倘若彦卿没有「打草惊蛇」，眼前恐怕还毫无头绪呢。
If Yanqing hadn't scared them off, we would not have many clues.
不过，越是准备周详的计划，一旦被打乱，作出反应的时间也就越长。步离人中如果还有想赌一把，坚持原计划出逃的，一定会回到这里确认迴星港的情况。

However, the more well-prepared a plan is, the longer it takes to adjust when it's disrupted. If any borisin wants to stick to the original plan despite the risks, they'll surely come back to Stargazer Navalia to check the situation.
你是说迴星港里此刻就有步离人？
Are you suggesting that there are borisin here at Stargazer Navalia, right now?
你难道没有发觉，这片自动运行的区域里，今日的人有些多的不太寻常？
This is an automated area, so don't you think that there are a bit too many people here today?
首先是那两个天舶司职员。打从我们来到这里，他们就在悄悄观察我们。
First, look at those two Sky-Faring Commission staff members. They've been observing us in secret since we arrived here.
接下来是那边的云骑士兵，如果是来巡逻的，那就是没有遵守两人一组的执勤规制。
Then, there's a Cloud Knight soldier over there. Perhaps he's here for patrol, but each patrol team must consist of two members, and obviously, he's not following the rules.
最后是那个穿着工造司服色的匠人，煞有介事地对着装置看个不停。
Lastly, there's that craftsman wearing Artisanship Commission clothing. He's unusually focused on checking that device.
想好了目标的话，咱们就去探探底。
If you have a target in mind, let's go investigate.
你们是什么人，不知道迴星港已经被封锁了吗？
Who are you? Don't you know that Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown now?
唉，几个不请误入的游客嘛，咱们好好说话。
Hey, chill out. They're just a few lost tourists.
Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown now?
…迴星港是罗浮仙舟的造船港，如果天舶司要封锁港口，肯定是有公文通知吧？
...But Stargazer Navalia is the shipbuilding port of the Xianzhou Luofu. If the Sky-Faring Commission called for a lockdown, there should be official documents proving it, right?
公文？当然有了。云骑军得知有人潜入迴星港。
Official documents? Of course, there are. The Cloud Knights are aware that some people have infiltrated this port.
…哦，合情合理，所以你们现在是排查步离人？
...That makes perfect sense. So, you're now investigating the borisin?
我们收到了上级指示，为了避免无关人等干扰云骑检查，我们特地将这里封锁了起来，请你们理解我们的工作。
Yeah, we've received orders from the higher-ups, so we've blocked off this area to prevent any interference with our inspection. Thank you for your understanding.
我们收到了上级指示，为了避免无关人等干扰云骑检查，我们特地将这里封锁了起来，请你们理解我们的工作。
Yeah, we've received orders from the higher-ups, so we've blocked off this area to prevent any interference with our inspection. Thank you for your understanding.
唉…啊！彦卿骁卫！还有飞霄将军？
Ahh... Ah! Lieutenant Yanqing! And General Feixiao?
云骑大哥，你知道步离人越狱的事情了吧？
You're aware of the borisin prison break, right?
接到消息了，我会时刻保持警惕！
Yeah, I've received the news, and I'll be on the alert!
根据我的观察，你一直在盯着竞锋舰的方向，所以你发现了什么状况吗？
Looks like you've been keeping an eye on the Skysplitter. Have you noticed anything unusual?
竞锋舰一切如常，没有特别的状况！
No, everything is normal on the ship. Nothing out of the ordinary!
这地方可不是云骑执勤的位置吧？
This is not a location for a Cloud Knight on guard duty, is it?
哦，这个地方视野不错，你是来这里观察竞锋舰的吧？
Well, this spot offers a great view. Are you here to keep an eye on the Skysplitter?
你看了这么久的竞锋舰，发现了什么吗？
You've been observing the Skysplitter for a while. Have you noticed anything?
…只是在这里看着舰船的飞行轨迹确实没什么意思，要是能上船，我最想看的还是彦卿大人的守擂比赛……
...Honestly, just watching the ship from here isn't too thrilling. I wish I could go on board and witness Lieutenant Yanqing's contests...
说到这个，彦卿大人，您不是应该在竞锋舰上吗？现在不回到竞锋舰上没关系吗？
Speaking of which, Lieutenant Yanqing, aren't you supposed to be on the Skysplitter? Is it alright for you to be here instead?
谢谢你的支持，我有更重要的事情要去做。
Thank you for your concern, but I have more pressing matters to attend to.
士兵，你有任务在身，给我集中精神！
You're on duty, soldier. Stay focused!
喂，你们三位，如果不是官方人员，请不要在迴星港里随便转悠。啊…是彦卿骁卫。
Hey, you there! Please refrain from wandering around Stargazer Navalia if you're not... Oh, it's you, Lieutenant Yanqing.
Is Stargazer Navalia on lockdown now?
封锁倒也没封锁…只是我在这儿排查一个古怪的问题。
No, not at all... Actually, I'm here to address a peculiar issue.
你们不也在这儿乱逛吗？
Aren't you wandering around here as well?
我是官方人员，被派来专门来排查一个古怪的问题。
I'm an official staff member assigned to investigate a peculiar issue.
没错，有计划外的星槎被制造了出来，全都从迴星港的这个码头里产出。是流水线的产能规划又出错了吗？
Yeah, we've had some unscheduled starskiffs being constructed at this dock in Stargazer Navalia. Could there have been an error in the production planning for the assembly line?
这可太奇怪了，演武仪典之前生产的星槎都应该做好规划了啊。
This is just weird. I thought all the pending starskiffs from before the Wardance had been scheduled already.
实在不好意思，我必须先专注眼前的工作了。有问题稍后再谈。
I'm sorry, but I need to focus on my work right now. If you have any questions, we can discuss them later.
实在不好意思，我必须先专注眼前的工作了。有问题稍后再谈。
I'm sorry, but I need to focus on my work right now. If you have any questions, we can discuss them later.
有一伙步离人假扮身份重新回到了迴星港，答案已经显而易见了——
So, it seems that some borisin have returned to Stargazer Navalia in disguise. The answer seems quite obvious...
The staff members from the Sky-Faring Commission.
应该是可疑的云骑士兵。
那个士兵应该只是有些走神，我认为最可疑的应该是天舶司职员。
I believe he was just slacking off. In my opinion, the staff members from the Sky-Faring Commission appear more suspicious.
The craftsman from the Artisanship Commission.
我看这个人反而是为排查星槎而来的。最可疑的应该是天舶司职员。
I think he's genuinely here to investigate the starskiffs, as he claimed. In my opinion, the staff members from the Sky-Faring Commission are the most suspicious.
你还记得我说过云骑军封锁了消息，并尽量使一切维持原状吗？这意味着，他们不应该封锁迴星港。
Remember when I mentioned that the Cloud Knights blocked all relevant news, to make it seem as if nothing happened? Stargazer Navalia is not under lockdown.
而那两位职员却以「迴星港封锁」为理由劝我们离开，这与云骑军原定的计划相悖。
But on the contrary, those staff members used "Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown" as an excuse to persuade us to leave. This contradicts the Cloud Knights' plans.
拙劣的伪装到此为止了，就算他们想要隐瞒也不可能逃脱。
Their flimsy disguise has been exposed. Even if they try to hide, there's no way they can escape us.
你们几位怎么还在这儿？我刚才说了，迴星港已经被封锁了。
Why are you still here? As I said, Stargazer Navalia is on lockdown now.
我可从未下过这样的命令。
No, I never issued such an order.
你们也许从未在战场上见过我，但一定听过我的名字。不过是谁准许你用问题来回答问题了！告诉我——
Perhaps you haven't met me on the battlefield, but I'm certain you've heard my name. Now, I'm asking you a question, so answer me! Tell me...
你们还有多少同伙？原定计划打算在何处接应呼雷？
How many more of your comrades are here? Where were you planning to meet Hoolay?
那个女人…是曜青的将军！你在等什么，动手！
This woman... She's the general of the Yaoqing! What are you still waiting for!? Attack her!
我还有些问题没有得到回答。
曾经身为战奴的你，应该很熟悉我们这些都蓝子裔……
You were our war slave, so you should know us descendants of Duran...
尽管试试吧，尽管用你知道的那些手段逼我开口。我能回答你的…永远只有鲜血和爪牙。
You want me to talk? Fine, try whatever you want, but I assure you, you won't get anything from me... only fangs and blood.
如果那样做，我和你们也就别无二致了。
If I were to do that, I wouldn't be any different from you.
我是刺入狼心的锋镝，我赐你速死。
I am the arrow that pierces the wolf's heart. I grant you a swift death.
…这正合我意。离群的狼，早就做好了无法返回故乡的准备。
...That's exactly what I desire. Wolves that leave the pack are prepared for the fate of never returning home.
可惜，你没能抓住我的伙伴…他会向伙伴们示警——
But sadly, you didn't catch my partner... He will alert them...
在你阖眼之前，你应该知道，是我允许他逃走。你的伙伴会带着云骑找到呼雷的下落。
Before you close your eyes, you should know that I allowed him to escape, because he will lead the Cloud Knights to Hoolay's hideout.
这就是「网开一面」么…？放任步离人逃走，然后顺着他的路线追猎。
Is this how you... "leave one side open"...? You let that borisin escape so you could track him.
这是步离人最常用的狩猎战术。
This is the most common hunting tactic used by borisin.
我太了解这些孽物的手段了。他们总会留下逃生的道路，任由猎物仓惶离开。随后便是近乎戏耍般的逐杀追猎，在牺牲者们的惨状中，步离人总会获得莫大的满足……

I know the methods of these abominations all too well. They always leave an escape route for their prey, allowing them to flee in fear. Then they chase them like it's a game. Borisin get great satisfaction from the last struggles of their victims...
这些都是您亲眼见证的事情吗？那个家伙把你称为…「战奴」，所以您到底经历了什么啊？
Have you witnessed these things firsthand? That guy called you a... war slave... What exactly have you experienced?
一段模糊的，几乎快记不清的过去罢了。在许久以前，我…曾是行走在他们中的一员。
Well, just a hazy past that I can barely recollect. Long ago... I was one of them.
步离人这三个字，只能用来称呼那些狼头恩主。我是一个出生在「沦陷地」的狐人……
The word "borisin" was only used to refer to those wolf masters. I'm a foxian who was born in one of the "fallen territories"...
在狼群眼中，我们只是流淌着狐血的耗材，是战场冲锋时用来拖住仙舟攻势的炮灰。
In their eyes, we're mere consumables, cannon fodder used to slow down Xianzhou attacks on the battlefield.
不是所有狐人都能有幸出生在仙舟疆域中的…我成长在步离人所放牧的世界。曜青称那些地方为「沦陷地」。
Not all foxians are lucky enough to be born on a Xianzhou ship... I grew up in one of the worlds where borisin roam, known as the "fallen territories" by the people of the Yaoqing.
对狼头恩主们而言，狐人只是他们的财产…是战场冲锋时用来拖住仙舟攻势的炮灰。
To the wolf masters, foxians are nothing but property, cannon fodder used to slow down the Xianzhou attacks on the battlefield.
但将军…活下来了，不但如此，还成为了曜青的将军！如果有机会，我很想听听将军过去的故事。
But you... survived. And not only that, you became the general of the Yaoqing! If I get the chance, I'd love to hear stories of your past, General.
说到这个，你可提醒我了，眼下不是讲故事的时候。貊泽，迴星港这边已经放出了「警告」，你这边情况如何？
Speaking of stories, you've reminded me that now is not the time for them. Moze, we've sent the "warning" from Stargazer Navalia. What's the situation on your end?
我找到了他们的位置，椒丘正在与呼雷周旋，他…示意我不要露面。
I've found them. Jiaoqiu is trying to stall Hoolay, and he signaled me... to not reveal myself.
相信椒丘的判断，继续监视，我们马上就来。
Trust his judgment, and keep watching. We'll be right there.
放走诱饵，迴星港的示警一定会断去呼雷袭击此处的可能。接着他又该如何应对呢？
I believe the "warning" we sent will stop Hoolay from attacking Stargazer Navalia. What will he do next?
狩猎还没结束。椒丘，你可一定要平安无事啊……
The hunt is not over yet. Stay safe, Jiaoqiu...
演武仪典召开前一个时辰\n\n长乐天
One dual-hour before the Wardance convenes\n\nExalting Sanctum
椒丘，快找个医用机巧给那个孩子施针！快！
Jiaoqiu! Find a medical ingenium and give that kid a shot! Hurry!
我…我明白了，前线怎么样了？
I... I see. How is the front line?
步离人的兽舰已经在方壶上登陆了…要不了多久，这儿也会被攻破。
The borisin beast ships have already landed on the Fanghu... It won't be long before this place is overrun as well.
月御将军呢…她有消息吗？我是她的医士，这时候我应该留在她的身边。
What about General Yueyu... Any news from her? I'm her healer. I should stay by her side at a time like this.
将军让我转告你，她不回来了，她必须守住「瞰云镜」。
She asked me to tell you that she's not coming back. She must protect the Cloudpeer Telescope.
将军让你…救救那个孩子，她像疯了一样战斗，只为了把我们所有人都带回这里！
General asks you to... to save that kid. The girl fought desperately just to bring us all back here alive!
我从没见过那样可怕的战斗方式…她的身体…我感觉她整个人似乎都撑开了…就像……
I've never seen such a brutal fighting style... Her body... it's like she was split open... just like...
伤者的血压快见底了。听见了没有，椒丘！
Her blood pressure is dropping. Do you hear me, Jiaoqiu?
我听得很清楚…准备一支「颠踬散」。我们必须现在开始手术！
Loud and clear... Get me some Tumbledust! We've got to start the operation right now!
我…一定会把她带回来的！
I... I will bring her back!
…这就是你一心想从我身上破解秘密的原因？你能听见我说话吗，椒丘？
...Is that why you're so determined to learn my secrets? Do you hear me, Jiaoqiu?
我听见了，我听得很清楚。
在三十年前方壶仙舟的那场大战中，她拯救了你们所有人，但却在濒死的时刻意外察觉到了体内流淌着步离血脉。
So, she saved you all in that great battle on the Xianzhou Fanghu three decades ago, but to your surprise, you discovered her borisin bloodline while she was at death's door.
末度告诉我，她是从蚀月猎群里逃离的战奴。何等奇妙的因果，她竟和我同出于一个部落。
Mok Tok told me that she was a war slave who escaped from the Eclipse Pack. What a twist of fate. Turns out she's from the same clan as I am.
原来如此，难怪那个狐人战斗时所展现的力量，果断和残忍…如此惊人！那全是拜她的步离血脉所赐。杂种…可憎的杂种将军。
Now I understand. No wonder she displayed... such astounding power, determination, and cruelty in battle...! Turns out it's all because of her borisin bloodline. Mutt... despicable mutt.
而她用自己血脉中的馈赠摧毁了步离人。
And she used the gift of her bloodline to destroy the borisin.
「月狂」，狼之赐福，狐之诅咒。对于步离人来说，在战斗中被月狂撕裂身体，兽化变形…是为无上喜乐。但对你们这些自愈力有限的狐人来说，它是死路一条。

Moon Rage, a blessing for wolves, and a curse for foxes. For borisin, to have their bodies torn apart by Moon Rage and transform into a beast... is the ultimate joy, but for you foxians with poor regenerative abilities, it means certain death.
伴随涌上心头的燃烧怒血，这位狐人将军敌我不分，鏖战不休，身躯上绽开的伤痕不是来自敌人的武器，而是她不能承受的巨大力量。终有一日，她将作为怪物，四分五裂地死去。

With the burning fury in her heart, that foxian general will eventually lose her sanity and indulge in endless bloodshed. The scars on her body will not be caused by enemy weapons, but by the immense power she can't withstand. One day, she will be torn apart and die as a monster.
而为了回报她的救命之恩，你打算倾尽所能，去挑战这个无法解开的谜题。
And in return for her saving your life, you intend to give everything to solve this impossible puzzle.
呼雷…你知道身为医士，最可悲的事情是什么吗？
Hoolay... do you know the saddest thing about being a healer?
一直以来，我费尽毕生所学，想从你这样的怪物手中夺回那些赴死的生命。我精疲力尽地瘫坐下来、双手颤抖，我在想我所做的一切都是有意义的……

All this time, I've devoted my life to bringing back those who sacrificed their lives to monsters like you. I exhausted myself, and my hands trembled, but I believed everything I did was meaningful...
可他们又再一次奔向战场。于是，我听到了他们的死讯。他们死在你们的爪牙之下，在星槎坠毁的火焰里，在帝弓的光矢中……
But once again, they rushed into battle, and then I heard of their deaths. They died under your claws, in your jaws, amidst the flames of crashing starskiffs, and under the Lux Arrow of Reignbow...
我像是个徒劳的白痴，从名为死亡的鼎镬中，捞起一尾名叫生命的鱼——看着它一个挣扎，又再次跳进了滚沸的汤汁里。
Like a useless idiot, I saved a fish named "Life" out of the cauldron called "Death," only to watch it struggle and dive back into the boiling broth.
我问自己，是什么让他们在伤愈后，又不顾一切地奔赴死地？为什么不珍惜得来不易的生命？这让我感到迷茫、空虚……
So I asked myself, why were they so eager to run toward their death after they had recovered from their wounds? Why wouldn't they value their hard-won life? All the doubts left me feeling lost...
呵呵…我在你身上嗅到了深入骨髓的绝望。
Heh... I can smell your desperation, all the way down to your bone marrow.
最后，我明白了，离去亦有「价值」。他们将离去的重量，压在了我们这些活人的心上，给了我们更多的力量。他们用死亡这枚硬币，换回了更多……

Eventually, I realized that their deaths held value. They placed the weight of their sacrifice on the living, granting us strength. With a coin forged by their deaths, they exchanged something more in return...
这就是如今我所做的一切，紧紧跟在你的身边，只为用我的双眼见证一个结果：你的死亡……
Everything I'm doing now, following you so closely, is for just one reason: Witnessing your death with my own two eyes...
你的死亡，亦有价值。它将换来演武仪典的平安；还有被我治愈的飞霄。
Even your death has value. It will pave the way for a peaceful Wardance and a fully cured Feixiao.
哼，你可悲的脑袋里转动的念头，真是不出所料。
Hmph, the thoughts in your pathetic head are hardly surprising.
不错，因为没有谁比步离人更清楚「死亡」所能带来的价值。而像你这样见惯死亡的医士，简单的恐惧也吓阻不了你。
Yes, I did. As borisin, we understand the value of "death" more than anyone. And as a healer who has witnessed so much death, you won't be swayed by fear.
真遗憾。在听完这个故事的刹那，我心中竟然升起了一丝对你的敬意。
What a shame. What a shame. Your story actually sparked a trace of respect for you in my heart.
你那颗流淌着毒血的心脏里…也会升起「尊重」这种情感吗？
Can you even feel "respect"... with your corrupted heart?
当然，因为我恍惚嗅到了同类的味道。可惜，你终究只是一条软弱无力的狐狸。
Of course, because I caught a whiff of my own kind in you. Unfortunately, in the end, you're still just a weak fox.
如同「狼之古训」所说：赐狼以穷途，令其寻得前路。饲狼以死数，令其食能果腹。苟且偷安，无处得生；抵死鏖杀，万世长存。

As the Wolf's Creed goes: Gift the wolf a dead end, where new paths arise. Raise him to a doomed fate, where satiation lies. The cowards, in forgotten corners, meet their unworthy demise. Yet the valorous, in brutal battles, embrace their eternal prize...
这也是我暂时留着你的原因，我会向你展示步离人对仇敌的最大敬意：
That's why I'm keeping you alive for now. I want to show you how borisin truly respect their enemies.
吞噬你们的血肉，滋养我们的筋骨，粉碎你们的愿景，开辟我们的猎途；要让你们的死魂灵好好见证，未来属于我！
We will consume your flesh and blood, nourishing our own. We will crush your hopes and dreams, clearing a path for our hunt! Your feeble souls will witness a new future, a future that belongs to me!
大人！负责接应的同胞发来了消息，迴星港的布置被人发现，我们现在必须立刻动身了！
My Lord! We've received a message. Our arrangement at Stargazer Navalia has been discovered. We must act quickly!
这一切也并没有出乎我的意料。
That doesn't surprise me at all.
是竞锋舰。举行演武仪典的星船要起航了。该死，到时候天舶司会清空航路！我们的星槎要是想逃走，一定会被发现的。
It's the Skysplitter. The ship that the Wardance will be held on is about to set off! The Sky-Faring Commission will clear the air routes! And if our starskiffs try to escape, we'll be spotted.
冷静，末度！看看你现在的样子，东躲西藏，提心吊胆…哪里还有半点步离人的尊严！
Calm down, Mok Tok! Look at you now, hiding and fearful... Where is your borisin dignity?
我说过，为了能让您顺利回归，我不需要什么尊严！只要您能返回步离人的猎群，一切就还有希望！
As I said, I'd sacrifice my dignity for your return! As long as you can come back to the borisin packs, there's still hope!
希望？步离人早就遗忘了「狼之古训」！软弱的野兽将希望寄托于强者庇护，强大的野兽则会自己挣杀出一条血路！
Hope? The borisin have forgotten the Wolf's Creed! Weak creatures put their hope in the strong, but the strong fight their way out!
如今的你们只想要迎回「呼雷」，而不是决出新主，已经证明了整个族群的没落。而那个操纵你们前来营救我的先知，不过是个试图利用都蓝血裔的骗子！
Bringing me back instead of choosing a new master only proves the decline of our pack. And as for the prophet who manipulated you into saving me, she's just a liar trying to use Duran's offspring!
末度，让我来告诉你步离人如何崛起！我们绝不会像老鼠一样躲藏在仙舟的街巷间，你应当是露出獠牙的饿狼，行走在满是羔羊的牧群。
Mok Tok, let me tell you how the borisin will rise to power! We won't hide like rats in the streets of the Xianzhou! We will be ravenous wolves, walking amidst a herd of lambs with our fangs bared.
战首大人，我们的狼群不在这里！我们不能贸然开战！
But Great Warhead, our packs are not here! We can't go to war like this!
狼群不在这里？不，我所行之处，皆为狼群！
Our packs are not here? Wherever I go, everyone is the pack!
末度，我们是位居食物链顶端的强者。
Mok Tok, we're the apex predators at the top of the hierarchy.
身为狼，我们是恐惧的制造者，而不是恐惧的奴隶。如果你无法看见道路，我将成为高悬的赤月，为你们照亮道路的所在——
As wolves, we create fear. We don't become servants to it. If you're blind to the path, I will be the crimson moon that lights the way for you.
和所有的弟兄们一起分享我的赤血。用它来感染狐人，用它来制造恐惧！
Share my crimson blood with our brethren! Use it to infect those foxians and strike fear into their hearts!
藏形匿影的猴子…给我出来！
Now, you devious monkey... Come out and face me!
他走不了，你也一样。曜青的猴子，你来的正是时候。告诉你们的将军……
No, he can't run, and neither can you. You've come at the right time, monkey of the Yaoqing. Tell your general...
告诉她，我将从这儿开始，杀穿罗浮仙舟。从现在开始，分享我狼血的子嗣会在每一处闹市中奔逐狩猎，以妖弓的信众为食。

Tell her, that I will unleash a massacre here, drowning the Xianzhou Luofu in blood. From this moment on, wolves bearing my blood will hunt on every street, feasting on the followers of that Devilish Archer.
狼子们，随我一同，在猎物之间高视阔步！
Follow me, my cubs! We shall stride among the prey!
赐狼以穷途，令其寻得前路。饲狼以死数，令其食能果腹。苟且偷安，无处得生；抵死鏖杀，万世长存……

Gift the wolf a dead end, where new paths arise. Raise him to a doomed fate, where satiation lies. The cowards in forgotten corners, meet their unworthy demise. Yet the valorous, in brutal battles, embrace their eternal prize...
听啊，这炮声隆隆——唤起了我心底所有关于战场的回忆……
Do you hear that? The rumble of the cannons... it brings back all the memories of past battles within me...
我的回归将带回「狼之古训」，我将以我自己的方式挽救堕落的族群，让它重焕荣光！
My return will bring back the Wolf's Creed. In my own way, I shall save our weakened pack and restore it to its former glory!
快撤！将消息带给末度大人！
Run! Tell Lord Mok Tok about this!
The Wardance is about to commence\n\nSkysplitter
呜哇，竞锋舰上的礼炮声好响啊！这就是「演武仪典」的气氛吗，感觉耳朵都要震聋了。
Wow! The Skysplitter's gun salute is really loud! So this is what the Wardance is actually like? I feel like my eardrums are going to burst.
场面不大，又怎么能吸引别人前来观看呢。三月，你没忘记自己是来做什么的吧？
Well, how could they expect to attract people to come and watch if they didn't make a huge spectacle? March, you haven't forgotten what you came to do, have you?
What... did I come to do?
我是谁？我在哪？我在这儿做什么？
Who am I? Where am I? What am I doing here?
看看周围，想起什么来了吗？
Look around you, do you remember anything?
啊，从天而降砸在泰科铵大球馆的回忆又涌了上来，我们…是来比赛的吧。
Ah, memories of falling from the sky into Taikiyan Stadium have come flooding back to me. We... came to compete, didn't we?
太好了太好了，你的脑袋终于恢复记忆了，我也放下了高高举起的「老铁」。
Great, you've finally gotten your memory back, and I can put down Old Mettle.
I am here to be the ringmaster on behalf of Master Yanqing!
我代表罗浮仙舟，前来打败挑战者！
As a representative of the Xianzhou Luofu, I will defeat all challengers!
就是这股气势…很有精神嘛！三月，你要是能双腿打直了别发抖，那就看起来更有说服力了。
That's the spirit, sounds like you're all fired up! If you could just keep your legs from shaking so much, it would be more convincing, March.
我是来确保演武仪典安全的！
I am here to ensure the safety of the Wardance!
那是爷爷交托给我的任务，至于你，安心守住擂台就好。
That was the mission my grandfather entrusted to me. You just relax and keep guard over the ring.
俗话说得好，「有事弟子服其劳」。记住喽，你是以罗浮剑士的身份，代替你那个不肖的彦卿师父前来守擂的。
As the saying goes, "The disciple takes the toil of their master." Remember, you are here under the identity of a Luofu swordmaster, taking the place of your no-good Master Yanqing as the ringmaster.
说起来，要是这一回台上的对手超级厉害，三两下就把我打趴了，那可怎么办呀…毕竟我只算得上剑术初学者。也不知当时哪来的信心，就这么答应了怀炎将军。

But what am I supposed to do if my opponent for this round is super talented and just wipes the floor with me in seconds? I'm still a beginner in swordplay! I don't know where I got the confidence when I agreed to help General Huaiyan.
嗨呀，不用担心。你要是趴下了，就让为师来会会你的对手咯。只是这么一来，罗浮仙舟的光彩可就全都归朱明啦，哈哈哈哈哈……

Come on, there's no need to worry about that. If you are defeated, then your opponent shall have to answer to me! Although, if that happens, the honor and the glory of the Xianzhou Luofu shall all be taken by the Zhuming, hahaha...
拜托了，云璃师父，我都快要上场了，你就给我点信心吧！
Master Yunli, please, I'm about to compete! Can you say something that will give me a little confidence?
三月，想一想你们列车无名客一路旅行经历的大风大浪！你一定见识过比演武对手可怕的多的敌人吧？这么一想是不是轻松多了？

March. Think about the great storms that you Nameless of the Express have weathered along your many journeys. There's no doubt that you have faced far more terrifying enemies than your opponents here today, right? Don't you feel a lot more relaxed looking at it that way?
云璃师父，我还是退赛吧。
Master Yunli, I think I should drop out of the contest.
压力好大，我感觉自己肚子隐隐作痛，要不…我还是退赛吧？
There's so much pressure, my stomach is really hurting. Maybe... I should just drop out of the contest?
你答应了爷爷还想跑？快走！
You made a promise to my grandfather and now you want to run away? Get out there, now!
要不，还是把彦卿叫回来吧！
Why don't we call Yanqing back?
要不要把彦卿师父给叫回来？这当师父的急流勇退…让弟子垫上刀头，这叫哪门子事啊。
Why don't we call Master Yanqing back? What kind of master would retire at the height of their career and leave their disciple to fight in their place?
三月，师父退赛，这可是你出人头地的好机会啊。
March. Your master has dropped out of the contest. This is a great opportunity for you to stick your neck out!
我看是师父给我一个人头落地的好机会吧！
Stick my neck out and get my head chopped off, you mean!
哪儿来得这么多抱怨，你答应了爷爷还想跑？快走！
What is all of this complaining about? You made a promise to my grandfather and now you want to run away? Get out there, now!
这些日子我苦练剑术，也该上场证明一下自己了。咱们走。
I've trained hard in the art of swordplay over these few days. It's time for me to get in the ring and prove myself. Let's go.
您好，请问有什么我可以帮到您吗？
Hello, is there anything I can help you with?
你好，我有些问题需要咨询！
Hello, I have some questions I'd like to ask you!
请问您是受邀参加比赛的选手，还是观赛的观众呢？
May I ask, are you an invited contestant, or are you a spectator?
那在此先预祝您宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜。
Then may your blade be sharp and your victory glorious!
我其实是看比赛的观众…
喂喂，还没上场就打退堂鼓了吗？你好，我们俩都是演武仪典的参赛选手。
Hey! Are you trying to back out before you even hit the arena? Hello, we are both Wardance competitors.
那就请沿着通道继续前进，会到达安检处，那里的工作人员会指引你们前往选手大厅的。
Then please continue along this passageway. You will come to a security checkpoint, and the staff there will guide you to the contestants' hall.
请沿着通道继续前进，会到达安检处，那里的工作人员会指引你们前往选手大厅的。
Please continue along this passageway. You will come to a security checkpoint, and the staff there will guide you to the contestants' hall.
这就是竞锋舰吗？虽然执勤的时候在地面上看还是挺气派的……
So this is the Skysplitter? It looked quite impressive from the ground where I was on duty, but...
但今天真的登舰了，感觉没有我想象中的…那么大？
But now that I'm on board, it just doesn't seem as... big as I imagined?
哦豁，你想象中的「气派的竞锋舰」是什么样子的呢？那么大？还是那么大？
Oh? And how big did you imagine this "impressive Skysplitter" to be? This big? This big, maybe?
我想想…嗯，要是从这里去往观众席，得搭星槎换乘，坐上两个时辰吧！不然不够气派啊！
Let me think... Hmm. I'd expect at least a four-hour journey by starskiff to the spectator seating from here. Otherwise it's simply not impressive enough!
那不就是单纯很大而已吗？
Wouldn't that be too big for no good reason?
大就是好，多就是美！我看这竞锋舰还是不够大，炮台也不够多！
The bigger, the better! If you ask me, the Skysplitter is nowhere near big enough and there are nowhere near enough cannons!
以前这艘舰船上的炮台还是蛮多的。
This warship used to have loads of cannons.
你在想一些不切实际的东西。
You're daydreaming about stuff that ain't gonna happen.
怎么了嘛，人还得是要有梦想的嘛！要我说啊，竞锋舰就是太小了！
What's wrong with that? People are supposed to dream big! If you ask me, the Skysplitter is far too small!
其实我也觉得这里有点小。
I kinda think this place is a bit cramped too.
远看这竞锋舰很小，登上一看，比想象的还要小。
The Skysplitter looks small from a distance, but it's even smaller than I imagined now that I'm on board.
你听听，这是我的同道中人。
Hear that? This person gets it!
主要是我想象中的竞锋舰是很大的，但是它和我想象的不太一样。
Either way, I thought that the Skysplitter would be absolutely huge, so it's not quite how I imagined it.
真的，这竞锋舰不够气派！
Seriously, the Skysplitter is nowhere near impressive enough!
听说这次演武仪典有一位从朱明仙舟来的剑士将要挑战彦卿骁卫，你觉得这两边打起来谁能赢？能不能理性分析一下？
I heard that a sword master from the Xianzhou Zhuming is going to challenge Lieutenant Yanqing at this Wardance. Who do you think will win in the fight? Can you give me your analysis?
那肯定是彦卿骁卫赢啊！他的剑术已臻化境，我有幸见过他在星槎海飞剑擒凶的英姿，三招两式就能……

Lieutenant Yanqing, obviously! His swordsmanship is on a whole other level! I was fortunate enough to see him in person using his Flying Swords to capture a criminal in Starskiff Haven. I reckon just a few swift strikes and...
我的天，这不是来自朱明仙舟的选手云璃小姐吗！
Goodness! Isn't that the Xianzhou Zhuming's contestant, Miss Yunli?
…三招两式就能被朱明的剑士打趴下！
...Just a few swift strikes and the Zhuming swordmaster will have him on his knees!
看到我鼻子上架着的眼镜了吗？
You see these glasses I have on?
这是我从湛蓝星那边买来的特产「定分镜」，只要盯着选手瞧，就能给对方的战斗力定个评级。
These Rating Glasses are a special souvenir I picked up from The Blue. If I just look at a contestant through them, they can give a combat power rating.
那你看看我，我的战斗力是多少？
Take a look at me, then. What is my combat power rating?
怎么可能，你再给我好好看看嘛！是不是满分也是5？
Impossible! Take a closer look! Is it scored out of five or something?
可怜的小三月，被机器的评分玩弄于股掌之间。别看了，快走吧！
Poor little March, being bullied by a mechanical scoring system... Don't pay them any mind, let's go!
别别别，别往我这儿看。万一看到个打击人的数字也别说出来哈。
No-no-no! Don't look at me! If you see some embarrassingly low score, then I don't want to hear it!
我已收到驭空大人的知会，特来接应二位。
I was informed of your arrival by Madam Yukong and came to greet you personally.
说起来，三月小姐要代彦卿骁卫守擂的事已经公示了。我刚才从选手大厅经过的时候，听见选手们正在议论纷纷，其中最多的问题就是——「三月七是谁？」

The news that you will be the ringmaster in place of Lieutenant Yanqing has been made public, Miss March. Just now, as I passed the contestants' hall, I overheard them all discussing this news. The most common question I heard was... "Who is March 7th?"
他们要是问起，三月小姐该如何自我介绍，您准备好了吗？
If they ask you this, how will you introduce yourself? Do you have something prepared?
三月七，星穹列车的美少女。
March 7th, young beauty of the Astral Express.
三月七，一位来自星穹列车的美少女。
March 7th, a young beauty from the Astral Express!
好啊，在别人问你的时候你不妨就这么大声说出来。
Alright! When people ask you, you might as well tell them this loud and clear.
我是彦卿骁卫座下弟子…这么一想也算是景元将军的徒孙。如此说来，我来头还挺不小的！
I am a disciple of Lieutenant Yanqing... That means that I'm also technically a grand-disciple of General Jing Yuan. When you put it like that, I'm actually a pretty big deal!
可恶，竟然把为师的名头抛到了一边…气死我了。
Ugh! You completely left my name out... How rude!
至少下一次虚张声势的时候，底气一定要足。
Next time you try to bluff like that, at least make it convincing.
失败者不配问我的名字。
Losers have no right to ask my name.
哼，失败者不配知道本姑娘的名字。
Hmph. Losers have no right to know my great name!
这是什么反派登场台词吗？
Is this some kind of villain entrance line?
哈哈哈哈，看来二位还是挺轻松的，临危受命能有这样的状态可不容易。
Hahaha, I see you are both quite relaxed! Impressive, given the imminent danger you face!
演武仪典这边早就登记过云璃小姐的选手信息了。三月七小姐则是临时入选这场比赛，天舶司已经为你准备好相关的手续了。

Miss Yunli's contestant information was registered for the Wardance a long time ago. However, as a last-minute entry, the Sky-Faring Commission has taken care of the necessary procedures for you, Miss March 7th.
两位请先沿着这条路上去，选手大厅就在前方。
Please follow this path. The contestant hall is just up ahead.
看来这就是选手大厅了。
So, this is the contestant hall.
三月，在「演武仪典」开始前，让为师再给你上一课。
March, before the Wardance begins, allow me to give you one more lesson.
你知道吗，爷爷常对我说，物肖主人形。一个人的武器会反映出他的习惯和性格。
My grandfather always told me that "a weapon mimics its master." That means that a person's weapon will reflect their habits and personality.
你见过我挥动我那把{RUBY_B#大剑}「老铁」{RUBY_E#}的样子吧？说说看，你观察到什么了？
You've seen me wield {RUBY_B#greatsword}Old Mettle{RUBY_E#} before, haven't you? Tell me, what did you observe from that?
That Master Yunli is very strong.
云璃师父的「老铁」看着比人都高，能挥动这样的武器，显然应该有一身怪力吧？
Master Yunli's Old Mettle is taller than a person. Being able to wield a weapon like that must mean that you have ridiculous strength, right?
Master Yunli has a fiery temperament.
挥舞这么巨大的武器…云璃师傅比起策略更喜欢压倒性的暴力呢。
Waving around such a giant weapon... Master Yunli favors using overwhelming force over strategy.
你说的不错。我的战术向来追求「简单有效」，砍就完事了。
You are not wrong. My battle style has always been "simple and effective" — one cut and it's over.
云璃师父，审美水平有待提高。
Master Yunli doesn't have good taste.
云璃师傅的剑看起来又粗又重，审美水平有待提高啊。
Master Yunli's weapon looks so thick and heavy. I don't think you have very good taste.
我让你猜对手的战术风格，谁让你评价我的「老铁」了。
I asked you to make predictions about your opponent's combat style. No one asked you to criticize my dear Old Mettle!
观察对手使用的武器，判断他们擅长使用什么样的战术，又有哪些短板，这就是争取胜利的捷径。比如重量惊人的巨剑，显然不利久战，所以要选择拖延时间的战术。

Observing the weapon that your opponent uses, assessing what kind of battle skills they excel at and where their weaknesses lie is the key to victory in battle. A shockingly heavy sword like mine, for example, is obviously not suited for a long, drawn-out battle. So, it would be best to find a way to drag the battle out.
你怎么把自己的弱点告诉我了？
Why would you tell me your weakness?
这样才算是相对的公平较量嘛，毕竟为师也不想看你输在别人手里。
That's the only way to ensure that we have a fair fight, don't you think? I don't want to see you go and lose to someone else, after all.
眼下是个好机会，就趁现在试着学学如何评估你的对手吧，就用这个大厅里的人练练手。知己知彼，才能百战不殆。

Now is a perfect opportunity to learn how to evaluate your opponents. Let's use the people here in the contestants' hall to practice. If you know yourself and know your enemy, you will not lose in a hundred battles.
知己知彼…让我看看，现在问问谁好呢？
Know myself and know the enemy... Let's see, who should I ask first?
可恶，久闻彦卿骁卫的大名，来这儿也就是想见见他，和他切磋一下。
Argh! I came here because I wanted to meet the great Lieutenant Yanqing I've heard so much about and finally cross blades with him myself!
谁能想到他竟然收了徒弟，还让自己的徒弟代替他守擂。这在我们曜青可是不战而逃的奇耻大辱啊！
Who would have imagined that he would take a disciple and have her be the ringmaster in his place? This is no more than running away from a fight and is a great dishonor to the Yaoqing!
这个临时顶替他的三月七究竟是谁啊？
This last-minute replacement, March 7th, who exactly is she?
这位来自曜青的选手除去背后的长剑外，竟还随身携带了一柄电磁手弩。
The contestant from the Yaoqing, aside from the longsword on the back, also carried an electromagnetic hand crossbow.
（早、早知道能同时使用多种武器，我就带上自己的弓了。）
(If... if I'd known I could use multiple weapons at once, I'd have brought my bow.)
小姑娘，你好啊。你也是来参加守擂竞锋的吗？
Hello, Miss. Are you here to take part in the Ringmaster's Challenge, too?
没错，我就是那个三月七。
That's right. I'm the March 7th that everyone's been talking about.
放心吧，我只是个练习剑术时长半个月的剑士。
Don't worry, I'm a newbie swordmaster who's only been practicing the art of swordplay for half a month.
三月七，站在你面前的是…习练剑法超过两百年的云骑老战士！
March 7th... Standing before you is a seasoned Cloud Knight who has practiced swordsmanship for over two hundred years!
（扮猪吃老虎，让对方轻敌也算是一种战术吧？）
(Tricking the opponent into underestimating me is a valid tactic too, right?)
只是个练剑不久的小丫头…为何她也会被选上？
She's just a little girl that has only just started training... Why was she chosen as a contestant?
…今天穿的这身衣服还真是有些不习惯啊。
...I'm not used to wearing clothes like this at all...
对了，你就是代替彦卿骁卫登场的三月七选手！没错吧？
Oh! You're March 7th, the stand-in for Lieutenant Yanqing, correct?
如您所见，我是负责现场赛事采访的记者，没错。
As you can see, I am the journalist entrusted with interviewing contestants on-site.
天舶司作为主办方准备的还挺周全，有点意思。
I see the Sky-Faring Commission has really gone all out as the host. Interesting...
是啊，像这样的大场合里，一般少不了咱们这样的人。对了，趁着比赛开始，我能问些自己感兴趣的问题吗？
That's right! A big event like this just can't go ahead without a few of us running around. Since the competition is getting started, could I ask you some questions that are on my mind?
其实我是来知己知彼的……
I'm actually just here to learn about my opponents...
知己知彼，其中就包括了解自己对吧？接受采访就能很好了解自己。
Know yourself and know your enemy, right? If you accept my interview, you'll learn all about yourself!
首先是大家最关心的问题！彦卿骁卫没有出现在今天的「演武仪典」上。
First, the question that is on everyone's minds! Lieutenant Yanqing is not appearing in today's Wardance!
根据一些不可靠的小道消息，我听说彦卿骁卫现在身负重伤，请问这是真的吗？
This is just gossip from unreliable sources, but I hear that Lieutenant Yanqing is seriously injured. Is this true?
竟然是这样，请问他是为什么身负重伤呢？
If that's the case, could you please tell me how these serious injuries came about?
难道是…星槎的交通事故？真是危险！
You mean... a starskiff crash!? Why, how terrible!
剑术练习还真是不容易呢。
Swordplay is a truly difficult art!
There was a plot against him.
竟、竟然有这种事！这可是大新闻！噗，对不起，虽然不太礼貌，但…该不会是三月小姐干的吧。
I—I had no idea it was that serious! That's a huge scoop! *ahem* I do not wish to offend you with this question but... This was not your doing, was it, Miss March?
讨厌，真是敏锐的直觉啊。要不然我怎么会站在这儿呢。
Hmph, you saw right through me. Why else would I be standing here today?
He wanted his disciple to have this opportunity.
等等，师父为了让徒弟出人头地而身受重伤退赛？哦哦，如此爱惜弟子的师父可不多见啊。
Wait. Your master got himself seriously injured so he could withdraw from the competition and allow you to compete in his place? Wow, not many masters would show such devotion to their disciples.
Then what is the real reason?
He just doesn't want to compete.
没想到备受关注的天才少年也会有消极比赛的情况。
I never thought that such a talented young man that has garnered so much attention would have this kind of attitude!
怎么会这样？好吧，我也是能理解的。
竟、竟然有这种事！这可是大新闻！
Y—You're kidding!? That's a huge scoop!
你自己都说是小道消息了…
You yourself said that this was just gossip...
噗，对不起，我实在表现得不太专业。看来彦卿骁卫也有自己的任务在身啊。那就让我们期待三月小姐在赛场上一展英姿吧。
Ah, my apologies, this was very unprofessional of me. I see that Lieutenant Yanqing has his own affairs to tend to. Then let us look forward to seeing a valiant performance from you, Miss March!
演武仪典开始后，三月七小姐将会接受来自不同世界的剑术高手挑战，这其中是否有你比较期待的对手呢？
Once the Wardance begins, you will be challenged by master swordsmen from many different worlds, Miss March 7th. Are there any that you are looking forward to facing in particular?
May I ask who that might be?
哦哦哦！果然还得是万众瞩目的彦卿骁卫！
Ohhh! Of course it's the highly-anticipated Lieutenant Yanqing!
来自朱明仙舟的天才剑术少女云璃。很期待两位交手的盛况！
The talented swordswoman from the Xianzhou Zhuming, Miss Yunli! I look forward to a spectacular battle between you two!
三月七选手无视了在场所有人，扬言要挑战曜青仙舟的「天击将军」。
So March 7th is ignoring everyone around her and is declaring her will to challenge the Merlin's Claw of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.
素、素裳…那是谁？最近好像经常在网上看到过这个名字。
S—Sushang...? Who is that? I feel like that's a name I've seen a lot online recently...
呃，谁？请问…您说的这位是参赛选手吗？
Uhh, who? Are you... talking about a contestant here today?
三月七选手真是太狂…呃不，太自信了！
March 7th, you are quite arro—... I mean, extremely self-assured!
很感谢你接受采访，谢谢！
Thank you very much for accepting my interview. Much appreciated!
很感谢你接受采访，谢谢！
Thank you very much for accepting my interview. Much appreciated!
找我？嗯，你有什么想问的吗？
Uh... Was there something you wanted to ask me?
嗯…这只是普通的云骑阵刀。
Ah, yes... This is just a regular Cloud Knight devastator glaive.
非要问我的弱点的话…我一开口就会导致冷场，这算是弱点吗？
If I had to think of a weakness... Whenever I open my mouth, I make things awkward. Does that count as a weakness?
我明白了，三月七小姐、云璃小姐，我不是参赛选手，我是负责赛事安保的卫兵。
I understand what's going on, Miss March 7th and Miss Yunli. I'm actually not a contestant. I'm just here as a security guard.
Ah, so... that was a little bit awkward.
没事，我也经常不忍心看别人冷场而接话，结果导致尴尬的人变成自己。我已经习惯尴尬了，请不必在意。

It's alright. I can't bear to watch other people make things awkward, so I always try to keep the conversation going, but then I'm the one who ends up making things awkward. I've gotten used to it by now, so don't worry.
Have you noticed anything out of the ordinary?
没什么状况，可以说是风平「狼」静。
Nothing out of the ordinary. I guess you could say it's all fair winds and calm "wolves."
果然又冷场了…你们理解笑点了吗？「浪」和「狼」同音，令人忍俊不禁。
Another awkward pause, I knew it... Do you get it? "Wolves" sounds like "waves." It's a funny pun.
唉，开口就冷场，果然是我的弱点啊。
Ah, making things awkward really is my weakness...
来客还在陆续增加，请千万小心。
There are still many guests arriving here. Please be cautious!
我不是参赛选手，三月小姐请找别人聊天吧。
I am not a contestant Miss March. Please find someone else to talk to.
「演武仪典」的第一场赛事，就快开始了。三月你还好吧？
The first round of the Wardance is about to begin. Are you feeling okay, March?
我？我还好。一看到这么多人聚在一块，不知怎么突然安心了起来。
Me? I'm fine. As soon as I saw all these people gathered here, I suddenly felt weirdly relaxed.
These contestants all seem very reliable.
看着这些选手，我不知为何突然心不慌了。
Looking at these contestants, I suddenly feel a lot calmer for some reason...
好像…没有什么特别的感受？
I don't... really feel anything special?
你登台交手的时候，维持这样的平常心就好。
Just make sure to maintain this composure when you go in the ring.
我明白云璃师父让我「知己知彼」的用意了，没有刚才那么紧张了！
I understand why you wanted me to "know myself and know my enemy." I don't feel as nervous as I did before!
...So, do you want to go out and see the ring?
I want to keep learning about my opponents!
...Very well, go and get your intel.
I want to see what the ring looks like!
Woof woof, woof woof woof woof?
（尝试翻译一下谛听说了什么）
(Try to translate what Diting is saying...)
Woof woof woof woof, woof woof woof.
嗯嗯，「我不是参赛选手哦」，我明白啦。
Ah, it's saying "I'm not a contestant." Got it.
Woof woof, woof woof woof woof woof?
Looks like she's done with her questions...
你就别再继续知己知彼了，走吧，我想去看看擂场。
That's enough knowing the enemy for now. Come on, I want to see what the ring looks like.
或许是长时间和{NICKNAME}相处，让三月七产生了「可以问问长椅」的冲动。
Maybe it's because she spends so much time with {NICKNAME} that March 7th has the urge to interrogate the bench.
但是三月七并不是{NICKNAME}，三月七的精神状况也没有…那么糟糕。
But March 7th isn't {NICKNAME}, and her mental condition isn't... that bad.
嗯…有什么想问的，可以抓紧问，不然「三月七的理智」就要回来了。
Hmm...If there's anything you want to ask, hurry up or March 7th's rationality will come back.
现场有厉害的选手来过吗？
Did any skilled competitors show up?
长椅沉默不语，长椅见过太多厉害的人，其中就包括曾经的罗浮剑首。
The bench remains silent, having witnessed the presence of many a formidable figure, including the once-renowned Sword Champion of the Luofu.
三月七努力收起和长椅聊天的冲动，冲云璃点了点头。
March 7th tries very hard to contain her urge to talk to the bench and nods at Yunli.
长椅看着三月七的背影，流下了一滴汗。
The bench gazes at March 7th's back as a single bead of sweat drops from it.
你就别再继续知己知彼了，走吧，我想去看看擂场。
That's enough knowing the enemy for now. Come on, I want to see what the ring looks like.
先别着急去擂场，在这里了解一下你的对手吧。
There's no need to rush to the ring just yet, let's get to know your opponents around here first.
哇哦——！这就是从观众席望过去的感觉……
Wow! So this is what it's like from the spectator seats?
你看那边，那边就是我们要登上的擂台。
Look over there, that's the ring we'll be standing on.
云璃师父，我、我怎么好像又紧张起来了！我真的能做到吗？
Master Yunli, I—I'm getting nervous again! Can I really do this?
已经来不及让你紧张了，时间就要到了！
It's too late for nerves now. It's almost time!
一想到怀炎将军交代的使命，我的心就一直扑扑直跳，云璃师父，怎么办啊？
As soon as I think about the mission General Huaiyan gave me, my heart starts racing like crazy! What do I do, Master Yunli?
你的心要是不跳了那才麻烦。好好感受一下气氛，做好准备吧。
It's when it stops beating that we need to worry. Just take in the atmosphere and prepare yourself.
我得暂时离开，去舰上各处好好检查检查，这也是爷爷交代的使命呢。
I have to leave for a moment and do some inspections around the ship. This was also part of grandpa's orders.
唉，也不知道彦卿师父那边怎么样了……
I wonder how Master Yanqing is doing over there...
云璃师父，我感觉我还没有准备充分……
Master Yunli, I don't think I'm completely ready...
三月，准备永远是不充分的。
March, there is no such thing as completely ready.
The Wardance is about to begin...
咱们也算是托工作的福…
I guess we got pretty lucky with this job...
听说这次来了不少高手。
I hear there's quite a few masters here...
听说彦卿骁卫不会登场…
I hear Lieutenant Yanqing isn't competing anymore...
Let's go, it's time to enter the stadium!
云璃小姐，三月小姐！两位这边走！
Miss Yunli, Miss March! This way, please.
走，让我们去选手大厅转转。
Come, let's take a look around the contestant hall.
从这边走能够看到演武仪典的正式会场。
If we walk through here, we'll be able to see the Wardance's official venue.
报告将军，队伍已各就其位。天舶司对星槎航道的管制也全部完成。
General, report! The teams are in position, and the Sky-Faring Commission has taken control of the starskiff lanes.
让所有机巧鸟动起来，扫描每个打算出入港口的人。
Activate all cycranes and have them scan everyone coming in and out of the port.
时刻戒备，一旦有可疑的异动，要在最短的时间内对其进行压制，避免事态扩散。
Remain vigilant at all times. Any suspicious movements must be suppressed as quickly as possible before the situation gets out of hand.
All of you, get out of my way...
将军…我失手了。那条疯狗把我留在了这儿，是要向你……
General... I failed you. That mad dog left me here as...
是啊，我可是一直强忍着撕开他喉咙的冲动。毕竟，呼雷大人命我们留在此处，就是想看看……
That's right. I have been holding back the urge to slit his throat all this time. Well, Lord Hoolay ordered us to remain here, just to see...
你这位大名鼎鼎的天击将军，步离人的死敌，有没有能耐陪他一同进行…这场狩猎游戏？
...if you, the great Merlin's Claw, mortal enemy of the borisin, are able to join him in a little... hunting game...
狩猎可不是什么游戏。它是一场你死我活的战争，准备好受死了吧？孽物！
Hunting is not a game, it is a battle of life and death. Are you ready for your death, abomination!?
我…没能救回椒丘。呼雷比我想像得更狡诈，也更难对付。
I... wasn't able to save Jiaoqiu. Hoolay was more cunning and powerful than I imagined...
说说看，他打算怎么向我宣战…是单枪匹马的决斗？还是交换人质？
Tell me, how is he planning to declare this war against me...? With a one-on-one duel? Or with a hostage exchange, maybe?
呼雷计划袭击罗浮仙舟上的闹市。
Hoolay is planning on attacking the bustling streets of the Xianzhou Luofu.
这怎么可能？就算还有潜伏的步离人伪装者没能揪出来，呼雷这一行也不过数十人，他打算同时袭击罗浮仙舟的闹市？

Impossible! Even if there are still undercover borisin that we haven't sniffed out, Hoolay can't have more than a few dozen people. How is he planning on simultaneously attacking the streets of the Xianzhou Luofu?
这才是那家伙的底牌。呼雷的体内潜藏着步离人之间世代传承的寿瘟祸迹。我亲眼看见他将一个狐人转变成了步离狼卒……
He has an ace up his sleeve. Hoolay's body holds a plaguemark passed down through generations of borisin. I've seen him convert a foxian to a borisin wolftrooper with my own eyes...
这就是呼雷的「宣战」。他的血…能让狐人迅速扭曲变形、陷入疯狂，他将自己的血交给了手下，想在罗浮各处散布，掀起恐慌！

This is Hoolay's "declaration of war." His blood... It can cause foxians to rapidly transform and lose their minds. He has passed his blood to his minions and is planning to spread it across the Luofu and stir up panic!
也就是说到处都会发生袭击？
You're saying that there will be attacks all over?
想以一己之力「包围」我们…还真是个出人意料的怪物。
He wants to "encircle" us in one fell swoop... This beast is truly unpredictable.
立刻联系天舶司和云骑，启动通行禁令，要求所有的狐人闭门不出。
Contact the Sky-Faring Commission and the Cloud Knights right away! Have them enforce a traffic ban and order all foxians to remain indoors until further notice!
在看到敌人下战书的那一刻，就意味着对方已经开始行动了。
The moment you see your enemy's declaration of war, it means that they have already begun to take action.
可是…一旦呼雷制造的恐慌蔓延开来——
But... if Hoolay succeeds in getting this panic to spread—
还记得我告诉你们的吗？狩猎，应当考虑猎物的所想，而不是一味追逐猎物的踪迹。
Do you remember what I told you before? Hunting is about thinking in the same way as your prey, not just mindlessly chasing after them.
呼雷想要的就是罗浮上所有人陷入恐慌，他想看我们自乱阵脚，用有限的人力在罗浮每一寸土地上捕风捉影，寻找袭击到来的征兆，最后筋疲力尽。

What Hoolay wants is to see everyone on the Luofu descend into panic. He wants to see us lose our minds and waste our limited manpower scouring every inch of the Luofu for signs of an attack until we exhaust ourselves.
就像曜青人宴饮时爱玩的游戏：用几个碗盖住一样物什，移来换去，最后要你猜猜东西藏在哪个碗底下。

It's like that party game that the people of the Yaoqing love to play: They hide an object under one of several bowls, then move the bowls around, and have you guess which one the object is underneath.
但在我看来，这些都不过是障眼法——
The way I see it, this is all nothing more than misdirection...
无论呼雷做什么，都没法改变一个事实：他被困在了罗浮仙舟上。想要逃离此处，唯一的办法就是寻到船只。
No matter what Hoolay does, there is one truth that cannot be changed: He is trapped aboard the Xianzhou Luofu. The only way for him to escape is to find a ship.
And the only ship he is able to see is...
只剩下天空中的竞锋舰了？
So his only option is the Skysplitter?
眼下…他唯一能看到的船，只有天空中的竞锋舰了。
Right now... the only ship he'd be able to see is the Skysplitter.
对他而言，那上面有数不清的人质。那里会是最理想的去处，也是我们最后的战场。
In his eyes, that ship is full of countless hostages. That would be the best place for him to go. So that will also be our final battlefield.
可如果我们猜错了…他去了别处，又或者就像他所说的——他的爪牙会带上狼血在各处感染狐人掀起混乱…我们又该怎么办？
But, if we're wrong about this... If he goes somewhere else, or if he does as he said he would, and his minions infect the foxians everywhere with wolf blood... What do we do then?
难道我们要放弃那些「可能性更小」的地方吗？
Are we just supposed to abandon those "less likely" locations?
这就是你在剑术之外要学的另一课：「权衡」和「取舍」，我们永远在扪心自问却又永远无解的问题。
This is another lesson that you must learn outside of swordplay: Weighing your options and making a decision. There are always questions that we will ask ourselves but never be able to answer.
在做出决定前，我们要杀死内心的犹豫；在做出决定后，我们要和悔恨缠斗。
Before making a decision, we must destroy any hesitation that we are holding onto. Once we make a decision, we must fight off any regrets.
我们可能会选错方向，令无辜的战友白白牺牲；我们可能猜对了敌人的动向，却错估了对手的实力，折戟败北……

There is a chance that we will make the wrong decision and allow our allies to be sacrificed in vain. There is a chance that we will predict our enemy's movements correctly, yet underestimate their strength and be overwhelmed in battle...
但犹豫不前比犯错更加致命。无论如何，我们都要作出决定。
But being lost in hesitation and failing to take any action will always be more harmful than taking the wrong path. We must make a decision, no matter what.
各位，听我命令。我会坐镇星槎海，疏散人群，应对所有可能到来的袭击。我会倾全力迎战，确保地面的安全。
Everyone, listen up. I will personally take charge of Starskiff Haven, evacuate the people, and prepare for any possible attacks. I will do my best to ensure that things are safe on the ground.
{NICKNAME}，请你像建木重生时那样，助仙舟一臂之力。我要拜托你和貊泽在这儿搜寻椒丘的下落。
{NICKNAME}, please lend us your strength as you did when the Ambrosial Arbor was reborn. I need you and Moze to go in search of Jiaoqiu.
将军，请将竞锋舰的安全交给我！我本该出现在擂台上，现在我也必须重新回到竞锋舰上去。
General, please entrust me with the safety of the Skysplitter! I was originally meant to participate in the tournament, so now it is only right that I return to the Skysplitter.
如果呼雷袭击了竞锋舰…彦卿骁卫，请你务必尽力困住他，直到我赶来为止。
If Hoolay does come to attack the Skysplitter... Lieutenant Yanqing, I need you to hold him there until I am able to arrive.
将军应当对我有信心。若他敢登上竞锋舰，彦卿以手中之剑起誓，绝不让他逃离！
Please rest assured, General. If he dares step foot on the Skysplitter, I, Yanqing, swear on the blade in my hands that he shall not escape!
随着云骑开赴各处，封锁与排查迅速展开。\n\n此时，在长乐天，云骑正列阵待命……

As the Cloud Knights set off to various locations, they swiftly began to cordon off areas and start inspections.\n\n At that time, the Cloud Knights are waiting in formation in the Exalting Sanctum...
诸位！在仙舟的疆域上，步离人竟然狂妄地向我们发起挑战，放言要血洗仙舟的闹市街巷！
Cloud Knights! The borisin have arrogantly decided to challenge us on Xianzhou territory! They vow that they will unleash a bloodbath along the streets of the Xianzhou.
我们的身后，是手无寸铁的仙舟百姓和迢迢而来的旅客。试问，身为云骑军人，我们能让步离人的计划得逞吗？！
The unarmed civilians of the Xianzhou and countless visitors from afar are under our protection. Let me ask you, as Cloud Knights, will we allow the borisin to succeed with their plan!?
呼叫星槎海，所有云骑全面戒备，防范步离人的袭击！
Calling Starskiff Haven. Have all Cloud Knights be on full alert for borisin attacks!
飞霄，星槎海各处巷道中都有狼形生物在高速移动——
Feixiao, the ports of Starskiff Haven are crawling with wolf-like creatures. They're moving fast—
Hold them back, I will be there immediately!
貊泽的信号就在附近。但是在一刻之前，他断开了联系……
Moze's signal is nearby, but we lost contact just a moment ago...
他会没事的。云骑，搜索目标！
He will be fine. Cloud Knights, search for the target!
战首为你们准备了…一条死路…
The Warhead has prepared... a road of no return for all of you...
我也是个像模像样的选手…
You? You need to perk up more!
大家太熟了，认真不起来。
We're too familiar with each other. It's hard to get serious.
你当大家今天是来闹着玩呢？
You reckon we're all here just to play around today?
Are you from the Xianzhou Zhuming?
Ah. Yes! Have you been there?
Zhuming's got a climate that makes people healthy...
I want to go there one more time.
Wanna come find me when you're on vacation?
After this fight is over, then!
I heard that everyone who came aboard the Skysplitter...
Could I be an elite as well?
Well, what else would I be? I'm definitely one.
Ahhh! Mom, I'm winning at life!
I didn't think that everyone around here would be...
Would be people who hide their strength!
Welcome to the world of the strong.
Don't ask me. I don't know either!
星槎海的战场打扫完毕了。
We have cleared out the enemies in Starskiff Haven.
但长乐天和金人巷似乎还陷入苦战中，我这就准备星槎——
But it seems that there are fierce battles being waged at both the Exalting Sanctum and Aurum Alley. I will prepare a starskiff—
久战不利，眼下必须争分夺秒地挫败呼雷制造的闹剧。
We cannot allow the fighting to continue. This is now a race against time to stop this farce that Hoolay has created.
虽然椒丘总是希望我适可而止、别动真格，但现在…该是真正「速战速决」的时候了。
I know Jiaoqiu always wants me to know my limits and not get carried away, but... now is the time to bring this to a swift end.
呼叫长乐天，如果看到空中有光，立刻全员散开！
Contact the Exalting Sanctum. Tell them, if they see a light in the sky, all units are to retreat immediately!
与此同时，金人巷中\n\n飞霄自天降下的风之箭矢精准地将步离人尽数击倒——
At the same time, in the Aurum Alley\n\nFeixiao's skyborne wind arrows accurately find their mark in the borisin...
啧，真是难搞啊。我就知道事情会变成这样……
Tsk, what a mess. I just knew it would end up this way...
这家伙每次上战场总喜欢搞出这么大的场面。
Every time she hits the battlefield she makes a mess like this.
这下连半个能问出情报的活口都不剩了。这些家伙里一定有人知道呼雷和椒丘的下落……
She didn't even leave a single survivor to get intel from. One of these men must have known about Hoolay and Jiaoqiu's whereabouts.
是飞霄射出的「箭」，天知道这一回她是拿什么东西当作箭矢射到了这儿。
That was one of Feixiao's "arrows." Who knows what she used as an arrow to fire all the way over here.
如果她不提前喊一声，咱们几个怕是要跟这群狼崽子一起陪葬了。
If she hadn't given us a heads-up, we'd have all been wiped out with these little runts.
下次要是她出现，记得离她远远的。你应该也不希望自己变成一块一块的回列车吧？
Next time she appears in battle, make sure you keep your distance. You don't want to return to the Express in pieces, I'm sure?
你家将军未免太离谱了吧！
That general of yours is way out of line!
她…热血上头就是这样，把所有地方当成可以乱来的战场。
She... She's just very passionate. She sees every place as a battlefield where she can unleash hell.
你家将军一直是这样吗？
Has that general of yours always been like this?
谈不上「一直」，只是「经常」罢了。一旦打到兴头上，她就会把所有地方当成可以乱来的战场。
I wouldn't say "always"... But "often" would be fair. As soon as the heat of battle gets to her, she sees every place as a battlefield where she can unleash hell.
我想亲眼看她再射一箭…
I want to see her fire another arrow with my own eyes...
貊泽用冷漠的表情上下打量着你。你能读懂那没有任何表情的表情似乎在说「珍惜生命不好吗？」。
Moze sizes you up with a cold, indifferent gaze. You can almost hear the unspoken words in his expressionless face: "Is it not better to cherish your life instead?"
像我这样的侍卫，不过是将军身旁一个微不足道的影子。但椒丘不同，若没有他的悉心治疗，便不会有今日的将军。
A retainer like myself is nothing more than an insignificant shadow who stands by the general's side. But Jiaoqiu is different. Without his careful treatment, the general wouldn't even be here today.
我从没这么希望他能靠自己的嘴皮子再拖延些时间……
Hopefully, he can use that silver tongue of his to buy himself enough time...
{NICKNAME}，四下看看，如果能找到一两个还活着的步离人就告诉我。
{NICKNAME}, take a good look around. If you can find one or two borisin that aren't dead yet, let me know.
不管他们嘴有多硬，我都有办法撬开，让他们吐露些情报出来。
I don't care how tight their lips are sealed. I always have a way to crack them open and get the information we need.
狼首人身的怪物仰面朝天，身上布满了悚人的刀伤。
The wolf-head monster was facing the sky, its body covered in terrifying knife wounds.
There are no responses whatsoever from the borisin.
谁能想到…如此惊人的力量竟然掌握在一个狐人战奴的手里。
Who could have imagined... that such astonishing strength would lie in the hands of a foxian war slave...
如此果断，又如此…残暴。比起如今沦落到这般地步的我们，她才更像是都蓝的子裔。难怪战首会对她感兴趣。
So decisive, so... brutal. She is more like a descendant of Duran than we who have fallen to our current state. No wonder the Warhead has his eyes on her.
那个闯入幽囚狱的劫犯。末度…你还真是一只无论如何都摁不死的臭虫啊。
The sneak that infiltrated The Shackling Prison. Mok Tok... You are harder to kill than a cockroach.
受了那样一击，竟然还活着…
The fact that you still draw breath after an attack like that...
我记得你，末度…你还真是一只无论如何都摁不死的臭虫啊。
I remember you, Mok Tok... You are harder to kill than a cockroach.
你能主动现身，也省去了我们一番功夫。
But, the fact that you have willingly shown yourself saves us some time.
现在投降还不算晚。告诉我，呼雷…还有，椒丘去了哪儿？
It is not too late for you to surrender. Tell me... where are Hoolay and Jiaoqiu?
省省力气吧，曜青的猴子。所有的野兽都明白一个道理，为了摆脱陷阱，就算扯断臂膀也在所不惜。今天，我将成为这只臂膀。
Save your energy, Yaoqing monkey. If there is one principle that we beasts know well, it is that we might have to break off an arm to break free from a cage. Today, I will be that arm.
在我漫长的狩猎生涯中，虽然只有眼前这短短的片刻追随了战首。但他的存在却像青丘的月亮般照亮了我们盲目已久的双眼，让我看见了道路。

I lived as a hunter for many years, yet I have only followed the Warhead for this recent, brief period. However, his existence has brought light back to our once-blind eyes, like the moon of Verdantia. He has shown me the way.
都蓝子裔背弃了「狼之古训」。为了苟延生命，我们在黑暗中东躲西藏，互相啃噬；我们不再是狼，反而变得像老鼠般龌龊、可悲。

The descendants of Duran have abandoned the Wolf's Creed. In order to ensure our survival, we took solace in the shadows and fed on one another. We were no longer wolves. We were no more than rats, living a dirty and pathetic life.
得蒙呼雷大人的恩赐，我分享了他的眼界与狼血——都蓝的子裔，应当为狼群的胜利而生，也要为狼群的胜利而死！
Thanks to the gift granted to us by Lord Hoolay, I have shared his vision and his blood... The descendants of Duran should live for the victory of the pack, and they should die for it as well!
来啊，曜青人，亮出你的爪牙！我和你，不死不休！
Come, Yaoqing man. Show me your fangs! We will fight to the death!
但你会错意了，在这里没有什么一对一的公平决斗。等我们俩放倒了你，希望你还能一如既往地嘴硬。
But you seem to have misunderstood. There will be no fair one-on-one duel. Let's see how tough you are once we've put you down.
无论牺牲得有多壮烈…步离人，你们的战斗和死亡都没有一丝荣誉可言。
No matter how heroic your sacrifice... there is no honor in your battles or deaths, borisin.
It seems that Mok Tok got what he wished for.
呼雷…你的「宣战」计划完蛋了。
Hoolay... your "declaration of war" is over.
接下来，不管你逃到何处，飞霄将军都会逮到你，送你步上末度的后尘。
From now on, no matter where you run, General Feixiao will catch you and send you to the same fate as Mok Tok...
你的嘴皮子可比爪子锋利多了。
Your tongue is sharper than your claws.
别碍事，小子，让你的将军来和我说话，我和她的狩猎游戏还没结束呢。
Don't stand in my way, child. Have your general speak with me. Our little hunting game is not over yet.
退下吧，貊泽。我就在这儿，呼雷，你还有什么想说的？
Stand down, Moze. I am here, Hoolay. What do you wish to say?
天击将军，虽然咱们从未在战场上谋面。但这一路走来，我从属下和你的医士口中听到了不少关于你的有趣传闻。
The Merlin's Claw, though we have never met on the battlefield, I have heard many interesting things about you from both my men and your healer.
仙舟人真够胆，竟然放任一个流着步离之血的狐人战奴攀上将军的宝座。
The people of the Xianzhou must be quite brave to allow a foxian war slave with borisin blood to ascend to the position of general.
难道就没有人质疑过你的血统吗？还是因为你显赫的功绩让所有人暂时闭上了嘴？
Has no one ever questioned that lineage of yours? Or could it be that your grand achievements were enough to convince everyone to keep their lips sealed?
在战场上和自己的敌人攀亲道故，算得上是一种委婉的求饶…呼雷，你是在向我求饶吗？
Claiming to have family ties with the enemy sounds to me like an attempt at asking for mercy... Hoolay, are you begging me for mercy?
看来，你的血里不仅有狼的残忍，还兼具了狐的狡诈。
I see that it is not only the ruthless blood of a wolf that courses through your veins, but also the cunning blood of a fox.
说到底，这是来自步离人的馈赠。我们赠予的，我们也当有权收回——
When you think about it, this was a gift from the borisin. Anything that we gift, we are also free to reclaim...
天击将军，我向你发出最后的邀请：我会在竞锋舰上等候你的到来。
The Merlin's Claw, I shall extend a final invitation to you: I will be waiting for you on the Skysplitter.
在你到来之前，我将大开杀戒，让这七百年来黯淡已久的「赤月」再度跳动点燃，用血光照亮这艘众人瞩目的船，让世人认清仙舟有多么软弱无能。

Before you arrive, I will slaughter all in sight, allowing the Crimson Moon that has fallen dim for over seven hundred years to once more come to life. I will illuminate this ship with the sheen of blood and show everyone just how weak and powerless the Xianzhou is.
然后我会驾驭这艘舰船，冲破一切封锁和阻拦，踏上归乡的道路，让它成为步离人再兴的旗舰。
Then, I will pilot this ship through every blockade and barrier you have prepared and begin my journey home. This ship shall be the flagship for the borisin resurgence!
在我完成这一切之前，你有机会阻止我，或是死在我的手中，这将是我为你准备的道路。
Before I finish these tasks of mine, you have a chance to stop me, or die at my hands. This is the path that I have prepared for you.
我接受你的挑战，呼雷。因为从踏上竞锋舰的这一刻起，你已经走上了一条绝路。
I accept your challenge, Hoolay. Because the very moment you stepped aboard the Skysplitter, you stepped onto your path to ruin.
驭空姐姐，时隔三十年，咱们又再次并肩战斗了。
Madam Yukong! After thirty years, we find ourselves fighting side-by-side once more!
好久没松松筋骨了，开始吧！
It's been a while since I've let loose. Let's get this started!
眼下是在罗浮仙舟上，你可给我收着点拳脚！
Remember you are still on the Luofu. Try not to go too wild!
Kill her! Kill all these foxians—
还没认清现实吗？从现身这一刻起，你们只有死路一条。
Have you still not realized your situation? From the moment you appeared, you were doomed to one fate.
别再藏头露尾了！呼雷，出来面对我！
Enough hiding, Hoolay! Come out and face me!
等仙舟人流够了血，战首会现身的！
The Warhead will appear once enough Xianzhou blood has been spilled!
很遗憾，他看不到这一幕了。
What a shame he will never get to see that.
长乐天那边的情况如何？
How are things at the Exalting Sanctum?
步离人…他们越来越多了！
尽力压制住他们，缩小包围圈！
Do all you can to suppress them and fence them in!
再坚持片刻，我的支援马上就到！
Hang in there a bit longer, reinforcements are on the way!
战首的血…在我体内沸腾…
The Warhead's blood... It boils in my veins...
呼雷万岁！步离人的复兴必将到来！
Long live Hoolay! The borisin resurgence is at hand!
你们以为自己还能像千年前那样到处侵略和屠戮？
You think you can still pillage and murder freely as you did a thousand years before?
曜青仙舟将确保那只是你们死前最不切实际的幻想！
The Xianzhou Yaoqing will ensure that this is nothing more than your dying fantasy!
来啊，这点小伤！我绝不退却！
Fight me! You think a scrape like this will send me running!?
演武仪典即将召开\n\n竞锋舰
The Wardance is about to commence\n\nSkysplitter
「我要托付你们的绝不只是擂台上的胜负荣辱，还有竞锋舰的安全。」
I'm entrusting you not only with the honor of the ring, but also with the security of the Skysplitter.
爷爷说的倒是轻松，尽给我出些难题。
That's easy for my grandfather to say, but this mission doesn't seem so simple anymore.
第一场擂赛马上就要开始了…不知彦卿那边是否一切顺利？
The first round of the tournament is about to begin... I wonder how Yanqing and the others are doing?
按照计划，我也该找竞锋舰上的云骑士兵问问，看看他们有什么发现。
According to the plan, I should seek out the Cloud Knight soldiers aboard the Skysplitter and see if they've discovered anything.
三月，是我，云璃。你还好吗？
March, it's me, Yunli. Are you okay?
哎哟，疼疼疼疼，稍等一下，我马上过来。
Ooh, ow-ow-owww. Just a moment, I'm coming!
Ah... She's still a nervous wreck.
原本我也没有这么紧张的，但一个人待在休息室里就会越想越多。毕竟这一次参加演武仪典，咱们的身上还背负着这么重的任务……

I wasn't this nervous before... It's just being alone in this lounge, I can't stop thinking about everything. I mean, not only are we taking part in the Wardance, but we have such an important mission to carry out as well...
别担心你的任务，还有我帮你。
Don't worry about your mission. I am here to help you.
别担心你的任务。你不是还有我吗。别被爷爷「代表罗浮守擂」的出战名头给唬住了。
Don't worry about your mission. You have me here too, right? I know my grandfather said that you must "represent the Luofu as the ringmaster," but don't let that intimidate you.
问问你自己，你是星穹列车无名客，一向来去自由，但为什么在爷爷把任务交给我们后，你和我一起登上了这竞锋舰？
Ask yourself: You are a Nameless of the Astral Express. You have always been free to come and go as you please. So, why did you board the Skysplitter with me when my grandfather gave us this mission?
要说为什么的话…因为我也希望，演武仪典能顺利召开。
Why...? Because I also want the Wardance to go smoothly.
对无名客来说，虽然每一站我们都只是过客…可在这里我结识了两位师父，也认识了许多朋友。为了大家，我希望这场「演武仪典」能一切顺利。

For us Nameless, even though we're just visitors at every stop... It was here that I met my two masters and made many new friends. I want the Wardance to go ahead without any problems, for everyone's sake.
答的好！擂赛马上就要开始了，我必须去完成爷爷交付的任务了。
Good answer! The tournament is about to begin, so I must go carry out the mission that Grandpa gave me.
三月，祝你宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜。
March, may your blade be sharp and your victory glorious.
好不容易让她没有那么紧张了，现在就不去打扰她了。
It took enough time to calm her nerves, it's best I don't disturb her again now.
这不是云璃小姐吗？如果有什么事情需要帮助的，请告诉在下。
Is that you, Miss Yunli? If there is anything that I can help you with, please let me know.
云骑的布置情况怎么样了？
How are the Cloud Knights doing?
按照怀炎将军的指示，云骑已经各就其位。
The Cloud Knights are all in position, following General Huaiyan's orders.
你有发现有「狼」的情况吗？
眼下我们还没有注意到异常情况。
We haven't noticed anything out of the ordinary yet.
做得很好，不过我还得和你再次确认一下——
Very good. Although, there is one thing I want to confirm with you...
你们有识别步离人的手段吗？
Do you have a way of identifying borisin?
很遗憾，我们目前没有能区分步离人与狐人的手段。
Unfortunately, we don't have any means to distinguish between borisin and foxians.
不过可以肯定的是，关于伪造身份，云骑正在抓紧排查溯源……
However, you can rest assured that the Cloud Knights are working hard to investigate the source of the forged identities...
讲讲眼下云骑的部署规划？
Tell me about how the Cloud Knights are currently deployed.
竞锋舰上全体云骑各司其职，不敢怠慢。
All Cloud Knights on the Skysplitter have their own responsibilities and wouldn't dare neglect their posts.
我和三月七已经感受到了，来到竞锋舰上的云骑士兵们个个都是精锐。
March 7th and I could already tell. It's clear that every Cloud Knight soldier we've met on the Skysplitter is an elite warrior.
我想确认有无异常登舰的情况。
I would like to confirm if there have been any irregularities in boarding.
云璃小姐来得正是时候，就在刚才，我们收到了一个紧急登舰请求。
Your timing is perfect, Miss Yunli. We actually just received an emergency boarding request.
它不在抵达竞锋舰的星槎航班表上，不过星槎上本身通牒文件都是正式的。
It wasn't on the Skysplitter starskiff registry, but all the documentation checked out.
谁会在这个时候登舰？位置在哪，我去检查一下。
Who would be boarding the ship at this time? Where are they? I'll go check it out.
那艘星槎会从选手用的停船港登舰，需要在下为您带路吗？
The starskiff is using the contestant docking bay. Would you like me to lead the way?
不用了，你还有执勤的任务，我一个人去就行。
No need. You have your own duties to take care of. I'll be fine by myself.
例行检查！请登舰乘客立刻接受检查。
Routine inspection! All passengers please prepare for an inspection.
（这就是可疑的星槎？乘船的人呢……）
(So, this is the suspicious starskiff? Where did the passengers go...?)
我数十个数，再不出来，我就把船砸了哦？
I'm going to count down from ten. If you do not come out, I will destroy the ship.
九、八、七、六、五、四…时间要到了哦！
Nine, eight, seven, six, five, four... Time is running out!
例行检查而已，你不会真的要把船砸了吧？难道这也是你们朱明传统……
It's just a routine inspection. You weren't actually going to blow up the ship, were you? Is that also some kind of Zhuming custom...?
What are you doing back here!?
该不会是步离人伪装的吧？
You're not a borisin in disguise, are you?
等等，就算步离人变形伪装，也变不了我这样的小个子吧！快把剑收起来。
Wait! Even though the borisin can disguise themselves, they can't turn into someone as short as me! Put your sword away.
咱们的彦卿小弟不是说要放弃守擂，选择猎狼，为将军分忧解难吗？
Didn't little Yanqing claim he was going to give up being the ringmaster and go on the hunt instead? Help shoulder the general's burdens?
地面上步离人突然展开了袭击，飞霄将军担心这是呼雷的障眼法，于是我就主动请命赶来驰援竞锋舰。
The borisin on the ground suddenly launched an attack. General Feixiao was concerned that this was all a diversion by Hoolay, so I requested to come to the Skysplitter and provide support.
没想到你兜兜转转，又回到了竞锋舰上，不过此刻擂台你是上不了啦。
I can't believe you ended up back here on the Skysplitter after running around all over the place. But, you're too late to enter the tournament now.
按照爷爷的安排，咱们俩的好徒弟三月会代替你登台守擂——是不是感到很骄傲啊？
Following Grandpa's plan, our disciple March is taking your place as ringmaster... Aren't you proud of her?
乍一听到这么有冲击性的事实，还真是又自豪，又让人担心来着。
When I first heard the news, I was definitely proud, but also a little concerned...
多一个人手总是好事，竞锋舰这么大，对了，你应该知道——
More manpower is always a good thing, since the Skysplitter is so large. Oh, and by the way, you should know that—
竞锋舰的速度似乎在变慢？莫非……
Does it feel like the Skysplitter has slowed down? Could it be...
跟我走，咱们去引擎室瞧瞧！作为整艘舰船的核心设施，我们优先确保那儿的安全！
Come with me, we need to check the engine room! It's the heart of the ship, so we need to prioritize its safety!
古怪，这附近怎么一个人都不见了？
Strange, why is there no one here?
The Cloud Knights... They're over here.
你们也应该和他们躺在一起……
And you should be lying alongside them...
放心吧小娃娃，这里的空间还很宽敞，有足够藏下你们尸体的地方。
Don't worry, children, there's plenty of space to hide your bodies over here.
虽说打心眼里希望这场「演武仪典」能一切平安无事，让我虚惊一场……
Even though I truly hoped that the Wardance would go ahead uninterrupted and that I was worrying for no reason...
但这帮家伙终于还是来了啊，我心尖上压着的这块石头总算也能落地了！来吧，孽物！
Now that these guys have finally shown up, it's a huge weight off my mind. Bring it on, you abominations!
引擎舱里发现了两只狼，就意味着其他的地方会有更多孽物潜入…呼雷已经登上了竞锋舰！
If we found two wolves in the engine room, that means that even more abominations have infiltrated other areas... Hoolay is already aboard the Skysplitter!
没时间解释了，「演武仪典」应该已经开始了！如果我猜的没错，在步离人登舰之后，他们极有可能在仪典上大肆杀戮。
There's no time to talk about this. The Wardance has already started! If my guess is correct, the borisin will most likely use the ceremony to begin their slaughter.
走吧，我们现在就赶往演武仪典的擂台！
Let's go. We need to get to the Wardance ring!
尊敬的各位来宾，各位选手，欢迎各位莅临罗浮仙舟星天演武仪典！
We would like to welcome all of our honored guests and contestants... to the Xianzhou Luofu's Luminary Wardance ceremony!
在进入第一场擂赛前，赛事组委会隆重向各位介绍银河著名主持人——叽米先生，作为嘉宾主持来到现场！
Before we get the first round under way, our organizing committee would like to introduce you all to a host known throughout the cosmos — Mr. Owlbert! He is here today as our special guest host!
有请嘉宾主持叽米先生，为演武仪典正式揭幕——
Let us invite our special guest host, Mr. Owlbert, to the stage to formally open the Wardance—
从此刻开始，竞锋舰将属于我。各位观众，我将为你们带来一场货真价实的死斗！
From this moment on, the Skysplitter belongs to me. And for you, dear spectators, I have prepared a true fight to the death!
抱歉，这艘船上并没有你期待的观众——这儿的所有人，全都为你而来。
My apologies! The spectators that you were expecting aren't here... Everyone here actually came to see you.
仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！
Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars!...
I see you were ready for me.
那样也好！既然做好了送死的准备，来吧，尽你们所能——让我尽兴吧！
That's fine too! Since you have all prepared for your deaths, come, give me all you've got — entertain me!
「演武仪典」召开前三个时辰\n\n神策府
Three dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nSeat of Divine Foresight.
「围三阙一」…这就是你所说的，能确保演武仪典如常进行的计划吗？
Surround your enemy, but leave one side open... This is your strategy for ensuring that the Wardance will be able to be held as usual?
正是。呼雷出逃，本该立刻终止演武仪典的举行。谁也不能预料这头凶兽会袭向哪里，似仪典这样的节庆，反而更容易成为他逞凶的目标。

Precisely. When Hoolay escaped, we should have canceled the Wardance immediately. No one can predict where a wild beast like him will attack, yet festivals and celebrations like this are likely to become targets.
不过，演武仪典筹备良久，势在必行，宣布中断又让我心疼得很。我转念一想，既然不得不开，那还是开吧。只是今日召开的又何必是真正的演武仪典呢？

However, preparations for the Wardance were in the works for so long, I couldn't bear to announce its cancellation. So, I thought, if the show must go on, then let it go on. But that doesn't mean that the Wardance we hold today has to be the real event.
只要将登舰观众与选手全数替换成云骑士兵，高悬在空中的那座竞锋舰，将会成为绝佳的猎狼战场。
All we need to do is swap all the spectators and contestants aboard the ship with Cloud Knight soldiers, and the Skysplitter, soaring high above, will become the ultimate battleground for our hunt.
…可要是呼雷没有打算袭击演武仪典，又该怎么办呢？
...But what do we do if Hoolay is not planning to attack the Wardance?
那就尽可能让他看见竞锋舰。天舶司会清空航道，减少其他星槎通航。这样一来，当天上只剩下一艘船时，他便有了不得不去的理由。

Then we just need to draw his attention to the Skysplitter. We'll have the Sky-Faring Commission clear all transport lanes and cut down starskiff traffic. Then, when the time comes, there will be only one ship in the sky, and he will have no reason not to attack.
而飞霄将军会负责敲山震狼，切断步离人逃亡的路线，让他自以为找到了去处。
General Feixiao will be in charge of scaring the wolves and cutting off their other means of escape, making him think that this will be his best way out.
考虑到步离人在罗浮上有内应，我会负责前去施加压力，令内应们疲于自保。
Given that the borisin already have insiders on the Luofu, I will be in charge of putting pressure on them, making them focus solely on keeping themselves safe.
好啊！那么老朽也该动动身子骨了。我会与天舶司一同紧守玉界门，以防局势失控。
Very good! Then I'd better dust off my weary bones, too! I will go with the Sky-Faring Commission to guard the Jade Gate and ensure that things do not spiral out of control.
能有炎老担当这最后的保险，晚辈就放心了。
Knowing that Elder Huaiyan is part of our last line of defense is a great comfort.
这场狩猎务必教呼雷明白，「巡猎」的锋镝，永远快孽物一步。
This hunt will make Hoolay understand that the arrows of The Hunt will always be one step ahead of the abominations.
刚才的震动…到底是什么情况？似乎整座舰船渐渐慢了下来？
That jolt just now... what's going on? It feels like the entire ship has started to slow down?
应该是步离人真的入侵了竞锋舰。按照怀炎将军的指示…我也该行动起来了。
Borisin must have actually infiltrated the Skysplitter. Based on General Huaiyan's orders... it's time for me to take action.
你们…肯定不是负责扮演步离人的云骑军吧？
You guys... you're not Cloud Knights acting as borisin, are you?
你们…是真正的步离人吧？！
You're... you're real borisin, aren't you?
...Master Yanqing, what are you doing here?
当然是因为心系竞锋舰和弟子的安危啊。
I was concerned about the safety of the Skysplitter and my dear disciple, of course!
彦卿小弟，你想要猎的狼，此刻正站在咱们头顶上演武仪典的擂台里，挑战云骑……
Yanqing, the wolf you are hunting is standing above us in the Wardance ring at this very moment, facing the Cloud Knights...
这场「演武仪典」的实况不会出现在仙舟人们的眼中，它也不是什么点到为止的剑斗。这是一场没有荣誉，只有凶险的死斗。三月，你准备好了吗？

This "Wardance" will not be seen by the people of the Xianzhou, nor will it be just a ceremonial sword fight. This is a battle to the death that offers no honor, only mortal danger. March, are you ready?
拜托，我可是代表罗浮出战的剑士，三月七！
Please, I am March 7th, a swordmaster who will represent the Luofu in glorious battle!
做师父的上阵，怎么能少得了我这个弟子呢！
If my masters are going to battle, how could they go without their disciple?
还得引用景元将军的名言吧，「嗐，来都来了。」
To use General Jing Yuan's favorite expression: "Since I'm already here..."
云璃，三月小姐，祝两位宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
Yunli, Miss March, may your blades be sharp and your victories glorious!
也祝你们宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
May your blades be sharp and your victories glorious!
咱也一样，祝你们…算了，还是祝大家旗开得胜吧！
May your blades... Ah forget it. Let's go and make this a quick victory!
演武仪典「猎狼守擂」 开始
对于狩猎而言，秘密是不可或缺的武器。没有秘密的人，只是被撕开皮肉，悲惨等死的猎物。
Secrets are a weapon that a hunter cannot live without. Those that have no secrets are no more than prey, cut open and waiting for death.
这么说来，在你眼中，我已经是一头毫无秘密可言、随时待死的猎物了？
What you're saying is, in your eyes, I am no more than prey that has exhausted all of its secrets and is simply awaiting its death?
难道你还有其他的路可逃么？椒丘，我已将你的伪装和防御层层撕开，你和你所侍奉的将军，你们深藏的秘密，我已了如指掌。
Do you think you have some other escape route? Jiaoqiu, I have already peeled back your disguises and defenses layer by layer. I know all the secrets that you and your general have buried so deep.
可是战首也将自己的秘密告诉了我，我已了如指掌。
But you have told me all of your secrets too, Warhead.
你永远也用不上它了。你会和它一同埋葬在这儿。不过，你始终是个幸运的家伙……
But you will never have a chance to use them. You will be buried with them right here. Although, you are a fortunate one...
毕竟你不用去活着见证你的将军所要面临的悲惨未来。
After all, you will avoid having to see the tragic future that awaits your general.
我想她比你更明白自己的结局——终有一日，她将在战斗中被一次比一次更猛烈的「月狂」压倒，最终在变形和狂怒中四分五裂。

I'm sure she understands her fate far better than you ever will. One day on the battlefield, she will be overpowered by her ever-intensifying Moon Rage and finally be torn apart by her fury and transformation.
就连你们所{RUBY_B#「巡猎」的岚}信奉的神{RUBY_E#}也无法将她从这个结局中拯救出来…相反，祂倒是可以为她带去解脱。
Not even {RUBY_B#Lan, The Hunt}your God{RUBY_E#} can save her from this fate... Although, THEY can lead her to liberation.
而唯一的救治之道，在我手中。
And the only way to save her is here, in my hands.
到底你是医士我是医士啊？你就对自己的判断这么自信吗？
Are you the healer or am I!? Are you really that certain of your own judgment?
我该走了，狐人。在离去之前，你知道我要做什么，对吧？
I must leave, foxian. But before I go, you know what I must do, don't you?
「饮血酒」…听说步离人的战俗，是在上阵前杀俘饮血，激发狂性……
Drink bloodwine... I hear it is a borisin custom to kill prisoners and drink their blood before battle to stir up their madness.
你真是花了不少工夫研究我们…不过，你的路就到此为止了。
You really did put hard work into researching us... It is a shame that this is where your journey ends.
Is there anything that I can do for you?
我听说那个时候是你救下了我？
I heard that you saved me?
There's no need to thank me.
你是医士的话，能治好我的「月狂」之症吗？
If you're a healer, can you cure my Moon Rage?
治好了又如何？看你再次登上战场去送死？听我一句劝，孩子，你的身体状况，不适合再上战场。
And what if I can? Do I just sit back and watch as you head back out to die in battle? Listen to me, child, your condition is not suited for the battlefield.
你说什么？我只是个医士！我能做的只有——
What are you talking about? I'm just a healer! All I can do is—
所以，你能做的便是治好我们，让我们去「医治」战争。
So, all you can do is heal us, and let us go "cure" war.
真是大言不惭啊，小姑娘。这场战争持续了几千年，还会继续打下去！说什么「医治」战争，你们不过是在送死！
Such arrogance, young lady! This war has been waged for thousands of years, and it will only continue! What do you mean by "cure" war? All you will achieve is getting yourself killed!
就像你们这些医士拼命救死扶伤，但这世上依旧会有疾病和死亡一样。我们也会一直战斗下去的。
You healers work yourselves to the bone to save people, even though there will always be sickness and death. So we will also keep fighting.
我不能代替那些已经不在的人发言。但我知道，月御将军…还有所有一去不回的战士们不是白白送死。
I cannot speak for the dead. But, I know that General Yueyu... as well as all the warriors that never returned from battle will not have died in vain!
他们是为了让更多的人活着回到故乡，就像你做的那样。
They fought so that others could make it home alive. Your actions are no different.
Jiaoqiu, this is an order! Cure me!
…没有秘密的人…只是被撕开皮肉，悲惨等死的猎物。
...Those who have no secrets... are no more than prey... cut open and waiting for death...
尽情痛饮我的鲜血吧…呼雷。只可惜，我不是一个没有秘密的人啊。我还藏着一个微不足道的秘密……
Enjoy the taste of my fresh blood... Hoolay. Unfortunately, I am not a man without secrets. I still have one little secret hidden up my sleeve...
「颠踬散」…我早早喝下了它，药毒已流遍我的全身…迟早…会在你身上见效。
Tumbledust... I drank it a while ago, and the poison is already flowing through my veins... Sooner or later... you will begin to feel the effects.
世间至毒…若能换回无辜的生命，便也可被称作良药……
If the most lethal poison known to this world... is able to save innocent lives... Then it can also be called a great medicine...
「我将尽力医治」…飞霄，我兑现承诺了。用这条微不足道的性命……
I will do my best to cure you... Feixiao, I kept my promise. At the cost of this insignificant life...
擂赛开始前，要不抽空跟三月见个面？
Maybe I should take a moment to meet with March before the tournament starts?
三月现在就待在选手休息室里，也不知道她准备得如何了……
March is in the contestant's lounge right now. I wonder how her preparations are coming along...
按照爷爷的安排，现在应该问问竞锋舰上的云骑士兵，有没有新的情况……
According to Grandpa's plan, I should seek out the Cloud Knight soldiers aboard the Skysplitter and see if there've been any new developments...
(I have to check on this immediately.)
演武仪典即将开始，请各位选手进入赛场就位。
The Wardance is about to begin. Contestants, please make your way to the arena.
The engine room is just up ahead. Let's go.
Come with me! To the ring!
走这边，我们到的还不算晚！
This way, we're not too late!
尊敬的各位来宾，各位选手，欢迎各位莅临罗浮仙舟星天演武仪典！
We would like to welcome all of our honored guests and contestants... to the Xianzhou Luofu's Luminary Wardance ceremony!
将军的安排终于还是派上了用场…我必须尽快找到云璃他们。
It looks like the general's arrangements are finally coming in handy... I need to find Yunli and the others as soon as possible.
按照计划，一旦呼雷出现，云骑们会全员集合，尽可能制伏他。
The plan said that if Hoolay appears, the Cloud Knights will assemble and do everything they can to suppress him.
擂台下面的大厅…我记得是在这边。
The hall below the ring... I remember it being this way...
I've been waiting a long time for this, Hoolay!
竟然派几个幼崽来送死…
I see Feixiao has sent some young cubs to the slaughter...
给我记好了，我叫三月七！罗浮的守擂剑士！
Remember this! My name is March 7th! Ringmaster of the Luofu!
难道罗浮仙舟上没有其他够格的战士了吗？
Does the Xianzhou Luofu not have any worthy warriors?
那你可得留神，被幼崽打败的滋味，你这头老狼未必消化得了啊！
I wouldn't let my guard down if I were you. It's about time this old wolf tasted defeat at the hands of a young cub!
你们以为设下了埋伏，人多就能取胜？
You think a little ambush is enough to defeat me?
我会让你们明白，你们错得彻底！
I will make you understand just how wrong you are!
罢了，在飞霄到来之前，就由你们来充当余兴节目吧！
Fine. You can be a little opening act for me until Feixiao finally arrives!
小崽子们，尽全力挥剑吧！
Swing with all your might, dear cubs!
你们以为我会逃跑？狼所行之路，只有前进，没有逃离！
You thought I would run? A wolf's path only goes forward. Running is never an option!
Not bad! But it will take much more than that!
我的身躯百杀不死，你们的刀剑弱如芒草！
Your feeble weapons are like blades of grass before my unbreakable body!
飞霄为什么还不来？这些小崽子实在无趣！
Why is Feixiao still not here? I grow bored of these cubs!
再这样下去，我可要杀光他们啦！
If this goes on, they'll all be dead by the time she arrives!
仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！仙舟翾翔，云骑常胜！
Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars! Xianzhou soars, Cloud Knight roars!...
咱们一起，让他屁股向后，狗头着地！
It's time for us to put this dog down!
一剂毒药罢了…以为靠这样的手段能扭转战局？
A pathetic little poison like this... You think this is enough to turn the tide of battle?
But that does not mean you can defeat me...
你确实很难杀死，但绝不代表你无法被制服！
You may be hard to kill, but that does not mean you cannot be overpowered!
呼雷！看仔细了，云骑天威，尽在此剑！
Hoolay! Take a good look. The power of the Cloud Knights is in my blade!
在将军们计谋运筹之下，接下来你们将要直面步离强敌了，理应做好准备再继续前进。
Under the careful planning and deliberation of the generals, you are about to face the powerful borisin enemies. You should make your preparations before advancing forward.
Let me rest for a bit first.
如何让挑食的小孩吃下青椒？
How do we get a picky child to eat green chilis?
如何让多疑的恶狼服下毒药？
How do we get a suspicious and devious wolf to drink down poison?
I've already told you the answer.
至此为止，「猎狼计划」终于顺利收场。
The "Wolf-Hunt Mission" has finally come to a smooth end.
随着战首败亡，狼卒们无力抵抗，被云骑军尽数镇压。{NICKNAME}与貊泽找到了奄奄一息的椒丘。
As the Warhead is defeated and slain, the Wolftroopers can no longer resist and are completely overwhelmed by the Cloud Knights. {NICKNAME} and Moze then find Jiaoqiu, who is at death's door.
而此时此刻，「呼雷越狱」一事，仍有最后一笔账等待清算……
And this time, there's one more business that must be settled with the affair around Hoolay's jailbreak...
亏你们几个能撑到现在。这场狩猎总算是圆满收场了，云骑军正在善后撤离中。
This hunt is finally over. Thank you for holding out so long. The Cloud Knights are withdrawing as we speak.
彦卿骁卫，你身体还撑得住吗？
Lieutenant Yanqing, how are you holding up?
I could take on ten more!
我好得很…一点事都没有！就算再来十个呼雷……
I've never been better... I could take on ten more Hoolays...
别太勉强了，年轻人，你看起来伤得不轻啊。等丹鼎司的医士到场，让他们好好给你治治。
Take it easy, young one, your wounds look quite severe. I'll have the Alchemy Commission healers see to you when they arrive.
将军，地面上的情况还好吗？
General, how are things on the ground?
将军…地面上一切还好吗？
General... is everything okay on the ground?
嗯，我尽力镇压了步离人的袭扰。当我察觉到呼雷不在地面上时，我就争分夺秒地赶来这儿了。
Everything's fine. We were able to suppress the borisin attacks. When I sensed that Hoolay was not on the ground, I raced to get here as quickly as I could.
幸亏将军赶到救了一命。
I... I thought I was done for.
我可不想让景元将军失去他的得意弟子。当我察觉到呼雷不在地面上时，我就争分夺秒地赶来这儿了。
I wouldn't want General Jing Yuan to lose the disciple that brings him so much pride. When I sensed that Hoolay was not on the ground, I raced to get here as quickly as I could.
你竟然没把计划告诉我…
I can't believe you didn't tell me the plan...
…将军，你竟然没把竞锋舰上的计划告诉我！
...General, I can't believe you didn't tell me about the plan for the Skysplitter!
别怨我啊，这可是你家将军的主意。他得知你放弃守擂，加入我的猎狼队伍，便要我对你保密。也许是怕你急性子坏事吧。

Don't blame me, this was your general's idea. When he learned that you gave up being the ringmaster to join my Wolf Hunt team, he insisted that I hide the plan from you. Perhaps he thought your impatience would mess things up.
你看，兜兜转转，不还是回到了这里吗？
Well? You may have run all over the place, but you ended up back here, did you not?
没想到，生平第一次，我在战场上迟到了。不，也许该说是你们几个年轻人的剑太快了些。
Who would have imagined that I would arrive late to the battlefield for the first time in my life? ...No, perhaps you young ones' blades were just too fast for me.
我本以为最好的战况不过是你们几个能联手拖住这头凶兽，自保不失。但…你们合力击败了呼雷，真是后生可畏。

I originally thought, in the best-case scenario, you would team up and hold this beast back while protecting yourselves. However... You joined forces and defeated Hoolay! The youth are truly to be feared and respected!
来吧，为免夜长梦多，该是将呼雷重新囚禁起来的时候了。
Come, we need to lock up Hoolay once again before anything unexpected happens.
吓、吓死我了，我还以为你差点就要栽在呼雷手里。幸亏那位将军赶到了。
I—I was so scared! I thought you were a goner there! We're so lucky the general made it in time!
彦卿小弟，你做得好啊！刚才击倒呼雷的最后一剑，我怎么从来没见你使过？
