Yanqing, that was amazing! The final blow you dealt to Hoolay, how have I never seen that before?
你想学吗？我可以教你啊。不过得等我养好这一身伤才行……
Do you want to learn it? I can teach you! But, I'll need some time to heal up first...
虽然有些不甘心，但如果你能教我，我可以勉为其难地承认你的水平比我高那么一丁点儿……
I hate to say it, but if you can teach me that move, I'll maybe admit that you're just a tiny little bit stronger than me...
呼雷真的是被我们打败的吗？
Was it really us who defeated Hoolay?
呼雷…真的是被咱们打败的吗？我怎么觉得，在战斗中他不知为何突然落了下风……
Was it... really us who defeated Hoolay? Why do I feel like he suddenly started to flag during our battle?
一定是咱们三个的一腔凛然正气让他感到了畏惧！
It must have been our awe-inspiring righteousness that struck fear into his heart!
你这个人心思还真多啊，这么瞻前顾后干什么啊？管他为什么落了下风，只要最终结果是咱们几个赢了就好！
You really are an overthinker! What's the point of worrying about these things? Who cares why he started to weaken? All that matters is that we won!
我本以为…这场战斗将会以我和飞霄的死斗做结，却没想到会败在你们的手里。
I thought... that this battle would end with a fight to the death against Feixiao. I never imagined I would be defeated by you.
真是令人印象深刻的一剑啊…和当年被{RUBY_B#镜流}那个女人{RUBY_E#}击败时如此相似。
Such an unforgettable blade... So similar to the one wielded by {RUBY_B#Jingliu}that woman{RUBY_E#} who defeated me all those years ago.
七百余年过去，我本以为自己能有破解之法。但我终究还是…爪牙迟钝了。你们赢了，小子。
Over seven hundred years have passed, and I thought that I would have a way to overcome it by now. But in the end... my fangs and claws were too slow... You won, child.
不必挣扎了，呼雷。回到幽囚狱，你有足够的时间被懊悔折磨。
Stop struggling, Hoolay. There's plenty of time for you to be tortured by your regrets when you go back to The Shackling Prison.
我确实败了，但这并不出乎我的意料。但你还是露面了，飞霄。
Yes, I was defeated, but this was not unexpected. And regardless, you still showed your face, Feixiao.
我确实败了，但这并不出乎我的意料。但你还是露面了，飞霄。
Yes, I was defeated, but this was not unexpected. And regardless, you still showed your face, Feixiao.
我期待了如此之久，这场狩猎游戏终于走到了尽头…我说过，我为你准备了一条道路……
I have looked forward to this for so long. Our little hunting game has finally reached its climax... I told you before that I had a path prepared for you...
我一定会医好你的…飞霄。
I promise I will cure you... Feixiao.
我很清楚自己身体的状况，一直很清楚。这股永不停歇的愤怒不是什么「疾病」。它是潜藏在我血脉中，来自步离人的「月狂」。
I know very well what is happening to my body. I always have. This ever-thirsting fury is no "sickness," it is the borisin Moon Rage that flows through my veins.
总有一天，我会被这股狂怒点燃、烧尽。我会成为被帝弓光矢所追逐的怪物……
One day, this rage will ignite and burn me alive. I will become the very monster that the Reignbow Lux Arrow hunts...
就像所有的步离人那样，就像青丘军里那些被送上战场一去不回的「死士」那样…就像{RUBY_B#我的前任}月御将军{RUBY_E#}那样。
Just like the borisin, just like the Verdant Knights that were sent to war never to return... Just like {RUBY_B#my predecessor}General Yueyu{RUBY_E#}.
你答应过我的，在医好之前，你绝不会死去。
You promised me before that you would not die before I could cure you.
没有人能永远活着，椒丘…这一次，我要食言了。
No one can live forever, Jiaoqiu... This time, I must break my promise.
这里是…竞锋舰？还是其他什么地方？
Is this... the Skysplitter? Or somewhere else?
彦卿骁卫，你来执行云骑的军规。明白吗？
Lieutenant Yanqing, you are to enforce the Cloud Knights' military rules. Understood?
We can't let her get away!
你总是把更艰难的战斗留给自己。
You always leave the hardest battles for yourself.
就像现在这样，从来不知逃避为何物。
Even now, you would never run away.
很奇怪吧，作为敌人，我比你的战友更了解你。
Isn't it strange? That as your enemy, I understand you even better than your own allies?
这怒火…真让人怀念啊。我知道，它寻求的从来不是胜利，而是狩猎本身。
This rage... I remember the taste. I know that it was never victory that it thirsted for, but the hunt itself.
你不该存在的。我亲眼看到你死了……
You shouldn't be here. I saw you die with my own eyes...
Just consider me a figment of your imagination.
在每一次狩猎前，我都会做好失败而归的准备。但这次不一样，这一次…失败就是我奔赴的终点。
Before every hunt, I make preparations for defeat and retreat. But not this time. This time... defeat was exactly the ending I was racing towards.
当我从椒丘口中了解你的故事后，我发现了，他一直在隐瞒一个秘密…而这个秘密的意义，甚至连那位医士本人也未能察觉。
When I learned your story from Jiaoqiu, I realized... that he had always been hiding a secret... and that not even the healer himself understood the meaning of this secret.
命运真是讽刺啊。我一直在等待今天，可没想到它会以这种形式到来。
What an ironic fate, don't you think? All this time, waiting for this day to come, I never imagined that this was how it would turn out.
至于现在，就让我们掘开帝弓天将坚如铁石的心防，看看在她最幽暗的角落里，藏了些什么吧？
Now, let us break through the iron-clad defenses of the Arbiter-General's heart and see what secrets she has hidden in those deepest, darkest corners.
熟悉的死亡气息，就像兀鹰……
The familiar smell of death, like a vulture...
飞霄，这就是他们对我们，对你，还有对银河中所有文明做的一切。我们唯一能做的，就是将他们的爪牙折断，将他们送入尘埃…我们必须复仇。
Feixiao, this is what they have done to us, to you, and to all civilizations across the cosmos. Our only choice is to clip their claws and fangs and reduce them to dust... We must have our revenge.
这些熟悉的场面，仙舟人应该向你展示过无数次了。但这一切不过是他们想让你看到的。
I'm sure that the people of the Xianzhou have shown you these familiar scenes countless times. But they only showed you what they wanted you to see.
他们让你为拯救弱者而战。但他们却有没有告诉你，剥开一切温情伪装后，这就是宇宙本来该有的样子。
They have you fight to save the weak. But, what they never told you is that when all the pretenses of kindness and compassion are stripped away, this is how the universe is meant to be.
就像豺狼与羔羊，鹰隼与雀鸟，镰刀与麦穗，猎人与猎物…这一切本该如此。
The wolves and the sheep, the hawks and the sparrows, the sickles and the wheat, the hunter and the prey... This is how it should be.
…休想用花言巧语蒙蔽我，没有什么动物会用如此残忍的方式摧毁一个世界。你们是这片银河里最可憎的毒瘤。
Don't think you can deceive me with some poetic speech! There is no animal alive that would destroy a world so brutally. You are the foulest poison this cosmos has ever seen.
这个宇宙中真正有毒的是仙舟人向你灌输的道德，它把狼豢养成了狐狸。
The real poison is the morality that the Xianzhou people have tried to instill in you. They've raised a wolf into a fox.
仙舟人将吞食与被吞食冠上「邪恶」与「正义」的名目，用这些名目来充当枷锁，铐住你的兽性，驱使你心甘情愿向他们的敌人冲杀。

The world is eat or be eaten. The people of the Xianzhou have made up the names "evil" and "justice" to describe these basic truths. They use these names as shackles to chain your wild nature and drive you to willingly slaughter their enemies.
当仙舟弱小时，他们将自己伪装成受害者来博取你的同情；当仙舟强大时，他们却封你为复仇者要你秉持正义。
When the Xianzhou is weak, they play the victim so they can win your sympathy. When they are strong, they make you their avenger and have you fight in the name of justice.
睁开双眼看看，在这场战争中，你只是一颗受他们摆布的棋子。
Open your eyes. You are nothing more than a pawn in their war.
我找到了…这是你的「怀疑」。
I've found it... This is your shadow of "doubt."
于「月狂」之怒中肆行杀戮，令友军枉死…天击将军，你辜负了联盟的信任！
Blinded by the fury of your Moon Rage, you slaughtered your allies... Merlin's Claw, you have betrayed the Alliance!
你的行止，与那些孽物毫无差别。
Your actions are no different from those of the abominations we stand against!
到底是流着孽物之血…假以时日，她必定会成为联盟的敌人。云骑，列阵！
At the end of the day, it is the blood of the abominations that runs through your veins... One day, you will inevitably become an enemy of the Alliance. Cloud Knights, formation!
你义无反顾地投身于新主人的军队，你以为自己得到了自由、尊重和认可。
You ran into the arms of your new masters' army without hesitation. You thought that you had found freedom, respect, and recognition.
你以为自己伴着「正义」的旗号冲锋行军，你以为只要杀死足够多的步离人，就能成为新主人中的一员。
You thought that you now marched into battle under the flag of "justice." You thought that if you only murdered enough borisin, you could be just like your new masters.
但你错了，他们很明白，狼永远是狼。
But you were wrong. They know all too well that a wolf will always be a wolf.
每次战斗结束，怒火褪去，你面对士兵们又敬又怕的眼神，听闻他们窃窃私语的流言，你明白自己永远没法成为他们中的一员。

At the end of every battle, as your rage faded away, you would look into your fellow soldiers' eyes and see both respect and fear. You would hear their whispers, knowing that you could never become one of them.
你害怕终有一天，在愤怒的烈焰烧尽时，你从猎人变成了怪物。而巡猎的锋镝，永远指向怪物的心脏。
You feared that one day, when the flames of your rage burned out, you would turn from a hunter into a monster. And we all know that the arrows of The Hunt are always aimed at the hearts of monsters.
现在，你最大的恐惧就要成真了：成为仙舟的敌人。
Now, your greatest fear is about to come true: You have become an enemy of the Xianzhou.
您回来了…飞霄大人！是战首回来了！
You have returned... Lord Feixiao! The Warhead has returned!
战首回来了！她会带领我们的！
The Warhead has returned! She has come to lead us!
战首大人将率领我们去往前方！请率领我们，去往前方！
Our Great Warhead will lead us onward! Please lead us, forever onward!
战首万岁！飞霄大人将赐我们未来！
Long live the Warhead! Lord Feixiao will grant us our future!
该是回巢的时候了，飞霄。
It's time to return to the pack, Feixiao.
无论你对步离人怀有多么深重的仇恨，也无论你和我之间怀有多少敌意。我都会为你展示一条你从未设想的道路，因为你做出了选择——

No matter how deep the hatred you bear for the borisin... No matter how much we may consider each other enemies... I will still show you this path that you never imagined was available to you, because you made a choice...
你吞下了「赤月」，你有资格成为步离人的战首。
You devoured the Crimson Moon. You are worthy to become the borisin's Warhead.
那些前来营救我的都蓝子裔，全心期待着当我重获自由时就能扭转战局，改变一切，让所有步离猎群再度兴盛！但这不过是受有心人操弄的美梦罢了。

The descendants of Duran who came to rescue me hoped with all their hearts that once I regained my freedom, I would be able to turn the tide of battle and change the fate of our people, allowing the borisin to return to their former glory! But this was just a dream used by someone with ulterior motives to manipulate the borisin.
他们宁可将求存的希望寄托在虚无缥缈的救主身上，却连一丝垂死搏杀的勇气和力量都没有。这样的步离人，不如让他们尽数灭亡吧！
They would rather place their hopes of survival on an imaginary savior than gain the courage and strength to fight to the death. Borisin like that deserve no more than to be sent to their deaths!
而我，一个被关押七百年的囚徒，连荣耀战死都求之不得的战犯，一旦回归族群就会成为受人摆布的傀儡。我绝不接受这样的命运！

And I, a prisoner who was held captive for over seven hundred years, a criminal of war who was deprived even an honorable death in battle, would become a puppet upon my return, at the mercy of others. This is a fate that I will never accept!
对于真正的强者而言，「狐人」或「步离」只是一个名字，真正的强者能决定自己的道路。
For those who are truly strong, "foxian" and "borisin" are no more than labels. Someone who is truly strong chooses their own path.
我将为自己开辟一条全新的道路，将决定猎群命运的权力交给你——曾经的步离战奴，未来的狐人之主。
I will create that new path for myself. I will pass the right to decide the destiny of the borisin on to you... former borisin war slave and future foxian ruler.
你的医士，椒丘，他如此忠诚地侍奉你，为了治愈你的月狂不惜一死。我告诉过他，解救之道在我手中。
Your healer, Jiaoqiu, served you with such loyalty. He was even willing to die in order to cure your Moon Rage. I told him before that the only way to save you lay in my hands.
只要你点一点头，你将立刻从这场「赤月」带来的疯狂噩梦中醒来，你的身躯将焕然一新。从此，不再有疯狂困扰着你，怀疑只是心头随手拂去的尘埃，恐惧也将荡然无存。

If you just nod your head, you will awaken from this nightmare that the Crimson Moon has inflicted on you, and your body will be born anew. From that moment, you will no longer be trapped by your rage, your doubt will be swept from your mind like dust, and your fear will naturally disappear.
这就是你为我准备的「道路」…成为另一个你？
So, this was the "path" that you prepared for me... To become a new you?
没错，毕竟你和我是如此相似。我们都是为战而生，也是为战而死的怪物。
That's right, we are so similar after all. We are both monsters that were born for war and will die for war.
...I'm sure my answer doesn't need much explanation.
我说过，狐人或步离只是一个名字。你想做谁，就可以做谁。你想做什么，就可以做什么。
I told you before, "foxian" and "borisin" are no more than labels! You can be whoever you want to be. You can do whatever you want to do!
接纳这一切，步离人将会臣服于你。毁灭他们，让他们尸骨无存，或是教化他们成为仙舟的附庸…一切凭你喜欢。
Accept these truths and the borisin will bow to you. Destroy them, reduce them to dust, or teach them to become servants of the Xianzhou... You are free to do as you please.
你的名字将被镌刻在仙舟的史册，或是大敌名录里，一切都由你做主。
Carve your name into the Xianzhou's history books, or into the List of Archenemies. You have the final say.
你不明白，呼雷，你根本不明白，我想要的是什么。
You do not understand, Hoolay. You have no idea what it is that I truly desire.
在我还是个孩子的时候，为了逃离狼头的皮鞭和枷锁，我的双手第一次沾上了血。
When I was just a child, I stained my hands with blood for the first time, in order to escape the whips and shackles of the wolf masters.
我跑不动了…萨兰，他们追上来了吗？
I can't run anymore... Saran, are they catching up?
他们还在，不要停！凝梨，抬头，看天上的光！
They're still behind us, don't stop! Neergul, look up! Look at that light in the sky!
那是「流星」！流星在照耀我们，只要向它许愿，就能得到自由！
That's a "shooting star"! It's shining down on us! If we just tell it our wish, we can have our freedom!
我们所有人都能逃出去！我们会得到自由，然后把它分给更多的窟卢兄弟姐妹！
We will all be able to escape! We'll win our freedom and then share it with our koolur brothers and sisters!
所以，快走吧！我们可以逃走的！
So, you have to run, quickly! We can do it, we can escape!
身后浓重的黑暗中，传来凶狼的呼喝与走兽的嗥叫。
From the dense darkness behind, comes the fierce howls of wolves and the cries of wild beasts.
我们跑啊跑啊，用尽全力，不知彼此奔向了何方。
We ran and ran with all the strength we had, but we ended up losing each other.
我逃出了猎群的追捕，遇到了一个会飞的女人…一名云骑军。
I escaped the hunting pack and encountered a woman that could fly... a Cloud Knight.
我猜你信守了自己的诺言。
I imagine you kept your promise.
很可惜，当我带着她重回故地，想要解放窟卢的同伴时，我看到大地上只留下一个望不见底的深壑。
Unfortunately, when I led her back in order to free my koolur companions, there was nothing left there but a bottomless pit.
妖弓的光芒…灾星坠地，万物俱灭。
The light of the Devilish Archer... A star of calamity that strikes the ground and leaves only devastation in its wake.
在随后的岁月里，我和云骑战友无数次追逐那道光的轨迹，又无数次看着它落下。
In the years that followed, I followed the trail of that light alongside my Cloud Knight allies, and saw it fall countless more times.
渐渐地我明白了，那根本不是什么承载愿望的流星。每一道光矢的出现，意味着一个无可救药的世界和无数生灵的湮灭。
Gradually I came to understand. That light was not some shooting star that carried wishes and aspirations. Each Lux Arrow meant that countless lives in a helpless world were about to be obliterated.
我向天弓之神祈愿，请祂不要再让我目睹「流星」坠下。
I prayed to the God of the Skybow that I would never have to witness one of these "shooting stars" fall again.
是啊，祂们从不回应，放任我等在世间彼此仇杀，这就是我们鏖战至今的理由。
That's right, THEY never answer us. THEY just let us loose in this world to massacre each other. That is why the fierce battle between us has raged to this day.
若是无血无泪、高高在上的神明不垂听凡人的祈愿，那我们就要为自己的渴望而战！
If the gods, who never bleed nor cry, who watch silently from above, refuse to listen to the prayers of mortals, then we have no choice but to fight for our own desires!
你明白了吗，萨兰…你我的相似之处，远比你想得更多。
Do you understand now, Saran... You and I are similar in more ways than you think.
你是一头为战而生，为战而死的野兽！
You are a beast that was born for war and will die for war!
所以，你为之而战的渴望是什么，呼雷？
So, what is it that you yearn for, Hoolay? Why is it that you fight?
为了让天上的众星，成为步离人放牧的原野。
I fight so that I can turn the stars above into a great wilderness for the borisin to roam.
为了终有一日，不再有人目睹「流星」落下…为了能多一个人活着，和我一起回到曜青。
I fight so that one day, I will never have to witness another "shooting star" falling to the ground... So that just one more person can live and return to the Yaoqing alongside me.
宁可抗拒你本应成为的样子，从自由的狼沦落为受人豢养的狐，只为…多一个人？
You would resist becoming the person you were supposed to be, lower yourself from a free wolf to a domesticated fox just for... the sake of one person?
那就如你所愿！我会以你的恐惧和怀疑为养料，抓住你，吞下你——我会取代你…成为「飞霄」！
Then have it your way! I will use your fear and doubt as my nourishment. I will seize you and devour you! I will replace you and... become "Feixiao"!
「我们如此相似，是为战而生，为战而死的怪物」…你说的一点也没错，呼雷。
We are so similar, both monsters that were born for war and will die for war... You were right when you said that, Hoolay.
所以，向天祈愿吧——尽管祂们从不回应。愿「巡猎」的锋镝，贯穿怪物的心脏！
So, I shall pray to the heavens... even if THEY do not respond to me. I pray that the arrows of The Hunt will pierce the heart of every monster!
什…什么？！我们脑袋上可没有耳朵！
Wh—What!? We clearly don't have wolf ears!
绝不会让你们…离开竞锋舰！
I will not allow any of you... to leave the Skysplitter!
她把我们都当成敌人了吗？
Does she think we are her enemies?
呼雷这家伙，豁出命来也要把将军拖下水！
Hoolay just wanted to take down the general, even at the cost of his own life!
可恶，我还以为能停下来喘口气的！
Ugh! Just when I thought we'd get a minute to catch our breath!
怎么办？咱们几个是打还是逃？
What do we do? Do we fight, or run?
事到如今，哪还有逃的选择？
After all this, do you still think running is an option?
自我降生之日起，天空泣血，万物嚎哭。
Since the day I was born, the skies have cried tears of blood, and all living creatures have howled and lamented.
我曾统御群强，猎尽孱弱。
I once commanded the strong and hunted the weak.
现在，我将以你的心兽为武器，以你的名字为猎物…飞霄！
Now, I will use your inner beast as my weapon and your name as my prey... Feixiao!
我会撕开你的伪装，让你认清自己的卑怯无能，呼雷！
I will tear back your disguises and show you how cowardly and powerless you truly are, Hoolay!
狼潜伏在所有步离和狐人的心底…
A wolf lurks in the heart of every borisin and foxian...
一旦你衰弱无力，它就会以你为食！
The moment you grow weak, it will devour you!
Grow complacent and your life will be stolen!
Fight to the death and you shall live forever!
在它捕食我之前，得先向我摇尾乞怜！
If it wants to devour me, it will first have to beg for my mercy!
猎物，尝尝刀剑穿身的滋味！
Prey, taste my blade as it pierces your skin!
这是七百年来我唯一的感觉，痛苦！
This is the only sensation I have experienced for seven hundred years... Pain!
Your fangs and claws have grown dull!
Devour the heavens and envelop the earth!
我会用你的爪牙撕裂你！
I will tear you apart with your own claws!
我会用你的力量压垮你！
I will crush you with your own strength!
我会用你的风暴吞没你！
I will devour you with your own storm!
消失吧，我将从你的血中凯旋！
Be gone! Your blood will give me victory!
心兽，用愤怒碾碎她的意识！！
Inner beast, use your rage and destroy her consciousness!!!
很有气势，不过还远远不够。
Impressive, but you will need much more than that.
Prey, kneel and accept your fate!
这场狩猎游戏，就到此为止吧！
Our little hunting game ends here!
天上威光，心中之狼，随我在此…一同征伐！
Mighty light of the heavens, wolf in my heart, come to me... We shall conquer as one!
呼雷，从你踏进我心中那一刻开始，你就已经输了。
Hoolay, from the very moment you stepped into my mind, you had already lost.
你根本不配成为我的对手。
You were never a match for me.
你所谓的弱肉强食，不过是狡辩。
Your so-called survival of the fittest is nothing but an excuse.
You cannot weaken my resolve, Hoolay.
你想在我内心种下恐惧……
You aim to instill terror within me...
但这些，不过是…幻影罢了。
Yet, all of this is nothing but a... phantom.
Use Basic ATK to break the illusion
我想听听他们作何解释。
I'd like to hear their explanations.
龙师涛然，在此恭迎灵砂小姐。
Welcome, Miss Lingsha. I am Preceptor Taoran.
灵砂拜见龙师长老，久疏问候。妾身这一次来，还带上了一位朋友，说起来他应当不算外人。
Greetings, my honored Preceptor. It's been a while since we last touched base. I've brought a friend with me today. I believe you're already familiar with each other.
涛然…长老？我被放逐时，你已接近转世寿限。可…如今你怎么成了这般模样？
Taoran... Elder Taoran? I remember when I was exiled, you were on the verge of passing on. What's with this new look?
这一切全都是拜您的前世之身所赐啊。若不是你当年任意妄为，我又何须为了担起举族解脱之道另寻险径，将自己变作这般不人不鬼的模样。
All of this is thanks to your past life. Had you not been so rash, I wouldn't have had to walk such a dangerous road to free our clan, becoming this specter of my former self.
丹恒先生，您两度归来，却始终没肯赏脸与我们这些老东西会晤，实在遗憾。如今却要在这个场合下相见，真是造化弄人。
Dan Heng, you've returned twice, but it seems that meeting us fossils wasn't on your agenda. Regrettable, indeed. Now here you are to meet me anyway — life does love its ironies, doesn't it?
我今天随灵砂小姐来，并非为了叙旧。
I didn't come here with Miss Lingsha today to reminisce.
说的是。司鼎大人送来请柬，龙师哪有不赴约的道理。
Indeed. When the Cauldron Master extends an invitation, it's only proper for the Preceptors to attend.
灵砂忝任司鼎一职，丹鼎司里百废待兴，直到今天才能与您相谈，长老见谅。
As the newly appointed Cauldron Master, there's been much to take care of within the Alchemy Commission. It's only now that I've had the chance to speak with you. Please forgive the delay, Elder.
幽囚狱劫狱之事，我寻得一些「物证」送来，龙师一定看过了。
I sent over some evidence regarding the prison break in The Shackling Prison. I trust you've already looked it over.
嗯，你将「魔阴身的遗骸」、「幽囚狱的地图」和一枚「还尘驻形丹」送到了府上。
Yes, you sent us the remains of mara-struck soldiers, a map of The Shackling Prison, and a Semblance Reversion Essence pill.
那遗骸是用云吟术隐藏行迹的刺客，在幽囚狱中助步离人一路畅行无阻。
These are the remains of assassins who used cloudhymn magic to conceal their tracks. They aided in the borisin's escape, allowing them unimpeded passage through The Shackling Prison.
那张勾了线的地图则是「幽囚狱犯人逃亡的路线图」。持明巧匠曾为幽囚狱建造出谋划策，想必涛然先生手中也藏有一份同样的地图。这药丸——

That marked-up map is a map of prisoners' escape routes. Vidyadhara craftsmen once made blueprints for the prison's construction, so I imagine, Mr. Taoran, you have a similar map in your possession. This pill —
是「还尘驻形丹」。不错，幽囚狱劫狱之事，我曾出力擘画。
Is Semblance Reversion Essence. Indeed, I helped plot the prison break in The Shackling Prison.
所以丹鼎司中出现药王秘传与绝灭大君，祸乱丹鼎司，引入星核，令建木重生也和持明脱不了干系？

So the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus joining forces with the Lord Ravager to stir up trouble in the Alchemy Commission, the introduction of the Stellaron, and the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection — all have something to do with the Vidyadhara?
很意外吗？两位受神策府的指派，作为使者前来，不就是想听我俯首自白吗？
Are you surprised? After all, both of you were sent here by the Seat of Divine Foresight as messengers, to hear my confession, weren't you?
虽不意外，但我仍感痛心。
This is not unexpected, but it still brings me pain.
你受将军指派前来，不就是想听我俯首自白吗？若你心中存有一丝不忍，就该明白我做这一切的动机。
You were sent here by the general to hear my confession, weren't you? If there's even a shred of empathy in you, you should understand the reasons behind everything I've done.
自饮月之乱后，持明人丁日稀。龙尊流放，我和几位龙师不得不勉力支绌，挽狂澜于既倒。方法或许有些激进，或许不被理解，但说到底都只为一件事——「持明的存续」。

Ever since the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae, the population of the Vidyadhara has dwindled. With the high elder exiled, a few of us Preceptors had to do what we could to turn the tide. My methods might have been drastic, perhaps even incomprehensible, but it was all for one cause — the survival of the Vidyadhara.
奈何仙舟人一意禁绝寿瘟祸迹，对持明的苦难袖手旁观。丹恒，灵砂，身为持明的你们，应该了解我的苦心。我所做的不过是求生二字罢了。

Yet, the Xianzhou natives zealously forbid any plaguemarks and did nothing while the Vidyadhara suffered. Dan Heng, Lingsha, as Vidyadhara, you should understand the desperation behind my actions. All I've tried to do is to ensure our survival.
我何尝不知持明所面临的问题。求生也并非罪过。
I'm well aware of the challenges the Vidyadhara face. Fighting for survival isn't a sin.
但是长老的所为，超出了求生者应行的界限…犹如只知「繁育」的兽，却没有一丝人心慈爱可言。
But Elder, your actions have gone beyond mere survival... You've become a beast driven solely by the Propagation, devoid of even a hint of empathy.
喔？即便自称「高贵的龙脉」，我们自始至终也不过是直立行走的动物。种族存续是根本之事，我若不做兽行，持明怕是连人都做不得了！

Oh? Despite calling ourselves a "noble draconic bloodline," at our core, we're merely bipedal beasts. The survival of our kind is paramount. If I hadn't resorted to beastly actions, the Vidyadhara might not even exist!
古之所谓「圣人不仁」，龙尊放下了维系一族存续的职责，便只能由我将天下大恶归于己身！
The sages show no mercy, as the old wisdom goes. When the high elder abandoned our people's survival, I had to shoulder the world's sins alone!
灵砂、丹恒，往者已矣，但持明的未来仍然握在你们的手里。如今罗浮仙舟上形势遽变，我等持明原该团结一心，切莫再蹈前世饮月之过。

Lingsha, Dan Heng, the past is behind us, but the future of the Vidyadhara still lies within your grasp. The situation on the Xianzhou Luofu has changed rapidly. As Vidyadhara, we must unite in purpose and avoid the mistakes of the previous Imbibitor Lunae.
妾身来这儿，本就是来听听长老的解释。但没想到长老除了擅长讲大道理外，小动作也做得不少啊。
I came here to listen to your explanation. But I never imagined that, besides being good at preaching, you'd also have quite a few tricks up your sleeve.
丹恒先生，麻烦您将这里的香炉找出来，香里的气味有问题。
Dan Heng, could you please find the incense burner? The incense smells... wrong.
哼，「金蟾啮锁烧香入」，焚香迎客本是雅事一件。哎，可惜 ，可惜。
Hmph, the burning of incense is a respectful way of welcoming guests. Such a refined tradition, sadly, seems to be forgotten here.
丹恒先生，我嗅到了一丝古怪的气味，长老迎接我们，恐怕是藏了些手段。麻烦你将这香气源头找出来掐灭。
Dan Heng, I smell a strange scent in the air. It seems the elder is welcoming us with some hidden tricks. Could you please track down the source of this scent and put it out?
丹鼎司、太卜司中常见的焚香小炉，里面静静燃烧着几乎难以辨识的烟气。
A small incense burner, commonly seen in the Alchemy Commission and Divination Commission, quietly smolders, its wisps of smoke nearly indistinguishable.
你相信灵砂的判断，这焚香里显然做了手脚。得立刻熄灭它才行。
You trust Lingsha's judgment. Clearly, the incense has been tampered with. It must be extinguished immediately.
丹恒先生，我嗅到的香味应该就在这附近，麻烦你了。
Dan Heng, the scent I smell should be right around here. I could use your assistance.
就连我为客人所备的焚香也要被怀疑…持明一族内部的信任已沦落至此。
Even the incense I prepared for guests is considered suspicious... The trust among the Vidyadhara has fallen so low.
我本对罗浮持明背叛联盟一事将信将疑…但听完长老剖陈己罪，我觉得奢谈信任，并无意义。
I was initially skeptical about the Vidyadhara's betrayal of the Alliance... But after hearing your confession, I realize that there is no point in talking about trust.
触犯了联盟的天条，将为持明全族带来刀兵之灾。就算重获了繁衍的可能，又能如何？
Breaking the covenant of our alliance will bring war upon the Vidyadhara. Even if we are able to have offspring again, what difference will it make?
恰恰相反，我所行之事，一旦功成，联盟将视持明为救星。因为联盟与持明的最终的利益是一致的。
Once my plan succeeds, the alliance will see the Vidyadhara as their saviors, because both parties ultimately share the same interests.
喔？谈论「求存」不成，长老要谈「利益」了吗？
Oh? So now that "survival" won't convince us, you want to talk about "interests"?
联盟与丰饶民血战千年，但一直未决出胜负，你们考虑过为什么吗？因为若联盟得胜，必将成为下一个丰饶民；若作战失利，联盟将陷入灭绝的地步。

For a thousand years, the Alliance has been engaged in brutal warfare against the Denizens of Abundance, yet victory has remained beyond reach. Have you ever wondered why? Should the Alliance emerge victorious, they will inevitably become the next Denizens of Abundance. However, if they suffer defeat, the Alliance will face extinction.
故而长久以来，联盟虚伪地维持着这其中危如累卵的平衡。但我却有超脱困局之道。
Thus, the Alliance has deceitfully upheld this precarious balance. However, I have a way to escape from this dilemma.
联盟的解救之道，就藏在「化龙秘法」中！
The Alliance's path to salvation lies within the secret of dragon transmutation!
想象一下，如果有一种方法能将其他生命转化为持明。联盟便有了源源不绝的士兵，无需为死伤减员所苦。
Imagine if there were a way to transform other life forms into Vidyadhara. The Alliance would then possess an endless stream of soldiers and would not need to worry about casualties.
一旦战争结束，这些士兵也不会继续繁衍，无需担忧其泛滥成灾。这就是「仙舟联盟」的解救之法，令寰宇断绝寿瘟之苦的上上善道。唯我持明可以做到！

Once the war ended, these soldiers would cease reproduction, eliminating concerns of overpopulation. This is the way to salvation for the Xianzhou Alliance, the ultimate path to end the universe's suffering under the immortality plague. Only we, the Vidyadhara, can achieve this!
…长老就是靠这个说辞，说动持明族中那些懵懂无知的人为你卖命吗？
So, you relied on this rhetoric to manipulate the ignorant members of the Vidyadhara into serving you?
灵砂，对您失望之极。您的所思所想已是非人。云骑！
I am deeply disappointed in you, Elder. Your thoughts and intentions are completely devoid of empathy. Cloud Knights!
丹恒先生，还有灵砂姐姐！大家…都在这儿啊？
Mr. Dan Heng, and Sister Lingsha! Everyone's... here?
你以为我不知道，你们送信的来意？是景元要你们来试探我的吧？
You think I don't know why you're really here? Jing Yuan sent you here to test me, didn't he?
按联盟与持明的盟誓，不得在持明领地中令持明流血受伤。各位要在罗浮龙尊的见证下破弃盟誓？

According to the oath between the Alliance and the Vidyadhara, it's forbidden to spill Vidyadhara blood on their own territory. Are you all ready to violate this oath in the presence of the Luofu's high elder?
龙女大人切莫惊慌。长老，持明圣地和龙尊不是握在你手中的保命符！
Dragon Lady, there's no need to panic. Elder, the Vidyadhara sacred grounds and the high elder are not to be used as pawns in exchange for your life!
长老一路高谈阔论，看似忧国忧民，头头是道，结果最后关头还是将一个小女孩来当作保命符，实在是可笑可悯。
You talk a big game, as if you have the nation and people's best interests at heart. But when it really matters, you use a small girl as your shield. It's ridiculously pitiful.
我已经说过了，求生从来不是罪过。各位与我都是持明，本该理解我的苦心。我身为持明，也为诸位留下和而不同的体面法子。
I've said it before, survival is never a sin. We are all Vidyadhara, so you should understand my intentions. And as a Vidyadhara, I will leave for you a dignified solution.
各位现在退出鳞渊境，上书联盟高层，由六御公审降罪，处我以褪鳞之刑，转世重生。
Leave the Scalegorge Waterscape immediately, and appeal to the top echelons of the Alliance. Let the Six Charioteers hold a trial and sentence me to exuviation and rebirth.
涛然先生的如意算盘我倒是一清二楚。持明转生，前世之罪一笔勾销…但龙师们在转世过程中所做的龌龊手脚我也不是不清楚。你虽不是你，但你还会是你。

I see right through your plans, Mr. Taoran. Vidyadhara rebirth erases past crimes... but I'm well aware of the Preceptors' dirty tricks during rebirth. You might not be you, but you will still be you.
我不会借口「一无所知」而轻易为自己宽宥往罪，也不会任由你们乘隙脱责。
I won't forgive myself for past sins under the pretext of "knowing nothing," nor will I allow you to evade accountability.
丹恒，我自来讨厌你的不识时务，转世重生，你一点也没变。
Dan Heng, I've always disliked your inability to see the bigger picture. Rebirth hasn't changed you one bit.
白露小姐，您贵为罗浮持明的龙尊，请告诉我，您此刻的想法。
Miss Bailu, as high elder of the Luofu Vidyadhara, please share your thoughts at this moment.
我…我不想留在这儿。我不想再被人差来遣去！我不是任人摆布的娃娃！请你们带我走！
I... I don't want to stay here. I'm tired of being pushed around! I'm not some puppet to be controlled! Please, take me away with you!
按盟誓所言，联盟之人不得在此杀伤持明。但我早已不是联盟的子民，我只是一个来去自由的无名客。

As the oath dictates, members of the Alliance are forbidden from harming Vidyadhara here. But I've long since severed ties with the Alliance. Right now I'm simply a Nameless, free to come and go as I please.
仙舟的盟誓，管不了我手中的枪！
The oath of the Xianzhou means nothing to the spear in my hand!
我…一切还好。谢谢几位把我救了回来。
I... I'm fine. Thank you for rescuing me.
You... you actually came here in person!?
若不如此，便不能听到长老的高论。
Otherwise, I wouldn't be able to hear your lofty opinions.
你要的六御公审，自是逃不脱的。除此之外，我会致函方壶的{RUBY_B#玄全}伏波将军{RUBY_E#}，以她嫉恶如仇的性子，想必会做出更加公允的处置吧。

The public trial you seek with the Six Charioteers is inevitable. In addition, I'll write to {RUBY_B#Xuanquan}the Seiche Queller{RUBY_E#} of the Fanghu. With her hatred for evil, I'm sure she will make a just decision.
如果是那位大人，定能让罗浮上下的持明族心服口服。
If it's her, she will earn the respect and assent of all the Vidyadhara on the Luofu.
…论武力将军确实更胜一筹。但若是将军以为能就此对我们龙师进行一番清算，倒也不必想得如此美好。

...In terms of martial prowess, you indeed have the upper hand. But if you're under the impression that this advantage can be used to settle the score with us Preceptors, that's quite an overestimation.
凭着持明在联盟中的根基，你真以为能对我们做些什么？
Given the Vidyadhara's foundation within the Alliance, do you really think you can do anything to us?
就像我一开始说的那样。我会揽下所有罪过…成为替罪羊。
As I mentioned, I'll take all the blame and become the scapegoat.
凭我所知的秘密，光是审讯就要花上许久许久。到最后出于种种利益交换，我一定会活下来。这一点你比我更明白，毕竟这就是你最爱玩弄的「权衡」之术嘛。

With the secrets I possess, the interrogation alone will take an eternity. And in the end, through various exchanges of interests, I am certain to survive. You understand this better than anyone, as it's the very art of "trade-offs" you love to wield.
最后我要提醒将军…我听闻呼雷脱狱，直奔竞锋舰而去，血洗演武仪典的惨状恐怕不难想象。也许在我被判罪之前，联盟的弹劾会先让将军焦头烂额吧？

Lastly, a word of caution to you... I heard that Hoolay has escaped from prison and is headed directly for the Skysplitter. The bloodshed at the Wardance is bound to be gruesome. Perhaps, even before my trial, your impeachment will have you in dire straits first?
很遗憾，涛然先生，今日的竞锋舰上只有云骑，没有观众。
Regrettably, Mr. Taoran, the Skysplitter only hosted Cloud Knights today, no audience.
就在刚才，呼雷，已在云骑围攻下授首了。
And just moments ago, Hoolay was executed by the Cloud Knights.
呵呵…哈哈…哈哈哈哈哈哈……
快、快救我！把我从墙上放下来！
Quick, get me down from this wall!
动手！尽你们所能！我要这几个人有来无回！
Get them! Do whatever it takes! Make sure they don't leave here alive!
「猎狼守擂」行动结束，地衡司的使者们抚恤民众，一时惊扰也旋即平复。
Operation "Wolfhunt Showdown" has ended. The messengers from the Realm-Keeping Commission are calming down the populace and the momentary disruption has subsided.
有太多话还没来得及讲…
There's so much we didn't have the chance to say...
三月小姐！我的三月小姐！
Miss March! My dear Miss March!
我去个盥洗室的工夫，你们都给我安排好了是吧？{NICKNAME}，你能不能陪龙女大人玩点阳间的游戏？
I was only in the bathroom for a little bit, and you've already arranged my death? {NICKNAME}, can't you play some normal games with Dragon Lady?
这样过家家比较真情实感！
This kind of make-believe adds a genuine touch!
You really can't keep your mouth shut, can you?
好啦！别玩了，该去探望我的师父们了。
Alright! Enough playing. It's time to visit my masters.
病房就在那边，你们自己过去吧～下次有时间再来找我玩哦！
The infirmary is right over there. You can go by yourselves. Come back and visit me when you have time!
下次别再和{NICKNAME}玩这种超真实过家家了好不好？
Next time, let's not play overly realistic make-believe with {NICKNAME}, okay?
没办法嘛～这次猎狼行动，飞霄将军没给我什么发挥的空间。
Well, there's not much I could do. General Feixiao didn't really give me any chance to shine during this Wolf Hunt operation.
要换我在擂台上，一棒下去，就算十个呼雷也要给我趴下。
If I had been in the ring, I could've knocked down ten Hoolays with just one strike.
你的话倒是和彦卿师父说得一毛一样。不过嘛，眼下他和云璃全都被送进了丹鼎司好好强制休养了。
You sound exactly like Master Yanqing. But for now, both he and Yunli have been forced to go to the Alchemy Commission for some well-needed rest.
唉，剑术造诣最低的我却没什么事，得好好感谢二位师父替我分担成吨的伤害才行啊。
I'm the least accomplished in swordplay, but I came out unscathed. I really ought to thank my masters for taking all the blows on my behalf.
而在丹鼎司中，{NICKNAME}正悼念着某人……
Meanwhile, in the Alchemy Commission, {NICKNAME} is mourning for someone...
呵呵，看看这是谁来了。人见人爱的{NICKNAME}，以及花见花开的小三月。
Look who's here. The beloved {NICKNAME} and the charming March 7th.
今天你们来丹鼎司…哦，我明白了，{NICKNAME}想必是来陪三月探望两位师父的吧？
You came to the Alchemy Commission today... Oh, I get it. {NICKNAME} is here with March to visit her masters, aren't you?
没错没错，二位师父目前还好吧？
Exactly. How are my masters doing at the moment?
可惜，在这里只有一位师父，我还好哦。
Unfortunately, only one master is here. I'm doing fine.
云璃师父擅自跑出来的？
Did Master Yunli run out on her own?
我也是听从医嘱的人，白露小姐说我可以随便走走，我才出来走走的。
I'm just following the doctor's advice. Miss Bailu said I could take a stroll, so here I am.
你们的彦卿师父就没有那么幸运了，估计现在还躺着吧……
Your Master Yanqing wasn't as lucky. He's probably still in bed...
Master Yanqing... didn't make it in the end?
喂，小心说话！你可不要咒我师父喔！
Hey, watch your words! Don't you jinx my master!
他的伤倒是没有重到那个程度…不过嘛，更长的静养时间还是少不了的。
His injuries weren't that severe... but well, he'll still need some more time to rest.
毕竟又是激战呼雷，又是和飞霄将军…咳，狠狠切磋了一下武艺！他那副小身板，早就顶不住了。
Considering the intense battle with Hoolay and then with General Feixiao... ahem, the rigorous sparring session with her! His small body couldn't take it anymore.
云璃师父，你不也是大战了一场吗？
Master Yunli, didn't you also engage in combat?
哼哼，罗浮的小娃娃呀，体质就是没咱们朱明的孩子这么棒！
Haha, the little babies from the Luofu just don't have the resilience that us kids from the Zhuming have!
对了，听貊泽说起他们这队人马被狼卒围困，打了一场苦战。{NICKNAME}，你和貊泽并肩作战，有没有受伤？
I heard from Moze about the tough battle against the Wolftroopers. {NICKNAME}, you fought alongside Moze. Did you get hurt?
…敌人基本被飞霄将军解决了。
...The enemies were mostly taken care of by General Feixiao.
我听在场的云骑说了。但从几十个狼卒到数千个狼卒有十来种版本的传言…目前数量还在继续增长中，越听越离谱！

I heard a few versions of the story from the Cloud Knights who were there. The number of Wolftroopers went from a few dozen to thousands, and the number keeps rising. It's becoming more absurd by the minute!
仔细想来，似乎没有机会受伤。
Now that I think about it, I didn't really have a chance to get hurt.
原因大概能够猜到了，一定是飞霄将军太强了。
I can guess why: General Feixiao is just too strong.
云璃，你给我好好躺着去！
对了，那个眯眯眼的狐狸医士，还有那个戴兜帽的家伙……
What about that smiley fox healer and the guy with the hood...
幸好{NICKNAME}他们找到了重伤的椒丘，他失血太多，需要好好静养。他和貊泽都身负重伤，被妾身狠狠地关了禁闭，一个都别想离开丹鼎司。

Thank goodness {NICKNAME} and the others found Jiaoqiu. He lost a lot of blood and needs to rest properly. He and Moze are seriously wounded. I've had to forcibly confine them to the Alchemy Commission.
这三人伤势都危及性命，得亏了咱们罗浮仙舟还有一位神奇的衔药龙女，已是不幸中的万幸了。
All three from the Yaoqing are critically injured, but fortunately, the Xianzhou Luofu has a miraculous Healer Lady. It's a silver lining in this misfortune.
啊，看来这曜青仙舟的使团，整个都在丹鼎司里集合了。要不我们买些水果，去看望一下飞霄将军？
Ah, it looks like the entire delegation from the Xianzhou Yaoqing has gathered at the Alchemy Commission. Why don't we go see General Feixiao and bring her some fruit?
妾身本来想说「不行，得让这几人静养」…不过算了，谁让这两人有个一样不安分的老大呢。
I would normally say no because they need to rest... but, alas, what can you do when the two of them have a leader who is just as restless?
飞霄将军刚从静养病房里溜走了，她自以为身手了得。整个丹鼎司上下动静我可一清二楚。
General Feixiao just slipped out of the recovery room. She thinks she's so sneaky, but I know everything that happens in the Alchemy Commission.
你们若想探望，可以去波月古海边转转，我瞧见她向那儿去了。
If you're looking to meet her, the Lunarescent Depths might be your best bet. I spotted her heading that way earlier.
我刚才在波月古海边散步时，见到飞霄将军正在陪他们闲聊。你们若想探望，可以去那边转转。
While taking a walk by the Lunarescent Depths, I spotted General Feixiao chatting with them. If you wish to visit them, you can head over there.
哈，听脚步声…这不是飞霄将军吗？怎么不听医嘱好好养伤，一个人又跑出来了。
The sound of those footsteps... They must belong to General Feixiao. Out and about despite the doctor's orders?
真巧啊，这里还有一位不听医嘱的人。
What a coincidence! Someone else who refuses to listen to the doctor's orders.
我自己就是医生嘛，对身体情况的了解，未必逊色于那位龙女大人。
Well, being a doctor myself, I don't think my knowledge of my own body is inferior to the Dragon Lady's.
医者不自医，在我面前你就别逞强了。
The healer does not heal himself. Don't try to act tough in front of me.
…抱歉，椒丘。我没想到你会用「以毒饲狼」的做法，多么失策，要是我能早一点找到你们…要是我没有派你去幽囚狱……
... I'm sorry, Jiaoqiu. I didn't expect you to use poison that way. What a miscalculation. If only I'd found you sooner... If only I hadn't sent you to The Shackling Prison...
这话说的，当真是我认识的那个飞霄吗？难不成是步离人的刺客，佯装成你的声音来取我性命？
The way you're speaking, is this really the Feixiao I know? Or could it be a borisin assassin, imitating your voice to take my life?
椒丘，你的眼睛…看不见了，是吗？
Jiaoqiu, your eyes... You can't see anymore, can you?
现在我还能听见海浪的声音，它们很清晰…这便足够了。
I can still clearly hear the sound of the waves. That's enough for me.
不必自责，你知道我更关心什么：在吞下「赤月」后，你的身体有什么变化吗？
Don't blame yourself. You know what I'm more concerned about. Has your body had any changes since you swallowed the Crimson Moon?
我不知道，它似乎什么都没有改变…但以前困扰我的许多疑虑烟消云散了……
I'm not sure. There don't appear to be any changes... However, the many doubts that once plagued me have dissipated.
我本以为自己无法再活着听你谈论自己的身体了…但，感谢貊泽和那个孩子。相对于如今的结果，我所支付的代价实在微不足道……
I never thought I'd live to hear you discuss your health again... But thanks to Moze and that child, the price I've paid seems trivial compared to what we've achieved.
我毫无怨言，飞霄，我很满足。
I hold no grievances, Feixiao. I am content.
…我不懂该怎么说些宽慰人心的话，对怎么治好别人的病也一窍不通。
...I don't know how to offer words of comfort, nor do I know much about curing others' ailments.
我只是一介武人，所以，我也只能给你一种承诺……
I am just a warrior, so my pledge to you is simple...
宇宙浩瀚，一定有人能治好你的双眼，我会找到他。而在那之前……
In this vast universe, there's bound to be someone who can heal your eyes. I'll find them. But until then...
这场风波背后的威胁也需有人清理。
The threat behind all this chaos needs to be dealt with.
想必你心里已有了念头。说出来吧。
You must already have some ideas. Let them out.
药王残党的出世，步离人的群集…那只隐于幕后的黑手搅动风云，要的便是联盟首尾难顾，最终如一支流矢，无所中的。
The resurgence of the Sanctus Medicus and the gathering of the borisin... are merely distractions orchestrated by an unseen force, meant to divide the Alliance's attention.
可惜这一次，他们惹错了人。待返回曜青后，我将亲自率领青丘军出征……
Unfortunately, they picked the wrong fight this time. Once we return to the Yaoqing, I'll personally lead the Verdant Knights into battle.
…誓要击落一名绝灭大君，令烬灭军团明白「巡猎」的意义。
...I vow to take down a Lord Ravager and teach the Ruin Legion the true meaning of The Hunt.
我就知道…你一向是个停不下来的急性子啊。
I knew it... You've always been so impatient.
抱歉，和来时一样，我又迟到了。
I apologize for my tardiness, once again.
丹鼎司留我查验身体状况，花了不少时间，待确认无事后他们才将我放了回来。
The Alchemy Commission detained me for some time for a health examination. They released me only after ensuring I was in good condition.
将军安然无恙，老朽和景元悬着的心可算是放下了。
General, seeing you safe and sound puts our minds at ease.
此番呼雷逃狱之事，引发不小的动荡，也令演武仪典被迫中断，当真是一场无妄之灾。好在后生可畏，几个年轻人赴汤蹈火，弭平了这场大灾，也算是不幸中的万幸。

Hoolay's escape caused significant upheaval and forced the Wardance to be put on hold — a truly unforeseen disaster. Fortunately, the younger generation showed their valor. They bravely tackled the crisis, putting an end to the disaster and providing a glimmer of hope in a dire situation.
太卜符玄在前往玉阙仙舟述职前，我曾向她问卜仪典之事。她留下字条说「卦象涨落于震乾之间，是大壮之相」，纵有波折也能安然度过。

Before Master Diviner Fu Xuan's departure for the Yuque, I consulted with her about the Wardance. She left a note stating, "The hexagram oscillates between thunder and heaven, a sign of great power," assuring us that we would successfully navigate any challenges.
她要我相信年轻人的能力，放手任其施为。如此说来，卜测确实应验了。
She advised me to trust the younger generation's abilities and let them lead. Her predictions, it appears, have come true.
只是…罗浮仙舟数百年来负责囚禁呼雷，押解移交前，他却死在了竞锋舰的擂台上。这件事传入联盟高层的耳朵里，又会惹来不少非议。
It's just... the Xianzhou Luofu's longstanding duty of keeping Hoolay imprisoned ended with his death on the Skysplitter. This event is likely to bring much criticism from the Alliance's upper ranks.
呼雷之死未必是坏事。消息传开，既能重挫步离人卷土重来的企图，也能绝了有心人利用他的野心。

However, Hoolay's demise might actually be a blessing in disguise. Broadcasting this news could derail the borisin's resurgence and quash the ambitions of those who wished to take advantage of his return.
将呼雷的遗体移交曜青仙舟即可，至于向联盟解释的事情，由我来办就好。
Hand over Hoolay's remains to the Xianzhou Yaoqing, and I'll handle the explanations to the Alliance.
倒是「演武仪典」该怎么说？虽然猎狼计划顺利完成，竞锋舰上的事无人知晓。但步离人袭击闹市的消息一定会不胫而走。

But, what about the Wardance? While the wolf-hunt mission was a success, the events on the Skysplitter remain a secret. However, the news of the borisin's attacks on the streets will spread like wildfire.
仪典中断，就务必重开。至于目击袭击的观众，我们不仅要多加安抚，也要让他们看到仙舟云骑的舍生忘死。
The Wardance was interrupted, so it must be reconvened. As for the people who witnessed the attacks, beyond placating them, we also need to show them the Xianzhou Cloud Knights' fearless dedication.
「仪典首日，有步离凶徒妄图制造恐慌，幸得前来观礼的天击将军率云骑化解危机，击毙狂徒。」这样的英雄故事不但货真价实，传开了也人人爱看，最能平息谣言非议。

"On the Wardance's opening day, rogue borisin attempted to stir up panic but were swiftly neutralized by the Merlin's Claw and the Cloud Knights." A genuine tale of heroism that will captivate and calm the public.
那就依炎老的意思。罗浮会尽力抚恤死伤，裨补损失，务求在数周之内重开演武仪典。
As Elder Huaiyan suggests, the Luofu will do its best to heal the wounded and compensate those who were affected. We aim to reopen the Wardance in the coming weeks.
如此一来，罗浮内的事情算是议定了。不过我更担心这桩祸事背后所涉及的那只黑手——
This settles the immediate concerns on the Luofu, but my thoughts linger on the orchestrator behind these events.
从建木灾异开始，罗浮仙舟所经历种种变乱，全都与绝灭大君「幻胧」息息相关。
From the onset of the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis, the Xianzhou Luofu has experienced numerous disturbances, directly linked to the Lord Ravager Phantylia.
操纵步离人渗透仙舟，唆使罗浮龙师加入药王秘传乱党…虽然从结果来看，她的图谋暂时无法奏效。但我有种感觉…也许她并不在意自己的计划是否能成功。

Her attempt to infiltrate the Xianzhou with the borisin and sway the Luofu Preceptors to join the Sanctus Medicus' insurrection was unsuccessful. But I have a feeling that she is indifferent to the success of her plans.
由过往行事的风格来看，比起武力上的胜利，幻胧更希望能在盟友之间凿开不和的裂缝，播撒混乱的种子。如果联盟无法弥合这些裂痕，最终就会崩解成一盘散沙。
Rather than outright victory, Phantylia's motive seems to lie in breeding discord and chaos among allies. Should the Alliance fail to mend these rifts, it risks disintegrating into a pile of sand.
仙舟联盟数千年未曾变改的目标，我们手中所握的锋镝，也许应该顺势而动，指向新的敌人了。待到仪典结束，我打算向元帅进言上奏此事。

The goal of the Xianzhou Alliance has not changed for thousands of years. Perhaps we should point the weapons in our hands toward this new adversary. I plan to bring this matter before the marshal following the Wardance.
以炎老的洞见，元帅会如何应对？
With Elder Huaiyan's insight, one wonders how the marshal will react.
到了这一步，棋盘上所摆的乃是数千琥珀纪以来未曾有过的棋局。在这样的棋局里，就连棋手们也会成为上阵拼杀的卒子，胜负所系乃是天上万千星辰的明灭。

It's clear we're engaged in a game of chess not seen in thousands of Amber Eras, a game where even the strategists become pawns in battle, where the stakes are as high as the fates of countless stars in the sky.
老朽…无法断言元帅的决定。但我们所担忧的一切，元帅并非无所察觉。她已命令{RUBY_B#戎韬将军}爻光将军{RUBY_E#}日夜演算，占决大略。

Predicting the marshal's decision is beyond me, yet she's well aware of our concerns. She has tasked {RUBY_B#The Seer Strategist}General Yao Guang{RUBY_E#} with performing extrapolations day and night to gauge the situation comprehensively.
今天之所以召各位汇聚此处，不仅仅是为了商议罗浮的难题，还有一件事需要我们三人同时在场——
We gathered today not just to tackle the Luofu's predicaments but also to address a matter requiring our collective presence.
爻光从玉阙仙舟发来了她的通讯印信，她要将近些时日在阵法中参详计算的结果与我们分享。
Yao Guang has sent a message from the Xianzhou Yuque, informing us that she wishes to share the results of recent calculations she made within the matrix.
景元，我要借神策府那方「棋盘」一用。
Jing Yuan, I'd like to borrow the Seat of Divine Foresight's "chess board" for this purpose.
玉阙仙舟的深处，一座古老的「钟」被人敲响。它漾开的余波滑过了引力的丘壑。
An ancient "bell" has been struck in the depths of the Xianzhou Yuque, its soundwaves rippling over the valleys and hills of gravity.
于是，光从棋盘的纵横间喷薄而出，织成了代表戎韬将军的印信。
Thus, light bursts forth from the chessboard's grid, weaving into a seal symbolizing the Seer Strategist's authority.
各位，好久不见啊！距离上一次列席会议已过去三十多年，这段时间我可是一直日夜思念着几位将军啊☰☰。
Hello everyone, it's been a long time! Over three decades have passed since we last convened, and I've dearly missed each of you generals during this time ☰☰.
戎韬将军是念叨我们几人，还是「念叨」我们几人的命数走向啊？
Was the Seer Strategist thinking of us, or thinking of the fates we're destined for?
哈哈，天击将军还是这般快人快语，☳☶可不讨人喜欢喔。
The Merlin's Claw, as blunt as always, ☳☶ though not everyone's cup of tea, huh?
此前还对景元先生说什么「幸好此行是我前来，若是换做戎韬将军，问话或许就不会这么友善了」——我可是瞧得一清二楚，不知这场对话成真了没有？

You once told Jing Yuan, "You're lucky that I'm the one who came this time. If it were the Seer Strategist, this conversation might not be so friendly." I'm intrigued — did that conversation really come to pass?
我可从没听人说起过，「十方光映法界」连嚼舌根的密谈都能算得一清二楚。看来元帅不止派了两位将军前来罗浮观礼，还有第三位客人不请自来啊。

I've never heard anyone mention that the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier could eavesdrop on even the quietest whispers. It appears that the marshal sent not just two generals to the Luofu but an uninvited third guest as well.
毕竟联盟总有人说景元先生「智光昭昭，不逊『戎韬』」，罗浮遭此劫难，玉阙自然不会坐视不管☰☲。
People have been saying that Mr. Jing Yuan's intellect shines as brightly as the Seer Strategist's. With the Luofu caught in such strife, the Yuque couldn't just stand by and watch.
戎韬将军，黄钟系统能维持的时间有限。长话短说吧。
Seer Strategist, our time with the Yellowbell is limited. Let's get straight to the point.
好啊。托景元先生的福，{RUBY_B#罗刹与镜流}那两位囚犯{RUBY_E#}，玉阙已审讯完毕了。
Alright. Thanks to Mr. Jing Yuan, the interrogation of {RUBY_B#Luocha and Jingliu}the two prisoners{RUBY_E#} on the Yuque has concluded.
他们自认的罪行中，「将星核送入罗浮」这一项与景元先生的推测一致，不过是子虚乌有、自编自造的障眼法。
Mr. Jing Yuan's speculations were correct. Of the crimes they confessed to, planting a Stellaron on the Luofu was a complete fabrication, meant to mislead.
而真正的目标…是想借此得到面见元帅的机会，献上他们擘画的「与神相争之策」——这一点千真万确。
Their real aim was to secure a meeting with the marshal to present their Godslayer Protocol — a strategy they firmly believe in.
镜流与那名异邦人，献出了什么策略？
And what was this grand strategy proposed by Jingliu and that traveler?
可谓是一番难以言说、壮丽绝伦的图景☳☳。奥秘就在于那金发异邦人的棺椁……
The narrative they painted was vast and difficult to put into words ☳☳. It all revolves around the coffin of the blond traveler...
...to be precise, it's the remnants of the Propagation.
The remains of the Swarm Author?
准确地说，是其神体的一部分。在两位囚犯描绘的未来中，它便是能将「寿瘟祸祖」牢牢钉上末日之途的钉子。
More accurately, it's a fragment of the divine body. In the future they depicted, this fragment serves as the final nail, sealing the fate of the Plagues Author and securing its doom.
而在这之前——要与神相争，更大的「联盟」不可或缺。为此，他们还向仙舟引介了一位盟友。
Before reaching that point, battling the gods necessitates a larger alliance. Hence, they sought out an ally for the Xianzhou.
想必诸位都听过天才俱乐部#81阮•梅的大名吧？玉阙的「眼」看到了，这位不请自来的客人已经抵达了罗浮仙舟。
I assume you've all heard of the famed Genius Society member #81, Ruan Mei, haven't you? The "eye" of the Yuque has just seen this uninvited guest arrive on the Xianzhou Luofu.
…三、二、一。时间刚好！至于如何接待这位贵客…请允许我将这烫手山芋丢给各位咯。
...Three, two, one. Right on time! Now, as for the best way to receive our distinguished guest... I'll leave that in your capable hands.
代表将军印信的光消逝殆尽，如同它降临时那样迅速。
The light representing the general's seal fades as swiftly as it arrived.
禀告将军，天才俱乐部的阮•梅博士的舰船已经抵达港口，她希望求见您。
General, Dr. Ruan Mei from the Genius Society has docked and is requesting to see you.
我明白了。对方可有说明来意？
I understand. Did she explain her intentions?
她说，她的船上有一名罗浮仙舟的接渡使，因为遭逢意外漂流在外。出于道义，她将此人送回故乡——
She mentioned she has an amicassador of the Xianzhou Luofu on her ship. They were cast adrift after an accident. She's bringing this person home out of a sense of duty —
你还记得自己的名字吗？
小女子…叫停云，我是罗浮仙舟「鸣火」商团的接渡使……
My name is... Tingyun. I serve as an amicassador of the Whistling Flames merchant guild on the Xianzhou Luofu...
…到处都找不到那条傻狗…陛下，我以前没怎么来过「黄金的时刻」，实在不知道他会跑到哪里去……
...Can't find that idiot pooch anywhere... Your Majesty, I've never really been to the Golden Hour before, so I really don't know where he could have gone to...
别着急，朕会帮你找到他的。唉…不过这城市确实大得出奇，朕以前的首都都没这么大。
Worry not. I will help you find him. *sigh* This city is a sprawling maze though. Even my capital was not this vast.
大海捞针肯定不是办法，你有没有什么其他线索？比如他可能会去哪里？
This is like finding a needle in a haystack. Do you have other clues? Like places he might go?
啊？狗？哦哦哦，「傻狗」只是个形容词。那家伙是个人。
Eh? Dog? Oh oh, "idiot pooch" is just a nickname. It's a person.
This looks like a chore. Time to leave.
呃…你是哪位？陛下，这是您的臣民吗？
Err... Who might you be? Your Majesty, is this a subject of yours?
嗯？匹诺康尼有谁不是我的臣民呢？不过我确实不认识这位……
Hmm? Who isn't my subject in Penacony? But I don't think I know this one...
You're the Emperor of this place?
太无礼了…在你面前的是蒂索克二世陛下，「黄金的时刻」的「皇帝」。虽然「家族」未见得承认，但她在我们群众心中可是当之无愧的真龙天子。

How rude... The Emperor of Golden Hour, Her Majesty Tizocic II stands before you. The Family may not recognize her sovereignty, but in the hearts of her subjects, she is none other than the true descendant of the dragon.
你不认得自己的皇帝，说明你对「黄金的时刻」不甚了解…无妨，如果你也想帮忙，就一起来吧。多个人手总是好的。

That you don't recognize your own Emperor, shows that your understanding of the Golden Hour is meager... No matter, if you wish to help as well, come with us. It's always good to have more helping hands.
记住朕的话，彩拿篷先生——「善意是可以传播的。」
Heed my words, Mr. Chenapon: Goodwill can be spread.
我明白了，陛下…好心人，是这样的，我是克里姆特立宪国来的逐梦客，几个系统时后要和鸢尾花家系谈一笔唱片生意。
Understood, Your Majesty... Kind soul, about the matter at hand: I am a Dreamchaser from the Klimt Republic. I am to negotiate a record deal with the Iris Family in a few system hours.
但我那个脑子有泡的生意伙伴，一入梦就不知所踪。我本和他约好了在这里见面，结果马上就要开始谈判了，还不见他的人影！
But that blister-brained business partner of mine went missing right after entering the dream. I was to meet him here to start negotiations, but he's nowhere to be found!
Can't you return to reality to get him?
我也想啊…这家伙大概是怕我干扰他玩乐，连房间号都不肯告诉我。我说不出房间号，前台就不肯帮我联系他……
I wish... That fool probably thought I'd be cramping his style — he refused to even tell me his room number. And if I don't know the number, the concierge can't help me contact him...
打过了，打不通啊！可能是把手机关了，也可能是弄丢了，这家伙都干得出来。
I did! I couldn't get through! His phone might be off, or he lost it... That moron is capable of anything.
不能找猎犬家系帮忙吗？
Can't ask the Bloodhound Family for help?
为了这点「小事」去找猎犬？得了吧！肯为这等「小事」劳心费力的人，全匹诺康尼也只有陛下一位。
Ask the Bloodhounds? For such a paltry matter? Forget it! There is only one person in all of Penacony who would aid in earnest for such a triviality — Her Majesty.
只能在城里到处找找看了…
I'll just have to look around in the city...
…估计又是跑到哪里去玩了！这不是埃夫姆第一次搞砸这种事了！我为什么蠢到总会原谅他呢？不靠谱的废物！
...He must have run off somewhere to have fun! Not the first time Ephraim's done something like that! Why am I so dumb to trust him every single time? That unreliable fool!
够了，彩拿篷先生，赌气的话无益于改变现状。实际上你很需要他，不是吗？
Enough, Mr. Chenapon, your aimless anger will not change the present. And you really do need him, don't you?
…唉，陛下，您教训得对。这家伙其实相当有两把刷子，做过好几张爆款专辑，但就是沉迷玩乐，还没有时间观念……
...*sigh* Your Majesty, you're right to admonish me. This fellow's still got some talent, having released several hit records. He's just obsessed with having fun and has no concept of time...
这样吧，彩拿篷先生，你留在汇合地点等待埃夫姆，朕去那些玩乐场所找找他。陌生的臣民啊，你若想帮忙，就随朕来吧。
How about this, Mr. Chenapon — you stay here and wait for Ephraim, while I look for him in those entertainment spots. My loyal subject, walk with me if you wish to help.
I'm really sorry for troubling you, Your Majesty.
I have to think of a solution...
*克里姆特粗口*…埃夫姆这个蠢材，气死我算了。
*Klimt profanity*... That nitwit Ephraim is going to drive me to my grave.
看来这位埃夫姆沉迷于玩乐…那朕大概能猜到他去了哪里。随朕来吧。
It appears that this Ephraim is very much a fun-seeker... Then I can guess where he has gone. Come with me.
在「黄金的时刻」，如果有人沉迷玩乐到失去联系，那八成是被困在这里了。
In the Golden Hour, if you lose contact with someone who has sunken into entertainment, odds are that person is stuck here.
This is a house of criminal decadence?
差不多吧。这地方叫「世界尽头」酒吧，是欢愉信徒的基地。
More or less. This place is a bar called the World's End, a depot of debauchery for acolytes of Elation.
这群信徒经常会把初来乍到的逐梦客骗进酒吧，灌个酩酊大醉，撺掇他们当众出丑。算是一种很低俗的娱乐方式。
These believers will lure dream-seeking newcomers into the bar and egg them on to commit embarrassing acts in public. It's a form of low-brow entertainment.
蒂索克二世叹了口气，旋即又深吸了一口气，对着酒吧正门大喝一声——
Tizocic II sighs, then immediately draws a deep breath, faces the bar entrance and yells out...
你还没从震惊中缓过神来，就看到一名女子带着谄媚的微笑从酒吧里走了出来。
You've barely recovered from startlement when you see a woman with a fawning smile sashaying out of the bar.
唉哟，陛下，您来之前打个电话嘛，我们这都没来得及给您准备…嗯？{NICKNAME}？你怎么也在？
Oho, if it isn't Your Majesty! Why didn't you call in advance? We haven't prepared for your arrival at all... Hmm? {NICKNAME}? What are you doing here?
少废话。有个叫埃夫姆的音乐人，来自克里姆特立宪国，你见过吗？
Cut the chit-chat. There's a musician by the name of Ephraim, from the Klimt Republic. You've seen him before?
见过见过，之前他确实是来这喝酒来着。后来喝多了，说要「在伟大的匹诺康尼推销伟大的音乐」，就唱着歌跑出去了。我们…嘿嘿，就没去管他。

Oh, indeed I have. He stopped by to have a drink. He later got drunk and said he wanted to "promote profound music on the profound planet of Penacony," and ran out while singing a tune. We... Heheh, left him alone.
还不是你们怂恿的！你还好意思笑！他人现在在哪儿？
It's because of you lot who egged him on anyway! Yet you treat it like a joke! Where is he now?
不知道啊。要不您问问酒吧附近的人，他们也许还记得…埃夫姆当时那副志得意满的样子，轻易可忘不掉啊，哈哈哈。
I don't know. Why not ask the others near the bar? They might remember... Ephraim was a drunkenly flamboyant character — he's not easily forgettable, hahaha.
我知道的就只有这些了…您还有别的事吗，陛下？
That's all I know... Did you wish to know anything else, Your Majesty?
…你们这些家伙啊…算了，说了也白说。没你事了，退下吧。
...You scoundrels... So be it, my words fall on deaf ears anyway. My business with you is concluded. You're dismissed.
绿火腿夫人夸张地行了个礼，转身钻进了酒吧的大门。
Lady Greenham dramatically curtsies, turns around, and ducks through the bar's door.
随朕问问这附近的人吧。一个耍酒疯的人应该很显眼。
Follow me to inquire from the folks nearby. A wildly drunk person would be hard to miss.
皇帝陛下？有什么事需要我帮忙吗？
Your Majesty? Is there anything I can do to help?
是否见过一个耍酒疯的人？
Did you see someone in a drunken frenzy?
耍酒疯…这旁边就是「世界尽头」酒吧，耍酒疯的人可不少……
A drunken frenzy... This is the World's End bar right here, is it not? There are plenty of 'em around...
听绿火腿夫人刚才的意思…这人应该一直在路上大声唱歌。而且唱得不错。
From what Lady Greenham said just now... this person should have been loudly singing on the road, and he sounded decent too.
我倒确实是听见有人唱歌，才跑来看热闹的。但我过来的时候，事情好像已经平息了。不好意思啊陛下，帮不上什么忙。
I did hear someone singing, and came by to take a look. But when I got here, the noise had settled down. I apologize, Your Majesty, that I couldn't be of help.
哪里的话，多谢。我们再去问问别人。
Oh stop it, and thank you. Let's go ask someone else.
不好意思啊陛下，帮不上什么忙。
My apologies, Your Majesty, I couldn't be of help.
哎呀，这不是皇上吗？今天也出来巡逻啊？
Ooh, if it's not Your Majesty! Come out for a patrol again?
多罗曼查先生，朕希望你稍微尊重一点你的皇帝。
Mr. Dorromancha, I do hope you observe a little more respect for your Emperor.
Heehee, I'll be mindful in the future!
你是否见到过一个耍酒疯的人？
Have you seen a really drunken person?
见到了见到了，有个老哥在路上放声歌唱，唱得还挺好。我刚去喊哥们一起看热闹，一转眼这醉鬼就不见了。
Oh, oh, I did, a man singing loudly on the road, and it wasn't all that bad either. I shouted for my friend to listen, but he was already gone when I turned around.
你要不来问我都快忘了这事了…这梦里什么事都可能发生，早就见怪不怪了。
I'd almost forgotten about it if you didn't ask... Anything can really happen in this dream — it's not really something to be flabbergasted about.
说起唱歌，皇上，咱过会儿一起去唱K？你不是号称自己有「帝王级歌喉」吗？让我们几个臣子见识下呗！
Speaking of singing, how about we hit up a karaoke bar later, Your Majesty? Didn't you proclaim that you had Emperor-tier vocals? You've gotta flaunt 'em a little to your subjects!
下次吧，朕还有公务要处理。
Next time. I still have business to attend to.
皇上，过会儿一起去唱K呗？
下次吧，朕还有公务要处理。
Next time. I still have business to attend to.
陛下！好久没见您来这边出巡了。您身边这位是？
Your Majesty! It's been a while since you took a stroll here. This person with you is...?
A kind soul who's helping out.
不愧是陛下，行善的号召力越来越强了啊～
You're not the Emperor for nothing! Your propensity to attract kindness blooms evermore!
哈哈，您看起来确实身手不凡。
Haha, you look like you've got some skills.
什么「哀家」，朕还没死呢！何况朕都一把年纪了，你还是另给自己寻个良配吧！
Concubine!? I'm still single! And I'm so old, you're better off seeking a more fitting partner!
{F#她}{M#他}是随朕一起处理公务的热心臣民。你有没有在附近看到个喝醉的男人，在街上高声歌唱？
{F#She}{M#He} is a compassionate subject out on official business with me. Have you seen a drunken man nearby, singing loudly along the street?
哎哟，真不巧…我这才刚入梦，什么也没看见……
Ooh, how unfortunate... I just entered the dream, and didn't see a thing...
没关系，我们再去问问别人。
It's all right. We'll ask someone else.
哎哟，真不巧…我这才刚入梦，什么也没看见……
Ooh, how unfortunate... I just entered the dream, and didn't see a thing...
没关系，我们再去问问别人。
It's all right. We'll ask someone else.
诶哟，蒂索克，什么风把你吹过来了？你不是最不爱来这种声色犬马之地了吗？
Oho, what winds have brought you here this time, Tizocic? I thought you detested such establishments of sinful pleasures?
Heh, brought an imperial guard with you too, eh?
{F#丫头}{M#小子}，不要和这种人发生冲突。没有必要。
There's no need to entangle yourself with such people.
Who's this person? Your imperial guard?
以朕的身份地位，有个侍卫不过分吧？
I doubt it's uncommon for an Emperor to have a retainer, is it?
朕来这里是有事要办…你刚才有没有看到个喝醉的男人，在街上高声歌唱？
I am obviously here on business... Did you see a drunken man just now, singing loudly on the street?
唱歌的？看见了，之前有个醉鬼一边唱歌一边骚扰路人，刚被猎犬抓走了。
Singing? 'Course I did — there was a drunken fool singing and accosting passersby. He was taken away by the Bloodhounds.
被猎犬家系抓走了…那可就有点麻烦了。
Detained by the Bloodhounds... This is going to be a little troublesome then.
这有什么麻烦的，你不是「皇帝」嘛？想捞人，让猎犬卖你个面子不就行了？
How much trouble could there be? Aren't you the Emperor? You just have to show your face and the Bloodhounds'll release him, no?
哟，你还挺入戏？你还真当她是「皇帝」了啊？
Ha, a method actor, aren't you? You really think she's the Emperor?
确实能让他们卖朕个面子。但也不能总靠王权压制规矩…唉，没办法，这次情况紧急，特事特办吧。
I'm sure I can have them acquiesce to this request, but I can't simply flout rules by abusing my authority... *sigh* No choice then — I'll have to make an exception for this urgent matter.
…你真以为猎犬认你这个土皇帝啊？笑死了，演的自己都信了吧？
...You really think the Bloodhounds recognize such a lame Emperor as yourself? That's hilarious. You really believe in your own act?
别理他。那边有个猎犬家系的成员，我们去找他谈谈。
Don't mind him. There's a member of the Bloodhound Family over there. Let's go talk to him.
你真有这么大面子，连家族都能说动？
You really have so much pull that you can persuade The Family?
不是「面子」，是「人望」。朕不指望你能理解。
It's not "pull." It's "prestige." I don't expect you to understand.
皇帝陛下，幸会。有什么事吗？
It's a pleasure, Your Majesty. Is there something I can do for you?
免礼。朕是想打听一下，你们是否拘捕了一位名叫埃夫姆的宾客？
At ease. I wanted to ask, have you arrested a guest named Ephraim?
啊…是有这么回事。此人在街上耍酒疯，被猎犬踢出了梦境。当下他正在接受家族公关人员盘问。
Ah... Yes, we did. That man was drunk on the streets, and the Bloodhounds kicked him out of the Dreamscape. The Family's public relations officer is currently interrogating him.
蒂索克二世向猎犬解释了埃夫姆几个系统时后的急事…
Tizocic II explains to the Bloodhounds regarding Ephraim's urgent matter in a few system hours...
所以，能不能以朕的名誉作保，提前释放埃夫姆？朕保证他不会再犯。
So, can you take my honor as a guarantee and release Ephraim early? I promise he won't do it again.
这点小事，犯不上陛下作保——我稍后就通知家族公馆释放埃夫姆。
This is too trivial a matter to be worthy of Your Majesty's guarantee. I'll inform The Family's mansion to release Ephraim shortly.
感谢你，忠诚的臣民。朕会记得你的帮助。
Thank you, my loyal subject. I will remember your aid.
It is my honor, Your Majesty.
那朕就先回现实接人了。至于你…你叫什么来着？
I shall return to reality and see to this release. As for you... what's your name?
A fine name, I admire that.
I do good deeds not for glory.
You have great self-awareness, and I'm impressed.
铁柱…朕懂了，是因你善用那根铁棒，对吧？这名字倒是很有那仙舟韵味！
Skybatter... Ah I see, it's because you're so skillful at using that bat, right? This name does have a certain charm to it!
唔…既然你陪侍在朕身边共同行善，还是应当赏赐你个封号。这样吧，从现在开始…朕册封你为——「灰骑士」。
Well... Since you've been accompanying me to perform good deeds, I shall reward you with a title. How about this, from now on... I'll knight you as the Gray Knight.
不必感谢。朕只封赏心怀善念的「好人」。「好人」并不多见。
There's no need for gratitude. I only reward those with goodness in their heart. Good-hearted people are a rare find.
并不随便，朕只封赏心怀善念的「好人」。「好人」并不多见。
Of course not. I only reward those with goodness in their heart. Good-hearted people are a rare find.
你就不必再陪朕出梦了，朕自行前往便是。朕平时都在「黄金的时刻」巡视，往后若是遇到什么麻烦，记得随时来和朕商谈。
You need not accompany me out of the dream. I will go on my own. I'm always making rounds in the Golden Hour — if you run into any trouble, feel free to speak to me.
时刻当心，灰骑士——人很容易就会被这梦中的声色犬马绊住脚，忘记应行的路在何处。
Take heed, Gray Knight — it's easy to be bound in this dream filled with carnal desires, and it's easy to forget where one should go.
蒂索克二世的身影消失了。
哈哈哈，恭喜啊，荣升骑士了。
Hahaha, congratulations, you're now a knight.
当然不是…也不对，可能以前是吧？匹诺康尼的逐梦客里确实有不少是亡国的贵族。嗐，谁知道呢。
Of course not... Wait, maybe she was in the past? Many Dreamchasers from Penacony were aristocrats from the fallen empire. Ha, who knows?
这有啥好羡慕的？她个假皇帝册封的假贵族，又没有封地，哈哈哈。
What's there to be jealous about? It's a fake knight title given by a fake Emperor, and even has no fiefdom that comes with it, hahaha.
蒂索克二世刚开始自称「皇帝」的时候，其实没什么人理她。但她后来不仅以「皇帝」自居，还做了很多好事：寻人寻物、调停矛盾、还有协助家族工作之类的。

When Tizocic II first started to call herself "Emperor," no one really acknowledged her. But she's done a lot more than just call herself Emperor — there were many good deeds she performed: Locating missing people and items, resolving conflicts, and even helping The Family.
久而久之，至少在这「黄金的时刻」，大家多多少少都受过她的帮助，也就愿意给她个面子，尊称她一声「陛下」。
As time passed, at least in the Golden Hour, everyone has been helped by her in some way, so they are willing to show her the courtesy of addressing her as "Majesty."
怎么说呢…虽然不知道她为什么自称「皇帝」，但她确实是个「好人」。
How do I put this... Although I don't know why she calls herself "Emperor," she's definitely a good person.
你看，「家族」成员理应在{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}的律法下融为一体，却总免不了各自残留些私心。

Look, The Family's members theoretically should all be united as one under the banner of {RUBY_B#Harmony}the Great One{RUBY_E#}'s teachings, but you inevitably can't dismiss the tinges of personal avarice within them.
「家族」尚且如此，就更别提你们这些逐梦客了——没有贬低你的意思，别见怪——思考任何事只从自己的立场出发，总也顾及不到、或者刻意漠视他人的利益。

If it is so for The Family, it is even truer for Dreamchasers like yourself — not meant as a slight, no offense — who would consider everything from their own perspectives and can't put themselves in others' shoes or would consciously ignore the interest of others.
所以大家很拥戴蒂索克二世，只有她真心实意地从他人的立场出发，为个体的利益行动、为个体的利益忧愁。
That's why everyone supports Tizocic II. She's sincere, empathetic, and genuinely cares about others' interests, always putting herself in their shoes.
就像咱们皇帝陛下说的那样——在咱们这个时代，「好人」可是稀缺资源。
As Her Majesty said — good people are a rare resource in our time.
啊，时间不早了，我还要继续巡逻…回见。
Ah, it's getting late. I'll need to continue my rounds... See you around.
（「皇帝陛下」应该已经接到埃夫姆了吧？回之前的汇合地点看看吧。）
(Her Majesty should have picked up Ephraim by now. Let's go back to our meeting point.)
蠢货，还不快谢谢皇帝陛下！
You dunce, why aren't you thanking Her Majesty?
感谢皇帝陛下！如果不是您出手相救，我们这桩生意很可能真要黄了……
Thank you, Your Majesty! If it weren't for your generous aid, our business would have been ruined...
埃夫姆先生，首先，你该道歉的对象不是朕。其次，比起道歉，朕觉得彩拿篷先生应该更想听到一个保证。
Mr. Ephraim, firstly, I'm not the one who you should be apologizing to. Secondly, rather than an apology, I feel that Mr. Chenapon would much rather have your promise.
对不起！我以后再也不在工作时间沉迷玩乐了……
I'm sorry! I'll never slack off during work hours again...
唉…这次就算了，我也习惯了。但是，陛下可是用自己的名誉担保，才把你捞出来的。你要是故态复萌，那就是打陛下的脸，明白吗？
Sigh... I'll let it go this time. I'm used to it. However, I've placed my own honor on the line to get you out. If you return to your old ways, it'll be a slap in my face. Understood?
明白！我明白！我保证绝不再犯！
Understood! Absolutely! I promise never to do it again!
时间不早了，二位抓紧时间去准备谈判吧。朕好不容易把你捞出来，别再把正事耽搁了。
It's getting late. You two should prepare for the negotiations. Now that I've finally gotten you out, you should return to your business.
再次感谢陛下。我们先回酒店准备谈判了，下次再见。
Thank you once again, Your Majesty. We will return to the hotel to prepare for the negotiations. See you next time!
祝你们这桩生意能顺利推进。
Wishing you the best of luck with this deal!
你来了，朕的灰骑士。在我们的努力下，那两位年轻人总算是没有耽误事。
You've come, my Gray Knight. With our efforts, those two young men finally got their business settled.
身为皇帝，帮助臣民解决问题只不过是分内之事，谈不上功劳不功劳。
As an Emperor, it is my duty to help my subjects with their problems, and there's no credit to be taken.
说实话，我没什么参与感。
To be honest, I didn't feel too involved.
哈哈，可能是吧。朕猜想，比起寻人，你大概更擅长硬碰硬的差事。
Haha, perhaps. I'm guessing that, instead of searching for missing people, you're more suitable for jobs that require your fists.
走上街头，多去做些好事吧，你总会遇到能发挥自己才能的舞台。
Head out there and do some good. You'll definitely find an avenue for your talents.
朕想想，你比较擅长打架的话…有什么比较适合你的好事可以做吗…啊，还真有，朕最近一直遇到一伙人……
Let me think. If you're good at fighting... Are there any good deeds that are more suited to you? Oh, there is! I've always been running into this group of people...
You've met a bunch of guys, then what?
说话说一半，吃面没有蒜。
You can't teach a new dog old tricks!
不不不，并非什么大事。朕一直强调要以和为贵，避免冲突。那个…不过「世界尽头」酒吧的那群人啊，确实比较难缠……
No no no, it's not something major. I've always emphasized the importance of peace and avoiding conflict. But... those guys at the World's End bar are a little hard to shake off...
蒂索克二世生硬地转移了话题，开始讲述起自己和假面愚者们斗智斗勇的过程。仿佛是为了让你尽快忘记刚才那个她本不该提起的话题。

Tizocic II stiffly changes the subject, and begins to talk about her battles with the Masked Fools — as if she wants you to quickly forget the subject that she regretted bringing up in the first place.
…从那以后，那个绿火腿夫人对朕心服口服。你看，今天朕一喊她，她立刻就乖乖出来了。
...Since then, Lady Greenham has bent her knee. You see, today I called for her, and she came right out.
怎么了？你东张西望什么？
What's wrong? Why are you glancing around?
我有点急事要处理，之后再聊。
I have some urgent matters to attend to. Let's talk later.
嘀嗒！这位「皇帝」似乎有些问题！我的直觉告诉我，她应该遇到了些危险，但不肯和你说！
Tick-tock! There's something wrong with the Emperor! My instincts tell me that she's in some sort of danger, but she refuses to tell you!
真这么简单就好了！她应该是缺少了什么东西！就是因为缺少了那样东西，她才说什么也不肯寻求你的帮助！
If only it were that simple! She must be missing something! It must be because she is missing something, that's why she refuses to ask you for help.
{NICKNAME}，我们得搞清楚到底发生了什么，这样才能帮助她远离危险！
{NICKNAME}, we need to get to the bottom of this! It's the only way we will be able to keep her out of danger!
你回来了，灰骑士。有什么事需要朕帮助吗？或者你只是想和朕聊聊天？
You're back, Gray Knight. Is there something you need my help with? Or perhaps you would like to chat?
There's something I have to do.
再见，灰骑士。记得平时多做好事。
Goodbye, Gray Knight. Keep up with the good deeds.
蒂索克二世咬紧牙关、皱紧眉头，内心似乎正与一股暌违多年的愤怒久别重逢。
Tizocic II clenches her teeth and furrows her brows. She seems to be going through an internal turmoil with a fury that hasn't surfaced in years.
嗯？发生什么事了…我感觉……
Huh? What's going on... I feel...
…你来得正好，灰骑士，朕正好有事要找你帮忙。
...You've arrived just in time, Gray Knight. I need to ask you for a favor.
朕本以为，这匹诺康尼姑且算是个文明开化的地方，最多只是有几个宵小之辈不懂得要尊敬皇帝。
I've always considered Penacony was, at the very least, a civilized place. That at worst, there would be meager riffraff who disrespected the Emperor.
可这些日子，竟有一伙刁民胆敢频繁地袭击朕——朕心胸宽广，不想和他们一般见识，可奈何忍一时越想越气。

But these days, there have been a bunch of unruly hooligans who assaulted me time after time. Benevolent as I am, I refused to stoop to their level, but the more I think about it, the more seething I become.
现在每当朕落单时，都有可能被那伙人袭击。有几次他们甚至下了死手，让朕从梦境中醒了过来——这和刺王杀驾有什么区别！
Each time I'm alone, I would be attacked by those scoundrels. There have been a few times when their attacks were even fatal, waking me from the Dreamscape — how is this any different from regicide!
朕现在也开始担心，这群刁民可能开始谋划在现实中对朕下手了……
And now I'm starting to worry, that those thugs may be plotting to end my life in reality...
灰骑士，朕看得出你颇有些手腕，能不能帮朕整治一下这些刁民？
Gray Knight, I am aware of your skills in combat. Will you help me rehabilitate these ruffians?
不知道。朕实在想不明白，做了一辈子好人好事，怎么就会被刁民盯上呢？
No clue. I really don't understand: I've devoted my lifetime to doing good — why would disgruntled subjects be trying to hinder me?
Are you sure one beating is enough?
暴力只会形成循环，朕本不想如此。但事到如今，朕也必须降下天威了。
Violence only begets violence. I do not wish for this to come to pass. But seeing as how things have transpired, I must dish out divine justice.
Isn't it better to call the police?
皇室的事，去找猎犬帮忙调查，简直是丢人现眼。
It's an utter disgrace to ask for Bloodhound assistance in imperial matters.
朕有一计…他们每次都在朕落单时袭击朕。过一会儿，朕假装落单，你偷偷跟在朕的身后，等那几个袭击者出现，一举抓住他们！
I have a plan... They usually wait till I'm alone to ambush me. In just a bit, I'll pretend to be alone, and you hide behind me. When those assailants appear, we'll arrest the lot of them!
至少帮我看清楚那几个刁民的长相！然后你就立刻通报猎犬！
Then at least help me identify their faces! And then report them to the Bloodhounds!
I thought you didn't want to involve them...
朕是不想麻烦猎犬帮朕找刁民。找到了以后，肯定还是要按规矩办事，岂能动用私刑？那不符合律法。

I did not wish to trouble the Bloodhounds to help me look for the ruffians. Once we've found them, they should still be subjected to the legal system. How could I mete out personal justice? That is against the law.
朕真是越想越生气。朕到底做错了什么，要被刁民苦苦相逼？
I get angrier the more I think about it. What wrong exactly have I done, that I am relentlessly hounded by these scoundrels?
走吧，去个安静些的地方，看那些个刁民会不会上钩。
Let's go to a quieter place. We'll see if they take the bait.
此处平时人烟稀少，朕在这里被他们袭击过。灰骑士，你先躲藏起来，朕如果遇袭，你就出来抓人。
This spot is usually quite deserted — I was ambushed by them here once. Gray Knight, look for a place to hide. If I'm ambushed, that's your cue to capture them.
好，你蹲在这里不要走动。朕去钓钓他们。
Okay, hide behind here and don't move. I'll go fish for some baddies.
哎呀呀，今天不巧，平时陪朕一起巡视的臣民都没时间…都忙！忙点好，忙点好……
Oh hoho, how dismal! The loyal retainers who patrol with me are busy today... All of them! It's good that they're keeping busy though, busy is good...
没办法，朕只能独自巡逻啦！好在匹诺康尼治安很好，独行夜巷也不会有危险。
Alas, I'll have to make the rounds all by my lonesome self! Good thing Penacony's a super safe place, so safe that you won't even run into danger walking down a dark alley alone.
真安静啊，街上也没有「家族」的人，和酒店里差别真大啊。
So very quiet, and no Family members on the streets, so different from the hotel premises.
皇帝陛下！救命！我被卡在电话亭里了！
Your Majesty! Help! I'm stuck in the phone booth!
谁？谁在求救？卡在电话亭里了？这也太不小心了…稍等，朕马上就来！
Who's calling for help? Stuck in a phone booth? How careless... Hold on. I will be right there!
蒂索克二世一溜烟跑出了你的视线，大概完全忘记了自己还身处危险之中。
Tizocic II runs out of your line of sight in an instant, probably forgetting that she's still in dire danger.
（怎么突然就跑了？赶紧追上去看一眼…她要是在我眼皮底下遇刺，那真是把无名客的脸丢尽了。）
(Why did she suddenly run off? Gotta hurry and keep up with her... If she was assassinated right under my nose, I'd totally run the Nameless' repute through the mud.)
朕不知道你们在说什么…
I don't know what you're talking about...
你不可能想不起来！就算是再没人性的畜生，也不可能忘记那种程度的暴行！
You can't have forgotten! Even soulless livestock would not forget such an atrocity!
伊里潘！你冷静一点，我们是执法者，不是土匪。
Illifan! Calm down. We're executioners, not bandits.
可是…可是…苏安瓜，她凭什么能忘记一切，像没事人一样生活……
But... But... Swanga, how could she have forgotten everything and live life like nothing happened...
恐怕正如我们所担心的那样，她在来到匹诺康尼之后，就与「家族」的某些高层做了笔交易，将自己过去的记忆彻底封存了。
It's probably just as we feared — after coming to Penacony, she made a deal with The Family's upper echelon and sealed her past memories away.
哎…袭击了她这么多次，给了她这么多次强刺激，她都完全想不起来…事情可能比预估的还要棘手。
*sigh* ...Even after so many ambushes, after assassinating her so many times, she still can't remember at all... This is more distressing than anticipated.
先生们，朕确实不明白你们在说什么。朕不记得自己做过任何会被你们记恨的事，你们应当是认错人了。
Gentlemen, I really do not know what you are talking about. I don't remember what I did that made you so vengeful. You must have mistaken me for someone else.
朕朕朕，朕个屁！我现在再杀你一次，看你想不想得起来！
You really think you're some hotshot Emperor!? How about I kill you again and we'll see if you've really forgotten!
Let's calm down and discuss this!
伊里潘，先住手。{F#小姐}{M#先生}，这件事和你没有关系。麻烦你先离开这里，这对大家都好。
Illifan, stop. {F#Miss}{M#Dude}, this has nothing to do with you. Please leave now, as it's in everyone's best interests.
I can't stand by and watch someone die.
又不会真的死！只不过给她些刺激，让她想起来自己做过什么罢了！
It's not like it's a real death! It'll just give her a jolt. Maybe she'll remember what she did, and that's all!
危险总与无名客有关系。
The Nameless and danger are never too far departed.
哦？无名客…我理解你们的准则，但你不了解这件事的内情。
Oh? The Nameless... I know your creed, but you don't understand the ins and outs of this.
苏安瓜，你疯了？这家伙肯定会去找猎犬报案，咱们的工作就彻底泡汤了。
Swanga, are you nuts? This one'll definitely report us to the Bloodhounds and wreck all our progress.
苏安瓜说的对，我们不是土匪——但我们也有不得不做的事。得罪了！
Swanga's right. We're not bandits, but we do have something we need to do! Sorry about that!
Don't run. I... I can still fight!
算了伊里潘，停下！再打真的要惊动家族了！
Forget it, Illifan. Stop! Any more and we'll alert The Family!
灰骑士，停手吧。刁民，朕不是非要把你们逼到无路可走，但你们现在必须解释清楚，到底为什么五次三番地袭击朕！
Gray Knight, please stop. You there, it's not that I revel in forcing your hand, but you will explain once and for all your repeated ambushes on me!
*普普沙粗口*，看来你真是一点都不记得了。
*Pupsha profanity*, looks like you really don't remember a thing.
你们到底要朕记得什么！？
What exactly do you want me to remember!?
Spill it, now. Stop beating around the bush.
…我知道这样打哑谜让人恼火，但我们必须让她自己回忆起自己的罪行。否则…即使把她抓回去也没有意义。
...I know it's really annoying to do this, but she must recall her own crimes. Or else... it won't matter even if we bring her back.
因为那挨千刀的「司法精神」。
It's because of the accursed arm of the law.
但要是没有那「挨千刀的」，你就和她没有区别了。
But if it weren't for that accursed justice system, you would be no different from her.
朕的脑子好得很，没有忘过任何事，也不会遗忘任何事！
My memory's pretty good — I've never forgotten anything, nor will I!
What sort of idiot question is that? I was born in...
朕确实有一些记忆…不，有很多记忆…都仿佛不曾存在过一样……
I do have some memories... No, plenty of them... that feel like they didn't exist before...
朕只记得自己是个皇帝，在匹诺康尼统御万民…可朕来自哪里？从何时开始做的皇帝？朕…的确不记得了……
I only remember I am an emperor, governing the citizens of Penacony... But where did I come from? When did I become Emperor? I... truly can't remember...
即使对你这样的人来说，那些记忆也太残酷了。逃往匹诺康尼之后，你请「家族」将它们封存了起来。
Those memories were too cruel, even for someone like you. After fleeing to Penacony, you asked The Family to seal them off.
灰骑士，朕有些吃不准…朕是不是应该找回那些记忆？至少能搞清楚…为什么这些刁民这样恨朕……
Gray Knight, I'm in a conundrum... Should I be finding those memories? Then at least it'll be clear... why these ruffians hate me so much...
她没得选！她必须找回记忆！
She does not get a choice! She must find her memories!
…朕应该找回记忆。尤其是，如果那些记忆里，藏着朕曾做过的「罪恶」……
...I should find my memories. Especially if, in those memories, are buried heinous sins that I've committed...
That's because you're a good person!
是啊！朕是个好人，好人必须直面自己做过的恶。
Yes! I'm a good person, and good people must face their evils.
…看来匹诺康尼的确改变了你，只可惜…算了，先不提这个。
...It looks like Penacony has indeed changed you. It's a pity that... Never mind, I'll drop it for now.
如果记忆确实被「家族」封存，那…那我也不知道该怎么把它找回来。这是个死局……
If your memories have really been sealed by The Family, then... I don't know how to retrieve them either. It's a dead end...
若是「家族」做的，我有办法。
If The Family did it, I have an idea.
你有办法？你能有什么办法……
You do? What idea could you possibly have...
…你是星穹列车的人，对吧？我听说过他们…你能做到什么都不奇怪。
...You are from the Astral Express, yes? I've heard that they... that you can do the impossible.
我信{F#她}{M#他}，伊里潘。那…就看你的本事了，无名客。你呢？你同意吗？「皇帝」？
I trust {F#her}{M#him}, Illifan. Now... it's up to your skills, Nameless. How about you? Do you agree? Emperor?
嗯，请你帮朕找回记忆吧，灰骑士。人逃离不了自己的过去，无论是好是坏。
Yes, please help me retrieve my memories, Gray Knight. We can never escape our own past, for better or worse.
有什么和她过去有关的物件吗？
You got any items that have to do with her past?
和她过去有关的物件啊…我想想……
An item to do with her past... Let me think...
这样吧，用一个和「我们」有关的东西试试吧。毕竟正是她的过去，塑造了现在的我和伊里潘。
How about this: Try using something that is connected to us. It is her past after all that created the present me and Illifan.
这是「帕斯德鲁克市」市民活动中心的一部分。
This is a piece of the community center in Pasdrak City.
你这畜生！「帕斯德鲁克市」这个地名对你来说真的那么陌生吗？
You beast! Does Pasdrak truly mean nothing to you!?
伊里潘！够了！无名客，如果这个旧零件没问题的话，就拜托你了。
Illifan! Enough! Nameless, if this old part can let you do your thing, we'll leave it to you.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
你先去忙吧。如果二位不介意，可以随朕一起在这里等{F#她}{M#他}回来。
You go get busy. If you two don't mind, you can wait here with me for {F#her}{M#his} return.
如果你准备好了，就请你帮朕找回记忆吧，灰骑士。人逃离不了自己的过去，无论是好是坏。
Once you're ready, please help me retrieve my memories, Gray Knight. We can never escape our own past, for better or worse.
Nah, I've got better stuff to do.
你先去忙吧。如果二位不介意，可以随朕一起在这里等{F#她}{M#他}回来。
You go get busy. If you two don't mind, you can wait here with me for {F#her}{M#his} return.
That's fine. Please make it quick.
喂，灰骑士，灰骑士！发什么呆呢！
Hey, Gray Knight, Gray Knight! Stop standing there in a daze!
灰骑士？怎么回事，睡着了？
Gray Knight? What's going on? Are you asleep?
啊？别吓我，你是不是脑子坏掉了？我是你最最敬爱的普普沙帝国公主殿下蒂索克二世！
Eh? Stop giving me a fright. Are you out of your mind? I am your most beloved Pupsha Empire's Princess Tizocic II!
Why has Your Majesty turned into a child?
什么「陛下」，你脑袋不想要了？皇帝才能叫「陛下」，我是公主，对我要称呼「殿下」！
Your Majesty? You wanna lose your head? You call the Emperor "Your Majesty." I'm a princess, so you will address me as "Your Highness"!
和你说过多少次了，称呼绝对不能搞错！怎么就不长记性呢！哎，你们这些平民出身的骑士，什么都好，就是缺点文化。
How many times have I told you not to get the titles wrong! Why can't you remember! Bah, you knights risen from common lineage are excellent in everything but etiquette.
（公主殿下？看来就是蒂索克二世被封存的回忆…她竟然真是皇室？）
(Your Highness? Looks like these are Tizocic II's sealed memories... She's an actual member of the empire?)
赶紧清醒清醒吧！咱们该去花店了～
Snap out of it! We're off to the florist!
最近功课太多，感觉已经有些日子没进城了。
I've had so much homework lately. It feels like forever since I've visited the city.
我托人预约过了，花店今天应该是咱们俩包场。
I've made an appointment for the florist to only cater to the both of us.
公主殿下莅临小店，小店真是蓬荜生辉啊！
For Your Highness to visit our humble shop, we are splendiferously honored to host you!
您看看您，还专门跑一趟…您有什么看中的花卉，小人送到您府上去便是，您纡尊降贵亲自前来，实在是折煞小人啊！

And for you to specially make this trip... All you had to do was make a selection of your favored blooms and I would deliver them personally to you. My lowly shop is not worthy of your glorious presence!
我这不也是找个借口出来逛逛嘛。你是不知道，我们这些皇亲国戚，平时根本没什么机会离开那个迷宫似的鬼地方。
It was just an excuse to come out for a stroll. You probably don't know — we imperials rarely get any opportunities to leave that labyrinthine hellhole.
啊哈哈哈…总而言之，公主殿下，您有什么想买的，尽管吩咐小人便是！
Ahahaha... In any case, please call on me if you wish to buy anything, Your Highness!
兄长登基践祚已两年有余，这两年和我的关系也逐渐疏远了。要是能送他以前最喜欢的纺锤花，他应该会很开心吧？
My older brother has ascended the throne for more than two years, and our relationship has grown distant. If I gift him with spindleblooms that he used to love, I think he'd be happy?
这纺锤花，小店有不少存货，您要多少，小人就拿得出多少。
We have plenty of spindleblooms in storage. I'll fetch as many as you wish.
只不过，纺锤花乃是平民百姓钟爱的廉价花卉，拿去赠与皇帝陛下，会不会显得有些……
It's just, spindleblooms are bargain-bin flowers for commoners. To present them to His Majesty, would that be somewhat...
没事没事，送纺锤花就好。即便做了皇帝，他也仍然是我哥哥，我最了解了。
It's fine. Spindleblooms will do just fine. Even if he's the Emperor, he's still my older brother. No one knows him better than I do.
殿下所言极是…那小人去后面备货，殿下稍等片刻。
Your wish is my command... I will prepare the arrangement immediately. Please wait a moment.
你慢慢准备。我们俩也没什么急事。
Take your time. We aren't in a hurry anyway.
送花，主要是为了让哥哥觉得，我还是他天真的妹妹。这样接下来很多事都好谈。
The gift of flowers is mainly to let my brother think that I'm still his naive younger sister. That will make the discussion of many future matters much more amicable.
送些花，给他哄开心了，也许他就愿意给边境星区的那些苦命人免除些赋税了。
Giving him some flowers to cheer him up, and maybe he'll be willing to lift the tax levies on those poor folk along the frontier star districts.
不是我天真，是我要让陛下觉得我天真。
No, I'm not. I just want His Majesty to think I am.
It's a pretty adorable way of thinking.
对呀，这就是我的目的——让陛下重新想起来，他妹妹有多可爱～
Yes, that's exactly my goal — to remind His Majesty of how totally adorable his younger sister is!
他不是小孩了，不会奏效的。
He's not a child, so he won't play into your hands.
晓之以理动之以情，这些事那些大臣都做过，可都没办法说服他。直接去和他摆事实讲道理，大概也不会有什么用。
