One must know the reason to move the heart. Those high officials have done this sort of stuff before, but none was able to move him. It probably wouldn't work either to verbally spar with him using facts and reason.
在政治领域，小孩子有小孩子的武器。小孩子不会撒谎、不会玩弄权谋、不会被利益牵扯——至少大家都是这么认为的。
In the realm of governance, even children have their own weapons: They don't lie, plot, or vie for power — or at least that's how everyone thinks of them.
所以，当我捧着一大捆纺锤花，声泪俱下地求他免除赋税时，没有人会觉得这是个政治问题——这只是小姑娘纯洁的希冀罢了。

So when I skip in with a huge bouquet of spindleblooms, crying and wailing to beg him to remove tax levies, no one will think that it's an issue of governance, just an innocent desire of a little girl.
如果到了那个份上，陛下还不肯让那些边民的日子好过些，那时候产生的舆论压力一定会狠狠折磨我的傻哥哥的。
If the scene's reached that stage, and His Majesty still refuses to soften those people's hardships, the resulting pressure will surely be excruciatingly torturous for my silly older brother.
况且，我了解他…他可能不在乎边民，但一定在乎史书会怎么写他。
And, I know him... He may not care about the people, but he cares about what the history books will write about him.
嘿嘿～生在帝王家嘛，耳濡目染。
Tee-hee! I was born into imperialty, after all. Just putting what I've learned and heard to practice.
嘿嘿～生在帝王家嘛，耳濡目染。
Tee-hee! I was born into imperialty, after all. Just putting what I've learned and heard to practice.
你这想法还是挺天真的。
That thinking of yours is pretty naive.
哼，那你想个更好的办法嘛～再不免除赋税，边境星区可能真要造反了！
Hmph, you think of something better then! If we don't lift the levies in time, the frontier star district is seriously going to rebel!
唉…店主怎么还不回来？不会是刚撒下花种吧？
*sigh* ...Where's the shop owner? Is he planting seeds or something?
殿下…殿下…灰骑士，快带着殿下逃……
Your Highness... Your Highness... Gray Knight, you must take Her Highness and flee...
查普客上尉？你…你这是怎么了？
Lieutenant Chapuk? You... What's wrong with you?
…政变了…你二姐要抢班夺权…陛下已经遇害驾崩了……
...It's a coup... Your Second Sister wants to usurp the throne... His Majesty has been assassinated...
灰骑士！快跑！带着她跑啊！那疯女人要杀了所有有继承权的人，斩草除根！快跑！
Gray Knight! Run! Take her with you! That mad woman will exterminate all successors to the throne! Hurry!
上尉用尽力气高声呼喊。然后吐出一口鲜血…再没了气息。
The lieutenant musters all his strength and yells at the top of his lungs, then coughs up blood... and stops breathing.
这…到底发生了什么…我不明白，我真的不明白……
This... What in the world happened... I don't get it. I really don't...
公主殿下，皇帝请您回皇宫一趟，她要和您叙叙旧。
Your Highness is hereby requested to return to the palace. The Emperor wishes to reminisce on days past.
But I heard that the crown has fallen.
皇冠不会落地，王权永远不会缺位。
The crown will not fall, and the throne will never be vacant.
Step aside. Her Highness has business to attend to.
有事？还有什么事比新皇践祚更重要？
Business? More important than the coronation of a new Emperor?
呵…灰骑士，殿下让你这贱民活得太久、爬得太高了。
Heh... Gray Knight, Her Highness has let a commoner like you live for far too long, and rise too high.
帕特特将军，哥哥待你不薄……
General Pattet, my older brother was nothing but generous to you...
公主殿下，人情义理只对您这个岁数的人，或是您身边这种贱民才有意义。
Your Highness, affairs of sentiment only mean something to people of your age, and that filthy commoner beside you.
既然您不肯随我回去…那就莫怪我行事粗野了。
Since you won't return with me... forgive me for being brusque.
灰骑士，我想了一下，二姐不是母亲的亲生女儿，她们关系素来不睦。一旦二姐上位，太后一派的政治影响力会大打折扣。

Gray Knight, when I think about it, Second Sister isn't my mother's biological daughter, and they've never seen eye to eye. Once she ascends the throne, the authority of the Empress Dowager's clan will be greatly reduced.
所以，我们应该先逃到钦查里格斯邦，那是太后的直属封地。
Which is why we should first escape to Kincharitges State — that's the Empress Dowager's fiefdom.
街上到处都是二姐的人…我们找辆车快点出发吧，尽可能不要惊动这些叛军。
Second Sister's soldiers are crawling the streets... Let's find a car and set off and try not to alert these turncoats.
真是的，你怎么把车停在离花店那么远的地方？啊不对…「少开车，多走路」，好像是我自己的馊主意…唉！
Gosh, why'd you park the car so far away from the florist? Oh wait... I think it was my terrible idea to "drive less, walk more"... Bah!
现在自责也于事无补，快走吧！
No point blaming yourself now. Let's go!
灰骑士，你要去哪儿啊！别磨磨蹭蹭的了！
Gray Knight, where are you going! Stop dawdling!
灰骑士，快去开车吧！这里到处都是叛军，我们没时间闲逛了！
Gray Knight, quickly go get the car! There are rebels everywhere, now's not the time to potter about!
灰骑士，开车吧。不要走大路，从郊区绕个远出城，他们应该还来不及封锁得那么严密。
Gray Knight, you drive. Stay off the main roads and take a detour through the countryside to exit the city. They probably won't be able to set up stringent blockades so quickly.
后来，太后挥师讨贼，推翻了二姐短暂的皇权。
Later, the Empress Dowager rallied her army and overthrew my second sister's short-lived imperial rule.
朕被扶上王座，成为了普普沙帝国的皇帝。太后为了保护她年幼的女儿，开始临朝称制。
I ascended the throne and became the Pupsha Empire's Emperor. In order to protect her young daughter, the Empress Dowager began ruling in her stead.
可惜朕刚成年，皇太后便去世了，但外戚们并不打算将权力归还给朕。
It was disheartening that when I was of age, the Empress Dowager passed away, and my extended family did not intend to return my imperial authority to me.
朕与摄政者们的矛盾越来越激烈、越来越不可调和。
My conflicts with the regents became intense, and our relations gradually soured.
朕很清楚，朕已经越来越不像一个称职的傀儡了。
It was clear to me that I was fast losing my position as a puppet ruler.
朕很清楚，他们迟早会杀了朕。
It was clear to me that they intended to kill me sooner or later.
德奇特将军，朕打在襁褓之中时就认得你，那时你是多么英武…可现在，你竟这样可悲地抵赖自己的罪行……
General Daquette, I've known you since I was a babe-in-arms — you were so heroic back then... But now, here you are, pathetically denying your own crimes...
陛下，就算你再怎么说，那也不是我做的！
Your Majesty, even if you say that, I did not do it!
图尔良税务官，多么正直清廉的官员！舅舅，你竟狠得下心，放火烧死他们一家<unbreak>49</unbreak>人。
Tax Collector Turian, he was an upright and moral official! Yet you, Uncle, gave in to your vileness and burned their whole family of <unbreak>49</unbreak> to death.
朕收到不止一封奏折，要你血债血偿…可你毕竟是朕的血亲，朕不忍杀你。若你愿意在电台公开认罪道歉，朕可以只革你的职，放你回家。

I have received more than one memorial for you to pay your blood debts... But you are my blood kin, and I have not the heart to execute you. If you confess to your crimes on public broadcast and repent, I will only relinquish you of your duties and send you home.
Tizocic, you were the one who killed them, didn't you?
你犯下死罪，还要嫁祸给亲人，真是猪狗不如！
You committed mass murder and dare frame family for it. You're worse than a beast!
将军，记得吗？朕只是你们手中的傀儡，如何做得出这么残酷的事？
General, do you remember? I was a puppet dancing in all your hands — how could I ever commit such a brutal deed?
我知道你要干什么…你想收回权力。所以你需要一个借口，去肃清为你操劳多年的忠臣！
I know what you want... You want your power back. You just needed an excuse to purge the loyal servants who've toiled for you all these years!
我死之后，你会公开宣布，导致这场灭门惨剧的是过甚的外戚权力…然后你会逼议会通过法案，重新确立皇权。

After my death, you will announce that the fiery tragedy was a result of consolidated authority among your relatives... And then you will force the council to pass a vote to reinstate your imperial authority.
你还是个婴儿时我就看得出来，你和你爸、你哥、你姐一样，是个天生的禽兽！
I could tell when you were just a baby. You and your father, your elder brother and sister, you're all the same — all beasts of nature!
Just accept your fate without resistance!
You repulsive tyrant, I will end you today!!!
侍卫，把我舅舅…送回家吧。然后，宣琳儿玛进殿。
Retainers, take my uncle... home. And then, summon Lenamar.
不久，那位叫做「琳儿玛」的年轻女子进入了王座室。
A short while later, a young woman named Lenamar enters the throne room.
蒂索克二世让侍卫们暂时退下，王座室内只余下了三人。
Tizocic II motions for the retainers to leave them, leaving just the two of them in the throne room.
陛下折煞我也。能替陛下效力，我只有荣幸，哪儿来的辛苦一说。
Your Majesty has naught to do but command me. It is my utmost honor to serve Your Majesty. I do not deserve any praise.
尤其是，陛下还允诺我当上帝国的情报部长…这是我几辈子修来的福分。
Especially when Your Majesty has even promised me that I would be the Empire's Spymaster... This is the fortune that my ancestors have bequeathed me.
如此危险的差事，朕怎么会让你白干呢？但朕要批评你一句——你干得有些过火了。
How could I not reward you for such an important mission? But I do have some words of criticism — you overdid it this time.
陛下批评的对，我也在自省。但水火无情…放火这种事很难做到精准。
Your Majesty's words ring true, and I reflect upon my acts as well. But forces of nature can't be controlled... Arson is something that is hard to grasp with precision.
也对。好了，不谈这些不开心的事了…朕敬你一杯酒。灰骑士，把酒给她端过去。
That is true. All right, enough of this upsetting talk... Let me raise a glass to you. Gray Knight, bring out the wine for her.
灰骑士，愣着干什么？快把酒给琳儿玛情报部长端过去。
Gray Knight, what're you waiting for? Hurry up and bring out the wine for Spymaster Lenamar.
蒂索克二世若无其事地将一瓶药水倒在了其中一杯酒中。你目睹了这一切。
Tizocic II nonchalantly tips a vial into one of the glasses. You witness everything.
随便挑一杯给她端过去吧。
Just pick any glass and bring it to her.
皇帝将决定权交给了你。
The Emperor has decided to leave the decision to you.
蒂索克二世点点头。她认同你的决定，因为她信任你，胜过信任这世上的任何人。
Tizocic II nods her head. She agrees with your decision, because she trusts you, far more than anyone else in this world.
谢主隆恩！我就不客气了！
I thank you for your graces! Allow me then!
此后数个月，朕以税务官灭门案为借口，彻底清除了朝野的皇太后派。
Over the next few months, I used the tax collector extermination as an excuse to eradicate the Empress Dowager's clansmen within and without the imperial chambers.
朕用<unbreak>49</unbreak>条无辜者的性命，换回了自己的皇权。
I traded <unbreak>49</unbreak> innocent lives to restore my own sovereignty.
朕本以为，只要杀光了这些政敌，自己就会安心。
I thought that I would be safe if I just slayed my political enemies.
可是，朕杀的人越多，就越害怕。
But, the more I slew, the more afraid I grew.
想要对朕不利的人，仿佛越杀越多。
It felt as if I had to kill more and more people who opposed my rule.
Gray Knight ... Gray Knight ... Gray Knight!
朕有事拜托你，尽快过来。
I have a matter to entrust to you. Come right now.
（蒂索克二世的回忆都混在一起了…找找看她在哪吧。）
(Tizocic II's memories are muddled... Let's see where she's gone.)
你勾结叛党，意图推翻皇权。朕对你的处罚公平公正。
You consorted with insurgents in a plot to overthrow my imperial rule. My punishment to you was fair.
成王败寇，这很公平。但请你放过我的家人，尤其是那些孩子…他们不知道什么政治、什么反叛、什么战争……
There are winners and losers in war. This is only fair. But please release my family, especially those children... They know nothing about politics, treason or war...
朕当然不想做这种事，但…你能保证他们长大后不会憎恨自己的杀父仇人，再次掀起叛乱吗？
I don't want to do this either, of course, but... can you guarantee that when they grow up, they won't hate the one who killed their father, and attempt another coup?
That's right. Even I cannot promise that.
灰骑士，朕等你很久了。又有不少穷人被叛党煽动，聚集在一起企图推翻朕的统治。
Gray Knight, I've been waiting for you for a while. Once again, the impoverished plot another insurgency, rallying together in an attempt to overthrow my rule.
这事朕不放心交给别人，就由你来处理吧。
It's too important to leave to anyone else, so I'm entrusting you to handle this.
灰骑士，你在百姓之中的口碑历来不错，我们不想杀你。
Gray Knight, your chivalrous repute is known among the commonfolk. We don't wish to kill you.
如果你愿意弃暗投明，我们愿意接纳一位强大的战士。但若你执意要继续做暴君的爪牙…我们不惧死亡。
If you wish to abandon that villain, we would welcome a mighty warrior who fights for righteousness. But if you insist on being a tyrant's fangs... We do not fear death either.
I am loyal to my Emperor.
走吧，我可以当做没看见。
Leave, and I will pretend we never met.
我明白了，你无法背弃誓言，但也不忍伤害平民。
I understand. You do not wish to break your oath, but neither do you wish to harm the people.
感谢你…希望有一天你能想通，自己究竟应该忠于什么。
Thank you... I hope you will one day figure out where your true loyalty lies.
灰骑士！你在哪里？灰骑士！
Gray Knight! Where are you? Gray Knight!
快过来，有很多事需要你处理！我一个人忙不过来！
Get over here. There are plenty of matters I need you to handle! I can't do it all by myself!
琳儿玛，灰骑士让你活得太久了。
Lenamar, the Gray Knight has let you live for too long.
Your Majesty... You... What is the meaning of this?
你不知道吧？灰骑士之前放了你一马…但这不重要。重要的是，{F#她}{M#他}当初不该这么做。
Did you not know? The Gray Knight let you go once... but that's not important. What is, is that {F#she}{M#he} should not have done so in the first place.
我不明白…我一直尽心尽力为陛下效力，刀山火海在所不辞，事到如今您怎么会觉得……
I don't understand... I've served Your Majesty with all my heart. I've gone through heaven and hell for you. Why would you...
对不起，琳儿玛，朕很感激你，真的。但你下手太狠了。
I'm sorry, Lenamar. I am very grateful to you, really. But you overdid it.
可以和平解决时，你会诉诸暴力。有必要动用武力时，你会滥杀无辜。有你在朝廷里，群臣都很不安。
When it could've been resolved with peace, you would meet it with violence. When strength was required, you'd massacre innocents. When you were in court, the other ministers stand uneasy.
呵…这不都是您的命令吗？况且这世上最没资格指责我滥杀的，不就是陛下您吗？
Heh... Weren't they all on your orders? And shouldn't you, Your Majesty, be the last one to accuse me of massacre?
你是将死之人，朕宽恕你的失言。
Since you're about to die, I will forgive your verbal indiscretion.
所以…陛下现在要杀我了吗？
So... Your Majesty is going to kill me now?
朕已经杀了。用半系统时前的那杯酒。
I already have. With that wine glass half a system hour ago.
先让朕吃冰淇淋，再让朕吃烤鸡…你的小算盘朕非常明白。
To have me eat ice cream first, and then roasted chicken later... I am very aware of your tricks.
先用冰淇淋麻痹朕的舌头，这样朕就尝不出肉里毒药的味道了！你当朕是傻子吗？
Using ice cream to numb my tongue, so I would not be able to taste the poison on the meat! You think me a fool?
小…小人绝无此意！只是今天天气炎热，冰淇淋易化，小人才劝陛下先吃了冰淇淋…要是化了，那就不好吃了啊！
I... I would never do that! The weather was blazing today, and ice cream melts easily — that's why I advised you to eat the ice cream first... It wouldn't be tasty if it melted!
Don't deny it! Retainers, take him away!
陛下！小人冤枉！小人冤枉！
Your Majesty! I've been wronged! I've been wronged!
又有一批禁卫军叛逃了。这批人带着很多不利于朕的所谓「证据」，准备去投靠星际和平公司。
Another batch of imperial guards has deserted. These guards have plenty of so-called evidence against me that they intend to use when they join IPC.
替朕去拦下他们吧。普普沙帝国的事情，还轮不到公司插手。
Intercept them for me. The IPC has no jurisdiction in the Pupsha Empire's affairs.
灰骑士…我就知道她会派你来。
Gray Knight... I knew she would send you.
你和她不一样，你是个能讲得通道理的人…所以，你应该明白我们必须这么做。
You're different from her in that you can be reasoned with... Which is why you should understand that we have to do this.
蒂索克二世的统治必须被终结。这不仅是为了禁卫军，也是为了整个普普沙帝国。
Tizocic II's rule must be ended. Not just for the imperial guards, but for the entire Pupsha Empire.
我想不通，灰骑士——你这样正直的人，为什么甘愿为那样的暴君卖命？
Help me understand, Gray Knight: You fight for righteousness, but why would you wholeheartedly serve such a tyrant?
她小时候不是这样的人。
She wasn't like that when she was young.
当然，当然，没有人生来就是残暴的畜生…但……
Of course, certainly, no one is born a brutish beast... But...
通往暴君之路，并不需要残暴的灵魂，只需要一颗软弱的心。
To walk a tyrant's path, one does not need a cruel soul, just a weak heart.
你想因愚忠而死吗？还是要鼓起勇气，做一次正确的事？
You wish to die for blind loyalty? Or will you muster your courage and do the right thing for once?
My oath is unbreakable above all.
我明白了。动手吧，灰骑士。能和你对决是我的荣幸。
I understand. Draw your weapon, Gray Knight. It is my honor to fight you.
谢谢你，灰骑士。你做了正确的选择。
Thank you, Gray Knight. You've made the right choice.
Gray Knight, get over here quickly.
你为朕操劳了那么久，朕希望好好嘉奖你一番。
You've toiled so long for me. I hope to reward you lavishly.
传令下去，对帕斯德鲁克市实施饱和式轰炸。
Pass down my orders: Execute a saturation bombing on Pasdrak City.
陛下！叛乱已经平息，您这是干什么？
Your Majesty? The uprising has been quelled — what in the world are you doing?
那座城市五年内发生了三次叛乱。你要朕相信叛乱已经「平息」了？开什么玩笑！
Three rebellions have occurred in that city within five years. You want me to believe that the insurgency has been quelled? Cease with your jesting!
陛下…虽然帕斯德鲁克市的确曾是叛党的大本营，可它并不属于叛党，它属于居住在其中的<unbreak>400</unbreak>万百姓……
Your Majesty... Pasdrak City may have been the insurgents' main base, but it does not belong to them — it belongs to the four million citizens who live there...
朕理解你，朕也不想这么做。但为了普普沙帝国的江山社稷…一些残酷的「保险」是必须的。希望你理解。
I understand what you said, and I do not wish to do this either. But for the great Pupsha Empire... some brutal insurances are required. I hope you understand.
可这…这根本不是什么「保险」！这就只是集体惩罚罢了！！！
But this... this isn't just some kind of insurance! You're just burning the forest for the trees!!!
既然你这么喜欢帕斯德鲁克…来人，把这个老东西送到帕斯德鲁克上空，和炸弹一起扔下去！
Since you love Pasdrak that much... Men, take this wizened thing up to the airspace of Pasdrak and toss him out along with the bombs!
朕知道你无意谋反。但朕清楚，如果就这样放过你，会给其他人释放出什么信号。
I know you didn't mean to conspire. But I am clear that if I simply release you, it will send a signal to others.
微臣只不过是用自家的产业给灾民赈灾…这又做错了什么？
I was merely using my own assets to provide relief to disaster victims... How is that wrong?
这次恒星风暴格外强烈，灾民遍布帝国。全国上下都在挨饿，只有你老家的灾民收到了你的「善意」，这对其他百姓公平吗？

The stellar winds this time were particularly intense, and disaster victims litter the Empire. While the whole empire is suffering from a famine, only your hometown's victims received your "kindness." How is this fair to the rest of the refugees?
现在是讨论公平的时候吗？陛下，能救一个是一个啊！
Is this really the time to discuss fairness? Your Majesty, every life saved is a precious one!
朕知道！可挨饿的老百姓不会这么想！他们会觉得朕不在乎他们，只有你在乎！可朕在乎！朕在乎！
I know that! But the famished commonfolk don't! They'll think I don't care for them, and that only you do! But I do care! I do!
所以你不能是发善心赈灾——你必须是趁国之危，以赈灾之名，准备拥兵自重，占山为王。这就是为什么朕必须杀你。你明白吗？

Which is why you can't be soothing relief with kindness. You must be the one who declares himself king of the hill as he prepares his army while the kingdom is weakened. This is why I must kill you. Don't you get it?
陛下，历史会审判我们每一个人。
Your Majesty, history will judge us all.
灰骑士，朕最忠诚的灰骑士……
Gray Knight, my most loyal Gray Knight...
叛军马上就要打进来了…朕要离开这里了。
The turncoats are breaching the inner walls... I must leave now.
朕不能带你走，因为如果他们以后找到了我们，你就是最危险的证物。
I cannot take you with me, because if they find us in the future, you are the most dangerous piece of evidence.
你一生为朕尽忠…最后一次，我保证这是最后一次了。
You pledged your life in servitude to me... Last time, I promise this is the last time.
Gray Knight, my most trusted one...
朕不相信任何人，只相信你。而你是怎么报答朕的？你放跑了那些叛党！
I believe in no one, but you. And this is how you repay me? You released those traitors!
叛军马上就要打进来了…若不是你做的好事，他们会有卷土重来的机会吗？
The traitorous army has almost breached this place... If it weren't for you, would they even have had a chance to rise again?
朕曾以为…在这世上，朕至少还能相信一人…现在看来，是朕太天真了。
I once thought... that in this world, there was at least one person I could trust... But it appears that I was too naive.
革命党人冲进皇宫时，朕已经收拾好财产，逃亡匹诺康尼了。
When the revolutionaries barged into the palace, I had already packed my valuables and fled to Penacony.
朕请求「家族」封存了自己过去的记忆，因为那些记忆总令朕恐惧。
I asked The Family to seal my past memories, for they brought me nothing but fear.
朕在匹诺康尼…成为了一个远近闻名的「好人」。
In Penacony... I became a renowned "kind soul."
蒂索克二世颓然地看着你，突然开始嚎啕大哭。
Tizocic II dejectedly looks at you, and suddenly starts bawling.
灰骑士…灰骑士…对不起，朕对不起你…朕不该杀你，朕也不想杀你…为什么朕会做那样的事……
Gray Knight... Gray Knight... I'm sorry. I'm truly sorry... I should not have killed you. I did not want to... Why would I have done those things...
I am not the Gray Knight.
朕知道你不是，但你们…真是一模一样……
I know you're not, but you two... look so much alike...
The Gray Knight will understand you.
是啊，是啊…{F#她}{M#他}不会恨朕的……
哭什么哭，好像那些事不是你做的一样！
What're you crying about? As if you didn't do anything of those things!
伊里潘，让她哭吧。有什么事，等她情绪平复了再说。
Illifan, let her cry. We can wait until after she calms down.
蒂索克二世哭了很久才终于冷静下来，恢复了「皇帝」的优雅。
Tizocic II finally quiets down after much sobbing, regaining her Emperor-like elegance.
重新自我介绍一下吧。我是普普沙共和国旧帝国资产清算委员会的执行组长苏安瓜。
Allow me to re-introduce myself: I am Swanga, Executive Leader of the Old Empire Dissolution Committee of the Pupsha Republic.
我是他的副手，旧帝国资产清算委员会的执行副组长伊里潘。
I am his second-in-command, Illifan, Executive Vice-Leader of the Old Empire Dissolution Committee of the Pupsha Republic.
我们是来带你回去受审的，蒂索克二世。
We have come to take you back to stand trial, Tizocic II.
你被指控涉嫌<unbreak>70</unbreak>余项战争罪、<unbreak>1312</unbreak>万项谋杀罪、<unbreak>127</unbreak>项…算了，太长了。这是逮捕令，你自己看吧。

You have been charged with over <unbreak>70</unbreak> war crimes, <unbreak>13.12</unbreak> million murders, <unbreak>127</unbreak>... Forget it. They're too many. This is an arrest warrant. Take a look yourself.
如果朕和你们回去，你们会怎么样对待朕？
If I return with you, what will you do with me?
还能怎么样？公平的审判，仁慈的处决。
What else can we do? A fair trial, and lenient judgment.
知足吧，你的臣民从来没有这个机会！
Be content with your lot, as your subjects have never had this chance!
朕觉得，匹诺康尼确实让朕变成了…变回了原本的自己。
I feel that, Penacony has certainly turned me... back to my old self.
一个好人…应当敢于直面她曾犯下的罪，坦然接受惩罚。
A good person... should be brave to face her former crimes, and stoically accept punishment.
...I am willing to return with you.
呵…好人。你能这么想，也好。
Heh... Good person. You've certainly got some imagination, and that's good.
灰骑士…朕还有个问题想问你……
Gray Knight... I still have a question for you...
朕在匹诺康尼做了这么多好事，现在又甘愿回国接受审判…这能赎清朕的罪孽吗？
I've done so much good in Penacony, and am now willing to return to my kingdom to face judgment... Will this atone for my sins?
你不知道？我知道啊！不能！
You don't know? I do! It can't!
赎罪？你有什么本事赎罪？你以为自己摆出一幅慨然赴死的姿态，那被你屠杀的一千多万人就能安息了吗？你以为罪恶会随着你的死亡消失吗？

Atonement? How do you intend to do that? You think the tens of millions you've butchered will find peace just because you've apparently made peace for your sins? You think evil will disappear with your death?
人能做到的无非是「付出代价」而已，你肯付出代价，这已经足够好了…但别妄想这会让你内心平静，消弭你的罪恶——你不配。

All a person can do is to pay the price. And you will pay for it. That much is enough... But don't think for a moment that your sins will be erased just because you've made peace — you are not worthy.
伊里潘说的有些过火…但他是对的。
Illifan is a little overboard... But he's right.
「赎罪」是个伪命题。不管你再怎么行善，曾经犯下的恶及其后果都不可能被忘记。
Atonement is a fallacious concept in itself. No matter how much good you perform, your past evils and repercussions cannot be easily forgotten.
三人留下简短的告别，转眼间便离开了梦境。你知道，这将是你和蒂索克二世的永别。
The three of you say your goodbyes and leave the Dreamscape. You know that this is your final farewell to Tizocic II.
（也许她的本性真的不是一个恶魔…）
(Perhaps she's not really a devil by nature...)
（但伊里潘说的也有道理…她变成了好人，但对死在她手下的人民而言…这有什么意义呢？）
(But Illifan has a point... Even though she has turned over a new leaf, does it even matter to those who died by her hand?)
（或许以后能在网络上刷到讲述她生平的内容吧……）
(Maybe I'll be able to get an update on her life when I browse the network in the future...)
亲爱的逐梦客啊！先皇已经离开了匹诺康尼，现在由朕——蒂索克三世践祚，继续完成先皇未竟的事业！
Dear Dreamchaser! The late Emperor has left Penacony. I, Tizocic III will inherit the throne and carry on the duties of the late Emperor.
如果你需要任何帮助，或者遇到了任何麻烦，都可以来找朕帮忙～
If you are in need of help or are in any kind of trouble, feel free to approach me.
为臣民服务，是朕的义务和荣幸！
It is my duty and honor to serve my subjects!
你知道「先皇」是怎样的人吗？
Do you know what kind of person is the late Emperor like?
这不重要，亲爱的臣民。重要的是，朕是怎样的皇帝！
That's not important, my dear subject. What matters most is what kind of Emperor I am!
朕乃是一心一意为臣民谋幸福的皇帝！
I am an Emperor who is dedicated to the happiness of her subjects!
What's your relationship with the late Emperor?
朕并非被谁选定的继承人。朕愿意践祚，只是因为朕愿意也有能力接手先皇留下的政治遗产。
I was not chosen by the people. The reason why I am willing to ascend to the throne is because I am willing and able to continue the legacy left by my predecessor.
接手她那最伟大的政治遗产——善意！
To take over her greatest political legacy — goodwill!
总而言之，无论您有什么需要，都欢迎随时和朕商议～
In any case, whatever you need, feel free to discuss it with me.
I want to have a chat with you.
没问题，和臣民交流感情也是皇帝的工作～
No problem. It's the Emperor's duty to communicate with her subjects.
The late Emperor was apparently a tyrant.
是是是…朕知道她是个暴君，朕知道她杀了很多人。
Yes yes yes... I know she was a tyrant, and many have died by her hand.
已经不止一位臣民给朕讲过这些事了。朕已经知悉了！
More than one subject has brought this issue up to me. I am fully aware!
但她曾是暴君又如何呢？正如她所行的善永远也不能遮蔽她所做的恶，她所做的恶也分毫无法污毁她的所行的善。
So what if she was a tyrant? The good deeds she accomplished cannot be overshadowed by the wrongs she committed, just as the evils she committed cannot tarnish the good she had done.
朕会将她留下的善意传递下去，至死方休。
I will continue her legacy of kindness till the day I die.
Why do you want to inherit the throne?
因为这里是匹诺康尼，全银河最大的销金窟，充斥着邪恶、贪婪与背叛。
Because this is Penacony, the greatest money pit in the cosmos. It is full of evil, greed and betrayal.
如果留存在这里的善意无人承继，那很快就会消失，被人忽视、被人遗忘、被人践踏。
If the remaining kindness here is not inherited, it will soon disappear. It will be neglected, forgotten and trampled on by people.
所以朕必须成为下一位皇帝，确保善意尽可能长久地留存。
Hence, I must become the next Emperor, to ensure that kindness will endure.
I don't have any other questions.
好的～如果遇到什么烦心事，记得随时来找朕！为臣民排忧解难，是最幸福的事～
Sure! If you encounter any troubles, remember to come to me anytime! It gives me untold happiness to dispel any troubles for my subjects!
好的～如果遇到什么烦心事，记得随时来找朕！为臣民排忧解难，是最幸福的事～
Sure! If you encounter any troubles, remember to come to me anytime! It gives me untold happiness to dispel any troubles for my subjects!
哦～朕亲爱的臣民，你又来了！有什么需要朕帮忙的事情吗？
Oh! My dear subject, you're back! Is there anything I can help you with?

眼前的老人平静地凝望着远方的梦想之城。
The elderly man in front of you gazes calmly at the City of Dreams in the distance.
顺着他的目光看去，在城市虚构的地平线之上升起了阵阵烟雾，那是逐梦客们第无数次开启狂欢的标志。盛会之城的喧嚣如此遥远，你和老人与它断无关系。

Following his gaze, you see puffs of smoke billowing from the fictional horizon of the city, signaling yet another time of merriment for the Dreamchasers. The clamorous city of festivities sounds so distant that it feels like a world apart from the elderly man and you.
他如一尊雕像般端坐着，连呼吸的迹象都难以察觉——盯着他，你也不由得屏住了气。然后，你惊讶地发现，人在梦境里是不必呼吸的。

He sits upright like a statue, even his breathing is hardly perceptible. You can't help holding your breath when staring at him. To your surprise, you realize that one does not have to breathe in the dreamscape.
How are you doing, young Nameless?
老人的视线投向你的左肩。
The elderly man sets his sight upon your left shoulder.
我忘记了很多事情…但那个标志我还记得，无名客可是一群传奇人物。
A lot of things have slipped my mind, but I remember that symbol. The Nameless are a legendary bunch.
我还以为你已经没气了。
I thought you were breathing your last.
老人嘴角微扬，露出一丝笑意。
The elderly man's face breaks into a faint grin.
很多人都没有意识到，在梦境里，呼吸其实是多此一举。
Many don't realize that breathing is unnecessary in the dreamscape.
只是对于大部分有机生命而言，忘记呼吸是一件难事。
For most organic lifeforms, forgetting to breathe isn't an easy task.
已经很久没人和我说过话了。有些…太久了。
It's been so long since I talked to someone. Far too long...
我叫查德威克。能告诉我你的名字吗，孩子？
My name is Chadwick. May I have yours?
曾经，我只凭名字就大概能猜到一个人来自哪里。但你…你很特别，孩子。
I used to be able to tell a person's origin from their name. But you... You're special.
啊…你身上的确带着些「神秘」的气质。
Hmm... You do have an enigmatic air about you.
曾经，我只凭一个人的神态和穿着就能大概猜到对方的出身。但你…你很特别，孩子。
I used to be able to gauge a person's background from their demeanor and attire. But you... You're special.
哪怕透过梦境这层厚重的滤镜，我也能感受到你身体里翻涌的生命力。你停不下来，每时每刻都在追求冒险——或者说，「开拓」——的路上。

I can feel the surging vitality in you even through the thick filter of the dreamscape. You can't stop. You spend every moment of your life going on an adventure — or more precisely, a trailblazing journey.
你拥有的那份能量…源源不断…似乎在不断向外流溢，超出了任何我所知晓的生物心脏所能负荷的界限。
That energy you possess... is inexhaustible and seems to be constantly overflowing. It's more than most beings I know can take.
老人的语气中透出一丝激动。
The elderly man's voice is palpable with excitement.
孩子，你身上的未知令我感到好奇和欣喜。两者都是我许久未曾体验过的情绪——毕竟现在的我对自己一无所知。谢谢你能来到我面前。
The unknown about you intrigues and delights me — both are emotions I haven't experienced for a long time. After all, I still know nothing about myself to this day. Thank you for being here.
可惜，尽管我的内心无比渴望，但我们恐怕不能在此长谈…他们来了。
As much as I want to keep this conversation going, I'm afraid I can't... as they're here.
抱歉打扰，查德威克博士。猎犬接到消息，听说您正在遭受不明人士的骚扰。我们是来帮您驱逐滋事者的。
Sorry for disturbing you, Dr. Chadwick. We have received word that you are being harassed by an unknown individual. We're here to help you evict the intruder.
只是平心静气地聊天而已。
We were just having a chat.
闯入者——需要我提醒你，这片城区不对逐梦客开放吗？违反家族规定的闹事者，猎犬有权将其逐出梦境。
Intruder, do I have to remind you that this area isn't open to Dreamchasers? We have the authority to expel anyone who violates The Family's rules from the dreamscape.
Are you trying to pick a fight?
I'm leaving. Don't you dare lay a finger on me...
…别这么做，莫伊拉。我喜欢这孩子，你能放过{F#她}{M#他}一回吗？看在我的份上，你知道我最排斥暴力。
...Please, Moira. I like this kid. Could you let {F#her}{M#him} off the hook this time? Please do it for my sake. You know how I detest violence.
…我知道了，查德威克博士，这是顾及您的面子。但就这一次…下不为例。
...Fine, Dr. Chadwick. I'm doing this as a favor to you, just this once.
离开这里，逐梦客。不要再靠近查德威克博士一步——否则后果自负。
Go away, Dreamchaser. Don't ever go near Dr. Chadwick again, or you'll suffer the consequences.
嘀嗒！那位老爷爷，他身上有些不对劲！
Tick tock! There's something fishy about that old man!
他为什么一个人待在这里，又为什么要被人监视…非常在意，嘀嗒！
Why is he alone here, and why is he being supervised... It's bothering me, tick tock!
I think he's no ordinary guy.
不愧是钟表小子的朋友，我也有同感！
I feel the same way, too! No wonder you're my friend.
Do you think I can beat that woman?
要和气，不要打架！暴力不能解决问题！
Violence isn't always the best solution!
我能感觉到，那位老爷爷身上肯定缺了什么东西！嘀嗒，他很可怜！
I can sense that the old man is missing something! Tick tock, what a poor guy!
不如我们先躲起来，等到家族的人离开了再去帮帮他吧——又轮到「钟表把戏」大显神威咯！
How about we hide and wait for The Family people to leave so that we can help him? It's time for my Clockwork to do its trick!
你本就不该出现在这里——最好别再给自己找不痛快。
You shouldn't have been here in the first place. I advise you to behave yourself.
原地等待了许久之后，守在查德威克身边的猎犬成员终于离开了……
After a long wait, the Bloodhound Family Member guarding Chadwick finally leave...
（终于走了…家族的人还真是有耐心。）
(She's finally gone... What a patient bunch those Family members are.)
（抓紧时间，再去检查下查德威克的情况吧。）
我很想和你多聊聊，孩子。但你不能在这里久留…猎犬家系从来不会警告同一个人两次。
I'd really love to talk to you more, but you can't stay here for long... The Bloodhound Family never gives second warnings.
毫无疑问，「钟表把戏」成功了…但查德威克的表情没有丝毫波动。
Without a doubt, the Clockwork is successful... However, Chadwick's expression remains unchanged.
但你仍然察觉到了藏于表面之下的某种变化…岁月的沉积让眼前的老人不再将情绪挂在脸上，但难以抑制的喜怒仍会令他的肢体颤抖。

Yet, you can discern an underlying change taking place beneath the surface... Years of experience have taught the elderly man to conceal his emotions, but he can't stop his body from trembling in uncontainable joy and anger.
我…似乎想起来了一些事，某些东西开始向外涌现了。
My memory... seems to be coming back. Things are coming out in a surge.
记忆仍然残缺不全，很多片段都不完整…但我的的确确能看到它们了。
The memories are fragmented and incomplete, but I can see them.
老人的四肢不再因愤怒颤抖。他闭上了眼睛，打算开始追溯自己生命中的一切。
The elderly man's limbs stop shaking in fury. He shuts his eyes, trying to trace back everything in his life.
无数个散落的碎片在我眼前闪过…我试图用一张网捕捉它们，但它们总能狡猾地穿过网洞，消失在无意识的汪洋里。
Countless scattered fragments flash before me... I try to catch them with a net, but they keep slipping through the mesh slyly and vanish into the ocean of unconsciousness.
只有几个零星的片段被兜住了，留了下来。我得小心翼翼地把它们捡起来……
Only a few fragments are caught by the mesh and stay in the net. I have to pick them up cautiously...
我看到了…某样东西，某种…<color=#dbc291ff>武器，伴随着无休止的杀戮和死亡</color>。它似乎和我有关。
I saw something... It looked like... <color=#dbc291ff>a type of weapon which brought about endless slaughter and death</color>. I seem to be related to it.
为什么…我不觉得自己是个爱好暴力的人。我不愿那么想……
Why... I don't see myself as someone who finds pleasure in violence. That's a dreadful thought...
或许你曾经被卷入过战争。
Maybe you were once caught up in a war.
大概吧，也许…但那感觉不太一样，很不一样。我不想顺着那条思路走下去……
That's probably the case... But there's something different about that sensation. I don't want to continue that train of thought...
我还看到了…一些人。啊…卓尔不凡的人们，哪怕是在散装的记忆里也闪着光芒。
I also saw... some people. Oh... those extraordinary characters. Even in fragmented memories they can shine.
我…我曾经是他们中的一员，我是……
I... I used to be one of them. I am...
…天才俱乐部。我终于想起来了——<color=#dbc291ff>我曾是「天才俱乐部」的一员</color>。
...The Genius Society. I finally remember — <color=#dbc291ff>I was once a member of the Genius Society</color>.
If so, why are you here?
我和你一样想要答案，孩子。我在这片无意义的梦境中滞留太久了。
Just like you, I wonder about the same thing. I've been stuck in this meaningless dreamscape for too long.
我同意，孩子。我在这片无意义的梦境中滞留太久了。
I concur. I've been stuck in this meaningless dreamscape for too long.
为什么我会任由时光蹉跎，却丝毫没起过自我拯救的念头？难道是……
Why would I while my time away without the slightest thought of rescuing myself? Could it be...
查德威克锁起了眉头，目光扫了一眼猎犬方才走过的地方。
Chadwick furrows his brows as he glances at the spot where The Bloodhound Family Member walked past earlier.
家族…一定是他们对我施加了某种影响，而且我无力反抗。
The Family... They must have done something to me that left me powerless to fight back.
只靠我自己是无法脱离这种影响的。必须要依靠某种强而有力的外力介入…比如…比如「天才俱乐部」。
I can't free myself on my own. Some sort of powerful external force has to intervene. Like... like the Genius Society.
I happen to know a few of its members.
你愿意为了一位萍水相逢的老人伸出援手吗，孩子？哪怕你根本不知道他是个什么样的人？
Would you be willing to lend a hand to an elderly man you barely know?
不能看着你被家族软禁。
The fact that you're confined by The Family bothers me.
我明白了…驱动你的是发自内心的正义感。
I see... You're driven by your sense of justice.
I don't think you're a bad guy.
我明白了…驱动你的是对自身直觉的信任。
I see... You're driven by your trust in your intuition.
谢谢你，孩子。这片梦很美好，也很虚幻。若是待在这里，我将永远无法拯救自己。是你给了我一丝希望。
Thank you. This dream is beautiful yet unreal. If I keep staying here, I won't ever be able to rescue myself. You've brought me a glimmer of hope.
这就够了…去吧孩子，趁着猎犬还没回来。我会带着希望等你回来。
That's more than enough... You should go before The Bloodhound Family Members are back. I'll be waiting for your return with hope.
（天才俱乐部的查德威克…以前的确没听过这号人物。）
(Chadwick from the Genius Society... I haven't heard of him before.)
(Let me text Herta and ask her about him.)
（黑塔的反应好像有点意外，那位老先生究竟是…）
(Herta sounds surprised. Who on earth is that elderly man...)
（听她的，先去黑塔办公室了解下情况吧。）
(I'd better listen to Herta and visit her office first.)
How come Screwllum is here too?
You've got a lot going on here...
许久不见，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。希望你最近过得安好。
It's been a while, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. I hope life is treating you well.
没时间给你们互相客套了，螺丝。赶紧聊正事吧。
There's no time for pleasantries now, Screwy. Let's cut to the chase.
不必着急，黑塔。假设：查德威克已经在匹诺康尼的梦境中滞留了上万个系统时，那我们也不必为这短短数分钟的探讨感到紧张。
There's no rush, Herta. Assumption: If Chadwick has been stuck in Penacony for tens of thousands of system hours, I think we can afford a couple of minutes to discuss the issue.
漂亮话都让你说了——我可不想干等着！他手上的*那些东西*实在太宝贵了。
You can act all righteous as you want, but I can no longer wait! The *things* he is keeping are too valuable.
说了你也不明白——不，别说是你了，就算换成其他「天才俱乐部」的成员，能理解这个课题的恐怕也寥寥无几。
You wouldn't understand even if I explained it to you, but it isn't your fault. Not even many Genius Society members can comprehend this matter.
哦对，忘了告诉你…查德威克，他以前的确是天才俱乐部的成员。
Oh, I've forgotten to tell you... Chadwick was indeed a member of the Genius Society back then.
So, are you saying that Chadwick was...
对——他以前的确是「天才俱乐部」的一员。
Right... He was indeed a member of the Genius Society back then.
那个人是货真价实的…咳，我是说，他研究的课题非常有价值。
That man is the real deal... Ahem, I mean, his research is very valuable.
卡尔德隆•查德威克，天才俱乐部#79。专精领域包括固体物理、虚数应用理论和轨道力学。
Calderon Chadwick, Genius Society #79. His expertise includes solid-state physics, applied theory of imaginary numbers, and ballistics.
His seat is higher than yours.
…席位和地位又不是画等号的，想靠这个激我？没戏。
...Our seats do not influence our statuses. You're not going to be able to rile me up with that.
的确如此。他在自己擅长的领域取得了轰动寰宇的成果。
He is, for his groundbreaking achievements in his areas of specialization.
自生命之火于我的核心内被点燃以来，于这漫漫的星海旅途中，我极少遇见真正配得上「天才」二字的灵魂。
I've been traveling across the universe since the flame of life was ignited in my core. Throughout the long journey, I rarely met souls that truly deserved to be called a "genius."
我身边的黑塔女士是其中之一——卡尔德隆•查德威克亦是。
Madam Herta is one of them, and so is Calderon Chadwick.
哼…顺带还夸了我一下，谢谢啊。
Thanks for throwing in a compliment for me.
我与查德威克博士有过两面之缘。第一次是在他年轻气盛时，第二次则是在数十年后——两次见面，他所处的境遇大不相同。
I met Dr. Chadwick twice. Our first encounter happened when he was still young and ambitious, and the second was decades later. His situations in both meetings were starkly different.
回忆：查德威克博士曾<color=#dbc291ff>向我求救</color>。那时他的年龄应在五十岁上下。
Recollection: Dr. Chadwick once <color=#dbc291ff>asked for my help</color>. He was about fifty at that time.
我答应了他彼时的诉求。自那以后，卡尔德隆•查德威克便音讯全无，仿若星海间全无他曾来过的痕迹。
I agreed to help him at that time. Ever since then, I have never heard from him again. It was as if he had never existed in the universe at all.
直到黑塔女士接到了您的信息。
Until Madam Herta received your text.
他还活着，但被夺去了记忆。
He's alive, but his memory has been stripped away.
他在匹诺康尼被人软禁着。
家族…鬼知道他们背地里在谋划什么。说吧，螺丝，你想怎么行动？
The Family... Who knows what kind of scheme they are brewing? Screwy, what do you think we should do?
此事背后疑点众多，我暂且无法根据有限的信息梳理出有信服力的结论。
There are too many uncertainties surrounding this matter. For now, I'm unable to come up with a convincing solution based on the limited information.
假设：查德威克博士确实因某种原因遭到家族记恨，并被软禁于梦境世界中；该推导中仍然存在无法解释的漏洞。
Hypothesis: Dr. Chadwick offended The Family for some reason and was confined in the dreamscape as a result. Things still don't quite add up in this scenario.
据我所知，卡尔德隆•查德威克并非长生种。而距离他最后一次与我通信已经过去了许多个年头。
As far as I know, Calderon Chadwick is not a long-life species. It has been decades since I was last in touch with him.
他以某种方式活到了现在…
Something is keeping him alive until now...
情况越来越扑朔迷离了。
This is getting more and more puzzling.
恐怕只有一种方式能解开眼下的谜团。
I'm afraid there's only one way to unravel the mystery.
我想亲自前往匹诺康尼，借故探访查德威克博士。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，不知你是否愿意同行？
I'd like to travel to Penacony myself and find a chance to visit Dr. Chadwick. {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, would you like to join me?
Let's set off right away. I can't wait to find out the truth.
面对未知，你展露出的激情总是令我神往。
I admire your excitement in the face of uncertainties.
能和你一并出行是我的荣幸！
It's my honor to travel with you!
在出发前，还有一件事需要让你知悉，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
There is something I have to tell you before we go, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.
卡尔德隆•查德威克毕生最为卓越的成就，是一种名为<color=#dbc291ff>「虚数坍缩脉冲」</color>的武器——
The most outstanding achievement of Calderon Chadwick's life is the invention of a weapon called <color=#dbc291ff>Imaginary Implosion Pulse</color>.
——那种武器曾经夺去无数人的家园和生命。
That weapon took millions of lives and destroyed countless homes.
终于又见面了，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
It's good to see you in person.
我们每一次的相逢都被赋予了非凡的意义，对此我感到庆幸。
Each of our encounters bore an extraordinary significance, and for that I am grateful.
哈哈，不得不赞美「开拓」为这个宇宙带来的奇迹。
Haha, I must praise the miracles brought to this universe by the Trailblaze!
我已经很久没来过这里了，「白日梦」酒店的大堂还是和印象中一样铺张奢华。
It's been quite some time since I last came here. The lobby of The Reverie is still as extravagant as I remember.
走吧，我们去前台询问查德威克的下落。
Let's head to the reception and ask about Chadwick's whereabouts.
欢迎回到匹诺康尼，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。有什么我能为您效劳的吗？
Welcome to Penacony, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. How can I help you?
I see you've brought a friend today...
我的名字是螺丝咕姆，女士。请原谅我不请自来，也没有办理入住手续——您在家族的「永久贵宾名单」上应该能找到我的名字。
My name is Screwllum, Madam. Please forgive me for coming here uninvited and without checking in. You should be able to see my name on the "Permanent VIP List" of The Family.
听到「螺丝咕姆」四个字的瞬间，艾丽的五官微微抽动了一下，随后还是维持住了镇静。你对她的职业精神感到由衷的敬佩。
Alley's face twitches slightly upon hearing the name of Screwllum, but she is quick to compose herself. You really admire her professionalism.
请您稍等，螺丝咕姆先生。
我已经确认过了，您的名字确实在「永久贵宾名单」上。欢迎您回到匹诺康尼，螺丝咕姆先生——请问有什么是我能为您效劳的吗？
Your name is indeed on the Permanent VIP List. Welcome back to Penacony, Mr. Screwllum! What can I do for you?
我和{NICKNAME}此次前来，是为了探访一位住客。
{NICKNAME} and I are here to visit a hotel guest here.
卡尔德隆•查德威克博士——您能否安排我们见上一面？据我所知，他应该已经在匹诺康尼滞留了很长时间。
Dr. Calderon Chadwick. Could you arrange for us to meet? From what I know, he's been staying here for quite some time.
卡尔德隆•查德威克…奇怪，我竟然不记得这个名字了。二位请稍等，我需要调用一下系统数据……
Calderon Chadwick... The name doesn't ring a bell to me, which is strange. Please bear with me while I check the system data...
…很遗憾，两位。查德威克博士不便接待访客。
...I'm sorry, gentlemen. Dr. Chadwick can't meet with visitors at the moment.
之前，在筑梦边境，我为你破了一次例。同样的事不会再发生第二次了。
I was lenient to you last time at the Dream's Edge. The same thing won't happen again.
你该庆幸螺丝咕姆先生在你身边，逐梦客。否则……
Count yourself lucky that Mr. Screwllum is with you, Dreamchaser. Otherwise...
如果我们一定要见他呢？
What if we insist on seeing him?
你该庆幸螺丝咕姆先生在你身边，逐梦客。否则……
Count yourself lucky that Mr. Screwllum is with you, Dreamchaser. Otherwise...
我想，我们大可不必让局面变得如此剑拔弩张。我猜家族的各位也不想惊扰到来往于大堂的宾客们吧？
Let's not escalate the situation. The Family wouldn't want to disturb the guests in the lobby, right?
据我所知，卡尔德隆•查德威克并非长生种。而我与他的最后一次通话……
To the best of my knowledge, Calderon Chadwick isn't a long-life species. And the last time I talked to him...
提问：家族采用何种手段延长了卡尔德隆•查德威克的寿命？该手段是否得到了星际医学组织的认可，并且符合匹诺康尼自身拟定的规制？
Question: By what means did The Family extend the lifespan of Calderon Chadwick? Has that means been approved by the Interastral Health Organization? Does it comply with the regulations of Penacony?
我没有回答您这个问题的权限，先生。我也没有权限允许任何人私自探访查德威克博士…请回吧，这里没有让步的余地。
I don't have the authority to answer your questions or allow unauthorized visits to Dr. Chadwick, sir... Please leave. There is no room for negotiation here.
理解。你的一切行为皆出于对家族的忠诚。
Understood. Your action speaks of your loyalty to The Family.
那么，我是否可以认为：为了坚守原则，你宁愿将整个家族推向{RUBY_B#智械星球IX}螺丝星{RUBY_E#}的对立面？你又能否承担与「天才俱乐部」为敌的后果？

Well, can I assume that you'd rather turn The Family against {RUBY_B#Intellitron PlanetIX}Planet Screwllum{RUBY_E#} just to uphold your principles, am I correct? Are you prepared to bear the consequences of being the enemy of the Genius Society?
(Screwy... I've never seen this side of him.)
(He's so intimidating all of a sudden...)
…请给我一些时间，我需要请示一下家主。
...Please excuse me for a moment. I need to consult our family head.
莫伊拉离开了一会儿——再回来时，她的脸上已经没有了此前的锐气。
Moira is gone for a while. When she returns, her facial expression has softened a great deal.
…十分抱歉，给两位添麻烦了。家主指示，对螺丝咕姆先生…还有这位无名客{F#小姐}{M#先生}放行。
...My sincerest apologies for the inconvenience. The family head has instructed me to let Mr. Screwllum... and this Nameless {F#lady}{M#gentleman} here through.
这就是查德威克博士的房间。
根据规定，猎犬不能在未经客人允许的情况下进入客房。我会在这里为两位守门。
The regulations prohibit the Bloodhounds from entering the hotel rooms without the guests' permission. So, I'll stay outside.
You guys have stringent regulations here.
The regulations are set by the head of our family.
以查德威克博士现在的状态恐怕无法应门。就由我来开门吧。
I'm afraid Dr. Chadwick can't answer the door in his current state. Let me open it.
突然到访多有失礼，卡尔德隆•查德威克博士，望您理解我们唐突闯入的缘由。
Dr. Calderon Chadwick, sorry for showing up here all of a sudden. We hope you don't mind our unexpected visit.
The secret is right in front of us.
难道是家族在忽悠我们？
Has The Family taken us for a ride?
不，那位猎犬并没有说谎。秘密就在我们眼前。
No, that Bloodhound didn't lie. The secret is right in front of us.
螺丝咕姆缓缓将右手探进入梦池中……
Screwllum reaches his hand slowly into the Dreampool...
…小心翼翼地，他从液体里捞起了一枚晶莹的泡泡。离开液体表面的一瞬间，泡泡开始缓慢上浮…直到于半空中悬停。
...Gently, he scoops up a translucent bubble from the liquid. The moment the bubble leaves the surface of the liquid, it starts floating upward... until it is hovering in midair.
终于又见面了，卡尔德隆•查德威克博士。
At last, we meet again, Dr. Calderon Chadwick.
推导：卡尔德隆•查德威克作为短生种族，他以肉身状态存活至今的概率无限趋近于零。时至今日，任何人为增寿的技术都无法将普通人类的自然寿命延长两个琥珀纪。

Deduction: The likelihood of Calderon Chadwick, as a short-life species, remaining alive to this day in a corporeal state is close to zero. As of now, no longevity technology has been able to extend the natural lifespan of a normal human by two Amber Eras.
但匹诺康尼的家族对「忆质」和其相关技术有着深入了解。即使无法令查德威克的肉身存续，他们仍然可以提取出他大脑底层的质料，令他的思想继续「存活」。

On the other hand, The Family in Penacony has a deep understanding of memoria and its related technologies. Even though they can't sustain Chadwick's body, they could still extract the substance from the depths of his brain, allowing his consciousness to "survive."
Can he even be considered to be alive?
大概取决于你如何定义「活着」。银河中也有许多人认为，由冰冷的机械和电子回路组成的机体不能被称之为「生命」。
It depends on how you define "alive." Many in the galaxy opine that machines, which are made of cold, metallic chassis and veined by electric circuits, cannot be seen as lifeforms.
这也是某种意义上的「永生」…
当然，也有很多人认为这根本算不上「活着」。这取决于每个人的理念，信仰，或思辨方式。
For sure, many wouldn't think this counts as being alive. It depends on each person's beliefs, religion, and way of thinking.
尚存的疑问：家族为何要大费周章，将查德威克的记忆存于此处；这份记忆于他们而言又有何重要之处？
One question remains: Why would The Family go to such lengths to store Chadwick's memory here? What significance does his memory hold for them?
或许是你提到的那种「武器」。
Perhaps, they're concerned about that weapon you mentioned.
Imaginary Pulse... That's the name, right?
我不认为家族能从查德威克的脑海中提取出有用的信息，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。因为……
I don't think The Family is capable of extracting any useful information from Chadwick's mind, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. It's because...
螺丝咕姆犹豫了片刻，没有接上「因为」二字的后话。
Screwllum hesitates and trails off after the sentence.
…隔墙恐怕有耳，有些事不便于此讨论。猎犬的听觉可是相当灵敏的。
...Let's talk about this elsewhere in case someone is listening to our conversation. The Bloodhounds have excellent hearing.
你有权知道这个故事的来龙去脉，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。假设你没有出于善意将自己的发现告知黑塔，查德威克不知还要被梦的监牢软禁多久。

You have the right to learn the story in its entirety, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. If you hadn't informed Madam Herta of your discovery out of kindness, it cannot be said how long Chadwick would have been confined here.
因此，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我想向你提出一个请求——我想请你代我将一样东西转交给滞留在梦里的卡尔德隆•查德威克博士。
So, I need a favor from you, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. I'd like you to pass something over to Dr. Calderon Chadwick for me in the dream.
我相信这样东西能够让他…缓过神来。
I believe that thing will help him... come to his senses.
我会尝试和家族的高层斡旋，争取能将查德威克的忆泡带离匹诺康尼。
I'll negotiate with the upper echelons of The Family toward the aim of taking Chadwick's Memory Bubble with me.
在那之前，希望你能从查德威克那里了解到事件的全貌——也包括在他失联之后发生的事。
Until then, I hope you'll learn the full story from Chadwick, including matters that happened before he went missing.
May you have a nice dream, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.
眼前的老人平静地凝望着远方的梦想之城。
The elderly man in front of you gazes calmly at the City of Dreams in the distance.
啊，年轻人…很高兴我还认得出你。
Oh, youngster... I'm glad that I can still recognize you.
你还记得，上次你们临别前，老人的语气里带着渴盼被拯救的希望——原本存留于他眼眸中的、那一撮跃动的火苗似乎又被掐灭了。
You still remember the elderly man's upbeat voice when you two parted ways last time. That tiny, flickering flame of hope in his eyes seems to have been snuffed out again.
我很高兴你愿意陪我说话…但你不该来这儿。莫伊拉，还有其他那些猎犬，他们不会乐意看到你的。
I'm happy you're willing to talk to me, but you shouldn't come here. Moira, and the rest of the Bloodhounds for that matter, won't be pleased to see you.
They won't come around looking for trouble anymore.
放心，这个问题已经解决了。
Don't worry. That problem has been solved.
我可能…我大概不需要知道其中细节。我听说过一些和无名客有关的故事，我猜你也一定和传闻中那些人一样本领滔天。
I... I probably don't need to know the details. I've heard stories about the Nameless, and I believe you must be as talented as those in the stories.
我是来帮你的，查德威克博士。
I'm here to help you, Dr. Chadwick.
帮我…啊，这件事我大概还记得。我必须承认…我没抱太大希望。那对我来说太奢侈了。
Help me... Oh, I still remember something about this. I must confess... that I didn't get my hopes up. Hope is a luxury for me.
像是被闪电击中一般，查德威克的瞳孔突然放大了一倍——然后又迅速地收缩。笼罩他眼白的灰雾开始散去，他神态中的一切都变得明朗起来。
As if struck by lightning, Chadwick's eyes suddenly widen and quickly contract again. The gloom covering his eyes dissipates, and he appears bright-eyed.
螺丝咕姆…他在哪儿？他答应过我…他说过他会帮助……
Screwllum... Where's he? He promised... he would help me...
不…不对。他的确履行了承诺，他没有辜负我的信任。消失的人是我…我的耳朵和嘴巴都被堵住了，眼睛也被蒙上……
Wait... No. He did fulfill his promise, and he didn't fail me. I was the one who went missing... Both my ears and mouth were covered, and I was blindfolded...
为什么？一切都那么混乱，那么无序。我是「天才俱乐部」的一员，这我记得起来…但我做了什么？我又忘记了什么？是谁把我束缚在了这幻象里……
Why? Why is everything in such a chaotic, disorderly manner? I remember I'm a member of the Genius Society... But what did I do, and what have I forgotten? Who bound me to this illusionary world...
向查德威克展示那瓶药丸。
Show the bottle of pills to Chadwick.
Is this a bottle of... pills?
It can help you recover your memory.
我明白了…这是螺丝想到的办法，对吗？
Got it... This is Screw's idea, right?
我明白了…这是他想到的办法，对吗？
Got it... This is his idea, right?
现在，我的胸腔里像是装着整个宇宙。我能看到它的每次闪烁，感受到它的每次跃动——但实际上，我对它一无所知。
Now, my chest feels like it holds the entire universe in it. I can see it flicker and feel its pulse, but I know nothing about it.
但在刚才，你拿出那个药瓶的时候，从那片宇宙的深远角落传来了一个声音。那个声音…它想说服我相信螺丝咕姆和你。
But when you showed me the bottle of pills earlier, a voice came from a distant corner of my universe. It... tried to persuade me to trust Screwllum and you.
查德威克露出一个笑容，你第一次从他的脸上读到由衷的喜悦。
Chadwick's face beams with a smile. It is the first time you have seen genuine joy on his face.
现在的我，还有什么资格挑三拣四呢？把它给我吧，孩子。
Who am I to be picky now, right? I'll take it.
别担心，我哪也不去…我哪也去不了。我在这里等你回来，孩子。
Don't worry. I'm not going anywhere, because I can't. I'll wait here for your return.
年轻的卡尔德隆•查德威克就站在你的面前。几个琥珀纪过后，你仍然一眼便能看出他神态中的积虑。
The young Calderon Chadwick is standing right before you. He wears the same contemplative expression even after several Amber Eras.
没错，查德威克博士。以这里作为起点，我们——{RUBY_B#公司部门}技术研发部{RUBY_E#}和你的团队——将共同开创银河的未来。
Yes, Dr. Chadwick. Starting from here, we, the {RUBY_B#IPC department}Technology Department{RUBY_E#}, and your team will shape the future of the galaxy together.
话可别说太满了，杜德利。对于这个项目，我还不敢说有百分百的把握。
Don't be overconfident, Dudley. I'm not fully certain that this project will work out.
哈哈哈…放心吧，我们需要的不是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>的成功率——我们需要的是有你在我们的团队里。
Hahaha... Take it easy. What we need is you on our team, not a <unbreak>100%</unbreak> success rate.
说真的，杜…我有些担心。你们想要的东西，那种只存在于理论构想里的「武器」…它真的有可能颠覆银河。
Honestly speaking, Dud, I'm a bit apprehensive about this. What you guys are seeking is a weapon that only exists theoretically... It could cause an upheaval in the galaxy.
…当然了，查。可别低估了技术研发部，我们或许没有你的天才头脑，但绝对不缺「远见」。
...Of course, Chad. Don't ever underestimate the Technology Department. We might not be geniuses like you, but we're plenty "visionary."
{RUBY_B#存护}琥珀王{RUBY_E#}刚刚挥锤，宣告了一个新世纪的开始，也代表传说中的寰宇巨灾愈发迫近……
The {RUBY_B#Preservation}Amber Lord{RUBY_E#} just swung their hammer, announcing the beginning of a new era. It means that the legendary cosmic catastrophe is drawing close...
倒是不必给我科普这些，我读过《星空简史》…不过真没想到，你居然也是「灾难说」的支持者。
No explanation needed. I've read The Brief History of the Universe to know enough... By the way, I'm surprised you're a supporter of the catastrophe theory.
哈哈哈，那倒不一定。我支持更具商业挖掘潜质的理论，仅此而已。
Hahaha, that's not totally true. I'll just support any theory with the most commercial value.
...It sounds like something you would say.
咳咳，但无论如何你都不能否认：自从「万界之癌」开始散布，诸如军团和泯灭帮之流的活动变得愈发活跃了。我们在这里的工作就是为对抗那些威胁做准备。

Ahem, there's something you can't deny: Since the Cancer of All Worlds started spreading, the Legion and the Annihilation Gang have become more and more active. Our mission here is to prepare and ward off those threats.
——我不想说什么「我们的事业是正义的」之类的话…我知道你没那么天真，查。我只是觉得，人有些时候可以把事情想得单纯些…那样日子就能好过很多。
I don't want to say things like: "We're working for a just cause," because I know you aren't that naïve, Chad. I just think that our lives can be a lot easier... if we don't complicate stuff.
我可不想在这地方和你扯上一整天。我们下去吧。
I don't want to spend all day delving into this subject with you. Let's go down.
没错，恐怕是寰宇蝗灾时期留下来的。已经太久无人问津这颗星球了，在这座设施里看到什么我都不意外。
You're right, and I think they're probably from the Swarm Disaster era. It's been a long while since anyone stepped foot here. I won't be surprised by anything I see in this facility.
…亏你们能找到这么个地方。我还是第一次看到活体。
...I'm impressed you guys managed to find this place. This is the first time I've seen living True Stings.
哈，可惜你不是生物学家。先把这里清理干净吧，要不然可没法开工。
It's a pity you aren't a biologist. Let's clear this place up, or we can't start working.
…这扇门之后，女士们先生们，就是我们烹制「奇迹」的后厨。
...Ladies and gentlemen, the space beyond this door is where we concoct the "miracle."
查德威克博士就在里面吗？
没想到有一天能和那位「天才」共事……
I never thought I'd end up working alongside that genius...
哈哈哈，别着急。在诸位和博士成为正式战友之前，我还有些话要说。
Hahaha, please hold your horses. Before you all officially become Dr. Chadwick's colleagues, there's something I want to remind you.
跨过这道门，就意味着各位选择了自己的第二次人生。从今往后的很长一段时间里，这座实验室就会是你们生活的全部。
By walking through this door, you'll be selecting a different life for yourselves. This lab will be your life for a very long time to come.
你们会在这里工作、研究、娱乐、谈心；你们会与世隔绝，直到项目问世或宣告失败。
You will work, research, have fun, and make friends here, isolated from the outside world until this project is launched or fails.
如果你们还没有准备好迎接这样的生活——趁着大门还没打开，离开还来得及。
If you aren't ready for this kind of life, you may go before I open this door.
…我从十五岁开始就在研究虚数理论，能和查德威克博士共事是我毕生的愿望。
...I've been studying Imaginary theories since the age of <unbreak>15</unbreak>. Working with Dr. Chadwick is my lifelong ambition.
对…这是其他人毕生难求的机会。一扇门算什么？我们是科学家，我们早就把一生献给了科学。
Right... This is an opportunity others could only dream of. That door is nothing! As scientists, we've long dedicated our lives to science.
哈哈哈…像，你们和他真的很像。我相信各位与博士共事的时光一定会十分愉快。
Hahaha... You guys are just like him! I believe you will have a great time working with Dr. Chadwick.
那么，女士们先生们，请进——
Well, ladies and gentlemen, please come on in...
对撞产生的能量波没能成功撕开虚数裂口；引爆胶囊未能达到临界状态。
The energy waves from the collision failed to tear up the Imaginary fissure. The detonation capsule did not reach the critical threshold.
…解除安全协议吧。将对撞速率提高到默认阈值的<unbreak>1.3</unbreak>倍——我们从这里开始。
...Lift the safety protocols. Increase the collision rate to <unbreak>1.3</unbreak> times the default threshold. Let's take it from there.
这种行为太冒险了…甚至可能会危害到实验人员的安全。
This is too risky... and might even compromise the researchers' safety.
是啊！我们可以再试一次，没必要……
Exactly! We can try one more time. There's no need to...
…我们已经试过太多次了。很明显，按照原样走下去也不会有进展。
...We've tried too many times. It's clear that we won't make any progress if we go down the same road.
过去的三年，我们翻过了几乎所有的理论障碍。在这个秘密实验室里诞生的科研成果足够震撼整个宇宙。
Over the past three years, we've overcome nearly every theoretical hurdle. The scientific achievements born in this lab are enough to leave the universe amazed.
但如果我们无法成功造出「虚数坍缩脉冲」…所有努力都会付之东流。公司不会允许我们把任何成果带出这里，连一页纸都不可能。
But if we fail to build the Imaginary Implosion Pulse... our efforts will all be in vain. The IPC won't allow us to take the scientific results with us, not even a single page.
作为物理学家，我们别无选择，唯有成功。
…您能亲自前来观看试爆，我和我的团队倍感荣幸。这个实验室平时绝不会接待客人…幸好螺丝咕姆先生您的身份特殊，技术研发部不便推辞。

...My team and I are honored to have you here to watch the detonation test. This lab doesn't welcome visitors, but you're special, Mr. Screwllum. The Technology Department wants to stay in your good graces.
不必感谢我，博士。您和您的同僚在此取得的成果令我深感震撼。
You're welcome, Dr. Chadwick. I'm floored by you and your colleagues' achievements.
但请允许我提出疑问——和有机生命相同，好奇心有时会驱使我打破礼仪的界限——您为什么会同意参与研发「虚数坍缩脉冲」这种武器？

Please allow me to ask you some questions, as curiosity sometimes compels me to ignore the decorum, just like what organic life experiences. Why did you agree to take part in the development of a weapon as destructive as the Imaginary Implosion Pulse?
因为杜德利…我在技术研发部的朋友，他说过——这件武器能被用来打击「毁灭」的势力。我们在做的是正确的事。
Dudley, my friend from the Technology Department, said that the weapon could be used to contain the Destruction's forces. He said we were doing the right thing.
非常抱歉，查德威克博士。我不应如此唐突地提问，导致您不得不给出违心的答案。
I'm very sorry, Dr. Chadwick. I shouldn't have sprung that question on you and put you in a position to give an insincere answer.
我想，我们每个人都有权选择自己生活的方式。我们可以放弃那些会令自身迷惘的「冗余思考」，只把视线投向自己身前之物，和自己擅长的领域。
I think we're all free to choose the life we prefer. We can put aside those redundant thoughts that distract us and focus on our tasks at hand and areas of expertise.
但要小心，博士。对于你我这类人，一时的懈驰可能导向万千生灵的哀恸。智慧是宇宙对我们的赐福，也是它强加于我们的重负。
But you must be cautious, Doctor. For people like us, even a minor slipup can impact the entire universe. Our wisdom is both a blessing and a burden.
有些话语现在传达已经太晚。如今我们已经知晓，魔盒里的确装着一只怪物。但愿您能守住它，不让它被无知的孩子随手打开。
Some advice is too late to be given now. Now, we already know that the box contains a monster. I hope you'll safeguard it and make sure it won't be opened by some ignorant kids.
…谢谢您的忠告，螺丝先生。希望有朝一日我们还能再见。
...Thanks for your advice, Mr. Screwllum. I hope I'll see you again one day.
…为什么，杜德利？！我们不止一次，推心置腹地谈过这件事…我每天都在警告你们！滥用它可能导致的后果，你心知肚明！
...Why, Dudley!? We've talked about this more than once... I've been warning you guys every single day! You know very well what could happen if it is misused!
这里有很多跟你我一样的普通人，他们把自己四分之一的人生都贡献给了这项事业，有些还为它付出了惨痛的代价——他们…我们想看到的不是这个结果！

Many of our colleagues here are ordinary folks just like us. They have dedicated a quarter of their lives to this project, and some have even paid a hefty price for it. They... This isn't how we wanted things to end up!
…很遗憾，查。你在自己的领域是「天才」，但却对权力的结构一无所知。你过于天真…所以才会看不清大局，甚至对于自己身处什么样的时代一无所知。

...I'm very sorry to tell you this, Chad. You might be a genius in your field, but you know nothing about power. Your naivety blinds you from seeing the big picture, and you don't even understand the era you're in.
你早该明白的，你我在这场局里都只是棋子。棋子一旦落到棋盘上，剩下的就只有身不由己了。
You should have realized long ago that we're both merely pawns in this game of chess. Once we're placed on the chessboard, we are no longer in control of our fate.
「武器」被制造出来就是为了打击敌人，这道理很难理解吗？十余支军团的先遣队正在准备袭击联合商路，他们的存在可能直接威胁到庇尔波因特。

Weapons are made to eliminate enemies. Is it that hard to understand? Over a dozen vanguard units of the Legion are preparing to attack the joint trade routes. Their presence can directly threaten Pier Point's safety.
敌人近在眼前——眼下就是检验「虚数坍缩脉冲」威力的最佳时机！
Our enemies are closing in... This is the perfect time to test the power of the Imaginary Implosion Pulse!
一百种…不，你们有一千种办法阻止他们，还能付出更小的代价、波及更少的无辜者。
You have a hundred... no, a thousand other ways to stop them that can incur lower costs and affect fewer innocents.
我终于理解了…过去的二十年，在这里发生的一切都只是一场实验。我们亲手建造的一切…却从来就不属于我们。
I've got it, finally. What we've done here for the past twenty years is just an experiment. The result of our work... never truly belongs to us.
别骗自己了，查——你打一开始就知道自己趟的是哪滩浑水。你只是选择性地视而不见而已。
Stop lying to yourself, Chad. You knew what you were getting into right from the beginning, but you chose to ignore it.
过来吧，「起爆专家」。该让军团尝尝我们的厉害了。
Come here, "bomb-maker." It's time to show the Legion our might.
不能这样…不该这样的。无数人会因我丧命……
We can't do this.... We shouldn't do this. Countless lives will be lost because of me...
…弹道轨迹预计算已经完成。命中误差区间：±<unbreak>0.08%</unbreak>。
...Ballistic trajectory precalculation is complete. Margin of error: ±<unbreak>0.08%</unbreak>.
自动巡航AI已部署。触敌引爆AI已部署。
Automatic cruise AI deployed. Enemy contact detonation AI deployed.
「虚数坍缩脉冲」启动准备：已完成。随时可以起爆。
Imaginary Implosion Pulse preparation: Complete. Ready to detonate at any moment.
…爆炸范围内有多少非敌方目标？
...How many collateral targets are there in the blast range?
预计起爆范围内共有<unbreak>24</unbreak>颗卫星级及以上星体。其中包含3颗存在D级以上级别文明的次级行星。
There are an estimated <unbreak>24</unbreak> planets at the satellite level or above within the blast range. Among them, there are three secondary planets with civilizations of Grade D or above.
嗯…连带损伤在可接受范围内。起爆计划照常。
Hmm... the amount of collateral damage is acceptable. The detonation plan can proceed as scheduled.
时候到了，专家。按下起爆按钮吧。
It's time, bomb-maker. Hit the detonate button.
…这是什么意思？我说了——按下起爆按钮！
...What are you doing? Press it now!
啊…我明白了。你害怕背上骂名，对吧？
Ah... I get it. You're afraid of taking the blame, aren't you?
不用担心。按下那个钮的不是你，也不是我；后人的史书上根本不会提到我们两个的名字。
Fret not. The one who presses the button is neither you nor I. We won't even be mentioned if this incident is later reported.
真遗憾，我本不想戳破你的偶像气泡…但卡尔德隆•查德威克不值得你的同情。他早就预见到了近似的结局，但还是选择了忘记后果，不惜代价投入研究。
I'm sorry to burst your bubble, but Calderon Chadwick isn't worth your sympathy. He'd long foreseen the outcome, but he chose to ignore it and carry on the research at all costs.
他的自私就是把自己的才能置于一切之前——其他人的事？他压根就不在乎。
Selfishly, he puts his talent before everything else. He doesn't care the least bit about anyone else.
…我不想再浪费口舌了，你刚刚浪费了最后一次机会。
...I'm not going to say anything else. You've just wasted your final opportunity.
起爆指令已确认。对撞起爆器开始充能…<unbreak>20%</unbreak>…<unbreak>50%</unbreak>…<unbreak>75%</unbreak>…已达到起爆临界点。
Detonation command confirmed. Collider charging in progress... <unbreak>20%</unbreak>... <unbreak>50%</unbreak>... <unbreak>75%</unbreak>... Critical detonation threshold reached.
自动巡航AI已开启。锁定目标中…<unbreak>30%</unbreak>…<unbreak>70%</unbreak>…完成。
Automatic cruise AI activated. Locking target... <unbreak>30%</unbreak>... <unbreak>70%</unbreak>... Complete.
锁定AI已开启。升温中…<unbreak>20%</unbreak>…<unbreak>40%</unbreak>…<unbreak>80%</unbreak>…腔室温度已达到阈值。
Lock-on AI activated. Warming up... <unbreak>20%</unbreak>... <unbreak>40%</unbreak>... <unbreak>80%</unbreak>... Chamber temperature has reached threshold.
Imaginary Implosion Pulse is about to be launched. <size=28>Five...</size>
…不要怪我，查。我们都要为自己的选择负责。
...Don't hold it against me, Chad. We have to be responsible for our choices.
他们会永世诅咒我的名字，他们会…你又付出了什么代价，杜德利？
My name will forever be cursed. They'll... What's the price you have to pay, Dudley?
看吧，查…这就是你的问题，你总把自己的天赋和才能视作理所应当。你完全不知道还有一种人，像我这样的人——
Look, Chad... This is your problem. You always take your gifts and talents for granted, and you have no idea there are people like me...
现在…你经历了我一半的人生，也知道我的故事了。
Now, you have experienced half of my life and learned about my story.
虚数脉冲杀死了多少人？
How many people did the Imaginary Pulse kill?
…一个我竭尽全力想要忘掉的数字。那天以后，我再也不敢向镜子投去哪怕一瞥。我害怕看到一个恶魔…一个夺走无数人生命和家园的凶手。

...A number that I try my best every day to forget. Ever since that day, I haven't dared to look in the mirror even once. I'm worried I might see a monster... A murderer who has killed countless people and ruined even more lives.
我不知道该怎么看待你。
I'm not sure what to make of you.
我也一样，孩子…那天以后，我再也不敢向镜子投去哪怕一瞥。
Me too, child... Ever since that day, I don't dare to even glance at myself in the mirror.
我害怕看到一个恶魔…一个夺走无数人生命和家园的凶手。
I'm worried I might see a monster... A murderer who has killed countless people and ruined even more lives.
那天在控制室里也是我最后一次看到杜德利。或许现实就和他说的一样，棋子是不配拥有名字的。
That day in the control room was the last I saw Dudley. Perhaps, it's true that pawns don't deserve to be mentioned, just like how he put it.
再之后，我遣散了团队，废弃了原本的实验室。我想办法带走了一些关键的资料，不希望它们落入别有用心之人手中。
After that, I disbanded the team and left the lab. I managed to take some crucial data with me to keep them from falling into the wrong hands.
我从他人口中得知，下令使用「虚数坍缩脉冲」的技术研发部高层被部门专门立项审查，后来失去了音信。
I later learned from others that the higher-ups of the Technology Department who ordered the Imaginary Implosion Pulse detonation were subjected to an internal review. They were never heard of again.
但我清楚公司不会善罢甘休。我们的研究成果太过宝贵…哪怕他们明面上发表声明谴责，也不可能真的放弃和虚数脉冲有关的技术。

But I knew that IPC wouldn't let the matter rest. The result of our research was way too valuable... Although they released a statement condemning the detonation, they would never really give up the technology related to it.
他们需要我——为了掌控那些知识，也为了不让它们落入银河间其它派系之手。他们会追我到天涯海角。
They needed me to control the knowledge and keep it out of reach of other factions across the universe. So, they would always be breathing down my neck.
…所以我开始了逃亡，我不想穷尽一生都活在一片阴影之下。
...So, I decided to escape, not wanting to live the rest of my life being controlled by others.
在我最需要帮助的时候，我只想到了一个名字。我们此前只有一面之缘，但他却戳破了我的虚伪和借口。
A name came to my mind when I needed help the most. We only met once, but he saw through my hypocrisy and excuses.
对。我下定决心找到他，相信他能帮我反抗公司。
Yes. I made up my mind to look for him, thinking that he could help me rebel against IPC.
这就是我后半生的故事……
This is the story of the latter part of my life...
曾几何时，在世界与世界互相隔绝的年代，某些文明已经拥有了足够毁灭自身的武器。
Once upon a time when there was no interaction between different worlds, some civilizations were already in possession of weapons powerful enough to destroy themselves.
对力量的畏惧让他们建立起了复杂的规则和律法，极力避免自毁的开关落入疯子或暴徒之手。
Out of fear for power, they established complicated laws and regulations in an attempt to prevent these self-unmaking devices from falling into the hands of the insane or the violent.
后来，当星海被曲折蜿蜒的航路连成一片，技术和资源开始在世界之间流动，比原本那些武器强大数万倍的新武器也逐一问世。

When the starry seas later became interconnected by winding routes, the exchange of technology and resources began. New weapons, many times more powerful than the original ones, emerged one after another.
令人不解的是：随着武器威力的擢升，那些原本被用来限制滥用的繁杂规则却被愈发简化。当刀尖的方向从向内变成向外，人们对暴力的态度不约而同地变得宽容。

Bewilderingly, those complicated rules in place to limit the abuse of weapons became increasingly simplified as more and more powerful weapons were invented. People were more tolerant of weapons when they were used against enemies.
假如在某个遥远的世界上，万千生灵正被烈火摧残，悲鸣响彻云霄——但对于在树下仰望夜空的你我而言，那不过是漫天繁星被谁人摘下了一颗而已。

Let's say there was a faraway planet where its people were being ravaged by ferocious flames with their cries echoing throughout the sky. Yet, for you and I, lying beneath the tree and gazing at the sky, the planet would be just another star plucked by someone from many others.
「智慧」，多么令人迷惑的词汇。有人以为它是一切问题的答案，一切美德的终点。
"Wisdom." What a perplexing word. Some see it as the answer to every problem and the ultimate of all virtues.
但银河间多少智识超凡之人，却受尽世俗烦扰。究其原因，到底是天才太过高傲，还是庸人过分嫉妒？没人说得清楚。

However, many of those with extraordinary intellect are troubled by secular problems. Is it because the geniuses are too arrogant, or is it because jealousy gets the better of the mundane? No one has an answer for that.
唯有一点无须争辩：智慧可以与自私的欲念共存。
Only one thing is irrefutable: Wisdom can co-exist with selfish desires.
当赞达尔用古老且陌生的语言将「虚数之树」几个字书于纸上…他的眼中看到了什么？
What did Zandar see when he was recording tomes on the "Imaginary Tree" in his strange and ancient language?
当我还是一个孩童，第一次接触虚数理论时，在我脑海中浮现的画面不是一棵参天大树；而是一片茂密的树海。
When I was little and first discovered the Imaginary theories, what came to my mind was the image of a dense forest, not of a huge tree.
我所见过的一切，令我全然无法相信宇宙的基底是一棵无私的巨树，自愿为亿万枚树叶奉献、给养。
After going through so many things, I still find it hard to believe that the foundation of the universe is a giant tree that nurtures countless leaves selflessly and voluntarily.
我宁愿相信，每个世界都是一枚随风飘来的树种，因为巧合落在了这片土地上，然后开始自顾自地扎根、生长，最后形成了这片树海。
I prefer to see each planet as a seed carried by the wind that happens to land on the soil. The seeds then begin to take root and grow bigger, eventually forming the forest.
宇宙并不在意我们——宇宙只是存在着，并凝望着。
The universe isn't concerned with our presence... It merely exists and observes.
螺丝咕姆…终于，我终于找到你了。
我们很多年没见了，查德威克博士。请原谅，我无法由衷地对您道出「我很遗憾」——因为我知道你早就预见了这个结果。
We haven't seen each other for years, Dr. Chadwick. Please forgive me for not telling you that I feel sorry for your plight. I know you have long seen it coming.
我经历的一切都是自己种出的结果…这么多年过去，我已经不需要再被人提醒这一点了。
I brought this upon myself... After all these years, I no longer have to be reminded of that.
我现在需要帮助，螺丝先生……
你历尽劫难后仍要和我对话…你一定是无路可走了。如有需要，螺丝星可以成为你暂时的庇护所。
I can tell you're driven to a corner, as you're still willing to talk to me after going through all those hardships. Planet Screwllum can be your temporary shelter if you need it.
不，不行。我已经对自己发过誓，绝不会再把无关的人卷进来了。
No. No way. I've pledged to myself never to involve any more innocent people in this matter.
不管我躲到银河的哪个角落，公司都会找到我的…这是早晚的事。我不可能一直逃下去，但我还有别的方式反抗。
No matter where I hide, the IPC will find me. It's just a matter of time. I can't be on the run forever, so I need to fight back in some way.
我听说了，俱乐部里有一位天才研制出了一种秘密药物，可以帮人「屏蔽」部分意识和记忆。但我和俱乐部的各位向来交情不深，所以才想到找你帮忙牵线。

I've heard that a genius has developed a secret drug capable of blocking parts of the consciousness and memory of a person. I've never been close with anyone from the Genius Society, so I'd need you to pull the strings for me.
「选择性阻断药」——我有所耳闻，大概是那位脾气古怪的药剂师的发明。的确，那位女士从不与公司来往，不必担心她会做出出卖同僚的行为。
The Selective Blocking Agent — I've heard of it. I suppose it's the brainchild of that eccentric pharmacist. Indeed, that lady has no dealings with the IPC, so the risk of her selling you out is low.
疑问：你是否认定这是最稳妥的解决方案？
Question: Do you think this is a surefire solution?
…这样代价最小，我确定。只要我能将那些知识暂时遗忘…公司就什么也别想从我的脑子里榨出来。
...All I'm certain is that it has the smallest price to pay. As long as I can forget the knowledge temporarily... The IPC will have no means to extract it from my brain.
至于我所要经受的任何事…那都是我应得的。人总要为自己的行为负责，承担代价也是必要的一环……
As for whatever I'll be going through, I deserve it. Everyone must be accountable for their actions, and facing the consequences is part and parcel of the process...
我理解了，查德威克博士。我会协助你拿到那样药物。
I understand, Dr. Chadwick. I'll get you that drug.
你终于能够诚实地面对自己了，博士——仅就这点，我为你感到欣慰。我衷心希望你能挺过这段艰难的时光。
You're finally honest with yourself, doctor. I'm glad for you for that achievement alone. I hope with all my heart that you can pull through these tough times.
眼前的查德威克博士大概已经年过古稀——他的形象与你们初遇时相比已经几无差别。
The Dr. Chadwick in front of you is at an advanced age. He looks very similar to how he was when you first met him.
依然是那双积虑的眼睛，眼白里又多夹杂了几分浑浊。
He still has those contemplative eyes, now tinged with a hint of gloominess.
他似乎感受不到你的存在…或许你该先在四周转转，观察一下这个房间。
He can't seem to sense your presence... Perhaps, you can take a look around the room first.
啊…他们又派了新人来，是吗？
Ah... Did they send their guys over again?
换谁来都是一样的。同样的话我已经说过无数次…我现在对你们而言百无一用。
Who is sent here makes no difference. I've said time and again that I'm no longer of use to you guys.
You took the Selective Blocking Agent...
啊…我明白了。这里不是现实…你也不是公司派来的人，对吗？
Ah... I get it. This isn't reality, and you aren't an IPC lackey, are you?
太好了…我已经太久没和人正常地对过话了。我在这里…什么都不缺，他们会满足我的任何要求…我只是没有自由。
Wonderful... It's been so long since I had a normal conversation with someone. I don't need anything here, as they'll get me whatever I want... I'm just deprived of freedom.
一开始，他们伪装得很客气。他们拿各种东西诱惑我，想用物质和承诺交换我的知识…但没有效果。
At first, they pretended to be friendly with me. They tempted me with valuables and promises in return for my knowledge... all to no avail.
后来他们失去了耐心。他们开始逼迫我阅读和虚数应用理论相关的文献……
Eventually, they lost their patience and started forcing me to read articles related to the theory of imaginary application...
…但「阻断药」的效果远比想象中好。它不止屏蔽了我脑海中的知识，甚至还阻断了我学习相关知识的能力。
...But the drug was surprisingly effective. Not only did it block my access to the related knowledge in my mind, but it also hampered my ability to learn the knowledge.
再后来，他们接受了我已变成一个无用老人的事实。自某个时刻开始，他们的策略变成了静候我的死亡。
Much later on, they accepted the fact that I had been reduced to a useless old man. Starting from some point in time, they changed their strategy and decided to just wait for my death.
…没有什么值得道歉的，这都是我理应付出的代价。
...You don't have to. It's the price I have to pay.
被软禁的唯一好处，就是随着岁月和痛苦的累积，压在我身上的负罪感似乎减弱了一些。
The passing of time and the increasing pain seem to have alleviated my guilt, which is the only good thing about being confined here.
我从他们派来的人口中得到了一些零碎的消息。再加上我自己的推断…公司可能计划着等待我的肉体死亡后，对我大脑中残留的忆质做手脚。

I've gathered bits and pieces of info from the people they sent. Combined with my own deduction, I believe the IPC might be scheming to tamper with the memoria left in my brain after the death of my physical body.
他们大概认为，无论我用了何种手段缄口不言，一旦等到肉身消亡的一刻，余留下来的东西就只能任他们摆布。
They probably think that no matter how tight-lipped I am now, whatever remains of my dead body will be at their disposal.
我很害怕，年轻人…我害怕自己建立起来的防线会在死亡到来的一瞬完全崩塌。
I'm scared, youngster... I'm worried that all the precautions I've taken so far will be negated upon my demise.
如此发展下去，公司总有一天会再次掌握「虚数脉冲」的技术，并垄断它。到头来，我的一切努力都会变成徒……
At this rate, IPC will one day regain control of the Imaginary Pulse's technology and monopolize it. My efforts will all be in vain when the time comes...
请容我否认，博士——你的努力不是徒劳。
Please allow me to rebut that, doctor. Your effort isn't in vain.
我们又见面了，查德威克博士。
Here we are again, Dr. Chadwick.
螺丝…螺丝咕姆？！我没想到…我从来没想过自己还能再见到你……
Screw... Screwllum!? I never thought... I could see you again...
我也一度这么以为。命运无常，但它终于还是向你我展现了它善意的一面。
I once thought so too. Life is unpredictable, but it has eventually shown us its benevolent side.
我来是想告诉你，博士，你的努力没有白费。哪怕在肉身消亡以后，你仍然坚守着那些知识，没有给居心叵测之人留下可乘之机——
I'm here to tell you that your effort isn't in vain. Even after the death of your physical body, you're still safeguarding your knowledge, leaving no chance for those harboring ulterior motives...
——凭借的不是药物的效果，而是<color=#dbc291ff>铭刻于你意识根底的执念和坚持。</color>
It isn't the effect of the drug, but the <color=#dbc291ff>ingrained dedication and perseverance in your consciousness.</color>
那就好…那就再好不过了。
That's great... It couldn't be better.
你知道吗，螺丝？我一直都在后悔。第一次遇见你的时候，我屏蔽了自己的心之声。
You know what, Screwllum? I've always regretted not listening to the voice inside me when we first met.
一句简单的话，我却憋了大半辈子没能说出口。我想…现在是时候让我自己听见了。
It's just a simple phrase, but I haven't been able to say it. It's probably time I hear it myself now.
说出来吧，查德威克。人类的生命转瞬即逝，很少有人能不带着遗憾迈过终点。你的人生并不幸福——但能够拥有此刻，至少代表它是完整的。
Say it, Chadwick. Life is fleeting, and many reach the end with regrets. I can't say your life is a happy one, but it is at least complete when this moment takes place.
<color=#dbc291ff>我加入这项实验不是为了任何理念，只是为了我自己。我想让自己的才能和领域被世界看见，仅此而已。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I joined the experiment not for a good cause, but for myself. I wanted my talents and expertise to be seen by the whole world, and that's it.</color>
谢谢你，螺丝咕姆。也谢谢你，孩子。我感觉…好多了，也许从未这么好过……
Thank you, Screwllum, and you. I feel... much better, probably never better...
这一路上辛苦你了，查德威克博士。现在，如果你不介意——就由我们来陪你走完这最后一段吧。
You've been through a lot, Dr. Chadwick. Now, if you don't mind, please let us be with you as you make your way to the end.
Help Dr. Chadwick to his feet.
两个琥珀纪以后，查德威克博士终于获得了自由——他现在与我们同在。
Two Amber Eras later, Dr. Chadwick is finally freed. He is now with us.
Why is he in the dream?
How did he end up like this?
查德威克博士的梦魇成为了现实。他的肉身死去之时，公司用忆庭提供的先进技术提取了他大脑中的忆质，并将其封存在了忆泡之中。

What Dr. Chadwick dreaded the most became reality. After his demise, the IPC extracted the memoria in his brain with the advanced technology provided by the Garden of Recollection and sealed it in a Memory Bubble.
他们一定早有准备，所以整个忆质迁徙的过程十分迅速——迅速到连查德威克弥留之际的自我意识都被保存了下来……
They must have prepared for it in advance, as the process took place right after his death, so fast that even his consciousness in his final moments was preserved...
…光是这样还不够。以那种方式被保存下来的忆质，说到底只是一滩「死水」罢了；要是在很长的时间里不被「搅动」，水里的东西迟早都会死光。
...That step alone wasn't enough, as the memoria preserved that way was, in essence, a stagnant pool. If it remained inactive for too long a time, what was in the water would eventually die out.
所以，公司想到了办法——将查德威克送往匹诺康尼，通过联入梦境维持忆质的活性。推测：技术研发部一定设法与家族达成了某种协议。

Therefore, the IPC came up with a solution — sending Chadwick to Penacony to maintain the activity of the memoria. Speculation: The Technology Department must have struck some sort of a deal with The Family.
在家族的监视下，查德威克博士于梦中徘徊了两个琥珀纪。若不是你，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}——他们的监视还会一直延续。
Under The Family's supervision, Dr. Chadwick wandered in the dreamscape for two Amber Eras. If it weren't for you, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, their supervision would continue.
我想，查德威克博士该休息了。
I think it's time for Dr. Chadwick to rest.
真是个奇迹。就靠着忆质里残留的那一丝丝自我，他居然能跟公司抗衡到现在…我当年果真没看错人。
This is such a miracle. It's hard to believe he has managed to resist the IPC until now with what little consciousness remaining in his memoria... I was right about him back then.
他一直都是个天才，黑塔女士——但他的意志并非一直如此坚韧。
He's always been a genius, Madam Herta, but he isn't always this determined.
科学和技术本身并无善恶观念。过去的几百年里，他一直在为自己年轻时的一个念头「赎罪」。
Science and technology is not good or evil. For the past hundreds of years, he's been trying to redeem himself for a thought he had when he was young.
当时听{NICKNAME}小鬼提到他的下落，我还以为终于有机会能接触到他的研究了…可惜，没想到最后事情竟会如此发展。
When {NICKNAME} told me about him, I thought I would finally have the chance to learn about his research... It's a pity that things turned out this way.
那些装置能够暂时维持忆泡的活性。只要关上它们，查德威克博士就能安静地睡去。
Those devices are used to maintain the vitality of the Memory Bubble temporarily. By turning them off, Dr. Chadwick will be able to enter a peaceful slumber.
{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我们一起送它最后一程吧。
{F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, let's pay our final respects to him together.
在你眼前的不止是一台冰冷的装置，也是卡尔德隆•查德威克三分之一的生命。
Before you lies more than just a lifeless machine, it embodies a third of Calderon Chadwick's existence.
你本期待着世界会对这位天才的逝去做出回应……
You hoped for a response from the world to the departure of this brilliant mind...
…但此刻荡漾于空气中的唯有沉默。
...Yet, all that lingers is a profound silence in the air.
我对你的了解并不深刻，博士。相识百年，你我见面不过寥寥三次。
I don't know you very well, Doctor. We've known each other for a century, yet we've only met three times.
但还是请允许我称你一声——「朋友」。
Nevertheless, please allow me to address you as a friend.
这样说也许算不上慰藉：但在我的计算中，你的研究本有潜力拯救数以亿计的生灵。
I understand this may not be much of a consolation, but in my calculations, your research had the potential to save billions of lives.
可惜时代已随风去。在真正的灾难降临之前，我们只能祈祷——祈祷博识尊的视线能够投向下一位卡尔德隆•查德威克。

Regrettably, the era has slipped through our fingers like sand. Prior to the onset of an actual disaster, all we can do is pray — pray that the discerning gaze of Nous may turn toward the next Calderon Chadwick.
唔…我是不是也该说点什么？
Well... should I also say something?
咳…查德威克博士，我虽然没见过你本人——但我对你的头脑和研究深感钦佩。
*cough*... Dr. Chadwick, although I've never met you in person, I deeply admire your intellect and research.
你知道，我可不经常夸人…但咱们俩研究的领域有很多重合的地方。你发表的虚数应用理论不止一次给过我启发，甚至有点让我…唔…羡慕。

You know, I don't usually give compliments... But our fields of study share many commonalities. Your work on the theory of imaginary applications has sparked my inspiration on more than one occasion, and I have to say, it's even made me... umm... a tad jealous.
可惜咱们没机会一起共事了。听螺丝和那个小鬼说的，你这辈子可真是遭了不少罪——那就睡个好觉吧，博士。
It's a shame we never had the chance to work together. From what I've heard from Screwy and that troublemaker, you've had your share of hardships in your lifetime. Rest in peace, Doc.
嗯，一个平静的结局。对于晚年的查德威克博士来说，算得上一种巨大的奢望。
Well, it's a calm conclusion. For Dr. Chadwick in his later years, This would count as quite a significant luxury.
没想到我居然会亲手为一位俱乐部的同僚送行。这感觉…还挺奇妙的。
I never imagined I'd be bidding farewell to a fellow Society member in person. It feels... rather peculiar.
真遗憾，要是我能早两个琥珀纪意识到——
It's a real pity. If only I had realized two Amber Eras earlier—
…谁？是谁？！你们、你们刚才听见那个声音了吗？
...Who? Who is it!? D—Did you all hear that voice just now?
Are you playing a prank, Screwllum!?
冷静下来，二位。我也听到了那个声音……
Calm down, both of you. I heard that voice too...
那难道是…查德威克博士残留的意识体？
Could it be... the residual consciousness of Dr. Chadwick?
又来了！不过这次的音量…似乎…减弱了一些。
It's happening again! But this time, it seems... quieter.
推测：查德威克博士的自我意识仍有微弱残留。它正在迫切尝试与我们对话。
Speculation: Dr. Chadwick's self-awareness still lingers faintly. It's making an eager effort to communicate with us.
黑塔女士，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}——我们靠近些吧。
我在听着呢，博士。你还有什么想说的，就趁现在吧。
I'm listening, doctor. If there's anything else you want to say, now's the time.
黑塔的人偶向前迈进了一步，用额头抵住了颤抖的忆泡。残驻着查德威克意识的忆泡瞬间破裂…数秒之后，黑塔睁开了眼睛。

Herta's puppet takes a step forward, pressing her forehead against the trembling Memory Bubble. The Memory Bubble, which still holds traces of Chadwick's consciousness, ruptures in an instant... and a few seconds later, Herta opens her eyes.
真让人火大啊…明明只是个只有几十年寿命的普通人，居然能取得这么令人瞠目结舌的成就。
It's absolutely infuriating... He was nothing more than an ordinary person with a lifespan of just a few decades, yet he managed to achieve such astonishing feats.
What did he say to you?
…所有。就在刚刚那一瞬间，他把自己毕生的成果都托付给了我。
...Everything. In that brief moment, he entrusted all his life's work to me.
It seems like you truly admire him.
欣赏？可以这么说吧。不过老实说…我是有些羡慕，还有点…妒忌。
Admire? I suppose you could say that. But to be honest... I'm somewhat envious, and a bit... jealous.
就在刚刚那一瞬间，他把自己毕生的成果都托付给了我。
At that very moment, he entrusted me with all his life's work.
看来在生命的最后时刻，卡尔德隆•查德威克选择了相信你，黑塔女士——哪怕你们素未谋面。
It appears that in the final moments of his life, Calderon Chadwick chose to place his trust in you, Madam Herta — even though the two of you had never met before.
有机生命的理性，着实令人难以捉摸。但有机生命的冲动，往往蕴含壮阔且浪漫的诗意——令我震撼。
The reasoning behind organic life is truly unpredictable. Nevertheless, the impulses of organic life frequently embody a grand and romantic poetry that never fails to leave me in awe.
…了不起，太了不起了。上万条公式和方程此刻正在我脑海里闪现…我从没想过还有这种剖析问题的方式。
...Remarkable, truly remarkable. Tens of thousands of formulas and equations are flashing through my mind right now... I never imagined there could be such a way to analyze the problem.
从虚数流溢到虚数坍缩…从理论到应用…从一纸论文到「虚数脉冲」的问世……
From Imaginary overflow to Imaginary implosion... from theory to application... from a mere paper to the birth of the Imaginary Pulse...
您看到什么了，黑塔女士？
What did you see, Madam Herta?
我看到了…他最后留下的一段话。
I saw... the final words he left behind.
「致黑塔女士：尽管我在有生之年守住了自己的阵地，但以公司掌握的资源，他们终有一日会找到复现『虚数坍缩脉冲』的技术和方法。」

"To Madam Herta: While I've held my position during my lifetime, given the resources the IPC possesses, they will inevitably discover the means and techniques to reproduce the Imaginary Implosion Pulse."
「木已成舟，自『虚数脉冲』问世的一刻起，宇宙的任何一隅都注定要警惕来自它的威胁。我无力令时光倒流，但我至少还能做到一件事——」

"The die was cast at the moment the Imaginary Pulse was created. Every corner of the universe is destined to be on guard against its threats. I can't turn back time, but there's still one thing I can do..."
「——将我掌握的知识和技术交给值得托付的人，为建立足以制衡公司势力的『威慑体系』打下基础。」
