"...I can entrust my knowledge and technology to those who are worthy, thereby establishing the groundwork for a deterrence system robust enough to counterbalance the IPC's might."
「我的生命已经走到了终点。但从这一刻起，我想要成为一柄利剑，永远悬在霸权和枭恶的头顶。」
"My life is nearing its conclusion. Yet, from this moment forward, I aspire to be an unyielding blade eternally poised above tyranny and malevolence."
壁炉取暖开着，但整个客房如同冰窖一样寒冷。
The fireplace heating is turned on, yet the whole room is chilly like an icy cavern.
你无法想象一个正常人能长期生活在如此之低的室温下。
You can't imagine a normal person living in a space so cold.
你掂了掂这只已经落灰的旅行箱——它显然空空如也。
You weigh a dusty suitcase with your hand — it is obviously empty.
它也许已经在这个房间里静躺了上百年的时光。
It may have been left untouched in this room for centuries.
在这间死气沉沉的客房里，唯一能提醒你时间仍在流动的便是入梦池内那些呼吸着的、窜动着的液泡。
In this dingy, stuffy room, the only thing that reminds you of flowing time is the pulsing, hovering liquid bubbles in the Dreampool.
但它们也不会告诉你查德威克博士身在何处。
But they won't be able to tell you where Professor Chadwick went.
我会尝试和家族的高层斡旋，争取能将查德威克的忆泡带离匹诺康尼。
I'll negotiate with the upper echelons of The Family toward the aim of taking Chadwick's Memory Bubble with me.
在那之前，希望你能从查德威克那里了解到事件的全貌——也包括在他失联之后发生的事。
Until then, I hope you'll learn the full story from Chadwick, including matters that happened before he went missing.
May you have a nice dream, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.
莫伊拉直直地盯着你，你从她眼中看到了恼怒和无奈。
Moira stares daggers at you, and you can infer both angst and resignation in her eyes.
如果螺丝咕姆不在身边，你觉得她有可能当场把你撕成碎片。
If Screwllum wasn't around, you guess she might just try to tear you apart right here and now.
这里究竟是什么地方，杜？
What exactly is this place, Dud?
很遗憾，我不能告诉你这颗星球的具体坐标——上面的命令。这是为了防止你们…唔…半途而废，希望你能理解，查。
Forgive me, but I cannot tell you the exact coordinates of this planet — orders from up top. It's to prevent you all from... err, abandoning the task beforehand. I hope you'll understand, Chad.
但我可以告诉你的是：你在这里绝对不会被打扰。
But I can tell you this: You will absolutely not be disturbed here.
啊…原来如此。但你应该也明白吧？只要我想，我肯定有办法搞清楚自己在哪。这不是什么难事。
Ah... I see, but you should know too? That if I wanted, I would find a way to locate my position. It's not that hard.
杜德利发出了笑声，没有正面回应。他当然明白，毕竟站在他身边的是一位「天才」。
Dudley laughs out loud instead of fielding a response. Of course he knows that: It is a genius who stands before him.
动作快！把敢反抗的人都抓起来！
Hurry it up! Round up anyone who dares to resist!
他们…他们真的打算使用「脉冲」吗？！
They... Are they really going to use the Pulse!?
查德威克博士…查德威克博士在哪？只有他、只有他能阻止这一切！
Professor Chadwick... Where is he? Only he can put a stop to all this!
长官！我们找到卡尔德隆•查德威克博士了！
Captain! We've located Professor Calderon Chadwick!
好，时间还来得及——把他带到控制室来，我去通知杜德利总监。动作快！
Good, we still have time then. Take him to the control room. I'll notify Director Dudley. Hurry, go!
几本书籍散落在地上。你定睛看了看书名，确信这些书本与查德威克的专业和研究课题毫不相干。
A few books are scattered on the floor. You peer at their names, and are certain they have nothing to do with Chadwick's specialization nor research subjects.
你很难想象那位老人会对《仙舟持明族民乐考》感兴趣，或许他真的已经在这里待了太久了。
You find it hard to believe that old man would be interested in Xianzhou Vidyadhara Folk Music Theory — or perhaps he must have lived here for too long.
老人面前的书桌上叠放着几封未寄出的信件。
The desk before the old man is stacked with unsent letters.
信件的封面上用潦草的字体书写着：「寄出不予批准，建议退回」。
On a letter cover, written in hasty handwriting: "Unauthorized send request. Return recommended."
墙壁上的保险箱，不知道里面保存着什么。
One wonders what's inside the safe on the wall.
也有可能是完全空的…因为此处的卡尔德隆•查德威克不可能再私藏秘密。
It could be completely empty... because the Calderon Chadwick right here has no more secrets he can hide.
（查德威克博士，是被软禁在了这里吗？）
(Professor Chadwick has been placed under house arrest here?)
在我的计算中，卡尔德隆•查德威克的研究本能拯救数以亿计的生灵——现在看来，这一计算结果有极大概率将会应验。
According to my calculations, Calderon Chadwick's research could have saved hundreds of millions of lives. Now, it appears that this outcome has an extremely high rate of becoming reality.
愿你能在那片树海中找到永恒的安宁，博士。
May you find eternal peace among that sea of trees, doctor.
没想到他居然会把毕生的成果都托付给我…他是不知道这座空间站跟公司之间还有合作关系吗？
To think he would entrust his life's work to me... Did he not know this space station was connected with the IPC?
但是他留下的愿望…果然还是得尊重才行。
But his wishes... They must be honored.
那就想办法绕过公司的眼线吧。赌上「天才」之名，我一定会为卡尔德隆•查德威克博士办到这件事。
Find a way to circumvent the IPC's surveillance then. With my reputation as a Genius on the line, I will surely get this done for Dr. Calderon Chadwick.
（刚刚我所经历的，就是查德威克的前半生吗？）
(What I just experienced, was that the first half of Chadwick's life?)
（但这段回忆还没结束…去看看接下来在他身上发生了什么吧。）
(But this memory isn't over yet... Let's take a look at what happened to him after.)
对于「梦」，我向来抱怀敬畏，因而不常光顾匹诺康尼那所谓的「盛会之梦」。
I've always regarded dreams with awe, hence I rarely frequent Penacony, that Planet of Festivities.
与我而言，所谓的美梦呈现出来的样貌甜腻且虚假，与「梦」原本应有的模样相去甚远。
To me, the so-called sweet dreams are often saccharine and insincere, a stark contrast to the true shape of a dream.
不知在梦境中沉浸许久以后，还留在现实中的查德威克是否安好。
I wonder, after immersing himself in the dreamscape for so long, is Dr. Chadwick doing well in the realm of reality?
（奇怪…这房间完全没有宾客入住的迹象。）
(Strange... There are no signs of any guests having stayed in this room.)
Perhaps we should look around first.
{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我想…我大概知道查德威克在哪了。
{F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, I think... I might know where Chadwick is.
Please come and take a look.
螺丝先生，请告诉我…俱乐部的各位是怎么看待我的？
Mr. Screwllum, please tell me... How do the members of the Society view me?
我并未就此收集过多数人的意见。不过，有一位女士的评价，我想我可以代为转述。
I have not gathered too many opinions on this matter. However, there is one lady's assessment that I believe I can convey on her behalf.
「卡尔德隆•查德威克用短短数年的时间，突破了很多长生的老妖怪几辈子都突破不了的难题。他才是那个货真价实的『天才』。」
"In a few short years, Calderon Chadwick achieved breakthroughs that even ancient immortals couldn't conquer. He is a genuine genius."
你听到查德威克发出一声满意的笑…然后不再说话。
You hear Chadwick emit a satisfied laugh... and then he no longer speaks.
带我们醒来吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
那只蓝色羽毛的孩子，它还没学会找到回家的路，就在捉迷藏时走丢了……
That blue-feathered child... it already got lost playing hide-and-seek before it learned how to find the way back home...
拜托了，客人！请你帮忙去找找那孩子吧，啾！
Please, guest! Help look for that child, tweet!
鸟，折纸小鸟，或者「湛蓝爵士」。只要别给我添乱，想怎么叫都行。
Bird, origami bird, or Dr. Blues. You can call me anything you want as long as you don't give me any trouble.
托那位「钟表匠」的福，我正在忙着修这座流梦礁——哦，不对，应该说「钟表小子」让我建的「清醒村」。
It's thanks to that Watchmaker that I'm busy fixing up this Dreamflux Reef. Oh, correction — I should say it's thanks to Clockie that I'm building Rouseville.
咳，看过《钟表小子》动画片吗？按设定来说，「折纸小鸟只认识钟表小子」。
Ahem, have you seen Clockie's cartoons? According to the setting, origami birds only know Clockie.
但你说话不像折纸小鸟。
But you don't talk like an origami bird.
那当然，这里所有人都知道「钟表匠」…但只有很少一部分人知道他真正想要什么。
Of course, everyone knows the Watchmaker around here... But only a handful know what he really wants.
行了，比起在这跟我说废话，你更该去找找那家伙留下的东西。
All right, rather than talking about the pointless, you'd be better off looking for the stuff that fella left behind.
You're not just an animated character.
好眼力。可惜，暂时还没到解密「折纸小鸟」的环节。
Good eye. Unfortunately, it's not time yet to solve the "Origami Bird" arc.
比起在这跟我兜圈子，你更该去找找那位「钟表匠」留下的东西。
Instead of going around in circles with me, you should look for the stuff that the Watchmaker left behind.
一个两个的，怎么都在纠结这种幼稚的设定…比起在这跟我兜圈子，你更该去找找那位「钟表匠」留下的东西。
What's with you people and your obsession with such a juvenile setting... Instead of going around in circles with me, you should look for the stuff that the Watchmaker left behind.
让我看看…我这集的「戏份」是督促美梦的来客，去寻找「小镇背后的秘密」。
Let's see... My role in this episode is to urge Dreamville's visitors to search for "the town's hidden secret."
听到了吗？快去吧——这座梦境，没你想得那么简单。
Did you hear me? Quickly now. This Dreamscape isn't as simple as you think.
嗯？这顶帽子…看来你已经找到「钟表匠」留下的「{RUBY_B#遗产}宝藏{RUBY_E#}」了。
Hmm? This hat... Looks like you've found the {RUBY_B#Legacy}treasure{RUBY_E#} that the Watchmaker left behind.
这么说，他的心愿完成了？
Does this mean that his last wishes are fulfilled?
你向湛蓝爵士转述了在匹诺康尼发生的一切——关于「秩序」的阴谋，以及「钟表匠」的遗愿。
You tell Dr. Blues about all that has happened in Penacony — about the Order's conspiracy, and the last wishes of the Watchmaker.
「钟表匠」这家伙也是死脑筋…设计这么大一盘局，把胜算全押在别人身上。兜兜转转一大圈，没想到最后真给他找到了「完美结局」。

This Watchmaker sure is a stubborn one... planning such a gigantic plot and betting it all on someone else. I never thought he'd actually find the perfect ending after going around in such a huge circle.
好了，这下「钟表匠」的心愿圆满达成，那只贪杯的猎犬估计也光荣退休了——
All right, now the Watchmaker's wishes have been fulfilled. That drunken hound can also probably retire with honor...
…这个地方，又只剩我一只鸟了。
...And I'm the only bird left in this place again.
我？我是折纸小鸟，懂吗？只能出现在梦里的那种。
Me? I'm an origami bird, don't you get it? The sort that can only appear in dreams.
匹诺康尼容不了一只不说「啾」的鸟，于是我就听了那个「钟表匠」的忽悠，在这儿建了个新巢。后来又有一些爱唱反调的人也被他拽了过来，这儿就成了流梦礁。

Penacony does not welcome birds that can't tweet, which is why I trusted the Watchmaker's deception and built a new nest here. Later, he dragged a bunch of naysayers here, and this place became Dreamflux Reef.
——从某种意义上来说，这里是个巨大号的「避难所」，专门接收那些不为梦境所容，却又离不开梦的可怜虫。
...To a certain extent, this is a grand haven, specifically sheltering poor souls who could neither fit into the Dreamscape, nor leave the dream.
没错。好好珍惜吧，匹诺康尼可再难有我这么优秀的筑梦师了，我——
That's right. Treasure all this, for Penacony will be hard-pressed to produce another Dreamweaver as gifted as me. I...
你面前的小鸟突然哑火。它沉默了两秒，态度变得极为冷淡。
The bird before you suddenly goes mute. It is silent for a couple of seconds, and its demeanor turns aloof.
Forget it, it's none of your business.
我忙得很，去找别的倒霉鬼当导游吧。慢走不送。
I'm very busy. Go find another unlucky soul to be your guide. Don't let me keep you.
Tick-tock, something's wrong with Dr. Blues!
它和我在美梦小镇里见到的样子完全不同，它的身上缺了很多折纸小鸟该有的东西！
It's completely different from when I saw it in Dreamville. It's missing something that an origami bird should have!
不仅如此，那副折纸的身体下好像装着另一个灵魂……湛蓝爵士，或许它不是普通的折纸小鸟？
Not just that, it seems like there's another soul inside that paper body... Maybe Dr. Blues is no ordinary Origami Bird?
滴答…要想寻找湛蓝爵士的过去，就得从它提供的信息入手——能够建造出流梦礁的家伙，肯定不是无名之鸟！
Tick-tock... If we're to search for Dr. Blues' past, we'll just have to start with the information it provided. A bird capable of building Dreamflux Reef must not be an ordinary bird!
我们先去「筑梦师们聚集的地方」看看吧，滴答！
Let's take a look at the place where Dreamweavers gather first, tick-tock!
鸟，折纸小鸟，或者「湛蓝爵士」。只要别给我添乱，想怎么叫都行。
Bird, origami bird, or Dr. Blues. You can call me anything you want as long as you don't give me any trouble.
除了寻找小鸟的事儿以外一概不回复——我忙得很，要找导游麻烦别人去。
I'm not answering anything else other than how to find the birds. I'm very busy, please find someone else to be your guide.
——即使在梦境中，也绝不能松懈！
...No time to relax, not even in a Dreamscape!
总有些学生，走出折纸大学后就把课上的内容抛在脑后…筑梦学以建筑为技术基底，既然如此，安全与合理就是最关键的问题。

There are always students who forget what they learned in Paperfold University after graduating... Dreamweaving is based on architecture as its technical foundation, so safety and practicality are the utmost concerns.
您应该重新看看那几个新方案。它们完全违背了建筑设计的准则！
You should look at those new plans again. They completely defy the principles of architectural design!
呵呵，教授，我理解你的担忧，但我们也应尊重筑梦师们的自我表达。
Heh-heh, I understand your frustration, Professor, but we should also respect the Dreamweavers' freedom of expression.
请您不要避重就轻，<color=#dbc291ff>家主</color>——这可是有关于未来筑梦教育的大事！
Please refrain from being dismissive, <color=#dbc291ff>esteemed head</color>! This concerns the cornerstone of future Dreamweaving education!
当然，我会再次考虑的。不过…今天似乎还有别的客人来访。
Of course, I'll reconsider. But... we appear to have other guests today.
…哼，我会再提醒您的。哎，现在的筑梦师已经是一代不如一代了……
...Hmph, I'll be sure to remind you. Bah, the current generation of Dreamweavers is always more lacking than the last...
阿锡卡叹了口气，转身离开了……
Asika sighs, then turns and leaves...
晚上好，逐梦客{F#小姐}{M#先生}。找我有什么事？
Good evening, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Dreamchaser. How can I help you?
只是一个称呼，不必在意——权力与地位会让人盲目，在非工作时间，我更希望别人能称呼我为「惠特克爵士」。
Please dispense with the formalities. Authority and power blind the soul. When it's after work hours, I much prefer people address me as Sir Whittaker.
Do you have any other questions?
I wish to learn how to weave dreams too.
当然可以，家族在「太阳的时刻」设立了折纸大学，等到开课之日，我一定会欢迎你来旁听筑梦课程的。
Of course you may. The Family has established the Paperfold University in the Moment of Sol. When classes start, I'll be sure to welcome you to sit in on our dreamweaving course.
Do you have any other questions?
鸟…呵呵，你是说那位「钟表匠」创作的动画片吧。
Birds... Heh-heh, you mean the cartoons that the Watchmaker created.
那真是个不错的比喻，这片梦境中的每一位筑梦师确实都是「鸟」。我们「隐夜鸫」的符号，不就是在夜晚歌唱的鸟儿吗？
It's not a bad metaphor at all. The Dreamweavers in this Dreamscape are really all birds. Our Nightingale symbol — is it not a bird that sings at night?
在这片梦境中，鸟本就是筑梦师的象征。这个意象表现在了各种事物中，也在一些文艺作品里有所展现。
In this Dreamscape, birds are a symbol of Dreamweavers. This sentiment has been expressed in objects of all sorts, and shown up in some pieces of artistry.
没错。艺术与现实总是相辅相成——据我所知，《钟表小子》动画中的折纸小鸟正代表了曾经为建造梦境奉献一切的筑梦师们。
That's right. Art and reality always complement each other. According to what I know, the origami birds in Clockie's cartoons symbolize the Dreamweavers that gave their all to build the Dreamscapes.
可惜，匹诺康尼的宾客与逐梦客很少有人对历史感兴趣…如果你需要，我这里还保留着关于那个年代的筑梦故事。
Alas, few guests and Dreamchasers in Penacony show an interest in history... If you're interested, I've got some dreamweaving stories of that era kept here.
一张老照片从资料的折页中滑落。相纸看着有些年头，泛黄的纸上印着四个年轻的身影。
An old photograph slips out from one of the folded pages of the file stack. It looks dated, with four young figures printed on its faded yellow background.
这四人或许就是资料中提到的「折纸筑梦师」。
These four may just be the Origami Dreamweavers mentioned in the file.
哦…真是张令人怀念的相片。
Oh... This photo really brings back memories.
它属于曾经的「折纸筑梦师」费歇尔，也是我的导师——他在晚年时带领我们这些折纸大学的学生一起整理了隐夜鸫的家史资料，这照片应该就是那时放进去的。

It once belonged to Origami Dreamweaver Fischer, who was also my mentor. In his later years, he led us Paperfold University students in compiling a family history of the Nightingales. This photo should have been from that time.
他们是「最初的筑梦师」格拉克斯教授的学徒，更是创造十二时刻的传奇筑梦师。如今你目之可及的每一片梦境都留下了他们的手笔。
They were students of the first Dreamweaver, Professor Glaux, and legendary Dreamweavers who created the Twelve Hours. What you witness in each Dreamscape is their legacy.
…只可惜，这片梦境只铭记了他们的作品，而他们的名字却被慢慢遗忘。
...Alas, it's a shame that this Dreamscape only has their works engraved, but left their names long forgotten.
那是一个无数梦想萌发的时代。费歇尔先生曾跟我讲述过那个年代——
That was a time when countless dreams sprouted. Mr. Fischer once told me of that age...
当时的匹诺康尼刚刚完成对梦境的开辟，各大家系也还未完全投入同谐的怀抱，无数机遇潜藏在梦中待人挖掘，因此无数逐梦客蜂拥而至，渴望财富与成功。

During that time, Penacony had only just completed the Dreamscape's development. The lineages weren't completely given unto Harmony's embrace yet, and countless opportunities buried in dreams were waiting to be unearthed, resulting in numerous Dreamchasers gathering like moths to a flame, thirsting for fortune and success.
为建成真正的盛会之星，担任隐夜鸫家主的格拉克斯教授开始向全宇宙募集最优秀的人才，带领他们探索改造梦境的方法——也就是筑梦技术。

To build a true Planet of Festivities, Professor Glaux — who was the Nightingale's family head — began recruiting the most stellar talents across the cosmos, leading them in the exploration of methods to modify the Dreamscape — what you know as dreamweaving technology.
他最优秀的四个学生被赋予了「折纸筑梦师」的称号。他们是建筑师，更是征服梦境的伟大逐梦客。
His four most outstanding students were coined the Origami Dreamweavers. They were architects, but first and foremost, they were great Dreamchasers who conquered the Dreamscape.
I'm about done with my questions.
虽然只是我的猜测——钟表小子动画中那几位小鸟头领的原型，正是这几位「折纸筑梦师」。
This may just be my speculation, but the original inspiration for those leader-birds in the Clockie cartoons — they were these Origami Dreamweavers.
Hang on! The numbers don't add up!
（折纸小鸟共有五种颜色…但这里的传奇筑梦师只有四位！到底谁才是「湛蓝爵士」？）
(Origami birds come in five colors... but there are only four legendary Dreamweavers here! Which one is Dr. Blues exactly?)
这个嘛…我也并不清楚，如果你感兴趣，就请自己去探寻真相吧。
About this... I'm not too sure either. If you're interested, you may wish to seek out the truth yourself.
时间会让过往的故事消磨褪色，被纸醉金迷掩埋…年轻人，我很高兴你还能记得他们。
Time will cause the colors of past tales to fade, buried by extravagance and embellishment... Young one, I'm very glad that you still remember them.
这张照片就暂借给你吧。希望你能够探明这背后的往事。
I'll lend you this photograph for now. I hope you can unearth the history behind this matter.
你好，年轻的逐梦客，还有别的事情吗？
Hello, young Dreamchaser. You have something else to ask?
哦…真是张令人怀念的相片。
Oh... This photo really brings back memories.
它属于曾经的「折纸筑梦师」费歇尔，也是我的导师——他在晚年时带领我们这些折纸大学的学生一起整理了隐夜鸫的家史资料，这照片应该就是那时放进去的。

It once belonged to Origami Dreamweaver Fischer, who was also my mentor. In his later years, he led us Paperfold University students in compiling a family history of the Nightingales. This photo should have been from that time.
他们是「最初的筑梦师」格拉克斯教授的学徒，更是创造十二时刻的传奇筑梦师。如今你目之可及的每一片梦境都留下了他们的手笔。
They were students of the first Dreamweaver, Professor Glaux, and legendary Dreamweavers who created the Twelve Hours. What you witness in each Dreamscape is their legacy.
…只可惜，这片梦境只铭记了他们的作品，而他们的名字却被慢慢遗忘。
...Alas, it's a shame that this Dreamscape only has their works engraved, but left their names long forgotten.
那是一个无数梦想萌发的时代。费歇尔先生曾跟我讲述过那个年代——
That was a time when countless dreams sprouted. Mr. Fischer once told me of that age...
当时的匹诺康尼刚刚完成对梦境的开辟，各大家系也还未完全投入同谐的怀抱，无数机遇潜藏在梦中待人挖掘，因此无数逐梦客蜂拥而至，渴望财富与成功。

During that time, Penacony had only just completed the Dreamscape's development. The lineages weren't completely given unto Harmony's embrace yet, and countless opportunities buried in dreams were waiting to be unearthed, resulting in numerous Dreamchasers gathering like moths to a flame, thirsting for fortune and success.
为建成真正的盛会之星，担任隐夜鸫家主的格拉克斯教授开始向全宇宙募集最优秀的人才，带领他们探索改造梦境的方法——也就是筑梦技术。

To build a true Planet of Festivities, Professor Glaux — who was the Nightingale's family head — began recruiting the most stellar talents across the cosmos, leading them in the exploration of methods to modify the Dreamscape — what you know as dreamweaving technology.
他最优秀的四个学生被赋予了「折纸筑梦师」的称号。他们是建筑师，更是征服梦境的伟大逐梦客。
His four most outstanding students were coined the Origami Dreamweavers. They were architects, but first and foremost, they were great Dreamchasers who conquered the Dreamscape.
I have nothing else to ask.
时间会让过往的故事消磨褪色，被纸醉金迷掩埋…年轻人，我很高兴你还能记得他们。
Time will cause the colors of past tales to fade, buried by extravagance and embellishment... Young one, I'm very glad that you still remember them.
希望你能探明这背后的往事。
I hope you can unearth the history behind this matter.
我是谁跟你没关系。有这闲工夫不如去找找流梦礁的折纸小鸟。
Who I am is none of your business. If you've got time to spare, you might as well go look for Dreamflux Reef's Origami Birds.
（向湛蓝爵士展示泛黄的相片）
哪来的照片？都说了我忙得很，我——
Where'd you get this photograph from? I already told you I'm very busy, I...
小鸟愣住了，你第一次从它那张折纸的面孔上读出类似「茫然」的情绪。
The bird is dumbfounded. It is the first time you see the definition of "bewilderment" written all over that origami face.
这是我的照片？不对…又好像不一样……
This is my photo? No... It seems different...
这不是我的照片，但我认识，不，我很熟悉这几个人……
This isn't my photo, but I recognize, no, I'm very familiar with these few...
我应该认识他们，甚至说，很熟悉……
I should know them, or rather, I'm very familiar...
我还找到了一些过去的资料。
I've even found some information from the past.
…这些的都是什么乱七八糟的！真正的隐夜鸫压根不是这样的，我们——
...What's all this nonsense about! The true Nightingales weren't like this at all, we...
糟糕，当鸟当久了，好像忘了什么很重要的事情……
Oh no, I've been a bird for so long. It's as if I've forgotten something important...
Well, then, you should let me help you!
不要。我见过钟表小子那套玩意儿…让别人钻进自己的脑子？太恶心了，我不要。
No. I've seen what Clockie does... Letting someone into your brain? That's disgusting. No.
小鸟又恢复了那副*贱贱*的神情——说真的，它是你见过最不讨喜的卡通形象了，没有之一。
The bird regains its *sly* expression — honestly, it's the most unpleasant cartoon character you've ever seen, hands down.
（软的不行…就别怪我来硬的了！）
(If a good cop won't work... guess I'll have to go bad cop then!)
We need to plan this out carefully...
小鸟又恢复了那副*贱贱*的神情——说真的，它是你见过最不讨喜的卡通形象了，没有之一。
The bird regains its *sly* expression — honestly, it's the most unpleasant cartoon character you've ever seen, hands down.
（软的不行…就别怪我来硬的了！）
(If a good cop won't work... guess I'll have to go bad cop then!)
We need to plan this out carefully...
好心的客人，请问你有看到一只折纸小鸟吗？
Kind guest, might I ask if you've seen an origami bird?
一只身体圆滚滚，羽毛滑溜溜，和我们长得一模一样的折纸小鸟？啾啾？
A rotund, ruffled, origami bird that looks just like us? Tweet tweet?
I see four standing before me.
不一样，不一样！那孩子的羽毛是蓝色的，啾。
They're not the same! That child has blue feathers, tweet.
折纸小鸟叼来树枝，修理大树，筑造巢穴。大树的迷宫弯弯绕绕，只有小鸟才知道树叶间的捷径，啾。
Origami birds pick up branches, repair the Great Tree, and build nests. The Great Tree's maze is winding, and only birds know the shortcuts between leaves, tweet.
但可怜的孩子，它还没学会找到回家的路，就在捉迷藏时走丢了……
But this poor child hasn't learned the way home, and it got lost in the labyrinth...
拜托了，客人！请你帮忙去找找那孩子吧，啾！
Please, guest! Help look for that child, tweet!
桌上堆着许多建筑的绘画草稿。笔触简略，但已然能看清画面中多座宏伟且奇幻的建筑。
The table is strewn with many architectural concept drawings. Their lines are simple, but you can clearly see the many grandiose and fantastical buildings in the drawings.
某人在建筑旁写下一行小字：「十二时刻•设计草图」
Someone has written something beside the building: Twelve Hours Blueprint.
书架上放着一本名为《梦境施工指南》的手账册，上面字迹杂乱，似乎有不少人同时在使用。
On the bookshelf is a handbook named Dreamscape Construction Guide. The scribbling on it is haphazard, like many people were perusing it at the same time.
扉页上一行字尤为醒目：「筑梦千万条，有趣第一条！」
A line stands out on the title page: "There are countless guidelines to dreamweaving, but making it interesting is the top priority!"
桌上放着一张崭新的《逐梦客时讯》，头条处的大字印着这样一条报道。
A glossy new Dreamchaser Bulletin is placed on the desk, with the following header printed in huge letters.
「琥珀历<unbreak>2151</unbreak>纪，筹备已久的『筑梦工程』正式启动，预计于本琥珀纪内完成『十二梦境』的建设。目前，一期工程『白日梦酒店』已开始动工。」

"<unbreak>2151</unbreak> AE: The long-prepared Dreamweaving Project has officially launched. The Twelve Dreamscapes are slated to be completed within this Amber Era. Currently, phase one of the Reverie Hotel's construction has commenced."
「该工程将由隐夜鸫家系全权负责。根据洽谈结果，家主格拉克斯表示没有加入『家族』的意向，但愿意支持家族提出的梦境开发计划……」

"The Nightingale Family is fully responsible for this project. According to negotiations, their head, Glaux, has expressed no intention to join The Family, but is willing to support the Dreamscape development plan that The Family has suggested..."
「与此同时，隐夜鸫向银河发出邀约——欢迎宇宙中的建筑家与忆质学者来到匹诺康尼，共筑美梦世界……」
"Concurrently, the Nightingales have also extended an invitation to the universe — to welcome the architects and memoria scholars of the cosmos to build this world of Dreamjoy together..."
——没听过来工地还要带孩子的！
...I've never heard of anyone who brings their kids to the construction site!
一边设计建筑，一边钻研难搞的忆质，还要被梦里的怪物追着跑…「白日梦酒店」好不容易开工，结果又被这小孩儿耽误进度！

Designing a structure, studying how to work with this finicky memoria, and being hunted by in-dream monsters... Work on the Reverie has finally started, only to have this child impeding our progress once again!
告诉教授，我不干了，我要跑路！
Tell the professor I'm done, I'm gone!
哎呀，冯恩先生，清醒点吧——你的大名还挂在星际和平公司的黑名单呢，除了那位教授，宇宙中没人敢接你的简历。
Oh Mr. Vaughn, please be realistic. Your name is still blacklisted by the IPC. Apart from the professor, no one in the universe will hire you.
更何况…那孩子也不是自愿留在这片梦境中的，你就体谅一下吧。而且，他很可爱呀~
Furthermore... it's not like that child wants to be in this Dreamscape of his own accord, so please be more understanding. Also, isn't he super cute?
就因为他年龄小？凭什么，我也是小孩儿！
Just because he's young? How's that fair? I'm a child too!
在梦里不意味着能说梦话，冯恩先生，你可是咱们里最年长的那位。
Just because you're in a dream, doesn't mean you can spit delusions, Mr. Vaughn. You're the oldest among us.
据我所知，那孩子在来到隐夜鸫家系前，是一个流浪的星际难民。
From what I know, that child was a wandering interstellar refugee before he came to the Nightingale Family.
他没有亲人，没有家庭，也没受过正规的教育，更不知道该怎样正确地「接触他人」。
He had no kin, no family, and was never raised properly, much less how to interact with people.
或许…他是将冯恩先生看做同龄人，在别扭地示好呢？
Perhaps... he saw Mr. Vaughn as someone of his age, and was expressing affection, albeit inappropriately?
让我原谅他，除非他亲自对我的「冯恩三世美食加工机」道歉——犯错了，最少也得有句「对不起」吧？
For me to forgive him, he'd have to personally apologize to my Vaughn III Gourmet Refinement Machine. Shouldn't a "sorry" at least be in order when a mistake is made?
小筑梦师，你来评评——是不是这个道理！
Little Dreamweaver, you be the judge. Is that fair or not?
看见没？连刚入行的后辈都知道什么叫礼貌。
See? Even a junior who's just joined the industry knows etiquette.
Maybe there's something he can't tell us...
哎！你们怎么一个个都站他那边！
Bah! Why're you all taking his side!
呵呵，冯恩先生的心态确实像他的同龄人呢……
Heh-heh, Mr. Vaughn certainly acts like he's of the same age as the child...
不过…这孩子犯错了就喜欢躲起来，现在又藏去哪儿了呢？
But... this child likes hiding after making a mistake. Where could he have gone this time?
{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}，得麻烦你跟我们一起找找他了。
{F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, I'd have to trouble you to help look for him.
哼，他刚刚跑去走廊的另一头了，先过去看看吧。
Hmph, he ran off in the other direction of the corridor. Go look there first.
「白日梦酒店」刚开始动工，希望他不要闯进什么危险的地方。
The Reverie's construction just started. I hope he doesn't barge into anywhere dangerous.
只有巴罗那种笨蛋才会明知故犯。这小子应该没这么傻…吧？
Only that fool Barlow would knowingly do something bad. This kid wouldn't be that stupid... right?
难说。师父手下的筑梦师可没几个正常人。
Hard to say. Most Dreamweavers working under master aren't completely sane.
哈哈，你说的也是，毕竟…咱俩也不怎么正常。
Haha, you're right. I mean... neither of us is normal either.
脑子正常的哪愿意在这么危险的地方干活啊？每天除了闷头画稿、钻进梦里施工——甚至还要被人诬陷诽谤。

Who would want to work in such a dangerous place if they didn't have a screw loose? With heads buried in architectural drafts, working deep in the dream, and even subjected to accusations and slander.
「乔伊女士，您对『白日梦酒店』的设计与艾普瑟隆的某处建筑十分相似，您对此有何解释吗？」——哇，我听着都要吐了。你这都能忍？

"Lady Joey, your design for the Reverie Hotel looks highly similar to a certain building in Epsilon. Do you have an explanation for this?" Sheesh, just listening to this tripe makes me want to puke. You can tolerate this?
一点闲话罢了，常听常新，算不上什么大事。
It's just some chatter. You get used to it after a while, it's nothing major.
不过…也只有在梦中，我们那些被人称为荒诞的想法才有可能实现。冯恩先生，你不也是为此而来吗？
But... it's only in a dream that our supposedly hare-brained concepts can be realized. Mr. Vaughn, didn't you come for this very reason too?
哼哼，你说的也是，毕竟…咱俩也算不上什么正常人啊。
Heh-heh, you're right, I mean... neither of us is anywhere close to normal.
呜呜…我的「冯恩三世」…好不容易找到了点在梦里加工美食的窍门…
*sob* My Vaughn III... I finally managed to get the hang of making snacks in a dream too...
那帮老古董非说这又是什么爆炸装备——不过就是外形有那么一点点与众不同嘛…
That antiquated bunch claimed this was something explosive... It just looks a bit odd is all...
他们都不敢尝一口「冯恩三世」做出来的点心！
They don't even dare try a bite of the snacks Vaughn III made!
醒醒吧。就算没那孩子捣乱，也没人敢用你发明的东西做饭吃。
Wake up. Even if that child wasn't causing a fuss, no one would dare to eat anything you make.
上一个这么大胆的同事还躺在医疗室里呢。
The last person who was that brave is still lying in the clinic.
哟，忆质重构、模因合成、光锥材料…这些忆庭的玩意儿居然真让他给搭出来了。可以啊，这小子从哪学的筑梦技巧？

Woah, memoria refactoring, memetic synthesis, Light Cone materials... He actually constructed all these concepts that existed only in the Garden of Recollection. Not too shabby. Where'd this kid learn his dreamweaving techniques?
大概是在我们工作的时候吧，毕竟他一直躲在边上看着。
Probably while we were working. He's always been lurking by the side watching us work.
我原来以为这孩子只是好奇，施工相关的讨论也没有刻意避着他…没想到他都记住了。
I thought this child was just curious, so I didn't keep him out of earshot during our architectural conversations... Turns out, he memorized it all.
…或许，这孩子比我们想象的都能干。
...Maybe this child is more capable than we thought.
别瞎想了。现在咋办？直接撬门？
We need to focus. What now? Do we break the door open?
乔伊摇了摇头，她弯下腰，轻柔地敲了敲门板。房内传来窸窸窣窣的响动。
Joey shakes her head, bends down, and softly knocks on the door. A rustling can be heard from behind it.
虽然手法还比较稚嫩，但空间与结构都很稳定，你造出了一处非常优秀的「庇护所」。
The craftsmanship is amateur, but the space and structure are stable. You've made an outstanding shelter.
孩子，你是在哪学到的筑梦技巧？
Child, where did you learn these dreamweaving skills?
...What, are you going to arrest me again?
不，是格拉克斯教授向你发出了邀请——请你正式加入「隐夜鸫」，成为一位筑梦师。
No, I'm here because Professor Glaux extended an invitation to you — to officially join the Nightingale Family as a Dreamweaver.
你是个敏锐的孩子，熟悉梦境，也拥有构筑梦境的天赋。教授不会拒绝这样的人才的。
You're sharp, familiar with the Dreamscape, and possess a talent for building Dreamscapes. The Professor would never refuse such a prodigy.
…为、为什么？我不明白，我不是刚刚犯了错……
...Wh—Why? I don't understand. I did something wrong...
我相信冯恩先生也只是想要句道歉而已——对吧？
I believe Mr. Vaughn just wants an apology... right?
半透明的梦泡在乔伊的指尖凝结，变化成小鸟的形状，飞向门内。另一侧传来惊呼。
The translucent dream bubble coalesces on Joey's fingertip, turns into the shape of a bird, and flies through the door. A gasp can be heard from the other end.
你看，筑梦与诗歌很像，解析现有的结构，再搭建新的结构，创造优美而精巧的作品。我们擅长的就是利用混沌，再重塑其形体——

Look, dreamweaving is similar to poetry or songwriting: Analyzing the present structure, then reconstructing it to create an elegant and exquisite masterpiece. Our proficiency lies in reshaping chaos into other forms...
对你来说，{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}这里{RUBY_E#}一定是个没有秩序，蛮不讲理的地方……
To you, {RUBY_B#Penacony}this{RUBY_E#} must be an orderless, reasonless place...
但总有一天，这里将会成为一片真正的美梦——
But one day, this place will become a real Dreamjoy...
我以隐夜鸫之名向你保证。
I promise you, in the name of the Nightingales.
不用急着做决定，慢慢考虑就好~
Don't worry about making a decision now, consider it carefully!
还没好好自我介绍过呢。我叫乔伊，隐夜鸫家系的筑梦学家，也是这处白日梦酒店的主设计师。
I haven't properly introduced myself. I am Joey, a Dreamweaver scholar of the Nightingale Family and the chief designer of the Reverie Hotel.
本大爷是银河第一的大发明家，稀世难遇的建筑天才——你可以叫我冯恩大人！
I'm the greatest inventor in the cosmos, a once-in-a-millennia architectural genius — you may call me Sir Vaughn!
隐夜鸫家系中有很多人，大家是因为热爱而聚在一起的逐梦者。
There are many in the Nightingale Family who are Dreamchasers, rallied together over a common passion.
也希望…我们能成为你的「家人」。
And we hope... that we will become your family.
——<color=#dbc291ff>奥尔拉</color>。我的名字，就叫我奥尔拉吧。
...<color=#dbc291ff>Orla</color>. My name... just call me Orla.
我想起来了…奥尔拉，我真正的名字。
I remember now... Orla is my real name.
之后我去了隐夜鸫，筑梦师接纳了我，教我知识，带我和他们一起搭建梦境……
Later, I went to the Nightingales, and the Dreamweavers took me in, taught me everything, and brought me along with them to build the Dreamscape...
而我有世界上最好的家人。温柔的乔伊、不着调的冯恩，还有巴罗和费歇尔…是他们教我关于筑梦的一切……
And I had the world's best family. The gentle Joey, the eccentric Vaughn, and Barlow and Fischer... They taught me everything about dreamweaving...
他们与历史记载的不太一样。
They are quite different from how they were recorded in history.
历史只写上了他们的名字，却没有记录下真正的他们…为什么？
History only wrote their names, but not their true selves... Why?
我记得，我们之间还有一个约定。我在流梦礁等待他们完成承诺，却一直没人来找我……
I recall that we had another promise among us. I waited for them at Dreamflux Reef to fulfill that promise, but no one ever came...
必须去看看，「过去」到底发生了什么…？
I must take a look. What exactly happened in the past...?
筑梦师巴罗，猎犬已经找到你的罪证了——勾连偷渡者、窃取家族机密、威胁匹诺康尼的和平…
Dreamweaver Barlow, the Bloodhounds have found proof of your crimes — consorting with stowaways, stealing Family secrets, and threatening Penacony's peace...
每一项罪名都足以让你重回监狱，走，跟我去公馆进行审讯吧！
Each crime is enough to send you back to jail. Come with me to the Pavilion to receive judgment!
呵，你们猎犬可真是威风，拿着橡木刚刚颁布的法令，就能有办法给我安上罪名。
Heh, you Hounds sure are cocky — you found a way to pin these crimes on me with the warrant that the Oaks just issued.
哼，你原本就是监狱中的囚犯，是「家族」为你担保，让你获得改过自新的机会，是你不珍惜！
Hmph, you were a prisoner to begin with. The Family vouched for you and gave you a new lease on life. But you didn't treasure it!
我不珍惜？哈…哈哈……真是一群走狗！
I didn't treasure it? Ha... Haha... What a bunch of lapdogs!
为我担保？笑话！把我从监狱中捞出来的是格拉克斯老头子——窃取机密，威胁和平？更是放屁！「隐夜鸫」的筑梦技术什么时候变成你们家族的东西了？
Vouch for me? What a joke! It was old man Glaux who bailed me out of prison. Stealing secrets, threatening peace? More wild accusations! When did the Nightingales' dreamweaving methods belong to you?
用人的时候多殷勤，呵呵…惊梦剧团都没你们翻脸快。
And you were so hospitable when you were using me, heh-heh... Even the Dreamjolt Troupe should learn from you when it comes to betrayal.
逮捕你，当然是为了梦境的安全……
Arresting you is for the sake of the Dreamscape's safety, of course...
被迷因袭击的乔伊，在实验中失踪的冯恩，还有被你们打压的费歇尔…这些都是为了「安全」？
Joey was attacked by memes, Vaughn went missing during an experiment, and Fischer was being muzzled by you lot... Was that for safety too?
这片梦境发展至此，皈依家族已经是大势所趋。梦境需要的是平稳、繁荣，这里容不下你这种爱惹是非的异端——投降吧！
The Family's governance is what contributed to this Dreamscape's development. The Dreamscape needs stability and prosperity, not radicals like you who sow chaos. Surrender!
哼，要是我拒绝呢？你如果对我使用暴力，那可是猎犬对隐夜鸫的冒犯。违背「五大家系联合一心」的宗旨，你们的家主担得起这个责任吗？

Hmph, and what if I refuse? If you detain me using violence, that's a slight on the Nightingales, a breach of the creed of the "unity of the five major lineages." Will your family head be able to bear this responsibility?
呵，我们当然不会违背条令…但不属于任何家系的忆域迷因可就不一定这么想了！
Heh, of course we wouldn't defy orders... but a Memory Zone Meme that does not belong to any Family wouldn't think that way!
(Oh no, that person is in danger...)
…咳、咳咳…多亏了你，总算赶跑他们了……
Thank you for your help, you are...?
Just someone who happened to be passing by.
A close associate of Boss Red.
总之，多谢你的帮助，呃咳咳——
Anyway, thank you very much for your help. *cough*
那些家伙看不惯「隐夜鸫」不是一天两天了，但没想到他们会直接在这里动手。
The Nightingales have always been an eyesore to them, but I never thought they'd actually try anything here.
费歇尔被叫去朝露公馆，估计也是凶多吉少……
Fischer being summoned to Dewlight Pavilion probably also spells misfortune...
目前在这片梦域工作的筑梦师只有我和奥尔拉。不过奥尔拉还小，不能让他陷入危险中…我要把这些迷因都引开，能搭把手吗？
Orla and I are the only Dreamweavers in this dream domain. But Orla's still young, and shouldn't be confronted with such danger... I will distract those memes, will you lend a hand?
谢谢你，不知名的好心人。我们得加快脚步了。
Thank you, kind stranger. We must hurry.
（巴罗想要保护奥尔拉，但…他的身体似乎快撑不住了。）
(Barlow wants to protect Orla, but... he's not going to last.)
男人在尽力抵抗伤口带来的疼痛，但他的脚步无法控制地越来越慢。
The man is trying his best to withstand the pain from the wound, but his pace is obviously slowing down.
我没事，是男人就得在关键时刻顶上来。
I'm fine, we have to step up at crucial moments.
Orla... I hope he's all right.
听到你有危险就跑来了。
I ran over as soon as I heard you were in danger.
哈哈，他还是那么急性子……
Haha, he's always been the rash sort...
奥尔拉是我们中最小的孩子，也是最机灵的孩子。他做的「庇护所」越来越好，只要他不出来，就没人能破解……
Orla is the youngest among us, but the sharpest. The shelter he's crafted gets better with time. So long as he remains hidden, no one can break his creations...
但他还只是个孩子，本不该经受这些的。
But he's still just a child, and should not be subjected to this mess.
再走快点吧，我们得把追兵引开才行。
Let's hurry up, we have to lead our pursuers away.
可恶，猎犬的鼻子怎么这么好使……
Darn, those Hound noses sure are troublesome...
咳咳——迷因的数量还在增多，他们的增援马上就会过来……
*cough* The memes' numbers are increasing. Their reinforcements should be here any minute...
哈…抱歉，我可能…就到此为止了。
Ha... Sorry, I might... have to stop here.
你的视线下移——不知何时，男人的身上已然遍布伤口。他早已无法继续挪动双腿了。
You look down — at some point, the man's body got covered in wounds. He can no longer move his legs.
我留下来当诱饵，你先走吧。
I'll stay behind and keep them busy, run.
奥尔拉修的藏身点应该就在附近，我知道过去的捷径。没必要两个人都交代在这。
Orla's hiding spot should be nearby, I know the shortcut to get there. No reason to sacrifice two lives here.
如果之后还会见到奥尔拉…替我说声抱歉吧。没法遵守约定，继续陪他锻炼了。
If you get a chance to see Orla... tell him I'm sorry I couldn't keep the promise to keep training with him.
那小孩儿身边的家人越来越少了，我们没法再护他周全…如果可以，以后也麻烦你多帮帮他。
The child's family is being whittled down. We can't keep him safe anymore... If you could, please help him out whenever possible in the future.
...I won't deliver the message for you.
哈哈，那就扯个什么「巴罗已经去浪迹天涯」的谎吧。虽然他可能不信…但有希望，总归是个好事儿。
Haha, then just make up some lie about how Barlow has already gone off-world. Although he might not believe in it... But as long as there's hope, it should be a good thing.
谢谢你，以及——再见了，不知名的好心人。
Thank you, and — goodbye, nameless well-wisher.
打扰一下，{F#小姐}{M#先生}——请问您认识建造这里的筑梦师吗？
Excuse me, {F#miss}{M#sir} — do you know the Dreamweaver that built this place?
我名为费歇尔，是「隐夜鸫」的现任家主，此行来寻找本家系的成员奥尔拉。听说他最近在这附近活动，或许建造此处的筑梦师会知晓他的行踪。

My name is Fischer, I'm the current head of the Nightingale Family. I'm looking for a family member named Orla. I've heard he's been about this area lately, perhaps the Dreamweaver who built this place may know his whereabouts.
奥尔拉就是这里的创造者。
Orla is the creator of this place.
当年那个到处捣乱的毛头小子，竟然已经能建出这种规模的建筑了……
The kid that used to be such a troublemaker has already built something of such scale...
话题扯远了。看来奥尔拉确实在这附近，我想与他见一面，能麻烦您带路吗？
I digress. It seems like Orla is indeed nearby, I wish to meet with him, could I trouble you to show me the way?
蓝色的折纸鸟如玩偶般安静，它默不作声。
The blue origami bird is as quiet as a doll, silent.
这是…克劳克影城的周边玩偶？你果然不想见我。
This is... a Clock Studios Theme Park merchandise doll? You really don't want to see me.
算了，玩偶也行，如果你在玩偶后面的话…请不要走，听我把这句话说完吧。
Never mind, a doll is fine. If you're behind the doll... Please stay and hear me out.
谈判结束了，此后他们不会再牵连其他的筑梦师，也不会追究过去的恩怨。
The negotiations are over, they won't implicate other Dreamweavers nor will they be pursuing old grievances.
混乱已经结束，走吧，跟我回去吧。
The chaos is over. Come on, let's go back with me.
家族的人不会这么轻易地让步，你给了他们什么？
The Family doesn't budge so easily, what did you offer them?
…「隐夜鸫」。他们想要整个「隐夜鸫」，我同意了。
...Nightingale. They want the entire Nightingale, and I agreed.
此后，筑梦师会并入「家族」的管理下——但我们保下了折纸大学。以后所有的筑梦师都可以在那里学习，我们也可以更好地保护我们的成员！我——

From now on, the Dreamweavers will be managed by The Family — but we've kept the Paperfold University. In the future, all the Dreamweavers will be able to study there, and we will be able to protect our members better! I...
我不理解。你让格拉克斯教授的努力和大家的抗争都变得毫无意义。
I don't understand. You made Professor Glaux's efforts and everyone's defiance totally meaningless.
孩子，不是所有人都像巴罗他们那样勇敢，我们也没有资格逼迫所有人都拿出这份勇气。
My child, not everyone is as brave as Barlow and the rest. We have no right to force everyone to muster that kind of courage.
是，我们理解隐夜鸫的初心，我们可以牺牲，但其他隐夜鸫呢？他们大多数只是热爱着筑梦的普通人，无论是否归属家族，他们的梦想都不会被磨灭。

Yes, we understand the intent of the Nightingales. We can sacrifice ourselves, but what about the other Nightingales? Most of them are just normal people who love weaving dreams. Whether or not they belong to The Family, their dreams will not be erased.
不能让全部人都为我们的一腔私情买单，我必须思考能让大多数人幸福的办法，因为我是「家主」——这是格拉克斯教授交给我这份职责前的告诫。

We can't make everyone pay the price for our selfishness. I need to think of a way to make the majority happy because I am the family head. This is what Professor Glaux instructed before handing me this responsibility.
每一位筑梦师都很宝贵，我们已经不能再承受任何损失了。
Every single Dreamweaver is precious. We cannot afford any more losses.
你说的对。但只有这样，隐夜鸫才不会消失，我们筑造的「巢」会永远留在梦中。
You're right. But this is the only way for the Nightingales not to disappear, and the "nest" we built will remain in the dreams forever.
抱歉，这已经是我能找到的最好的结局了。
I'm sorry, this is the best ending I could come up with.
折纸鸟不再说话，仿佛重新变回了玩偶。
The origami bird stopped speaking, as if it were a doll again.
乔伊曾说，筑梦是一首写在梦中的诗，将这处荒芜之地变为一片美梦，变为能为所有人带来幸福的家……
Joey once said that weaving dreams is like writing a poem within a dream, turning this desolate wasteland into Dreamjoy, into a home that brings happiness to all...
我会继续这份意志。现在还看不到什么成果，但或许有一天，筑梦之诗开花结果……
I will continue this will. There aren't any fruits of labor yet, but one day, the poem of dreamweaving will come to fruition...
那时，希望你能愿意再次回来。
By then, I hope you'll be willing to come back.
奥尔拉不愿再和我交流了…能帮我劝劝他吗？
Orla doesn't wish to speak to me anymore... Can you help me convince him?
请帮我把这张照片转交给他——只要他愿意回来，隐夜鸫永远都会是他的家。
Please pass this photo to him — as long as he's willing to return, the Nightingales will always be his home.
这是一张令人眼熟的照片——它曾打开过「湛蓝爵士」的内心，或许也能在此撬开「奥尔拉」的心房。
It's a familiar photo — it once opened Dr. Blues' heart, maybe it can open Orla's too.
蓝色的折纸鸟如玩偶般安静，它拒绝再次开口。
The blue origami bird is as quiet as a doll, it refuses to speak again.
费歇尔让我转交这张照片。
Fischer asked me to pass you this photo.
小鸟的羽毛抖了抖，最终还是没有接过照片。
The bird's feathers ruffle slightly, but ultimately, it does not accept the photo.
筑梦师失去了他的最后的家人，于是在匹诺康尼的最下方建了一处庇护所，就此躲在里面。
The Dreamweaver lost the last of his family, so he built a shelter at the bottom of Penacony and is hiding there.
他躲在梦境之底，却时刻在仰视着上方的天空——他唾弃费歇尔的宣言，却仍期待着费歇尔口中「开花结果」的某日。
He hides at the bottom of the Dreamscape, yet his gaze is fixed upon the heavens above — he scorns Fischer's proclamations, yet he yearns for the day when Fischer's words come to fruition.
时间又过去了很久…他的身体先等不下去了，于是爱撒谎的家犬为他虚构了新的身体，那是「钟表匠」为筑梦师画下的肖像——一只天蓝色的折纸小鸟。

A long time passed... His body was unable to withstand the test of time, so that compulsive liar of a Hound made a new body for him — a sky-blue origami bird that the Watchmaker painted as a portrait for the Dreamweaver.
但看来等的时间太长，他的心灵与记忆也有等不下去的一天……
However, the prolonged wait has taken its toll. His mind and memories can no longer endure the wait...
呵，费歇尔就是个说大话的骗子。他再也没有回来过，其他人也没回来过。「钟表匠」和加拉赫，他们也都等到了自己的「完美结局」。
Ah, Fischer is just a huge liar. He has never been back, and neither has anyone else. The Watchmaker and Gallagher both waited for their own "perfect ending."
看看现在的匹诺康尼，繁华、美丽、灯火通明，就像乔伊跟我许诺的一样。
Look at Penacony now, bustling, beautiful, bright, exactly what Joey promised me.
而不认可这份美好的人们，我也为他们留下了流梦礁，没人会在梦中流浪……
For those who don't agree with this beauty, I offer the Dreamflux Reef as their sanctuary — no one will ever feel deserted in dreams.
折纸筑梦师们已经完成了他们的承诺，但…我不能接受没有他们的梦境。
The Origami Dreamweavers have fulfilled their promise, but... I cannot accept a Dreamscape without them.
我已经没有坚持的理由了，也该迎接我并不完美的结局了——
There's no reason for me to hold on, it's time for me to embrace my imperfect end...
呵呵，你是说让我当一只卡通小鸟，不能筑梦、不能认识朋友、甚至不能让别人看见，这样继续活在梦里吗？

Hehe, are you telling me to merely exist as a cartoon bird, devoid of the ability to weave dreams, to make friends, and to remain invisible to the eyes of others? Is this the solitary existence I am to endure within the realm of dreams?
无名客，我没有未来，我是「过去」。
Nameless, I have no future, I am the past.
你还有其他的折纸小鸟。
You still have the other origami birds.
那些小鸟只是「钟表匠」无心促成的造物吧…那家伙，总是喜欢做这种奇怪的事情。
Those birds are just the unintentional creations of the Watchmaker... That guy's always doing weird stuff like this.
但我理解他——匹诺康尼在忘记过去，但哪怕只有一点也好，这个世界应该留下往日的痕迹。我怕哪天…我也会忘记那些时光。

But I understand him — Penacony has forgotten its past. But even if just a little, this world ought to preserve a fragment of its past. I fear for the day... when I, too, shall begin to forget those cherished moments...
…说到底，我始终是那个最胆小、最幼稚的家伙。大家都有想要建造的梦想，而我——只是想要一个鸟儿的「巢」吧。
...In the end, I'm still the most timid and naive one. Everyone has a dream to build, but I... only want a nest for the birds.
如果说匹诺康尼是一片梦想之地…那么，只有一次也好，我希望这片梦想之地回应一次我的愿望——让我回到那个鸟巢吧。
If Penacony is a land of dreams... Then, even if it's just once, I yearn for this land of dreams to heed my plea — let me return to the nest.
还呆着做什么，等你很久了。
What are you doing here? I've been waiting for you.
哼哼，吓傻了？快来试试我新做的「冯恩四世」，全面改进升级——就差你来测试了！
Heh-heh, are you shocked? Come try my new Vaughn IV, fully improved and upgraded — you're the only one who hasn't tried it!
You guys... are here to pick me up?
呵呵，我们不是约好了在上面见吗？太久等不到人，就决定直接下来咯。
Haha, didn't we agree to meet up there? I waited so long and didn't see anyone, so I decided to come straight down.
我这次不会离开了，在这片梦境中，我们再也不会分开。
I'm not leaving again, and in this Dreamscape, we shall never be separated again.
Yes... my friends, here I come!
小鸟扇动翅膀，它的身体逐渐变得透明，他的模因身体正在逐渐飘散。
The bird flaps its wings, its body slowly becoming transparent, its memetic body gradually drifting away.
（奥尔拉的意志减弱了…再这样下去，他<color=#dbc291ff>将被自己的梦境吞噬</color>！）
(Orla's will is fading... If this continues, he will be <color=#dbc291ff>consumed by his own Dreamscape</color>!)
回忆对小鸟虚构的身体来说太过沉重，他希望你就此放手。
Memories are too heavy for a birdie's illusory body. He hopes you can let him go.
小鸟的身体正被梦境吞噬。如果想把奥尔拉带回去…这就是最后的机会了。
The bird's body is being devoured by the Dreamscape. If you want to bring Orla back... this would be your last chance.
你没有阻止。小鸟轻盈地朝着光飞去，飞向其他小鸟的身边。在光芒中，你恍然看到鸟变为一位少年，他转头向你轻轻微笑。

You didn't intervene. The bird flies gracefully toward the light, joining the other birds in flight. Within the radiance, you witness the bird's transformation into a young man, who turns his head and offers you a gentle smile.
Don't be controlled by the Dreamscape!
That's just a shadow of the past...
思想和情绪可以在忆域中化作具象，这是最基础的筑梦知识。
Thoughts and emotions can materialize in the Memory Zone — That's the foundation of dreamweaving.
但哪怕我知道这是梦，也不愿选择醒来——
Even though I know this is just a dream, I don't want to wake up...
我太久没见过他们的样子了。梦中人无法再次入梦，我连他们的脸都要忘了…就此深陷于梦中，也许就是属于我的完美结局。
I haven't seen their faces for so long. Dreamers are unable to enter dreams again. I've almost forgotten their faces... Perhaps being trapped deep in a dream is the perfect ending for me.
曾经的几位传奇筑梦师站在远处，为奥尔拉指出通往美梦的方向。
A few legendary Dreamweavers of the past stand in the distance, guiding Orla toward Dreamjoy.
That's all the more reason for you to wake up.
小鸟的身影越发透明，它向着伙伴、向着自己的美梦奔去。
The bird's silhouette grows increasingly translucent as it runs towards its companions and the embrace of its own yearning.
…但对它来说，这真的是<color=#dbc291ff>「最好的结局」</color>吗？
...But to it, is this really the <color=#dbc291ff>best ending</color>?
你没有阻止。小鸟轻盈地朝着光飞去，飞向其他小鸟的身边。在光芒中，你恍然看到鸟变为一位少年，他转头向你轻轻微笑。

You didn't intervene. The bird flies gracefully toward the light, joining the other birds in flight. Within the radiance, you witness the bird's transformation into a young man, who turns his head and offers you a gentle smile.
正因珍视——才不能用虚伪之物替代。
Because it's precious — It should not be replaced by something false.
你需要把他们的故事带回去，重新讲给匹诺康尼，让所有人知道——究竟是谁筑起了这片美梦。
You need to bring their stories back, recount these stories to Penacony, and let everyone know exactly who built this Dreamjoy.
我知道你已经记下了他们的故事。
I know you've already recorded their stories.
时间没能留下的真相，由你带回去就足够了。
It's enough to have you bring back the truth that time did not manage to preserve.
But there still needs to be an overseer.
为了防止他们的故事再被篡改，这里需要一位监督者。
An overseer is required to prevent their story from being altered yet again.
我想…一位见证过历史的筑梦师就是最好的选择。
I think... a Dreamweaver that has witnessed history would be the best choice.
你不在我可就要乱讲了。
If you're not there, then I'm gonna start spewing nonsense.
你可不要怪我到处乱讲——筑梦师奥尔拉因为害怕挨揍而哭鼻子！还不止一次！
Don't blame me for spreading nonsense — Dreamweaver Orla cries because he's afraid of getting punched! And he did it more than once!
…油嘴滑舌的无名客，和「钟表匠」真是一模一样。
...Smooth-talking Nameless. You're exactly like the Watchmaker.
Do you want me to keep going?
既然费歇尔完成了他的承诺，那按照约定，我也该…偶尔回去看看。
Since Fischer upheld his promise, then as agreed, I should... go back to see how things are once in a while.
梦境的主人做出了选择。它最后看了一眼过去的同伴，转身走向你。
The Dreamscape's owner has made his choice. It takes one last look at his past companions, and turns to move towards you.
在这儿待得也够久了。走吧，该走了——
I've stayed here long enough. Come on. It's time to go...
…听见了听见了。这个名字从你嘴里吐出来总感觉怪怪的…你还是叫我「湛蓝爵士」吧。
...I heard you the first time. This name feels weird coming out of your mouth... Call me Dr. Blues.
总之——真相也找了，梦也打碎了，现在满意了吗？
Anyways — The truth was found, and the dream was broken. Happy now?
Feels like it needs something more...
谢谢，别再来第二次了。老年鸟受不了这个。
Thank you, and don't do it again. This old bird can't take it.
I'm happy to help. You're welcome.
没在夸你！哎…这点怎么也跟「钟表匠」一样。你们无名客都是一个模子里出来的吗？
I wasn't complimenting you! *sigh* ...Why are you exactly like the Watchmaker? Are all you Nameless cut from the same cloth?
Forget it. Let's leave it be.
小鸟抬头望向星空——十二片梦境的灯火连成一片，组成了流梦礁的星空。
The bird looks up at the starry sky — The lights from the twelve Dreamscapes link up to form Dreamflux Reef's starry sky.
…费歇尔果然没骗我，他真的将这里变成了一首诗。
...Fischer didn't lie to me. He really turned this place into a poem.
Do you want to go up and take a look?
下次吧。托某位无名客的福，本鸟刚做了一场大梦，得先缓缓。
Maybe next time. Thanks to a certain Nameless, I've just had a huge dream. I'll have to take a break.
…不管怎么说，能再见他们一次，还是挺好的。
...No matter what, it was great to be able to see them again.
I can't hear you. Say it louder!
令人倍感亲切的*啾啾*声，叫声来自头顶的星空——四只圆滚滚的鸟从天而降，落在湛蓝爵士身边。
A familiar tweeting sound comes from the starry sky above — four chubby birds descend from the sky and land beside Dr. Blues.
不听话的湛蓝弟弟，终于找到了啾～
Naughty little Blues, we finally found you! Tweet!
哼哼，等不到你，于是本公子只好屈尊来下面的「大树」了…不必谢我啾～
Heh-heh, you weren't coming, so yours truly has to personally come down to the Great Tree below... No need to thank me, tweet!
不是，等一下，按理说其他折纸鸟应该不知道流梦礁的位置——
Wait. Hang on. Normally, other origami birds shouldn't know the location of Dreamflux Reef...
嘿呀——不要小瞧折纸小鸟的骨气啾！
Bah, don't underestimate the grit of an origami bird, tweet!
啾啾，原来从下往上看的天空也很漂亮呢～
Tweet tweet, so the sky seen from below is beautiful too.
湛蓝爵士也很想你们啾。
Dr. Blues misses you all too, tweet.
Hey, there's no need for you to talk...!
好不容易聚在一起，应该留个纪念啾！
Now that we're finally together, we should record this occasion, tweet!
这样的话，湛蓝爵士也能常常见到我们的样子了啾。
This way, Dr. Blues can always see our faces, tweet!
好心的客人，能帮我们一起拍张合照吗，啾啾？
Kind guest, could you help us take a group photo, tweet tweet?
四只折纸小鸟将中心的蓝色小鸟围住。你能感受到湛蓝爵士的无措，和那幅极力掩饰、却仍忍不住流露出的笑意。
The four origami birds surround the blue bird. You can feel Dr. Blues' bewilderment and the faint smile he struggles to suppress yet can't entirely conceal.
虚构的鸟儿并非湛蓝爵士真正的家人，但……
The fake birds aren't Dr. Blues' real family, but...
谁说这不算一种*完美结局*呢？
Who says this doesn't count as some sort of *perfect ending*?
又来一个没见过折纸小鸟的镇外人啾。我是流梦礁的「湛蓝爵士」啾。
Here comes another outsider that has never seen an origami bird, tweet. I am Dr. Blues from the Dreamflux Reef, tweet.
小鸟看你的神态仍是贱贱的，但眼神中已经没有了那种*与众不同*的光。
The bird's gaze at you is still sly, but there's no longer that *unique* spark in its eyes.
或许，那个筑梦师已经回到了属于自己的地方，这里剩下的只有折纸小鸟了。
Perhaps that Dreamweaver has already returned to a place where he belongs, and all that's left here is an origami bird.
令人倍感亲切的*啾啾*声，叫声来自头顶的星空——四只圆滚滚的鸟从天而降，落在湛蓝爵士身边。
A familiar tweeting sound comes from the starry sky above — four chubby birds descend from the sky and land beside Dr. Blues.
不听话的湛蓝弟弟，终于找到了啾～
Naughty little Blues, we finally found you! Tweet!
哼哼，等不到你，于是本公子只好屈尊来下面的「大树」了…不必谢我啾～
Heh-heh, you weren't coming, so yours truly has to personally come down to the Great Tree below... No need to thank me, tweet!
你们、你们怎么突然过来了啾——
You... why are you suddenly here, tweet...
嘿呀——不见的日子，有在认真锻炼吗？
Hey — Did you keep up with your training since our last encounter?
啾啾，原来从下往上看的天空也很漂亮呢～
Tweet tweet, so the sky seen from below is beautiful too.
好不容易聚在一起，应该留个纪念啾！
Now that we're finally together, we should record this occasion, tweet!
这样的话，湛蓝爵士也能常常见到我们的样子了啾。
This way, Dr. Blues can always see our faces, tweet!
好心的客人，能帮我们一起拍张合照吗，啾啾？
Kind guest, could you help us take a group photo, tweet tweet?
四只折纸小鸟将中心的蓝色小鸟围住，啾啾声连成一片。你看到湛蓝爵士发自内心的笑容。
The four origami birds surround the blue bird, tweeting in unison. You see Dr. Blues' sincere smile.
只有你记得筑梦师们曾痛苦挣扎的过往。
You alone hold the memory of the Dreamweavers' arduous and painful past.
或许…对湛蓝爵士来说，这才像是真正的家人。它确实找到家了。
Perhaps... to Dr. Blues, this is what family is. It really did find a home.
你回来的速度比我想象中快许多，调查已经结束了吗？
You're back faster than I thought. Is the investigation over already?
Yes, I'm done with the investigation.
没有，但已经不需要它们了。
Nope, but we don't need them anymore.
呵呵，从你的表情能够看出，这并不是一个令人感到轻松的故事。
Hehe, from your expression, I can tell this isn't going to be a light-hearted story.
很遗憾，立场限制了我能够提供的帮助。
A pity, my position limits the help I can offer.
不过…我的恩师费歇尔先生曾赠给我一句话，希望它也能为你提供几分宽慰。
But... my mentor Mr. Fischer once told me this. I hope it can bring you some sort of comfort.
——「若是筑梦时被绊住腿脚，就抬头吧。」
"If you stumble when weaving dreams, look up."
「看向这片梦境，然后告诉自己：你的努力从不会白费。总有一日，它们将连成星光，照亮某人的眼睛。」

"Look upon this vast Dreamscape and tell yourself that your endeavors are never in vain. One day, they shall be woven together into a celestial tapestry, casting radiant light into the depths of another's eyes."
愿你能寻到自己的巢，愿你能书写自己的诗。
May you find your own nest, and write your own poem.
（关于筑梦师的事情，或许还得找「家族」的人问问……）
(I'd better look for a Family member to ask about the Dreamweaver...)
(Hmm? Looks like there's a quarrel going on...?)
（乔伊与冯恩，看样子是「妃色夫人」与「黄金公子」的原型…跟着他们，应该就能了解湛蓝爵士的过去。）
(Joey and Vaughn, looks like they're the original Lady Vermilion and Young Master Gold... I can learn about Dr. Blues' past if I follow them.)
（去走廊找找他们口中的人吧。）
(Let's head to the corridor to look for that person they mentioned.)
...Over there! Don't let him get away!
罪人，你的行为早已触犯家族的底线！
Sinner, your actions have long tested the limits of The Family!
放弃抵抗！否则我们就不客气了！
Do not resist! Or you'll be sorry!
（筑梦师们的黄金年代就此结束了……）
(The Dreamweavers' golden age has ended here...)
（流梦礁…这里就是奥尔拉最后建起的，最坚固的「庇护所」。）
(Dreamflux Reef... This is the safe haven that Orla raised — the last, and the sturdiest.)
竟然能在梦境之底造出如此庞大的城寨……
To be able to erect such a massive stronghold at the bottom of the Dreamscape...
不知不觉，奥尔拉也是能独当一面的筑梦师了。
Unbeknownst to everyone, Orla may have become a full-fledged Dreamweaver as well.
就算是最挑剔的冯恩，应该也会忍不住惊叫吧……
Even the most hard-to-please person, Vaughn, would yell in surprise...
I really want to see their faces now.
前段时间…外面不算太平，不少筑梦师也被牵连。
A while back... it wasn't really peaceful out there, and many Dreamweavers became involved in this.
奥尔拉与那些被牵连的筑梦师关系很好，也被卷进了这场风波。
Orla was good friends with those Dreamweavers who were affected, and he also got caught up in this mess.
家系已经失去了很多人，不能再失去任何一个了……
The lineage's lost many people, and couldn't afford to lose even a single more...
无论如何，现在外面的情况已经稳定下来了。奥尔拉也不用在梦境的缝隙里躲躲藏藏，可以回家了。
In any case, the situation outside has calmed down. Orla doesn't have to hide in the crevices of the Dreamscape. He can go home now.
I'm here to take him home.
（筑梦师聚集的地方…去筑梦边境问问看吧。）
(The place where Dreamweavers gather... Let's ask around bat the Dream's Edge.)
（或许「家族」的筑梦师们知道些什么。）
（原来折纸小鸟的原型就是隐夜鸫…湛蓝爵士也曾是「家族」的筑梦师吗？）
(So the origami bird's original form is a nightingale... Was Dr. Blues also once The Family's Dreamweaver?)
(Time to go back to Dreamflux Reef and ask it.)
（似乎已经进入湛蓝爵士的回忆中了…先确认一下这是哪里吧。）
(Looks like I'm inside Dr. Blues' memories already... Better check where this is first.)
（这段记忆应该在很久之前，那个梦境刚刚开始建设的年代……）
(This memory should be from long ago, the time when that Dreamscape was first being built...)
（门外传来脚步声，有人要进来了？）
(Footsteps from outside the door. Is someone coming in?)
（乔伊与冯恩，看样子是「妃色夫人」与「黄金公子」的原型。比起档案中简短的介绍，这里的他们显然更加生动……）

(Joey and Vaughn — they seem to be the inspirations for Lady Vermilion and Young Master Gold. Compared to the brief descriptions in the files, the people they are in the memory are obviously far more lively...)
（跟着他们，应该就能了解湛蓝爵士的过去。）
(Let's follow them to figure out more about Dr. Blues' past.)
（这里是「湛蓝爵士」的内心世界…咦，那几只折纸小鸟就在前面。）
(This is Dr. Blues' inner world... Hmm? Those origami birds are up ahead.)
There's something I'd like to ask you.
I'd like to help you recover your memory.
都说我忙得很了…快点，有何贵干？
I told you, I'm super busy... How can I help you? Be quick about it.
不要。我见过钟表小子那套玩意儿…让别人钻进自己的脑子？太恶心了，我不要。
No. I've seen what Clockie does... Letting someone into your brain? That's disgusting. No.
他应该是跑去里面躲着了…臭小子，怎么还给门上锁啊！
He probably ran in there and hid... That brat, he locked the door!
啧，看我冯恩大爷暴力开锁！
Tsk, I'll blast the door open then!
据我所知，白日梦酒店的设计图中并没有规划这片区域…如果我没猜错，这个房间大概是那孩子自己做出来的。
To my knowledge, The Reverie's blueprints did not map out this area... If I'm not wrong, this room was probably made by the child himself.
…啥意思，格拉克斯老爷也教那臭小子学筑梦了?
...What'd you mean? Mr. Glaux also taught the kid to weave dreams?
这大概是那孩子自己摸索着做出来的东西。真有趣…我还没见过这种建构方式呢……
This is probably something the child figured out himself. Interesting... I've never seen such a construction method before...
...Something doesn't feel right. What are you thinking?
呵呵~顺着这孩子出的谜题玩玩如何？说不定会有意想之外的收获呢？
Heh-heh... How about we play along with this child's riddles? We might get a pleasant surprise out of it?
那可能某天，格拉克斯师父就会*不小心*发现你藏在房间里的那些猫头鹰老师周边吧——
Then there might come a day when Master Glaux *accidentally* finds out about the Professor Owl merchandise that you've got stashed in your room...
停停停！我知道了，配合你就是了！
Stop stop stop! All right! I'll go with your plan!
你千万别说漏嘴…格拉克斯老爷可不喜欢「钟表匠」画的那只猫头鹰了，我好不容易才背着他抢到的限量版……
You better not let anyone know... Mr. Glaux has always disliked that Watchmaker-drawn owl. I had such a hard time nabbing the professor's limited edition merch without Glaux noticing...
呵呵~走吧，该去找找那孩子藏起的钥匙拼图了。
Heh heh... Let's go then. We should look for the jigsaw key that the child hid.
（「奥尔拉」…这大概就是湛蓝爵士真正的名字。他受到两位筑梦师的邀请，加入了隐夜鸫家系。）
(Orla... That's probably Dr. Blues' real name. He was invited by the two Dreamweavers to join the Nightingale Family.)
（而乔伊与冯恩…这两位折纸筑梦师的言行也与档案记录中的样子有所出入。）
(And Joey and Vaughn... The personalities of these two Origami Dreamweavers are also quite different from what was described in the files.)
（就如惠特克爵士所言，真正的历史总被时间磨损，或许我该将这些都记录下来……）
(It's just as Sir Whittaker said — that real history would always be ground down by time. Maybe I should record all these...)
（咦？远方那只蓝色小鸟…是湛蓝爵士？）
(Huh? That blue bird in the distance... Is that Dr. Blues?)
桌上放着一张略有破损的《逐梦客时讯》，中间印着这样一条报道。
A mildly worn Dreamchaser Bulletin rests on the table, with a news headline printed in its middle.
「『白日梦酒店』竣工开业，第一届谐乐大典成功举办，各位家族成员见证『同谐』化身的降临……」
"The completed Reverie Hotel has opened. The inaugural Charmony Festival was successfully held, and all Family members witnessed the descent of the avatar of the Harmony..."
「十二时刻梦境建设进入尾声。橡木家系家主歌斐木表示：『五大家系联合一心』，隐夜鸫家系或将并入『家族』？」
"Construction of the Twelve Hours of the Dreamscapes is almost near its end. The Oak Family Head Gopher Wood declares the "unity of the five major lineages." Will the Nightingale join The Family?"
（巴罗并不是沽名钓誉的叛徒…他是为同伴奋斗到最后一刻的英雄。）
(Barlow was no vainglorious traitor... He was a hero who fought for his companions till the last moment.)
（不知这场抗争的结果如何。或许能在奥尔拉的记忆中找到最后的真相……）
(I wonder how this resistance ended. Maybe I can find the true ending in Orla's memories...)
费歇尔先生…哎，我知道此行的目的。但奥尔拉说他不愿意见你。
Mr. Fischer... Look, I know the reason behind this trip, but Orla says he doesn't want to see you.
他大概不会亲自露面。我已经将您带过来了，后续的沟通就得靠您自己了。
He's probably not going to show up in person. I've brought you here, but how this goes is up to you now.
以及…不管怎么说，{RUBY_B#流梦礁}这里{RUBY_E#}仍是一处隐秘之地，希望您不要向外透露这里的信息。
And... no matter what, {RUBY_B#Dreamflux Reef}this place{RUBY_E#} is still a concealed secret location. I hope you won't reveal it to outsiders.
…那你呢？我此行是来带所有筑梦师回到隐夜鸫…你愿意跟我回去吗？
...What about you? I came here to bring all the Dreamweavers back to the Nightingales... Will you come with me?
隐夜鸫，多么令人怀念的名字……
但我的身体已经没法再接受更多的变故了，费歇尔先生。我老了，也该退休了。
But my body cannot withstand much more mishap, Mr. Fischer. I'm old, and I should be retired.
呵呵，没什么可抱歉的，这并不是你的错……
Heh-heh, there's nothing to be sorry for. It's not your fault...
去吧，一直向前走——你要找的人在那边等着你呢。
Go, keep forging ahead — the one you wish to find is waiting for you there.
路边躺着一叠破损的《逐梦客时讯》，几条不同年代的报道夹杂其中。
A stack of torn Dreamchaser Bulletins is lying by the roadside, with reports from different times mixed in it.
「隐夜鸫家系家主格拉克斯引退，五大家系合并或成定局？」
"Nightingale Family head Glaux retires. Will the unity of the five major lineages be inevitable?"
「『匹诺康尼折纸大学学院』正式建成。前隐夜鸫家主格拉克斯出任第一任校长，开设『筑梦学院』以为匹诺康尼培养更优秀的筑梦师人才。」
"Penacony Paperfold University has officially completed construction. Former Nightingale Family head Glaux becomes first dean, then opens Dreamweaver Academy to create more outstanding Dreamweavers."
「十二时刻梦境建设基本完成，漫长的『筑梦工程』计划圆满成功——笔者相信，这将是匹诺康尼最好的时代，伟大的『逐梦时代』……」

"Construction of the Twelve Hours in the Dreamscape is almost complete, and the prolonged Dreamweaver Project is a success. The author believes that this will be Penacony's finest age, the grand Age of Dreaming..."
蓝色的折纸鸟如玩偶般安静，它拒绝再次开口。
The blue origami bird is as quiet as a doll, it refuses to speak again.
I'm here to return the file.
你回来的速度比我想象中快许多，调查已经结束了吗？
You're back faster than I thought. Is the investigation over already?
Yes, I'm done with the investigation.
你向惠特克爵士转述了那个属于筑梦师的逐梦年代——以及那些文字并未记载的，最真实的他们。
You tell Sir Whittaker about the Dreamchaser era that belonged to the Dreamweavers — and the truest form of those people, which was unrecorded in history.
原来如此…上任家主费歇尔先生并未向我转述这段往事。
I see... Mr. Fischer, the former Family head, did not tell me about this past.
感谢你的这份记录，我会妥善保存的。
I thank you for this record. I will keep it secure.
我很想答应您——但很遗憾，我的立场要求我的行为必须谨慎。那些影响家系稳定的部分或许无法公开，但我保证，梦境会记住这些筑梦师的名字。

I'd really like to say yes, but alas, my political stance requires that I be prudent about my actions. I may not be able to publicize the parts that affect The Family's stability, but I promise that the Dreamscape will remember the names of those Dreamweavers.
I guess it will be a long wait...
很可惜，即使身处梦境，匹诺康尼也无法满足所有人的心愿。
A pity that, even in the Dreamscape, Penacony is unable to fulfill everyone's wishes.
不过…我的恩师费歇尔先生曾赠给我一句话，希望它也能为你提供几分宽慰。
But... my mentor Mr. Fischer once told me this. I hope it can bring you some sort of comfort.
——「若是筑梦时被绊住腿脚，就抬头吧。」
"If you stumble when weaving dreams, look up."
「看向这片梦境，然后告诉自己：你的努力从不会白费。总有一日，它们将连成星光，照亮某人的眼睛。」

"Look upon this vast Dreamscape and tell yourself that your endeavors are never in vain. One day, they shall be woven together into a celestial tapestry, casting radiant light into the depths of another's eyes."
愿你能寻到自己的巢，愿你能书写自己的诗。
May you find your own nest, and write your own poem.
各位公民，你们也都看到了，就是这个外邦人！
Citizens, we have seen it too, it was this outlander!
我心爱的大壮之所以会性情大变、连着几天不愿意接客，全是因为这个外邦人做了手脚。
That my beloved Bossman would exhibit such major mood swings, refusing to receive guests for days on end, it is the trickery of this outlander.
胡说！我、我只是轻轻摸了一把…谁知道你们这儿的大地兽胆子这么小啊。
Slander! I—I only petted it lightly... Who knew your dromas would be so timid?
哼，「轻轻」摸了一把？我手下这些大地兽可都是被{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}祝福过的圣兽，十分娇贵！
Hmph, "lightly"? My dromases are sacred beasts blessed by {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. They are nigh priceless!
就拿这大壮来说，它一旦受到惊吓就吃不进饭；吃不进饭，就没力气驮人；它不驮人，我一天就要少赚许多钱！
Like Bossman here, it loses its appetite when it's frightened. Without food, it won't have strength to carry people, and if it doesn't work, I'll lose that much more money in a day!
再看这漂亮的鳞片，脏是脏了点，但…我去，上面什么时候有的划痕？肯定是刚才被你摸坏了！
And look at these beautiful scales, they are a little shabby, but... Wuh, when did this scratch appear? You must have done this with your grubby fingers!
啊？这…这是它原本就有的啊。
Eh? That... That was already there to begin with.
别在那儿狡辩了。除了你，今天还有谁碰过它？你必须赔偿我的损失！
Stop making excuses, no one else touched it besides you that day. You will pay for my losses!
哦，瞧瞧谁来了？连跟黄金裔并肩作战的英雄都站在我这边——果然公道自在人心。
Oh, look who's here? Even the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs stands with me — justice does lie in the hearts of people.
没错，来自圣城之外、觊觎我们财富的家伙——可不能对他们手软。
That's right, for these scoundrels from outside the holy city who covet our wealth, their punishment must be swift and just.
后到场的朋友们别担心吃不着瓜，我这就把来龙去脉再讲一遍……
Those who have just arrived, worry not, for I shall reiterate the story once more...
最近这段时间，大壮不知为啥总是犯懒。我看事出反常，就亲自到兽栏蹲守，果然发现了元凶——这个外邦人！
In recent times, Bossman had been unusually lazy. I noticed something amiss, and personally stood guard by its cage. Guess who I caught red-handed — this outlander!
他每天准时准点来到这里，跑到大壮旁边、在它身上猛掐。我的心都要滴血了！
He would come here on time every day, get close to Bossman and pinch it violently. My heart bleeds for its abuse!
那、那是按摩！我看它状态不对，估计平时没少挨累，就想帮它缓解一下……
I—I was massaging it! I noticed something off with its behavior, surmising that it was overworked, and wanted to ease its pain...
你这老板都不让驮兽歇口气，连续工作一年不休息，就是山之民也吃不消啊。
An owner like you — working your beasts of burden to the bone without a day off — even mountain dwellers would be hard-pressed to keep up.
我…我们奥赫玛自己的驯养方针，什么时候轮到你个外邦人指手画脚了？难道你不尊重我们的习俗？
H—How we rear our livestock in Okhema will not be dictated by an ignorant outlander such as you! Are you disrespecting our customs?
确实，虽然我不懂大地兽，但这个外邦人未免太不守规矩了……
That's right, I don't know much about dromases, but this outlander is overstepping his boundaries...
就是，说不定又是{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的遗民，手脚真不干净……
Yeah, that one might even be another remnant of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}'s worshipers. Look at them sneaking about...
听到了吗？按照律法，现在你只有两个选择。要么赔钱私了，要么咱们公民法庭上见。
Hear that? According to our laws, you now have two choices: Resolve this with compensation, or I'll see you in civilian court.
Hah? But I have no money...
那就怪不得我了——卫兵呢？过来干活了！
Don't blame me then... Where are the guards? It's time to earn your keep!
That's a little overboard, isn't it?
霸道？照你这么说，要求犯人赔偿也是霸道？
Overboard? I'm in the wrong for seeking compensation from a criminal?
拉莱德大人，此言差矣。虽然这位{F#姑娘}{M#青年}的言辞稍显朴素，但道理并没有错。
Lord Liluder, you are mistaken. This {F#lass'}{M#lad's} words may have been candid, but the reasoning is sound.
全场消费由我开拓者买单。
As a Trailblazer, I'll take care of all expenses.
…你是想自己替他赔钱？可那样还怎么给他个教训？
...You wish to pay the compensation for him? But how will that teach him a lesson?
拉莱德大人，这位{F#姑娘}{M#青年}是出于善意才提此建议，你若真接受，只怕是内心过于强大了。
Lord Liluder, the suggestion from this {F#lass}{M#lad} came from a place of goodwill. If you really do accept it, being overly compassionate would be your only fault.
怎么总感觉你喊得比我还大声…算了。
Why does it sound like you're just trying to raise your voice over mine... Forget it.
那是因为站在你身后的并非只有支持者，拉莱德大人，他们也可能是为了看你出糗。
That is because those standing behind you aren't just mere supporters, Lord Liluder, they may be anticipating your fall from grace.
…这就不必了吧。我只是想要钱而已，教训外邦人这活还轮不到我亲自做。
...That won't be necessary. I am only interested in money. It's not up to me to personally mete out punishment on outlanders.
拉莱德大人，这位{F#姑娘}{M#青年}的言外之意是，你的咄咄逼人已经把局面带到了冲突的边缘。
Lord Liluder, what this {F#lass}{M#lad} means is that, your overbearing antics have escalated this conflict to the brink of physical violence.
拉莱德大人，这样的做法恐怕有些太不近人情吧？
Lord Liluder, such methods are a tad unreasonable, no?
在矛盾逐渐激化时，一个老者从人群中走了出来。
As the conflict gradually reaches breaking point, a geezer emerges from the crowd.
只是一个普通的老者。拉莱德大人，我看你气势十足，想必已是心怀事理。关于这些驮兽，在下有些问题想请教。
Just an ordinary geriatric. Lord Liluder, I reckon you must have knowledge of the matter, from your confident poise. I have a few questions regarding these pack beasts.
哼，不光大地兽，我对经手的各种商品都了如指掌。你问吧。
Hmph, not only the dromases, I also know my merchandise like the back of my hand. Ask away.
作为大地兽的庇护主，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}最为人知的特性是什么？
As the guardian of these dromases, what is the most commonly known characteristic of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}?
那还用说？当然是吃苦耐劳、坚韧不拔、皮糙肉厚！
Need you even ask? It's earnest hardship, tenacity and a thick hide!
那么，被吉奥里亚祝福过的大地兽，又该是什么表现呢？
Then, how should dromases, blessed by Georios, be manifested?
听到这里，各位或许心有疑惑——倘若眼前这头大地兽真被泰坦祝福过，如此坚韧的生物，仅凭赤手又怎能在它的鳞片上留下划痕呢？
On this note, everyone may be asking a question: If this dromas here was blessed by a Titan, how could such a tough creature have a scratch on its scales?
对此我有一个猜测：先前城邦遇袭时，疯王眷属在城内四处破坏，不少大地兽也受到了波及。
I shall hazard a guess at this: When the city was attacked, the Mad King's Kin wrought destruction along the streets, causing damage to many dromases.
它鳞片上的伤痕是荣耀的证明。只是因为亲近大地，体表的泥土遮住了伤痕，所以始终没人发觉。
The scars on its scales are a testament to its glory. But as a servant of the earth, mud covered its scar, preventing anyone from noticing.
…直到那位先生为它按摩，鳞片表面的泥土被抖落，伤痕才随之显现。
...Till that gentleman gave it a massage, causing the mud on its scales to be kneaded off, and thus was the scar revealed.
哈！真是能说会道。但你以为有了这番说辞，他就不用赔钱了吗？
Ha! How ludicrous. You think your outrageous rhetoric will acquit him of having to compensate me?
如果你不喜欢，倒也存在其他解释：比如这头大地兽并没有受到祝福，只是出奇脆弱而已；又或者…划痕根本就不是那位先生弄的。
If you didn't like that, there are other theories as well: That this dromas wasn't blessed at all, and is just unusually frail. Or... the scar wasn't even made by that gentleman to begin with.
真相究竟是什么样，相信拉莱德大人心知肚明。究竟要采用哪种解释，选择权在你。
I believe Lord Liluder is most aware of the truth. You are free to choose your explanation, no matter which one it may be.
你…算了，今天的事就先不追究了。但千万别再让我见到那个外邦人搞事！
You... Fine, I'm not pursuing this matter today. Just don't let me catch that outlander doing anything funny!
这场纠纷结束得过于迅速。人群陷入了七嘴八舌的讨论，有人赞叹于老者的精妙言语，有人则为没热闹可看而感到遗憾。
This conflict was resolved way too quickly. The crowd is engrossed in gossipy discourse, some lauding the geezer's glibness, others sorry to see the drama end so soon.
Ah, Mister... Thank you so much...
好了，你也快走吧。记得别再给人留下话柄——哪怕你并没有做错。
All right, you run along quickly. Don't give anyone else a reason to speak ill of you, even if you did nothing wrong.
慌张的外邦人连连道谢，消失在了人群尽头。
The flustered outlander expresses profuse appreciation and disappears into the crowd.
这位小友，请不要急着离开。我还有些话要说。
Don't be in such a hurry to leave, young friend. I still have something to say.
我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.
你刚才为那外邦人撑腰的举动令我印象深刻，善良的灵魂在哪个城邦都很稀缺。
Your support for the outlander left a deep impression on me. Kind souls are rare in most cities.
I merely did what I had to do, you flatter me.
哈哈，看来你已经把善举当成了习惯。我认为我们有深入交流的必要。
Haha, it looks like you're a habitual altruist. I believe it necessary for us to have a deeper conversation.
We have no choice. I will stand in.
哈哈，看来你已经把善举当成了习惯。我认为我们有深入交流的必要。
Haha, it looks like you're a habitual altruist. I believe it necessary for us to have a deeper conversation.
I just wanted to pit my wits against him...
一个人的真实想法往往以玩笑的形式表露。我认为我们有深入交流的必要。
A person's true thoughts are often revealed in the form of jokes. I believe it necessary for us to have a deeper conversation.
这位小友，请不要急着离开。我还有些话要说。
Don't be in such a hurry to leave, young friend. I still have something to say.
我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.
我听说过你，来自异邦的战士。圣城当下面临的问题，似乎也与你息息相关。
I have heard of you, warrior from the outlands. You also appear to be involved in the problems plaguing the holy city.
如你所见，外邦人在这里正逐渐变得不受欢迎。
As you can see, outlanders are gradually becoming less welcome here.
你也是外邦人的一员。但你与黄金裔们并肩作战、证明了自己的勇气，这才被当作贵客——并非所有人都这么幸运。
You are also an outlander, but you have fought side by side with the Chrysos Heirs, proven your courage, and hailed as an esteemed guest. Not all are so lucky.
我也想过帮助那人来着…
I also thought about helping that person...
虽然没有付诸实践，但有行善的念头终究是好的——倘若其他公民都能学习你的品质，局势会比现在好上许多。
Even if not put into practice, the intent to do good is nonetheless commendable — if other citizens could learn from your virtue, we wouldn't be in such harrowing circumstances.
What does that have to do with me?
或许你自恃受到尊敬，不会被凡人的纠纷困扰。但奥赫玛并没有表面上那么欢迎外邦人……
Perhaps because you are respected, therefore undisturbed by the woes of the common folk. But Okhema is not as welcoming of outlanders as it appears...
当这问题真正爆发时，民意势必如洪水般汹涌。我从未听说有人能因身份尊贵而免于淹溺。
When this problem truly explodes, public opinion is bound to surge forth like a deluge. A person's status has never saved them from drowning.
曾经的「永恒之城」并不吝于为其他城邦的来客敞开大门。但随着黑潮肆虐，人们心中的善意也逐渐萎靡……
This former Eternal City has always been generous in opening its doors to outsiders. But as the black tide encroaches, the goodwill in people's hearts may slowly give way to misgivings...
此事说来话长。我们应该找个能坐下的地方，舒舒服服地谈论这个议题——就选<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的浴场</color>吧，我是那里的尊享客户。
It is a long story. We should look for a place to speak about this more comfortably. How about <color=#dbc291ff>Marmoreal Palace's baths</color>? I am a privileged patron there.
不介意的话，我去开个浴池，你可以先在这周围逛逛。公民们还沉浸在刚才发生的事里，说不定能听到些有趣的看法。
If you don't mind, I'll go run a bath first. You can take a look around. The citizens are still mulling over what just happened, you might hear something of interest.
唉，这事儿最后怎么就皆大欢喜了呢？那我缺的乐子这块谁给补啊？
*sigh* Why did this matter have a happy ending? Who will fill up the hole of boredom within me now?
唉，果然你也被外邦人困扰过吧？有的外邦人确实不太守规矩……
*sigh* You have been troubled by outlanders too? Some of them really test the law's patience here...
讨厌嘛，倒也算不上，就是有的外邦人确实不太守规矩……
I wouldn't say that, but some outlanders really flout the laws here...
Have you considered joining a tavern?
那是什么，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}信徒的聚集地？我可没兴趣……
What's that? A place where {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s disciples congregate? I'm not interested...
我只是想见见外邦人出糗的模样罢了，他们中的某些家伙确实不太守规矩……
I just want to see outlanders make a fool of themselves. Some among them like to test the law's patience...
就拿我自己来说吧。我有一家面包店，平时也赚不了几个钱，勉强能维持生活。
Take me, for example. I have a bakery, it doesn't earn much most days, but I can make ends meet.
大概是从上上周开始，总有些外邦人在打烊前坐在店门口，希望我把当天没卖出去的剩面包施舍给他们。
It started about two weeks ago — there would be outlanders standing by the entrance when I closed up, hoping that I would offer any unsold bread to them.
我本来觉得这没什么，但有些买得起面包的公民知道之后，也过来占我的便宜，搞得人人都想吃免费的剩面包，我的生意都变差了。

I didn't think much of it at first, but the people who could afford them caught wind of this, and also came by to take advantage of my kindness. Everyone ended up wanting free bread, and my business suffered.
听起来也不是外邦人的错…
Doesn't sound like the outlanders were at fault...
怎么不是？要不是他们带了坏头，奥赫玛人怎么会这么贪心！
Are they not? If they hadn't started the trend, Okhemans wouldn't have learned to be so greedy!
你不给那些公民不就行了？
Couldn't you have just not offered any to those citizens?
这…我要是不给，大家又会说我吝啬，给外邦人不给自家人，生意不就更差了吗！
I... If I didn't, they would just call me miserly, offering bread to outlanders but refusing my countrymen... Business would be even worse then!
真离谱，这帮人就不能找个工作、自己掏钱买面包吗？
Outrageous. Can't these guys just find a job and pay for their own bread?
哎呀，这群外邦人，一个个那么勤奋干什么？居然还跑过来给大地兽免费打工……
Bah, what're these outlanders doing, being so hardworking? They're even willing to work for the dromases free of charge...
看来工作还是不够饱和。
Looks like there's not enough work to go around.
工作？可别提工作了！我正为这事发愁呢。
Work? Don't even mention that word! I'm tearing my hair out because of it.
Being hardworking is a bad thing?
它对公民来说也许是美德，但出现在外邦人身上，就只剩下麻烦了。
It may be a virtue to citizens, but with the outlanders showing up, it's spelled nothing but trouble.
I also want to massage the back of a dromas...
…你这是爱好异于常人，不像那群外邦人，纯属精力过剩。
...You just have an odd hobby that raises some brows. That's nothing like those outlanders who're brimming with vigor.
之前来到圣城的外邦人数量不多，元老院就同意他们按批次进城。没想到这帮家伙…都太能干了。他们找工作只有两个要求，包吃、包住，连工钱都不需要付。

There weren't many outlanders who came to the holy city in the past, so the Council of Elders agreed to let them enter in batches. But who would've thought that these ruffians... were so exceptional. They had only two conditions while looking for a job: Food and lodging. You didn't even have to pay for their work.
有这么划算的伙计，现在基本没几个摊主愿意雇佣像我这样的本地人了——我可受不了不要工钱的活！
No business owner in their right mind would want to hire any locals with such affordable staff! I can't work for no pay!
要不你去城墙外找工作？
Why don't you look for a job beyond the walls?
啥意思？外面全是荒原，还有疯王眷属，有去无回啊！我没疯到那种程度。
What'd you mean? It's a wasteland out there, and with the Mad King's Kin roaming about, there's no return from that! I'm not THAT desperate.
为什么不开设新的岗位呢？
Why don't you create a new stall?
说得轻巧。市场总共就那么大，哪儿还能容下更多摊位了？
Easier said than done. The market's only so big, how many more stalls can it hold?
是吧？公民们应该团结起来维护自己的权益才对，不过这又说来话长了……
Right? The people should be banding together to protect their own rights, but that's another long story...
反正元老院已经在讨论如何处理外邦人的问题了，等官方通告出来再说也不迟。
Anyway, the Council of Elders is already discussing the outlander problem, we can wait for official word before acting.
那位老者真是舌灿莲花。拉莱德不是第一次做局刁难外邦人了，没想到这回给自己碰了一鼻子灰，哈哈~
That old man sure has a silver tongue. It's not the first time Liluder has tried to make things difficult for outlanders. Well, that backfired on him this time, haha!
等下轮抽签结束后，他怕不是还要折腾好一阵，到时可就又有乐子看了。
When the next drawing of lots ends, he'll probably still be struggling for a while — that'll be a funny sight to see then.
抽签进城嘛。圣城已经收留了很多人，住房和其他资源都有限，尤其是在尼卡多利袭击之后。
To enter the city. The holy city has taken in many people, and accommodation and other resources are limited, especially after Nikador's attack.
这种局面当然不能来者不拒，所以外邦人想进入圣城，必须在抽签中获得资格才行。
We can't turn them away of course, so if the outlanders wish to enter the city, they'll have to draw lots to qualify.
不过缇宝大人前些日子带回了一队雅努斯的祭司，不用抽签就直接进城了…特殊时期，人才总是最珍贵的啊。
But Lady Tribbie brought back a group of Janus priests some days ago, and they didn't have to draw lots to enter the city... Talented individuals are a precious commodity in times of need.
缇宝他们不是带来了一批吗？
Didn't Tribbie bring back a group?
嗐，那里面有雅努斯的祭司，圣城需要他们的协助。特殊时期，人才总是最珍贵的嘛。
Those are Janus priests, the holy city needs their help. Talented individuals are a precious commodity in times of need.
圣城已经收留了很多人，住房和其他资源都有限，尤其是在尼卡多利袭击之后。这事儿指不定会引起多少微词。
The holy city has taken in many people, and accommodation and other resources are limited, especially after Nikador's attack. This matter will surely invite plenty of criticism.
You're also looking to revel in others' misery?
别误会，我可不是什么嗜血观众。只是他这么喜欢做局，不看个戏总觉得吃亏。
Please don't misunderstand, I am no onlooker baying for blood. I just reckon it'd be a waste not to witness a troublemaker get his just deserts.
他倒也不是没有支持者——圣城的住房和其他资源都有限，尼卡多利的袭击更是雪上加霜。现在外邦人只能抽签进城。

He has his fair share of supporters — the holy city has limited space and resources, and Nikador's assault has only made that distinction more stark. Now, the outlanders have been forced to draw lots for entry.
不过缇宝大人前些日子带回了一队雅努斯的祭司，不用抽签就直接进城了…特殊时期，人才总是最珍贵的啊。
But Lady Tribbie brought back a group of Janus priests some days ago, and they didn't have to draw lots to enter the city... Talented individuals are a precious commodity in times of need.
现在城内的局面非常复杂，谁都能说出一堆道理来。公民们吵得厉害，元老院估计一时也拿不定主意。

The situation in the city is complicated. Everyone seems to have their fair share of arguments. The citizens are locked in their bickering, and the Council of Elders will likely reserve judgment for now.
给你一个忠告吧：学会独立思考是很重要的——就像我一样。
A word of advice: Learning to think for yourself is essential — just like me.
是你啊，小友。快下来吧，这里的水温刚刚好。
It's you, young friend. Come on down, the water is just right.
我对局势已经了如指掌！
I've got a complete grasp of the situation!
是嘛，那你的行动力着实令人佩服。
Is that so? Your actions are worth commending then.
但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「舆论不能只用一边耳朵倾听。」不如也来听听我所掌握的信息吧。
There was once a sage who said this: "Public opinion cannot be heard with only one ear." How about listening to what I have gathered?
我习惯一边感受水流，一边思考。有时我们距离真理只差这一点小小的灵感。你也该试一试。
I'm used to thinking with the flow of water. Sometimes we are but a miniscule spark of inspiration away from the truth. You ought to give it a try too.
只有超高温浴池才能满足我。
Only a hot bath will satisfy me.
…泡澡这种事，讲究一个量力而行。我老了，太刺激的吃不消。请你先将就一下吧。
...A bath is all about knowing your limits. Thrills aren't my strong suit at my age, please bear with me for a moment.
你进入了浴池——如他所说，水温刚刚好。
You enter the bath — as he said, the temperature is just right.
该从哪里说起呢…就从你开始吧。听说你初入奥赫玛时，尼卡多利的眷属正在城中肆虐。
Where should I begin... How about we start with you? I hear that Nikador's brethren were running rampant in the city when you first arrived in Okhema.
早在那场袭击发生之前，就偶尔有逃难的外邦人来这里寻求庇护。他们的城邦已经毁灭，仅凭自己没法在荒原上长期生存。
Before that attack happened, an occasional outlander seeking refuge would come here for shelter. Their cities had been razed to the ground, and they could not survive long in the wasteland.
而现在，希望得到圣城庇护的逃难者数量激增——因为你们击败了尼卡多利，通向奥赫玛的道路也变得安全了许多……
And now, the number of refugees seeking protection in the holy city is rising. Because you defeated Nikador, and made the journey to Okhema that much safer...
哈哈~如果有哪个外邦的吟游诗人听了说你的壮举，我相信他会为你专门写一首歌的。
Haha! If an outlander bard hears of your exploits, I reckon he will surely write a song regaling your feat.
You mean I caused this problem?
没必要这么想，未来之事本就不可预料。而且对那些外邦人来说，这是十足的好消息。
Don't think of it like that. Future events cannot be predicted. And to these outlanders, that is most welcome news.
没错，「生存」是一件奢侈品。失去了城邦的人们在黑潮面前…没有胜算。
Exactly. Survival is a luxury. The homeless refugees who face the black tide... they have zero chance at victory.
是不是因为没交买路钱？
Is it because they didn't pay the toll?
并非谁都稀罕财富，尤其是那些失去神智的怪物…至少你的笑话让气氛没那么沉重了。
Not everyone covets wealth, especially monsters that have long forsaken their sanity... But your joke has injected some levity in such dire times.
灾厄中的资源有限，奥赫玛没法接纳太多外邦人，来者不拒只会让城邦陷入混乱。
Resources during disasters are scarce, and Okhema can't take in too many outlanders. Welcoming everyone will only plunge the city into chaos.
如今，这些外邦人大多被安置在了远离城墙的避难所里，生存条件比荒原好上许多，还有圣城守卫保护。但那毕竟没法给他们家园的安定感。
