Right now, most of these outlanders have been situated in a shelter far away from the city walls. The conditions are much better than the wasteland's, with the city guards protecting the place. But it will never grant them a sense of security akin to their homes.
元老院想出了一个权宜之策：只放一小部分外邦人进城，具体人选通过抽签决定。但反对者说，这种抽签可能并不公平，因为元老们可以故意挑选「有用」的人……

So the Council of Elders came up with a temporary solution: To allow only a small number of outlanders into the city, decided by drawing lots. This method may be unfair to those who object, because the Council has rigged the process to select the useful ones...
那些掌握特殊技能、擅长做粗重活计的强壮男子很容易得到机会；而带着孩子的老人则很难，即便他们实际上更需要帮助。
Strong men who have mastery over special skills and proficiency in heavy labor stand the highest chances, while old folk with children in tow the lowest, even if they require more assistance.
可惜，没有证据表明这种筛选真的存在。甚至还有公民认为，那不过是东道主的正当权利——我们有资格决定帮谁。
Alas, there is no evidence to prove that this sorting really exists. Even the citizens think that this is the authority of the host city — we have the right to decide who we help.
的确有公民认为，这种筛选不过是东道主的正当权利——我们有资格决定帮谁。
Some citizens do think that these conditions are but the authority of the host city — we have the right to decide who we help.
那都别放进来了，最公平。
How about no one gets allowed in then, that's most fair.
某些激进者确实这么想，说奥赫玛不应接纳任何外邦人。但那样的话，我们在黑潮面前就会孤立无援了——万敌和白厄两位勇士也来自外邦。

Some radicals do think this way, saying that Okhema should not accept any outlanders at all. But if that were the case we would be solitary in our stand against the black tide — Mydei and Phainon are foreign as well.
原来元老院也是强度党。
So the Council of Elders recognizes strength as well.
你的意思是…我明白了，有能力的人确实容易受到优待。
You mean... I see, those of ability are more easily favored.
奥赫玛的资源有限，但也足够为绝大部分外邦人提供援助。真正的问题在于：<color=#dbc291ff>我们愿意付出代价吗？</color>
Okhema's resources are limited, but there is enough to aid most of the outlanders. The real question is: <color=#dbc291ff>Are we willing to pay the price?</color>
假设城门口来了一群快要饿死的陌生人，只要一口吃食就能活下去。奥赫玛当然有能力救助他们，但代价是你我会少吃……
If a group of strangers was starving at the gates, and they could live with a mouthful of food, Okhema would be more than capable of saving them, but you and I would have one fewer bite...
少吃一个苹果。对，就苹果吧，我爱吃苹果。「每天一苹果，医生远离我」。
...One fewer bite of an apple, for example. I like apples. "An apple a day keeps the doctor away."
那么，<color=#dbc291ff>你愿意用自己桌上的一个苹果，去换陌生人的一条生路吗？</color>
Then, <color=#dbc291ff>are you willing to relinquish an apple on your table, in exchange for a stranger's survival?</color>
救人一命，少吃几个我也愿意。
I'd be willing to forgo any number of apples to save a life.
啊，多么高尚的回答，我就知道你有着少见的善良灵魂…但我们不能强迫所有公民都做出这样的选择。
Ah, a most noble answer. I knew you possessed a precious kind soul... but we cannot force all the citizens to make the same choice.
如果只是一个，那我愿意。
If it was just one, I'll be willing.
啊，看来你的心中的确存在着善。割让自身的利益——无论多么微小，其背后的高尚都值得赞扬…但我们不能强迫所有公民都这么选。

Ah, looks like kindness does indeed exist within you. To forgo one's benefits, no matter how small they may be, is still a noble act worth commending... But we cannot force all the citizens to do the same.
我只在利益不受损时愿意。
I'll only agree to acts that don't harm my own interests.
理解。只有当行善的代价可以承受时，人们心中的善才会被激发出来。
Understood. 'Tis only when the price for a kind act is bearable, that our benevolence is roused.
这得看我能从他那里换来什么。
That would depend on what they'd have in exchange.
很遗憾，快要饿死的人往往没什么财产…除了他们自己。
Alas, famished refugees would have a dearth of valuables on them... apart from their own lives.
哪怕没有代价，我也不愿意。
I wouldn't do it, even if there was no price.
嗯，这也是很多普通人的真实看法，而城邦的命运就是掌握在这些人手上的。
Yes, this is how most ordinary people truly feel, and the fate of the city lies in the hands of those who think like that.
对这个问题的回答造就了一切分歧。时至今日，公民们依旧为此争论不休。
The answers to this question incurred further discord. The city's people are locked in verbal conflict to this day.
至少在我看来，奥赫玛应当是包容的。哪怕我们不能拯救所有人，也应怀抱更多善意、给予他们足以活下去的资源……
How I see it at least, is that Okhema should be tolerant. Even if we can't save everyone, we should embrace kindness, and provide resources for others to live on...
因为真正的资源，是人。没有人的城邦就像没有秘酿的容器，难以在狂风中保持挺立。
Because the true resource is people. A city without her people is like a vessel without fine brew — unable to stand steadfast in violent gales.
谁知道呢？这一切恐怕只有{RUBY_B#时间的流逝}欧洛尼斯的神迹{RUBY_E#}才能给出答案吧。
Who knows? I fear only {RUBY_B#Passing of Time}Oronyx's Miracle{RUBY_E#} may be able to give an answer.
在你们高声交谈时，一位青年悄悄来到了浴池旁边。
During your loud discourse, a youngster has surreptitiously sidled to the edge of the bath.
吾师，你怎么在这儿？真是让我好找…我有消息要告诉你。
Master, what are you doing here? I had such a hard time finding you... I have news for you.
是你啊，帕拉滕。我要先听好消息。
Oh, it's you, Palaten. I will have the good news first.
很可惜，只有坏消息——不久前，城门口来了一群外邦人。他们没有尝试进城，而是直接往命运重渊去了，现在不知情况如何。

Unfortunately, I have only bad tidings. An outlander group arrived at the city gates not long ago. They did not attempt to enter the city, their course set directly for the Abyss of Fate instead. Their circumstances are unknown right now.
苏克提瑞斯沉默了片刻，仿佛在思考一道由弟子抛出的谜题。
Soctires is silent for a moment, as if contemplating a conundrum that his student threw his way.
命运重渊…那边不是还很危险吗？他们为什么不去元老院的避难所？
The Abyss of Fate... Isn't it extremely dangerous there? Why did they not head for the Council of Elders' shelter?
不知道。可能是他们与奥赫玛存在信仰分歧——就像那位诺杜斯祭司一样。
I don't know. Perhaps they have a conflict of faith with Okhema — like that priest of Noldus.
正巧小友在这，我们不如亲自去看看情况…能麻烦你陪我们跑一趟吗？
Good thing you're here, young friend. How about we survey the situation personally... Might I trouble you to come with us?
小友果然爽快。等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
You are most forthright. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
通往命运重渊的路并不安全。我和帕拉滕只是普通学者，遇上麻烦不好脱身。
The road to the Abyss of Fate is not safe. Palaten and I are just ordinary scholars — we wouldn't be able to extricate ourselves from trouble.
而你是和黄金裔并肩作战的英雄。有你在，我们才能平安归来——等这件事结束之后，我请你吃饭。
And you are a hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. We will return safely with your company. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
It can't be a wasted trip.
哈哈，当然——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
Haha, of course. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
而且我相信，经过这次接触，我们对外邦人的了解也会更进一步。
And I believe that with this interaction, we understand the outlanders' plight better.
我一直认为，眼见胜过耳闻。想要了解外邦人的处境，没什么比亲自去看看更客观了。
I have always thought that seeing is believing. There's nothing more convincing than personally witnessing the outlanders' circumstances to learn about them.
如果你实在对他们不感兴趣，也可以把我的邀请当作一份委托——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
If you're really uninterested in them, you can treat my invite as a commission — I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
我准备好了，吾师。我们这便出发吧。
I'm ready, Master. Let us set off.
疯王的眷属果然没那么容易退去。帕拉滕，你留在安全的地方；小友，待会我的身后就拜托你了。
Though expected, the Mad King's Kin are admittedly resilient. Palaten, you stay in a safe place. Young friend, I'll be counting on you to watch my back.
哦哦哦，如此热血的台词！
Ooooh! That line's got me all fired up!
吾师…原来你还懂武技的吗？
Master... you knew martial arts all along?
不，我只是趁机把那些难民组织起来，以免他们过于惊慌……
No, I simply seized the chance to rally those refugees, so they would keep calm...
Aahhh! Get away from me, monsters!
吾师，这些人…他们的状态很不好，在我们来之前就已经有人受伤了。
Master, these people... they're not doing well. Some were already injured before we got here.
的确，而且看样子，他们此前也没吃过像样的饭——这里的话事人在哪？
Indeed. And from the looks of them, they haven't had a proper meal for a while. Who's in charge here?
一个带孩子的女人从人群中站了出来。
A woman holding a child emerges from the crowd.
多谢你们，还有这位灰发的英雄。我们…我们该怎么回报你们？
Thank you all so much, especially this gray-haired hero. How... How can we ever repay you?
先不说这个，你们为什么不去圣城指定的避难所？那里有卫兵驻守，比这里安全得多。
That can wait. Why didn't you go to the holy city's designated shelter? There are sentries garrisoned there. It's much safer than here.
之前我听见卫兵说什么「大地兽工坊骚乱」、「抽签」、「物资分配」之类的，就没敢上去搭话。
I overheard the guards before, talking about some "dromas workshop incident," "drawing lots," "resource allocation" and whatnot, so I didn't dare ask them to clarify.
我想，或许圣城的负担已经够大了。就算恳求卫兵放我们进城，也不过是给他们平添麻烦，最后闹个不痛快罢了。

I think the burden on the holy city is already heavy enough. Even if we beg the guards to let us in, it would only add to their troubles, and in the end, it would just lead to an unpleasant situation.
既然如此，我们不如先在附近找个地方落脚，看看能不能自食其力。只是没想到……
If that's the case, we might as well look for a nearby place to rest our feet, to see if we could fend for ourselves. But who would've thought...
不会的，宝贝…有妈妈在就不会。
No, baby... It won't happen as long as mama is around.
可是安东尼叔叔，还有爱莎姐姐…他们好像真的快要死了。
But Uncle Anthony, and Sister Aisha... They really look like they're going to die.
我的肚子也有些饿——之前不是说过，到了圣城就可以吃上饱饭了吗？妈妈，我们什么时候才能到圣城？
My tummy is hungry too... Didn't you say that we'd have something to eat once we got to the holy city? Mama, when will we get there?
女人蹲下，紧紧抱住了自己的孩子，泪水从她眼角默默滑落。
The woman crouches and holds her child tight, tears silently streaming down the corners of her eyes.
苏克提瑞斯轻咳两声，把你们拽到了一旁。
Soctires softly clears his throat and pulls you to the side.
经历了这么多事，任谁都难免控制不住情绪。给那对母女留点空间吧。
Anyone who just suffered so much hardship would find it difficult to keep their emotions in check. Best give that mother and child some space.
这些外邦人的情况比想象中还要糟糕。如果放任不管的话，他们最多只能活一周——前提是没有更多袭击发生。
The outlanders' situation is much worse than I imagined. If we keep turning a blind eye, they will at best survive for a week. That is... if they aren't attacked by wild beasts first.
想要直接带他们进城是很困难的，我们只能提供物质援助。对此，我有一个想法……
It would be hard to bring them directly into the city, so we can only provide supplies for them. And I have an idea about that...
但至少我们可以帮助眼前的人，不是吗？我已经想到了一个办法……
But we can at least help those in front of us, can't we? I already have an idea...
在发表评价之前，务必记得，不是所有人拥有选择。
Before you pass judgment, please remember that not everyone has a choice.
类似的悲剧在这片土地上发生过太多次，难道每个可怜人都是咎由自取吗？我看未必。
Similar tragedies have happened too many times in this land. Did all of them deserve their fates? I think not.
这些外邦人已经挺过了最艰难的旅程，只要一点简单的帮助就可以活下去。对此，我有一个想法……
The worst of the journey is over for these outlanders. They just need a little help to live on. I have an idea...
至少这些外邦人已经挺过了最艰难的旅程，如今只要一点简单的帮助就可以活下去。对此，我有一个想法……
At least the worst of the journey is over for these outlanders. Now they just need some simple help to live on. I have an idea...
圣城的避难所距离城墙只有半天脚程，那里有卫兵守护，相对安全。只是凭这些人现在的状态很难抵达。
The holy city's shelter is only a half-day trek away from the city walls. There are guards there, so it'll be safer. It's just that the way these refugees are now... getting there would be difficult.
眼下他们没有多少食物，又因为刚才的袭击而急需药物。我们可以暂时为他们提供这两样东西，等伤员痊愈之后，再把他们送去避难所。

They haven't much food to begin with, and that last attack has left them in urgent need of emergency medical supplies. We can provide them with these two for now. When their wounded are healed, we can escort them to the shelter.
可是，吾师…药品在奥赫玛是战略物资，现在管控严格，一般公民很难买到的。
But, teacher... All medicine is now considered wartime supplies in Okhema — distribution is under strict control. Most people won't even be able to buy any.
我知道，我会想办法的…至少能确保他们活着。
I know. I will think of a way... at least to guarantee their survival.
好消息是，食物还没有受到管控。在<color=#dbc291ff>云石市集</color>随便就能买到足够这些人吃一周的粮食。
The good news is, food isn't strictly regulated. You can easily get enough food to feed these people for a week at the <color=#dbc291ff>Marmoreal Market</color>.
所以，我提议兵分两路：我和帕拉滕去找药，小友去市场买些喜欢的吃食回来，我们之后在这里集合。
So, I suggest we split up: Palaten and I will secure the medicine, while our young friend buys some food back, after which we will reconvene here.
哎，必须要我同行吗？原本还打算和这位灰发英雄一块选购来着。
Hey, do I really need to come along? I was thinking of doing the procurement with this gray-haired hero.
我需要一个帮手。记得我上个月嘱咐过的吗？我老了，很多事都必须有人拉一把才行。
I need a helper. Remember my instructions last month? I'm getting old, and there are many things that I need help for.
要是哪天我没力气走下去了，你还得接过我的衣钵，继续教化奥赫玛人民。
If there comes a day when I haven't the strength to walk a step farther, you'll have to take my mantle and carry on guiding the people of Okhema.
那好。出发之前，小友还有什么想说的吗？
Well then, before we set out, is there anything our young friend wants to say?
谢谢你，小友…真是麻烦你陪我跑上跑下了。等这件事结束后，我一定会认真向你道谢的。
Thank you, young friend... I really appreciate you accompanying me on my errands. When this is all over, I have to thank you in earnest.
不是说要请{F#她}{M#他}吃饭来着吗？别忘了算我一个。
Didn't you say you were going to treat {F#her}{M#him} to a meal? Don't forget my share.
Don't forget to reimburse me then.
哈哈，当然！等事情结束后，直接把账单交给帕拉滕就好，他最会算账了。
Haha, of course! When everything's over, just give the invoice to Palaten — he's the best at doing the accounts.
吾师，会算账不意味着要还账…别坑我啊！
Teacher, being good at the ledger isn't the same as paying for stuff... Please don't tease me!
人命关天，已经没时间走流程了…等问题解决之后，再向元老院报备吧。
Lives are at stake. We've got no time to do it by the book... We'll report this to the Council of Elders when the problem is resolved.
听起来这些人的命运全靠我们了。没想到我一介学徒，居然也有当英雄的一天…想想还有点激动呢！
It sounds like these people's fates are relying on our success. I never thought a lowly apprentice like me would get a chance to perform such heroics... Sounds awfully exciting!
What do these people have to do with us?
此言差矣。我们总是要给弱者提供力所能及的帮助，不只是因为道德，哪怕是从功利角度来说，也应当因此。
You're asking the wrong question. We should always provide all the help we can to the weak, not just because it is moral. It is the correct action, even from a utilitarian perspective.
说不定什么时候，强与弱的身份就会发生转换，我们也会需要他们的帮助…而且，刻法勒的伟大之处，不正是在于替众人背负世界吗。
Who knows when the roles of the strong and weak will be reversed? When we will also need their help? Besides, isn't Kephale's majesty in bearing the burdens of the world for the people?
没想到我一介学徒，居然也有机会继承刻法勒的精神，想想还有点激动呢！
I never thought a lowly apprentice like me would get the chance to carry on Kephale's will. It sounds very exciting!
那么，一会儿见了，灰发的英雄。
Then, we'll meet later, gray-haired hero.
妈妈，我不想再吃这些硬面包了，牙都快硌掉了！
Mama, I don't want to eat this rock-hard bread anymore. My teeth are going to fall out!
乖，再吃一口就好。下次我们不吃硬面包了，我保证……
Be a good girl and have one more bite. We won't have to eat hard bread next time, I promise...
好啊~等到了圣城，我要吃烤苹果派！
Yay! I want baked apple pie when we reach the holy city!
找个能落脚的地方怎么就这么难？我只是想过上安稳的生活而已……
Is there no recourse in our search for a safe haven? I simply wish to live out a peaceful, simple life...
难道最后还是要回北方？不，我可不想再走一遍了！
Do we have to return north in the end? No, I'm not making that trek again!
刻法勒在上，欧洛尼斯保佑，扎格列斯显灵…哪位都行，帮帮我们吧。
By Kephale, may Oronyx protect us, may Zagreus grace our presence... Any of them will do. Please help us.
我的腿…它还在吗？我有些…没知觉了……
My leg... Is it still there? I can't... seem to feel it...
你撑住啊。领队已经在想办法了，你很快就会好起来的…别睡，别睡！
Hang in there. The leader is already trying to help. You'll get better real soon... Don't go to sleep. Don't sleep!
这个商贩似乎是一夜间冒出来的，你不记得自己在集市上见过她。
This shopkeeper appears to have popped up overnight, since you don't remember seeing her at the market.
哟，欢迎光临维比娅的小店。能有您这样的英雄眷顾，我这摊位都蓬荜生辉了。
Ooh, welcome to Vibia's little shop. It's a great honor for a hero such as you to be gracing my humble store.
I want a crate of food.
食物？当然，我这就把压箱底的货都拿出来招待您。
Food? Of course. I'll have only my most premium goods brought out to you.
商贩从角落里拽来一个落满灰尘的木箱，掀开了盖子一角……
The shopkeeper drags out a dusty wooden crate from a corner, and opens a corner...
干瘪的蔬菜、诡异的肉类、硬如武器的面包…种种迹象表明，这箱食物是次品中的次品。
Shriveled vegetables, strange meats, bread hard as steel... All signs indicate that this crate of food is obviously inferior beyond all atrocity.
还没等你看清细节，商贩就重新把木箱拖回角落，用一块麻布罩住了。
Before you even get a glance at the intricacies, she drags the crate back to its corner and covers it with a cloth.
怎么样？昨天刚到的货，非常新鲜！
How's about it? They just arrived yesterday. Fresh as it gets!
你这货是从墓里挖来的？
From which grave did you dig that crate up?
什么话？这明明是我辛辛苦苦偷…我是说搜集来的，你可不能空口污人清白！
How could you? I spent all that effort steal... I mean, searching for it. You shouldn't accuse an innocent!
这一箱价钱也不贵，<unbreak>2000</unbreak>利衡币。想要的话就给钱。
It's not expensive either, only <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> Balance Coins. Cough up the coin if you want it.
This is your most premium produce?
…这一箱价钱又不贵，才<unbreak>2000</unbreak>利衡币。买不了吃亏，买不了上当啊！
...This crate doesn't cost much, only <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> Balance Coins. There's no way you're losing out on this deal!
怎么样，到底要不要？要就给钱。
How's about it? Want it? Cough up the coin then.
（这家确实很便宜，但质量不敢恭维…如果我想用廉价货色打发那些外邦人，它会是不错的选择。）
(It is very cheap, but its quality remains suspect... It is a decent option, if I intend to use substandard food to get those outlanders off my back.)
哎呀，您果然识货。喏，我这儿还有些水果，一并送你当赠品好了。
Hah, I knew you had a good eye. Oh, I have some fruit here too, take 'em as a gift.
记得别让卫兵看见箱子，不然可能会有麻烦——那就不关我的事了。
Don't let the guards see the crate, or there'll be trouble — I won't be liable for any of that.
这是你最后一次看见这个商贩。在把货箱交给你之后，她便朝着远离市场的方向狂奔，直到消失在视野尽头。
This is the last time you see this peddler. After giving you the crate, she sprints off into the distance, far away from the market, and fades beyond the horizon.
你扛着货箱，一路回到了重渊。
You lug the crate back to the abyss.
I'll take another look around here.
别看了，再看也不会有区别的…唉，随你吧。
Forget that, it won't make a difference... Bah, it's your call.
考虑好了没有？过了这村没这店了！
Done thinking 'bout it? It's now or never!
哎呀，您果然识货。喏，我这儿还有些水果，一并送你当赠品好了。
Hah, I knew you had a good eye. Oh, I have some fruit here too, take 'em as a gift.
记得别让卫兵看见箱子，不然可能会有麻烦——那就不关我的事了。
Don't let the guards see the crate, or there'll be trouble — I won't be liable for any of that.
这是你最后一次看见这个商贩。在把货箱交给你之后，她便朝着远离市场的方向狂奔，直到消失在视野尽头。
This is the last time you see this peddler. After giving you the crate, she sprints off into the distance, far away from the market, and fades beyond the horizon.
你扛着货箱，一路回到了重渊。
You lug the crate back to the abyss.
I'll take another look around here.
别看了，再看也不会有区别的…唉，随你吧。
Forget that, it won't make a difference... Bah, it's your call.
又见面了，可爱的小家伙。有什么想吃的水果吗？
We meet again, my adorable friend. Any fruit you want to eat?
I want a crate of food.
不是蔬果，而是食物？呵呵，小朋友，你还真会给我出难题。
Not fruit and vegetables, but food? Heh-heh, you sure know how to create a quandary in me, little friend.
但这可难不倒我，稍等就好……
But this won't vex me at all. Just wait a while...
德墨忒尔笑着走进屋子。返回时，她手上多了几个巨大的竹篮——大到让你怀疑她是怎么搬动的。
Demetria laughs as she enters the house. When she returns, several large baskets are hanging off her arms — they are so big you wonder how she's even carrying them.
除蔬果以外，篮子里也包括了肉类和面包。至于质量，只能算是不好不坏。
Besides fruit and vegetables, there are also meats and bread in the baskets. As for their quality, you can only vouch for their mediocrity.
在向你展示过后，德墨忒尔将篮子放回了柜台后面，看来她也没强壮到能一直举着它们。
After parading them in front of you, Demetria sets the baskets back behind the counter. She is probably tired from having to carry them.
怎么样，小家伙？如果你想要，我的报价是<unbreak>4000</unbreak>利衡币。
What about it, little one? If you wish, I'll sell them to you for <unbreak>4,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.
（这家店的价格和质量都适中。如果我想要无功无过的选择，那就是它了。）
(This shop's price and quality are acceptable. If I want a middling option, this is probably it.)
好。你要把这些食物带到哪儿去？我帮你送一程吧……
Okay. Where do you want the food delivered to? I can help you with that...
谢绝了老店长的帮助，你带着篮子一路回到了重渊。
After politely declining the shopkeeper's offer to help, you bring the baskets back to the abyss.
I'll take another look around here.
没事，你想看多久都可以。
No worries, take all the time you want.
怎么样，小家伙，做好决定了吗？
Little one, have you decided yet?
好。你要把这些食物带到哪儿去？我帮你送一程吧……
Okay. Where do you want the food delivered to? I can help you with that...
谢绝了老店长的帮助，你带着篮子一路回到了重渊。
After politely declining the shopkeeper's offer to help, you bring the baskets back to the abyss.
I'll take another look around here.
没事，你想看多久都可以。
No worries, take all the time you want.
您想来点什么呢？本地的特色美食，还是那些早已失传的外邦菜肴？
What would you like to eat? Local specialties? Or perhaps something more outlandish that has been lost to time?
I want a crate of food.
「一箱」食物？那只好把我的备餐拿出来秀一秀了……
A "crate" of food? That means I'll just have to flaunt my reserve stock then...
放心，这儿的食物都是奥赫玛最好的。就算不是最好，也是数一数二的。
Don't worry, the food here is Okhema's finest. Even if it's not, it's still pretty up there.
克瑞斯招招手，帮工们从房间里搬出几个敞口陶瓶，里面存放的食物——如他所说，令人垂涎。
Kyros waves his hand, and from the room, his helpers carry several ceramic vases containing food. It is as he said: They look delicious.
摆盘精美的果蔬、新鲜出炉的浓汤，散发着香气的秘酿…每样都是食物中的上品，并且经过细心烹饪。
Lush fruit and vegetables in a platter, aromatic soup fresh from the oven, fine brew emanating intoxicating fragrance... Each and every item is world-class, and made with culinary intricacy.
怎么样？我说过这是全奥赫玛最好的。当然，价格不算便宜，<unbreak>8000</unbreak>利衡币。
What'd you think? I told you I'd give you Okhema's finest. Of course, they cost quite a bit: <unbreak>8,000</unbreak> Balance Coins.
（这家店的质量相当高，但是价钱也很贵。如果我想给外邦人吃顿好的，它会是不错的选择。）
(This shop's quality is top-notch, and its price reflects that. If I want to give the outlanders something sumptuous, this would be a fine choice.)
我看看…钱数没错。稍等，我帮你打包一下。
Let's see... This is the right amount. Hold on, I'll help you pack the food.
啊对了，冒昧问一句，你买这么多食物是要做什么？
Ah yes, if you don't mind me asking: Why are you buying so much food?
送给一伙快饿死的外邦人。
To feed a group of dying outlanders.
外邦人啊…怎么说呢，这些吃食还挺宝贵的，我希望它们的美味能被充分享用…你懂我意思吗？
Outlanders eh... How do I put this... This food is quite valuable, and I hope that their taste will be fully savored... You get my drift?
It's not like I'm not paying you.
话是这么说没错…但拜托你一定要让他们躺在椅子上、按步骤用餐，不然就享受不到百分百的美味了！
You may be right... but I would ask that you must have them lay back in their chairs and taste the food in order, or they won't be able to enjoy the utmost in flavors!
Isn't food for people to eat?
不不不，如果不能躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐，食物的风味就会被浪费……
No no no, if they don't lay back in chairs and eat the meal in order, the food's flavor will go to absolute waste...
I'll go to another shop then.
哎别，何必呢？我就是想说这些食物很珍贵而已，只要你躺在椅子上，按照步骤用餐就好……
Oh come on, there's no need for that. I just wanted to put emphasis on how priceless these foods are. Just make sure you lie back in your chair and savor them in order...
I'm eating them myself. How about that?
不不，没有不行，果然是英雄出少年啊。那你千万记得，要躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐……
Of course! You're definitely a hero in the height of your youth. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...
总感觉有古怪…算了，那不是我该关心的事。但你千万记得，要躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐……
Something feels off... No matter, it has nothing to do with me. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...
在克瑞斯关于进食规矩的科普中，你抱着装食物的容器跑远了。
As Kyros is rambling on fine dining practices, you've already left the vicinity, the vessels full of food bundled in your arms.
I'll take another look around here.
看得再多，你也找不到比我更好的。
You can look, but you won't find a better establishment than mine.
货比三家之后，总算意识到我所言非虚了吧？
After browsing the various shops, you must have realized that my words ring true, no?
我看看…钱数没错。稍等，我帮你打包一下。
Let's see... This is the right amount. Hold on, I'll help you pack the food.
啊对了，冒昧问一句，你买这么多食物是要做什么？

I'll go to another shop then.

I'm eating them myself. How about that?

Of course! You're definitely a hero in the height of your youth. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...
总感觉有古怪…算了，那不是我该关心的事。但你千万记得，要躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐……
Something feels off... No matter, it has nothing to do with me. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...
在克瑞斯关于进食规矩的科普中，你抱着装食物的容器跑远了。
As Kyros is rambling on fine dining practices, you've already left the vicinity, the vessels full of food bundled in your arms.
I'll take another look around here.
看得再多，你也找不到比我更好的。
You can look, but you won't find a better establishment than mine.
妈妈，我们什么时候到圣城？我要吃烤苹果派！
Mama, when will we reach the holy city? I wanna eat baked apple pie!
We'll get there in three seconds.
这不是那位灰发英雄嘛？难道……
Isn't that the gray-haired hero? Could you have...
This is for you. How about a thank-you?
Hee-hee, the holy city is here.
你交出了落满灰尘的木箱，里面的菜叶似乎比之前更蔫了。
You hand over the dust-laden wooden crate — the leaves of the vegetables within look even more withered than before.
妈妈，它们看上去好像不是很新鲜……
Mama, they don't look very fresh...
傻孩子，现在能有吃的就不错了，还奢求什么！
Silly child, having something to eat is a blessing in and of itself. You shouldn't be so picky!
多谢你为我们提供这些，英雄。我很快就会把它发给同伴们。
Thank you for supplying us with food, hero. I will distribute them to our companions quickly.
来，宝贝，你也跟这位{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}道声谢吧。
Darling, say thank you to this kind {F#lady}{M#man}.
小女孩的目光在箱子上来回游弋，总算在箱子边缘找到了一个还算新鲜的苹果。
The little girl's eyes dart back and forth over the crate, finally coming across an apple that looks relatively fresh at the edge of the box.
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，这个新鲜的给你吃。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, this fresh apple is for you.
她皮笑肉不笑地捧着那个苹果，把它塞进你的怀里。
She offers the apple with a awkward grin, thrusting it into your arms.
傻孩子，人家怎么会稀罕一个苹果呢？再说这本来就是人家的东西……
Silly child, why would our benefactors be satisfied with just an apple? And it was theirs to begin with...
还不等她把话说完，一个人影便急匆匆跑了过来。母女二人识相地选择了回避。
Before she can finish her sentence, a figure runs over in a hurry. The mother and child tactfully excuse themselves.
你交出了那几个竹篮，里面的食物虽不算珍馐，却也是这些人最需要的。
You hand over the baskets. The food inside isn't exactly delicacies, but they are just what these people need.
里面…全都是食物？而且看上去品质还不错……
It's... all food inside? And they look pretty good too...
是啊，今天我们可以做苹果馅饼了——虽然离烤苹果派还有些差距，但也不错。
Yes, honey. We can make apple tarts today... They're not baked apple pies, but they taste just as good.
多谢你为我们提供这些，英雄。我很快就会把它发给同伴们。
Thank you for supplying us with food, hero. I will distribute them to our companions quickly.
来，宝贝，你也跟这位{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}道声谢吧。
Darling, say thank you to this kind {F#lady}{M#man}.
女孩抓起篮子里最大最新鲜的苹果，笑着塞到你的怀里。
The girl grabs the biggest and freshest apple in the basket and shoves it into your hands with a grin.
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，这个最大的给你吃。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you should have the biggest one.
傻孩子，人家怎么会稀罕一个苹果呢？再说这本来就是人家的东西……
Silly child, why would our benefactors be satisfied with just an apple? And it was theirs to begin with...
还不等她把话说完，一个人影便急匆匆跑了过来。母女二人识相地选择了回避。
Before she can finish her sentence, a figure runs over in a hurry. The mother and child tactfully excuse themselves.
你交出了那几个敞口陶瓶，里面的食物无比精美、仿佛闪着金光。
You hand over the ceramic vases. The food in them is exquisite, as if radiating with flavorful light.
这…如此丰盛的食物，真是送给我们的？我不会在做梦吧……
This... such a bountiful spread, is this really for us? I'm not dreaming, am I...
妈妈，苹果派，是我最想吃的烤苹果派！
Mama, apple pie, it's the baked apple pie that I want!
傻孩子，这里比烤苹果派好吃的东西有许多，何必惦记那玩意。
Silly child, there's plenty of food more delicious than baked apple pie in here. Why fuss over a pie?
谢谢，谢谢您，您简直是我们的大英雄！我很快就会把这些发给同伴们。
Thank you, thank you, thank you! You are our hero and savior! I'll give them out to our companions right now.
您的这份恩情我们一定会回报——虽然暂时没钱，但如果有需要我们的地方，您尽管开口，我们随时乐意效劳。
We will definitely repay this favor. Though we have no money now, but if you ever have need of us, just give us the word, and we will be more than happy to help.
来，宝贝，你也跟这位{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}道声谢吧。
Darling, say thank you to this kind {F#lady}{M#man}.
女孩抓起陶瓶里最大最新鲜的苹果，笑着塞到你的怀里。
The girl grabs the biggest and freshest apple in one of the vases and thrusts it into your hands with a smile.
{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，这个最大的给你吃。
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you should have the biggest one.
如果不介意的话，您干脆留下来和我们共进佳肴吧~
If you don't mind, how about having a meal with us!
当你们沉浸在欢笑中时，一个人影急匆匆跑了过来。母女二人识相地选择了回避。
While everyone revels in their joy, a figure hurriedly rushes over. The mother and child tactfully excuse themselves.
不好了，英雄！吾师，吾师他，他…药，药！
Grave news, hero! Master, Master, h—he... med, medi—!
我就知道他不让人省心！
I knew he was gonna be a handful!
…不要在这个时候念诵法吉娜的咒语啊！
...Now's not the time to chant one of Phagousa's curses!
呼…呼…好，冷静了。你仔细听我说……
Fuu... Hooo... All right, I'm calm. You have to listen carefully...
最开始，吾师说自己有门路搞到药，但必须由我把药带出城。他为我指明一处小巷，让我在一刻钟后回来拿药……

In the beginning, Master said he had a way to get the medicine, but I had to be the one to transport it out of the city. He directed me to an alley, and told me to return to take the medicine from him when a quint had passed...
我看时间还早，就打算先去整点东西吃，结果等吃完都快到践行时了。我连忙冲出店面，往那条街跑……
There was still some time, so I decided to find something to eat, but when I was done, it was almost Action Hour. I dashed out of the shop and headed toward the alley...
没跑多久，我就看见吾师跟三个卫兵走在一起——虽然吾师没有戴上镣铐，但看表情就知道，他一定是被迫的。
I didn't get far before I saw Master walking with three guards. He wasn't cuffed, but I knew from his expression that he wasn't with them out of choice.
我一路跟踪那帮卫兵，发现他们居然把吾师押去了<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的上层</color>！那里人多眼杂，我没法靠得太近，只好回来找你商量对策。

I tailed the guards and found that they had detained Master on the <color=#dbc291ff>upper levels of Marmoreal Palace</color>! There were a lot of people there, and I couldn't get close, so I hurried back to discuss a plan with you.
哦对，之后我确实在那个小巷里找到了药，你说神奇不神奇？
Oh yes, I did find the medicine in that alley after all that. It was a curious turn of events.
肯定没有，不然我哪有机会来到这里？
I'm pretty sure I wasn't — I wouldn't have been able to return otherwise.
多亏吾师恰是时候地引开了卫兵的注意…你是和黄金裔并肩作战过的英雄，求你帮吾师做做解释吧，卫兵们肯定会听的！

It was fortunate that Master distracted the guards when he had the chance... You're the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. Please, you have to explain Master's case to them. I'm sure the guards will listen!
有没有想过药是哪来的？
You ever thought about how the medicine got there?
吾师让我去小巷里拿药，然后他就被抓走了，难道说……
Master bade me retrieve the medicine from the alley, and then he was arrested by them. Don't tell me...
不，这里面肯定有什么误会…你是和黄金裔并肩作战过的英雄，求你帮吾师做做解释吧，卫兵们肯定会听的！
No, there must be some misunderstanding here... You're the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. Please, you have to explain Master's case to them. I'm sure the guards will listen!
吾师不是穷凶极恶的罪犯！这里面肯定有什么误会……
Master is not some nefarious criminal! There must be some misunderstanding...
我是他的弟子，卫兵们肯定不会听我解释。但你是和黄金裔并肩作战过的英雄——求你帮吾师说说情吧！
I am his student, the guards will never listen to me. But you're the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs — please talk to the guards on behalf of Master!
说罢，帕拉滕便掏出药袋、向受伤的外邦人跑去……
With that said, Palaten takes out the medicine pouch and runs in the wounded outlanders' direction...
苏克提瑞斯被抓走了…不排除误会的可能，但还是跟他当面问清楚比较好。
Soctires has been captured... A misunderstanding's not beyond possibility, but it'd be better if I asked him in person.
帕拉滕说他被关在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的上层</color>，应该不难找。
Palaten said he's being detained on the <color=#dbc291ff>upper floors of Marmoreal Palace</color>, so he shouldn't be hard to find.
我的腿…它还在吗？我有些…没知觉了……
My leg... Is it still there? I can't... seem to feel it...
你撑住啊，他们已经搞到药了，你很快就会好起来的…别睡，别睡！
Hang in there. They have the medicine. You'll get well in no time... Don't sleep!
忍着点，我这就帮你包扎伤口。
Bear with it. I'll help you bandage your wound.
Hold it, what are you doing?
不认识我了？是我杀了疯王！
Don't recognize me? I'm the one who slew the Mad King!
我来看看被你们关押的犯人。
I'm here to see the prisoner you detained.
原来是和两位黄金裔并肩作战的异邦英雄，失礼了。
It's the outlander hero who fought alongside the two Chrysos Heirs. My apologies.
作为贵客，您可以破例探视一小会儿。等时间到了，我会来通知您。
I can bend the rules for a short visit for an esteemed guest. I will inform you when time's up.
这个房间的布设相当舒适，没有铁栅栏或其他限制手段，为被关押者保留了最后的体面。
This room's layout is quite cozy. There are no bars nor restraining devices — a modicum of respect has been left for whoever gets detained here.
苏克提瑞斯的眼神有些躲闪，似乎并不愿被你看到这副模样。
Soctires' eyes are somewhat avoidant, as if he is reluctant to have you see him in this state.
即便我不说，相信你也能猜到大概——为了帮外邦人找到药品，我溜进了圣城存放物资的仓库。
I believe you have already guessed the gist of it, even if I don't say anything — to help the outlanders secure medicine, I slipped into the holy city's supply warehouse.
帕拉滕说你被卫兵抓了。
Palaten said you were caught by the guards.
他没有说谎。至于被抓的原因，即便我不说，相信你也能猜到大概……
He wasn't lying. As for the reason I was caught, even if I said nothing, I'm sure you can guess the gist of it...
为了帮外邦人找到药品，我溜进了圣城存放物资的仓库。
To help the outlanders secure medicine, I slipped into the holy city's supply warehouse.
I didn't want to come initially.
是啊，谁会愿意跟嫌犯扯上关系呢——为了帮外邦人找到药品，我溜进了圣城存放物资的仓库。
Yes, who would want to be involved with a suspect... To help the outlanders secure medicine, I slipped into the holy city's supply warehouse.
这是偷窃，我很清楚自己在做非法之事。如今这番下场，也算是我咎由自取。
It is theft. I understand very well that I was committing a crime. As for how it ended, it was simply my just deserts.
但要说是否值得，我唯一的遗憾就是没能把更多药品运送出城、交给那些需要的人……
As to whether it was worth it, my only regret is that I didn't manage to transport more medicine out of the city into the hands of those who need it...
抱歉，我辜负了你们的期待。之前承诺说请你吃饭，大概也要食言了。
I'm sorry for disappointing you. I may have to renege on that promise to treat you to a meal.
当时一定有更好的办法。
There must have been a better way.
是啊，作为旁观者，我们当然可以拿出一万个理由说服自己：只要再等等，总会有更好的办法出现。
Of course. As an onlooker, we can always find myriad reasons to convince ourselves, that a better idea would surface if we just waited a while longer.
但那些需要帮助的人等不了，我也等不了——我是个老人，老人知道自己不剩多少时间，所以也没多少耐心。
But those who need help can't wait, and neither could I. I am an old man — I don't have the luxury of time nor patience.
有必要做到这种地步吗？
Was there a need to go this far?
不止你有这份疑惑：作为公民，为什么我要冒着失去一切的风险，去帮助一群陌生人呢？
You're not the only one with this question: As a citizen, why did I risk everything to help a bunch of strangers?
因为我也希望在陷入困境时，能有人来拉我一把。
Because I, too, hope that in my time of need, someone will lend me a hand.
曾有贤者说，「想要别人善待你，你得先善待别人。」这话我觉得很受用。
A sage once said: "If you want someone to be kind to you, you must first be kind to others." I think this is most appropriate here.
当然，总有人觉得自己不会陷入困境。只是…谁又能保证奥赫玛的城墙能永远挺立呢？
Of course, there are always people who think they'll never find themselves in hardship. Except... who can ensure that Okhema's city walls will stand tall forever?
What're you going to do now?
按照圣城法律，他们将对我进行审判，结果大概率不会仁慈。
According to the holy city's laws, they will make me stand trial. There's a high chance they won't be lenient.
坚持正确的事也要付出代价，何况我只是为了满足自己的施救欲，并不能代表正确。我已做好了接受惩罚的准备。
The price must be paid for doing the right thing, even more so for an ambiguously moral act like mine conducted to sate my own savior complex. I am fully ready to accept its consequences.
在最后的时刻到来前，我唯一的愿望就是能再吃一个苹果。
Before the final moment arrives, my only wish is to eat another apple.
是的，苹果是我最爱的食物。「每天一苹果，医生远离我」。
Yes, apples are my favorite food. "An apple a day keeps the doctor away."
可惜咱们的交流没能再深一些，不然我一定会和你探讨苹果的美味，以及其他更多事情……
'Tis a pity we didn't get to know each other better, otherwise I would surely discuss the wonderful flavor of apples with you, along with many other matters...
（说起来，重渊的小女孩还真送了我一个苹果…要交给他吗？）
(That reminds me, that girl in the Abyss gave me an apple... Should I give it to him?)
哦，你居然会随身携带苹果？这可是贤者的十大必备特质之一，你很上道嘛！
Oh, you actually have an apple on you? This is one of the ten essential idiosyncrasies among sages. You learn fast!
谢谢…如此一来，我也就没什么遗憾了。
Thank you... I will have no regrets now.
苏克提瑞斯美美地吃起了苹果。吃到一半时，门口的卫兵走了进来。
Soctires gleefully crunches down on the apple. When he's halfway through eating, the cell's guard walks in.
你没有给出那个苹果，苏克提瑞斯苍白地笑笑，低下了头。似乎也没什么可聊了。
You don't give him the apple. Soctires smiles palely and lowers his head — there is nothing left to be said.
在一片沉默中，门口的卫兵走了进来。
The cell's guard enters, cutting through that thick silence.
探视时间结束了，异邦的英雄，请回吧。
Visiting time is over. Outlander hero, it is time to leave.
What fate is in store for him?
这不是我能决定的，要看公民法庭会给出怎样的意见。
It is not up to me to decide. The public court will handle him.
据苏克提瑞斯说，他闯入圣城仓库，是为了帮助一伙受伤的外邦人——我们已经派人去查证了。这可能会影响他的量刑。
According to Soctires, he trespassed on the holy city's warehouse, all to help a group of wounded outlanders. We have already dispatched people to investigate. This may affect his sentencing.
审判将在三天后的<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒广场</color>举行。届时也请您一同出席，见证圣城律法的公正。
The trial will be held at the <color=#dbc291ff>Kephale Plaza</color> in three days. We also invite you to attend, to witness the justice of the holy city's law.
我是来自黎明云崖的元老伊特罗，{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的祭司。我谨代表元老院的意志，前来主持这场审判。
I am Elder Etro from Dawncloud, priest of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}. I am presiding over this trial representing the will of the Council of Elders.
今天我们聚在这里，是因为受人尊敬的公共讲师，苏克提瑞斯，闯进了圣城仓库行窃。
The reason we are gathered here today is that the dearly respected public speaker, Soctires, trespassed on the holy city's warehouse and committed theft.
按律法所言，偷窃应处以禁闭之刑。但考虑到作案动机，本案又不能简单依照先例判罚。
According to law, theft is a crime punishable by imprisonment. But in light of the motive of this case, it cannot be so easily judged based on precedent.
因此，今天我们遵循传统、召开公民法庭，由在场的诸位代表作出裁决。愿塔兰顿的公正与我们同在。
And so, as per the tradition that we uphold, we have opened up the public court, for everyone present to be the judge. May Talanton's justice be with us.
公民们纷纷为这番开场词鼓起掌来，直到元老示意掌声止息。
The citizens' applause rise in a crescendo in response to this opening, till the Elder gestures for the clapping to cease.
本案的争议在于，苏克提瑞斯之所以铤而走险，是为了救助一伙受伤的外邦人。然而，这是否能成为他减刑乃至免罪的理由？

The controversy in this case lies in the fact that Soctires risked his own well-being to help a group of wounded outlanders. However, is this enough reason for his sentence to be reduced, or even acquitted?
站在我右手边的是控方代表，仓库的主人，富人拉莱德。他认为应当重判，以免再有物资流出城外。
To my right is the prosecution's representative and owner of the warehouse, the wealthy Liluder. He believes that the punishment should be harsh, to prevent future supplies from leaving the city.
站在我左手边的是辩方代表，嫌犯的弟子，学者帕拉滕。他认为考虑到嫌犯确实救了许多人命，应当轻判。

To my left is the defendant's representative and student of the accused, Scholar Palaten. He believes that the sentence should be light, considering the actions of the accused did indeed save many lives.
双方均已提交了书面文件。在辩论开始之前，现场有哪位公民要提问吗？
Both parties have submitted their documents. Before the trial starts, do any citizens present have any questions?
作为罪人，我申请先对诸位公民说几句话。
As the sinner, I request to say a few words to everyone present.
哎呀，你这老头，都被抓了还打算妖言惑众？
Hey, old fart, you were caught red-handed, and you're still trying to charm your way out of this?
拉莱德，苏克提瑞斯有发言的权利。
Liluder, Soctires has the right to speak.
苏克提瑞斯清了清嗓子，他的眼神仿佛一头被困在泥潭里的大地兽——这种生物临死前的反应不是暴怒，而是眼眶湿润。
Soctires clears his throat, his eyes mirroring a dromas ensnared in swampy mud — when such a creature is on the verge of death, its eyes are not one of wrath, but wet with tears.
在遥远的黄金年代，我们曾经以城邦为界、彼此分立；在并不遥远的纷争年代，我们又以城邦为由、彼此交战…这段历史大家应该很熟悉。

In the golden age long past, we were once divided as city-states, separate from one another. In the warring age not-so-long past, we once again divided ourselves as city-states, which became the reason for our battles... I'm sure everyone is very familiar with this stretch of history.
然而黑潮不会分辨城邦。在它眼里，我们都只是人，是弱小的存在。如今世上已经没有其他城邦了，那些我们熟知的名字早就消散在了风中。

But the black tide does not discriminate between cities. In its eyes, we are all humans, insignificant existences. In the present day, there are no other cities left, their names that which we are oh-so familiar scattered to the winds.
所以，外邦人其实并不存在——外邦是哪个邦？摆在我们面前的，只有要不要帮助一群需要帮助的人而已。
Which is why, in reality, outlanders don't exist — which city do they hail from? The question posed before us is merely about whether we want to help a group of people who need it.
至于我的罪名，完全不值得多费口舌。我可以接受惩罚，只希望各位能抓住这个机会、把当下的问题聊清楚——
As for my crime, precious time need not be spent on it. I can accept the punishment, but I only hope that everyone will take this chance to discuss the current question with clarity...
圣城对弱者到底该是何态度？我们究竟要把这座永恒之城引向何方？以上，再次感谢伊特罗大人。
What stance exactly does the holy city take with the underprivileged? Where exactly are we leading this Eternal City? That's all. I thank Elder Etro again for this chance.
那么，在辩论开始前，现场有哪位公民要提问吗？
Now then, before the trial starts, do any citizens present have any questions?
其实我很好奇，灰发的贵客对此会有何见解？作为和黄金裔并肩作战过的英雄，你的想法至关重要。
I am curious: How does our gray-haired guest view this situation? As the hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs, your thoughts may be of crucial import.
（在大地兽工坊的那场骚乱中，我选择了<color=#dbc291ff>为那个外邦人撑腰</color>，因此受到了苏克提瑞斯的赏识……）
(During the turmoil that occurred in the dromas workshop, I chose to <color=#dbc291ff>support the outlander</color> and thus gained Soctires' appreciation...)
（在大地兽工坊的那场骚乱中，我选择了<color=#dbc291ff>声讨那个外邦人</color>，但他还是被苏克提瑞斯解了围。）
(During the turmoil that occurred in the dromas workshop, I chose to <color=#dbc291ff>go against the outlander</color>, but Soctires still managed to sort everything out for him.)
（在大地兽工坊的那场骚乱中，我<color=#dbc291ff>没有支持任何一方</color>，只是静看事态发展。）
(During the turmoil that occurred in the dromas workshop, I <color=#dbc291ff>didn't support anyone</color> and just quietly watched things unfold.)
（后来苏克提瑞斯邀请我详谈此事。在云石天宫的浴池里，我表达了<color=#dbc291ff>对外邦人的同情</color>。）
(Later, Soctires invited me to discuss this. I professed my <color=#dbc291ff>sympathies toward the outlanders</color> at the bath in the Marmoreal Palace.)
（后来苏克提瑞斯邀请我详谈此事。在云石天宫的浴池里，我表达了<color=#dbc291ff>对外邦人的反感</color>。）
(Later, Soctires invited me to discuss this. I professed my <color=#dbc291ff>repulsion toward the outlanders</color> at the bath in the Marmoreal Palace.)
（后来苏克提瑞斯邀请我详谈此事。在云石天宫的浴池里，我表达了<color=#dbc291ff>中立且客观的态度</color>。）
(Later, Soctires invited me to discuss this. I professed my <color=#dbc291ff>impartiality</color> at the bath in the Marmoreal Palace.)
（再后来，我们在重渊遇见了那些需要帮助的外邦人。我为他们购买了<color=#dbc291ff>劣质的食物</color>。）
(After that, we once again met in the abyss the outsiders who needed aid in the abyss. There, I bought the outlanders some <color=#dbc291ff>low-quality meals</color>.)
（再后来，我们在重渊遇见了那些需要帮助的外邦人。我为他们购买了<color=#dbc291ff>物美价廉的食物</color>。）
(After that, we once again met in the abyss the outsiders who needed aid. There, I bought the outlanders some <color=#dbc291ff>meals that were a good bargain</color>.)
（再后来，我们在重渊遇见了那些需要帮助的外邦人。我为他们购买了<color=#dbc291ff>非常丰盛的食物</color>。）
(After that, we once again met in the abyss the outsiders who needed aid. There, I bought the outlanders some <color=#dbc291ff>luxurious meals</color>.)
这么看，我一直以来的观点还是挺明显的……
From what I did, I think my standpoint is pretty obvious...
你抬起头，苏克提瑞斯露出释然的眼神，仿佛在说：「小友，遵循你内心的态度就好」。
You raise your head, meeting Soctires' gaze of respite, as if saying: "Young friend, stay true to your heart."
支持学者帕拉滕的辩护。
我支持学者帕拉滕的观点。为救人性命而犯下的错误，不应完全按照罪行看待。
I support Scholar Palaten's point. Mistakes incurred from saving lives should not be solely judged as a crime.
我曾亲眼见过那些外邦人，他们确实处在危机之中。如果不是苏克提瑞斯为他们搞到了药，后果不堪设想。
I once saw those outlanders with my own eyes, and they were indeed in dire danger. If not for Soctires securing medicine for them, the consequences would have been unimaginable.
In light of this reason, I believe that...
啥？这么严重的事情，无罪？！还有王法吗？还有法律吗？
What? Not guilty of such a heinous crime!? Does the law even exist in your eyes?
好家伙，吾师果然没看错你。
Hah, Master wasn't wrong about you at all.
支持富人拉莱德的控诉。
我认为拉莱德说得有道理。无论是否出于善意，人总要为他做过的事负责。
I think Liluder speaks true. Regardless of motive, he has to be responsible for his actions.
这个世界上不缺少因善而生的恶。倘若动机能替行为辩护，那谁都会说自己「本意是好的」。
This world has no lack of evil borne of compassion. If motives could replace a defense, everyone would say their "intentions are good."
In light of this reason, I believe that...
The sentencing should be imposed according to law.
The sentencing should be imposed more harshly.
这…偷盗的最高量刑也不过是监禁而已啊！
Wha... The harshest punishment for theft is at best imprisonment!
{F#好丫头}{M#好小子}，我就知道你是深明大义之人。
{F#Lass}{M#Lad}, I knew you were a righteous character.
（如果我选择中立，就没法在二人接下来的辩论中插嘴。我真要放弃站台发言的机会吗？）
(If I choose to stay neutral, I won't be able to jump into their debate. Do I really want to abandon a chance to speak at the podium?)
It might be better to support one or the other...
Better not get involved in this matter...
我要保留自己的态度，这场审判我不会支持任何一方。
I will maintain my own stance and not support any side in this trial.
那么，双方代表可以开始辩论了。
Now then, both parties can begin their debate.
元老话音刚落，两位代表就像竞技场上的角斗士般对峙起来，吵得唾沫横飞。直到双方都精疲力尽、口干舌燥，局面才有所缓和……

As soon as the Elder ends his last word, both representatives face off like gladiators in an arena, their verbosity locked in fury and spit. It isn't until both sides have exhausted their energy and spittle, that the situation finally begins to calm down...
真是一场激烈的辩论。接下来，请大家投票表决……
What an intense clash of words. Next, will everyone please vote on their decision...
在那之前，介意我补充几句吗？
Before that, may I add a few words?
…小灰毛，我原以为你身为外邦英雄，在诸位公民面前必有高论——没想到，竟然如此胡搅蛮缠！
...Gray Hair, you're supposed to be an outlander hero who must have something grandiose to say before the people. I never figured you for a jabbering troublemaker!
拉莱德代表，如果你有异议，还请堂堂正正地驳倒{F#她}{M#他}。
Representative Liluder, if you have any objections, please respond to {F#her}{M#him} without contempt.
哼，众所周知，偷盗犯法，何况是把管控品倒卖给外邦人——这怎么能算善举呢？明明是罪加一等才对。
Hmph, as everyone knows, theft is a crime, let alone selling regulated goods to outlanders. How can this be considered a benevolent act? There should be another charge slapped on top of his crime.
要我说，就应该直接处死苏克提瑞斯，这样才能威慑潜在的犯罪分子。
If it were up to me, I would have Soctires executed. That'll set an example for other potential criminals.
拉莱德，不要公报私仇！大家都知道你对吾师怀恨在心，只因他拆穿了你诬陷外邦人的伎俩！
Liluder, this is not a place to pursue personal vengeance! Everyone knows you've always hated Master, all because he thwarted your petty attempt to frame the outlanders!
我这是在为奥赫玛的利益着想。否则还不等下个门扉时到来，圣城仓库就要被搬空了。
I only have Okhema's interests at heart. Otherwise, by the next Entry Hour, the holy city's warehouse would have been plundered clean!
（现场有这么多人…或许我应该试着调动这些公民的情绪。）
(So many people present... Maybe I should try to appeal to the public's emotions.)
He should be executed just because you say so?
你说处死，问过元老的意见了吗？这案子到底该怎么判，可不是你能决定的，不然我们还站在这搞什么公民法庭？趁早回家算了。

You speak of execution, but have you asked for the Elder's opinion yet? If you had the final say on this trial's outcome, why would we even need to stand here in front of a public court? Might as well call it a day.
依照圣城法律，偷盗的最高量刑是监禁，确实罪不至死。
According to the holy city's laws, the heaviest punishment for theft is imprisonment, not execution.
我、我没有跟元老和法律作对的意思……
I—I have no intention of defying the Elder and the law...
He stood to gain nothing from his acts.
卖给外邦人？那群外邦人穷得叮当响，找你销赃都比找他们靠谱——你为富不仁，但确实富啊。
Selling to outlanders? Those outlanders were penniless — he would've done much better fencing the food to you instead. You may have gotten rich unscrupulously, but the fact is that you are rich.
据圣城护卫查证，没有发生金钱交易的痕迹。请控方代表不要假定事实。
According to the city guard's findings, there was no evidence of any monetary transaction. I will ask the prosecution not to make any frivolous assumptions.
咳…我们换个话题，换个话题。
Ahem... Let us change the subject then.
It was his own ability that determined the theft's success.
你以为谁都能从圣城仓库里偷东西吗？你们的安保这么不严密？
You think anyone can waltz into the holy city's warehouse and plunder its supplies? Is your security that lax?
他偷药，既是为了救人，也是为了检验圣城仓库的防御——果然发现问题了吧？你们不想着加强防范，反倒要治他的罪？

He stole the medicine not only to save lives, but also to ascertain the warehouse's security measures. And there was a problem found, was there not? You never thought to strengthen your security, but seek to punish him instead?
公民们陷入了短暂的沉默，主要是因为你的发言太过「新锐」，没人能理解其逻辑。
The citizens fall into a temporary silence, mainly because your argument is too avant-garde for them to grasp its logic.
…什么歪理？他能凭本事偷药，我们也能凭本事处死他啊。
...What rubbish reasoning is this? If he wielded his ability to steal medicine, it is within our ability to sentence him to death.
异邦的英雄，请不要假定事实。这个话题就先过去，控方代表可以继续发言。
Outlander hero, please do not make any assumptions. We shall pass on this subject for now. Will the prosecution representative continue his argument.
以黄金裔盗取火种打比方。
Use the Chrysos Heirs stealing Coreflame as an example.
我听说黄金裔以搜集火种、拯救世界为己任，必须向泰坦发起狩猎。苏克提瑞斯的做法和他们相比又有何不同？
I hear that the Chrysos Heirs saw it their duty to gather Coreflame and save the world, to declare a hunt against the Titans. Is what Soctires did any different from theirs?
倘若为了救人而偷盗是大罪，难道你要说现在的奥赫玛建立在不义之上吗？否则，为什么黄金裔是英雄，苏克提瑞斯却成了罪人？
If stealing to save lives is such a heinous crime, are you insinuating that the present Okhema was built on injustice? If not, why are the Chrysos Heirs heralded as heroes, but Soctires a criminal?
呵呵，你可不要搞错。那些泰坦们要么陷入疯狂、要么无所作为，这才导致生灵涂炭。
Heh-heh, don't get it wrong. Those Titans were either mired in madness, or simply did nothing. That was what caused the devastation of life.
黄金裔搜集夺火种，既是为了将泰坦解放，也是为了帮众人博得一线生机。这叫名正言顺。
The Chrysos Heirs gathered Coreflame to liberate the Titans and pave a possible path for survival for all mortals. It is perfectly justified.
可我们圣城公民哪里对不起外邦人了？我们有害过他们吗？我们只是不让他们进城而已。
But when have our holy city's citizens mistreated outlanders? Have we harmed them? We merely turned them away at the city gates.
观众们陷入了议论——其中不乏其他泰坦的信徒。而伊特罗听到这个话题则是有些尴尬，不知该如何开口。
The audience is engrossed in discussion — scattered among them are many disciples of other Titans. And Etro, somewhat embarrassed by this subject, struggles to find his voice.
…二位，有关黄金裔和泰坦的话题未免太过敏感，还是别再提及为好……
...Both parties, subjects regarding the Chrysos Heirs and Titans may be too sensitive to discuss. It would be best not to pursue this line of reasoning...
…退一步说。假如苏克提瑞斯真是善心泛滥，看不得外邦人受苦，那他为什么不自掏腰包？
...I'll take a step back and assert this: If Soctires was really overcome with compassion, unwilling to further witness the outlanders' plight, why did he not use his own assets?
就算他捐出全部家当，也不过是他个人的自由。但他不该拿我们全体公民的东西，奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用！

Even if he donated his entire fortune, that would be his personal freedom to do so. But he should not have taken property that belongs to the people. Okhema's property is only for the people of Okhema!
How do you define an Okheman?
你的意思是，奥赫玛人生来就是奥赫玛人？只要你睁开眼时不在墙内，这辈子就没机会加入圣城了？
You mean, an Okheman is determined the moment they are born? If, the first time you open your eyes, you aren't within city walls, you'll never have a chance to join the holy city?
别忘了，拯救这里的黄金裔英雄中还有几个外邦人呢！
Don't forget, the Chrysos Heirs who saved this city contain outlanders!
你…不要质疑我对英雄们的感恩！万敌勇士乃是悬锋城王储，白厄勇士更是命定的救世主。
You— Do not undermine my gratitude for the heroes! Warrior Mydei is the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos, and Warrior Phainon is the destined Deliverer.
<size=28>他们为奥赫玛带来的贡献，一万个外邦人都比不上！</size>
<size=28>The contributions they have made to Okhema... not even ten thousand outlanders can dream of garnering!</size>
拉莱德这话看似正确，实则是用空话强词夺理，引来了台下鄙夷的目光。
It may seem that Liluder's words are true, but it is nothing but a strawman argument that has attracted disdainful stares from the onlookers.
It's not like the supplies are going anywhere.
物资不就是拿来用的？难不成一直放在仓库里等着发霉？还不如拿去给需要的人呢。
Aren't supplies supposed to be used? You're going to just let it collect mold in the warehouse? Might as well give it to those who really need it.
嘿，你怕是不知道什么叫战略物资。我可以不用，但不能没有！
Ha, you don't know the first thing about wartime supplies. I may not need to use them, but they must always be available!
黑潮的威胁仍旧很大，我们必须随时保持战备状态。难道你要让那些与黑潮对抗的战士得不到药吗？
The black tide's threat looms ever so great. We must always be ready for battle. Are you going to deprive our warriors battling the black tide of precious medicine?
想到这个场景，公民们纷纷表现得义愤填膺。你的发言显然为拉莱德递了刀子……
Indignation gradually crosses the citizens' faces when they imagine this scenario. Your statement has obviously given Liluder the upper hand...
那你又为奥赫玛出过多少力？
And how much have you contributed to Okhema?
那在之前的圣城保卫战中，身为奥赫玛人的你又为奥赫玛做了什么贡献呢？
In the last battle of the holy city's defense, what contributions did you make for Okhema, as an Okheman?
不说亲自上阵作战，你有出资帮助灾后重建吗？你做到过所谓「奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用」吗？
Forget about personal deployment — Did you offer resources to help rebuild in the aftermath? Did you hold true to your previous declaration that "Okhema's property is only for Okhemans"?
你？你、你…真是哪壶不开提哪壶！
You? You, you... stop your slander!
作为本地富户，拉莱德完美符合对「为富不仁」的所有刻板印象：贪得无厌、趾高气扬、一毛不拔……
As a local affluent, Liluder perfectly embodies the stereotypical "unscrupulous rich" person: Greedy, pompous, miserly...
观众们回想起拉莱德平日的作为，纷纷开始骂他，直到元老厉声制止。
Recalling Liluder's usual behavior, the spectators start berating him, till the Elder calls for order.
…对案情的讨论不应上升到人身攻击。请两位用更加健康的方式提出观点。
...Discussion about the case should not give rise to personal attacks. I will ask both parties to present their arguments in a more cordial manner.
我建议你学习刻法勒的品德。
I suggest you learn from Kephale's virtues.
照你这么说，刻法勒何必捧着那太阳？他又不需要光照，难道是吃饱了撑的？
If it is as you say, why did Kephale carry the sun? He doesn't need sunlight. What, he had nothing better to do?
你有没有想过，如果所有人都像你一样自私，谁来将黎明背负？奥赫玛又怎么能成为永恒之城？
You ever gave a second thought about this? If everyone was as selfish as you, who would bear the burden of dawn? How would Okhema even become the Eternal City?
这话说得直击要害。人们纷纷看向远处的黎明机器，以及将黎明托起的刻法勒——它的精神确实值得学习。

This point strikes true and draws blood. Heads gradually turn towards the Dawn Device in the distance, and Kephale, who supported the dawn on their shoulders through sheer will — their spirit is truly worth emulating.
这…你总不能要求每个人都那么做。
This... You can't expect everyone to perform such ridiculous feats.
承认吧，拉莱德，只有你做不到而已。
Admit it, Liluder, you're the only one who can't live up to this ideal.
好好好…换个话题，换个话题总行吧？
Fine, fine... Let's change the subject. We can do that, can't we?
谁都知道圣城资源有限，经不起挥霍。苏克提瑞斯把我们的财富交给外邦人，必然会导致公民生活水平的下降。
Everyone knows the holy city's resources are limited — they can't be expended unnecessarily. Soctires gave our wealth to outlanders. That will surely impact the living standards of our citizens.
在对抗黑潮的战争中，怜悯是无用的品质。为了保卫我们的生活，必须对苏克提瑞斯和他的外邦朋友们不留情面！
In the war against the black tide, mercy is a useless quality. To safeguard our lives, we must not show mercy to Soctires and his outlander friends!
不要搞错了敌人的身份。
Do not mistake the enemy's identity.
照你这么说，外邦人也算敌人了？明明我们应该和他们团结对外，一同抵抗黑潮才对。
So you mean that outlanders are enemies too? We should be united with them against external threats, to fend off the black tide together.
外邦人是没有攻打圣城，但他们也没有守护圣城呀。奥赫玛是因为它的公民才得以幸存，轮不到外邦人来摘桃子！
The outlanders did not attack the city, but they also did not partake in its defense. Okhema survived because of her citizens — no outlander should deserve to reap her blessings!
听到可能被外人占便宜，在场的公民激动了起来。他们高呼着对拉莱德表示支持，全然没意识到他本人或许才是那个摘桃子的家伙。

Upon hearing that they might be taken advantage of by outsiders, the present crowd gets riled up. They hoot and holler in support of Liluder, oblivious to the fact that they might just be the ones reaping said blessings.
What about after the war, then?
我去过一座名叫雅利洛的城邦，他们还没从对抗风雪的战斗中获胜，却已经有了重建家园的计划——这是你从没考虑过的。

I went to a city-state called Jarilo, where they had never triumphed in the battle against the storm, yet they already had plans to rebuild their home... This is something you have never once considered.
只要假以时日，外邦人创造的资源总会比消耗的多，公民的生活也会因此改善。难道你们不想看见那一天吗？
As long as time flows, the resources that outlanders create will one day exceed their consumption, and the citizens' lives will be improved. Do you all not wish to see such a day?
你、你这说法未免太理想化了……
Y—Your rhetoric reeks of sheer idealism...
拉莱德试图挽回局势，却不能阻止公民们畅想那副画面。是啊，还有什么比团结一致、共创财富更振奋人心呢？
Liluder's attempts to salvage the momentum, but he can't stop the crowd from imagining that possibility. Yes, what else would inspire people more than a united front and creating shared fortunes?
You're not afraid of an outlander revolt?
你该不会以为，只要对外邦人冷眼相待，公民的生活水平就不会下降了吧？
You aren't presuming that as long you treat the outlanders coldly, the citizens' livelihoods won't be affected, are you?
人是会反抗的。即使人们眼中的弱者，被逼到份上时也会引发冲突。从功利角度看，帮助并安抚他们才是最划算的选择。
People will revolt. Even the meek will bare their fangs when forced into a corner. From a pragmatic perspective, assisting and placating them is the most economical choice.
那…那是因为圣城一直以来都太过仁慈了。对付这种暴民，就该出重拳才对！
That... That is because the holy city has been far too magnanimous. An iron fist is required in quashing dissidents!
拉莱德放着狠话，公民们却陷入了沉思。说到底，这不过是在衡量得失罢了，没人愿意见到双输的局面。

Liluder's harsh words hang in the air, but the citizens are deep in their own thoughts. Fundamentally speaking, it is but a matter of evening out loss and gain — no one wishes for a lose-lose situation.
给他一点小小的「毁灭」震撼。
Give him a little taste of Destruction.
你冷笑着看向拉莱德，仿佛凶兽在打量一只羔羊。这股威压让他不自觉打了个哆嗦。
You smile chillingly at Liluder, like a vicious beast sizing up a lamb. He reflexively shudders before your oppressive intent.
你、你要干什么？这里可不是竞技场啊！
Wh—What are you doing? This isn't an arena!
人早晚是要死的，这座城邦也终会被攻破——我见过太多类似的事了。
Everyone dies sooner or later. This city will inevitably fall as well. I have seen such similar outcomes too many times.
物资这种东西，死了也带不走。为什么不趁着还拥有当下，多跟别人分享分享呢？
Supplies can't be taken with you when you're dead. Why shouldn't we seize the present and share them with whomever we can?
此话一出，不光拉莱德，在场公民们的表情也变得无比复杂。你的观点大概不会有人反对，但绝对不会有人支持。

With these words, not just Liluder, but the expressions of everyone present become indescribably twisted. Your standpoint will probably not be challenged, but it definitely won't be favored by any either.
咳…灰发的英雄，我们只是盟友，你越界了。
Ahem... Gray-haired hero, we are only allies. You've crossed a line.
随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了拉莱德的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，感到热情高涨……
As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Liluder's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the exchange that just happened, fervor still pulsing through them...
不知不觉间，你已经代替了帕拉滕的辩方代表之位，而且获得了更多支持。
Before realizing it, you've replaced Palaten as the defense attorney and garnered more support.
随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了拉莱德的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，感到义愤填膺……
As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Liluder's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the exchange that just happened, indignation aflame within them...
不知不觉间，你已经代替了帕拉滕的辩方代表之位，但并没有获得多数人的支持。
Before realizing it, you've replaced Palaten as the defense attorney, but failed to garner the support of the majority.
那么，讨论结束，请各位投票……
Well, the discussion has concluded. Everyone please cast your vote...
在结束之前，介意我补充几句吗？
Before we conclude, may I add a few words?
为什么…为什么啊？你不是和我们一起去了重渊吗？你明明亲眼看见了一切，却还是……
Why... But why? Did you not go with us to the abyss? You clearly witnessed it for yourself, yet...
哎哎，少在那假惺惺的，好像人家跟你多熟一样。说不定{F#她}{M#他}就是因为亲眼看见了才做出这个决定的呢。
Hey, hey, stop with your crocodile tears and pretending that you're so close. Maybe {F#she}{M#he} made this decision precisely because of what was witnessed.
帕拉滕代表，如果你有异议，还请堂堂正正地驳倒{F#她}{M#他}。
Representative Palaten, if you have any objections, please openly refute {F#her}{M#him}.
首先，吾师是为了救人性命才出此下策。虽触犯法律，却已是那种情况下的最优解。
Firstly, my teacher only resorted to such measures in order to save lives. He may have violated the law, but it was the best possible solution under the given circumstances.
希望各位公民在判断时考虑到吾师面对的难题，不要对施助者过于严苛。永恒之城不应该是一座冰冷如铁的城邦。

I implore the citizens to take into account the challenges my teacher faced when passing judgment, and not to be overly harsh on those who offered aid. The Eternal City is not a cold and iron-hearted state.
（现场有这么多人…或许我应该试着调动这些公民的情绪。）
(So many people present... Maybe I should try to appeal to the public's emotions.)
你觉得自己能代表奥赫玛？
You think you're qualified to represent Okhema?
圣城应该什么样，是你说了算的吗？你能代表全部奥赫玛人？这座城邦到底是冰冷如铁还是热烈如火，应该由它的公民来评价才对。
Who are you to decide what the holy city should be? Can you represent all Okhemans? Whether this state is cold as steel or fiery with passion, it's up to its citizens to judge.
我说的是应然，不是实然——你不要混淆这两者的区别！
I'm talking about what should be, not what is — do not confuse the distinction between the two!
公民们哪有闲心分辨专业词汇的区别？作为「说人话」的奖赏，你得到了如雷的掌声。
How can the citizens even tell the difference in semantics? As a reward for "speaking the human tongue," you receive thunderous applause.
善恶与对错应该分开看待。
Good and evil should be viewed separately from right and wrong.
一件事在道德上是善的，不意味着它就是对的，至少不一定符合城邦的利益。
Just because something is morally good, does not mean it's right. At least, it may not align with the interests of the city.
何况，即使是道德上的善恶也该分开看待。一个人做了善事，不意味着可以让恶行一并消失——这是我从匹诺康尼的二世皇帝身上学到的。
Also, even the good or evil in morality should be viewed separately. A person's good deeds do not erase their wrongdoings — this is something I learned from the second Emperor of Penacony.
作为外邦英雄，你自述的经历让在场公民坚信不疑、纷纷鼓掌附和。见了这幅景象，帕拉滕只能叹气。
As an outlander hero, your self-described experiences fully sway the citizens your way, and they chime in with gradual applause. Palaten can only sigh at this sight.
你敢说元老院冰冷如铁？
You dare insinuate that the Council of Elders is as cold as steel?
你的意思是，现在的圣城和元老院冰冷如铁？真敢说啊。不怕塔兰顿的秤砣砸到你头上？
You're saying, the holy city and the Council of Elders are as cold as steel? How daring. Are you not afraid that Talanton's weights will come crashing down on your head?
我哪有那个意思？我说的是应然，不是实然——你不要混淆这两者的区别！
How could I mean that? I'm talking about what should be, not what is — do not confuse the distinction between the two!
咳咳。首先，圣城现在的决策者是阿格莱雅大人。其次，元老院不是那么强权的机构，不会因为几句坏话就拿秤砣砸人。

Ahem. Firstly, the current decision-maker of the holy city is Lady Aglaea. Secondly, the Council of Elders is not such a tyrannical institution. They will not punish someone with weights over a few disparaging comments.
公民们尽力保持着严肃，但还是能听见几丝笑声从他们憋红的冷脸下窜出——比起对你的认可，更像是看了一出滑稽戏。
The citizens make an effort to maintain their serious demeanor, but faint laughter still escapes their flushed, yet stern faces — more akin to watching a farce than approval of you.
This is not the reason for his crime.
你说的这些，都不足以成为他偷窃的理由。世上身处困境的人那么多，其中又有几个走上了犯罪的道路？
All that you've said is not enough to justify his theft. There are many people in difficult situations in the world. How many actually choose to turn to a life of crime?
我们不用考虑犯罪的动机，也不需要追溯罪犯悲惨的童年。法律的归法律，道德的归道德，就这么简单。
We need not consider the motives for the crime, nor investigate the criminal's tragic childhood. Law is law, morality is morality. It's that simple.
那样的城邦…会是多么寒冷的地方啊。
A city like that... will be such a cold place.
辩方代表，请停止你的情绪化发言，认真对待议题。
Defense counsel, please cease your emotional statement and address the matter more formally.
…另一方面，吾师在开场时已经说过，外邦人并不是一个身份，而是一种处境——我们都可能成为需要帮助的弱者。
...On the other hand, my master has said from the start: Outlanders are not an identity, but a circumstance — we all have the possibility of becoming vulnerable individuals in need of aid.
如果吾师的善举不能为他博取减刑，今后还有哪个公民敢冒着风险去帮助他人？为众人抱薪者，不可使其冻毙于风雪。

If the good deeds my teacher has done can't even earn him a reduced sentence, which citizen will dare take the risk to help others in the future? Those who gather firewood for the masses should not have to freeze to death in the blizzard.
一桩不当判决对社会风气造成的破坏，十个恶人都比不上。公民们，三思啊，不能开这个坏头。
The damage of a single wrongful ruling on the moral fabric of society is greater than that of ten wrongdoers. Citizens, think carefully — we cannot set such a bad precedent.
你疑似有些小题大做了。
You're trying to make a mountain out of a molehill.
一桩案子而已，影响哪有你说的那么大。就因为给你的老师定罪，社会风气就要完蛋了？不听你的，圣城就要灭亡了？

It's just one case. How can the impact be as severe as you claim? Is the moral fabric of our society going to collapse just because your teacher is convicted? If we don't heed your advice, is the entire holy city going to collapse?
英雄有所不知，公民法庭判案时，确实会考虑到先例的影响。至少在这一点上，辩方代表的担忧不是无中生有。

Hero, you may not be aware, but it's important to note that when the public court rules on a case, precedent is considered. In this respect, the concerns raised by the defense are not entirely unfounded.
参与法庭讨论是塔兰顿赐予的权利。既然你接受了它，就应当站在城邦与公民的角度思考。这不叫小题大做，这叫权责对等。

To be able to participate in courtroom discussions is a right granted by Talanton. Since you've accepted it, you are obligated to consider the interests of the state and its citizens. This isn't an exaggeration — it's balancing power and responsibility.
听了元老的话，公民们纷纷低下头、露出若有所思的表情。你的言论大概是不会有人附和了。
Upon hearing the Elder's words, the citizens lower their heads, their expressions thoughtful. It's likely that no one will support your opinion.
He chose the wrong approach to save others.
苏克提瑞斯的罪行不是救人，而是偷窃。他本可以用更合法的手段提供帮助，比如捐出自己的财产……
The crime of Soctires is not saving others, but theft. He could have used legal methods to offer aid, such as donating his own property...
我们不是在惩罚他的动机，只是在惩罚他的行为——不这么做才是对社会风气的破坏。
We are not punishing his motives, but his actions. Failing to hold him accountable will undermine societal values.
你的发言逻辑严密。直到掌声响起，帕拉滕也没能给出一句反驳。
Your argument is logically sound. Until the applause erupts, Palaten is unable to provide any counterargument.
破坏社会风气？他也干了。
Undermine societal values? He has done so already.
我同意你说的，不能开这个坏头。那你可知道，他的行为也对社会风气造成了坏影响？
I agree with you. We should not set such a poor precedent. But are you aware that his actions also negatively impacted societal values?
倘若为苏克提瑞斯网开一面，你就会见到更多「迫不得已」的犯罪者，甚至可能会有人偷药去救治大地兽……
If we grant Soctires leniency, you will encounter more "compelled" criminals. There may be someone who might even steal medicine to save the dromases...
…怎么可能到那种地步呢？你这是滑坡谬误！
...How could it possibly come to that? This is a slippery slope argument!
公民们听不懂帕拉滕的学术词语，但「偷药喂给大地兽」的画面已经烙印在了他们脑海中。有人笑出了声。
The citizens can't understand Palaten's academic term, but the image of "stealing medicine to feed dromases" has already been imprinted in their minds. Some of them even chuckle out loud.
He still hasn't returned the money he owes me!
还记得当初我和你们一起去重渊，你老师让我给外邦人买粮食的事吗？他可没说这要我自掏腰包！
Do you remember when I went with you two to the abyss, and your teacher asked me to buy food for the outlanders? He never mentioned I had to pay for it myself!
他欠我的钱到底什么时候能还？这难道就不是对社会风气的破坏吗？
When is he going to return the money he owes me? Isn't this also undermining societal values?
如果吾师真被判了重罪，那笔钱估计也……
If my master is truly convicted of a serious crime, I think that money will likely...
公民们发出一串哄笑——德高望重的苏克提瑞斯借钱不还，还有比这更大的乐子吗？
The citizens erupt in laughter — what could be more amusing than the esteemed Soctires not returning money he owes?
…各位别忘了，黑潮的威胁尚未远去，预言中的末日就在前方。我们要面对的是一场天灾，唯有团结才能为搏来一线生机。
...Let's not forget that the threat of the black tide is far from over. The prophesied apocalypse looms. We are facing a natural disaster, and only through unity do we stand a chance at survival.
人拥有无限的可能性。终有一日，我们会战胜黑潮。到了那时，外邦人会成为帮助我们重建家园的伙伴。难道各位愿意扼杀那个可能性吗？

Humanity holds boundless potential. There will come one day when we prevail over the black tide. When that time comes, the outlanders will stand with us as allies, to rebuild our homeland. Is everyone here willing to extinguish that possibility?
想要放眼未来，必先考虑当下。
To look forward to the future, one must first consider the present.
如果不考虑眼前的问题，圣城根本走不到未来。你只是在用童话般的描述画饼罢了。
If we do not consider the issues at hand, the holy city will not see a future. You're just painting a pretty picture no different from a fairy tale.
战胜黑潮？那是很久以后的事。至少现在，圣城不需要外邦人也足够热闹。
Defeating the black tide? That's in the distant future. For now, the holy city is lively enough without the outlanders.
公民们连连鼓掌称是。在他们看来，永恒之城只可能从内部被攻破——坚决不能让这种事发生。
The citizens applaud in agreement. To them, the Eternal City can only be breached from within — such a thing cannot be allowed to happen.
是奥赫玛人保卫了城市。
It's the Okhemans who protected the city.
如果外邦人真是我们的伙伴，为什么奥赫玛被疯王眷属围攻时他们没来？
If the outlanders are really our allies, why did they not come to our aid when the Mad King attacked Okhema?
是黄金裔和公民们保卫了这座城市——当然，还有我和丹恒。谁出力，谁受益，这不是理所当然的吗？
It was the Chrysos Heirs and the citizens who protected this city — and of course, together with Dan Heng and I. Isn't it only fair for those who contributed to also reap the benefits?
你这番话点燃了现场的气氛。人们高喊着你的名字，仿佛回到了刀光剑影的战场。
Your words ignite the atmosphere in the area. The crowd shouts your name, as if they have returned to a battlefield clashing with swords.
你先接几个外邦人回家再说吧。
Why don't you accept a few outlanders first, then get back to me?
既然你这么关心那些外邦人，为什么不自己接几个回家？
Since you care so much about the outlanders, why not bring a few of them home?
说来惭愧，我和吾师的宅邸确实收留了一些外邦人。数量不多，也就十个，远远不足以拯救所有需要帮助的人。
I'm ashamed to admit that my teacher and I have taken in a few outlanders in our homes. Not many, just ten. Far from the number of people who need help.
但我相信这微小的努力也会产生影响，正如水滴也能贯穿顽石。
But I believe that this tiny effort can make a difference, just like how water drops will eventually wear through stone.
公民们动容了——善行远比善心更加珍贵，人们用掌声表达了对这位学者的钦佩。
The citizens are deeply moved — good deeds are more precious than good intentions. They express their admiration for the scholar with applause.
外邦人只能当我的啦啦队。
The outlanders can only be my cheerleaders.
要说对付黑潮，我和我的黄金裔朋友们才是专家——还记得我们从疯王眷属手里拯救圣城的故事吗？那里面可没有外邦人出场。

If we're talking about defeating the black tide, my Chrysos Heir friends and I are the experts — do you still remember how we saved the holy city from the clutches of the Mad King's kins? There are no outlanders in that party.
你所谓的外邦伙伴能帮上我们什么？举办庆功宴会？还是站在旁边加油喝彩？这活「粉霞天女」也能干。
What can your so-called outlander buddies do to help us? Host a victory banquet? Or stand by and cheer us on? Even the Rosy Celestial Maiden can do that.
不等帕拉滕发话，在场的公民们就已经笑作了一团。看架势，他不会有机会开口了。
Without waiting for Palaten's reply, the citizens are already bursting into laughter. By the looks of it, he probably isn't going to get a chance to speak.
随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了帕拉滕的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，感到义愤填膺……
As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Palaten's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the exchange that just happened, indignation aflame within them...
不知不觉间，你已经代替了拉莱德的控方代表之位，而且获得了更多支持。
Before you realize it, you've replaced Liluder as the prosecutor and garnered more support.
随着最后一个音节落地，伊特罗元老伸出手，制止了帕拉滕的进一步发言。公民们回味着刚才的交锋，渐渐动了恻隐之心……
As the final syllable drops, Elder Etro stretches out his hand and halts Palaten's subsequent elaboration. The citizens recall the clash, and begin to feel compassion...
不知不觉间，你已经代替了拉莱德的控方代表之位，但并没有获得多数人的支持。
Before you realize it, you've replaced Liluder as the prosecutor, but failed to gather the support of the majority.
那么，讨论结束，请各位投票……
Well, the discussion has concluded. Everyone please cast your vote...
在结束之前，介意我补充几句吗？
Before we conclude, may I add a few words?
你好，元老伊特罗。我来得应该还不算太迟。
Hello, Elder Etro. I think I'm not too late.
阿格莱雅的出现让本已沉寂的观众再次激动起来——很少有民事案件能引来黄金裔的关注。
Aglaea's appearance spurs the spectators once more — few civil cases can catch the attention of the Chrysos Heirs.
各位先前的讨论，风儿已顺着金丝为我转述。在这个非常时刻，比起争辩衣服上的漏洞是对是错，或许我们更应该考虑怎么去缝补它。

Everyone's earlier discussions have been conveyed to me through golden threads riding the winds. At such a critical time, instead of arguing over whether the holes in a garment are right or wrong, perhaps we should consider how we should mend them instead.
若不惩罚苏克提瑞斯，便无以向律法和人民交代；但若判罚过重，又会显得圣城不近人情、独断专横。
Failing to punish Soctires, it will be unjust to the people and the law. But if the punishment is too harsh, it will cause the holy city to be seen as cold and tyrannical.
所以，想要在这两条金丝之间找到一个平衡点，最好的选择是……
Therefore, to strike a fair balance between the two, the best choice is...
Make him pay for the losses?
我们的贵客给出了不错的思路。顺着{F#她}{M#他}的话头，我来为各位公民提出一个折衷方案——
Our honored guest has offered some good ideas. Following {F#her}{M#his} thoughts, I would like to offer a compromise to the citizens...
苏克提瑞斯将免于监禁。作为替代，他会被派去难民庇护所务工，期间视作流放；除此以外，他还必须自费填补药物储备的空缺。

Soctires shall be exempt from imprisonment. As an alternative, he will be assigned to work at a refuge shelter, as a form of exile. Additionally, he will have to personally bear the cost of replenishing the medical supplies.
对某些公民而言，这样的惩罚甚至比在监狱服刑还要可怕，无须担心有人效仿。
To some citizens, such punishment might be more daunting than spending time in prison, so there's no need to worry about others following suit.
我要补充的就是这些，各位可以开始投票了。
This is all I have to add. Everyone, please begin voting.
请等一下！阿格莱雅大人，我还有一个疑问——您打算如何处置那些外邦人？
Please hold! Lady Aglaea, I still have a question — how do you intend to deal with that bunch of outlanders?
阿格莱雅脸上闪过一丝不易察觉的笑意，仿佛她一直在等待这句话。
A faint smile crosses Aglaea's face, as if she has been anticipating this question all along.
外邦人的命运，决定权不在我或者元老院，而是在各位公民手中。
The fate of the outlanders does not lie with me nor the Council of Elders, but with the citizens.
如果你支持他们，就确实去伸出援手。如果你反对他们，就当面把话讲出来。即使没有被金丝相连，表达心意也绝非难事。
If you support them, offer a helping hand. If you oppose them, speak directly. Even if you are not connected by golden threads, expressing one's mind shouldn't be too hard.
正如这位老者，他的态度就很鲜明，他的行动也确实产生了影响。有人因此受益，有人因此受罚……
Just like this old one. His stance is clear. His actions have indeed made an impact. Some have benefited, while others have faced punishment...
倘若每一位公民都能像他这般，那么在智慧与意志的交锋中，终会有一条清晰的道路显现。
If every citizen was like him, with the clash of wisdom and will, a clear path would emerge.
现在，是你们表达态度的时候了。请继续吧，伊特罗元老。
Now, it's time to declare your stance. Please continue, Elder Etro.
那么，请各位公民举手表决……
Then, citizens, please raise your hand to vote...
最终，六成的票数支持流放苏克提瑞斯…
Finally, sixty percent of the votes support Soctires' exile...
卫兵们押着这位老者远去。他和弟子很快就会收拾行囊、离开圣城…
The guards escort the old man away. Both he and his student quickly pack up their belongings and leave the holy city...
广场上的公民越来越少，人们回味着刚刚发生的一切。这座城市究竟该去往何方？还没有人能给出答案。
The citizens at the plaza start to scatter, with people digesting what just happened. In what direction should this city head towards? No one seems to have the answer.
But at the very least, it heads towards tomorrow.
我旁听了你的全部发言，贵客，也许你比我想象中更适应辩论场。
I heard your entire speech, honored guest. Perhaps you're more suited to be in the debate arena than I imagined.
但参与这种讨论是有风险的…民意就像一把火，没人能确定它会被引向何方。
But participating in such a debate has its risks... Public opinion is like an open flame, no one can predict where it will be directed.
是你啊，贵客。没能见到你发言，有点可惜。
It's you, honored guest. It was a pity that I was unable to witness your speech.
但这未必不是件好事。群众有时会被不那么明智的声音裹挟，而你不会成为其中一员。
But it may not be a bad thing. The crowd may be swayed by less wise voices, but you will not be one of them.
重渊的外邦人怎么样了？
What happened to the outlanders at the Abyss?
圣城守卫们接走了所有能找到的外邦人——当然，没有带进城区，只是送到了避难所。这是我能给予的最大仁慈。
The guards of the holy city escorted all the outlanders who could be found. Of course, they were not brought within the city walls, but to the shelter. This is the greatest mercy I can offer.
What's your view on the outlander situation?
哦？我还以为自己在庭上已经说得很清楚了呢。但有些话确实不能暴露在阳光下……
Oh? I thought I expressed it quite clearly in court. Though some words cannot be exposed to the light of day...
圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.
只要黑潮的威胁还存在一天，这样的悲剧就不会结束…所以，我们必须狩猎火种。
As long as the threat of the black tide exists for another day, this tragedy will not cease... Hence, we have to hunt down all the Coreflame.
嗯，贵客，我们都还有要做的事，再见。
Indeed, honored guest. We still have much to do. Farewell.
还有什么要问的事吗，贵客？
Is there anything else you'd like to ask, honored guest?
重渊的外邦人怎么样了？
What happened to the outlanders at the Abyss?
圣城守卫们接走了所有能找到的外邦人——当然，没有带进城区，只是送到了避难所。这是我能给予的最大仁慈。
The guards of the holy city escorted all the outlanders who could be found. Of course, they were not brought within the city walls, but to the shelter. This is the greatest mercy I can offer.
What's your view on the outlander situation?
哦？我还以为自己在庭上已经说得很清楚了呢。但有些话确实不能暴露在阳光下……
Oh? I thought I expressed it quite clearly in court. Though some words cannot be exposed to the light of day...
圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.
只要黑潮的威胁还存在一天，这样的悲剧就不会结束…所以，我们必须狩猎火种。
As long as the threat of the black tide exists for another day, this tragedy will not cease... Hence, we have to hunt down all the Coreflame.
嗯，贵客，我们都还有要做的事，再见。
Indeed, honored guest. We still have much to do. Farewell.
浴场这么大…那位老者的浴池在哪呢？
The bath pool is huge... Where is that old man's bath?
你们快到神殿里去，那边安全——跟我来。
You all hurry to the temple. It's safe there — follow me.
这里有许多食品店，价钱和质量都有区别。该选哪个呢……
There are many food stalls here, varying in price and quality. Which one to choose...
这样食物的事就算解决了，去找外邦人领队吧。
Now that the food is settled, it's time to find the outlander leader.
我、我不认识什么帕里斯！别伤害我和「赫拉克勒斯」！
I—I don't know any Paris! Don't hurt me or Heracles!
退下！该死的{RUBY_B#尼卡多利}疯王{RUBY_E#}残兵，不许再向前了！
Stay back! Foul remnant of {RUBY_B#Nikador}the Mad King{RUBY_E#}. You are not permitted any further!
是谁？这里很危险，快点离开！
Who are you? This place is dangerous. Get out of here at once!
等等，{F#她}{M#他}好像是与黄金裔们一起狩杀疯王的英雄！
Wait, I think {F#she}{M#he} was the hero that hunted down the Mad King with the Chrysos Heirs!
什么？太好了，请快帮帮我们吧！
What? Perfect! Please, come and help us!
Uh... Are you sure {F#she}{M#he}'s a hero?
哎呀，有好处！我是商队的领队，好处有的是！
Jeez, you will be rewarded! I am the leader of a merchant caravan, and I have all the rewards you could need!
Looks like I have no choice.
I'm begging you. Please do something!
Looks like I have no choice.
Can't beat me, so you resort to foul language?
Have some class and be a civilized Titankin.
面对无法对抗的力量，受创的泰坦眷属转身逃离，遁入城外的永夜天帷。
Faced with an unstoppable power, the injured Titankin turns and flees, slipping into the Evernight Veil outside the city.
那副踉跄的破碎身躯甚是狼狈，完全引不起胜者追击的欲望，所以你只是凝望着她的影子消逝在光芒一同消逝的境界线外……

Its staggering and broken form is so pathetic that you lose all urge to chase it down for a victorious counterattack. So, you simply watch as her shadow disappears into the border where the light vanishes altogether.
「天谴之矛」麾下居然有败逃的懦夫，真是可笑…还是多亏英雄出手相助，我们才能全身而退。
The fact that the Lance of Fury underlings would be so cowardly as to flee in defeat. Pathetic... Thank you for saving us, hero. We would not have made it out of here alive without you.
自从蛮神陨落，这只眷属就时常在附近徘徊，袭击戍卫与过往的商队，这次倒霉的就是「阿尔戈商队」的老板伊阿宋。

Ever since the fall of the savage god, this Titankin has been roaming the surrounding area, attacking guards and passing trade caravans. This time, it was Iason, leader of the Argo Caravan, who fell victim.
是啊，还好你和克米昂长官及时出手！要是让我去见了塞纳托斯，可就没人能养活城里的商人和大地兽了！
That's right. Fortunately, you and Captain Camilla took action in time! If I were sent to meet Thanatos, no one would be left to support the city's merchants or dromases!
好啦，赫拉克勒斯…唉，虽然保住了小命，但宝物被她抢走了……
It's okay, Heracles... Ah, though I've been spared my life, she did get away with my little treasure...
There's a treasure? Why didn't you say sooner!
刚刚没掉落什么稀有材料啊。
I didn't see any rare loot just now?
我就知道这任务没完事儿。
I knew this mission wouldn't just end like that.
那东西可不一般，是{RUBY_B#浪漫的泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的圣物——她亲手创造的<color=#dbc291ff>蜕生金丝</color>！
This is no mere ordinary object. It's a divine object of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}. It is the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Thread of Rebirth</color> that she weaved herself!
你听说过这个故事吧——在造物世，墨涅塔将世上的爱与自己的残茧捻作丝线，作为赠予{RUBY_B#理性的泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的礼物。
You must have heard this story? During the Era Creatura, Mnestia wove together the love of the world and their own cocoon to create silk as a gift to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.
阿格莱雅女士曾出资委托我收集泰坦的神迹，我费尽心思才从游牧的贼团手中购得此物，结果到了城前却被敌人抢走了…真是可惜……

Lady Aglaea sent me on an assignment to retrieve the miracles of the Titans. I worked myself to the bone to purchase this object from a group of nomadic thieves. Now, it's been snatched from my hands by the enemy right before I arrived back at the city... Such a shame...
伊阿宋低头哀叹，露出遗憾的神色，看似在独自咀嚼痛失宝物的悲伤与辜负阿格莱雅的愧疚——但你能察觉到他眼神在地面和你的身上悄悄摇摆。

Iason drops his head with a sigh, his face painted with regret. It seems he is stuck between the sadness of having lost the precious item and the guilt of disappointing Aglaea... However, you sense his gaze darting between the ground's surface and your body.
你直说要我帮忙不就行了。
You could just ask me for help.
等、等等！英雄！这个宝贝真的很宝贵，就请你帮帮忙吧——就当是为了阿格莱雅女士！
W—Wait! Hero! This treasure is truly extremely precious, and you have to help me! Count it as a favor to Lady Aglaea!
I'll help if I get time.
太好了，谢谢英雄，谢谢英雄！
That's wonderful. Thank you, hero! Thank you, hero!
那个…我在外行商时听流民们说过，泰坦眷属都聚集在黑潮下的<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>，只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪。

So... While I was traveling and selling my wares, I heard word from the refugees that the Titankin were gathering in <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color> under the black tide. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.
英雄，城外黑潮凶险，我们普通人也帮不上什么忙，只能请您多加小心了。
Hero, as the black tide outside the city is perilous, we mere citizens can offer you no assistance. All we can do is ask you to take great caution.
A treasure hunt! Partner, let's go on a treasure hunt!
这群泰坦眷属就聚集在<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>中，也只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪，拜托了！
These Titankin are gathered in <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color>. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.
先前的眷属在与你鏖战一番过后，已经没有了先前的杀气。
