After their ferocious battle with you, the Titankin from before seem to have lost their previous murderous intent.
你此时才发现这副石铸的身躯是多么古老，如夜幕下的悬锋城墙一样陈旧而残破。
It's at this moment that you realize just how ancient its stone-cast body is. It's just as old and derelict as the walls of Castrum Kremnos under the curtain of night.
金丝…帕里斯的…被偷走了……
The golden thread... Paris'... It was stolen...
咦？难道这本来就是你的东西吗？
Huh? Are you saying this belongs to you?
看来不找到这个叫帕里斯的人，她是不会把宝贝交出来了…那这位帕里斯身在何处呢？
Looks like she won't hand over the treasure unless I find this "Paris" person... Where could he be?
好！出发吧，去阿卡迪亚找他…等等，阿卡迪亚是哪里呀？
Alright! Off we go! To Arcadia to find... Wait — where is Arcadia?
We didn't unlock that teleport anchor.
要不给我开个任务指引？
Want to give me a mission guide?
眷属的声音逐渐变得微弱，她残存的神智似乎无法再与你们进行问答，只能默默重复着那个陌生的名字。
The Titankin's voice is growing ever weaker. It seems she no longer has the mental capacity to answer your questions, only to silently repeat that stranger's name to herself.
真是难办，不认识的人，不认识的地方。
Well now we're stuck! We don't know this person, or this place!
We'll go back to the past!
回到她的过去找线索吗？是个好办法！
Go back to her past to find clues? That's a great idea!
钟表把戏…是什么东西？我不会呀！
Clockwork... What is that? I can't do that!
但如果回到她的过去，或许能找到一些线索……
But, if we go back to her past... Maybe we can find some clues...
Can't we just steal it from her now?
不要乘人之危！而且人家能感觉到她没有说谎，还是让我们事情搞清楚再说吧。
Don't take advantage of those in need! Plus, I can sense that she isn't lying. Let's find out what's going on first and then go from there.
但如果回到她的过去，或许能找到一些线索……
But, if we go back to her past... Maybe we can find some clues...
不过这位雕像小姐的记忆太过模糊，还需要其他的碎片才能窥见与之相关的往世。伙伴，去云石市集收集一些关于「帕里斯」和「阿卡迪亚」的记忆吧！

But, this statue lady's memory is too blurry. We need to find other fragments of it if we want to see into her past. Partner, let's go to Marmoreal Market and collect some memories related to "Paris" and "Arcadia"!
你好呀，小朋友，是来买水果的吗？这批货是刚从「花园」送来的，新鲜得很！
Hello, young friend! Are you here to buy fruits? These are all in fresh from the "garden," and they're fresh as can be!
I want to ask you some questions.
问题？哈哈，离开智慧花园之后，已经很久没人需要我解惑了，请问吧。
Questions? Haha, no one has come to me seeking enlightenment since I left the Garden of Wisdom. Please, ask away.
帕里斯？我从来没听过这个名字。
Paris? I have never heard that name before.
我猜他肯定不住在奥赫玛——这圣城上下的人都光顾过我的店铺，每个客人的名字我都记着呢！
I am certain that he doesn't live in Okhema. People from all over this holy city have frequented my store and I remember the name of every customer!
阿卡迪亚？是什么水果的名字吗？不好意思啊，小朋友，我这不卖阿卡迪亚。
Arcadia? Is that a fruit? Sorry, young one, I don't sell Arcadia here.
但如果你能搞来它的种子，我就去让智慧花园的老朋友种点，明年你就能买到了！
But if you can find some seeds, then I can ask my friend in the Garden of Wisdom to plant some. Then you can come and buy some next year!
好像没问到什么有用的东西，再去问问其他店主吧……
Looks like she didn't have anything useful to offer. Let's go and ask another store owner...
赞美瑟希斯，愿你令圣城子民早些理解我作品的魅力……
Praise Cerces! May you assist the people of this holy city in understanding the charm of my works...
啊，有顾客！我刚才在向瑟希斯祈求赐予同胞们智慧，想买什么书？
Ah, a customer! I was just praying to Cerces to gift intelligence to my fellow citizens. Is there a book you are after?
I want to ask you some questions.
当然可以，传递知识正是瑟希斯交由我们家族的使命！我知无不言！
Of course! Imparting knowledge is the very mission entrusted to my family by Cerces! I will share any knowledge I have!
帕里斯…帕里斯……我居然不知道这个名字？你等等！
Paris... Paris... I've never heard that name? Wait!
克帖西芬在石板与书卷中翻找了许久，看来石板和卷轴做书最不方便的就是没有封面辨别书名……

Ctesiphona rummages for some time among slates and scrolls. It seems that the most inconvenient thing about working with slates and scrolls is that there is no front cover to help identify them quickly...
呼——无论是诗歌、神话、戏剧还是冒险故事里都没有这个人。看来我帮不上你的忙了。
Phew... I checked poems, mythology, plays, and adventures, but no mention of this person. Looks like I won't be able to help you.
阿卡迪亚？客人，你真是位阅历不浅的读者，这可是古老年代的冒险故事最爱引用的设定——<color=#dbc291ff>墨涅塔庇护的黄金之乡</color>！

Arcadia? Dear customer, I see you must be a most experienced reader. Arcadia is a common setting people love to use in ancient adventure stories... It's <color=#dbc291ff>the Golden Land under the protection of Mnestia</color>!
那里是诗人、艺术家与追逐浪漫之人的天堂，一般主角都会在这里遇到自己的爱人，获得墨涅塔的赐福…此事在经典作品《金毯密传》中亦有记载。

It's a paradise for poets, artists, and those in search of romance. The main characters in these stories would meet their true love here and receive Mnestia's blessing... This is all recorded in the classic work Secret of the Golden Carpet.
说到《金毯密传》，那身为王子的男主与敌邦公主的私奔故事可谓精彩绝伦……
Speaking of the Secret of the Golden Carpet, that story of a prince eloping with the princess of an enemy state is truly a masterpiece...
克帖西芬开始滔滔不绝地介绍起这个故事，你如果再不问正事，估计她要跟你把全集都讲一遍。
Ctesiphona begins to endlessly talk about the story to you. If you don't get back to the matter at hand, she may end up recounting the entire epic.
How do we get to Arcadia?
导航…哦，你是说「神启石镜」吧，这我可帮不了你。
GPS... Oh, you mean the "Stone Mirror of Revelation." I cannot help you there, I'm afraid.
奥赫玛有旅行社带团吗？
旅游…我只在史书里听过这个词。这黑潮和疯狂眷属乱跑的年代没有旅游，只有以身探险的冒险者和商队。

Travel... I have only encountered that word in historical texts. There is no travel in this era, with the black tide and Titankin running rampant. We have only adventurers and merchants who roam the land at the risk of their own lives.
它的位置每个故事说的都不一样，有的说它在翁法罗斯的最中心，有的说它在法吉娜的海底…还有的说它在一群蝴蝶的背上，于高空中飘荡。

As for its location, every story says something different. Some say that it is at the center of Amphoreus. Some say it is in the ocean depths of Phagousa... Some even say that it is on the back of a flock of butterflies, floating high in the skies.
至于哪个是真的，我也不知道——毕竟都是故事嘛。
As for which is true, I have no idea... They're all stories, after all.
原来阿卡迪亚是个这么厉害的地方！但只有故事中的记述可能还不够，也没有问到关于帕里斯的事情…我们还是再找找其他人吧。
I didn't realize Arcadia was such an amazing place! Although, descriptions in stories probably still aren't enough, and we still know nothing about Paris... Let's go and find someone else to ask.
……敬仰墨涅塔的顾客确实喜欢所谓的「金丝礼服」，但用软金线来编织，不仅成本高昂，且穿者也会行动不便。不如用染色的丝线或布料来代替。

...I know that those who revere Mnestia are fond of the so-called "golden thread dress," but weaving clothing out of malleable gold not only makes it very expensive, it also makes it very hard for the wearers to move in. Would it not be better to use dyed silk or cotton?
但人们都说墨涅塔的丝线就是黄金做的，如果用染色的丝线来替代，岂不是弄虚作假？
But everyone says that Mnestia's silk is made of gold. Using dyed silk would just be a forgery, wouldn't it?
与泰坦的造物相比，染色的线与金属的线都是仿神的赝品。执着于赝品的材质高低，而让衣物失去应有的美，对「浪漫」反倒更加不敬吧？

Compared to the creations of the Titans, dyed threads and metal threads are all merely works that imitate the work of the gods. Do you not think that obsessing over the quality of an imitation and ruining the clothes' intended beauty is a sign of disrespect to "romance" itself?
原来如此，感谢阿格莱雅老师的指点…啊，来客人了！
I see. Thank you for your guidance, knowledgeable Aglaea... Ah, a customer!
你好，贵客，想来找某件合身的行头，还是想来寻找某个问题的答案？
Hello, dear customer. Are you here for an item of clothing to suit your physique? Or could it be an answer to a question that you seek?
哇哦，一下就被看穿了。正好阿格莱雅见多识广，一定知道我们想要问的事情！
Woah. You saw right through me. I know you are a lady of great learning, Aglaea. I'm certain you know about what we seek!
帕里斯？奥赫玛城中确实有过这样一位城民，应该是戍卫队的一员。
Paris? There is indeed no citizen of Okhema by this name. I imagine they are a member of the garrison.
那阿格莱雅小姐知道他现在身在何处吗？
Do you know where they are right now, Miss Aglaea?
这个…距离我上次听到这个名字已经有数十年了。之后我因事离开了圣城一段时间，当我再次回到奥赫玛，此人已不在城中了。
Well... It has been decades since I last heard that name. I was away from the holy city for a time and upon my return to Okhema, they were no longer here.
也不能妄下定论，寿限在此世总是难以预测，毕竟或许存在逃避塞纳托斯抚摸的方法，也或许存在死亡无法触及的地方。

I cannot say for certain. The duration of a life is hard to predict in this world. Perhaps there exists some method to escape Thanatos' touch, or perhaps there is a land that death itself cannot reach.
阿卡迪亚…这还真是个值得怀念的名字。
Arcadia... Now that is a name that stirs memories.
很久以前，这个名字曾流传于奥赫玛的街头巷尾，人们说那是一个被黄金之茧庇佑的理想之城，在纷争正盛的年代，人人都向往那个地方。

A long time ago, this name spread through the streets and alleys of Okhema. People said that it was an ideal city that was protected by the Chrysalis of Gold. In the era of strife, people flocked to it.
那…阿格莱雅知道该怎么找到这个地方吗？
Then... Do you know how to find this place, Aglaea?
和服装一样，传说往往也会应潮流来去。阿卡迪亚在如今已是「过时」的故事，许多墨涅塔的信徒都不知晓这个名字。
Much like clothing, legends are often things that come and go with the times. Arcadia is already a story of the "past." Many disciples of Mnestia don't even know this name.
或许应某个逸闻中所说，在这黑潮覆压的乱世，蝴蝶载着这座城飞到了谁也见不到的地方吧。
It could be the case, according to one story, that in this war-torn world savaged by the black tide, a flock of butterflies carried that city to a place that no one could see.
阿格莱雅女士——阿格莱雅女士！
伊阿宋带着物资回来了，但却不愿进城，说什么在等人——搞不好这小子把您的事情搞砸了，劳烦您亲自到场看看吧。

Iason has returned with supplies but refuses to enter the city. He says that he is waiting for someone... There is a chance that he failed in the task that you gave to him. Could I trouble you to come and see him yourself?
…贵客，看来我们的话题需要暂时中断在这里了。愿你们能早些找到想要知晓的事情，我先告辞了。
...Dear customer, it seems that we must leave our conversation here for now. I hope that you find the answers you seek soon. I bid you farewell.
这些口述和雕像小姐的记忆，应该足够让我们回到过去了，去找雕像小姐吧！
These descriptions, along with the statue lady's memories, should be enough for us to return to the past. Let's go and find the statue lady!
一会儿未见，泰坦眷属似乎比之前更加颓靡了，能从声音中到感受到她的活力正在飘逝……
In the time that you were gone, it seems that the Titankin has become even more desperate than before. You can sense from her voice that her vitality is slowly fading...
人家不知道怎么修理眷属，她这样子也去不了其他地方……
I don't know how to repair Titankin. She can't go anywhere else in this state, either...
这…人家没看到她的嘴长在哪里呀。
Uhh... I don't even know where her mouth would be.
我们现在能做的，也只有快点了解她的内心，帮她找到想要见到的人了。
All we can do for now is try to understand what she wants and help her meet the person she longs for.
走吧，伙伴，让我们看看阿卡迪亚和那位帕里斯到底在哪——
Let's go, partner. Let's find out just where this Paris guy and this Arcadia place are.
迷迷挥手打开了通向过往的门扉……
Mem waves their hand and opens a door to the past...
这里是纷争浇灌出的河口，这河用了敌人流淌的鲜血，而不是天上来的雨点，去湿润无休止的战场。
This is the river mouth irrigated by strife. It is not raindrops that flow from this river, but the blood of enemies that dampens the field of unceasing wars.
我诞生的地方是尼卡多利的城邦，漂泊于永夜天帷之下的堡垒。这里的人不知何为山海。他们的山是战场的余烬堆积的灰山，他们的海是战败敌人流淌的血海。

I was born in the city of Nikador, a castle that floats below the Evernight Veil. The people here know nothing of mountains or oceans. Their mountains are piles of burning ash that litter the battlefield, and their oceans are a sea of blood that flows from their enemies.
是的，悬锋城便是这样的地方，而我的父亲——如果造主能称之为父亲的话——乃是带来纷争的尼卡多利。
That's right. That is exactly the kind of place that Castrum Kremnos is. My father — if you can call a creator father — was Nikador themself, bringer of strife.
我的兄弟姐妹们说，它曾告诉他们的先祖：宁战死，毋荣归。唯有死于战场之上，成为纷争的祭品，才是值得骄傲的命运。

My siblings used to tell me of a prophecy that Nikador had told their ancestors: "Valorous death before glorious return." Only offering your life to the battlefield and becoming a sacrifice to strife is a fate worthy of pride.
凯旋尚且不能为傲，败退更是玷污悬锋的恶行。它曾告诉它们的先祖：悬锋上的泥垢，必须用血洗去。
There is no pride in victory, and defeat is an even more disgraceful act that tarnishes Kremnos. The god told their ancestors: "The filth of Kremnos must be washed clean in blood."
The Ephor of Castrum Kremnos appears.
谁是战场上蒙羞而归的败者？谁是误入鲜血蜜酿的飞蝇？谁是悬锋上应被洗涤入血河的污垢？谁辜负了纷争的尼卡多利之授命？

Who is the loser who returned from the battlefield in shame? Who is the fly that accidentally flew into the mead of fresh blood? Who is the dirt on Kremnos that must be washed in the river of blood? Who has failed the duty of Nikador of strife?
是你——它亲自铸造的眷属。你的血统尊贵如角斗浴血的胜者，你的使命高尚如破腹献肠的祭司。但你却辜负了你的命运，在对奥赫玛军的突袭中失利，败退而归。

It is you... The Titankin that they created themselves. Your bloodlines are as noble as a gladiator's, raising their weapon high in victory. Your mission is as noble as the priest that pierces the belly and viscera of offerings. Yet you have failed your destiny, as you were defeated in your ambush of the Okhema army and returned vanquished.
失败的纷争利器，负罪的悬锋子民。残躯已无法继续征战，荣耀的悬锋会将你背负耻辱的躯壳粉碎，让死亡的手来抹除悬锋的污垢。

You have failed as an instrument of strife, and you bring guilt on the citizens of Kremnos. Your broken body is capable of battle no more. The glory of Kremnos will smash your body that bears such shame and allow the hands of death to purify this stain on Kremnos.
尼卡多利的孩子们，将你们受辱的姊妹带往监牢，让她与另一个懦夫一同等待命运的裁决吧。
Children of Nikador! Take your humiliated sister to the prison and have her await her fated punishment alongside her fellow coward.
她没有发出声音，她不觉得苦痛，反倒认为理所应当。
She makes no sound, and she feels no pain. She knows she is the one to blame.
开裂的箭镞重回炉床，死去的战士埋入坟场，这名为命运的规则理应是这样。
As broken arrows are cast in rebirth, and fallen soldiers return to the earth. These are but the rules of fate.
兄弟，你说我们为啥要把同类和敌军的俘虏关在一起啊。
Brother, do you know why we must imprison our own kind alongside enemy soldiers?
真不想回答你这种没脑子的种类，那当然是因为她打了败仗，比那打了胜仗的俘虏还可悲。
I don't want to sit and answer your brainless questions. Obviously it's because she was defeated in battle. That is more shameful than an enemy soldier that battled victoriously.
那兄弟，要是咱们以后打了败仗，是不是也要挨悬锋城的铁矛啊？
Does that mean, brother... That if we are defeated in battle, we will suffer the spear of Castrum Kremnos, too?
怕啥？咱们是后方，背锅也是前线背…等会儿，这是谁在偷听呢。
What are you so worried about? We're backline forces, and the frontline is always going to be the scapegoat... Wait, someone is listening.
I came to break someone out.
是入侵者！兄弟，咱们快阻止他！
Intruder! Brother, we have to stop them!
等等，我怎么觉得这家伙不太对劲……
Wait. There's something not quite right about them...
或许是因为有着尼卡多利的血统，天谴哲人敏锐地察觉到你身上散发出的强者气息——他们并不知道，他的神在未来都被你轰杀了呀！
Perhaps they carry the blood of Nikador? The Furiae Philosopher keenly senses the aura of strength emanating from your body... They have no idea that their god will be slain by you in the future!
等会儿！我觉得咱俩拦不住这家伙，要不就当没看见……
Wait! I don't think just us two can stop them. Why don't we just pretend we never saw them...
啊？但我们这岂不是当了逃兵？
Huh? Would that not make us deserters?
傻帽，要是打输了，咱俩也得被关在下面！
You fool. If we're defeated, we'll end up locked up anyway!
再说了，除非通过「神性」的力量，否则没人能打开牢房的门…快走吧！
What's more, no one can unlock the prison gates without some form of "divine" power anyway... Let's get out of here!
（雕像中的神性已被提取，用它去开启牢房的机关吧……）
(The statue's divinity has already been extracted. Use it to open the prison gate mechanism...)
呵呵，人们常说悬锋城是个粗野的地方，但看来并非如此——他们不仅为战俘带来了一位朋友，这位朋友还是个美丽的姑娘！

Hehe. They all say that Castrum Kremnos is a rough and boorish land, but I see that is not the case... Not only did they bring a friend for us prisoners of war, this friend happens to be a beautiful young girl!
…我不是朋友，只是因为没能送你们全军踏入冥河，而不得不与你共赴冥河的败者。而我也不是姑娘，只是铠甲用了女子的模样。

...I am not a friend. I am merely a failure that must swim the River of Souls alongside you as I was unable to send your entire army to its depths. Nor am I a young girl. My armor was simply cast in the shape of a girl.
墨涅塔在上，这石铸的身躯兼具妇人的健美与雕塑的精妙，那不屈与坚韧的美映照在你的脸庞。要我说，你便是这城邦中最美的姑娘。

Great Mnestia, this statue combines the fine physique of a woman with the finesse of sculpture. Your unyielding and tenacious beauty is reflected in your face. If you ask me, you are the most beautiful girl in this city.
…轻口薄舌的流贼、恶痞、败寇，莫要用谵语侮辱悬锋城的战士。
...Sharp-tongued thieves, scoundrels, and failed bandits should not seek to insult a warrior of Castrum Kremnos with their wild ravings.
姑娘为我想的称号还真是丰富，但我还是更希望你叫我的名字——<color=#dbc291ff>帕里斯</color>。
You have so many nicknames for me, miss. But I would prefer you to call me by my name: <color=#dbc291ff>Paris</color>.
有人闯进来了——穿着不是悬锋城的士兵，你是何人？
Someone has broken in... You do not wear the armor of a Castrum Kremnos soldier. Who are you?
I came to rescue you two.
太好了！雅努斯都不给开的门你给开了，你比雅努斯还牛！
Oh felicitations! You opened the door that not even Janus would! You are greater than Janus themselves!
I'm here to watch the show.
伙计，你说的戏总不能是我们被处刑的表演吧？这可不好看，放了我，带你去圣城看好的！
My friend, by show... you do not mean the performance of our execution, do you? That would be a terrible display. Release me and I will take you to a real show in the holy city!
哦！我知道，那些大英雄们都喜欢给自己起各种各样的称号——你一定也是外出冒险的英雄吧，快救救我们！
Oh! I know! Great heroes love to give themselves all sorts of titles... You must be a hero out on a great adventure, too? Quick, you must save us!
毫无尊严的懦夫，要逃走你就自己逃吧。
You dishonorable coward. If you wish to escape, do it alone.
什么？你是不是打仗把脑袋打坏了——如果你的构造有脑袋的话。
What? Have you battled so much that your brain got knocked silly? ...If you have a brain in there, that is.
你没听他们说要把我们变成祭品，切成丁抛到铸魂的金血里，平息尼卡多利的愤怒吗？
Have you not heard that they plan to make us sacrifices? To dice our bodies and cast them into the soul-melting golden blood to quell the rage of Nikador?
那又如何。身为尼卡多利的造物，战败便是对吾父最大的亵渎，理应投身死潮向其谢罪。
So what? As a creation of Nikador, defeat is the greatest blasphemy against my father. It is only natural that I should cast my body into the waves of death to apologize for my failure.
得了吧，它要是看到别人变成碎块下锅就能消气，就应该是掌管厨艺的泰坦！
Are you serious? If they are the type to be appeased by seeing others diced and cast into a pot, would that not make them the Titan of cooking!?
你们…竟然敢在悬锋城中侮辱尼卡多利——守卫！有闯入者……
You... You dare insult Nikador within the walls of Castrum Kremnos... Guards! There is an intruder...
帕里斯用臂铠砸在天谴猎手的头盔上，顿时让本就负创的她昏死了过去。
Paris smashes his gauntlet against the Furiae Archer's helmet, causing the already injured Titankin to pass out immediately.
我们可不能拒绝命运赐予生机，就像我们也不能拒绝命运赐予的失败一样——伙计，她这副石铸的身子可不轻，待会就麻烦你搭把手了。

We cannot decline an opportunity to live granted to us by fate! Just as we cannot escape a failure fated by destiny... My friend, this stone statue is by no means light. I will need you to help me lift her.
男人托起天谴猎手的身体，吃力地往出口走去……
The man lifts the body of the Furiae Archer and struggles towards the exit...
无耻的懦夫，蒙羞的败者，以尼卡多利之名——绝不允许你们踏出悬锋城半步。
Shameless cowards, useless failures. In the name of Nikador, I will not allow you to step one foot outside Castrum Kremnos!
坏了坏了，伙计，这可怎么办呢？
Oh crap, oh crap. My friend, what do we do?
居然还想逃跑…看来只有在献祭前切断祭品的四肢，才能让胆怯者安然接受命运。
You're still trying to escape...? I see. It seems that only when a sacrifice's limbs have all been sliced off clean that these cowards will finally accept their fate.
I cannot accept any of that.
Not if I slice yours off first.
That's pushing the family-friendly rating a bit too far.
说得好！看你的语气肯定不是泛泛之辈！就靠你对付他了，英雄！
That's the spirit! That is not the tongue of a mere citizen! Take them out for us, hero!
别跑——掠夺祭品的异乡人，一起成为吾父蜜酿的配料吧！
Stop right there! Outlanders that plundered the sacrifices to our lord! You will become seasonings in my father's honey brew!
哼哼，我的伙伴厉害吧，快来夸…等等，他们人呢？
Hmph. Isn't my partner amazing? You can say it... Wait, where did they go?
Looks like they already ran off.
这个帕里斯也太不讲义气了！我们还没问关于阿卡迪亚的事情呢！
This Paris guy knows nothing about loyalty! We still didn't get to ask him anything about Arcadia!
算了，记忆的气味飘向了奥赫玛的方向，我们继续让记忆向前吧——
Forget it. The memory fragrance is floating towards Okhema. Let's continue following the memory...
伙伴，一起继续探索往世吧，雕像小姐和伊阿宋还等着我们呢。
Partner, let's keep exploring the past! The statue lady and Iason are still waiting for us!
将我的性命从灰黯之手夺回的勇士，你何时才能从纷争掀起的雾潮中归还呢？
Oh warrior who stole my life back from the Hand of Shadow. When will you return from the tides wrought by strife?
俄诺涅元老，您的明智是洗涤云崖的溪流，不应让这城外的尘埃染了这水池的清澈。
Elder Oenone, your wisdom is the stream that cleanses Dawncloud. You mustn't allow a speck of dust from outside the great city to infect the clarity of this pool.
戍卫长，莫要调笑我。若无未归的英雄相救，我这摊池水早已沦入黑潮了。
Captain, do not mock me. If it were not for the soldier who is yet to return, this pool would have long since been engulfed by the black tide.
但先前抵御敌军的将士已然凯旋，您所等待的那位帕里斯不在阵中，已是凶多吉少。
But the soldiers who fought off the enemy have already returned triumphant. That Paris that you wait for has not yet returned, which means his fate is likely one of misfortune.
唉！若是如此，我又有何脸面于云崖之上安然度日？如果他战死沙场，我便辞去元老职务，久居于城墙之前为他悼念。

Agh! If that is so, how can I bring myself to return to Dawncloud and live my days in peace? If he fell on the sands of the battlefield, I shall resign my post as the elder and spend the rest of my days before the city walls in remembrance of him.
呵，您如此执迷，不知是塔兰顿的砝码压住了您，还是墨涅塔的金丝缠住了您？
Hah. This obsession of yours... I cannot tell if you are crushed under the weights of Talanton or bound by the golden thread of Mnestia?
你…戍卫长，先去看看远处靠近城门的是何人吧。
You... Captain, go and see who that is that approaches the city gate.
Paris appears, as does the Furiae Archer.
是帕里斯！我的恩人！赞美命运三泰坦！
It's Paris! My savior! Praised be the Three Titans of Fate!
俄诺涅女士，您还是如初见时那样美丽！菲罗克长官也还是那么阴郁，看来胜利也扫不去您心中的愁绪。
Lady Oenone, you are as ravishing as the day I met you! Captain Philoc, your face is as overcast as ever. I see even victory cannot rid you of the melancholy in your heart.
帕里斯…看来是你的言谈令塞纳托斯都感到厌烦，让它把你从冥河里丢了出来。
Paris... I see even Thanatos grew weary of your incessant ramblings and cast you out from the River of Souls themselves.
等等，你身旁的是献给奥赫玛的战利品吗？
Wait, do you bring with you a spoil of war as an offering to Okhema?
不，她也是从天谴之矛下逃离的可怜人，请收留她吧。
No, she is an escapee of the Lance of Fury that deserves our mercy. Please, you must offer her shelter.
收留？荒谬！你知道有多少同胞曾死于这些眷属的手下吗？
Shelter? Preposterous! Do you know how many of our kind have died at the hands of these Titankin?
等等，戍卫长，全世之座下可容天地，莫要让你的仇恨遮蔽了它头顶的黎明——我以元老的名义为她担保，带她进城吧。
Wait, Captain. The Throne of Worlds accepts all. Do not allow your hatred to blind you to the dawn above... By my name as the elder, I will vouch for her. Bring her into the city.
感谢俄诺涅元老！您的善良令刻法勒的胸怀显得更加宽广，令这圣城更加高贵！
Thank you, Elder Oenone! Your kindness broadens even the heart of Kephale and crowns this holy city with even greater nobility!
不用谢我，帕里斯。若不是你挽回了我险些断于黑潮的命运之丝，我的这份善良也无处可施……
No need to thank me, Paris. If you had not saved my thread of fate from being cut off by the black tide, this kindness would have already been lost...
看啊，你所守护的人和部下挽着敌人的手步入城中，而那被挽起的手可能在前日刚刚射杀了你的父兄。

Do you see? The person and subordinate whom you protect has marched into the city hand-in-hand with the enemy. Your fathers and brothers could have just lost their lives to those very hands a few days ago.
我们将士为元老们舍命拼杀，而元老却因情欲所惑，将我们的仇敌视作宾客……
We soldiers risk our lives fighting to protect the elders, yet they are tempted by lust and throw open the doors to our enemies...
是啊，在金丝的牵掣下，塔兰顿的天秤也难免倾斜，雅努斯的指引也失了方向……
That's right! With the interference of the golden thread, even Talanton's scale become tilted, and direction from Janus loses its way...
不会吧，伟大的大工匠，难道您修不好吗？
Surely not. Grand Craftsman, are you saying that you cannot repair her?
能。材料，没有。大地的石料，纷争的金血，理性的种子——一无所有。
Can. Materials, have not. Earth's stones, golden blood of strife, seeds of reason — nothing there is.
唉，怎么又都是泰坦们的东西，他们这些家伙还真是爱难为凡人。
Ah! Why are all those things derived from the Titans. Oh, how they rejoice at the suffering of mortals.
放弃吧…不要再玷污我残存的荣耀了…让我投身命定的冥流……
Just give up... Do not further sully what little honor I have remaining... Let me give myself to my destiny in the underworld...
姑娘，你都快没气了，就少说点丧气话吧。
Miss, your strength is fading. Do not waste it on pessimism.
让我想想办法…大工匠，这东西是？
Let me think of a way... Grand Craftsman, what is this?
算碑，圣物，欧洛尼斯的。解开预言，改变时空，很难。
Calculation tablet, divine object, Oronyx's it is. Unravel prophecy, change time and space, hard it is.
哦！我知道这东西，雅努萨波利斯的神棍最喜欢玩的玩具，应该也能修好她身上的窟窿！
Oh! I know this! This is Janusopolis' astrologers' favorite toy! This should be able to repair the holes in her body!
Understand, you do not. Use it, you can not.
嗐，奥赫玛这么大，就找不到一个玩得转这玩意儿的人吗？
Hey, with a city as vast as Okhema, are you sure we can find no one that can make this thing spin?
欧洛尼斯亲传弟子来了。
Disciple of Oronyx, at your service.
国服第一算碑玩家申请出战！
Calculation tablet national champion, ready for battle!
啊！是之前的恩人，没想到你真的能打过泰坦眷属…不对，我就知道你一定能脱身！
Ah! My savior from before! I never expected you would defeat the Titankin... I mean, I just knew you'd make it out alive!
既然你懂算碑，那这次也要拜托你帮忙了——别担心，我帕里斯绝不会让你白忙这么多次，事后定有重谢！
As you understand this thing, I must ask you for help once more... Fear not, Paris will not let your efforts be in vain again, and they will be greatly appreciated!
总感觉这家伙说话不怎么靠谱…算了，为了雕像小姐，就让我们帮帮他吧。
I can't help but feel like this guy is shady... Whatever, let's help him for the statue lady's sake.
太厉害了，恩人！我在奥赫玛这么久居然不知道有你这号文武双全的英雄！
My savior, you are truly amazing! After all my years in Okhema, I cannot fathom that I knew not of a hero as both wise and strong as you!
你多活几十年就知道了。
Live a few more centuries and you'll see.
Why... Why are you trying to save me?
我想从你身上知道一些事情。
I need some information from you.
你未来会有我需要的东西。
You will have something I need one day.
为了得到崇高道德的赞许。
To receive the Praise of High Morals.
但你先扪心自问一下，为了得到赞许而行使的善行，值得崇高道德的瞥视吗？
You can't help but stop to ask yourself... If something is done in order to receive praise, is it worthy of being looked at as highly moral?
是吧，既然你自己也没想清楚自己的动机，崇高道德也很难对你加以信赖。
Right? As you were not even clear of your motivation, the high morality finds it hard to place their faith in you.
是吧，君子论迹不论心，你的果断与自信值得崇高道德…在这里或许是塔兰顿的奖赏！
Right? It's about the means above the ends. Your decisiveness and confidence are worthy of high moral praise... Perhaps this is a reward from Talanton themself!
呵，果然另有所图。那你呢，叫做帕里斯的士兵。
Hmph, I knew you had ulterior motives. Then what of you, soldier by the name of Paris?
墨涅塔的神言说过：不能对美丽的事物的逝去熟视无睹。懂我意思吧，美丽的姑娘。
The divine declaration of Mnestia states: One must not turn a blind eye as beauty dies. You understand what I mean, don't you, beautiful girl?
不过还有另一个原因，那便是我对你的言行感到不快！
However, I have another reason. Your words and actions displease me!
面对不公的死亡，你不选择抗争，甚至不愿选择挣扎。我要救下你的命，就是要向你证明：命运可不是不能战胜的东西！
You chose not to fight back even in the face of an unfair execution — you would not even put up a struggle. I saved your life to prove to you: Destiny is something that can be defeated!
行啦，既然来了奥赫玛，逛云石市集可比骂我蠢有意思多了，我带你看看吧！
Okay, okay. Well, as we are in Okhema, a browse of Marmoreal Market would be far more entertaining than sitting around calling me foolish all day. I'll take you!
Are we going into a romance plot now?
Can I just take my rewards and go?
哎呀，不好意思，忘了我们的恩人——一起来吧，你的报酬也在这边。
Oh, sorry. I forgot about you, our savior. Come with us, I shall take care of your payment there, too.
嗨，梅塔涅拉婆婆，最近生意还好吗？
天呐，是小帕里斯！你还活着！婆婆都准备好给塞纳托斯为你摆渡的祭品了！
Heavens! Young Paris! You're alive! I was all prepared to give offerings to Thanatos for your safe passage!
哎哟，那我可真是谢谢您嘞，现在我活着回来了，不如就把这祭品送我吧。
Oh, then I thank you for your kindness. Seeing as I have returned alive, how about giving these offerings to me instead?
呵呵，行啊，拿着吧——等等，婆婆是花了眼吗，你身后怎么站着一个尼卡多利的眷属！？
Hah, fine, take them. Hold on, am I seeing things? Is that a Nikador Titankin behind you!?
放心吧，婆婆，她是咱们奥赫玛的客人。
Fear not, granny. She is a guest of Okhema.
这样呀…不好意思，欢迎你来到奥赫玛，客人。
I see... My apologies, welcome to Okhema, dear guest.
呵呵，这里是奥赫玛，在刻法勒的庇护下，没什么好怕的。
Hah, here in the land of Okhema, we are under the protection of Kephale. There is nothing to fear here.
婆婆我这辈子没出过城，所以悬锋城的事情都是听来的——你们不种地只打仗，估计连水果都只能吃抢来的吧？

I have never left this city in my life, so all I know of Castrum Kremnos is what I've heard... like how you live only to fight and do not farm the land. I imagine the only fruit you've ever tasted is what you have pillaged?
来了奥赫玛，就让婆婆请你吃个够！来点苹果？还是麦迪特瑞恩蜜果？
You are in Okhema now, let me treat you to a feast! Would you care for an apple? Maybe a Mediterrana fig?
别推辞了，梅塔涅拉婆婆平时可抠门得很。
You must not refuse her generosity. Granny Metanella is normally extremely stingy.
但我族的身体只为战争铸造，没有进食的器官。
But my race is built only for battle. We have no organs with which to feed.
那你是怎么维持生命的？
Then how do you sustain yourselves?
我等受尼卡多利的金血浇灌，无需外物维生，只以纷争为食。
We are bathed in the golden blood of Nikador. We need no external objects to sustain ourselves. We feed only on strife.
我等的言语依靠甲胄间的共鸣，乃是纷争的回响。
Our language is created using resonance between our helmets and armor, which is the echo of strife.
瞧瞧这天杀的尼卡多利，自己天天喝蜜酿，却不让自己的孩子有嘴品尝美味。
Get a load of this wretched Nikador. Spending their days drowning in their sacramental wine while never giving their children mouths to sample the flavors of the world.
小帕里斯啊，等你打赢了那个疯王，咱们也把他的嘴封上！
Young Paris. When you finally defeat the Mad King, let us seal his mouth shut, too!
呵，如此懦弱的男人，面对尼卡多利只会抱头鼠窜吧。
Hah. A coward like him would run for the hills when faced with Nikador.
是啊，我肯定得跑——要是死在战场上，可就没机会去<color=#dbc291ff>阿卡迪亚</color>了。
That's right, I'd have to run. If I die on the battlefield, I'll never get my chance to go to <color=#dbc291ff>Arcadia</color>.
唉，你这孩子怎么还惦记着这事儿，婆婆得再说说你了……
Tsk, you are still obsessed with that idea? I need to sit you down for a good talking to...
啊！既然咱们的客人不能吃水果，我们就去另外一家店看看吧——
Ah! Well, since our guest cannot partake of fruits, we will take a look around another store.
你拿自己的祭品当报酬？
You are using your own offerings as payment?
Are you just getting rid of me like that?
Two lives saved and I get some snacks?
呃…最近手头比较紧，先以此物表达我的心意…我们快走吧，不然她得唠叨到幕匿时了！
Ughh... Things have been a bit tight lately. Take these as a token of my gratitude for now... We need to hurry off, or she'll nag me till Curtain-Fall Hour!
赞美瑟希斯，愿你令我的子孙理智长存，别写些不三不四的书……
Praise Cerces! May you grant my descendants wisdom that their writings never grow cheap...
帕里斯？你小子没死啊！还好我给你留了新的《金毯密传》——等会儿，你带了个什么过来！
Paris? You're alive! Thank heavens I saved the new Secret of the Golden Carpet here for you... Just a second, what is that you've brought with you!?
喂，这是咱们奥赫玛的客人，别这么无礼。
Hey! This is a guest of Okhema. Don't be so rude.
哈抱歉抱歉，我只在战报和故事里听说过纷争的眷属，有点激动了。
Ho, I apologize. I have only ever read of the Titankin of Strife in battle reports and stories — I got a little startled.
对了，你刚刚提到新的《金毯密传》，这次的内容有提到阿卡迪亚吗？
So, this Secret of the Golden Carpet you mentioned, does it say anything about Arcadia in it?
这次能来点有效信息吗？
Will we get any information this time?
Please don't leave us hanging this time!
没有，估计是作者开新坑去了。现在大伙更爱看黄金裔英雄跟黑潮怪物对抗的剧情，这种乌托邦题材已经过时啦。

It does not. I imagine writer have moved on to other interests. Nowadays, people want to read about the heroes of Chrysos Heir doing battle with the monsters of the black tide. This kind of utopian storylines has grown old now.
等等，我刚刚就想问…阿卡迪亚是什么？
Wait, I meant to ask... What is this Arcadia?
你们悬锋城人这么不爱看书吗？阿卡迪亚是墨涅塔编织的人间仙境，是它送给瑟希斯的礼物之一。在金丝的缠缚下，天谴之矛无法攻入，灰黯之手无法触及……

Do you not read in Castrum Kremnos? Arcadia is a wonderland woven by Mnestia. It was one of their gifts to Cerces. Safe under the bindings of the golden thread, the Lance of Fury cannot pierce it and the Hand of Shadow cannot touch it...
呵，听上去是人们恐惧纷争与死亡而编造出的故事罢了。
Hah. It sounds like no more than a story created by those that fear strife and death.
——不，阿卡迪亚肯定是存在的。因为我手中就有从阿卡迪亚流出的<color=#dbc291ff>蜕生金丝</color>。
...No. Arcadia definitely exists. Because I hold in my hand a <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Thread of Rebirth</color> from Arcadia itself.
帕里斯从衣物中拿出了一枚纺锤，上面缠绕着几条金色的丝线，在黎明之下熠熠生辉。
Paris produces a spindle from his robes, around which a number of golden threads glisten in the dawn light.
哦哟，居然舍得在别人面前掏出你的宝贝了？
Oh, I never expected you to reveal your treasure to others?
我曾于黑潮之中救下一位逃难的公主，为表感谢，她才将此国宝赠予我。我每日能感受到这丝线在对我低语，呼唤着我前往那遥远的异乡……
I once rescued a princess as she fled from the black tide. As her thanks, she gifted me this national treasure. Every day I can hear it whispering to me, calling me to go to a distant land...
总有一天，我会找到那个地方，躲开这无休无止的纷争和虎视眈眈的死亡，和所爱之人一起享受永恒的浪漫。
One day, I will find this place. I will escape this endless strife and ever-looming death and enjoy an eternal romance with the one I love.
呵呵，你的所爱之人是谁呢？不会就是送给你这宝贝的<color=#dbc291ff>俄诺涅女士</color>吧？
Hah, who is this one you love? Surely it is not <color=#dbc291ff>Lady Oenone</color>, the one that gifted you this treasure?
Am I sensing a love triangle...?
别开这种玩笑了，若不是往日的恩情，我连与她对话的资格都没有。
Don't joke like that. If I had not saved her life, I would not even have the right to speak with her now.
比起受万人爱戴的元老，更合适的旅伴反倒是另一种人——未曾沐浴过爱的人，未曾理解过何为浪漫的人。

Rather than the elder that already enjoys the love of thousands, I am more suited to another type of traveling companion... One that has never felt love before, one that has never understood the true meaning of romance.
说到这里，帕里斯饶有兴味地看向天谴猎手。
Having said these words, Paris turns to the Furiae Archer with obvious admiration in his eyes.
无论她是敌人还是异类，我都希望自己能成为浪漫的眷属，亲自将那美好的金丝缠在那位旅伴的身上，绞断她原本冰冷的命运。
Be she an enemy or an outsider, I hope that I could become her romantic companion. That I could wind that perfect golden thread around her body and finally break the cold fate she once faced.
…真是无趣而肤浅的话题，在这里继续讨论你的妄想吧，我还是对那边店中的盔甲更感兴趣。
...Such a pointless and shallow topic. Continue indulging in your delusions as you please. I have more interest in the armor in that store over there.
等等，那不是盔甲，是裙子啊——
Wait, that's not armor. Those are dresses...
唉，这姑娘…恩人，麻烦你看着她点，别被戍卫当成敌人给敲碎了。
Ah, that girl... My savior, could you keep an eye on her? Please do not allow the guards to mistake her for an enemy and reduce her to rubble.
帕里斯，你这套话术逗逗城里的姑娘就算了，对那种东西也能说出口啊？
Paris. I get you teasing the city girls with that sweet talk, but you'd really say those things to something like that?
你们瑟希斯的传人真是保守，在「浪漫」面前，万物都应一视同仁……
You descendants of Cerces are far too narrow-minded. In the eyes of "romance," all should be seen as equal.
不会在这儿还要收集这个吧？
She's not still collecting those things here, is she?
嘘，这附近好像有熟悉的味道……
Shh, there is a familiar scent nearby.
奥赫玛的城中…有好多这样的蝴蝶。
The city of Okhema... There are so many butterflies here.
那是若虫，和你一样，是泰坦的眷属。
They are nymphs. They are Titankin, like yourself.
是以前的阿格莱雅！似乎和现在没什么差别呢？
That's Aglaea from the past! She seems no different to how she is today?
Probably because she's a Chrysos Heir.
因为她有墨涅塔的力量吧。
回去得问问她怎么保养的。
We'll have to ask her for her skincare routine.
真是稀奇呀，天谴之矛的士兵在云石市集可不常见——欢迎来到永恒之城，悬锋的客人。
How unusual! A soldier of the Lance of Fury browsing the Marmoreal Market is a rare sight indeed... Welcome to the Eternal City, guest from Kremnos.
方才你提到这蝴蝶也是泰坦的眷属，是哪一尊泰坦呢？
You said that these butterflies are Titankin. Which Titan are they descended from?
既然提到蝴蝶，那便是墨涅塔了。
Well, when it comes to butterflies, they are naturally descendants of Mnestia.
据说，墨涅塔追求瑟希斯的爱而不得，最终抱憾而终。心生垂怜的塞纳托斯拾起那些为爱而逝的亡魂，投入浪漫的残茧，令其孕育出金蝶——也就是这些眷属。

Legend has it that Mnestia longed for the love of Cerces, but their love was unrequited. They died with a sense of deep regret. Feeling great pity, Thanatos cast those that had lost their lives to love into a cocoon of romance and allowed them to be reborn as golden butterflies... These were the resulting Titankin.
它们如今也在为自己神明所爱的神明忙碌，追寻浪漫的足迹，为墨涅塔收集着疗愈瑟希斯的爱意……
They now work hard for the love of their beloved god. They trace the trail of romance and collect love to heal Cerces for Mnestia's sake...
呵，这儿的人都在赞颂墨涅塔的痴情，原来只是个一厢情愿的愚神。
Hah. The people here praise Mnestia for their unconditional love. Turns out they are no more than a foolish deity caught in a one-sided infatuation.
因为用「理性」目光来看，「浪漫」确实是一种无法理解的存在吧。
That is because if you look at "romance" through the eyes of "reason," it is an existence that one cannot explain.
要我说，让自己沉浸在幻想中，还将幻想附加在其他人的身上，自说自话地上演一个人的悲剧——如此自私的「浪漫」，只是一场一个人的「纷争」。

If you ask me, immersing oneself in a fantasy and forcing that onto another person is no more than acting out a self-produced tragedy... Such a selfish "romance" is no more than "strife" that one suffers alone.
…或许你是对的，许多带来浪漫的东西，实际上都平凡甚至粗劣，但身陷在其中的人很难意识到这点，他们会将泥潭看作甘泉，将粗丝看作金线。

...Perhaps you are right. Many of the things that bring romance to our lives are in fact so unremarkable they are almost crude. However, this is something that those who have fallen in love struggle to realize for themselves. They see a swamp as a sweet spring and rough twine as a golden thread.
但是浪漫的幼虫又寄生在每个人的心中，不知何时就会蜕化成蝶，让原本看得清的人花了眼。这是墨涅塔赐予每个人的祝福，可能也是诅咒。

But, like parasites, the larvae of romance dwell in the hearts of all. We know not when they will metamorphose into butterflies and change our perception from clarity to bedazzlement. This is the blessing that Mnestia grants to all, though it may also be a curse.
姑娘，离愁时快到了，走吧！
It's almost the Parting Hour, girl! Come on!
是你的朋友在呼唤你吧？告辞，愿金丝不会绊住你的脚步。
Is that your friend calling you? Farewell. I pray that the golden thread will not hinder your footsteps.
怎么样，我们圣城的生活是不是比天天打架的悬锋城幸福多了？
What do you think? Isn't life in the holy city much happier than the life of constant fighting of Castrum Kremnos?
是啊，但我为这样的幸福感到可悲。城外的纷争即将攻破城墙，你们的城民却还沉浸在虚假的平和中，恬不知耻地享受安逸。

It is. But I feel pity for this happiness that you feel. The strife of the outside world prepares to break through your city walls, yet your citizens are immersed in a false sense of peace. You enjoy this tranquility without any shame at all.
相比天谴之矛驯养的喋血狮群，你们不过是刻法勒的溺爱下的一圈羔羊。
Compared to the bloodthirsty lions bred by the Lance of Fury, you are no more than a flock of sheep coddled by the love of Kephale.
但享受安逸的权利恰恰是奥赫玛能凝聚人心的原因。而你的狮群已经把你抛弃了，不如就披上羊皮，享受一下羊圈里的幸福吧。

But it is this right to enjoy tranquility that brings the people of Okhema together. Your pride of lions has already abandoned you. Why not wrap yourself in the wool of a sheep and enjoy the happiness of a flock for yourself?
不说话就当你默许了吧。恩人，那就先告辞了，还得去给她找张大地民尺寸的床。
I'll take your silence as tacit consent. My savior, I will bid you farewell. I must go and find a bed that can sleep a Titankin.
I have a question for you...
嗯？恩人但说无妨，我有问必答。
Oh? Please, tell me, savior. I will tell you all that I know.
Just where on earth is Arcadia?
哈哈，我当然不知道了。如果我有答案，就绝不会在这奥赫玛多逗留一秒。
Haha, how would I know? If I knew that, I wouldn't linger one second longer in Okhema.
我至今为止的人生，只不过是为了那个还未开始的旅途做准备：参军攒钱，收集情报，还有…寻找愿与我同行的旅伴。

My entire life till this moment has been no more than making preparations for a journey I've yet to begin. I joined the army to earn money, I have gathered information, next... I must find someone willing to travel by my side.
等我做好出行的准备，一定会将此次恩情的报偿补还给您的！相信我！
Once my preparations are complete, I will make sure I repay you for this kindness! Believe me!
到现在也不知道阿卡迪亚到底在哪里…帕里斯未来真的去到那个地方了吗？
We still don't know where Arcadia is... Did Paris really make it there in the future?
记忆的味道似乎越来越奇怪了，我们还得再去更接近现在的往世看看……
The memory's scent is growing more and more unusual... We will need to go into the more recent past to see...
或许是没有战事让我感受时间的流逝，奥赫玛的岁月飞逝的速度如同飞矢。
Perhaps the lack of battle meant I also felt the flow of time less acutely, but my days in Okhema have flown by like an arrow.
城中的人们接纳了我，掳走我的士兵愿伴我左右。他们不断向我投来的某种不可名状的事物，那是我在故乡从未感受到的…热情。

The people of the city have accepted me, and the soldiers that once abducted me became my companions. They constantly affronted me with something that I could not properly describe. It was something that I had never felt in my hometown, a type of... kindness.
但在这情感面前，我却觉得这幅石身中愈发空虚，仿佛热情的温度正在蒸发我纷争的金血。
However, in the face of these emotions, I felt my stone body becoming more and more hollow... As if the warmth of this kindness was evaporating my golden blood of strife away.
为战而生的偶像逃离了战争，当命运偏离了航道，船上的灵魂也难免迷惘——
The idol born for war had fled the battlefield, their fate deviates from course. When the ship's trajectory is no longer followed, its passengers' souls become lost in remorse...
于沙场厮杀时，我无需恳请瑟希斯的垂枝，无需驱赶墨涅塔的飞虫。沙与血能遮蔽烦忧，号角声会引我向前。

When I fight on the battlefield, I need not beg for the willow sprig of Cerces, nor drive away the flying insects of Mnestia. My worries find solace in the blood and sand, and the call of the horn guides me forward.
但在这圣城之中，云石天宫的泉水涤去了沙与血，黎明云崖上的歌声盖过了号角声。站在无云遮蔽的天空下，我反倒是什么也看不清了。

But in this holy city, the spring water of Marmoreal Palace has washed clean all the blood and sand. The song of Dawncloud silences the horns. Standing under a clear sky, I instead find that I can see nothing at all.
终于找到你了。欢喜月之初的天宫庆典多么热闹，为何独自遁逃，躲在此处？
I finally found you. The palace's Month of Joy celebration is so lively, but why are you hiding here alone?
我从未参加过此类仪式，不晓得你们的礼节，待在席上怕是会扰了你的兴致。
I have never attended a ritual like this and do not understand your customs. I fear that my presence would ruin your enjoyment.
哈哈哈，满溢之杯在上！法吉娜的典礼中，最需要注意的礼节便是不要讲礼节！
Hahaha, oh great Chalice of Plenty! The most important thing during the festival of Phagousa is to not observe any etiquette!
来吧，就算你没有品尝蜜酿的喉舌，也能与我一起聆听乐曲与欢笑！
Come! Even if you don't have the tongue to savor honey mead with me, you can listen to the songs of celebration and laughter with me!
…好吧，那就由你这放肆之人，带我体会一下这放纵的快乐吧。
...Very well. Then I shall allow an unbridled man such as yourself to show me the joy of indulgence.
若是你为我带来的喧闹能将空虚填满，我也不厌沉入无底的杯中。
If the noise that you bring me can fill this void, I would not resist sinking into the bottomless cup.
你曾举着那天谴的弓矢步步轻移，将箭尖射入敌人的胸膛。
You once raised high your bow of fury and marched on step-by-step, launching arrows deep into your enemies' chests.
那真是一种光荣的职务，可是如今全白费了。
Oh, the glory you gained, all of it now in vain.
That's it! You're such a great dancer, Paris!
我跳得再好，也是大家见惯了的舞蹈。但这场上有一位稀客，说不定能给大家带来不一样的舞蹈——
No matter how great I dance, it is one that you have all seen before. However, we have a rare guest here today that may be able to show us a new dance like no other...
姑娘，来，跟我共舞一曲吧！
哎呀，这没什么难的，跟着歌曲舞动身体就行了。
Come on, it's not difficult! Just move your body to the rhythm.
别害羞啊！给我们看看悬锋城的舞蹈！
Don't be shy! Let us see the dance of Castrum Kremnos!
喂喂，不会是还放不下以前的心里的坎，不想给奥赫玛面子吧？
Hey now! You're not still so attached to your past that you cannot do Okhema the honor of a dance, are you?
哈哈哈，这不是跳得不错嘛！
I'm sorry... I didn't mean to...
在石像破碎的巨响过后，气氛瞬间沉寂。欢笑退潮之后，泛起了低声私语的泡沫——
The sound of the statue shattering to the ground brought the entire atmosphere to dead silence. As the laughter faded, the bubbling of whispers began...
这可是用吉奥里亚的圣石雕刻的，被她一下就碰碎了……
That was carved from the sacred rock of Georios. She smashed it like it was nothing...
是啊，我刚刚还站在她身边…若是撞到我身上，那是不是就直接去见塞纳托斯了？
That's right. I was just standing next to her... If she had fallen on me, I'd have been sent straight to Thanatos, would I not?
听说这家伙造出来就是用来打仗的，说不定还杀过我们的同胞，为什么要让这种东西来宴会啊……
I hear this thing was created only for war. It might have even killed our kin! Why should we allow something like that to come to our celebration...
These people changed their tune quickly...
宇宙评论区现状了属于是。
Essentially the comment sections of the universe.
诸位，请不要当面侮辱我们的客人。
Everyone, do not insult our guest!
这位眷属…女士是我们奥赫玛的贵客，不要将偏见带到这包容的城邦。
This Titankin... This lady is a guest of Okhema. Do not bring your prejudices into this city of acceptance.
戍卫长，泰坦眷属终归和我们凡人之躯有别。让她在这里放开手脚，岂不是在威胁城民的安全？
Captain, the bodies of Titankin and mortals are not the same. Is allowing her to frolic here freely not endangering the lives of the citizens?
嗯，这话也没错——听到了吗？帕里斯，你不该带她来这里。
Hm, you have a point... Did you hear that, Paris? You should not have brought her here.
好吧，我们走就是了，这云石天宫又不是没有其他地方可以玩……
Alright, we'll go. It's not like there is nowhere else in Marmoreal Palace for us to enjoy ourselves.
等等，既然她已经是我们的一员，那也应该遵守我们的法律。
Hold on. She is one of us now. She must obey our laws.
云石天宫是法吉娜赐予我们的馈赠，也是奥赫玛宝贵的古老财产。依照律法，戍卫队应该将破坏此处的犯人扣押，交由法庭判处。

The Marmoreal Palace is a gift to us from Phagousa, and the precious property of Okhema. According to law, the Garrison must detain any criminal that damages this place and take them to the court for sentencing.
啊？不用这么较真吧，别忘了她可是俄诺涅……
Huh? Surely it's not that serious? Don't forget, she is a guest of Elder Oenone...
作为元老的客人，她就可以跳离塔兰顿的制衡吗？
Are you saying that, as a guest of the elder, she is above the checks and balances of Talanton?
是啊，要是这些外来者可以随意绕开我们圣城的律法，那还像话吗？
He's right! You think an outsider being above the laws of our holy city is justifiable?
没错，审判她！连同过去伤害我们奥赫玛人的罪责一起审判！
That's right! Take her for sentencing! Judge her for this damage to Okhema alongside the past offenses she has committed against our people!
看到民意所向了吗？不要再以私情干预此处的公正了，除非你能将这破坏恢复原状！
Do you see the will of the people? Do not use your personal affairs to interfere with the justice of this land any longer! That is, unless you can restore this damaged item to its previous glory?
I may be able to fix it.
Galactic Baseballer to the rescue, once more!
我用无敌的泰坦之力想想办法。
I will use the unmatched power of the Titans to find a way.
对哦，你可以用「欧洛尼斯祷言」来修好这个东西吧！
You're right! We can fix it with Oronyx's Prayer!
恩人？好久不见，原来你也在这宴会上！
My savior? It's been a while. I had no idea you were at the celebration, too!
嗯？陌生人，别趁着醉意在这里说胡话了，你要如何让这碎片重新聚合？
Hm? Stranger, do not allow your drunken revelry to speak nonsense for you. How would you possibly restore these fragments?
这位可是能在悬锋城中来去自如、执掌欧洛尼斯神力的英雄，绝不可能骗你的！恩人，快给他看看你的本事吧——
This hero can enter Castrum Kremnos as they please and wield the divine power of Oronyx. They would never deceive you! My savior, quickly, show them your talents...
看吧，完好如初！咱就不要太计较了，让客人见了笑话可不好。
See? Good as new! Let us fight no more. We would not want to cause a scene in front of our guest.
欧洛尼斯的力量…好吧，既然有能人出手相助，我就不多计较了。
The power of Oronyx... Very well, as a capable hero has stepped in to help, I will take this matter no further.
但是为了大家的安全，还是请这位客人离开这里吧——比起宴会，你更该在战场上起舞。
However, I would ask you still to leave this place for the safety of our citizens... You are more suited to dancing on the battlefield than at a banquet.
戍卫长，你怎么能这么说！
Captain, how could you say such things!?
身为纷争的使徒，你们过往的敌人，确实不该出现在此处打扰你们的欢宴，告辞。
As an envoy of Strife and your former enemy, I should not be here to disturb your celebrations. Farewell.
自从这个眷属来到了奥赫玛，你就变得愈发散漫。别忘了，你还是圣城戍卫的一员，总有一日要为了保护奥赫玛，而与她的族人相杀。

Ever since that Titankin came to Okhema, you have grown even more undisciplined. Do not forget that you are also a member of the holy city's garrison. There will come a day when you will have to fight to the death against her kind to protect Okhema.
我很好奇，现在的你在战场之上，还是否能将剑刃劈向相同的面庞？
I cannot help but wonder... If you were on the battlefield now, could you swing your blade at something with her face?
这是什么意思？难道帕里斯对那个眷属……
What is he saying? Surely Paris and that Titankin aren't...
我早就听说这小子玩得花，原来还有这种癖好，嘿嘿嘿……
I had always heard that guy was a playboy. So, he's into that stuff too, hehehe...
…我不知道，因为我从来没有勇气直面过那些身为敌人的眷属。
...I do not know. To this day, I have never had the courage to face Titankin enemies.
但我知道，刚刚的那位眷属已不是我们的敌人，你不该用言语的剑刃去伤害她。
But what I do know is that THIS Titankin is no longer our enemy. You should not use your words as weapons against her.
唉，黄金之茧啊，不要再用丝线蒙住我同胞的眼睛了…这样的盲人，怎么面对即将到来的纷争呢？
*sigh* Oh, Chrysalis of Gold, weave your silk over the eyes of my fellow no longer... How can someone as blind as him hope to face the approaching strife?
元老与战士心中最重要的东西不是城邦的安危，而是无用的情愫……
The elders and the soldiers no longer hold the safety of this city's people most dear. They prioritize their useless sentiments...
若是人人如此，我们该如何抵御那即将到来的胁迫，难道要乞求墨涅塔用丝线来抵御刀枪吗？
If we all continue this way, how could we hope to fight against the impending threat? Are we supposed to beg Mnestia and their threads to protect us from their weapons?
恩人，你看到眷属姑娘往何处去了吗？
Savior. Did you see where the Titankin girl went?
场景就这么大，总能找到。
There's only so far she can go in this scene.
说的也是，她应该也没走出云石天宫。
I guess you're right. I doubt she left Marmoreal Palace.
刚刚戍卫长说出那样的话，她应该心里很不好受吧……
I'm sure the captain's words just now really hurt her...
恩人，也请你帮我找找吧，我估计她就在集市附近。
Savior, please help me find her. I imagine she must be near the market.
天谴猎手一个人遥望着远方的刻法勒，那石铸的面庞上看不出任何情绪。
The Furiae Archer sits alone, staring at Kephale in the distance. Their carved stone face shows no emotions at all.
Hah, he just doesn't give up.
Don't cry. Your enemies will laugh.
我为什么要哭…而且我也没有制造泪水的能力。
Why would I cry...? I'm not even capable of producing tears.
我的确在想那个戍卫长的话，但并不是感到伤心，而是在思考他说的是不是对的。
I am indeed thinking about what that captain said, but I am not sad. I am thinking about whether what he said is true.
人类，我和你们不一样。刻法勒赋予了你们这个种族无穷的可能性，你们的身体可以用于任何工作，你们可以信仰任何一位泰坦，可以去做任何事情。

Humans are different to us. Kephale has bestowed you with infinite possibilities. Your bodies can be used for any kind of work, you can worship any Titan you choose, and you can do whatever it is you please.
而我们眷属不同。我的身体是为纷争铸造的，无法品尝食物，无法与人共舞，无法繁衍后代。若不是瑟希斯的权能流溢于世，我甚至不该拥有思考和言语的资格。

But we Titankin are not the same. My body is created for strife. I cannot taste food, dance with man, or create future generations. If it were not for Cerces' power overflowing into the world, I would not even have the right to thought or language.
我或许真的该回到战场，这样我才能知道自己是谁——一个连名字都没有的战士，这是我的命运。
Perhaps I should return to the battlefield. That is the only way that I can truly know who I am... A warrior that does not even have a name. That is my fate.
姑娘，你怎么还再念叨着什么命运？若是命运的枷锁如此牢靠，你早就是悬锋城里的砂砾了。
Girl, how is it that you are still speaking of fate? If the chains of fate were truly unbreakable, you would have long since been reduced to gravel in Castrum Kremnos.
命运有什么好害怕的，那抬秤的泰坦糊涂，拉帘的泰坦盲目，开路的泰坦自己也迷路，执掌命运的就是这么三个迷糊虫而已！

What is there to fear about fate? The Titan that bears the scales is themself confused. The Titan that pulls the curtain is blind, and the Titan that guides the way is lost. They are no more than three blind mice that guide the strings of fate!
呵呵，在战场上怯懦如鼠，却有胆量咒骂命运的神明，你可真是把勇气用错了地方。
Hah. You cower on the battlefield, yet wield the courage to curse the gods of fate. I believe this courage of yours is misplaced.
神明不会亲手把剑插进我的胸膛，但你们悬锋城的战士会啊。而且他们尚且无心帮助虔诚祈福的信徒，又怎么会有空来管一个胡言乱语的凡人呢？

The gods would never pierce my heart with their blade personally, unlike the warriors of Castrum Kremnos. What's more, they cannot find it in themselves to assist their most devoted disciples. Do you think they have time to address a rambling mortal like me?
…说的也是，在金宝座上的泰坦眼中，我们不过是微不足道的蝼蚁。
...This is true. To the Titans on their golden thrones, we are no more than insignificant ants.
所以来跟我一起来骂吧，向傲慢的命运宣泄不满吧！
So, why not curse them with me? Come and vent your dissatisfaction with the arrogance of fate!
雅努斯的机关好没意思！
塔兰顿的天秤解密太无聊了！
欧洛尼斯送的小狗不够可爱！
The puppy Oronyx gave me wasn't cute enough!
人家哪里不可爱…不对，才不是小狗！
How am I not cute enough... Wait, I'm not a dog!
虽然不知道是什么意思，但是咱们的恩人已经做好了示范，该你了！
I'm not entirely sure what that means but... Our savior has led by example. It's your turn!
假如那三位泰坦真的能听到我的声音，比起咒骂，我更想让它们对我心中的疑虑做出回答……
If the three Titans could hear me, I would rather they answer the doubts in my heart than curse their existence...
但它们不会回答我的问题，只会在尘世外低吟似是而非的预言，像他们执掌的宿命一样冷漠。如此不负责任的存在，真是一群…一群……

But they will not answer my questions. All they would do is whisper paradoxical prophecies into the ether. They are as cold as the very fate that they control. Beings that flaunt their responsibilities like that are no more than a bunch of... A bunch of...
这…这是泰坦们的语言，它们应该会听得懂。
That... That was the language of the Titans. I'm sure they understand.
专门骂泰坦的脏话？太酷了，教教我！
A specific slur against Titans? That's so cool! Teach me!
不，凡人的口舌无法发出我们的言语……
No, a mortal tongue cannot pronounce our language...
嘿呀，不要小看人类的学习能力——海辣丝儿！
Hey now, don't underestimate a human's ability to learn... Halnals!
雕像小姐的心情看起来好多了，真为她开心！
The statue lady seems much happier now. I'm happy for her!
但是似乎我们还是没有找到什么与阿卡迪亚有关的信息…得让追忆的岁月继续向前一些……
But it looks like we still haven't found enough information on Arcadia... We need to take these memories forward a little more...
听，快听，远方传来了你熟悉的声音。
Listen, listen now! It comes from afar. You know this sound!
是纷争，纷争已经来到，相撞的刀枪在讴吟，被切开的骨肉在歌啸。
It is strife. It has come. The clashing of blades sounds like singing, a chorus of flesh cleaved from bone.
而伴随纷争的，是死亡。我听说无数的将士死在圣城前，那血流似溪水，几度要使冥河示现。
And with strife, comes death. I hear that countless warriors have died before the holy city. Their blood flows like a stream, almost summoning the River of Souls to Earth.
战争的孩子，为何对此熟视无睹？快快迈入这沙场，无论投身哪一边——
Child of war, why do you turn a blind eye? Join in the battle. It matters not for what side...
不，我已放下了我的弓箭，现在我是奥赫玛城中一位普通的妇人了。
No, I hung up my bow long ago. I am now an ordinary woman of Okhema.
这些年来，帕里斯教会了我作为人类的生活有多么安逸幸福。我随那大工匠学了锻造。我能为自己敲造银饰，能为帕里斯铸炼佩剑。
Over the years, Paris taught me the tranquility and happiness to be found in human life. I learned forging under the Grand Craftsman. I crafted silver jewelry for myself and a sword for Paris.
但你最想铸造的是屠戮的武器，是夺命的弓矢，就连给帕里斯的剑都开了饮血的樋。
But what you wish to forge the most is a murderous weapon, a bow and arrows that can take away life. You even put in a fuller in the sword you give to Paris so it can kill better.
…我在卡拉培先生的书上学了炊事。我能做出迷倒人类的食物，能为帕里斯烹饪美味的佳肴。
...I learned to cook from Mister Calpe's books. I can create dishes that humans love and prepare delicious recipes for my Paris.
但你最享受的是屠宰牲畜时的快意，你最喜欢的味道是那生肉散发的血腥味。
But you come alive the most in the moments when you're slaughtering livestock, and your favorite scent is that of raw blood on the chopping block.
我…我还随梅塔涅拉婆婆学了绣花，我为自己编制衣裙，为帕里斯编制挂毯……
I... I also learned how to embroider from Granny Metanella. I wove dresses for myself and tapestries for Paris...
那挂毯上绣的是奄奄一息的奥赫玛人，和挥舞着青铜武器的悬锋城人——因为你而在尼卡多利手中遭受的无数血战，被你织进了一根根纬线之中。

The tapestry shows the people of Okhema breathing their last, with those from Castrum Kremnos wielding the bronze weapons... The countless bloody battles that Okhema suffered under Nikador's rule, all because of you, have been woven to life in the tapestries forevermore.
你想引弦发箭穿头盔铠甲破碎头颅绽放嫣红花蕾前去纷争践踏脆弱躯体成泥玷污白石砖斩骨切肉脆响悦耳前去纷争恐惧憎恨哭嚎环绕燃烧的尸山燃烧残缺败者肢体献祭饮血前去纷争

You want to draw your arrows and shatter helmets and armor making them bloom red flowers as heads shatter go on to the strife and trample the weak bodies into mud that stains the white marble brick beneath the beautiful sounds of chopping flesh and cutting bones go toward the strife fear hate crying out mountains of bodies burning all around you entrails and limbs of the defeated and the sacrificed go to the strife
纷争的子嗣，你想上阵作战吗？
Child of strife, do you wish you go to battle?
哼，本以为你已成为了奥赫玛的子民，结果不能对你寄予期望。
Hmph. And I believed that you had become a citizen of Okhema. I knew it was wrong to place any hope in you.
此刻已是圣城存亡之刻，萨白尼、阿狄安、奥利弗兰卡…奥赫玛的藩邦一个个化为焦土，而天谴之矛已将矛尖指向城门。

The moment of reckoning has come for the holy city. Sabany, Adian, Alflanke... The vassal states of Okhema have been reduced to scorched earth one by one. Now, the Lance of Fury points its tip at the city gates.
为战而生的存在不愿为这庇护你的城邦而战，是不忍于往日的血亲厮杀、不敢面对自己造主的威能、还是不舍在这城中的某个人？

A being born for war refuses to fight to protect this city. Could it be that you can't bear to fight with your past relatives? Perhaps you don't dare face the might of your creator? Or maybe there is someone in this city that you cannot leave?
但我要告诉你，你所留恋的那个人马上就会登上战场了。
Whatever the reason, I must tell you: That man that you cannot bear to part with is about to step onto the battlefield.
军令已经下达，身为一个强壮的青年，他有义务捍卫圣城，乃至献出生命——这是他的命运，值得他引以为傲。
The military orders have been released. As a young man that is fit to fight, he has a duty to protect the sacred city, even if it costs his life. This is his fate, and he should be proud of it.
听，这城门前正放着悲声：有一些妇女在这里呼唤她们的丈夫，有一些在呼唤她们的年老的母亲，还有一些在呼唤她们的儿女，像飞鸟在悲唤雏儿。
Listen! Hear the sound of wailing from the front of the city gate: Wives call for their husbands and their elderly mothers, while others scream for their children. Just hear how they suffer.
而你，你如今依然在刻法勒的宝座前显露着你石刻的颜面，那没有表情的颜面像是带着笑意。
And you, you bow before the throne of Kephale with your stone face. Your emotionless expression has almost a smile in its place.
登上战场…若是和帕里斯一起…或许……
Go to the battlefield... If I am with Paris... Maybe...
唉，墨涅塔啊，请赐予我浪漫的奇迹吧！
Oh Mnestia, please grant me a romantic miracle!
Do you need my help again?
啊，大恩人，真是太久没见了！你总是在我最需要帮助的时候出现，让我不得不相信命运的眷顾了！
Ah, my savior! It has been far too long! You always appear when I need you most. I cannot help but feel that fate is always watching out for me!
你也知道，现在奥赫玛的战况严峻，悬锋城已经打到城门口了，如今又要动员我们城中的戍卫出战。
I'm sure you are aware that Okhema is in grave danger. As the forces of Castrum Kremnos have made it to the city gate, now we have to mobilize the guards of the city garrison to battle.
这次敌军带着尼卡多利的神启袭来，上阵的士兵怕是凶多吉少——但我可不想死！
The enemy forces are attacking with the Revelation of Nikador. I fear any soldier that face them will meet a grim fate... But I don't want to die!
You want to desert your duty again?
恩人，我不是不爱这养育我的圣城，但还有理想没有完成——我还没有见到阿卡迪亚，我不想在步入冥河的时候都没能见到它一面！

My savior, it is not that I do not love this city that raised me. It's just that I have a dream that I have not yet completed... I have still not seen Arcadia. I don't want to enter the River of Souls without ever having laid eyes on it!
所以，随他们怎么说吧，叛徒、逃兵，懦夫…我都无所谓，义务、责任、使命我都可以背弃，但我一定要到那个地方。
So, let them say what they will about me. Traitor, deserter, coward... My duty, my responsibility, and my mission, I will happily abandon them all, but I must reach that place.
我已备好了出逃的行囊，但在这之前，我希望能有人与我同行。你知道是谁的，对吧？
I have already prepared my bags for my escape. But, before I go, there is someone that I hope would accompany me. You know who that is, right?
Aren't you two moving a bit fast?
呵呵，朝夕相伴这么久了，而且明眼人都能看出我的心意。
Hah, we have spent many days and nights together now. Anyone with sense can see how I feel for her.
Me? But wouldn't that be wrong?
哈哈，恩人，你就别在这种场合跟我开玩笑了。
Haha, my savior, this is not the time to be joking with me.
我希望能与她一同离开，哪怕我们死在路上，也能用浪漫的翅膀逃离塞纳托斯的手掌，化作一对相伴的飞蝶飞向那个地方。
I want to leave with her. Even if we die on our path, we can fly into the hands of Thanatos together on the wings of romance. We can become butterflies and fly to that place together.
恩人，这份恋情离不开你的帮助。在我心中，你一直是墨涅塔化身一般的存在。
Savior, this love of mine has always relied on your assistance. In my heart, you are like an embodiment of Mnestia herself.
现在，我要向她表明我的心意与愿望。请你为我见证，为我祝福，给我力量…这是我最后拜托你的一个忙了。
Now, I will confess my love and wishes to her. Please bear witness and give me your blessings and strength... This is the last favor I will ask of you.
You have my blessings. Go for it!
你俩过好日子比什么都强。
Nothing is more important than your happiness.
I'll be here with my popcorn.
谢谢恩人，那我就去了，愿你能再次给予我好运。
Thank you, savior. I will go now. I pray that you can bring me good fortune once more.
帕里斯，我听说你要奔赴战场了，是吗？
Paris, I hear you are planning to go to the battlefield. Is that true?
是的，而我也已经做出了决定。
I did. And I have already made my decision.
一起逃跑吧！/一起并肩作战吧！
Run away together!/Fight together, side by side!
并肩作战？不不不，开什么玩笑，我会死在战场上的！
Fight side by side? No, no, no... Are you joking? I'll die on the battlefield!
可我会保护你的，我愿背弃悬锋城与尼卡多利，将一切力量为奥赫玛，为你所用！
But I will protect you. I will abandon Castrum Kremnos and Nikador, and give all of my power to Okhema. Use it as you please!
我会成为你最好的战友，与你共同承担这伟大的义务与使命，一起守卫……
I will become your greatest ally and share the weight of your duty and mission. Let us guard...
什么义务，什么使命，我根本不在乎，让悬锋城和奥赫玛带着它们一起见冥河去吧！
Duty? Mission? I don't care about those things! Castrum Kremnos and Okhema can disappear into the River of Souls with them for all I care!
姑娘，这个城中我在乎的只有你一人，其他人都无所谓…你愿意跟我走吗？
Girl, you are the only person that I care about in this entire city. No one else matters... Will you go with me?
不要再犹豫了，我们去找阿卡迪亚，躲开纷争与死亡，永远在浪漫中生活下去！
Hesitate no more. Let us go in search of Arcadia! We can escape strife and death and live a life of eternal romance!
你可以继续锻造饰品、烹饪美味的食物、编织美丽的挂毯，让你在奥赫玛找到的新生活在那里延续……
You can continue crafting jewelry, cooking delicious meals, and weaving beautiful tapestries. Your new life that you discovered in Okhema... you can continue it there...
而我们彼此也不应该是什么战友，而应该是更重要、更浪漫的存在。
We were never meant to be allies in battle. Our relationship is something more important, something more romantic.
太好了！既然这样，我在奥赫玛城中的理想也算是实现了！
Felicitations! My Okhema dream has finally come true!
帕里斯掏出了自己怀中的纺锤，将丝线的一段缠绕在自己的戒指上。
Paris pulled out the spindle from his chest pocket and wrapped a section of the thread around the ring on his finger.
他犹豫了片刻，继而将自己最为珍视的这捆金丝递给了面前的泰坦眷属——
He hesitated for a second, then proceeded to hand his most precious golden thread to the Titankin before him...
来，姑娘，拿好，它的长度足以延展到城外了。
Come, girl, hold this. It is long enough to stretch outside the city.
我们一起行动太过惹眼，你先混着攻势出城。半个时段之后，我循着丝线的方向来找你。
It is too obvious if we make our move together. You use the chaos of the attack to slip out of the city first. In half an hour, I will follow the golden thread to find you.
呵呵，循着金丝找到命定之人的位置，像是墨涅塔的寓言一样，是不是很浪漫？
Hah, following the golden thread to locate the person you are fated for... it's just like the fable of Mnestia. Don't you think it's romantic?
是吧！你就快趁着幕匿时先动身吧，现在大部分人都在睡觉，我马上就来找你！
Isn't it? Leave quickly while the hour of Curtain Fall is still with us and most people are still sleeping. I will come and find you soon!
Romance... I will never understand it...
太好了，恩人，多亏了有你的见证才这么顺利！
Oh felicitations, my savior! This all went so smoothly thanks to you bearing witness.
This actually had nothing to do with me.
我怎么觉得气氛不太对…
Why did that seem a little off to me...?
哈哈，她一直是个容易害羞的姑娘，你又不是不知道。
Haha, she's always been the shy type. You know this.
恩人，你也不想在这里跟尼卡多利拼个你死我活吧？不如和我们一起走，路上还能有个照应。
My savior, you don't wish to fight to the death with Nikador here either, do you? Why not come with us, so that we can look after each other along the way?
接下来应该就要去找阿卡迪亚了吧？我们就跟他一起走吧！
They're going to Arcadia now, right? Let's go with him!
Girl, what is the meaning of this?
不会吧，难道是你把戍卫长打成这样的？
It can't be... Did you do this to captain?
帕里斯，你在说什么！？这个泰坦眷属是——
Paris, what are you saying!? This Titankin is...
呼——还好有恩人在，但为什么悬锋城的战士会闯进城里？
Phew... Thank the heavens you are here, savior. But how did the soldiers of Castrum Kremnos get into the city?
Isn't it obvious...? This is all... your fault!
是你让那邪物踏足了奥赫玛…令城中的戍卫对眷属放松了警惕…而她如今就在城外攻打奥赫玛的队伍中——这就是你救下的邪物，恩将仇报的叛徒！

You allowed that wicked creature to step foot inside Okhema... You caused the city guards to lose their vigilance around Titankin... Now, she has joined the team outside the gates to attack Okhema... This is the creature that you saved. See how your kindness is repaid with vengeance and betrayal!
姑娘她，怎么会…我们明明约好了……
That girl, she... How could... We made a promise...
戍卫长！我们事后再来定罪，你伤势太重，请不要再多言了！
Captain! We can settle blame later. Your wounds are severe. Please save your words.
咳！我…我必须要说…在塞纳托斯降临前，我要诅咒你们这两个混账……
Ack! I... I must say this... Before Thanatos descends... I curse you two vile scoundrels...
你们的那些什么浪漫…爱…是我们用牺牲和鲜血来维护的…而我还要舍命保护你们这些盲目的愚者……
You and your romance... Your love... It is us that have sustained it with our blood and sacrifice... And now I have to pay with my life to protect you blind fools...
我诅咒你们…得不到{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的指引…得不到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的启示…被{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}予以严正的审判……

I curse you... to never gain {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s guidance... to never gain {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s guidance... to face stern judgement at the hands of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}...
永远…见不到…那该死的墨涅塔……咳！
May you never... lay eyes on... your godforsaken Mnestia... Ahhck!
元老，他已经…被灰黯之手牵走了。
Elder, he... He has been taken by the Hand of Shadow.
这、这是因为我们的错吗？是因为我们将纷争的眷属放了进来，所以才会变成这样！
Was... Was this our fault? Is this only happening because we allowed the Titankin of strife to enter the city!?
果然，我果然不配做一位元老……
I knew it... I was never worthy to serve as an elder...
不、不，不是的！这都是命运的罪！
No, no, that's not true! This is all fate's fault!
是命运让我们将善意与怜悯赋予了错误的人！是命运让恶果降临在了戍卫长身上！
It is fate that caused us to show kindness and mercy to the wrong person! It was fate that brought this dire ending on the captain!
唉，但我们怎么能审判命运呢——那执掌审判的泰坦也在判决命运的王座上啊。
Ah, but how are we supposed to cast judgment on fate... The Titan that presides over judgment also sits atop its throne.
俄诺涅元老，抱歉…我无法参与此事的审判，我必须要走了，城外还有人在等我。
Elder Oenone, I am sorry... I cannot take part in this judgment. I must go. Someone is waiting for me outside the city.
你…你要叛逃？和那个正在攻打我们的泰坦眷属一起逃走？
You... You are going to desert us? You are going to flee with that Titankin that is attacking our city as we speak?
帕里斯，不要再被那颗带来灾厄的祸星蛊惑了！我已经让你做了错事，绝不能再让你错下去！
Paris. You must not allow yourself to be bewitched by this bringer of calamity any longer! I have already allowed you to make one mistake. I cannot allow you to continue!
你若与她为伍，则会永远背负着共犯的罪责，永远成为被奥赫玛人怨恨的恶徒。
If you side with her, you will forever bear her sins. You will become a villain, hated by the people of Okhema for eternity!
而、而且，戍卫们会将菲罗克的死怪罪于你们！或许还会将你们捉回奥赫玛，处以最严厉的审判！
Further... Furthermore, the garrison guards will all place the death of Philoc on both of your heads! They may even bring you back to Okhema and see that you receive the most brutal of judgment!
可是…可是除了她，还有谁愿意帮我抛下这可怕的责任与义务，相信我所说的故事，和我一起去寻找阿卡迪亚呢？
But... But if I don't have her, who else will help me escape my terrifying duties and responsibilities? Who will believe my stories and go in search of Arcadia with me?
帕里斯，我的英雄，你还有我。为何要将金丝赠予一个丑陋的邪物，而不是将它归还它的主人呢？
Paris, my hero. I am here for you. Why would you give the golden thread to a vile, evil creature like that and not return it to its original owner?
我的权力可以让你远离战场，远离这些纷争的噩梦。我们一起躲在黎明云崖上，在刻法勒的膝下安然度日。
With my influence, you can be spared from the battlefield and kept far away from the nightmares of strife. Let us escape to Dawncloud and spend our days in peace under the protection of Kephale.
然后等到那黑潮落下，纷争败退，我们以尊贵的身份开着装饰花朵的马车去寻找的浪漫之乡——
Then, when the black tide falls and strife has been defeated, we can ride in our grand carriage as nobles and go in search of our city of romance...
是的，阿卡迪亚。以金丝为证，那是我的故国见证过的地方，我能帮你找到它……
That's right, Arcadia. With the golden thread as my witness, it is a land known to the people of my hometown. I can help you find it...
这只是给我所爱的人一个新的选择，有错吗？
I'm just giving the person I love another option. Is there something wrong with that?
你可真会找机会挖墙脚。
A home wrecker knows when to strike.
你怎能这样污蔑我…这金丝的主人本就是我，我比那个怪物更适合陪伴他吧？
How dare you slander me like that? ...I am the original owner of the golden thread. Am I not far more suitable to accompany him than that monster?
至少去找找雕像小姐吧！
At least go and look for the statue lady!
你是说让帕里斯跑到城外的战场上，冒着生命危险在一群疯狂的眷属中找她吗？
You're saying that Paris should run out onto the battlefield and risk his life among those insane Titankin to look for her?
恩人…我、我觉得俄诺涅说的没错。
Savior, I... I think Oenone is right.
对，没错！菲罗克不会骗我，那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中，背叛了我！

Exactly! Philoc would not lie to me. That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...
啊！我不能背负叛逃的罪责！俄诺涅，我的公主，请你帮帮我吧！
Ah! I cannot bear the blame of betrayal! Oenone. My Lady! Come and aid me!
放心吧，帕里斯。我会让你远离那个灾星，帮你去往你理想中的地方，忘掉那骗子吧，好吗？
Fear not, Paris. I will keep you away from that bringer of catastrophe and help you find the land of your dreams. Forget that liar, okay?
在城外的厮杀声中，在戍卫长尚未瞑目的尸首旁，两人相拥，像是躲入了看不见的茧里。

Surrounded by the sounds of the fighting outside the city, the two embrace as if wrapped in an unseeable cocoon. They stand beside the corpse of the captain, his eyes open past the precipice of death.
他们的面庞上的笑容是那么牵强，眼神中的惶恐胜过快乐。即便在两张俊美的脸上，也显得有些诡异。
The smiles on their faces are forced as fear devours any joy in their eyes. Though their faces are beautiful, there is something distorted about this image.
伙伴…这里的记忆开始变淡了，后面是雕像小姐不知晓的事情，我们已经没法再探寻了……
Partner... The memory here is starting to fade. The statue lady doesn't know what happens after this, so we cannot investigate any further...
但这句话的另一层意思是——刚才那一幕的一切，她都已然知晓。
However, what this does mean... Is that everything that happened here... she knew it was coming.
我、我不能冒这个险，万一她真的背叛了我…我一个普通人在眷属面前，不就像蝼蚁一样脆弱吗？我可不能死，我不能死……
I... I cannot take this risk. What if she really betrayed me... I, a normal man... am I not as frail as an ant before the Titankin? I cannot die. I cannot die...
和敌国的女子相恋，背弃一切私奔，这在我读过的故事里很浪漫，所以我才迷了心窍……
To fall in love with a woman from a rival city and abandon everything as I flee. This is the kind of romance I read in my stories, and that's how I became obsessed...
帕里斯，快做出决定吧…守卫马上就要来了，我可不能帮一个想要潜逃的士兵洗脱罪名。
Paris. Make a decision quickly... The guards are coming. I cannot help clear the name of a soldier who attempts desertion.
谢谢你，俄诺涅，谢谢你救我……
Thank you, Oenone. Thank you for saving me...
听，快听，灵魂传来了你熟悉的声音。
Listen, quick, listen. There is a familiar voice in your soul.
是纷争…纷争已经来到，神赐的金血在翻涌，命定的欲望在沸腾……
It is strife... Strife has come. The golden blood you were gifted begins to stew, and the fated desire boils up within you...
你要应这灵魂的呼声，投身纷争？还是握着手中的金丝，向远方遁逃？
Will you respond to the call of your soul and throw your body into the strife? Or will you hold on to this golden thread and escape into the distance ahead?
我不知道，这路的两端都是命运…一端是我的纷争，一端是他的浪漫……
I don't know. Both of these paths are my fate... One is my Strife, and the other is his Romance...
但本能的咆哮在城外的战场上是那么刺耳，于是，你还是选择射出了纷争的箭矢——
But the roar of your instincts deafens you on the battlefield, so you still opt to fire the Arrow of Strife that you wield...
第一个猎物，是你的同乡。他在军队的最前排，向你行起悬锋的礼仪，却被你贯穿了心脏。
Your first prey is your very own kin. On the Kremnos army's frontline, he gives you a salute, yet you shoot through his heart.
第二个猎物，是你的胞亲。他在攀爬城墙，想要在幕匿中潜入市集饱饮鲜血，却被你击碎了头颅。
Your second prey is your own family. He climbs the walls under the cover of night to feast on the dead, so you take your aim and shatter his head.
第三个、第四个、第五个…你不知疲倦地残害着你的同乡，却没有一箭射向奥赫玛人。
Number three, number four, number five... You ceaselessly hurt your own kin without stopping for rest. Yet your bow never aimed at any citizen of Okhema.
是那纤细的金丝还牵引着我的手，不令我的箭镞刺破那薄弱的浪漫——
It is the thin golden thread that still guides my hand. It will not allow my arrowheads to pierce that fragile romance...
你等了很久很久，甚至为奥赫玛的戍卫队击退了一波凶险的敌潮，但你没有等来与你远行的旅伴。
You wait and wait, and help the Garrison of Okhema fight off a whole wave of assault. But the man you would travel with never comes.
你想重回城邦，却又被城前的戍卫当作敌人阻拦。
You wish to return to the city, but the garrison guards greet you as an enemy.
你身上遍布圣城军与悬锋军的枪伤，你在这没有友亲的战场上寻找着失约的友亲——
As your body is covered in wounds dealt by both the army of the holy city and that of Kremnos, you search for the kin that missed his appointment in a battlefield bereft of kin...
那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中…背叛了我……
That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...
没错，你是叛徒，你背叛了悬锋城，背叛了自己的同袍父兄，还想抛下这救赎你的圣城，你是不忠的叛徒。
That's right. You are a traitor. You betrayed Castrum Kremnos and your family. Then you set to abandon the holy city that saved you. You are exactly the traitor they made you.
放心吧，帕里斯。我会保护你的，让你远离那个灾星，帮你去往你理想中的地方。
Fear not, Paris. I will protect you. I will keep you away from that bringer of catastrophe and help you find the land of your dreams.
没错，你是灾星，你为奥赫玛带来了动荡，你让这对你有恩的城失守，你是纷争的灾星。
That's right. You bring calamity, and you've caused Okhema to fall. The city was kind to you, but you brought strife on them all.
让我断了这手上的金丝，莫让那叛徒寻到了我们的踪迹……
Let me cut this golden thread on my arm. I cannot have the traitor following us...
现在，那金丝已断了，你手中再也不会有首饰、厨具和针线，只剩长弓与利箭。
Now, the thread is cut. Your hands will never again hold silver trinkets, kitchenware, or tapestries. All that remains are arrows and weaponry.
而我也不必再做抉择，命运的路只剩一端——
Now, there are no more choices open for me. Only one path of fate remains...
在那之后，我做了一个漫长的梦。
From that moment on, I've been into a long dream.
梦中，我是一只瘦骨嶙峋的狮子，除了捕猎果腹外，没有思考其他事物的能力。
In my dream, I am a malnourished, starving lion. I can not think about anything but hunting for food.
于是我不停地捕猎，撕咬、杀戮。我第一次感受到生物的饥饿，所以我吞下了银饰、炉灶、没绣完的金毯……
So, I hunt, devour, and kill endlessly. I feel the biological sensation of hunger for the first time, so I swallow silver jewelry, cooking stoves, unfinished tapestries...
——直到我又看到了这枚绑着断线的指环，才在黑潮下的荒原中醒来。
...Until I see the ring with the broken thread around it once more, and I come to my senses in the wastelands under the black tide.
戴着指环的男人躺在地上，我的箭让塞纳托斯的手掌捧走了他的灵魂。而与他同行的女子抛下了他，装饰花朵的马车头也不回地逃离了他的尸骸。

The man wearing the ring lies on the ground as my arrows guide the hand of Thanatos to claim his soul. The woman who travelled with him abandoned him. Their extravagant carriage, decked with flowers, sped away from his corpse without ever turning back.
到了现在，我也不明白，他说的「浪漫」到底是什么模样。
To this day, I still do not understand what this "romance" is that he spoke of.
神的行径有千模百样，神的行径不应众生期望。
The divine works in mysterious ways, and they care not for what a mortal man prays.
所料之事，却难圆满成就。不虞之事，却被神给予了道路。
An expectation is impossible for one to make real. When we know not where we're going, our path is revealed.
随着记忆谢幕的余音散去，你们又回到了飘着硝烟的悬锋城。
As the lingering echoes of the memory fade, you return to the smoke-filled streets of Castrum Kremnos.
没有找到阿卡迪亚，也再也寻不回帕里斯，而没有名字的眷属还在你们面前呢喃。
You've never found Arcadia, and Paris will never return. Yet the nameless Titankin still lies before you, murmuring.
这个故事…好像和一开始想象的不一样呢……
This story... It ended differently to how I imagined...
泰坦的眷属的言语逐渐微弱，你将耳朵凑近，希望听到她到底想说什么——
As the Titankin's speech grows weaker, you bring your ear closer, hoping to hear her final words...
纷争的眷属不再发出任何言语，她一动不动，仿佛成了真的雕像。
The Titankin of Strife utters nothing more. She falls completely still, as if she had become a real statue.
失去生命的眷属尸首与碎石无异。你知道过不了多久，悬锋城带着血腥味的风会卷起沙砾，将这块巨石磨蚀成尘，飘往远方。

Having lost her life, the Titankin's body is no different from a pile of rubble. You know that before long, the blood-stained winds of Castrum Kremnos will whip up the surrounding gravel and reduce it to dust, carrying it far into the distance.
尘土飘向的地方会是真正的阿卡迪亚吗？{RUBY_B#理性}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}知晓那个地方吗？{RUBY_B#浪漫}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}会在那里等候它吗？
Perhaps the land that this dust will be carried to is the true Arcadia? Does {RUBY_B#Reason}Cerces{RUBY_E#} know that place? Will {RUBY_B#Romance}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} await them there?
你不知道，你耳边只有{RUBY_B#纷争}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的战鼓回荡。
You do not know. All that you can hear is the echoing war drums of {RUBY_B#Strife}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
阿格莱雅女士，请稍等一会儿，那位异乡的英雄已经出发了……
Lady Aglaea, please wait a moment. The hero from afar has already set forth...
啊，是已经回来了！英雄，您找回那宝物了吗？
Ah, they have returned already! Hero, did you recover the treasure?
希望阿格莱雅能保管好它…
I hope you will keep it safe, Lady Aglaea...
辛苦了，贵客，真没想到这份委托会劳烦到你。
Thank you for your hard work, dear guest. I had never expected that this task would have fallen to you.
阿格莱雅从你的手中接过献礼，她双目微阖，感受着纺锤上每根金丝的触感……
Aglaea takes the offering from your hand and closes her eyes as she feel across every golden thread on the spindle.
Captain Iason, I have unfortunate news.
观察贵客方才的神色，它应当是承载了什么特殊的意义，或许在某些人眼中是十分贵重的宝物。
Seeing the look in our dear guest's eyes just now, I fear this object may carry some special meaning. It could be that this object was considered extremely precious to someone before.
但若让我以「理性」来评判，它既不神圣，也不贵重——
However, if you are to judge it through the eyes of Reason, it has neither divinity nor value...
只是一捆再平凡不过的，染了色的细线。
It is no more than a simple and unremarkable dyed thread.
它在他人耳边缄默，它在自己耳边喧哗。
Though it speaks not to another one's ear, I can hear it loud and clear.
它只在看到它的人眼中显现，只在相信它的人眼中璀璨。
Beauty is in the beholder's eyes, and only those that believe it will see it shine.
——黄金茧中的浪漫丝，便是如此缥缈物。
...The threads of romance in the golden cocoon, a mystery known to only those attuned.
这只若虫在悬锋城中格外醒目。你知道，弥漫血腥味的废墟并不是浪漫眷属乐意造访的地方。
A nymph is an unfamiliar sight to the streets of Castrum Kremnos. As you know, ruins stained with the stench of blood are not a place that the Titankin of Romance would happily visit.
嗡嗡——我是「浪漫」的使者，顺应「浪漫」的渴望而来，代表「浪漫」予以信徒回应。
Buzz... I am an envoy of Romance. I respond to those that long for Romance as its disciple.
陌生人，你知道是谁在此处呼唤墨涅塔吗？
Stranger, do you know who it was that summoned Mnestia to this place?
嗡…我明白了…真遗憾，希望塞纳托斯能早日把她送回我们的茧中。
Buzz... I understand... What a terrible shame. I hope that Thanatos will allow her to join our cocoon soon.
谢谢你，陌生人，那我就先回茧了！
Thank you, stranger. I shall return to the cocoon!
（那个是…尼卡多利的眷属？怎么会出现在这里？）
(That is... the Titankin of Nikador? What are they doing here?)
好像有股香味…不对，是陌生记忆的味道，从那里传过来的！
I can smell a sweet fragrance... No, this is the fragrance of an unknown memory! It's coming from over there!
这里的店主每天都会遇到各种各样的客人，也算是见多识广，就问问他们吧。
The store owners here meet all kinds of people every day. They'll be the most knowledgeable about the area. We should ask some of them.
这里就是雕像小姐记忆中的过去了，但她在哪里呢？
This is the past in the statue lady's memory... But where is she?
唔，果然打不开，不过他们说的神性似乎在哪里听过……
Agh, we really can't open it. Although, I feel like I've heard about that deity they mentioned somewhere before...
想起来了，这些雕像就储存着尼卡多利的神性！不过我们也不能把它们在这里砸碎吧？
Come to think of it, these statues store the divinity of Nikador! We can't just smash them here and now though, can we?
可以靠欧洛尼斯的力量。
我们得再回到另一个时空。
We need to return to the other spacetime.
这玩意儿和之前的解密一样吧…
This is the same puzzle as before, surely...
是哦，那找找附近有没有「欧洛尼斯奇迹」的秘典吧！
You're right. Let's look around to see if there is another secret edition of "Oronyx's Miracle"!
哇，他居然能抬动雕像小姐，力气真大…快跟上，要是让他们遇到卫兵就麻烦了！
Woah, he actually managed to lift the statue lady! He's so strong... We have to catch up with him. If they run into the guards, then we're in big trouble!
不好了！献给尼卡多利的祭品逃跑了！
We've got big trouble! The sacrifices to Nikador have escaped!
怎么可能？囚房明明没法从内部打开…那个眷属应该已经不能动了，他们肯定走不远！
How is that possible? The prison gates cannot be opened from inside... That Titankin can't walk anymore, so they can't have gone far!
帕里斯应该已经带着雕像小姐已经进城了，她会在哪里接受治疗呢……
Paris must have already taken the statue lady into the city. Where will she be able to receive treatment, though?
赞美法吉娜！赞美云石天宫！
哇，这里是正在开派对吗？好热闹！
Wow, are they having a party? This place is so busy!
嗯？她怎么还在城里，难道是迷路了？
Hm? Why is she still in the city? Has she gotten lost?
还有戍卫长和俄诺涅…好像不太对劲！
The captain and Oenone are there, too... Something isn't right!
雕像小姐，你的记忆，我们会记住的……
Statue lady... Your memory... We will never forget it...
她会在哪里呢…如果是人家，或许会找个视野开阔的地方吧……
Where could she be? If I were her, I might look for a place with open views...
这段回忆的味道好奇怪…嗯？帕里斯在那儿干什么呢？
This memory tastes weird... Hm? What is Paris doing there?
这里的通路被挡住了…不知道有没有其他泰坦的力量能帮一把「手」。
The passage here has been obstructed... I wonder if any other Titan's strength could lend a helping "hand."
这台装置好像缺了什么东西，看来还得靠扎格列斯来帮忙了……
There seems to be something missing from this device. It looks like I'll need to find Zagreus...
旧日的悬锋城，一场失败的战争后……
The former Castrum Kremnos, after a defeat in battle...
在记忆的更深处，传来了枷锁的碰撞声……
From the depths of the memory comes the clash of shackles...
旧日的奥赫玛城门，一场胜利的战争后……
The former Okhema city gate, after a victorious war...
在记忆的更深处，传来了市集的议论声……
From the depths of the memory comes the vibrant bustle of the marketplace...
旧日的奥赫玛城中，一位战士在岁月的流淌中迷惘着……
Within the old Okhema, a soldier is lost in the flow of time...
在记忆的更深处，传来了派对的喧闹声……
From the depths of the memory emerge the sounds of a lively party...
许久后的奥赫玛城中，无休止的纷争再度苏醒……
A long time later, within the city of Okhema, the echoes of endless strife resurface once more...
在记忆的更深处，传来伴随愁绪的哀叹……
From the depths of the memory arises a sorrow lament...
在奥赫玛的城外，战士徘徊在注定的疯狂中……
On the outskirts of Okhema, the soldiers wander in doomed madness...
戍卫长倒伏在鲜血中，充斥嗔怨的胸口停止了起伏……
The captain collapses in a pool of fresh blood. His chest, once heaving with rage, now still...
（要让这么大的东西动起来，或许只能靠「欧洛尼斯祷言了」……）
(Maybe the only way to get something this big to move is to use the "Oronyx's Prayer"...)
咦？这里的剑已经归位了…估计是那两个笨家伙没注意吧。
Huh? The sword here is back in its place... I'm guessing those two idiots didn't even notice it.
泰坦眷属口中吐出破碎的词语，夹杂着残存不多的生气。
The Titankin can only muster fractions of words, carried on the little life force she has left.
Friend! We have to be quick!
泰坦眷属的话语已微弱到无法听清，看来你们真的要快些了。
The Titankin's words have already grown too faint to discern. Looks like you really need to get moving.
就靠你了，好用…不，万能的大恩人！
I'm counting on you, my handy... I mean, my all-powerful savior!
呃，这是什么东西挡着入口……
这尊纷争眷属的雕像死死压住牢房的门，
A statue of the Strife Titankin presses against the cell door...
Is it possible to move it?
开拓力转动！你运转周天，双臂发力，气动山河——
Unleash the spiraling Trailblaze Power! You ignite the energy within, channeling it through your arms, gathering strength enough to move mountains and rivers...
它纹丝不动，看来你这块儿还得接着练练。
It hasn't budged. It seems like you will need more practice.
一百万匹开拓力！你的球棒狠狠砸在雕像的头上——
Unleash a million horsepower worth of Trailblaze Power! You swing your ball bat and strike the statue's head with all your might —
它坚不可摧，甚至韧性条都没动。
It is indestructible. Not even a dent appears on its Toughness bar.
Mem, hurry and think of a way!
真拿你没办法…人家记得这里的士兵都是靠殿中的「神性」驱动的，但好像储存神性的雕像都没启动……
You're hopeless... I remember that the soldiers here rely on the "divinity" within the shrine to function, but it seems none of the statues storing divinity are activated...
它们手中的剑应该就是传递神性的媒介，试着让这几个大家伙把剑插下去吧！
