Captain, did you know that I wasn't always a dial phone? I used to be an owl. But I'm not an owl anymore, I'm a dial phone.
猜猜看，这是为什么？懂的都懂，不懂的说了也不懂。
Wanna take a guess why? If you know, you know. And if you don't, well, no amount of explaining will help.
Riddlers need to get out of Penacony.
你充分听取了家具们的建议，指导性几乎为零。
You take the furniture's advice to heart, which provides practically zero guidance.
看来，最后还得由你做出决断——毕竟，你才是故事的亲历者。
Looks like it's up to you to make the final verdict. After all, you're the one who lives through this story.
你无视了家具们的意见，决定相信自己。
You ignore the furniture's opinions and decide to trust yourself.
毕竟，你才是故事的亲历者。
After all, you're the one who lives through this story.
你知道：在匹诺康尼，没有什么是严肃的。即便英雄的血泪史，也不过是茶余饭后的谈资。
As you know, nothing is taken seriously in Penacony. Even heroes' tales of blood and tears are just casual gossip over dinner.
你想起钟表小子、哈努兄弟、音符小姐…它们也曾是活生生的传奇。倘若《如我所书》以同样戏谑的形式被传唱，是你想要的结果吗？
You remember Clockie, Brother Hanu, Miss Note... they were all living legends once. If As I've Written gets passed down in the same mocking way, is that really what you want?
是啊。答案从一开始就再明显不过。三位无名客的故事，不就是最好的证明吗？
Yes. The answer was crystal clear from the start. The story of the three Nameless is the best proof of that, isn't it?
爱，友谊，愤怒，遗憾…一枚小小的梦泡，竟蕴含着如此复杂的情感，就像往陶罐里倒了满满一瓶伏特加。
Love, friendship, rage, regret... Such a tiny dream bubble contains such complex emotions. It's like pouring a whole bottle of vodka into a dolium.
感谢您提供的记忆，这是我的判断：它一定会大受欢迎。
Thank you for providing the memories. Here's my verdict: It's bound to be a huge hit.
就算结果不如预期，我也可以让各位英雄在创世涡心跳一段踢踏舞，同样能收获巨大的成功。
Even if the results aren't what we expected, I can still have the heroes tap dance in the Vortex of Genesis. That'll be just as big a success.
哈哈，开个小玩笑。您大可放心，我是专业的梦泡收藏家，知道什么能成功，什么不能。
Haha, just kidding. Rest assured. I'm a professional dream bubble collector. I know what can and can't be successful.
就这样，《如我所书》在匹诺康尼上市了。
And so, As I've Written was published in Penacony.
有人猜背后离不开苜蓿草的扶持，猜得没错。这么大的人情，何乐而不为？
Some guessed the Alfalfa was behind it, and they weren't wrong. With such a big favor ready for the taking, why not use it?
就让年轻人继续闹腾下去吧。万一哪天，{F#她们}{M#他们}真的能改变寰宇呢？
Let the young folks keep stirring things up. Who knows? Maybe they will actually change the universe one day.
泰坦、轮回、「智识陨落」…想象力倒是挺丰富。
Titans, cycles, "Fall of the Erudition"... Quite the imagination there.
可惜，主题还是老套——不就是英雄打怪兽嘛，都看过一百遍了！
Too bad the plot is so cliché! It's just another story about heroes fighting monsters! We've seen that a hundred times already!
这叫王道。就因为看了还想看，这类题材才会经久不衰。
That's what you call a classic formula. People keep coming back for more, and that's why this theme never gets old.
而且，这故事可不是编的……
Not to mention this was based on a real story...
你没听星际和平播报吗？铁墓真的被击败了，宇宙中也诞生了文明的种子。
Haven't you heard the Interastral Peace Broadcast? Irontomb was really defeated, and the seeds of civilization have sprouted in the universe.
说不定有朝一日，我们就能走进那个忆质世界，跟书里的英雄面对面交谈了。
Maybe we'll be able to step into that memoria world one day and have face-to-face conversations with the heroes from that book.
忆质构成的世界？我不信，一定是橡木家族编出来的。
A world made of memoria? No way. That's gotta be something the Oak Family made up.
算了，你还是去影视乐园找钟表小子玩吧，当心别被异域迷因抓走。
Whatever. Just go hang out with Clockie at the theme park, and watch out for those alien memes trying to abduct you.
科员们依旧那么忙碌。嗯，是熟悉的空间站。
The researchers are still as busy as ever. Yep, this is the space station I know.
对，将受损舰船运往庇尔波因特，让公司报销……
Right. Let's send the damaged ships to Pier Point and have the IPC foot the bill...
这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。来得正巧，我有一个好消息和一个坏消息，想先听哪个？
Oh, if it isn't {NICKNAME}. Perfect timing. I've got good news and bad news. Which would you like to hear first?
嗯…仔细想想，先说坏消息有点缺乏铺垫。还是先听好的吧。
Hmm... Now that I think about it, starting with the bad news might be a bit too abrupt. Let me give you the good news first.
记得我送你的那艘歼星舰吗？好消息是，我从一位太空海盗手里收到了现货……
Remember that starnought I gave you? The good news is that I got one from a space pirate...
结果，正赶上他的舰队被抽调去对抗铁墓，那艘歼星舰…被击毁了。
But his fleet was dispatched to fight against the Irontomb, and that starnought... was destroyed.
我重新挂了笔求购订单。但这种大船，一时半会儿很难找到第二个卖家。
I've reposted my purchase order. But it'll be tough to find another seller anytime soon for a ship of that size.
其实，我也是为铁墓而来…
Actually, I'm here for Irontomb, too...
你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...
…不得不说，这主意比科员们的课题有趣多了。可惜你不需要融资，不然我肯定投个几亿信用点。
...I have to say that this idea is way more interesting than the researchers' projects. It's a shame you don't need funding, or I'd definitely invest a few hundred million credits.
我念书那会儿，选修过「边缘星球史学」。第一堂课，老师就告诫我们：不要当真。
I took an elective called "History of Frontier Planets" back in my student days. The professor warned us on the first day not to take everything at face value.
许多世界都会在本土英雄传说中添加夸张成分，声称祖先的血脉继承自某位星神…到后来，离奇的身世都变成一种潮流了。

Many worlds add exaggerated elements to their local hero legends, claiming their ancestors' bloodlines are inherited from some Aeon... Eventually, having an extraordinary origin story became quite the trend.
但…故事不就是如此吗？只要相信的人够多，就会逐渐变成真实。
But... isn't that how stories work? When enough people believe in them, they gradually become reality.
我会帮忙把《如我所书》列为空间站必读书目——也许科员们对神话不感兴趣，可一提到这是黑塔女士的项目，就会像佩佩见了宇航服一样兴奋。

I'll get As I've Written added to the space station's required reading list. The researchers may not be interested in mythology, but once they hear it's Madam Herta's project, they'll get as excited as Peppy seeing a spacesuit.
黑塔女士她…有些消耗过度，还需要一些时间恢复。
Madam Herta has... overexerted herself. She still needs some time to recover.
区区绝灭大君，还不至于让我「消耗过度」。我只是没上线而已。
A mere Lord Ravager isn't enough to make me "overexert" myself. I just wasn't online, that's all.
公司那边非要拉人组建什么「同盟」。我受不了他们纠缠，就开启了自动应答模式。
The IPC keeps pestering me about forming some "alliance." I got tired of their nagging, so I just turned on auto-answering mode.
对了，{NICKNAME}，再告诉你一个好消息：铁墓陨落后，权杖也一同报废了，但我和螺丝抢救出了绝大部分数据。
Oh right, {NICKNAME}. I've got some more good news. After Irontomb fell, the Scepter was ruined, but Screwy and I managed to salvage a majority of data.
它们对新生的翁法罗斯——姑且先这样称呼它——很关键。如果顺利，世界的演化能跳过无机生命阶段，向前迈进一大步。
They are crucial for the newborn Amphoreus. Well, let's call it that for now. If things go smoothly, the world's evolution can skip its inorganic life phase and take a big step forward.
螺丝和公司签订了专项协议。未来一段时间，他们会密切关注翁法罗斯的状态。
Screwy has signed a special agreement with the IPC. They will closely monitor the state of Amphoreus for a while.
作为权杖的「心」，在铁墓席卷宇宙的瞬间，她也充盈万界，成为了群星的「记忆」。
As the "heart" of the Scepter, she, too, filled the cosmos in the instant when Irontomb swept across all of existence. She became the memories of the stars.
奔涌的虚数能量让她创造了奇迹：以{RUBY_B#记忆}「自我」{RUBY_E#}为摇篮，闭合翁法罗斯的因果，让一个世界从忆域中诞生。

The surging Imaginary Energy enabled her to create a miracle. With {RUBY_B#the Remembrance}her self{RUBY_E#} as the cradle, she closed the cycle of causality in Amphoreus, making a world emerge from the Memory Zone.
当然，我知道你想问的是结果。不妨这样理解吧，她…只是睡着了。她会重新睁开双眼，变回粉色的忆灵，再度踏上旅程，与你相遇……

Of course, I know you just want to hear the outcome. Let me put it this way. She's... just sleeping. Maybe she'll open her eyes again as a pink memosprite and once again embark on a journey to meet you...
只是这件事发生在「过去」。而在她的时间里，这一切就是「永恒」。
But that had already happened in the "past." In her subjective time, everything has become "eternal."
…离开前，她是笑着的。所以，别难过——她也会这样劝你。
...She was smiling when she left you. So, don't be sad. She'd tell you the same if she were here.
新的翁法罗斯要多久才能诞生？
How long until a new Amphoreus is born?
我…没法给你承诺。那颗星球会逐渐变成你熟悉的样子，但时间是未知数。
I... can't make any promises. That planet will gradually become how you remember it to be, but no one can tell when that'd be.
可能要一千个琥珀纪，也可能只要一两年。唯一能确定的是，你正在做的事，一定能促进它的生长。
It might take a thousand Amber Eras, or it might only take a year or two. The only thing for certain is that what you are doing will surely hasten its growth.
我的建议是：继续旅程，做好准备，也心怀希望。你知道，翁法罗斯这个世界，最不缺的就是奇迹。
My advice is: continue the journey, be prepared for the worst, but keep hope in your heart. You know that if there's one thing the world of Amphoreus isn't short of, it's miracles.
生命的第一因究竟是什么？
So what is the prime mover of life?
我和螺丝达成了共识：很遗憾，权杖的答案就是「毁灭」。你能在数据库中找到更详细的论述。
Screwy and I have reached a consensus on that. Regrettably, the answer given by the Scepter is indeed "Destruction." You can find a more detailed discussion in the database.
但这不是翁法罗斯的答案，我想，应该也不是你的。
But that's not Amphoreus's answer, and I don't imagine it's yours either.
对此，我有自己的见解，写在了批注里。如果你对这类问题感兴趣，也可以把它列为自己的课题。
I have my own insights on this, which I've written in the annotations. If you're interested in this kind of stuff, you can make it your own research topic.
I don't have any other questions.
那我先挂了，还有许多事要处理呢——黑塔，已下线。
Then I'll disconnect for now. Got lots of stuff to deal with. Herta, signing off.
其实黑塔女士一直惦记着翁法罗斯。上次她三句不离某样东西，还是收容星核的时候呢。
Madam Herta has actually been thinking about Amphoreus all this time. The last time she couldn't stop talking about something was when we contained the Stellaron.
《如我所书》的事就包在我们身上吧。等有了消息，我会再联络你的。
Leave As I've Written to us. I'll contact you again when we have news.
而且，最后一次演算的记录——你担任「负世」泰坦那次——至关重要。「开拓」会取代「毁灭」，净化这个世界。
Besides, the last extrapolation record, the one when you acted as the Worldbearing Titan, is crucial. The Trailblaze will replace the Destruction and purify this world.
你是说，黑塔女士召开了一场「俱乐部会议」，而且，有六位天才与会？这数字打破了俱乐部有史以来的最高记录！
You mean Madam Herta held a "Society meeting" and six geniuses actually attended? That's the highest number in the Society's history!
甚至连那位「寂静领主」，都听从了黑塔女士的号召？想到那场面，我…我简直无法呼吸！
Even that "Lord of Silence" answered Madam Herta's call!? Just thinking about that scene... I—I'm gonna hyperventilate!
杰克逊，冷静。请平复呼吸，生命体征检查器提示，你呼吸性碱中毒的可能正在直线上升。
Jackson, calm down. Take deep breaths. The vitals monitor shows that your respiratory alkalosis risk is skyrocketing.
呵呵，看看你心率抬升的斜率吧，我从来没在你的研究报表里见过如此激动人心的数据。
Heh, look at your heart rate spike! I've never seen such exciting data in any of your research reports.
伊萨卡，你最缺乏的就是洞悉数据本质的眼光。
Ithaca, what you lack most is the vision to see through the true nature of data.
刚才我心跳加速，是因为一个优雅的研究方向正在我脑海中成型。
My heart was racing because an elegant research direction was taking shape in my mind.
No one would be able to tell that.
我只看到一个绝望的学者。
All I see is a desperate scholar.
听好了：我将以《如我所书》为研究对象，探寻神话历史、真实虚构的双向互动，为原始文明演化提供一整套可参考的理论资源。

Listen up: I'll be using As I've Written as my research subject to explore the two-way interaction between mythology and history, providing a complete theoretical framework for the evolution of primitive civilizations.
千万次轮回留下的遗产，如模拟宇宙提供的数据般珍贵。泰坦与泰坦造物的有机构成、黄金裔参与下的城邦机制、叙述者与文本互动关系……

The legacy left behind by countless cycles is as precious as the data provided by the Simulated Universe. The organic composition of Titans and their creations, the city-state mechanisms involving the Chrysos Heirs, the interactive relationship between narrators and texts...
It all still feels like yesterday...
嗯，听起来有模有样。然后呢？
一张横亘历史学、神话学、人类学、生物学的学术蓝图正在我眼前徐徐展开——
An academic blueprint spanning history, mythology, anthropology, and biology is gradually unfolding before my eyes...
这个名字，将为数个琥珀纪以来一潭死水的人文学科掀起狂风骤雨！我只需如刻法勒般端坐源头，课题、经费便会如同黄金血般汩汩流向万千学者……

This name will stir up a storm in the waters of humanities that have been stagnant for several Amber Eras! I need only sit at the source like Kephale, and research topics and funding will flow like golden blood to thousands of scholars...
学术会议的邀请将纷至沓来，我将在会议开幕时第一个致辞。休息时，除非我先动手，否则没人敢碰茶歇！
Conference invitations will come pouring in, and I'll be the first to give a speech at the opening ceremony. During breaks, no one will dare touch the refreshments unless I make the first move!
反正都是幻想，你就不能想象得更出格一些吗？
Since it's all make-believe anyway, couldn't you let your imagination run a little wilder?
与此同时，会议方甚至会慷慨地报销一切住宿和往来费用！
On top of that, the conference organizers will generously cover all accommodation and travel expenses!
冷静，杰克逊，你呼吸性碱中毒的可能已经抵达临界值，冷静！
Calm down, Jackson. Your risk of respiratory alkalosis is reaching critical levels. Calm down!
终于，播种之旅告一段落，你回到了星穹列车……
At last, your journey of sowing has reached its end, and you return to the Astral Express...
回望来路，你讲述的翁法罗斯，在宇宙间深深扎下了根，静候发芽的那一天。
Looking back, the Amphoreus you spoke of has taken root deep across the universe, quietly awaiting the day it will sprout.
也许，这才是「创世」的最后一步。
Perhaps this is the final step of "Genesis."
What are you spacing out for?
那当然！再怎么说，翁法罗斯也是咱们仨一起开拓的。本姑娘可是一阵好跑。
Of course! After all, we three trailblazed through Amphoreus together. I ran my heart out for this!
离开塔拉萨时，我接到了三月的通讯，就顺道和她一起回来了。她在凯尔萨斯星遇到了点麻烦。
I received a message from March when I was leaving Thalassa, so I came back with her. She ran into some trouble on Kalsas.
别提了，人家本来就内向，又赶上联觉信标出故障…幸好丹恒会说粘土语。
Don't even get me started. I'm already shy as it is, and then the Synesthesia Beacon had to break down... Thank goodness Dan Heng can speak the Clayese language.
另外，我在纺锤-Ⅲ发现了形似奇美拉的新物种，此前完全没有记录。
Also, I discovered a new species resembling chimeras on Spindle-III. There were no prior records of it.
那岂不是还有可能出现住满大地兽的星球？
Does that mean there could be planets completely filled with dromases?
等姬子和杨叔回来，再统一做复盘吧。不妨先休息一会儿，{NICKNAME}看起来也有些累了。
Let's wait for Himeko and Mr. Yang to come back before we do a full debrief. You should rest for now, {NICKNAME}, you look tired.
Yeah. See you in a bit then!
世界前所未有地安静，仿佛能听见心跳的声音。
The world has never been so quiet. It is as though you could hear the sound of heartbeats.
这便是你为翁法罗斯写下的最后一笔。它何时会回应，只有命运知晓答案。
This is the final stroke you write for Amphoreus. Only fate knows when it will respond.
但你知道，无论「明天」还是「明天的明天」，都在「开拓」前行的路上。并非两条平行线，而是必然交汇的那一点。
But you know, whether it's "tomorrow" or "the day after tomorrow," they're all on the path of the Trailblaze. Not as parallel lines, but as points destined to converge.
坚定些，目光要一直看向前方呀♪
贝洛伯格没受到什么影响，太好了。
Belobog wasn't affected much, thank goodness.
How many moons does Amphoreus have?
Heard there used to be six...
Oh, you're here to buy As I've Written too?
As I've Written is sold out again today...
今天讲《如我所书》哪一段啊？
Which part of As I've Written are we covering today?
Shh, just listen and you'll find out!
迈德漠斯，真是翁星好儿郎！
Mydeimos, you're a true son of Amphoreus!
嘘，后头白厄真君那段更精彩！
Shh. The part about Lord Phainon is even better!
白厄真君，竟有这么一段奇事…
Did this really happen to Lord Phainon...
嘘，该讲十二金仙讨大君了！
Shh. It's time for the tale of the Twelve Golden Immortals challenging the Lord Ravager!
你说，这白厄真君和景元将军，孰强孰弱啊？
Who do you think is stronger, Lord Phainon or General Jing Yuan?
Tch... why don't you go ask the General?
翁法罗斯？由忆质构成的世界？胡扯！
Amphoreus? A world made of memoria? What a joke!
You might want to check where you're standing.
翁法罗斯…我要是也能模拟出一个世界就好了。
Amphoreus... if only I could simulate a world like that.
劝你别打这个主意，生命总会找到出路的。
Don't even think about it. Life always finds a way.
放心好了，戏曲、说书、相声…对于脍炙人口的故事，罗浮从不缺乏传播的手段。
Rest assured, whether through opera, storytelling, or crosstalk... The Luofu never lacks ways to spread stories that capture people's hearts.
《如我所书》一事，我会尽力去办，绝不让英雄事迹被星空埋没。
Regarding As I've Written, I will do my utmost, and won't let these heroic deeds be buried by the stars.
《如我所书》的事就包在我们身上吧。等有了消息，我会再联络你的。
Leave As I've Written to us. I'll contact you again when we have news.
黑塔已经从这台人偶中离线，任你如何招呼都没有反应。
Herta has gone offline from this puppet. No matter how you try to get her attention, there's no response.
欢迎光临我们一起写下的故事，这一页因你而存在的「永恒」♪
Welcome to the story we wrote together! This page of "Eternity" exists because of you ♪
你还能陪在我们身边吗？
少女莞尔一笑。她预见到你会在这一刻迟疑、感慨或发问。
The young girl smiled faintly. She had foreseen that at this moment you would hesitate, sigh, or pose a question.
片刻过后，你也回过了神…眼前的「她」只是一笔留在过去的墨痕：只能捎来信息，无法交换言语。
A moment later, you too regained your senses... The "her" before you was nothing more than an ink trace left from the past: able only to carry a message, unable to exchange words.
抱歉啦，只能通过这种方式给你留言……
Sorry, this was the only way I could leave you a message...
{NICKNAME}，我们在「记忆」的路上一起走出了很远很远的距离。虽然*我*记忆中的翁法罗斯会永远轮回下去，将铁墓封印在过去……
{NICKNAME}, we've come such a long, long way together on the path of Remembrance. Even though the Amphoreus in my memories will forever continue its cycles, sealing the Irontomb in the past...
<color=#dbc291ff>但被*你*记住的人们，这篇故事，还有这座永恒的花园，会一直陪在你的身边，作为《如我所书》的一部分，同星穹列车一直「开拓」下去♪</color>
But those who remember you, this story, and this eternal garden will always stay by your side, as part of As I've Written, continuing to Trailblaze with the Astral Express ♪
少女停顿了一下，眨了眨眼。
The girl paused for a moment, blinking her eyes.
总有一天，记忆会结出果实。
One day, memories will bear fruit.
I'll take them across the stars.
我相信，我们一定会重逢。
嘻，虽然很难猜出{NICKNAME}的想法……
Heh, even though it's hard to guess what you are thinking, {NICKNAME}...
但一句发自肺腑的「谢谢」，肯定能让你心里的小花绽放吧？
...A heartfelt "thank you" would surely make the little flower in your heart bloom, right?
如果有时间，<color=#dbc291ff>记得回到记忆中的小村庄，去看看「我」呀？</color>
If you have time, <color=#dbc291ff>can you please visit "me" in that little village in the memory?</color>
说不定，我还准备了一份粉色的小礼物呢♪
Who knows, I might have prepared a little pink present for you ♪
这座花园，是《如我所书》的最后一页…
This garden is the final page of As I've Written...
你看见：星云绽放光芒，勾勒出花圃的轮廓。一个新生的世界将要萌芽。
You see: The nebula blooms with radiance, tracing the silhouette of a garden. A newborn world is about to sprout.
这一幕是《如我所书》的结局，也是现实中翁法罗斯的原点：总有一天，它将孕育出真正的生命。记忆中的人们，会一一诞生，在「明天」等候你。

This scene is the ending of As I've Written, and also the origin point of the Amphoreus in the real world: One day, it will give birth to true life. The people in the memory will be born one by one, waiting for you "tomorrow."
群星静静呼吸。你确信，翁法罗斯的「果」已经种下。
The stars breathe silently. You are certain that the fruit of Amphoreus has been planted.
但它的「因」呢？在那一天到来前，旅途仍将继续。无穷的可能性在你脚下铺开，只有「记忆」……
But what about its "cause"? Until that day comes, the journey continues. Endless possibilities unfold beneath your feet, and only "the memory"...
只有「记忆」，仍被留在昨天。
I don't want to set off alone.
Perhaps there's still something I can do.
你想起「开拓」的承诺：逐火的故事将传唱群星。人们会记得，翁法罗斯是一个辉煌、壮丽的世界。
You recall the promise of Trailblaze: the story of Flame-Chase will echo across the stars. People will remember that Amphoreus was a brilliant, magnificent world.
你想到：可以让更多人阅读《如我所书》，留下这个世界的记忆。如果这么做，因果会变得更加坚固…你无法确信，但愿意相信。

You think: you can let more people read As I've Written, preserving the memories of this world. If you do this, the causality will become more stable... You can't be certain, but you're willing to believe.
重要的是，这是一个约定，你和许多人的约定。
What matters is that this is a promise, shared between you and many others.
也许，是时候履行诺言了。
Perhaps it's time to fulfill my promise.
米哈伊尔一向欢迎来访者。对于那些迷路的人，他总会给出指引。
Mikhail always welcomes visitors. For those who lose their way, he never fails to point them in the right direction.
但你的表情里没有困惑。我猜，你不是来寻求答案的。
But there's no confusion in your expression. I'm guessing you're not here for answers.
没错。我去了一个阿基维利也未曾抵达的世界，完成了前所未有的「开拓」……
That's right. I went to a world that even Akivili never reached, and accomplished an unprecedented "Trailblaze"...
没错。我在一趟旅途中认识了许多同行者，留下了弥足珍贵的回忆……
That's right. During my journey, I met many fellow pathstriders and made precious memories...
I'm here to tell a story.
没错。我与另一位作者一同，将「开拓」的旅程写成了书。这次，是为讲述而来……
That's right. Together with another author, I wrote a book about the Trailblaze journey. This time, I'm here to tell that story...
这段经历，想和前人们分享。
I want to share this experience with those who came before.
好啊，好。那就让他们听听，是个怎样的故事吧。
Alright, alright. Let's tell them what kind of story this really is.
是啊，翁法罗斯发生了太多事，三言两语要如何概括？这场讲述，恐怕会持续很久……
Yeah, so much has happened in Amphoreus. How could I sum it all up in just a few words? This story... I'm afraid it's going to take a while...
（先从翁法罗斯这个世界开始吧。）
(Let's start with the world of Amphoreus.)
那是一个行将消亡，却英雄辈出的世界。在逐火的征程中，黄金裔前赴后继，凡人们也众志成城。这是一首颂唱人性的赞歌，一段英雄之旅。

It was a world on the brink of extinction, yet teeming with heroes. In the Flame-Chase Journey, the Chrysos Heirs marched on one after another, while mortals stood united. This is an ode celebrating humanity, a hero's journey.
那是一个囿于轮回，却从不言弃的世界。即便经历永劫的苦难，人们也会踏上相同的道路，做出一样的选择。它超越时间，是真正的「永恒之地」。

It is a world bound by cycles, yet also one that never surrenders. Even through eternal suffering, people will walk the same path and make the same choices. Transcending time itself, it is the true "Eternal Land."
那是一个诞生自阴谋和罪恶，却与「毁灭」一同燃尽的世界。在冰冷而沉重的命运前，它没有倒下，倒下的是命运。
It was a world born of conspiracy and sin, yet burned away alongside "Destruction." Before the cold and heavy destiny, it did not fall. But destiny itself did.
(And now, for the meaning of this journey...)
让封闭的世界拥抱了群星。
Let the closed world embrace the stars.
在你抵达前，翁法罗斯几乎无人知晓。因列车到来，它得以冲破囚笼，奔向群星。
Before your arrival, Amphoreus was virtually unknown. Thanks to the Express, it broke free from its cage and raced toward the stars.
「开拓」不只是向前迈步，也同样是一份连结诸界的责任。经此一站，你似乎对阿基维利启程的信念有了更多理解。
"Trailblaze" isn't just about moving forward, it's also the responsibility of connecting worlds. After this stop, you seem to better understand the conviction behind Akivili's departure.
（当初留在匹诺康尼时，米哈伊尔是否也是同样的心情？）
(Did Mikhail feel the same way when he stayed in Penacony back then?)
Engaged in a showdown with Destruction.
你第一次直面一位绝灭大君——和仙舟时不同，这场战役的代价太过沉重。反物质军团的威胁，于你已经不再是远方星空的明灭。

For the first time, you faced a Lord Ravager head-on. Unlike in the Xianzhou, the cost of this battle was far too hefty. The threat of the Antimatter Legion is no longer just a flickering light in the distant stars.
米哈伊尔也好，历任领航员也罢，每个时代的「开拓」都有其意义。而阻挡在你面前的迷雾，似乎越来越清晰……
Be it Mikhail or any Navigator before, each era's Trailblaze has its own significance. And the fog that stands in your way seems to be getting clearer...
邂逅了无比珍贵的同道。
作为逐火的一员，你也投身于翁法罗斯伟大的征程。你与英雄们邂逅、结缘，共创伟业。作为旅行者，你留下的足迹已足够遥远。

As a member of the Flame-Chasers, you've joined Amphoreus's grand journey. You've encountered heroes, forged bonds, and achieved greatness together. As a traveler, your footprints have already reached far and wide.
「开拓」向来如此。探索、了解、建立、连结；但旅程总有下一站。当启程的笛声响起，列车就会离去，带着所有的回忆。

Such is the way of the Trailblaze. Explore, understand, build, and connect. But there's always a next stop on this journey. When the whistle of departure sounds, the Express will leave, carrying all memories with it.
（但星星会记得，每一篇史诗的名字。）
(But the stars will remember the name of every epic.)
Just a glimpse of a corner of the starry sky.
A turning point in the cosmic destiny.
The starting point for our next destination.
我想好了。就从头开始讲起……
I've made up my mind. Let me start from the beginning...
你在这片梦中梦里度过了不知多久。当故事结束时，你内心的某簇情感也变得更加强烈，像一枚燃烧的火种。
You spent countless moments in this dream within a dream. As the story ended, a certain emotion in your heart grew stronger, like a burning ember.
梦里的消息不似外面那般灵通。这故事的每一个情节，都出乎我的意料。
News doesn't travel as fast in dreams. Every plot twist in this story caught me completely off guard.
谢谢你，看来不需要多说什么了。
Thanks, I guess that's all that needs to be said.
我想，米哈伊尔会为你们感到骄傲的。
I think Mikhail would be proud of you all.
<size=28>Peppy! Why is your opacity down to <unbreak>50%</unbreak>!?</size>
难道佩佩遭遇了什么意外？
Could something have happened to him?

二维市@门附近…你挠了挠头，突然意识到：那不就是你所在的地方吗？难道说……
Near Duomension City's @Gate... You scratch your head as it suddenly hits you: isn't that exactly where you are? That means...
（鼻子不会骗小狗，果然是{NICKNAME}的味道！）

（跟你天下第一好的佩佩不是就我一个吗？哪来的……）

（不对不对，我才是真佩佩！你没有自己的名字吗？）
(No no. I'M Peppy! Don't you have your own name?)
（就说你是假的吧，佩佩才不会坐火箭来这，佩佩是和艾丝妲一起坐飞船过来的！）
(I knew you were a fake! Peppy would never come here by a rocket. Peppy came on a spaceship with Asta!)
幽灵佩佩气急败坏地在原地直瞪眼，最后无奈用鼻头拱了拱佩佩。
Ghost Peppy stands there fuming, glaring in frustration before finally giving up and gently nudging Peppy with its nose.
（…哦哦，原来你就是火箭呀…不好意思汪，我外狗语学得一般嘛。）
(...Oh, so you're Rocket... Sorry about that, woof. My dog language isn't that great.)
Why do you two look exactly the same!?
（这个问题要问狗妈妈的，问小狗，小狗也不知道呀！）
(You'd have to ask Mama Dog about that. The puppy wouldn't know!)
所以这只很像你的小狗叫火箭？

两条小狗在你面前趴伏下来，你碰碰我的鼻子，我碰碰你的爪子，一番激烈而无声的交谈后，佩佩神色凝重地点了点头。
The two puppies lie down before you, bumping noses and touching paws. After an intense but silent conversation, Peppy nods solemnly.
（太过分了！这不是欺负狗吗？{NICKNAME}，我们一定要帮帮火箭！）
(That's so mean! That's bullying a dog! {NICKNAME}, we have to help Rocket!)

（火箭说，非常紧急！相当于一脚踹翻小狗的饭盆！）

虽然奇怪，但在二相乐园，小狗怎么不能有电视瘾，小狗也要欢愉嘛！

两双豆豆眼可怜巴巴地看着你。哦，你怎么能忍心辜负这样热切恳求的目光？好吧好吧，小狗想要，小狗得到。你心甘情愿点了点头。

You are beset by two pairs of watery puppy eyes, gazing at you pleadingly. Oh, how could you possibly resist such earnest requests? Fine, fine... What a puppy wants, a puppy gets. You nod your head in willing surrender.
（火箭，快带我们出发去找那台电视吧！）

（那个节目很好看吗！那太好了，我们可以一起边吃骨头饼干边看电视汪！）

请把小狗的电视还给小狗。
Please give puppy's TV back to puppy.

你点点头，比划着拽住幽灵。佩佩也跟着咬紧你的裤脚，而火箭则叼起了佩佩的尾巴。
You nod and mime the grabbing of the ghost. Peppy follows suit by clamping onto your leg, while Rocket holds onto Peppy's tail.
One human and two dogs, working together as one!
咚一声，幽灵从电视机中被成功拔出，砸得你们人仰马翻。
With a loud thud, the ghost has been successfully yanked out of the TV, sending the three of you sprawling in every direction.

怎么出来了…电视…我要进…电视…进…电视…让我进电视……
How did I get out... TV... I need to go in... into the TV... Let me into the TV...
为什么…不让我进电视…让我…让我…让我……
Why won't you... let me into the TV... Let me... let me... let me...

打开方式有误，快把她塞回去。
Bad introduction, quick, stuff her back inside!

孤独…好孤独，我只有一个人了，孤独，孤独，我的执念又失败了……
Lonely... so lonely. I'm all alone, lonely, lonely... My attachment... failed once again...
到电视机里去…到电视机里去…到电视机里去……

But I can't get in... The TV keeps rejecting me, even though I'm a ghost born from attachment... even though my attachment is literally to get inside this TV... but I just can't... No, I could've been able to.
都怪你们…那是我离成功最近的一次…孤独，孤独…既然进不去电视机，不如……
It's all your fault... That was the closest I've ever been to getting in... Lonely, so alone... If I can't get inside, then...
（呜呜，我会在明年的今天，给你叼来狗粮的。）
(*whimper* I'll remember to bring you dog food on this day next year.)

(Miss Ghost, we could also try getting you into the TV...)
（额，我的意思是，{NICKNAME}一定可以！对吧？）

喂！不要随便替我答应啊！
Hey! Don't go making promises on my behalf!
话虽如此，在两条小狗瑟瑟发抖的注视之下，你终究只能再度点了点头。毕竟，责任重大，小狗的溜肩扛不住，还是交给你这个唯一的人类吧！

Despite it, you find yourself defenseless against the trembling gaze of the two puppies, and can only nod your head in response. After all, it's a heavy responsibility on a puppy's shoulders... better leave it to the only human around!
问题的核心，似乎都在这台电视机上……

佩佩的声音逐渐远去，你甚至来不及反应，就被一阵嘈杂的电流音彻底吞噬「嗞——嗞——」
Peppy's voice fades away, and before you even know it, a deafening burst of static noise completely engulfs you. "Bzzt— Bzzt—"
欢迎大家收看本期《请变幸福吧》！{RUBY_B#欢愉}幸福{RUBY_E#}的真意，你来定义！有请我们今天的待改造嘉宾——
Welcome to today's episode of Please Be Happy, where YOU define what {RUBY_B#Elation}HAPPINESS{RUBY_E#} truly means! And now, please welcome our guest awaiting transformation...

我安排的，制片人选个专家的权力总有吧！不过你给人嘉宾安个「不会笑的珀葵小姐」人设又是个什么意思？
I arranged it. I have the right to pick cheermakers as a producer! And you, dubbing our guest the "Unsmiling Miss Bequea." What's that about?
作为导演，我当然是想让她安心在这治疗创伤啊，用个人设，忘掉「那件事」，不就想让她好受点。
As the director, of course I want her to heal her trauma here comfortably. Having a persona helps her forget about "the incident," and makes things easier on the poor girl.
我不认可啊，战胜痛苦最好的方法就是面对它，人姑娘可比你想的勇敢多了！
I disagree. The best way to overcome pain is to face it head-on. She is much tougher than you give her credit for!
我跟你这个势利鬼就说不到一块儿去！不拍了！
There's no reasoning with that thick, snobby skull of yours! That's it, the shoot's over!
能不能冷静下来？谁惯你这臭脾气！
Would you calm your pants? Everyone's had enough of your tantrums!
（如果我没认错脸，这个珀葵应该就是外面那个幽灵生前的样子，那这里……）
(If I'm not mistaken, this Bequea must be that ghost when she was still alive. So this place is...)
「吧嗒吧嗒——」一阵纷乱急躁的小狗爪击音突然在你耳边响起。
"Tap, tap-tap—" You suddenly hear the frantic pitter-patter of puppy paws.
({NICKNAME}, are you okay? Can you hear me?)
（我现在在电视外面！刚刚，你唰一下就被吞进电视机肚子里去了！）
(I'm outside the TV! Just now, you got sucked right into it!)
Feels like I'm on a set...
是珀葵曾经拍节目的地方。
This is where Bequea filmed a show.
（弄不清状况的话，要不我们找人聊聊？）
(Should we talk to someone to figure out what's going on?)
抱歉，我正在准备接下来的拍摄，待会儿再聊吧。
Sorry, I'm preparing for the next shoot. Let's chat later.
你，对，就你，在那拖拖拉拉消极怠工吗！眼里没活，谁把你招进来的？
Hey, you! Yeah, you! Dragging your feet and slacking off over there! Can't you see we're all busy? Who hired you anyway?
你左右看了看，周围除了你哪还有第三个人。好吧，看来他指责的对象只能是你了。
You glance around, and there's not a single soul in sight except yourself. Looks like there's no dodging out of this one.
——{NICKNAME}•偷懒摸鱼正撞见上司发火的倒霉员工。
{NICKNAME}, an unlucky employee caught slacking off by the fuming boss.
您不在，我哪有心思干活！
I can't focus on work when you're not around!
对不起，我这就开始干活！
Sorry, I'll get back to it right now!
（不错嘛{NICKNAME}，很快就抓到角色精髓了！）
(Not bad, {NICKNAME}. You've already grasped the essence of your character!)
…唉，我也不是冲着你发火，只是这几天情绪实在不好，你别放在心上。
*sigh* Look, I'm not trying to take it out on you. I've just been in a bad mood these past few days. Don't take it personally.
你也看得出来，这节目做得真让人恼火。但没办法，一个导演就是一个节目的灵魂嘛！其实我也不是不乐意拍，但你应该看出来了，我实在是个善人！

You see how frustrating this show is to make, but what can you do... the director is the soul of the show after all! It's not that I'm unwilling to film it, but as you see, I'm just too much of a nice person!
你说那小姑娘，才多大就眼睁睁瞧着爹妈死在了告死魔手上，她是为了治愈自己，找回真正的幸福才来这个节目的。难道我要听那个制片人的鬼话，在节目里反复戳她的伤疤？

That poor girl was just a child when she saw her parents die at the hands of the Herald of Death. She came to this show to heal herself and find true happiness again. Am I really supposed to listen to that producer's nonsense and keep triggering her?
哎，要我说，珀葵现在最需要的只是欢愉，是一些乐子，欢笑就是真正的幸福。
*sigh* Look, if you ask me, all Bequea needs right now is some joy and good old entertainment. Laughter is true bliss.
我们的当务之急，不是在那里反反复复揭人伤疤，而是逗她笑啊。好歹生长在这欢愉之地，这帮人连怎么逗人笑都不知道吗？
We should be making her laugh instead of picking at old wounds. Don't tell me that living in this land of Elation, these people don't even know the first thing about making someone crack a smile?
你等着瞧吧，我这就回去继续拍，要不了几期她就痊愈了。
Just you wait and see. I'll get back to working now. She'll be right as a daisy in just a few more episodes.
嘿嘿，笑声是可以治愈一切的。
Hehe, laughter truly is the best medicine.
诶哟，领导！您今天怎么有空大驾光临，真是让我们片场蓬荜生辉啊！
Oh wow, boss! What brings your esteemed presence to our humble set today? You're really lighting up the place with your visit!
低调低调~作为闻名寰宇的「银河球棒侠」，你已经习惯了这种吹捧，虽然不知道他把你当成了谁，但这出戏简直是为你量身打造。你只需略微出手——

Ok, keep it cool... As the renowned "Galactic Baseballer," you're accustomed to this flavor of flattery. You have no idea who he thinks you are, but you were born ready for this type of scenario. You need but a slight show of skill...
就没有人比你更懂怎么摆出老板派头！
...And win them all over with a masterful display of "boss energy"!
不愧是咱们电视台的领导，瞧瞧，这就是做大事的人该有的气度！您放心吧，我当然以咱们电视台的利益为重，才不会真和那家伙斗气。

As expected of the head of our TV station! Now that's the kind of composure someone playing with big chips should have! Rest assured, I have the interest of the station as my top priority, and I won't let that manchild get the better of me.
他说我不心疼珀葵，其实当初让珀葵来录节目还是我拍的板，但是他为什么非要编造一个虚假的人设作面具呢？
He claims I don't care about Bequea, but I was the one who approved her being on the show in the first place. Why does he have to fabricate a fake persona for her to wear as a mask?
在这样的舆情之下，搞个人设反倒显得弄虚作假，咱们不如摊开来，让大家一起治愈珀葵，也让珀葵成为人们心中那个成功克服告死魔阴影的榜样！

Under these circumstances, putting up a facade works directly against our goal. It's better to just be open about it: have everyone help heal Bequea together, so she can become the example of someone who successfully overcomes the shadow cast by the Herald of Death!
告死魔事件是人间惨剧，而珀葵的幸存就像废墟中的花，天然具有煽动情绪的力量。您就说吧，整个二相乐园谁没听过她的故事？谁不关心她的未来？

The Herald of Death incident was a terrible tragedy, and Bequea's survival is like a flower in the ruins, a powerful tale that stirs deep emotions. There's no one in all of Planarcadia who hasn't heard her story and is uninvested in her future. Wouldn't you agree?
所以我就宣传了一下…现在，已经有很多人在给她写信，很多人向她表达支持与爱意了。可是现在，我真有点拍不下去了，除非您愿意…给我更多的支持！

So, I got some publicity going, and now lots of people are writing to her to show their support and love. But you see, I'm kinda hitting a wall with filming, unless you're willing to... offer more support!
我需要更多的宣传资金，更好的节目时段，给珀葵和她家人的故事更多曝光。
I need more promotional funds to get better program slots and more exposure for Bequea and her family's story.
您听听这个故事怎么样：一个幸存的女孩儿，将在整个社会充满爱的共同治愈下，代表着所有人的期待，成为榜样般的幸福者，在精神上——战胜了告死魔！
Just listen to this: A survivor, nurtured by the collective love from society, becomes a beacon of happiness representing everyone's hopes! A mental triumph over the Herald of Death!
这绝对会是一部温暖人心，带给人力量的节目，不是吗？
This will definitely be a heartwarming show that gives people strength, don't you think?
原来「那件事」是指十五年前的「告死魔事件」，而珀葵是幸存者……
So "the incident" refers to the Herald of Death's case from fifteen years ago, and Bequea is a survivor...
（珀葵小姐，一定有过一段非常痛苦的时光吧……）
(Miss Bequea must have gone through some really tough times...)
她似乎正在大家的簇拥下好转？
She seems to be getting better with everyone's support?
（所以这里很幸福，难怪幽灵珀葵小姐想钻进电视机！）
(No wonder Miss Bequea the ghost wants to get into the TV. It's so blissful in here!)
(Peppy always wants to hang around the food bowl, too!)
（明明大家都是好心，我怎么像偷翻垃圾桶被阿兰抓包那样不舒服汪？）
(Everyone means well, but why do I feel as if I'm caught rummaging the trashcan by Arlan, woof?)
I want to speak to Bequea about it...
（嗯嗯！听了那么多，都是在听别人认为好的方案汪！）
(Yep! We've only been hearing what everyone else thinks is best for her! Woof!)
（既然关乎真正的幸福，果然还是要听听珀葵自己的想法！）
(Since we're talking about true happiness, we should definitely hear what Bequea thinks!)
We're starting the interview! Aaaand ACTION!
(So, I'm back to being the interviewer now?)
采访开始，根据台本进行提问吧。
Alright, the interview has begun. Please proceed with the questions in the script given to you.
还记得来节目的初衷吗？
Do you still remember why you came on the show in the first place?
为了摆脱痛苦，找回真正的幸福。痛苦…是人生真正的绝症。
I came on the show to escape my pain and find true happiness. Pain... is life's true terminal illness.
告死魔事件后，我失去了正常生活的可能。一闭上眼，祂的黑影就在我梦中围追堵截；哪怕打起精神走上街，路过的每一对幸福的行人都会让我既羡慕又愤恨……

After the Herald of Death incident, I lost all chance at a normal life. Every time I closed my eyes, THEIR dark shadow haunted my dreams. And whenever I finally mustered the courage to go out, the sight of every happy couple that passed me would fill me with envy and bitterness.
因为痛苦，我居然会想：「为什么死的不是他们？为什么偏偏是我失去家人？」
The pain made me think: "Why wasn't it them who died? Why did I have to be the one to lose my family?"
它像致死的疾病那样让我从内部腐烂，让我变得越来越不像曾经幸福的自己，我知道这不对，我得自救，所以我来到了这里。

The pain was a fatal sickness; it made me fester on the inside until the happy person I once was simply disappeared. I knew this was wrong and I had to stop it and save myself. That's why I'm here on the show.
接下来是粉丝来信环节。
Next up is our fan mail segment.
真的很谢谢大家，能让大家振奋起来，我也很高兴……
Thank you all so much, I'm so happy to see everyone so encouraged and inspired again...
接下来可以问我们节目的核心问题了。
Now, we can get to the core questions of our show.
Why should I have to listen to you anyway?
...Please be good and do it. This is what's supposed to be happening right.
珀葵小姐，现在的你，幸福吗？
So, Miss Bequea, are you happy now?
…是的，我可能，不，我想我已经快找到真正的幸福了！
...Yes, I might have— no, I think I've finally found true happiness!
下一句是…嗯…节目组安排的特别好，那些乐子专家真的很有趣，粉丝的关心也让我感动，非常感谢所有人的支持与鼓励，让我被全世界爱着。

And the next line is... um... The production team set this up flawlessly, the "cheermakers" did an incredible job, and I'm honestly moved by all the fan support. I'm so grateful for everyone's encouragement: you make me feel like I'm being loved by the whole world.
可是…可是真的很抱歉，我……
But... but I'm really sorry, but I...
不管录节目时欢笑还是感动，等我回过神，噩梦还是会找上门来，悲伤仍然在我身后穷追不舍，不再痛苦的真正幸福好像根本不存在，哪怕是遇见「他」……

No matter if I laugh or cry during taping, the second I snap back to reality, I find that the nightmares are still there waiting for me. I just can't seem to shake off this sorrow. True happiness, without the pain, feels like an impossible, distant dream. I may have met "him," but...
Hey, stop her! She's losing it!
But she's in so much pain right now!
That's why you need to stop her right now!
What gives you the right to dictate what I say and do?
你还记不记得自己是干什么的？
Do you not remember what you're supposed to be doing?
Just listen to me! She's in so much pain...
痛苦也依旧存在…一刻也没有消失……
The pain is still here... It has never faded, not even for a single moment...
啊，对不起，我竟然又犯病了…对不起，对不起…我……
Ah, I'm sorry, I can't believe I just had another episode... I'm sorry, I'm so sorry... I...
我想听珀葵真正的心声！
I want to hear how Bequea truly feels!
别让她继续了，求你，她快要崩溃了！
Someone stop her now, please, before it's too late! She's gonna fall apart at this rate!
我也想要幸福，现在的我，除了痛苦什么也给不了「他」。我听话，我哈哈大笑，真希望这样我就好了！可是没有……
Of course I want to be happy. But right now, all I can give "him" is my pain. I do as I'm told, I laugh out loud... I really wish that would make me better! But it doesn't...
（珀葵小姐好像真的有点不太对了！）
(Something really doesn't seem right with Miss Bequea!)
Miss Bequea, are you feeling okay?
啊，对不起，我竟然又犯病了…对不起，对不起…我……
Ah, I'm sorry, I can't believe I just had another episode... I'm sorry, I'm so sorry... I...
作为摄影师和采访者，我们明明只要让她顺利完成拍摄就好了，不要做多余的事，做一个听话的人，接受设计好的安排…这些就不会发生了。

As the cameraperson and interviewer, all we had to do was to allow her to complete the taping without interruption. All we had to do was to stay within the lines and follow the plan... And none of this would've happened.
那也不能不让珀葵说真心话！
But you can't stop Bequea from speaking her truth either!
抱歉，我没有想到会这样。
Sorry, I didn't expect this to happen.
我理解你的好意…但你莽撞的善意，貌似带来了更大的麻烦。
I appreciate what you were trying to do... but your well-meaning actions have just made things worse.
请不要再这样刺激珀葵了。现在所有人都把珀葵当成病人，珀葵对自己的痛苦已经敏感到了极致，她不希望让任何人失望，也很害怕在拍摄时犯病……

Please stop needling Bequea like this. Everyone's treating her like she's so weak and fragile, and she's already so painfully aware of her own suffering. She doesn't want to let anyone down, and at the same time, she's terrified of having another episode like this during a shoot...
等她清醒过来，她一定非常愧疚。
She's going to feel so bad about this when she comes to.
所以你们根本没有治好她吧！
So you people never really cured her at all!
但她不是已经被「治愈」了吗？
你也感觉到了是吗？转念一想，治愈一个人一夜失去所有家人的创伤，其实根本就不是一档综艺节目能够做到的吧。但是现在太多人在关注她、太多狠话已经被放了出去。

You felt it too, didn't you? Think about it: healing the trauma of losing your entire family overnight is not something a variety show can ever truly do. And now there's so much attention on her, and there are all these things that have been said and cannot be taken back.
谁又有资格给所有忙得不亦乐乎的好心人浇盆冷水，说「你们做的不对」呢？我们这样的小人物，只要听话就好了，听对我们好的话就好了……

And who has the right to pour cold water on all those well-meaning people who find pleasure in doing what they think is good, and in saying things like, "You're doing it wrong"? Small fry like us, all we can do is to listen and obey. That's what's best for us...
珀葵无法停下，在这个舆论无可掌握的时代，她必须如万众期待的那样摆脱痛苦，变得幸福。
Bequea must keep going. In a time like this when public opinion has taken a life of its own, she needs to overcome her pain and find her happiness, exactly as everyone expects.
我们也无法停下，这档节目必须「治好她」，无论用哪种方法，无论是真是假。
We mustn't stop, either. This show must "cure" her by any means necessary, real or fake.
我们都没办法…我们只能好好听话。
There's nothing we can do... We just have to do as we're told.
But would that really give her happiness?
媒体真的知道什么是幸福吗？镜头真的能拍摄到幸福吗？做了摄影师后，我也常常在想这些问题。很遗憾，我现在还没有答案。

Do people in the media truly understand what happiness is? Can a camera lens really capture it? As a cameraperson, I often find myself thinking about these questions. But no, sadly, I still don't have the answers.
或许有一天，她会意识到她曾和真正的幸福擦肩而过…人们不总是这样吗？不过，那都是以后的事情了。
Maybe, one day she'll realize she once brushed against true happiness... Isn't that how it is for most people? But that's not really our concern now.
走吧，出口在那边，别再干扰我们的拍摄了。
Leave. The exit's that way. Don't make the taping more difficult than it should be anymore.
（我们小狗只要有人摸摸脑袋，有根大棒骨磨牙，就很开心啦！）
(We dogs are happy so long as we get head pats and a big bone to chew on!)
Anyway, let's just get out of here first.
佩佩用脑袋顶了顶你的腿，多温柔的小狗！
Peppy nuzzles your leg with his head. What a gentle pup!
以后还是在外面看电视吧…
I think we should just watch the TV from the outside from now on...
火箭高兴地摇了摇尾巴，好像在说「你演的真棒！」
Rocket wags his tail happily, as if to say, "You really nailed that performance!"
很抱歉之前冒犯了你们，电视机里的一切我都看见了……
I saw everything that happened on TV, and I'm sorry for my behavior earlier...
（是因为知道了更多事吗？感觉珀葵小姐不那么吓人啦！）
(Miss Bequea doesn't seem so scary anymore. Is it because I know more about her now?)
是的，信息的获取让我的头脑清醒了一些。电视机，进入电视机…抱歉，执念的影响对我依旧很深，但真的很谢谢你们，如今，我终于明白自己的目的地是怎样一个地方。

Yes, obtaining that information has cleared my head a bit. The TV, getting into the TV... I'm sorry, but the obsession still has a strong hold on me. I do really want to thank you, though. Now, I finally understand what kind of place my destination is.
电视机，进入电视机…可是如果珀葵并没有在这里获得真正的幸福，那为什么我的执念却是回到电视机？
The TV, entering the TV... But if Bequea didn't find true happiness here, why am I obsessed with going back to the TV?
如果可以的话，我想继续委托二位，帮助我找到当年更多的细节，带我进入电视。
If possible, I'd like you both to keep helping me uncover more details from back then, and to help me return to the TV.
（珀葵小姐很可怜的样子！我们答应她吧！）
(Poor Miss Bequea! Let's help her out!)
You can leave it to us!
艾丝妲喊你回家吃狗粮了…
Asta's calling you home. Time to go back and eat...
佩佩着急地舔舔你的手指，见你不为所动，又拽了拽你的衣角。
Peppy anxiously licks at your fingers, and when that doesn't get a response, he gives the hem of your clothes a little tug.
(But... where do we even start investigating?)
Continue to look into the TV.
（漏食玩具一次只能摇出一粒狗粮的话，多摇几次就可以吃饱啦！）
If the toy only drops one kibble at a time, I'll just have to shake it a few more times, and then I can eat as much as I want!
遗憾的是，无论你如何拍拍打打，电视机都无法再次进入了。
Unfortunately, no matter how much you tap and even smack the TV, it just won't turn on anymore.
调查珀葵在节目后发生了什么。
Find out what happened to Bequea after the show.
（虽然佩佩也很好奇，但现在还没有线索呢。）
(I'm really curious to find out what happened too! But there just aren't any leads yet...)
调查珀葵在节目中发生了什么。
Find out what happened to Bequea during the show.
（如果「珀葵」的执念就是回到电视机，那么节目里一定有对她很重要的东西。）
(If Bequea's obsession is about returning to the TV, then there must be something on that show that's very important to her.)
（汪！珀葵小姐的采访中是不是提到过…「他」？）
(Woof woof! Didn't Miss Bequea mention a... "him" during the interview?)
没错，这个可能与我存在牵绊的「他」让我非常在意，可惜…我根本想不起来他到底是谁。
Yes, I did. I keep going back in my mind to this "him" who might share a connection with me, but I just can't recall who he is.
This "him" might be Bequea's loved one.
（爱人？就像见到艾丝妲，佩佩的尾巴就忍不住摇起来那样的关系吗！）
("Loved one"? Is it like how Peppy's tail starts wagging uncontrollably whenever he sees Asta???)
This "him" might be a friend of Bequea's.
（佩佩和火箭就是朋友，一想到能一起冒险，佩佩连爪垫都是热热的！）
(Peppy and Rocket are friends, and just thinking about the two of us going on adventures together makes me feel warm and fuzzy all over, even down to my paw pads!)
This "him" might be a fan of Bequea's.
（对哦，就是黑塔女士收到一吨重的「黑粉」来信，也会笑一下呢！）
(That's true. Even Madam Herta cracks a smile when she gets a ton of mail from her Heritors!)

Sorry. Even though I can sense magnetic field fluctuations as a ghost and have noticed changes inside the TV, that feeling of being forbidden from entering it... hasn't gone away.
如果我尝试钻进电视，很可能还会被卡住。

行了行了，你跟条狗讲什么道理啊…赶出去就是了。

几声清脆的狗吠从你嗓中发出，你大受震撼，低下头，看见了一对圆鼓鼓、毛茸茸的小爪子。

既汪之则安之。别急着抱怨了，没看见有人正在驱逐你吗？

别急着舔这对从出生就没洗的爪子了，没看见有人正在驱逐你吗？

烦死了，我最讨厌狗了！一天到晚就会乱叫…找根棍子给它打出去吧。

可别拿棍子打啊。这么小一只狗，你别再不小心给打死了。
Don't hit it with a stick. The pup is so small, you could seriously hurt it.
讲道理也不行，打出去也不行，合着怎么着都不对呗？里头录着节目呢，能让流浪狗在这儿捣乱吗？

唉…那你打吧，打吧。打两棍赶出去就行，别真给打坏了。
*sighs* ...Alright, hit it if you must. Just don't hurt it. You just have to scare it away.
什么情况？有人要对「银河球棒侠」使用「棍棒」？倒反天罡这一块。

What happened to my Stellaron power?
可惜，变成小狗后，你的球棒被狗爪弄丢了，你的佩佩也失踪了，接下来你能仰仗的，只剩下阿基维利式的冲锋了。
Unfortunately, after transforming into a puppy, your baseball bat was lost by those fluffy paws, and Peppy has disappeared as well. All that's left now is your trusty Akivili-style charge.
...What are you still standing there for? Run!!!
Come here, come closer to me...
抱歉珀葵小姐，因为有条流浪狗闯入弄坏了器具，节目拍摄需要延迟十五分钟。我们会尽快把它赶出去，这种狗只要抽一棍子就跑了……

I'm sorry, Miss Bequea. A stray dog got in and damaged some of our equipment, so we'll need to delay the shoot by <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes or so. We'll take care of that dog as quickly as we can. Usually, seeing a stick is enough to send critters like that running...
珀葵小姐，怎么这副表情？你没有被狗吓到吧！我们这还是第一期啊！

不，我没看见什么狗，现在我只想一个人待会儿。

That was quick of you! Remember to run like that if you ever meet anyone who wants to hurt you. The faster, the better. Run and leave all the bad guys behind, like a rocket whizzing through the air!
不要撒娇…我可能留不下你。这里不是我的家…不，我和你一样没有家。
Don't cling to me now... I can't keep you. This isn't my home... No, I'm just like you. I don't have a home either.
你在害怕吗？嘘，小声一点，不要被他们发现。
Are you scared? Shh... stay quiet, or they'll find you.
「乖乖在这里躲好，如果被找到就跑快一点，再快一点，但别害怕，因为我会拦住{RUBY_B#告死魔}那个东西{RUBY_E#}」。

听我的，回去就开始背答案，下一次的心理测试，我希望你能有卓绝的进步！

哪来的狗，还不快点给他赶出去！

你在珀葵的脚边安静地坐着，只用黑豆似的小眼睛注视着她。

A couple of days ago, I overheard the producer talking to the Herald of Death Victims' Mutual Aid Society, and they said they could offer me a chance at the Happiness Surgery. Rocket, this is a really rare opportunity and I want to go for it... No, I've decided, Rocket. I am going to go for it.

它难道听得懂？好笑。小狗小狗，你主人不要你咯！

Lowering his head, Rocket carefully sniffed the flower, as if confirming something. Then, with utmost care, he lifted his paws and contentedly settled down on the diary. Everyone else had left, but he remained.

到底…什么才是真正的幸福？
In the end... What is true happiness?
每个人都应该有自己的答案。可从一开始，珀葵就已经在这片众人高呼「消灭痛苦，你就会幸福」的拯救狂欢中，迷失了对幸福的定义。

Everyone should have their own answer to this. Yet, from the very beginning, Bequea had already lost sight of her own definition of happiness in this frenzied crusade. Everyone, drunk on the prospect of saving others, kept chanting: "Eliminate suffering, and you'll find happiness."
告死魔是整个社会的罪魁，痛苦是欢愉与幸福的敌手，于是不可名状的幸福有了具象的解法，好像只要挥刀向痛苦围剿，纯粹的幸福便如必得的胜果……

The Herald of Death is the root of evil in this society. Pain is the enemy of Elation and happiness. And so, happiness, which is intangible, now has a tangible cure. As long as we raise our blades against pain, pure happiness becomes the assured fruit of victory...
于是她选择去做了幸福手术。
So she chose to get the Happiness Surgery.
可硕果想要永远纯粹，就必须丢弃可能腐烂的果肉，变成空心的尸首。
But if the fruit of triumph is to remain pure forever, one must cast away the flesh that may one day rot, leaving a hollow shell of a corpse.
这时的「幸福」就像是橘子那样，即使内部已经完全腐烂或蚀空了，外表看上去也还是「幸福」的形状。
At this point, "Happiness" is like an orange. Even when its inside has completely rotted or been hollowed out, the outside still keeps the shape of "happiness."
她真正的幸福，其实一直是那段痛苦的岁月中，几粒掺在玻璃渣里的糖：是那些真诚的关心，努力的逗趣，是掌声，是欢笑，是与她真正相伴的火箭。

Her true happiness had always been the few grains of sugar hidden among shards of glass during those painful years: the genuine care and concern, the earnest attempts at humor, the applause, the laughter, and Rocket, who was her true companion.
只余期待爱与幸福的本能，驱动着我的诞生。
All that remained was the instinctive longing for love and happiness, which gave rise to my existence.
You seem to understand her really well.
也只能是「理解」而已了。幽灵和死者本人终究是两个独立的个体。
The only thing I can do is to "understand." After all, a ghost and the person who has died are ultimately two separate entities.
你好像在说别人的故事。
You're talking like it's someone else's story.
这就是「别人的故事」。幽灵和死者本人终究是两个独立的个体。
It is "someone else's story." A ghost and the person who has died are ultimately two separate entities.
这正是我希望与你单独聊聊的原因。
That's exactly why I wanted to talk to you in private.
身为没有记忆的幽灵，我对这些痛苦的过往，只能像个看客一样借助你们重新经历，但背负着执念的我却非常理解珀葵，也真的在为这个故事动容。

As a ghost without memories, I can only experience this painful past as a spectator with your help. But, as I'm carrying the weight of this obsession, I've come to truly understand Bequea. I'm deeply moved by her story.
你能明白吗？在信件里看见陌生人称呼我「亲爱的小珀葵」时，我眼睛真的会泛酸，火箭热烈而真诚的爱，也会让我心口塌陷下软软的一块。

You know what I mean? When I see strangers addressing me as "Dear Little Bequea" in letters, my eyes will actually start to well up. Rocket's passionate and sincere love also carved a soft hollow in my heart.
而现在，那个等候在过去的火箭，正让我无比愧疚。我想我应该去告诉它，它不是和痛苦一起丢掉的垃圾，它是珀葵错过的家人。

And now, the Rocket who waited in the past fills me with guilt. I should go back, I think. Go back and tell Rocket that he isn't some trash thrown out with all the pain of the past. Rocket is a family member that Bequea missed out on.
但如你所见，现在的我，已经是一个彻底的幻造种幽灵了。
But as you can see, I've become a complete imagenae ghost now.
我不知道我还能否承担起小狗沉甸甸的爱。我不知道，那只等待了很久的小狗，想要成为家人的对象，到底还是不是我？
I don't know if I can handle the heavy weight of that little dog's love anymore. I don't know if I'm still the one that little dog, who has waited for so long, wants to become family with.
（接下来我的回答，也许会完全改变她的人生。还是慎重作答吧。）
(My answer to this might completely change her life. I should choose my words carefully.)
我明白了。承诺就是承诺，哪怕历经漫长的等待，也只会变得更加不容辜负。
I understand. A promise is a promise, and even after a long wait, it only becomes more unforgivable to break.
我明白了。就像《灵物保护法》所规定的那样，幻造种是独立的个体，我无法欺骗自己，取代它真正的家人。
I understand. As stipulated in Faekind Protection Act, imagenae are independent beings, and I can't deceive myself by trying to take the place of his true family.
回去吧，我知道该怎么做了。
Let's go back. I know what to do now.
所以哪怕一切虚幻的泡影和簇拥的人群都已消散，珀葵也无力去发现——
And so, even after all the fleeting mirages and the adoring crowds have faded away, Bequea no longer had the strength to find out...
火箭，谢谢你和它的付出。珀葵做完手术后，真的变得特别幸福。
Rocket, thank you both for your dedication. After Bequea's surgery, she's become truly happy.
但你知道我为什么会诞生吗？因为她很愧疚，手术带来的创伤让她把火箭遗忘了，可即便只有本能，她也一直希望能回来，履行成为家人的约定。

But do you know why I came into existence? Because she felt so guilty. The trauma from the surgery made her forget about Rocket, but even with just instinct alone, she always wanted to come back and fulfill her promise of becoming family.
就像你一直守候着这里一样，我现在也必须回到过去与火箭重逢。所以，你愿意解开对电视机的封锁吗？
Just as you've been waiting here, I must go back to the past to reunite with Rocket. So, would you be willing to unlock the TV?
因为那里有珀葵的家人。
(Would going back to the past make you happier?)
回到过去，那才是我真正的幸福。
Going back to the past, that's my true happiness.
（…那就回去吧！虽然坚强的话说了很多，但狗其实一直在等你汪！）
(...Let's head back then! Even though Dog went on with all that tough talk, Dog has been waiting for you all along, woof!)
没关系，这一次的{RUBY_B#重逢}告别{RUBY_E#}，我会用心听你说。
Don't worry, I'll listen to every word you say during our {RUBY_B#reunion}farewell{RUBY_E#} this time.
等你醒来，我们已在过去重逢。
When you wake up, we would have already reunited in the past.
火箭，谢谢你和它的付出。珀葵做完手术后，确实找到了自己真正的幸福。
Rocket, thank you both for your dedication. After Bequea's surgery, she's found her true happiness.
所以我也在想，作为幽灵珀葵的我，真正的幸福又是什么。
So I've been wondering too, what true happiness means for me, a ghost named Bequea.
在遇见你之前，我想要的是摆脱孤单，找到自己存在的理由，而现在，一切的答案都汇聚向了你，我的小狗火箭。
Before I met you, all I wanted was to escape my loneliness and find a reason for my existence. But now, all the answers lead to you, my little dog, Rocket.
我承诺给你买小狗玩具不是玩笑，说想给你一个家也不是空谈，你是第一个陪伴我的生命，也将是我诞生在这个世界开始，选择的第一个家人。

My promise to buy you puppy toys wasn't a joke, saying that I wanted to give you a home wasn't just empty talk. You're the first living being to ever keep me company, and you'll be the first family I've chosen since I began existing in this world.
火箭，我可以给你一个家吗？
Rocket, can I give you a home?
"Bequea"... Are you giving up your obsession?
因为这里也有守候着我的家人。
Because my family is waiting for me here too.
(Won't I make you remember your pain?)
你会让我得到真正的幸福，不愿意吗？
You can help me find true happiness. Aren't you willing to help me?
(That's not it... I don't know what to do...)
（人，成为家人要干什么？要按爪印吗？如果成为家人必须要有一个年限，小狗想要…想要一万年！）
(Human, what does one need to become family? Do I need to stamp my paw print somewhere? If being family must come with an expiry date, Dog wants it to be... wants it to be ten thousand years!)
…它…应该不会话痨一万年的，对吧？
...It... won't keep yapping for ten thousand years, right?
我计划之后带火箭离开这个地方。真的很感谢你们的帮助，希望我们以后还有缘能够再见。火箭，该道别了！
I plan to leave this place with Rocket later. Thank you so much for your help, I hope our paths will cross again someday. Rocket, time to say goodbye!
请相信，我们会在未来重逢。
Have faith, we'll meet again in the future.
终于找到你们了，给你发的消息怎么不回？
I've finally found you guys! Why didn't you answer my messages?
佩佩如导弹般冲向艾丝妲，嘤嘤叫唤着，像是在说「我好想你，我好想你！」
Peppy shoots toward Asta like a missile, squealing with joy as if saying "I missed you so, so, so much!"
我和佩佩在二相乐园很想你！
Peppy and I missed you so much in Planarcadia!
可恨电视机里没有信号…
Dang it, there was no signal in the TV...
看来你们去了一些有趣的地方冒险。
Looks like you've been adventuring in some interesting places.
我刚刚很担心呢，因为佩佩的装备不明缘由突然电量快速下降…原来是打开了扩大同步范围的特殊模式，难怪。
I was really worried just now because Peppy's equipment was losing power rapidly for no apparent reason... Oh, the expanded sync range mode is switched on, that explains it.
真是谢谢你的照顾了，我的购物计划还有第二场，有什么想要的，也列个清单给我吧。至于佩佩…既然事件已经解决，它也该回家吃狗粮了。

Thank you so much for looking after him for me! I still have a second round of shopping to do, so if there's anything you want, just give me a list. As for Peppy... Now that this matter is resolved, it's about time he comes home and has some food.
在你的目送下，佩佩泪眼婆娑地舔了舔艾丝妲，回到了它心爱的家人身边。
Under your watchful gaze, Peppy gives Asta a tearful lick before returning to his beloved family.
你们一定要做一辈子的家人啊！
You must stay family for life!
你俩把日子过好比什么都重要！
You two! Just live your best life! That's what matters most!
你们到底经历了什么啊？？？
What on earth did you all go through?
等佩佩把电充满，我可一定要听听。
Once Peppy is fully charged, I must hear about this.
那我先带佩佩回住处了。{NICKNAME}，等有时间我请你吃饭～拜拜！
I'll take Peppy back to our accommodations first. {NICKNAME}, let me treat you to a meal when I have time~ Bye-bye!
你再度回到熟悉的地方，见到了一束不知何人放下的花。泛黄的照片上她笑容灿烂，但愿她与她的家人，不再离散……
You return to this familiar place and find a bouquet of flowers left by an unknown person. In the yellowed photograph, her smile is radiant. May she and her family never be separated again...
你再度回到熟悉的地方，见到了一束不知何人放下的花。小小的狗爪印点缀一旁，看来她并非孤身一人，但愿她们自此不再离散……

You return to this familiar place and find a bouquet of flowers left by an unknown person. Tiny little paw prints adorn its side. Looks like she wasn't alone after all. May they never be separated again...
（嗯？路边有只小狗…怎么感觉背影很眼熟……）
(Hm? There's a little dog by the road... Why does its silhouette look so familiar...)
总感觉，有些在意他们口中的「那件事」……
I can't help but feel a bit bothered by this "incident" they speak of...
(Are we still recording? Man, this is tough!)
Looks like it's a post-show interview...
喜欢和我玩吗？给你买点玩具好不好？
Do you like playing with me? Shall I buy you some toys?
（果然…火箭就是那个「他」，而我现在就是火箭……）
(Just as I thought... Rocket is "him," and I'm Rocket now...)
桥依小姐！桥依小姐！你一定不能有事啊！呜呜呜…对不起，我们没有保护好你……
Miss Joye! Miss Joye! Please, hang in there! *sob*... I'm sorry, we failed to protect you...
别担心啦～桥依可是很难杀的！难道我桥依身为「地表基础最扎实的偶像」，还需要你们来保护吗？别自责了，乖～

Don't worry~ This pretty little bridge isn't that easy to kill! As "The Idol with the Strongest Foundation Above Ground," do you really think I need protection? No need to beat yourself up about it, sweetie~
Why are you talking to a bridge?
你这话什么意思？她可不是一般的「桥」啊！这是我们二维市首屈一指的偶像，桥依小姐！
Excuse you! What are you trying to say? She's not just any "bridge"! This is Miss Joye, the top underground idol in all of Duomension City!
桥依小姐被人袭击了！你难道看不出来吗？桥依小姐那双漂亮的眼睛被人夺走了！
Miss Joye was attacked, obviously! Can't you tell? Look! Her beautiful eyes were stolen!
So... this bridge is called Joye?
整个二相乐园还有哪座桥叫桥依？桥依小姐遇袭，我们都快急死了，无关人士就不要添乱了好吗！
Is there any other Joye in all of Planarcadia? Miss Joye was attacked! We're all losing our minds here, so if you're not part of this, then stay out of our way, will ya!?
丝葵德小姐！我理解你着急的心情，但是不可以对别人失礼哦！《桥依粉丝手册》怎么写的来着？
Miss Skuid! I understand you're anxious, but you can't be rude to others! Do you remember what the Joye Fan Manual has to say about that?
呜呜呜…「任何路人都是桥依小姐的潜在粉丝」…对不起，桥依小姐。对不起，这位潜在粉丝。我实在太心急了，才会那么凶。
*sob* *sniff*... "Strangers are just fans Miss Joye hasn't met yet"... I'm sorry, Miss Joye. I'm sorry, potential fan. I just lost my cool because I was in such a rush.
你好，{NICKNAME}，我是二维市的一个「偶像」，叫做「桥依」。初次见面…哦，不算初次见面了，你刚到二维市的时候，就从我身上路过过一次～我还记得呢！

Hi, {NICKNAME}. I'm a Duomension City "idol," and my name is Joye. Nice to meet you... Oh! Well, it's not quite our first meeting. You actually passed on me once when you first arrived in Duomension City~ I haven't forgotten, you know!
旁边这位是我粉丝会的会长，丝葵德小姐。她也是个很好的人啦，只是太担心我，才出言冒犯你，请原谅她吧。
And this here is Miss Skuid, the president of my fan club. She's a good person, really! She just got a bit carried away because she's worried about me. Please forgive her.
A pedestrian overpass is an idol?
二相乐园很神奇吧？在二相乐园，任何生灵都可以尝试成为偶像，即使是一座桥。
Isn't Planarcadia amazing? In Planarcadia, any living being can try to become an idol, even a bridge!
Whoa! Not just any idol, but an absolute heavyweight!
不许这么说桥依！要说也该说是…「最不会翻车的偶像」！
Don't you talk about me like that! If anything, I'm... "The idol least likely to flop!"
虽然很希望能让你现在立刻马上成为桥依的新粉丝啦…但我刚刚遭遇了袭击，双眼被不明歹徒摘取了。
As much as I'd love to make you my newest fan right here and now... I was just attacked, and the culprit stole my eyes. I haven't the foggiest who did it.
现在的桥依，属于重伤状态…如果可以的话，等我康复之后，再来看我吧～
So currently I'm in a grievously injured state... If possible, please do come visit me again after I've recovered, okay~?
桥依小姐，都这种时候了，就不要硬撑着偶像营业了。
Miss Joye, at a time like this, you needn't try too hard to maintain your idol persona!
我是「幻造医师」因巡，请问伤者在哪里？
I'm Izol, an imagenesis doctor. Where's the patient?
因巡医生，您终于来了！我真急死了！伤者就是这边这位，桥依小姐。您看看她情况严重不严重。
Dr. Izol, you're finally here! I've been worried sick! The patient is Miss Joye here. Please, could you assess how critical her condition is?
潜在粉丝{F#小姐}{M#先生}，不好意思，请先让一让。医生要对桥依小姐进行急救措施了。
Excuse me, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Potential Fan, please step aside. The doctor needs to give Miss Joye emergency care! Immediately!
呜…桥依小姐的情况还好吗？
*sniff*... How's Miss Joye? How bad is it?
创伤本身问题不是很大。这位袭击者的幻造技术很高超啊，没伤到其余的身体结构，只是摘除了双眼。
The injury itself isn't too serious. The attacker's imagenesis technique was superb. They didn't damage any other bodily structures and just removed both eyes.
只要稍微做一些应急处理，桥依小姐应该*暂时*不会有什么生命危险。
With some emergency treatment, Miss Joye shouldn't be in any life-threatening danger... for the moment.
谢谢你，因巡医生。但是…桥依还是觉得，自己现在很虚弱。
Thank you, Dr. Izol. But... I... still feel very weak right now.
唉…那当然会虚弱。你身上九成的愿力都凝聚在那双眼睛上吧？粉丝们平常所关注的也都是那双眼睛吧？

*sigh*... That's natural. <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of your Wishpower is concentrated in those eyes of yours, isn't it? Of course you'd feel weak. Those eyes of yours are usually all your fans pay attention to anyway, right?
你被夺取了九成的愿力。如果一个人类迅速失去了九成的体重，应该是立刻就会死亡的。而你现在的情况，和那差不了多少。

<unbreak>90%</unbreak> of your Wishpower has been stolen. If a human suddenly lost <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of their body weight, they'd die instantly. And your current situation isn't much different from that.
你想想办法呀因巡医生！你的诊所是二维市最好的诊所，肯定有办法能救救桥依小姐的吧？求求你了！救救桥依小姐！
Please, think of something, Dr. Izol! Your clinic is the best in Duomension City. Surely there must be a way to save Miss Joye? I'm begging you! Please save Miss Joye!
丝葵德小姐，冷静一点。桥依还需要你做更重要的事呢！
Miss Skuid, I must insist that you calm down. I still need you to do something more important for me!
请你回到粉丝会，帮桥依告诉大家，桥依只是受了些伤，没什么大碍，请大家安心等待桥依归来～拜托你啦！
Please go back to the fan club and let everyone know that I've been hurt, but that it's nothing serious. Tell them not to worry and wait patiently for my return~ I'm counting on you, okay~?
呜呜呜…我明白了，我这就回去…桥依小姐，你要信守诺言，一定要回来啊！
*sniff*... I understand. I'll head back now... Miss Joye, you have to keep your promise! You have to be okay, you hear me!?
因巡医生…桥依不能就这么死了，你也看到了，还有很多人在等我。
Dr. Izol... I can't die like this. You saw it yourself. There are still so many people waiting for me.
唉…以你现在的状况，幻造结构是随时可能崩解的。
*sigh*... In your current condition, your imagenated structure could disintegrate at any moment.
想要维持形态，有两个办法——要么你尽快将愿力补充到遇袭前的水平，要么你找回自己丢失的愿力。
If you want to maintain your form, you've got two options. Either you find a way ASAP to restore your Wishpower to the level it was at before you were attacked, or you recover your lost Wishpower.
哈哈，听起来都不是很简单呀……
Haha, neither option sounds very easy...
各位现场人员请注意，我是朽叶，这里现在由异常防御部接管。本案及现场的调查工作将由我方接手，请各单位配合。

Attention, everyone, attention! I'm Kuchiba, and the Department of Aberration Defense will now be taking over the investigation of this case and the crime scene. We expect and appreciate your cooperation. Thank you!
桥依小姐，方便谈谈发生了什么吗？
Now, Miss Joye, would you mind telling me what happened?
朽叶小姐…坦白说，桥依也不太清楚发生了什么…我毕竟是一座过街天桥嘛，平时身上人来人往的，不太可能专门注意到谁。

Miss Kuchiba... to be honest, I'm not too sure about what happened either... I mean, at the end of the day, I'm just a pedestrian overpass, so people are constantly walking all over me, and it's not like I could pay attention to anyone in particular.
今天像平常一样，桥依一边守护着过桥的行人，一边悄悄练习最近要唱的歌。有个蒙面人朝着桥依走来，桥依也没放在心上。毕竟咱们这里怪人多得很。

It was a day like any other day, and I was quietly practicing my new song while watching over the pedestrians crossing me. A masked person approached, but I thought nothing of it. After all, there are plenty of weirdos around here.
没想到…这人突然掏出绘具——就是绘师用来创造幻造种的那些尺规之类的，朝我挥舞了起来，再之后…我眼前就一片漆黑了。

But then... they suddenly whipped out their drawing tools — you know, those compasses and rulers that artists use to create imagenae and stuff — and started waving them at me. After that... everything went pitch black before my eyes.
我明白了。桥依小姐有怀疑的对象吗？最近是否得罪了什么人？
I see. Is there anyone you suspect, Miss Joye? Have you made any enemies recently?
…桥依确实没什么头绪。我并不是会得罪人的性格，也还没火到有黑粉的程度。要说是竞争对手，那更不可能，桥依这小众赛道，谁没事会和我竞争啊！

...I really haven't a clue. I'm not the type to make enemies, and I'm definitely not famous enough to have haters yet. As for rivals? That's even more unlikely! My niche is super specific. Who would possibly want to compete with me?
Hmm... I suppose that's true enough.
那你对凶手的身份有头绪吗？是人类还是幻造种，是什么种族、什么性别、什么身高体型，任何事都可以。
In that case, do you have any idea about your attacker's identity? Are they human or imagenae? Any clues about their race, gender, height, build... anything at all would help.
对不起…一切发生得太突然了，桥依没来得及仔细观察。
Sorry... it all happened so fast, I didn't get a chance to take a good look.
It's alright, there's no need to blame yourself.
因巡医生，听你刚才的意思，桥依小姐现在的状况比较危险？我直说好了：她还能撑多久？
Dr. Izol, what you said before... is Miss Joye's condition critical? Or, if I may be blunt: How much longer can she hold on?
我不知道。幻造种的愿力结构是个混沌体系，并不像物质生命那样井然有序。运气好的话，她会渡过难关，顺利活下去；运气不好的话…几个系统时内，她就会彻底崩解。

I can't say for sure. The Wishpower structure of imagenae is a chaotic system, not orderly like material life forms. If she's lucky, she'll make it through and survive. If she isn't... she'll completely disintegrate within a few system hours.
但无论「幸运」与否，短时间内遭受大量构造性愿力缺失，都会造成不可逆的影响。如果不能补全这些愿力，桥依小姐的记忆、人格、技能…全部都会受到严重的损伤。

But regardless of "luck," suffering a massive loss of constructive Wishpower in such a short time will cause irreversible damage. If her Wishpower isn't replenished, Miss Joye's memories, personality, and abilities... Everything will be severely harmed.
除非…桥依能找回自己的眼睛。
Unless... I can get my eyes back.
这的确是最好的解决方案…但我们都不知道袭击者是谁，也不知道此人要用桥依小姐的眼睛做什么。这恐怕很难吧。
That's definitely the best solution... but we don't even know who the attacker is or what they want with her eyes. I'm afraid this is going to be a tough one.
确实会很难，但好人要是能轻易战胜坏人，还要我们异常防御部做什么？接下来的事，就交给我们处理吧。
It'll be tough, for sure. But if it were that easy for the good guys to defeat the bad guys, what would be the point of having us at the Department of Aberration Defense? Leave the rest to us.
{NICKNAME}，你看起来对这件事很感兴趣？有兴趣来帮个忙吗？
Looks like this incident has piqued your interest, {NICKNAME}. Care to lend a hand?
Me? Why am I suddenly getting dragged into this?
你可是重要外宾，怎么能不让你有些参与感呢？
You're an important guest! How could we possibly let you just sit on the sidelines?
参与异常防御部办案，不合规矩吧？
Getting involved in a Department of Aberration Defense case... Isn't that against protocol?
异常防御部向来不拘小节。我们要是桩桩件件事都守规矩，破案率起码要下降一半。

The Department of Aberration Defense has always been flexible with the rules. If we followed every single little rule and did everything by the book, our case clearance rate would drop by at least half.
你无意帮忙，却在犯罪现场偷听了那么久的现场调查，我只好以妨碍公务之名把你抓回去了…开个玩笑。
So you don't want to help, but you do want to eavesdrop on sensitive case information being discussed at a crime scene investigation. I should arrest you for obstruction of justice... Just kidding.
如果你愿意帮忙，就过来和我们一起聊聊吧。
If you decide you'd like to help, come on over and talk with us.
现在的情况是比较危急的。桥依小姐遭到重创，如果不能尽快找回她的眼睛，她的健康恐怕会受到相当严重的影响。
At this time, the situation is critical. Miss Joye has suffered a grave injury, and if we can't find her eyes soon, I'm afraid her health will be seriously affected.
我可是听说，「球棒浣熊」相当擅长处理这种危急的局面。
Word is that the "Baseball Raccoon" is quite adept at handling sticky situations like this.
这种事情交给「球棒浣熊」来做，恐怕有些大材小用了吧。
Having the "Baseball Raccoon" handle something like this might be a bit like using a sledgehammer to crack a nut.
现在的当务之急，自然是尽快找到袭击桥依小姐的凶手，寻回她被夺取的双眼。
But right now, our top priority is to quickly track down the culprit who attacked Miss Joye and recover her stolen eyes.
不过，这里不是详谈的地方，我们找个方便说话的场所，再仔细聊聊这桩案子吧。
However, this isn't the place to be discussing it. Let's find somewhere more private to go over the details.
这附近有个茶室，我们去那里聊吧。
There's a tearoom nearby. Let's talk there.
茶室装得下过街天桥吗？
Can an overhead pedestrian bridge fit in a tearoom?
讨厌啦！桥依也不会把自己整个塞进茶室啦！
Hey, don't say things like that! It's not like I'd try to squeeze my entire self into the room!
Can a pedestrian overpass even move?
桥依要是满街乱跑，会造成交通事故吧！
Were I to run around the streets, I'd probably cause a traffic accident!
桥依好歹也是偶像，偶尔也要去Livehouse的。像我们这样不方便移动的幻造种，普遍都能够将愿力灌注在一些部分，让它可以暂时脱离本体。美食街的克拉肯先生也可以哦！

I am an idol, you know! That means I have to go to perform at live venues and the like. For imagenae like me who can't move around easily, we can generally channel our Wishpower into certain parts to temporarily detach them from our main body. Kraken from the food street can do it, too!
补充一句，桥依小姐的眼睛是被凶手用绘具从本体上强行「剥离」的。和这种自主离开本体的行为有很大的差别。
I'd like to point out that Miss Joye's eyes were forcibly "peeled" off her body by the killer using art tools. That's very different from voluntarily separating parts of your body.
但是，桥依小姐，你现在的身体状况并不好。在大量缺失愿力的情况下，还要暂时离开本体行动…我强烈建议你不要这么做。

But Miss Joye, your body is in extremely poor shape right now. Leaving your physical body to act separately after losing such a massive amount of Wishpower... I must strongly advise against such rash behavior.
桥依可不是那种乖乖等待别人拯救的性格！我要参与调查、积极自救，也许能够帮到你们呢。
I'm not the type to just sit around waiting to be saved! I want to join your investigation and do something! Maybe I'll even be able to help!
那好，我们走吧。桥依小姐，记得不要逞强。
Very well, Miss Joye, let's go. But remember not to push yourself too hard.
I need a moment to get ready.
Time is of the essence. I'll wait for you here.
你们说…桥依小姐，该不会就这么……
You don't think... Is it possible Miss Joye could...
你少说两句*吉祥话*吧！没人把你当哑巴。
Would it kill you to just stay quiet? Nobody asked you to jinx anything!
桥依小姐不会有事的，她总能渡过难关。
Miss Joye will be fine! She always manages to pull through!
我们找个方便说话的场所，再仔细聊聊这桩案子吧。
Let's find a better place to talk so we can go over the case in detail.
