Very well, Miss Joye, let's go. But remember not to push yourself too hard.
I need a moment to get ready.
Time is of the essence. I'll wait for you here.
干什么啦！不要一直盯着桥依的嘴唇看啦…就是因为这个部位不好看，我才一直藏在桥梁后面的。
Hey, stop that! Please don't stare at my lips like that... I've been hiding behind the bridge because I'm self-conscious about them, you know!
主要是漂浮的红唇有点惊悚。
It's mainly that those floating red lips are kinda creepy.
没办法嘛，眼睛让人夺走了嘛……
I can't help it. After all, my eyes were taken...
你没有眼睛，怎么知道我盯你？
You don't even have eyes. How do you know where I'm looking?
桥依能感觉到你的视线啦！
还是先来谈谈正事吧。我们直奔主题：异常防御部接手这起案件，是因为桥依小姐此番遭遇的袭击，是一起连续杀人事件的一部分。
Let's get right down to business. Here's the deal: The Department of Aberration Defense took this case because the attack on Miss Joye is part of a serial murder investigation.
I'm not that easy to kill!
欢愉之地还有这么可怕的案件？
Do scary things like that really happen in the land of Elation?
很遗憾，二相乐园终究不是乐园。
Alas, at the end of the day, Planarcadia is no arcadia.
最近几个月，二维市发生了一连串杀人事件——具体来说，是<unbreak>17</unbreak>起…哦，现在是<unbreak>18</unbreak>起了。经过调查，这些案件有着相当多的共通点。

In recent months, there's been a series of murders in Duomension City. <unbreak>17</unbreak> cases to be exact... oh, make that <unbreak>18</unbreak> now. Our investigation has turned up a number of similarities between the incidents.
具体情况，这里有一份案件简报，你可以自行阅读一下。
As for the specifics, here's the case summary. You can read through it yourself.
容我稍微解说一下。首先，受害者都是从事演艺工作的幻造种，有主播、歌手、笑星，当然还有桥依小姐这样的偶像。
Here are some of the main points. First, all the victims were imagenae working in the entertainment industry. Streamers, singers, comedians, and of course, idols like Miss Joye.
其次，所有受害者都被取下了一些身体部件。凶手的幻造技巧相当优秀，「剥离」的手法干净利落，几乎没留下任何可供调查的线索。

Secondly, every victim had body parts removed. The perpetrator's imagenesis technique is exceptional. Their "peeling" method is so clean and precise, it leaves almost no clues behind for us to follow.
还有最后一个共通点：案发现场都在被害人自己的地盘，住宅、工作室、专属休息室…但完全没有暴力闯入的痕迹。
And there's one last thing tying everything together: All the crimes happened on the victims' own turf. Homes, studios, private lounges... but there were absolutely no signs of forced entry.
简直就像是「被邀请来的客人」一样。
Almost as if they were "invited in."
尽管如此，但比较诡异的一点是，所有被害人都没有把「今天有人要来访」这件事告诉任何亲朋好友。
However, what's strange about that is that none of the victims told any of their family or friends about having "invited a guest" or someone coming to visit.
异常防御部暂时将这位神秘的连环杀手称为「千禧杀手」。因为今年是<unbreak>1999</unbreak>年嘛。
The Department of Aberration Defense is temporarily calling this mysterious serial killer the "Millennium Killer." After all, it's the year <unbreak>1999</unbreak>.
原来这段时间网上盛传的「千禧杀手」是真的！桥依还以为只是个都市传说呢！
So the Millennium Killer everyone's been talking about online is real! And here I thought it was just an urban legend!
既然是被邀请来的客人…那应该是被害人都认识的人吧？
Since they were invited in... The killer must have been known to the victims, right?
在案件被移交到异常防御部之前，治安局就沿着这条思路进行过调查。可是虽然被害人都是演艺行业的，但「歌手」和「笑星」的圈子毕竟还是不同的，「共同好友」寥寥无几。

Before the case was transferred to the Department of Aberration Defense, the Security Bureau had already investigated along these lines. However, even though all the victims were in the entertainment industry, the circles of "singers" and "comedians" are quite distinct with minimal overlap, so there are few "mutual friends" between them.
排查下来，被害人确实都认识几个电视台的制片人。但这几位制片人都有充足的不在场证明。
The investigation showed the victims did indeed all know several TV producers. However, all the producers had solid alibis.
先等等…这些「共通点」听起来和桥依遇到的案件不太一样啊？凶手没有来桥依家，而是当街袭击了桥依。况且桥依也没有被杀害，而是活了下来…虽然还是很受伤啦。

Wait a minute... my case doesn't share any of those "similarities" with the other cases, right? The culprit didn't come to my house, but attacked me right there on the street. Plus, I wasn't killed, I'm still here... though I am badly hurt.
这些差异，恐怕和桥依小姐本身的特性有关。
As for those differences, it probably comes down to a few of your innate traits.
凶手没办法「拜访你的家」，因为你平时就是驻扎在街上的。凶手也没法「杀害」你，作为一个大体型的幻造种，你的生命力太顽强了——实在是不幸中的万幸。

The killer can't "visit your home" since you're always out in public. They can't "murder" you either. Being a large imagenae, you're just too tough to kill outright. Talk about a blessing in disguise.
但是，凶手在众目睽睽之下，迅速「剥离」了你的双眼，包括你在内，没有任何目击证人能说清凶手的身份特征…这样卓越又残忍的幻造技艺，恐怕只有「千禧杀手」掌握了。

However, the killer swiftly "peeled" away your eyes in public. No witness, including you, could describe any of the killer's identifying features... Such an exceptional yet cruel imagenesis technique could only be the work of a master such as the "Millennium Killer."
这也是为什么，我会判断「桥依小姐遇袭事件」同样是「千禧杀手」的手笔。
Which is to say, that's also why I concluded that "The Joye Ambush Incident" was the work of the Millennium Killer as well.
所以到底为什么找我帮忙？
So why exactly do you need my help?
是不是告诉我太多机密了？
Aren't you telling me way too much?
因为「常规」的调查方式，效率太低了。
Because the "standard" way to investigate is too inefficient.
现在桥依小姐的双眼下落不明，甚至生命都可能危在旦夕，我不能把桥依小姐的健康和未来赌在「稳扎稳打」的调查上。
Now Miss Joye's eyes are missing, and she is in imminent danger of losing her life. I can't gamble her health and future on a "slow and steady" investigation.
所以，我恳求你，{NICKNAME}，用属于无名客的方式，在「千禧杀手」对那双眼睛做出什么事之前，将它夺回来。可以吗？
So, I'm begging you, {NICKNAME}, to retrieve the eyes in true Nameless fashion before the "Millennium Killer" does something to them. Can you do that?
没问题，我最喜欢助人为乐了。
No problem. I love helping out!
太好了，非常符合我对无名客的认识。感谢你愿意出手相助。
Perfect, that's exactly what I'd expect from a Nameless. Thanks for being willing to lend a hand.
听起来有点违法，得加钱。
Sounds kinda illegal, so it's gonna cost you extra.
没问题，非常符合我对「球棒浣熊」的认识。请别担心，一切责任由我一人承担。
No problem. That's no less than I'd expect from the "Baseball Raccoon." Don't worry, I'll be the only party liable for everything that occurs.
那么，这次会面就到此结束。接下来的事，就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
Well then, this meeting is over. I'll leave the rest to you, {NICKNAME}.
朽叶小姐，你不和我们一起调查吗？
Aren't you going to investigate with us, Miss Kuchiba?
身份所限，很多事就不便直接出手了。但请放心，今天之内，只要{NICKNAME}不做过于出格的事，各地治安官都会对你的调查视而不见。

Because of my identity, I can't intervene directly in many things. But rest assured, at least for today, so long as {NICKNAME} doesn't do anything too outrageous, security officers all over will turn a blind eye to your "investigation."
我能做到的也只有这些了。{NICKNAME}、桥依小姐，祝你们好运。
This is all I can do. {NICKNAME}, Miss Joye, good luck to you both.
唉，虽然朽叶小姐提供了内部资料，但我们缺少的信息还是太多了…既然被害人都混演艺圈，那如果能找个业内人士咨询一下就好了。

*sigh* Even with Miss Kuchiba's inside info, we're still missing way too much information... Since the victims were all working in the entertainment industry, it'd be great if we could consult someone from the industry.
你自己不就是业内人士？
桥依这种小偶像算什么「业内人士」啊！至少要上过跨年晚会才算「业内」吧。
I'm just some small-time idol. How could I be an "industry insider"? You gotta at least perform at the New Year Countdown Party to be considered "in the industry"!
你有什么熟识的人选吗？
Do you have anyone in mind?
说来丢人，桥依的圈内好友，大部分混得还不如桥依呢…估计是很难提供什么帮助的。
Though I hate to say it, most of my friends in the industry are doing even worse than I am... I doubt they'll be of much help.
诶？火花算不算业内人士？
Hmm... Would Sparxie count as an industry insider?
火花…她当然算了！二相乐园粉丝量最高的偶像，圈内人望也不可小觑，如果她愿意提供帮助……
Sparxie... of course she counts! She's Planarcadia's most followed virtual idol, and her industry prestige is considerable. If she's willing to help...
…不过，你不是才打了人家一顿吗？虽然说幻月游戏上相互对抗在所难免，但她该不会因此记恨你，不肯提供帮助吧？
...But didn't you just beat her up? Sure, clashing during the Phantasmoon Games is inevitable, but you don't think she'll hold a grudge and refuse to help because of that, do you?
Sparxie's not that kind of person, it'll be fine.
I hope she doesn't hold a grudge!
桥依宝宝！听说你被「千禧杀手」袭击了，好可怜哦！别担心，我们一定会抓住这家伙的！
Poor Baby Joye! I heard you were attacked by the Millennium Killer, you poor thing! Don't worry, we'll definitely catch this creep!
火…火花小姐竟然认识桥依？
我其实还一直想和你联动呢，就是幻月游戏期间实在太忙了，还要被这家伙殴打，一直没空联系你。等这件事结束，我们来场联动直播吧！

I've actually been wanting to collab with you for a while, but I was just too busy during the Phantasmoon Games, plus getting beaten up by this guy, so I never had the chance to reach out. Once this is all over, let's do a collab stream!
唔…谢谢火花小姐。不过现在桥依也能感觉到，自己越来越虚弱了…希望我能活到那个时候吧，嘿嘿！
Hmm... thank you, Miss Sparxie. But now I can feel myself getting weaker and weaker... I hope I'll live to see that day, hehe!
瞎说什么呢？偶像是不会死的。
所以你为什么会来帮忙？
So why did you come to help?
那当然是出于内心的爱与正义啦！如果要评选「二相乐园最正气凛然的顶流主播」，那肯定非我莫属。
It's all from the love and justice of my own heart! If there was an award for "Planarcadia's Most Righteous Top Streamer," I'd definitely be the one and only candidate!
没想到你还有温柔的一面。
I didn't know you had such a gentle side.
我一直都很温柔的好嘛！如果要评选「二相乐园最温柔的顶流主播」，那肯定非我莫属。
I've always been super gentle, okay!? If there was an award for "Planarcadia's Gentlest Top Streamer," I'd definitely be the one and only candidate!
主要是关于「千禧杀手」的案子，现在阴谋论盛行。你知道最可气的是什么吗？是最主流的阴谋论认为，我火花就是「千禧杀手」！

It's about the Millennium Killer case, conspiracy theories are running wild these days. And you know what's the most infuriating part? The most popular conspiracy theory claims that I, Sparxie, am the Millennium Killer!
我虽然平常确实不怎么积德吧！但也不至于和连环杀手混为一谈吧！气死我了…但没办法，在网络上寻求「清者自清」是没意义的事，最终还是只能自证清白。

Look, I know I'm not exactly a saint in my daily life! But come on, comparing me to a serial killer is insane! I'm so mad... But what can you do? Trying to prove your innocence online is pointless. In the end, I'll just have to clear my name myself.
来说说正事吧，小灰毛～你们是不是从异常防御部那边得到了什么独家情报？跟我分享一下呗？
Let's get down to business, Gray Hair~ Did you get any insider intel from the Department of Aberration Defense? Care to share?
你们向火花分享了从朽叶处获得的消息。
You shared the information obtained from Kuchiba with Sparxie.
怎么样？火花小姐，你有什么头绪吗？
So, Miss Sparxie, got any leads?
唔…我我归根结底是个艺人，不是个侦探，还是别指望我推理分析出什么线索啦！
Hmm... Look, I'm an artiste, not a detective. Don't expect me to deduce any clues here!
那你纯来看热闹的是吧？
So you're just here for the drama, huh?
Why don't you just go home?
哎呀！别急…虽然推理不是我的专长，但是「扮演」可是偶像的必修课！
Oh my! don't be so hasty... While deduction isn't my forte, "acting" is a required course for any idol!
我刚才在想啊…「杀死一座过街天桥」，这听起来像现代诗的标题一样荒谬。如果「千禧杀手」的幻造技艺那么精湛，那肯定也知道自己没办法杀死桥依小姐吧？

I was just thinking... "To Kill a Pedestrian Overpass" sounds as absurd as a modern poetry title. If the Millennium Killer is so skilled at imagenesis, they must know they can't actually kill Miss Joye, right?
所以呢，我就代入了「千禧杀手」的视角。也许这样能搞清楚他的目的——
So, I put myself in the Killer's POV. Maybe this way I could figure out their motive...
「我是一个幻造技术相当精湛的专家。我非常清楚，桥依这种大体积的幻造种，并不是能被我一击杀死的。但是，我还是要对她下手。」
"I'm an expert when it comes to imagenesis techniques. I'm well aware that an imagenae of Joye's size isn't something I could kill in one strike. But I'm still going to do it."
「因为归根结底，我可不能算是一个『连环杀手』。所谓『连环杀手』，是杀人取乐的疯子，而杀人根本就不是我的目标。」
"Because, after all, I can't really be considered a 'serial killer.' A 'serial killer' is a psycho who kills for pleasure, and killing was never my goal in the first place."
「我并不是以夺取性命为目的的狂徒…我真正关注的，自始至终只是那些被我『剥离』出来的部分。至于他们的死亡，不过是过程中的附带结果——只怪他们自己太弱小了。」

"I'm not a fiend who takes lives for the sake of it... What I really care about has always been the parts that I 'peeled.' As for their deaths, those are merely byproducts of the process. They only have themselves to blame, for being too weak."
所以，凶手的目标是身体部位？
So, the killer's going after body parts?
这不是显而易见的结论吗？
诶嘿～我肯定没有你聪明啦～
Ehe~ I'm definitely not as smart as you~
What do you mean? I don't get it.
意思就是，「千禧杀手」的目标根本不是杀害这些幻造种，而是夺取这些幻造种身上的部件。
In other words, the "Millennium Killer's" goal wasn't to kill these imagenae at all, but to take parts from their bodies.
唔…桥依还是不太明白，这个结论意味着什么呢？
Hmm... I still don't quite get it. What does this mean?
意味着我们亲爱的「千禧杀手」很可能并不是一个疯子。这人「剥离」幻造种的身体部位，很可能是有「用处」的！
It means our dear "Millennium Killer" might not be a lunatic after all. The way they're "peeling" body parts from the imagenae, it might actually serve a "purpose"!
有「用处」那就好办啦！那这么看，「千禧杀手」未必是一个人。说不定更像是围绕这些「部位」的去向，在运作的一整个犯罪团伙。

If there's a "purpose," that'll make things easier! So the Millennium Killer isn't necessarily one person. Maybe it's an entire criminal organization that operates around the whereabouts of these "parts."
如果是这样的话，那咱们就该去找最熟悉二相乐园地下世界的朋友聊聊了～你们认识名侦探「不死途」吗？
If that's the case, we should talk to someone who really knows Planarcadia's underground world~ Have you heard of detective Ashveil?
You really do have... a way with people, huh.
那太好了，也省得我介绍你们互相认识了～
Perfect! Saves me the trouble of doing introductions~
没关系～合作一次就熟了～
No worries~ You'll get along just fine after working together~
桥依宝宝，你身体还撑得住吧？
Baby Joye, are you holding up okay?
其实有点越来越不舒服了…失去大量愿力的影响，比桥依想象中还要大得多……
Actually, I'm starting to feel worse and worse... The loss of so much Wishpower is hitting me harder than I imagined...
别担心，让我们速战速决！尽快帮你找回眼睛！出发吧，小灰毛，该去不死途的侦探事务所了～
Don't worry, let's make this quick and clean! We'll get your eyes back in no time! Let's roll, Gray Hair, time to hit the Ashveil Detective Agency~
欢迎啊，几位老朋友。我正在想你们什么时候会来呢…但说实话，我没想到火花小姐也会掺和进来。
Well, well, if it isn't my old friends. I was wondering when you'd show up... though honestly, I didn't expect Miss Sparxie to get involved in this.
哼，不要小看我的情报网啊。
Hmph, don't underestimate my intel network.
还是火花推荐我们来的呢。
Sparxie was the one who recommended this place to us.
哼，看来她还是明白，要专业的人做专业的事。

唉，一见面就开始得意忘形…所以我才最讨厌侦探了。
*sigh* Getting all cocky right from the start... This is exactly why I hate detectives.
Mr. Ashveil... nice to meet you...
还是别斗嘴了。桥依小姐的身体状况好像越来越差了。
Let's stop the bickering. Miss Joye's condition seems to be getting worse.
没关系的！我还能…还能坚持一会儿的！
It's okay! I can... I can hold on a bit longer!
撑住啊，桥依小姐！好啦，我们还是快点进入正题，抓紧时间分享一下彼此的进展吧。
Hang in there, Miss Joye! Alright, let's get straight to the point and share what we've each found so far.
你们向不死途分享了火花刚才对案情的分析。
You shared Sparxie's analysis of the case with Ashveil.
也就是说，那些「部位」可能被拿去做见不得光的买卖…我的确也有类似的想法。但我们「冷硬派侦探」，办案可不能全靠想象，还是要实际探访一下相关的知情人士。

Which means, these parts might have been taken for some underground transactions... I had similar thoughts. But we hard-boiled detectives can't solve cases on imagination alone. We need to pay a visit to someone who actually know something.
在等你们过来的时候，我已经联系了几位愿意提供帮助的朋友。陪我上街和他们聊聊吧。
While waiting for you guys to arrive, I've already contacted a few friends who are willing to help. Come with me, we'll meet them out on the street.
线下采访也太古典了吧！你就不能直接给他们打电话吗？
In-person interviews? That's too old-school! Can't you just call them instead?
你懂什么？「安乐椅侦探」和「冷硬派侦探」是两种不同的侦探设定，事关人设的一致性，可万万不能乱来。
What do you know? "Armchair detective" and "hard-boiled detective" are two completely different archetypes! You can't mess around with character consistency. It's a serious business!
啊，鸽川，你的湍流能不能冲刷掉这座城市中隐藏的罪恶呢？
Ah, Dovebrook, could your currents wash away the sins buried in this city?
这个我懂，突然在莫名其妙的地方用莫名其妙的文艺台词大发感慨，这也是「冷硬派侦探」的固定桥段。
I get it, suddenly dropping dramatic, poetic one-liners in weird places is totally a "hard-boiled detective" trope.
等你们到我这个年纪就懂啦！
You'll understand once you are my age!
你可别学他啊！小灰毛都学成老灰毛了。
Don't follow his example! Gray Hair's already turned into an old graybeard!
桥依小姐，如果你的身体实在撑不住，可以先回去休息。
Miss Joye, if you're really not feeling well, you should go back and rest.
啊啊，我在。不好意思，我觉得有些累了，很想…睡觉……
Ah yeah, I'm here. Sorry, I'm feeling a bit tired, I really want to... sleep...
情况不妙哦…桥依宝宝好像比之前更虚弱了。
This doesn't look good... Poor Baby Joye seems even weaker than before.
看来我们要加快速度了。
We need to pick up the pace.
哟，老东西，你终于来了，等你半天了。哇，你还带了两位大人物…久仰久仰。
Yo, old man, you finally showed up, been waiting ages for you. Whoa, and you brought two big shots with you... what an honor.
给你们介绍一下，这位是「海梅斯」老师。她平时的工作，就是帮助改邪归正的前•犯罪分子回归社会。
Let me introduce you to Ms. Hymes. Her job is helping reformed ex-criminals reintegrate into society.
不要叫「前•犯罪分子」啦！叫人家「更生人」比较好一些。虽然尽是些不成器的烂西瓜，但肯改邪归正就是好的。
Don't say "ex-criminal"! "Reformed individual" sounds much better. Sure, they might be a bunch of rotten watermelons, but wanting to turn over a new leaf is a good thing.
因为工作原因，海梅斯老师非常熟悉二相乐园的「黑暗面」，可以说是「犯罪百科全书」了。所以，我向她咨询了一下那些幻造种「部位」的去向问题。
Because of her work, Ms. Hymes is very familiar with the "dark side" of Planarcadia. You could say she's a walking encyclopedia of crime. So, I consulted her about the whereabouts of those "parts."
你才「犯罪百科全书」呢！这老东西说话真够难听的！
Look who's talking, "Criminal Encyclopedia"! This old geezer doesn't know how to hold his tongue!
言归正传，我看了你给我的资料…该怎么说呢，我不太倾向于「千禧杀手」的目的是「做生意」。
Back to the point, I've looked at the materials you gave me... how should I put this, I'm not convinced that the Millennium Killer's goal is "doing business."
和有机生命不同，幻造种身上真正具备「利用价值」的，往往是那些具备特殊功能的部位——比如尖牙、利爪、喷火囊、毒腺之类的。
Unlike organic life forms, the parts of an imagenae that might actually be of use are usually those with special functions, like fangs, claws, fire sacs, or venom glands.
你再看这家伙「剥离」的都是些什么部位…四肢五官权且不论，眼镜、蝴蝶结、呆毛…谁会要这种部位啊？根本不是正常的市场逻辑。
Would you look at the parts this person "peeled"? Limbs and faces aside, he takes spectacles, bow ties, cowlicks... Who'd even want that? It makes zero market sense.
想象一下，一个邪恶的富豪，不惜斥巨资在黑市上购买一个蝴蝶结，然后缝合到自己身上…这实在不像正常人会做的事。
Imagine this: An evil millionaire splurges on a black-market bow tie and attaches it onto themselves... That doesn't look like something any sane person would do.
确实很难排除有这样的疯子。
Can't really rule out that there are lunatics like that out there.
这我就不知道了。我只了解唯利是图的混蛋，不了解神志不正常的疯子。
That's beyond me. I only understand greedy bastards, not mentally unstable lunatics.
变态的想法，谁说得清呢？
Twisted minds, who can ever figure them out?
我没办法反驳这一点，但只能说不太可能，因为实在不值得。

但被害人被「剥离」的部位都蕴含着不少愿力吧？就像我们桥依宝宝一样，那双眼睛里可蕴含了她全身九成的愿力呢！

犯罪分子如果只是为了「愿力」，那大可以去偷、去抢、去骗…但为了这点愿力，犯下会被判死刑的罪行，「性价比」实在有点太低了。
If they were only after Wishpower, they could steal, rob, or scam... but committing a capital crime for such a small amount of Wishpower? They are taking a huge risk for very little return.
所以，不太可能是为了经济利益…我明白你的意思了。谢谢你的帮助，海梅斯老师。
So, it's probably not for profit... I get what you mean. Thank you for your help, Ms. Hymes.
应该的。希望你们能顺利抓到那家伙。
Of course. Hope you can catch that guy soon.
所以，不太可能是为了经济利益…我明白你的意思了。谢谢你的帮助，海梅斯老师。
So, it's probably not for profit... I get what you mean. Thank you for your help, Ms. Hymes.
应该的。希望你们能顺利抓到那家伙。
Of course. Hope you can catch that guy soon.
不死途先生，「千禧杀手」不会来杀我的吧？我这才刚开始出人头地，可不能就这么被人断送了啊……
Mr. Ashveil, the "Millennium Killer" won't come after me, right? I'm just starting to make a name for myself, I can't have my life cut short like this...
没事的，@独自躺赢，「千禧杀手」一时半刻还注意不到你。
Don't worry, @Lone_Freerider, the Millennium Killer won't notice you anytime soon.
介绍一下，这位「@独自躺赢」是常年混迹在鸽川区的…呃…未来的大明星。他特别了解演艺界的幕后秘辛，说不定能给我们一些连异常防御部都没注意到的线索。

Let me introduce @Lone_Freerider, he's been hanging around Dovebrook District for years... and, uh, he's a future superstar. He knows the entertainment industry's behind-the-scenes secrets like the back of his hand and might give us some leads that even the Department of Aberration Defense hasn't picked up on.
诶，侦探先生，你是不是在故意欺负我呀？有我这个超级顶流在场，演艺界的幕后秘辛还用得着问别人吗？
Hey, Mr. Detective, are you picking on me on purpose? With a mega-superstar like me right here, why would you need to ask anyone else about the behind-the-scenes secrets?
哎呀，别这么说嘛。你是超级顶流，他是超级下沉。下沉市场的事，@独自躺赢肯定比你清楚，他可是超级下沉专家！

Come on, don't say that! You're a top-tier superstar, and he's top-tier in the other direction. When it comes to that market, @Lone_Freerider definitely knows better than you, he's the ultimate grassroots expert!
您这怎么夸我夸得这么难听呢！还是不提这个了…我看了您给我的名单。这些人之间有一个很隐秘的共通点，不知道您们注意到没有？
What kind of compliment was that!? Anyway, forget it... I've looked at the list you gave me. There's a very subtle connection between these people. I wonder if you've noticed it?
这些人全部都是今年，也就是<unbreak>1999</unbreak>年才成名的！没有任何一个人成名超过一年。
Every single one of them only rose to fame this year, in <unbreak>1999</unbreak>! None of them has been famous for more than a year.
喔，所有被害人都是新星。
Oh, so all the victims were newbies.
不，所有被害人都是「大器晚成」，就像我一样…所以我真不会被那家伙盯上吧？不死途先生，你肯定能抓住「千禧杀手」吧！
No, all the victims were "late bloomers," just like me... So that guy won't target me, right? Mr. Ashveil, you'll definitely catch the "Millennium Killer," won't you!
你先说重点，怎么个「大器晚成」？
Cut to the chase first, what do you mean by "late bloomer"?
这些被害人出道都很早很早，有几位甚至早在<unbreak>70</unbreak>年代就出道了，但直到今年才突然火了起来。
These victims started their careers way back. Some of them even debuted in the <unbreak>70</unbreak>s. It was only this year that they suddenly became popular.
嗯…其实桥依也是…直到今年，才多了些粉丝……
Hmm... Actually... I didn't get many fans until this year as well...
混迹演艺圈几十年，一直是无名小卒，最后在厚积薄发之下一朝爆火、大器晚成…这样的人生剧本实际上并不常见，而现在——
After decades in the industry as a nobody, finally achieving overnight success through years of accumulated effort and being a late bloomer... such life stories are actually quite rare, and now...
——这张「被害人名单」上全部都是这种人。
Everyone on this victim list is like this.
呜哇…鸡皮疙瘩起来了，还真有点吓人。
Whoa... I'm getting goosebumps, this is pretty creepy.
哦对了，还有一点，是我偶然发现的…「千禧杀手」夺去的，全部都是这些人身上「最受观众喜爱」的部位……
That reminds me. I discovered by chance that the "Millennium Killer" only takes the parts that resonate most with the audience...
网上总有人说我的小扁嘴很可爱，不会被「千禧杀手」盯上吧！不死途先生，我真的很害怕，你会抓住他的吧！
People online keep saying my little duck lips are cute. What if that makes me a target for the Millennium Killer? Mr. Ashveil, I'm really scared... you'll catch him, right!?
放宽心，@独自躺赢，你不会受到伤害的。有我们在呢。
Don't worry, @Lone_Freerider, you won't get hurt. We've got your back.
网上总有人说我的小扁嘴很可爱，不会被「千禧杀手」盯上吧！不死途先生，我真的很害怕，你会抓住他的吧！
People online keep saying my little duck lips are cute. What if that makes me a target for the Millennium Killer? Mr. Ashveil, I'm really scared... you'll catch him, right!?
放宽心，@独自躺赢，你不会受到伤害的。有我们在呢。
Don't worry, @Lone_Freerider, you won't get hurt. We've got your back.
不死途，你来了。两位初次见面，我叫「萨尔黎曼」，是贵由百货营业部的职员。
Ah, Ashveil, you're here. And you two, since this is our first meeting, I'm Saliman, a staff member at the Noblesse Department Store's Sales Division.
这家伙是我的酒肉朋友。你们也可能不是初次见面。但这家伙是个酒蒙子，下班后的大部分时候都不是很清醒，估计也记不住你们见没见过面了。
This guy's my drinking buddy. You might've met before, but he's a total drunkard. He's usually not this sober after work hours, so he probably doesn't remember whether he's seen you or not.
哈哈，饶了我吧，我那工作不喝点怎么扛得住呢？
Haha, give me a break! How else am I supposed to survive that job without a drink or two?
在工作之外，我还是摔跤手「剪刀脚•赛娜」小姐的粉丝后援团团长…而大约一个月前，赛娜小姐被「千禧杀手」杀害了。她是个欧克，被凶手夺取的部位是，她的耳朵。

Outside of work, I'm also the president of the fan club for the wrestler "Senna Scissorkick." About a month ago, Miss Senna was killed by the Millennium Killer. She was an orch, and the part that the murderer took from her was her ears.
萨尔黎曼算是相当老资格的粉丝了，也许能给我们提供一些不一样的视角。
Saliman's been a devoted fan for ages, maybe he can give us a fresh perspective.
我确实是老资格了。<unbreak>1983</unbreak>年，赛娜第一次登上擂台，我就是她的粉丝了。十几年来，她不温不火，我不离不弃。
I'm definitely an OG fan. I've been following Miss Senna since her first match in <unbreak>1983</unbreak>. Through all these years, even when her career was just lukewarm, I stayed loyal.
赛娜小姐之前的耳朵与一般欧克没有区别，后来她突然闭关了一个月，说是进行「精神上的修炼」，等到重新出来时，那双耳朵竟然变成了轻脚那样可爱的猫耳。

Miss Senna's ears used to be just like any other orch's, but then she suddenly went into seclusion for a month, claiming she was undergoing "spiritual training." When she finally emerged, those ears of hers had somehow transformed into adorable cat ears, just like a lightpaw's.
当时她跟我们说，这是「精神修炼」的结果，精神成长了，肉体也会有所反应。精神上的成长大概的确有帮助，赛娜小姐在闭关结束以后，很快就成为了摔跤界炙手可热的超级明星。

She told us back then that it was the result of "spiritual training." When your spirit grows, your body responds accordingly. I guess that growth really did pay off, because after her seclusion ended, Miss Senna quickly became a red-hot superstar in the wrestling world.
可几个月后，她就被杀害了…那双精神修炼得来的猫耳，也被那个卑劣的凶手夺走了……
But just a few months later, she was murdered... and the cat ears she had earned through spiritual training were stolen by that despicable killer...
我有时会觉得这实在是命运的捉弄。难道她为了让自己变得更强而进行的精神修炼，反而为她招致了杀身之祸吗…唉，想想就难受。
Sometimes I feel like this was fate's cruel joke. Could it be that the very training she took to make herself stronger ended up leading to her death instead... *sigh* It hurts just thinking about it.
别这么想嘛！她会死，是因为有坏人杀了她，而不是因为她自己做错了什么。
Don't think like that! She died because someone evil killed her, not because she did anything wrong.
谢谢你们。我也一直相信邪不压正，「千禧杀手」总有一天会伏法。
Thank you all. I've always believed that justice will prevail, and the Millennium Killer will get their punishment one day.
她曾在你的支持下绽放过。
She once bloomed with your support.
真可惜，我没办法为她做更多了。
What a shame, I couldn't do more for her.
不死途，你会抓住「千禧杀手」的吧？
Ashveil, you'll catch the Millennium Killer, right?
未必是由我来抓住，但这家伙绝对逃不掉。
It might not be me who catches them, but they definitely won't get away.
有你这句话就够了，我的酒肉朋友！
That's all I needed to hear, my drinking buddy!

...I have a doctor on my team who used to be a doctor at Campbell Imagenesis Surgery. In <unbreak>1998</unbreak>, she quit and joined our clinic, saying the pressure at big hospitals was too much.
我其实一直都知道，她在背地里替人进行地下的整形手术…但她医疗水平很高，我一直睁一只眼闭一只眼。

Bartoli Miranda... Her name is Bartoli Miranda. At this hour, she usually takes walks around the Plaza...
走吧，{NICKNAME}，让我们去会会这位米兰达小姐。
Let's go, {NICKNAME}, time to meet this Miss Miranda.
因巡医生也可能在撒谎。
别担心，他没有撒谎。我看得出来。
Don't worry, he's not lying. I can tell.
她会在这种时候继续散步吗？
Would she still go for a walk at a time like this?
很多连环杀手都执着于「规律性」，即使到了这种关键时刻，她恐怕也不会突然改变自己的生活习惯吧。
Many serial killers are obsessed with "routines." Even at such a crucial moment, she probably wouldn't suddenly change her lifestyle habits.
请问是巴托莉•米兰达小姐吗？
Excuse me, are you Miss Bartoli Miranda?
看来，人还是不该有太规律的作息，不然很容易被侦探找到。
Guess having too much of a routine isn't the best idea. Makes it way too easy for detectives to track you down.
呵，要是没做亏心事，应该也不怕被侦探找到吧？「千禧杀手」。
Of course, if you've got nothing to hide, you shouldn't be afraid of a detective tracking you down, right? "Millennium Killer."
我一直很讨厌这个外号。就因为案发在<unbreak>1999</unbreak>年，所以起名叫「千禧」？就因为死了很多幻造种，就要称我为「杀手」？
I've always hated that moniker. Just because the incident happened in <unbreak>1999</unbreak>, they went with "Millennium"? Just because many imagenae died, they had to label me a "killer"?
Uh... Were they supposed to call you something else?
我的行为中不包含任何「杀意」，也从来都没有想过要「杀死」谁，他们自己扛不住而已。
There's no malice in my actions, and I've never thought about "killing" anyone. They just couldn't handle it, that's all.
You're not even going to try to talk your way out of it?
不。我并不是为了和蠢货斗嘴才走到今天的。
No. I didn't get to where I am today just to bicker with fools.
看在你们两位也不是凡夫俗子的份上，我倒是不介意给你们讲讲我为何要这么做。
Since you two aren't just any random nobodies, I suppose I don't mind explaining why I did this.
我曾是一名优秀的整形医生。我的大部分患者，最终都能成为受人瞩目的明星。
I used to be an excellent plastic surgeon. Most of my patients ended up becoming prominent, head-turning stars.
但无论这些只能受我恩惠的无用之辈多么受人瞩目、多么光芒万丈，我都只是个籍籍无名的医生罢了。
Yet, regardless of how much attention and glamour these worthless people — who owe all their success to the favors I've so kindly bestowed upon them — receive, I am still just a nameless doctor.
这种生涯让我稍微心理失衡了一段时间，但我很快就自己调理好了。人不能总是内耗嘛！
This career path threw me off balance for a while, but I pulled myself together pretty quickly. You can't keep tearing yourself apart!
我想到，也许自己可以不去做一个「奉献者」，而是做一个「播种者」。
I thought, maybe instead of being a "benefactor," I could be a "sower."
于是我来到了因巡的诊所，在这里，我悄悄将自己需要的部位播种给那些渴望成名的蠢货。
So I came to Izol's clinic, where I secretly planted the parts I needed in those fame-hungry fools.
等到他们真的成名，那些由我创造的、最受人瞩目的部位，早已满盈着愿力，等待着我的采摘。
When they truly become famous, those eye-catching parts I created will already be brimming with Wishpower, ripe for my harvest.
所以都说了，我根本不是什么「杀手」，我只是在践行「春种秋收」的自然之理。等到全部采摘完成——也即是现在，我就将它们全部都移植到自己身上。

So, I've made it clear. I'm not a "killer." I'm merely following the natural law of "sowing in spring and reaping in autumn." Once the harvest is complete — that is, now — I will transplant all these parts onto myself.
哈哈，不觉得有一种丰收的喜悦吗？
Haha, doesn't it give you the joy that a bountiful harvest brings?
如今，我的全身都是二相乐园「最受人瞩目的部位」。在这个注意力为王的时代，我已登基加冕，成为「视线的君王」。
Now, my body is entirely made up of the most eye-catching parts in Planarcadia. In this age where attention is king, I have taken the throne. I crown myself, "Ruler of Gazes."
我不怕治安局、不怕异常防御部，更不怕你们这些所谓的谒者。我是迈向神境之人，尘世的法律无法制裁我。
I fear neither the Security Bureau nor the Department of Aberration Defense, and least of all you so-called Supplicants. I am ascending to godhood, and mortal laws cannot bind me.
You're just a god-awful lunatic at best.
迈向神境哪有那么容易…
Ascending to godhood isn't that easy...
是啊，这家伙只是沉浸在自己的妄想中，不知天地为何物了。
Yeah, this person's just wrapped up in her own delusions, completely out of touch with reality.
真是不出所料的反应。无所谓，我也不打算和死人争辩。
Just the reaction I expected. Whatever, I'm not going to argue with the dead.
只是，别再叫我「千禧杀手」了。也别再叫我「巴托莉•米兰达」。我已经有了全新的名字，属于「视线的君王」的尊号！
Just... stop calling me the Millennium Killer. And don't call me "Bartoli Miranda" anymore, either. I have a brand-new name now, a noble title befitting the "Ruler of Gazes"!
你杀了那么多幻造种，最后就把自己拼凑成这玩意儿？你自己觉得这好看吗？
After killing so many imagenae, this is what you cobbled yourself together into? Do you actually think this looks good?
尽情嘲讽吧！我会用仁慈的死亡给予你们宽恕！
Mock me all you want! I shall grant you forgiveness through a merciful death!
唉…跟纯疯子真是无法交流。准备应战吧，{NICKNAME}。
*sigh* There's just no reasoning with a complete lunatic. Get ready for battle, {NICKNAME}.
不对…为什么…我维持不住自己的形态了……
Something's wrong... Why... I can't maintain my form anymore...
为什么我的愿力结构在崩溃？不可能，我的幻造技术是完美的……
Why is my Wishpower structure collapsing? Impossible, my imagenesis technique is perfect...
好…好难受…我不能…死在这里……
Ugh... I feel... terrible... I can't... die here...
Oops... I think we went a bit overboard...
想来是「缝合怪」最终还是没办法维系自身的形体吧。
I guess this "patchwork monster" couldn't maintain its form in the end.
不，并不是我们的错。是这家伙自己的问题。
Well, it's not our fault. It's entirely her own fault.
我并不是幻造专家，只能粗浅解释一下——「幻造种」虽然是智慧生命，但和所有的「艺术」文脉相通。
I'm no imagenesis expert, so I can only offer a rather basic explanation. While the imagenae are intelligent beings, they resonate with all traditions of "art."
「艺术」这东西嘛，讲究一个主次有别、详略得当。如果一幅画、一本小说、一首歌，「全部都是重点」，那就等同于「完全没有重点」。

You see, when it comes to "art," it's all about knowing what to emphasize, balancing detail with brevity. If a painting, novel, or song tries to "emphasize everything," then it's essentially the same as "emphasizing nothing at all."
同理，一个幻造种如果全身都是「最受瞩目的部位」，那就会像这位「弗什么欧非手」一样，维持不住自己的形体，稍微挨几球棒，就变成现在的样子了。

Similarly, if an imagenae's entire body was made of the "most eye-catching parts," they'd end up like this "Frank-whatshername," unable to maintain their form. Just a few hits with a bat, and they'd turn into... well, this.
你知道的吧？这些尘灵是二相乐园的「最小愿力单元」…她也算是返璞归真了，真是个好结局，哈哈。
Did you know? These wispae are the smallest units of Wishpower in Planarcadia... She's really returned to her most basic form. What a perfect ending, haha.
但对我们就未必是好结局了！这家伙死掉了，这可没办法和朽叶小姐交差……
But that's definitely not a good ending for us! Now that she's dead, there's no way we can face Miss Kuchiba...
别担心，你们只是正当防卫，并没有做错任何事。
Don't worry, you were just acting in self-defense, you didn't do anything wrong.
太棒了，来得早不如来得巧，火花花顺利避开了最终决战！
Perfect! Talk about having impeccable timing! Sparxicle managed to dodge the final battle!
不会全身都变成尘灵了吧？
Don't tell me her whole body's turned into wispae?
别担心，桥依小姐的眼睛没事。我刚才眼疾手快，在巴托莉小姐崩解之前，把它好好保管起来了，稍后我们一起去还给桥依小姐吧！
Don't worry, Miss Joye's eyes are fine. I was quick on my feet and managed to keep them safe before Miss Miranda disintegrated. Let's return them to Miss Joye together later!
这是我们在巴托莉•米兰达家中搜查到的日记…这个人的思想，实在是扭曲到了令人毛骨悚然的程度。
This is the diary we found during our search of Bartoli Miranda's house... This person's mind is twisted to a bone-chilling degree.
真是辛苦两位了。没能及时赶到现场提供支援，我也要向两位道歉。
Thank you both for your hard work. I also want to apologize for not being able to arrive at the scene in time to provide support.
没事啦，他们俩又没受什么伤～
It's alright, it's not like they got hurt or anything~
不要擅自替别人原谅啊！
Don't go around forgiving people on others' behalf!
…但是当然了，我们两个也没受什么伤。没能活捉「千禧杀手」，我们应该向朽叶小姐道歉才对。
...But of course, neither of us was seriously hurt. We should apologize to Miss Kuchiba for failing to capture the Millennium Killer alive.
Don't sell yourself short, I've also made some—
不是，你俩有完没完？别客套了，赶紧去把眼睛还给桥依宝宝吧！
Oh come on, you two! Cut the pleasantries already and go return those eyes to Baby Joye!
…{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}、不死途先生、火花小姐、朽叶小姐……
...{F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, Mr. Ashveil, Miss Sparxie, Miss Kuchiba...
大家都在这里，桥依的眼睛也回来了。那就说明，你们顺利抓住「千禧杀手」了！
Everyone's here, and I've got my eyes back. That means you successfully caught the Millennium Killer!
呃…也不能算「抓住」吧！但反正她不会再有机会伤害任何人了～
Uh... I wouldn't say we "caught" her! But, in any case, she won't get another chance to harm anyone~
谢谢你们救了桥依！也谢谢你们，能为那些无辜被害的幻造种讨回公道。
Thank you for saving me! And thank you for bringing justice to those innocent imagenae victims.
即使凶手伏法，她造成的伤害也不会被磨灭。仍然有很多人失去了自己的家人和朋友，也仍然有很多人失去了自己的偶像。
Even if the culprit is brought to justice, the damage she caused cannot be erased. Many people have lost their families and friends, and many others have lost their idols.
这些伤口，恐怕还需要大家花上很长的时间去愈合。
These wounds will take quite some time for everyone to heal, I'm afraid.
总会有人带来希望，愈合伤口。
There will always be someone who brings hope and heals our wounds.
没错！所以偶像的工作就是带来希望！这项长期工作就交给我和桥依吧～
That's right! An idol's job is to bring hope! Leave this long-term mission to me and Joye~
很多伤口永远没办法愈合。
的确如此，所以「带着伤口活下去」，也总是人生的必修课。
Indeed, that's why "living with our wounds" is a lesson that everyone has to learn in life.
桥依小姐！你终于渡过难关了！我们就知道你能挺过去的！
Miss Joye! You finally made it! We knew you could pull through!
呜呜呜…桥依真的以为自己再也见不到你们了…好想你们啊……
*sniffles*... I really thought I'd never see you guys again... I missed you all so much...
我们也很想你，桥依小姐！呜呜呜呜呜……
We missed you too, Miss Joye! Waaaah... *sob*
也许我们永远没办法阻止善良的人们被邪恶侵扰，但至少今天，我们拯救了一份希望。
Maybe we can never stop evil from troubling kind people, but at least today, we saved a glimmer of hope.
哎呀～偶尔做些好事，心情竟然还不错～下次可以多尝试尝试！
Oh my~ Doing good deeds once in a while actually feels pretty nice~ Maybe I should try it more often!
感谢三位的协助。异常防御部也为三位提供了奖金，以表彰三位在「千禧杀手」一案中的卓越贡献。
Thank you all for your assistance. The Department of Aberration Defense has also provided you with bonuses in recognition of your outstanding contributions to the Millennium Killer case.
好耶！做好事还有钱拿！心情更好了！
Awesome! Getting paid for doing good deeds! I'm feeling even better now!
…不过，不死途先生、火花小姐，虽然难以启齿，但眼下还有另一件事需要两位帮忙。
...However, Mr. Ashveil, Miss Sparxie, although it's a bit awkward to say this here, there's another matter I need your help with.
请两位随我回到异常防御部，配合我们完成案件笔录。
Please come with me to the Department of Aberration Defense and assist us in completing the case report.
等一下，为什么只有我们两个？{NICKNAME}不用去吗？{F#她}{M#他}可是主要负责推理的那个人诶！
Hold up, why is it just the two of us? Doesn't {NICKNAME} have to be present? {F#She}{M#He}'s our main detective here!
等等，我也可以谈，我也可以是外宾。
Hold up, I can play that game too! I can also act like I'm a foreign guest.
你不可以是！乖乖和我一起去配合异常防御部的工作吧！
No you can't! Be a good sport and come help out with the Department of Aberration Defense's work!
哼，我反悔了！再也不要做好事了！
Hmph, I take it back! I'm never doing good deeds again!
（回过头来想想才发现，我这可真是破了一桩大案啊！这样一来，我岂不是也能在二相乐园的犯罪史上留名了？嘿嘿。）
(Looking back now, I really did crack a major case! In that case, aren't I making a name for myself in Planarcadia's criminal history? Hehe.)
（…感觉有点用词不当，把自己说得像罪犯一样了…总之是解决了一件大事，可喜可贺、可喜可贺。）
(...That came out wrong, I made myself sound like a criminal... Anyway, I took care of something major. How delightful! Love that for me.)
桥依与粉丝们正沉浸在重逢的感动中。还是先不要打扰他们了。
Joye and her fans are caught up in their emotional reunion. Better not disturb them for now.
（什么情况，那座桥旁边怎么挤了这么多人？）
(What's going on? Why are there so many people crowded around that bridge?)
火花小姐好像已经到了，我们过去找她吧。
Looks like Miss Sparxie is already here. Let's go look for her.
小灰毛！桥依宝宝！我来啦～
Gray Hair! Baby Joye! I'm heeere~
走吧，该去找其他朋友聊聊了。
Let's go, time to chat with our other friends.
我还约了最后一位朋友，去见见对方吧。
I still have one last friend to meet up with. Let's go see them.
根据我的「主播直觉」，那边几个人最适合我们炒作！去找他们聊聊吧。
According to my "streamer's intuition," those folks over there would be perfect for our publicity stunt! Let's go chat with them.
Look, Izol is right over there.
We should go get some answers.
瞩目于我吧，这无与伦比的强大愿力！
该死…怎么回事…感觉身体有些不受控制？
Blasted... What's going on... why does it feel like I'm losing control of my body?
No! Wait... The Wishpower... It's rejecting me!
这怎么可能！我明明已经…踏入成神之境！
This can't be! I was so close to... ascending to godhood!
{NICKNAME}！你来看桥依啦～上次那件事，真是太感谢你了。如果没有你，桥依恐怕再也没机会做偶像了。
{NICKNAME}, you came to see me! Thank you so much for what you did last time. If it weren't for you, I probably would never have gotten the chance to be an idol again.
放心好啦～美少女的恢复能力可是很强的！你看桥依水灵灵的大眼睛，哪里像是受过伤的样子？
Don't worry! Pretty girls like me have amazing recovery powers. See these big, sparkling eyes of mine? Do I look injured to you?
没留下什么精神创伤吧？
No lasting psychological damage, I hope?
嘿嘿，桥依的神经可是像筑桥的钢筋混凝土一样粗壮结实呢～才不会轻易就留下什么精神创伤！
Hehe, my nerves are as tough and solid as the steel and concrete used to build bridges. No way I'd get traumatized just like that!
你看，桥依不但生龙活虎，甚至还已经投身于下一场战斗啦！
See? Not only am I bursting with energy, I've already thrown myself into the next battle!
我是二维市的过街天桥、也是奋斗中的少女偶像——桥依，叫我桥桥就好~
I'm the pedestrian overpass of Duomension City, and also an idol-in-the-making named Joye! But you can just call me JoJo.
目前，我正在参加二相乐园第三千二百五十八届「加油吧！寰宇美少女」超大型选秀节目！
Right now, I'm competing in Planarcadia's <unbreak>3,258</unbreak>th "Go for It! Miss Universe" mega talent show!
桥依目前票数<unbreak>29</unbreak>，现在只差一票，就可以挺进<unbreak>990</unbreak>强了！
I'm sitting at <unbreak>29</unbreak> votes now. Just one more is all I need to secure my spot among the Top <unbreak>990</unbreak>!
你还没投票的话，就帮帮我吧，好心的{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
If you haven't voted yet, help me out, kind {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!
So a bridge can actually enter the talent show?
我也是很努力才说服导演，成为历届选秀中唯一一座桥选手的！
I worked really hard to convince the director to let me be the show's first-ever bridge contestant!
The Top <unbreak>990</unbreak>... How top are we talking?
The <unbreak>990</unbreak>th out of <unbreak>1000</unbreak>. Top of the universe!
不过，强大的从来不是具体的数字，而是桥依的双腿明明无法自由跳动，但我却因为<unbreak>29</unbreak>份爱和期待，已经开始在成为偶像的道路上奔跑啦。

But what truly matters isn't the number itself. It's that even though I can't dance freely with my legs, those <unbreak>29</unbreak> shares of love and expectation have already set me running, straight down the road to becoming an idol.
我的票只留给最心动的偶像。
I'm only voting for the idol I love the most.
好啊，我一定会让你对闪闪发光的桥依心动。
You bet! I'll make sure you fall head over heels for the sparkling Joye.
我要证明，就算是一座桥，也可以成为千年一遇的美少女偶像！
I'm gonna prove that even a bridge can become a once-in-a-millennium idol sensation!
I'd like to talk about your creator...
问这个问题，是因为觉得桥依和二相乐园常见的幻造种不太一样吗？
You're asking this because you think Joye's different from the imagenae you usually see around Planarcadia, aren't you?
没有可以自由移动的艺术形象身体，保持着器物的工具属性，就连外表也是普普通通的天桥……
No tangible artistic form to freely move around in, still stuck with the utilitarian nature of an object, and even my appearance is just... an ordinary pedestrian overpass...
因为严格意义上来说，桥依不是一个在期待中被创造出的「幻造种」。
Because strictly speaking, Joye wasn't an imagenae brought into existence through someone's expectations.
我的创造者，只是一个平庸、以设计谋求糊口的桥梁工程师，他的设计撑不起纵横的高架，也无法联结寰宇的星系，他只创造出了我，为一笔小小的稿费。

My creator was just an ordinary, run-of-the-mill bridge engineer who designed structures to make ends meet. His designs couldn't support sprawling overpasses or link star systems across the cosmos. All he ever created was me, for a measly commission fee.
没有寄托、没有愿望、没有艺术、没有名字和眼睛，只是一座过街天桥。直到我自己给自己取了名字，自己找到自己的梦想——桥依就出现了！
No purpose, no wishes, no artistry, no name, no eyes. Just a pedestrian overpass. That is, until I gave myself a name and found my own dream... That's when Joye was born!
不过我很骄傲呢。我可是他设计生涯中唯一一座还没塌的小桥。
But hey, I'm pretty proud of that. I'm the only bridge in his entire design career that hasn't collapsed yet.
...I wanna get off this bridge now.
欸嘿，晚了哦~而且你现在不是在桥下嘛！
Hehe, too late~! Besides, you're already under the bridge now!
你现在也不会塌的，对吧？
You're not gonna fall apart on me now, right?
Does anyone else know about this?
I'd like to talk about your dream...
在见面时向粉丝坦诚真实自我，本来就是偶像应该做的，请尽情向桥依提问吧~
Being real and letting fans see the real me. That's what being an idol is all about! So go on, ask me anything~
为什么想成为美少女偶像？
Why do you want to become an idol?
你或许可以想象，作为桥的我，日常生活就是在麻木茫然中目送，让无数过客从我身上走过。
You can probably imagine it. My daily life as a bridge is just standing here in numb bewilderment, watching countless strangers walk all over me.
可是LED大屏建起后，原本的过客却会为了那些屏幕中跃动的美好少女驻足，他们甚至站上天桥，兴奋地呼喊偶像的名字，为自推争辩不休。

But once those giant LED screens went up, the passersby who used to just walk on by started stopping in their tracks, drawn in by those radiant idols dancing across the displays. They'd even climb up onto the overpasses, shouting their faves' names in exhilaration, getting into heated debates over who's the best.
那一刻，激动、渴望涌上我的心头——「我也想拥有名字，我也想成为偶像！」就算诞生时没有被赋予愿望和期待也没有关系，桥依会有自己的愿望！

In that moment, excitement and longing welled up in my heart: "I wanna have a name too. I wanna become an idol!" It doesn't matter that I wasn't given wishes or expectations at birth. I will have my own dreams!
嘿嘿，桥依可是个很贪心的偶像！
Hehe, you can say I'm a super greedy idol!
如果真的实现了，那我一定会在「出道夜」高呼：「桥依想做，桥依去做，桥依成功做到！」
If I really make it happen, then on my debut night I'll shout at the top of my lungs: "Joye wanted it, Joye did it, Joye nailed it!"
哈哈，事实上我认真想过呢。如果真的可以被那么多人喜欢，走到成为偶像的那一天，我希望我的粉丝们能意识到：「偶像桥依也只是一座桥嘛！」

Haha, actually, I've given it some serious thought! If I really could get that many people to like me and make it as an idol one day, I hope my fans would realize: "Even as an idol, Joye is still just a bridge!"
我的意思是说，我不会离开这里。因为就算桥依真的成为了闪闪发光的美少女偶像，她作为一座天桥，让人们平安过街的最初使命也不会改变。

What I'm trying to say is, I'm not leaving this place. Even if I do become a dazzling superstar, my original mission as a pedestrian overpass — keeping people safe as they cross the street — will never change.
无论现在，还是未来。这才是偶像的意义嘛。
And that's exactly what being an idol is all about, whether it's now or in the future!
How'd it become a once-in-a-millennium thing?
夸张的手法嘛~偶像是需要人设的，这样一说你不就记住桥依了吗？
It's called exaggeration~ Idols need a persona, y'know? With that, now you'll remember Joye, no?
再说，我也没有虚假宣传哦，这句话正确的扩写是「努力参加一千年选秀总能有一次遇到机会出道的美少女偶像」。
Besides, I didn't falsely advertise anything! A more accurate version of what I just said is: "Auditioning for a thousand years straight, I will eventually get my idol sensation at least once."
说实话，很少有偶像可以像我这样一千年不塌啦。
To be honest, very few idols can maintain their image for a thousand years without a scandal like me.
So, what's your plan for making it as an idol?
尽管固化的四肢限制了我舞蹈的自由，但作为一座稳固的天桥，我可以比所有偶像都更加宠粉。
I might not be a great dancer with these stiff limbs, but as a rock-solid footbridge, I can spoil my fans way more than any other idol!
不需要买票，粉丝可以踩着我过桥，不需要付费，谁都可以跟我合照。免费的桥依招牌wink要不要？粉丝的公仆桥依静候您的驾到！
Fans can just walk all over me, no tickets required! It's totally free, and anyone can grab a selfie. Want a free signature wink? Joye, the people's footbridge, is at your service!
但是导演说我这样很没有商业价值。
But the director says I'm not "marketable" enough.
他希望有爆点，劝我「谈个地下恋、为人人都在践踏我卖个惨，至少上一次热搜，再写个『抱歉占用公共资源』的通稿……」
He wants a viral scandal. He told me, "Get a secret lover, play the victim since everyone's 'walking all over you' to get trending, then drop a canned apology for 'hogging public resources'..."
可是乐子神在上，天桥不就是公共资源吗！
But for The Laughter's sake, a footbridge literally is a public resource!
但你不早就是偶像了吗？
But... haven't you already made it as an idol?
其实，桥依目前还只能算不入流的小偶像啦！
Well, I'm still just a small-time, amateur one!
桥依偶尔在Livehouse里面进行一些小规模演出，积攒了一些数量不多，但都非常爱桥依的粉丝。现在这些粉丝也都很支持桥依的远大梦想。
I do small gigs at live houses sometimes, and I've got a small but super-loyal fan base. They're all totally behind my big dream now!
毕竟桥依想做到的可不止如此呢～桥依的终极梦想，是成为像火花小姐一样的超级偶像！
After all, I want to go way beyond that. My ultimate dream is to be a super idol, just like Sparxie!
火花小姐也说，她会全力支持我的梦想。她人真好！
Sparxie even told me she'd support my dream all the way. She's so wonderful!
{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你也一定会支持我的吧？
{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, you'll definitely root for me too, right?
Of course! You've got my vote!
嘿嘿，你真的特别特别特别好！桥依爱你哟～
Hehe, you're so, so, so sweet! Joye loves ya!
总觉得你的外形不太能做顶流。
Honestly, I'm not sure your "look" is cut out for the A-list.
没错，但这就是意义所在～
Exactly! But that's the whole point of it!
这世界上有很多人，都想要追逐自己「不配得到」的梦想吧？想做绘师的色盲、想做科学家的笨蛋、想做运动员的跛脚人，还有想做超级偶像的过街天桥。
Lots of people chase dreams that seem "out of their league," right? Like a colorblind artist, a scientist who's a bit slow, a limping athlete... or a footbridge that wants to be a super idol!
桥依想用自己的努力，传达一条信息——
I just want to work hard and send a message to everyone—
贪婪地前进吧！你配得到你想得到的一切！
Chase your dreams! You deserve everything you've ever wanted!
I've got stuff to do. Catch you later!
不要忘记为我投票，桥依一定会成为让你骄傲的超级偶像！
Don't forget to vote! Joye is going to be a super idol you can really be proud of!
I've got stuff to do. Catch you later!
我再强调一次：名侦探「麦卡托」是不会输的，你的「薇克丝」根本就是在垂、死、挣、扎。
Let me emphasize this one more time: Detective Mercator never loses, and your Vexis is just grasping, at, straws.
胡说八道！我都怀疑你是不是真看过《迷局游戏》原漫画，不会是近期动画开播招来的新粉，随便看了两集就来这不懂装懂吧！

Nonsense! I doubt you've even read the original The Labyrinth Game comic. You're probably just some newbie who hopped on after the animation started airing, watched a couple episodes, and now you're here pretending you know everything!
What are you guys arguing about?
我们在为了各自的偶像奋战，你离远点，小心误伤！
We're fighting for our own idols here, so back off! I don't want any collateral damage!
Do me a favor and knock it off.
您哪位？没看过我们漫画别瞎凑热闹。
And who are you supposed to be? Don't butt in if you haven't read our comics.
冷静一点，这好像是还没入坑的新人啊！怎么样，有兴趣来参加我们的「迷局游戏Only展」吗？感受侦探麦卡托和私刑制裁者薇克丝的智斗纠葛！

Take it easy. It looks like we've got a newcomer who hasn't fallen down the rabbit hole yet! So, are you interested in participating in The Labyrinth Game OnlyCon? Come experience the battle of wits between Detective Mercator and vigilante Vexis!
我最爱的漫画《迷局游戏》的主角之一，极具魅力的反派角色！
One of the main characters from my favorite comic The Labyrinth Game, such a charming villain!
伴随我童年的经典漫画《迷局游戏》的主角之一，神秘而正义的侦探。
A mysterious and righteous detective, one of the main characters from The Labyrinth Game, a classic comic from my childhood.
看起来很能打的粉丝&冷静的粉丝
我们最爱的漫画！影响二相乐园的绝佳智斗艺术之作！
Our favorite comic! A masterpiece of tactical brilliance that influenced Planarcadia!
感兴趣的话千万要来看看，现在动画版正在热播中，只要你看了，一定会爱上薇克丝！
If you're interested, you absolutely have to check it out! The animation adaptation is airing right now, and I guarantee you'll fall in love with Vexis once you watch it!
还是爱上我们的智斗天花板麦卡托吧，她一定会胜利的！
Nah, fall for our queen of mind games, Mercator! She's destined to win!
一定会胜利？少吹牛啦，你可别忘了，麦卡托只是个外表跟小学生没什么两样的普通人，但薇克丝可是会咒杀的！只要知道一个人的容貌和名字……

Destined to win? Oh, please. Don't forget, Mercator is just some kid who look like a normal elementary school student, but Vexis can literally curse people to death! All she needs is someone's face and name...
普通人怎么了？杀人狂魔薇克丝根本不知道麦卡托的真名，这是她的制胜之策。
What's wrong with being normal? That psycho killer Vexis doesn't even know Mercator's real name. That's her winning hand.
我不允许你叫她杀人狂魔！请叫她「惩奸除恶•美艳动人•私刑制裁者」薇克丝，她是因为无法忍受城市的腐朽，才走上修罗之道的。她的牺牲，值得所有人的铭记！

I will NOT let you call her a psycho killer! Please address her properly as "Vexis, the Righteous Punisher of Evil, the Enchanting Beauty, and the Vigilante of Justice." She only walked the path of carnage because she couldn't stand the corruption of this city. Her sacrifice deserves to be remembered by all!
…谁会记这么多前缀啊，我们麦卡托的前缀只有一个——「名侦探」！这才是人间正道！
...Who's supposed to remember all those titles? Mercator only needs one: Detective! Now that is the true path of justice!
算了算了，跟你吵这些根本没有意义…如果当初椅子斯基没有突然病逝，能活着把结局画完就好了——心怀正义的她，一定会让名侦探麦卡托将薇克丝绳之以法！

Forget it, forget it, there's no point arguing with you... If only Chairsky hadn't passed away so suddenly and had lived long enough to finish the ending. Someone with her sense of justice would've definitely had Detective Mercator bring Vexis to justice!
胡说八道，椅子老师会画这么空洞乏味的结局吗？你根本就没看懂原作留下的伏线！薇克丝肯定会逍遥法外、笑到最后！区区身高一米二的小学生……

Nonsense! As if Master Chair would ever write such a hollow and boring ending. You clearly missed all the foreshadowing in the original! Vexis will definitely get away with it and have the last laugh! A mere first-grader who's only 4 feet tall...
你是在羞辱麦卡托的身高吗？她的智慧只是浓缩在了一具孩童般可爱的身躯里！
Is that an insult to Mercator's height? Her wisdom is just condensed into an adorably child-sized body!
这是羞辱？这是陈述事实！
An insult? No, just stating facts!
你上一次就是因为亵渎我们的偶像，才差点和我们麦卡托粉丝团团长「不死神探」当街互殴的，要不是有个会说话的猴子拉架，你今天说不准就得躺着来逛漫展了。

Last time you mouthed off and insulted our idol, you nearly got into a street brawl with the Ashen Detective, the head of our Mercator Fan Club. If that talking monkey hadn't stepped in to break it up, you'd probably be visiting this convention on a stretcher today.
…又提这事，我懒得跟你吵了，你们麦卡托粉丝真扫兴！
...Bringing this up again? I can't be bothered to argue with you. You Mercator fans are such killjoys!
哼，只是提醒你谨言慎行！
Hmph, just a friendly reminder to watch your mouth!
（这俩人貌似不会打起来了，真没劲……）
(Looks like these two aren't going to start a fight... how boring...)
（不过…「不死神探」和「会说话的猴子」…该不会是那个落魄侦探吧？他兴趣还挺广泛。）
(But... the Ashen Detective and the Talking Monkey... could it be that down-on-his-luck detective? He sure has a wide range of hobbies.)
（一本没完结的漫画，竟然能有这么多粉丝为他吵架，真厉害啊。可惜我也没看过这个漫画，就不凑热闹了，先离开这里吧。）

(A comic that never even got a proper ending, and it still has fans arguing this hard... pretty impressive, honestly. Too bad I've never read it myself. I better stay out of this and get out of here.)
欸，这里是「迷局游戏Only展」，你怎么穿着《绒绒号》的Cos服就过来了…算了算了，咱们冷门作品爱好者还是要心胸宽广一些。
Hey, this is The Labyrinth Game OnlyCon, why'd you show up cosplaying The Fluffy... Ah well, we niche-fandom folks should be broad-minded anyway.
而且现在《迷局游戏》动画版正在热映，很快咱们也会变大热门的！
And with The Labyrinth Game animation blowing up right now, we'll become mainstream in no time!
当然有。虽然「椅子斯基」死前没能画完结局让人遗憾，但这也给我们留下了无尽的二次创作空间呐！
Of course! While it's a shame that Chairsky passed away before finishing the ending, but it left us with infinite possibilities for fan creations!
你在我这里能看到的，都是封神级别的同人志，请放心试阅！
Everything you see here is god-tier, feel free to check them out!
My Sworn Enemy Picked Out My Prison Uniform for Me After My Arrest
「追缉薇克丝的第五年，麦卡托将她缉拿归案了。没有争吵，没有歇斯底里，薇克丝接受了自己的命运。」
"In the fifth year of hunting down Vexis, Mercator finally brought her in. No shouting, no struggle, Vexis simply accepted her fate."
「但麦卡托终其一生也不敢停下追查罪恶的脚步。或许是因为，她始终忘不了薇克丝入狱前从她手中接过『M』码囚服时，那双忧郁的眼睛……」

"But for the rest of her life, Mercator never dared to stop chasing down evil. Perhaps because she could never forget those melancholy eyes Vexis had when she took the 'M' sized prison uniform from Mercator's hands... just before she was locked away..."
Great taste! Thanks for your business!
「最终的对峙就在这样一个肃杀的秋夜结束了。『你是我最好的搭档，』薇克丝躺倒在地，悲伤地说：『也是我将死之时，唯一想要呼唤名字的人。』」

"Their final confrontation came to an end on a bleak autumn night. 'You were my best partner,' Vexis said as she collapsed to the ground, sorrow in her voice. 'And the only one whose name I wanted to call in my final moments.'"
「『是的，但是你少装了， 』麦卡托说，『现在被{RUBY_B#咒杀}呼唤{RUBY_E#}到要死的人是我。』」
"'Yeah, but drop the act,' Mercator said. 'Right now, the one who's being {RUBY_B#cursed}called upon{RUBY_E#} to death is me.'"
Great taste! Thanks for your business!
「多年以后，面对空白的结局，所有《迷局游戏》粉将会回想起椅子斯基绘下薇克丝第一根发丝的那个遥远的下午。可故事不能就此结束——」

"Many years later, staring at the unfinished ending, all fans of The Labyrinth Game would remember that distant afternoon when Chairsky sketched Vexis's very first strand of hair. But the story cannot end here..."
「复活吧，椅子斯基！给我画完结局！」
"Rise again, Chairsky! Finish the ending for us!"
Great taste! Thanks for your business!
你难以取舍，最终决定统统拿下。
Unable to choose, you decide to take them all.
By The Laughter above! Thanks for your business!
这里的同人志我全都要了。
I'll take all the fan comics here.
你难以取舍，最终决定统统拿下。
Unable to choose, you decide to take them all.
真是闪电般的购物，多谢惠顾！
Very decisive! Thanks for your business!
虽然你穿着别家Cos服来「迷局游戏Only展」的行为不值得鼓励…但不得不说，你Cos的「球棒浣熊」还真挺还原的，简直和本尊一模一样。
While I can't exactly encourage you wearing cosplay from other franchises to The Labyrinth Game OnlyCon... I gotta admit, your Baseball Raccoon cosplay is spot-on. You look just like the real thing.
说起来，今天展会上也来了个神还原「麦卡托」Coser，大家都在合影呐！我打算等会儿也过去看看。
Speaking of which, there's an insanely accurate Mercator cosplayer here today. Everyone's been lining up to take pictures. I'm planning to head over and check it out later.
你Cos得那么好，也该多学学人家，去自己该去的漫展！下次不许了啊！
Your cosplay is so good, you should learn from others and go to the conventions you're actually supposed to attend! Don't do this again next time!
（真是懒得跟这家伙解释…话说雪衣应该会对「神还原的Coser」感兴趣吧？临走前去替她拍个照好了。）
(Can't be bothered explaining to this guy... Speaking of which, Xueyi would probably be interested in this so-called spot-on cosplayer, right? I should take some photos for her before I head out.)
（感觉这里的同人志似乎都还挺有趣的，不妨再到处逛逛吧。）
(The fan comics here all seem pretty interesting. Maybe I should take another look around.)
这是一本「平行世界」设定的同人志。封面上的麦卡托和薇克丝都穿着仙舟风格的服装。
This is a fan comic set in a "parallel universe." On the cover, both Mercator and Vexis are wearing Xianzhou-style outfits.
何也？汝何不杀我？岂以赦我一命，示汝之宽？
Wherefore? Why dost thou not smite me? Dost thou spare my life merely to vaunt thy mercy?
如汝此等凶徒，本当斩决，不宜贷命。然若我手加于汝，吾与汝之恶，又有何异？
Thy sort doth merit but the steel, and not forgiveness. Yet should I slay thee with this very hand, wherein shall I be different from thy malice?
你实在看不懂这两个古风小生在说些什么…但雪衣说话好像也是这个味儿？她说不定会喜欢？
You honestly have no idea what these two classical-styled characters are saying... but isn't this kind of how Xueyi talks too? She might actually like this?
…还是算了吧，二相乐园的作者们所理解「仙舟风格」总是有哪里怪怪的。
...Never mind. The authors' interpretation of "Xianzhou style" in Planarcadia always feels a bit off.
这是一本印刷精美，画风精良的同人志。封面上的麦卡托和薇克丝都被画得特别可爱。
This is a beautifully printed fan comic with excellent artwork. On the cover, both Mercator and Vexis are drawn extra adorably.
薇克丝小姐，我可以捏捏你肉嘟嘟的小脸蛋吗？
Miss Vexis, may I pinch your chubby little cheeks?
不可以，麦卡托小姐。你是名侦探，而我是杀人鬼。我们这样的人，是不可以…啊！你不要突然捏我肉嘟嘟的小脸蛋呀！
You may not, Miss Mercator. You are a detective, and I'm a murderer. People like us shouldn't... Ah! Don't suddenly pinch my chubby little cheeks like that!
对不起，我实在是忍不住…你那肉嘟嘟的小脸蛋，实在是太可爱了！
Sorry, I just can't help myself... your chubby little cheeks are just too adorable!
虽然你没看过《迷局游戏》，但你十分确信这本同人志的作者也没有看过原作。
Even though you never read The Labyrinth Game, you are absolutely certain that whoever made this fan comic hasn't either.
看来每个同人圈都会被这种没看过原作的诡异二创侵蚀…如果这本同人志还卖得很好，那就更糟糕了。
Looks like every fandom gets plagued by these weird fan works from people who never touched the source material... And it'd be even worse if this fan comic sells well.
这是一本…呃，应该是同人志的东西。封面上写着《薇克丝与现代伦理学的超克》几个大字，全书约七百页，没有任何插图。
This is a... uh, seems to be some kind of fan comic. The cover reads Transcending Modern Ethics with Vexis. It is about seven hundred pages, without a single illustration.
「薇克丝之行为，可谓对现代伦理学语境中『他者』之彻底否定与再召唤。其以主权性之咒文介入实存秩序，乃试图在法之空场上重塑规范之超越性结构。」

"Vexis's actions represent a complete negation and re-evocation of 'the Other' in the context of modern ethics. Through sovereign charmwork interfering with the existential order, she attempts to reforge the transcendental structure of norms upon the void of the law."
「换言之，薇克丝并非单纯之杀人者，而是以暴力之形式对『合法性自身』发出质询。此一行动，恰是对义务论的戏仿性摧毁与价值重估的拟态性演绎。」

"In other words, Vexis is not merely a murderer, but rather one who questions 'legitimacy itself' through the form of violence. This action is precisely a parodic destruction of deontology and a mimetic interpretation of value re-evaluation."
「其自以为在致力于『实现正义』，实则坠入了『能指的能指』之无限递归，遂使『正义』沦为自我指涉的镜像游戏。」

"She believes she's striving for 'justice,' yet in truth she has fallen into an 'infinite recursion' of signifiers pointing to signifiers, reducing 'justice' to a mere self-referential game of mirrors."
你完全不知道这本同人志在写什么东西，只知道不管故事中的薇克丝杀了多少人，她都显然遗漏了一个。
You have no idea what this fan comic is about, but you do know that no matter how many people Vexis killed in the story, she very clearly missed one.
天哪，好可爱的小学生侦探，简直就是麦卡托本人！
Oh my gosh, what an adorable little grade school detective. It is like seeing Mercator in the flesh.
这真是角色扮演吗？怎么感觉连容貌都和麦卡托一模一样？
Is this really cosplay? How does she even look exactly like Mercator?
可你看她旁边那把长眼睛的椅子——
But look at that chair with eyes next to her...
兴奋的粉丝&笃定的粉丝
也和椅子斯基本人的漫画形象一模一样！
It looks exactly like Chairsky's comic self-portrait!
拜托了，请不要再围着我们……
Hi there, look at the camera.
「球棒浣熊」？喂！你是「球棒浣熊」吧！
Baseball Raccoon? Hey! You're Baseball Raccoon, aren't you?
既然你也是漫画角色，应该明白我的处境，请帮我离开这里吧！
Since you're also a comic character, you should understand my situation. Please help me get out of here!
I'm just here to take pictures.
都可以都可以，总之先想办法让我离开！
Whatever, whatever, just find a way to get me out of here first!
纠正，是漫画取材自我的生活。
Correction, the comic is based on my life.
漫画也好，真人也好，总之拜托先想办法让我离开！
Comic, real person, whatever it is, please just find a way to get me out of here first!
小小人群而已，只要转移她们的注意力就能跑，你决定——
It's just a small crowd, if you can distract them, you can make a run for it. You decide to...
Take out the bat and threaten with violence.
这…这是《绒绒号》的Coser？别动手，我让开我让开！
W—Wait... is that a cosplayer from The Fluffy? Don't hit me, I'm leaving, I'm leaving!
不好啦！《苍天航路绒绒号》的粉丝来砸场子啦！
Oh no! The fans of Fluffy Across the Blue are here to crash our party!
你从零钱包里掏出了一把各个世界的一般等价物，撒向人群。都是些散碎零钱，但效果如你预料。人们一拥而上，哄抢了起来。

You pull a handful of common currencies from different worlds out of your coin purse and scatter them into the crowd. It's just loose change, but the effect is exactly as you expected. People rush forward in a frenzy, scrambling to grab the money.
毕竟，天上掉的馅饼就算只值一毛，也没人能忍住不摧眉折腰。哎，热爱，面对现实总是一败涂地！
After all, even if the pie that falls from the sky is only worth a single penny, no one can resist bending down to grab it. Ah, passion always gets its butt kicked by reality!
干得漂亮，椅子小姐，趁现在——快跑！
Nice work, Miss Chair, now's our chance! Leg it!
人群一哄而散，你得以带着两位奇怪的新朋友逃离现场。
The crowd scatters instantly, giving you the chance to escape the scene with your two strange new friends.
到这里应该就算是躲开了…谢谢你。
We should be safe here now... Thank you.
I mean, getting swarmed while cosplaying is pretty normal...
唉哟，你不会真不明白吧？我不是Coser啊！就像你不是在Cosplay「球棒浣熊」那样！
Oh come on, you really don't get it? I'm not a cosplayer! Just like you're not cosplaying Baseball Raccoon!
Actually, Baseball Raccoon is cosplaying me.
…我大概明白了，「球棒浣熊」是以你为原型的角色。唉，看来咱们的情况完全不同。
...I think I get it now, Baseball Raccoon is a character based on you. *sigh* Looks like our situations are completely different.
但事到如今，我也实在有些走投无路…就和你实话实说吧。
But at this point, I'm really at my wit's end... so I might as well be straight with you.
我并不是在扮演「麦卡托」。我就是《迷局游戏》里的「麦卡托」本人。
I'm not pretending to be Mercator. I am THE Mercator from The Labyrinth Game.
至于我，则来自《迷局游戏》每卷单行本衬里上的「作者寄语」。椅子斯基老师为自己绘制的「自画像」，就是我「椅子小姐」啦！
As for me, I come from the "Notes From the Author" on the inside cover of each volume of The Labyrinth Game. The little "self-portrait" that Chairsky drew of herself is me, Miss Chair.
用更冰冷的话来讲——我们是未经异常防御部批准，擅自化为幻造种的「灾异」。
To put it more bluntly, we are aberrations, unauthorized imagenae who transformed without the Department of Aberration Defense's approval.
但这可不是我们主动做的哦！《迷局游戏》都断更十多年了！
But hey, this wasn't our doing! The Labyrinth Game hasn't been updated for over a decade!
我猜想，是因为「幻月游戏」期间，愿力充盈世间，才导致了我们未曾料想的诞生吧…另外也是因为《迷局游戏》最近动画化了，让这部作品再次成为了读者关注的焦点。

I suppose it's because during the Phantasmoon Games, when Wishpower fills the world, that led to our unexpected creation... Plus, The Labyrinth Game recently got an animation adaptation, which brought this work back into the spotlight among readers.
老作品翻红，我和椅子小姐却跟着成了异常防御部喊打喊抓的「灾异」，真令人恼火。
Our old work's gone viral, but now Miss Chair and I have become aberrations hunted down by the Department of Aberration Defense. What a pain in the neck.
别那么沮丧，瞧瞧，椅子斯基当年给我们画得有眼睛有腿儿的，多厉害啊。
Don't be so down! Look, Chairsky drew us with eyes and legs back then, how awesome is that?
如果她没死，这个故事一定会有完美的结局。粉丝们也是这样想着让我们诞生的吧。
If she hadn't died, this story would've had a perfect ending. That's probably what the fans were thinking when they created us, too.
可惜了，我这四条都是腿，没有手来学画画！
What a shame, all four of my limbs are legs, so I got no hands to learn how to draw!
但你跑得快啊！异常防御部追过来的时候，你扛起我就能跑。
But you can run so fast! When the Department of Aberration Defense was chasing us, you just scooped me up and ran!
I'll give that chair a try when I get the chance.
那我希望你是为了追凶，而不是跟我一样逃跑。
I hope you are here to hunt down the bad guys, not running away like me.
其实我也想过自首，毕竟我的人生准则就是「绝不破坏法律」…但是现在我还不能这样做，至于理由…我想你已经猜到了。没错，就像我和椅子小姐那样——

I did consider turning myself in, since my life principle has always been "never break the law"... but I can't do that right now, and as for the reason... I think you've already guessed it. That's right, just like with Miss Chair...
杀人不眨眼的私刑制裁者薇克丝，也来到了这个世界。
Vexis, the ruthless vigilante who kills without batting an eye, has also arrived in this world.
薇克丝，一个治安官世家出生的孩子，曾是我最好的搭档…却踏上了修罗之路。
Vexis, a child born into a family of security officers, was once my best partner... until she walked down the path of carnage.
只要见过容貌、念出姓名，对方就会如她预设的那样死亡。她依靠着这项超能力，从罪犯杀到同事，从罪大恶极的人杀到拦路的一切，最终…甚至将屠刀对准了无辜者……

Once she sees someone's face and speaks their name, they die exactly as she predestined. With this supernatural power, she killed her way from criminals to colleagues, from the heinously evil to anyone who stood in her path, until finally... she turned her blade on the innocent...
为了阻止她，在漫画的结局前夕，我以身入局，设下了一个陷阱：只要她试图咒杀我，就会立刻被捕，可惜…结局永远停在了那里，而犯罪者却逃来了此处。

To stop her, I stepped onto the board right before the comic's ending and set a trap. If she tried to curse me to death, she'd be caught immediately. But alas... the story froze at that moment, and the criminal escaped to this place.
作为最了解她的侦探「M」，我必须先阻止她继续犯下罪行，再去自首。
As Detective "M" who knows her best, I must first stop her from committing more crimes, then turn myself in.
你怎么证明她也在这里？
How can you prove she's here too?
因为我诞生了。正义从不独立存在，侦探只会为消灭罪恶诞生。
Because I was born. Justice never exists independently. Detectives are born only to eliminate evil.
那些杀人预告函也根本不是漫展物料，在其他地方，它们正被四处张贴。
Those murder calling cards aren't just convention merch. They're being posted everywhere else, too.
所以，听着，这不是危言耸听：薇克丝已经来到现实世界了，她将以那染血的唇和手，为这座欢愉的城市，带来暴烈而彻底的死亡。
So listen up, and I'm not being dramatic here: Vexis has entered reality, and with her blood-stained lips and hands, she will bring violent and absolute death to this city of Elation.
Why don't we report this to security officer?
小孩子做这些也太危险了！
It's way too dangerous for kids to do this!
我才不是小孩子，你这个失礼的浣熊！
I'm not a kid, you rude raccoon!
如果现在报案，因为缺乏证据，我一定会因为身份问题直接遭到拘捕，所以最好的方法，还是得先找到薇克丝本人。
If I report this now, I'll get arrested over my identity due to lack of evidence. The best course of action is to find Vexis first.
你有没有可靠的二相乐园侦探人脉？
Do you have any reliable detective contacts in Planarcadia?
有，那可太有了，还是我们的老朋友——「不死神探」。你满意地点点头，就找这位麦卡托粉丝团团长吧，他一定非常乐意效劳。
Oh yes, absolutely. And it is our old friend, the Ashen Detective. You nod with satisfaction. This head of the Mercator fan club will definitely be happy to help.
线人是侦探的命脉。你可以去一旁联系他，我不会探听过多。
Informants are the lifeblood of a detective. You can contact him over there, and I won't pry.
但愿你找来的帮手能提供些有用的线索。
Let's hope the help you find can provide some useful leads.
别紧张，正义侦探麦卡托的烟斗里，装不下失败。
Don't worry, failure has no place in Justice Detective Mercator's pipe.
抱歉，如果当初能给出一个结局……
Sorry, if only I could have given you an ending...
算了，椅子斯基已经做得很棒了。
Forget it. Chairsky already did a great job.
就在这里给不死途打个电话吧。
Let's give Ashveil a call right here.
别看动画了，有委托人打电话找你。
Stop watching that animation, you've got a client calling.
您好，这里是「不死神探事务所」，我现在很忙，非常不高兴为您服务。
Hello, this is the Ashen Detective Agency. I'm busy right now and very unhappy to be of service.
「不要质疑我的答案…这些东西都在我的脑子里，快上！追寻犯罪的快感真让人血脉偾张！」……
"Don't question my answers... It's all in my head, come on! The thrill of chasing crime gets my blood pumping!"...
为麦卡托服务也不高兴吗？
我管你麦…为麦卡托？咳咳，你也看《迷局游戏》？
I don't care about Mer... Mercator? *cough* You watch The Labyrinth Game too?
为你服务…行吧，自从认识你，我就成了整个二相乐园最勤劳的侦探。
At your service... Well, ever since I met you, I've become the hardest-working detective in all of Planarcadia.
Alright, what kind of trouble did you get into this time?
你向不死途讲述了刚刚发生的事情……
You told Ashveil about what just happened...
乐子神在上，「麦卡托」作为灾异出现在了二相乐园？她还说薇克丝也一起出现了？如果是别人跟我说这些，我肯定觉得对方在拿我寻开心…但既然是你说的……

By The Laughter, Mercator appeared as an aberration in Planarcadia? And she said Vexis was there too? If anyone else told me this, I'd think they were messing with me... but since it's coming from you...
{F#她}{M#他}也不是什么正经人，很可能也在拿你寻开心。
{F#She}{M#He} isn't exactly a saint either, probably just messing with you as well.
不，{F#她}{M#他}不一样。我愿意相信{F#她}{M#他}。
薇克丝出现在世间…听起来很严重，但别担心，如果是M本人的话，她一定会获得胜利，就像她的口头禅那样——「你可以咒杀一切，但永远无法咒杀『正义』」！

Vexis has appeared in this world... It sounds serious, but don't worry. If it's M herself, she'll definitely prevail, just like her catchphrase says, "You can curse everything, but you can never curse justice"!
可惜了，我不能亲自赶过来，但我会给你引荐我手下最好的线人。
Too bad I can't make it in person, but I'll introduce you to my best informant.
Don't you want to meet your idol?
你别忙着看动画了！快来！
Stop watching that animation and get over here!
我不是不想来，而是不能来啊！麦卡托是我最喜欢的侦探！刑事侦查最忌讳感情用事，所以要规避这种过于密切的私人关系。

It's not that I don't want to go, I just can't! Mercator is my favorite detective. In criminal investigation, you must avoid letting emotions cloud your judgment, so I need to avoid getting too close on a personal level.
怠惰的侦探如此狡辩道。
The lazy detective retorted with such an excuse.
况且，人们不是都这么说嘛——「要和自己的偶像保持距离，否则一定会遭遇幻灭。」
Besides, isn't that what everyone says? "Don't touch your idols: a little gold always rubs off."
怠惰的侦探妄图用名言警句蒙混过关。
The lazy detective tries to get away with it by spouting wise quotes.
「旁白」，帮我把线人的定位发到{NICKNAME}的手机上。
Narrator, send the informant's location to {NICKNAME}'s phone.
记住，接头的暗号是：<color=#dbc291ff>「今天会下雨」</color>。
Remember, the passphrase is: <color=#dbc291ff>"It's going to rain today."</color>
挂断电话前，侦探深邃的目光投向窗外，那里，风雨欲来。
Before hanging up the phone, the detective cast a profound gaze out the window, where a storm was brewing.
看来你已经得到线索了，那么，出发吧。
Looks like you've got the lead. Well then, let's get moving.
街头，巷口，墙角…一瞬间，你脑海里涌现出无数谍战电影暗流涌动的画面，而现在，你也将成为他们中的一员。
Streets, alleyways, shadowed corners... In an instant, your mind floods with scenes from spy thrillers, all hidden currents and covert tension. And now, you are about to become one of them.
Let's find a way to meet the informant first.
（刚才不死途说的「接头暗号」是什么来着？）
轻点轻点，这座楼可是《迷局游戏》的取景处！漫画第三十二话最后一格，德米特里被薇克丝咒杀后就是从这个天台坠落的！被你敲坏了怎么办？

Easy, easy. This building is the actual filming location for The Labyrinth Game! In Chapter 32 of the comic, the last panel shows Demetri falling from this very rooftop after Vexis cursed him to death! What will we do if you damage it?
嗞█▄嗞…喉咙有痰▀▄▄老不好，多█▄半是肺热，噗噜█▄大夫，满愿电视台▀▄指定医疗▀▄嗞…嗞…
*bzzt*█▄*cough*...A throaty cough▀▄▄that's chronic, probably█▄heaty lungs, doctor█▄ploo, Fulwish TV's▀▄designated medical▀▄*bzzt*...*bzzt*...
广告结▀▄▄欢迎回来█▄现在▀▄播放《迷局游戏》动画版第四十七集……
Ad ▀▄▄Welcome back█▄Now▀▄playing The Labyrinth Game Animated Series Episode 47...
需要法律这张大伞的保护吗？我是「必胜律师」暗布雷拉。相信不死途已经向你展示过，我「必胜律师」的实力。
Need the protection of the law's umbrella? I am "Rainmaker" Umbralle. I'm sure Ashveil has already shown you my strength.
W—Wow... what a handsome umbrella-head gentleman!
How did you end up becoming an informant!?
哎呀，小声一点，人总要赚点外快的嘛！
Shh, keep it down! Everyone needs a little side hustle, you know!
怎么看起来是个危险人物？
Why does he look like trouble?
别这么说嘛，我好歹也算个体面的律师。
Hey now, I'm still a respectable attorney, you know.
我不需要保护，我需要线索。
I don't need protection, I need clues.
没问题，我不仅是必胜律师，还是必胜线人！
No problem, I'm not just an unbeatable attorney, but also an unbeatable informant!
那么，这位想来就是不死途提到的那位麦卡托小姐了。
So, you must be Miss Mercator that Ashveil mentioned.
身为灾异，应该有许多不便，难道是希望我帮您和「异常防御部」打「幻造种身份登记」的官司？
Being an aberration must come with many inconveniences. Perhaps you'd like me to help you file a lawsuit against the Department of Aberration Defense for "imagenae identity registration"?
不必。我自知是不被这世界欢迎的存在，不会在此世多做纠缠。但在离开之前，我还有需要解决的问题。
No need. I know I'm not welcome in this world, and I won't stay here for too long. But before I leave, there are matters I need to resolve.
她叫薇克丝，和我一样，也是漫画中诞生的「灾异」。此人嗜杀成性，非常危险，我们希望找到她。
Her name is Vexis, and just like me, she's an aberration born from a comic. She's a bloodthirsty killer, extremely dangerous, and we need to find her.
嗯？你不是消遣我吧，这明明就是通讯运营商「乐园电信」的二维市总负责人——「月梨」呀！
Huh? You're not messing with me, are you? This is clearly Pearuna, the head of the Duomension City branch of the telecom carrier Arcadia Telecom.
漫画角色？我不看漫画的，也可能是搞错了…但这个画像就是和月梨一模一样。
A comic character? I don't read comics, so I might be wrong... but this picture looks exactly like Pearuna.
…嗯，确实可能是搞错了。月梨是个相当好的领导，她的下属都赞不绝口。而且她目前婚姻美满，还领养了个孩子，事业和家庭都顺风顺水，怎么也不像个「嗜杀成性」的人。

...Hmm, I might be wrong about this. Pearuna is quite a good leader, and her subordinates can't stop praising her. Plus, she's happily married, has adopted a child, and both her career and family life are smooth sailing. She really doesn't seem like someone who would be a serial killer.
况且，她当上「乐园电信」的二维市总负责人都有好几年了，怎么也不可能是和麦卡托小姐一同现世的灾异。
Besides, she's been the head of Duomension City's Arcadia Telecom branch for several years now, there's no way she could be an aberration who manifested at the same time as Miss Mercator.
…我明白了。从理性上来说，这件事应该与月梨小姐无关。但我必须亲自去确认她的身份，因为「我名侦探的直觉」正在发出警报。
...I understand. Rationally speaking, Miss Pearuna shouldn't have anything to do with this. But I must verify her identity in person, because my detective's intuition is sounding the alarm.
如果她真是薇克丝，那么她现在几乎掌握了二维市所有人的身份信息，可以毫无阻碍地使用咒杀。也就是说，二相乐园…更危险了。

If she really is Vexis, then she now has access to almost everyone's personal information in Duomension City, and she can curse without any obstacles. In other words, Planarcadia... has become even more dangerous.
Do you have her contact info?
这是个人隐私信息，我实在没法提供。但我知道，她常去老饕小巷里面那个名叫「爆炒堂」的餐厅…一周能去个三四次。
That's private information, I really can't share that. But I do know she often visits this restaurant called "Wok 'n' Roll" in Yum Yum Alley... She goes there three or four times a week.
现在正是饭点，你们不妨去「爆炒堂」碰碰运气。说不定就能遇见她。
It's dinner time now, why don't you try your luck at the "Wok 'n' Roll"? You might just run into her there.
我，我记得那里！那是椅子生前最爱的餐厅，出道作《爆炒王》的构思地！
I—I remember that place! That was Chair's favorite restaurant when she was alive. That's where she came up with Wok Star, her debut work!
看起来，她也许并非与此事毫无关系…非常感谢您，暗布雷拉先生，我们这就去「爆炒堂」，希望能在那里遇到月梨小姐。
Looks like she might not be completely uninvolved in this... Thank you very much, Mr. Umbralle. We'll head to "Wok 'n' Roll" right away. Hopefully we can find Miss Pearuna there.
呃，容我提醒一句…法律讲求无罪推定，要小心被「解决案件」的欲望支配，越过不该越过的边界呀。
Uh, let me remind you... The law rests on the presumption of innocence. Be careful not to let your desire to solve cases take over and push you across boundaries that shouldn't be crossed.
暗布雷拉先生，侦探M只会被正义驱策。
Mr. Umbralle, Detective M is driven by justice alone.
本月客诉超四十八起，乐子神在上，我们一个月都接不上五十单。
Over forty-eight complaints this month, by The Laughter, we can't even get fifty orders in a month.
可是，厨师长，明明还有天天来吃饭的……
But, Chef, we still have regulars coming in every day...
月梨小姐是我的老朋友，就不算进去了…你们还是要多反省自己的问题！
Miss Pearuna is my old friend. I won't count this against her... You should reflect on your own issues!
可是作为厨师长，你也应该反省吧？你在这家店倒闭之前把它买了下来，难道是为了再让它倒闭一次吗？
But as the head chef, shouldn't you be doing some self-reflection too? You bought this place before it closed down. Don't tell me you're planning to run it into the ground again?
这可是《爆炒王》诞生的地方！我当然不忍心让它倒闭了！
This is where Wok Star was born! Of course I can't bear to see it go under!
可现在都是新时代了，谁还要吃我们这样味道、装饰、氛围都普普通通的家常菜？现在正值幻月游戏，我们明明可以蹭蹭热度嘛！出点什么「限定料理」不好吗？

But this is a new era now. Who still wants plain home cooking with ordinary taste, ordinary decor, and ordinary atmosphere? The Phantasmoon Games is in full swing. We could be riding the wave. Would it really hurt to release some "special dishes"?
别胡闹了，好好想清楚自己工作的目的吧。你希望客人来到我们店，是为了品味你的厨艺，还是追寻一些转瞬即逝的社会热点？

Stop fooling around and think carefully about the purpose of your work. Do you want customers to come to our restaurant to savor your culinary skills, or just to chase after some fleeting social trends?
料理的力量在于情感，在于生活，我们就是要用最朴素的食物，安慰那些忙碌于生活的普通食客们啊！这些你们都忘了吗？
The power of cooking lies in emotions, in life itself. We are here to comfort ordinary diners who are busy just getting through their days, using the simplest of dishes. Have you forgotten that?
唉…厨师长，就算你说得再感人，也没办法改变生意不好的现状啊……
*sigh*...Head Chef, no matter how moving your words are, it won't change the fact that business is terrible...
好了好了，你们下去备菜吧。
Alright alright, you guys go prep the ingredients.
怪不得椅子斯基会画出《爆炒王》。这位厨师长可真像她笔下的主角。
No wonder Chairsky created Wok Star. This head chef is just like the protagonist from her comic.
We're here to see Miss Pearuna.
月梨？哦哦哦，稍等…稍等一下。
Pearuna? Oh, oh, oh, wait... just a second.
月梨小姐现在就在这里吗？太好了，我们想找她了解一点情况。
Is Miss Pearuna here right now? Perfect, we'd like to ask her a few questions.
嗯嗯，你别急，你别急…我帮你叫一下。
Yeah yeah, don't worry, don't worry... I'll call her for you.
一个人影从窗内翻出，跌跌撞撞地跑了。
A figure climbed out of the window and stumbled off.
她跑了！麦卡托，这家伙大概真的就是薇克丝！
She ran away! Mercator, she must really be Vexis!
想追上她，先…先让我的刀同意，呜呜……
If you wanna catch up to her, you'll have to first... get past my blade... *sob*
这个厨子交给我，你们快去追薇克丝！
Leave the cook to me, hurry and go after Vexis!
想追上她，先…先让我的刀同意，呜呜……
If you wanna catch up to her, you'll have to first... get past my blade... *sob*
这个厨子交给我，你们快去追薇克丝！
Leave the cook to me, hurry and go after Vexis!
Forget it, just get on me, quickly.
Do you have a vehicle registration?
I haven't gotten my driver's license yet.
你试探着坐上了椅子小姐，如登临王座。
You gingerly sit down on Miss Chair, as if ascending a royal throne.
Relax, sit tight and hold on...
你动力源到底是什么啊啊啊啊啊——
What the heck is your power sourceaaaaaah—
安全带又在哪啊啊啊啊啊啊——
糟糕，前面人太多我飞不过去。
Blast, there's too many people ahead. I can't fly through.
I'll take a detour around, you go ahead.
为避免骚乱，你们将「月梨」带去了人少的路旁……
To avoid causing a commotion, you lead Pearuna to a quieter roadside...
见到我们就跑，你果然就是薇克丝吧？
Running away the moment you see us? You must be Vexis!
都十五年过去了…你们为什么还会出现…明明，我终于能过普通人的生活了。
It's been fifteen years... why are you showing up now... just when I finally managed to live like a normal person.
是啊，我早在十五年前就已经诞生了。
Yeah, I was born fifteen years ago.
难道我就不可以做一个普通人吗？
Can't I just be a normal person?
十五年前，上届幻月游戏，愿力满盈二相乐园。彼时恰逢《迷局游戏》即将完结，漫画的人气高挂榜一。我就是那时候作为「灾异」诞生的。

Fifteen years ago, during the previous Phantasmoon Games, Planarcadia was brimming with Wishpower. At that time, The Labyrinth Game was about to end, and the comic was dominating the popularity charts. That's when I was born as an aberration.
人们喜爱我杀尽世间不平事，但其实，我并非生性嗜血。如果可以，我早就想成为一个普通人……
People love me for cutting down the injustices in the world, but truth is, I'm not a bloodthirsty person by nature. If I could, I would have chosen to live like a normal person long ago...
因为真的…太累了。那个世界的罪孽厚得让人看不清任何希望，所以我真高兴来到这里，二相乐园没那么多罪恶，我也可以放心过普通人的生活。

Because I was just... so tired. The sins in that world were piled so high you couldn't see any hope through them. That's why I'm so glad I came here. Planarcadia doesn't have nearly as much evil, and I can finally live a normal life without worry.
但你手上血债还挺多的吧？
But you've got a lot of blood on your hands, don't you?
那不都是漫画里的剧情吗？
Isn't that just something from the comic?
你漫画里犯的罪要怎么算？
So how do we count the crimes you committed in the comic?
你会去逮捕推理剧中扮演凶手的演员吗？
Would you arrest an actor who plays a murderer in a detective show?
在现实世界，我从来没有伤害过任何人…我连一只尘灵都没伤害过。请相信我，我做过的那些「罪行」，归根结底只是虚构的故事罢了。
In the real world, I've never harmed anyone... I haven't even harmed a single wispae. Please believe me, all those "crimes" I committed were nothing but fictional stories.
杀人预告函又怎么解释？
And what about the murder calling cards?
乐子神在上！那只是为动画版预热的病毒式营销宣传罢了，不要当真啊。
By The Laughter! that's just viral marketing to hype up the animation adaptation, don't take it seriously.
我把话说到这个份上，你们总归能理解了吧？
I've laid it all out for you, so you should understand by now, right?
每一部分。我从诞生以后，就一直想方设法完成那部不再有机会被完成的漫画；麦卡托即便来到了陌生的地方，也依旧拼尽全力想抓住你。

Every single part. Since I was born, I've been trying every possible way to finish that comic that will never have a chance to be completed. Even in an unfamiliar place, Mercator still tries her hardest to catch you.
而有超能力的你居然说——你想放下，做个普通人？
And you, with your superpowers, are telling me that you want to give it all up and be a normal person?
超能力？琐碎的生活里，多得是费尽气力也得不到结果的烦恼。我的婚姻一潭死水，我领养的孩子也不争气，那我该怎么办？

Superpowers? In this mundane life, there are too many frustrations where you try your hardest but get nowhere. My marriage is dead in the water, my adopted kid's a disappointment, what am I supposed to do?
难道要把我次次考鸭蛋的儿子跟他没用的爸一块儿咒杀了吗？
Should I curse both my son who keeps failing his exams and his useless father to death?
在漫画中，我步步为营、机关算尽，却只觉得惶惶不可终日。而如今，我虽然要用尽全部的努力来完成最普通的现实生活，却感到踏实、感到宁静。

In the comic, I was always scheming and plotting my every move, yet I lived in constant fear. But now, even though I have to put in all my effort just to get through ordinary daily life, I feel steady and at peace.
追求平凡和追求超凡的人终究是无法相互理解的。
Those who seek the ordinary and those who seek the extraordinary will never truly understand each other.
你们可以继续追赶漫画中那刺激又英雄的命运，但薇克丝已经死了，请让她离开你们的心吧。
You can keep chasing after that thrilling, heroic destiny from the comic, but Vexis is dead. Please, let her go from your hearts.
想要平静的普通生活？可以。
Want a peaceful, normal life? Fine.
漫画里的犯罪不作数？理所当然。
Crimes in the comic don't count? Sure thing.
然而，你在现实世界中就真的那么清白无辜吗？你难道就从未按捺不住自己杀戮的欲望，犯下过罪行吗？
But are you really that pure and innocent in the real world? Have you never given in to your murderous desires and committed crimes?
那么，为什么漫画家椅子斯基「病逝」的时间，与你诞生的日期，完全一致？
Then why does the date of Chairsky's death perfectly match the day you came into existence?
Did she not die of an illness?
就是她，杀害了椅子斯基小姐！所谓的病逝，也不过就是被她咒杀后的结果。
It was her. She killed Miss Chairsky. The so-called "death by illness" was simply the result of her death curse.
作为灾异诞生后，你一定通过某种方法，发现椅子斯基准备创作出你被拘捕的失败结局，为了阻止她，你夺走了她的生命。
After becoming an aberration, you must have found out somehow that Chairsky intended to write an ending where you failed and were captured. To stop her, you took her life.
…连这些都发现了？你真是…你为什么这么执著，还是不愿意放过我！
...You even found out about all that? You really are... Why are you so obsessed, why won't you just let me go!
…都是因为没有结局…才让你有机会对创造出你的椅子斯基下手！椅子斯基那么热爱漫画，那么热爱你们…她又那么有天赋……
...It's all because there was no ending... that you got the chance to go after Chairsky who created you! She loved comics so much, cared about all of you so much... and she was so talented...
…抱歉。无论对我和她而言，那都是唯一的办法。
...Sorry. For both her and me, that was the only way.
我明白了，我明白了…为了弥补这个错误，我将*拼尽所有*，实现椅子斯基的遗愿。
I get it, I get it now... To make up for this mistake, I will give everything I have to fulfill Chairsky's final wish.
为这部未完成的漫画，绘下一个结局——
To draw an ending for this unfinished comic...
你感到一阵眩晕，视线清晰起来时，眼前只余一张不再能说话的普通椅子。
You feel a wave of dizziness. When your vision clears, all that remains is an ordinary chair that can no longer speak.
你看着椅子，椅子却不再能看着你，看来椅子小姐的确拼尽了所有。
You look at the chair, but the chair can no longer look back at you. It seems Miss Chair truly gave it her all.
There's nothing more we can do for now. Let's sit down.
一张不再能喷气奔跑的椅子，还略微有点硌屁股，无法给你带来泉涌的思路。
A chair that can no longer jet around, and one that is even a bit uncomfortable to sit on. This is definitely not going to spark any fountains of inspiration.
还有转机，椅子小姐等我！
There is still a chance. Wait for me, Miss Chair!
世上转机常有，而真能转成的人不常有。你还是先想想怎么找到她们吧。
Life is full of opportunities, but not everyone can seize them. You should focus on finding them first.
不死途？他怎么突然给我打电话？
Ashveil? Why's he calling me all of a sudden?
