怎么样？麦卡托的推理是不是非常精彩！
How about that? Wasn't Mercator's deduction absolutely brilliant!
你怎么知道发生了什么？
How do you know what happened?
你难道在偷偷跟踪我们？
跟踪？哈哈，可不要小看我「不死神探」的情报网啊！
Following you? Haha, don't underestimate the intelligence network of the "Ashen Detective"!
…话说回来，你知道吗？名侦探麦卡托最厉害的特技，就是将一切细节藏于脑内，并通过「思维回廊」进行分析。
...By the way, did you know? Detective Mercator's greatest ability is her ability to retain every single detail inside her head and analyze them inside her "Mind Gallery."
为了模仿她，我经过了刻苦的练习，终于学会了这一招。是不是很厉害？
I put myself through some intense training just to be like her, and I finally mastered this skill. Pretty impressive, right?
Hey, we have a rather urgent situation here...
不是聊漫画剧情的时候吧！
So this isn't really the time to discuss comic plots!
没错，名侦探麦卡托也总是能在最紧急的时刻，依靠这招「思维回廊」找出真相，解决谜题。
You're right. Detective Mercator always manages to solve the mystery and uncover the truth at the most critical moments using her signature Mind Gallery technique.
现在就让我来教教你吧！以后也一定能派上用场的。
Let me teach it to you right now! I'm sure it'll come in handy later.
唔，麦卡托在这种时候一般会怎么说来着…哦，我想起来了：
Hmm, what would Mercator say at a time like this...? Oh, I remember now:
咳咳…注意，接下来就是，推理时刻——
既然椅子小姐说要完成结局，那么她们去的地方大概率与作者椅子斯基本人有关。
Since Miss Chair says she wants to complete the ending, there's a high chance the place they're going to is related to the author Chairsky herself.
可是椅子斯基不是死了吗？
可作者不是被薇克丝杀了吗？
But wasn't the author killed by Vexis?
有趣的地方就在这里。按照麦卡托的推理，薇克丝面对要绘制出自己失败结局的造物主一定会非常仇恨，因此她有极其充分的杀人动机。

That's where things get real interesting. Based on Mercator's deductions, Vexis likely harbored intense hatred toward the creator who intended to give her a sad ending. This would establish a compelling motive for murder.
虽然很不愿意承认，但麦卡托在这里犯了一个致命的错误——她混淆了故事里的薇克丝和故事外的月梨。
As much as she won't admit it, Mercator made a grave error here. She conflated Vexis from the story with Pearuna from outside the story.
还记得你在「爆炒堂」听见的对话吗？
Remember that conversation you overheard at Wok 'n' Roll?
可是，厨师长，明明还有天天来吃饭的……
But, Chef, we still have regulars coming in every day...
薇克丝总是来这吃饭，并且看起来和店员关系不错。
Vexis is always here, and seems to be on good terms with the staff too.
你在这家店倒闭之前把它买了下来，难道是为了再让它倒闭一次吗？
You bought this store before it closed down. Don't tell me you're planning to run it into the ground again?
这可是《爆炒王》诞生的地方！我当然不忍心让它倒闭了！
This is where Wok Star was born! Of course I can't bear to see it go under!
厨师长为了不让「爆炒堂」倒闭，买下了这家店。而原因似乎是因为，这家店是《爆炒王》诞生的地方。
The head chef bought Wok 'n' Roll to keep it from closing down, apparently because it was where Wok Star was born.
怪不得椅子斯基会画出《爆炒王》。这位厨师长可真像她笔下的主角。
No wonder Chairsky created Wok Star. This head chef is just like the protagonist from her comic.
想追上她，先…先让我的刀同意，呜呜……
If you wanna catch up to her, you'll have to first... get past my blade... *sob*
椅子小姐也说过，这位厨师长简直就像漫画里的原型，她与薇克丝的关系看起来也非常要好。
Miss Chair also mentioned that this head chef is just like a character straight out of the comic, and she seems to be close to Vexis too.
那么，一个显而易见的矛盾就出现了。
So this is where things obviously get contradictory.
在麦卡托的推理中，薇克丝与作者椅子斯基是不共戴天的死敌关系。
Based on Mercator's deductions, Vexis and the writer Chairsky were sworn enemies who could not coexist in the same world.
但在「爆炒堂」，这个与椅子斯基、尤其是与她的漫画息息相关的地方——
But at Wok 'n' Roll, a place that is deeply connected to Chairsky, and especially to her comic...
——更名月梨的薇克丝不仅常来吃饭，更是经营者所熟悉的朋友。
...not only is Vexis, who now goes by the name Pearuna, a frequent guest, she is also a good friend of the owner.
This doesn't look like what a killer would do.
This doesn't look like an antagonistic relationship between two enemies.
不愧是你！但事实胜于雄辩，侦探的烟斗只有添上烟丝才能冒出真相的火花。
Ha, impressive! But we need proof of the pudding here, and a detective's pipe needs tobacco to spark the flames of truth.
关于当年的真相，我想你需要更多的信息。
About what really happened back then, I think you still need more information.
椅子斯基生前创作的工作室，严格来说，是通过我的记忆和推理还原的版本。
This is Chairsky's studio from when she was alive. More strictly speaking, it's a recreation of her studio based on my memory and deduction.
在椅子斯基的姐姐公布她病逝的消息后，我曾做过一些调查，毕竟…她可是我最爱的漫画家之一啊。
After Miss Chairsky's sister announced the news of her passing, I did some research... after all, she was one of my favorite comic artists.
当年的漫画就停在这里。
The comic ended right there, back then.
被M步步紧逼的薇克丝发出了最后的杀人预告，宣布要杀害一个真正无辜的人。
With M closing in on her, Vexis issues her final murder notice, declaring that she will kill someone truly innocent.
麦卡托以M的名义与治安官们设下埋伏，一旦薇克丝对她发动咒杀，就会被逮捕。
Mercator and security officers stage an ambush in M's name, ready to arrest Vexis the moment she moves to cast a death curse on her.
而麦卡托之所以敢这样做，就是因为她自信从未在薇克丝面前暴露过自己的本名。
Mercator decided on this move because she was certain she had never revealed her real name to Vexis.
这也是为什么…她会这么相信自己必将获胜吧。
That must be why... she's so convinced she'll win.
你翻看这份手稿，在最后结局的纸页上，你看见了大量反复删改的痕迹。<s>「麦卡托：正义是不死的…你无法…」「薇克丝：到底什么才算是正义呢…」</s>

As you flip through the manuscript, you notice that the final pages are heavily marked with revisions and corrections. <s>"Mercator: Justice never dies... You shall never..." "Vexis: What even counts as justice..."</s>
Huh. Looks like she was nowhere near decided on that ending.
没错，现场遗留了大量的废稿，以及各种反复试探不同结局的批注。椅子斯基就是这样一位精雕细琢的漫画家，既有天分又愿意努力……

That's right. The scene was littered with discarded drafts and loads and loads of margin notes exploring various endings. That was exactly the kind of artist Chairsky was: talented, diligent, and meticulous down to the last hair...
天才诞生却只来得及为世人留下残存的遗作，这样一想，真让人不甘心啊。
To think that a genius like her was born only to leave behind fragments of her work... it's truly frustrating.
这是一段新闻报道：「确认！天才漫画家『椅子斯基』离世！」
We now bring you this piece of news: "Confirmed: Prodigy Comic Artist Chairsky Passed Away!"
「…《迷局游戏》、《爆炒王》原作者，漫画家椅子斯基小姐，已确认于今晨因突发疾病抢救无效死亡。大量粉丝聚集街头，自发悼念椅子小姐……」

"Chairsky, creator of The Labyrinth Game and Wok Star, was confirmed dead this morning after emergency treatment for a sudden illness failed. A large crowd of fans has gathered on the streets, coming together to mourn Miss Chairsky..."
「…悼念现场却意外遭遇狂热粉丝寻衅滋事。据悉，双方争端的核心竟是为了《迷局游戏》的最终结局…姐姐称，此类向椅子斯基寄送威胁信件的疯狂行为曾多次发生……」

"At the memorial site, tensions flared when overzealous fans caused a disturbance. Reports indicate the dispute revolved, surprisingly, around the ending of The Labyrinth Game. Chairsky's older sister confirmed that the artist had repeatedly received threatening letters concerning this very issue..."
这类狂热粉丝的挑衅行为直到今天也没有停止。
Such disruptive behavior by extreme fans has continued unabated to this day.
你也参加过吧，粉丝团团长。
You were there too, weren't you, fan club president?
我…我那是对狂热粉丝实施正义的制裁！
I... I—I was just administering moral justice to those obsessive fans!
和狂热粉互殴，被猴子拦下…
Got into a fight with a crazy fan, but was stopped by a monkey...
这谁干的啊？你听错了吧，其实是老白为了根香蕉和人打架，被我给拦下来啦。
What are you talking about? You must've heard wrong. Mister N was actually about to get into a fight over a banana, but I stopped him.
狂热粉丝的行径人人得而抵制，椅子斯基说不准就是因为压力太大才迟迟画不出结局。
It's only right that we all stand against toxic fan behavior. Who knows, maybe Chairsky struggled to finish the ending because of all that pressure.
至于那位神秘的姐姐，之后再也没人能联系上她，而椅子斯基的相关信息也就此消失在了大众视野，连一场像样的葬礼也没有。
Despite repeated attempts, the mysterious sister was never heard from again. After that, Chairsky was gone from the public eye, and no proper funeral was ever held.
一个没有明显打斗痕迹的房间，散落着绘画用具和稿纸。
A room with no obvious signs of struggle, with art supplies and draft papers scattered everywhere.
椅子斯基就是在这样一个地方，创造出了至今仍被大家喜爱的《迷局游戏》。
It was in a space like this that Chairsky created The Labyrinth Game, a series still beloved by fans to this day.
总之，先整理一下目前的信息吧。
Anyway, let's go through what we know so far.
一个没有打斗痕迹的房间。
A room with no signs of struggle.
虽然基本可以排除他杀，但如果是病逝，屋里的痕迹又似乎太干净了一些。
While we can more or less rule out murder, if it was death by illness, there are some signs missing.
没有药物，没有体检报告……
I see no drugs, and there aren't any medical reports either...
也可能是她的姐姐曾经来打扫过吧。
Maybe her sister came by to clean up after.
The pressure of completing the ending.
就算是漫画天才，应对狂热的粉丝也够棘手。
Even a comic genius would have a hard time dealing with obsessive fans.
她又是个这么细致的绘画者，要为这部轰动一时的作品绘制完美的结局，承受的压力可想而知。
Given how meticulous she was, just imagine the kind of pressure she was under to deliver the perfect ending for this sensational hit.
我所有的线人都无法再联系上这位神秘的姐姐，不仅如此，椅子斯基的亲属一栏显示，她其实已经没有在世的家人了。
None of my sources can reach this mysterious sister anymore. What's more, according to Chairsky's family records, she has no living relatives left.
如果是这样的话，那作为「姐姐」出面宣布了椅子斯基的死讯，又迅速销声匿迹的人物，很有可能是——
If that's the case, then the "older sister" who announced Chairsky's death and then vanished so quickly can be...
当时恰巧诞生了的薇克丝。
Vexis, who was born at that time by chance.
所以…薇克丝可能伪装成了椅子斯基的姐姐，但是她为什么要这么做？
So... Vexis might have posed as Chairsky's sister. But why would she do something like that?
这也是本案最蹊跷的地方。
That's the most puzzling part of this case.
椅子斯基离世后，只由粉丝间自发举办了一场仓促的悼念仪式，至于椅子斯基的具体死因和葬礼的情况，后续没有任何媒体报道……
Following Chairsky's death, her fans hastily put together a memorial on their own. The exact cause of death and any funeral arrangements that were made were never reported in the media...
一位天才漫画家，顶着巨大的压力迟迟无法创作出结局却意外病逝，只由神秘的姐姐宣告死讯，自此就再也没有了消息……
A brilliant comic artist, struggling under immense pressure to complete the ending, suddenly passes away. Her mysterious sister announces the death, and nothing has been heard since...
而现在，薇克丝很可能就是那位神秘的姐姐。
And we now think Vexis might just be that mysterious "sister."
帮助无法画出结局的椅子假死。
She helped Chair, who was unable to come up with the ending, feign her death.
So, Chairsky isn't dead after all.
原来如此，椅子斯基根本就没有死…的确，这样很多事就说得通了。
I see. So Chairsky isn't actually dead... That would explain quite a few things.
那么，如果椅子斯基没有死，现在又身在何方呢？
If Chairsky isn't dead, where is she now?
漫画家与她笔下的反派，不是敌手，却胜似同谋。
The comic artist and her villainous creation weren't adversaries, they were accomplices.
我想，你已经有了一些猜测。
I take it you already have some ideas.
嗯…在整个事件当中，有一个人的行动非常古怪，就像…什么都知道。
Yes... through all of this, one person stands out for their truly strange behavior. It's like... they knew everything.
这种时候还装傻，得让你瞧瞧我「冷硬派侦探」的推理之拳了。
Still playing dumb at a time like this? Looks like it's time for the "hard-boiled detective's" Fist of Deduction to make an appearance.
求求了，你刚刚才「什么都知道」好吗！
Oh come on, you barely pieced everything together just a few moments ago!
月梨小姐是我的老朋友……
Miss Pearuna is an old friend of mine...
想追上她，先…先让我的刀同意，呜呜……
If you wanna catch up to her, you'll have to first... get past my blade... *sob*
我们起初以为厨师长是椅子斯基创作《爆炒王》的原型，但现在看来……
At first, we thought the Head Chef was the inspiration for Chairsky's Wok Star, but now it appears that...
她，可能就是假死的椅子斯基本人。
She might be Chairsky herself, who faked her death.
不，应该叫你：天才漫画家椅子斯基小姐……
No, I should call you: Miss Chairsky, the prodigy comic artist...
原来「厨师长」就是「椅子斯基」…真是个令人惊讶的真相。
So, the Head Chef is really Chairsky... What a revelation.
其实你早就知道真相了吧？你意识到麦卡托会沿着错误的推理一路狂飙，但身为粉丝，又实在不希望当面揭露她的错误，所以才拒绝直接来帮我们。没错吧？

You knew the truth all along, didn't you? You realized Mercator would go off on a wild goose chase with her deductions, but as her fan, you couldn't bring yourself to point out her mistakes. That's why you refused to help us directly. Am I right?
…好啦！推理时间已经结束了！接下来你该去现场和椅子斯基老师对峙了。不聊了，再见。
...Fine! Deduction Time is over! Now it's time for you to go confront Miss Chairsky herself. That's it. Goodbye.
那么…椅子斯基小姐，跟我聊聊吧。
So, let's have a chat... Miss Chairsky.
虽然早就想过会有这一天，但这一刻真正到来的时候，还是会有一种「啊，终于还是大结局了」的完结感。
I've long known this day would come, and yet now that it's here, I can't help but feel, "Ah... the grand finale has arrived."
我努力过，但抱歉，我没能做到让它有一个完美的结局。那位椅子小姐…是我的「自画像」吧？某种意义上说，也是我理想中的自己。也许让她来完结这个故事，也不错。

I did my best, but I'm afraid I couldn't give the story a perfect ending. That Miss Chair... she's my "self-portrait," isn't she? In a way, she's also an idealized version of myself. Maybe it's not such a bad thing to let her bring this story to a close.
椅子小姐正在帮你完结。
Miss Chair is helping you wrap things up.
她…她是我的「自画像」吧？某种意义上说，也是我理想中的自己。她大概比我更加纯粹，对于完结漫画有着更热切的渴望，可我已经不愿努力了。
She... she's my "self-portrait," isn't she? In some ways, she's an idealized version of me: purer, with a deeper and far stronger desire to complete the comic. But I've lost the will to continue.
画漫画曾经是我最美好的时光，我喜欢创造她们，为她们绘制人生。
Creating comics was the most beautiful time of my life. I loved giving life to my characters through my drawings.
但粉丝总有着各种各样的期待，角色也有着各种各样的命运，我不得不扛下所有压力去寻找一个完美的结局，可我…我只是一个爱画点破漫画的普通人啊！

But fans have all sorts of expectations, and characters have all sorts of destinies, too. I had to carry all that pressure to find the perfect ending, but I... I'm just an ordinary person who loves drawing silly little comics!
所有人都夸我是天才，只有薇克丝理解我。
Everyone calls me a genius, but Vexis is the only one who truly gets me.
她从书中诞生，告诉我觉得累就停下，「…不必在乎别人的期待，就让那些百万的读者等着好了，因为从今天开始，那个软弱的你就死掉了。」

She stepped out of the comic and told me to stop when I felt exhausted. "Forget about everyone else's expectations," she said, "those millions of readers can wait. From now on, that weak version of you is dead."
But it's been <unbreak>15</unbreak> years, and it's time to face reality.
为什么就非要去面对呢？
Although, why should I have to face it anyway?
You should stop running away from the truth.
Running away isn't exactly honorable, but it works!
带我们去找椅子小姐吧。
我知道你很急，但你先别急，我先给你炒俩菜？
I know you're in a hurry, but you can catch your breath here first. How about I make you something to eat?
就让我随心所欲地画点漫画做点饭，开开心心的不好吗？为什么非要让我再次去面对舆论，面对狂热的粉丝，面对结局的压力？
Why can't I simply draw comics and cook as I please? Why must I face public opinion, the obsessive fans, and the constant pressure to complete the ending?
求求你，我是个懦弱的人，真的不愿再去管这个让我痛苦的漫画了。
Please... I'm just a coward who can't face this comic that's causing me so much pain anymore.
But you're the one who created those characters...
创造了她们我就应该承受它带来的痛苦吗？
And therefore I must bear the pain that comes with creating them?
那就不管你的朋友月梨了吗？
Are you really going to do nothing about your friend Pearuna?
其实你根本舍不得抛弃她们。
Actually, you can't really bring yourself to abandon them.
你一眼就认出了椅子和麦卡托。
You actually recognized Chair and Mercator right away.
你一直保护着月梨的秘密。
You've been protecting Pearuna's secret all along.
我向月梨承诺过会让她拥有全新的生活，这可能是我唯一能为她守护的东西了。
I promised Pearuna I'd give her a brand-new life. This might be the only thing I can do for her now.
至于椅子和麦卡托…是我创造了她们，她们也曾是我最美好的印记，我确实从没有一天能真正放下。
As for Chair and Mercator... I created them, and they were once my most beautiful memories. It's true that I haven't been able to let go of them for even a single day.
…算了，都过了十五年安生日子了……
...Oh well. I've had <unbreak>15</unbreak> years of peace up till now after all...
跟我来吧，我想椅子会带她们去我曾经创作的地方，我可以带路。
Come with me. I think Chair will take them to where I used to draw. I can show you the way.
Just give me a little bit of time to get ready.
嗯，不必着急奔赴一场结局。
Well, there's no need to rush headlong into an ending.
哦，记得把这把椅子捎上。
Oh, don't forget to bring this chair along.
杀死那个背负期待的我后，我却感到了彻底的自由。
And after killing that version of myself, the self that was weighed down by so many expectations, I actually felt true freedom.
Just give me a little bit of time to get ready.
嗯，不必着急奔赴一场结局。
Well, there's no need to rush headlong into an ending.
哦，记得把这把椅子捎上。
Oh, don't forget to bring this chair along.
薇克丝，我最好的搭档，还记得我们是什么时候分道扬镳的吗？
Vexis, my best of partners, remember the time we parted ways?
你为什么不说话？好吧…我来替你回忆一下。
Why aren't you saying anything? Alright... let me refresh your memory.
「拉德克」，这个名字你可能已经不记得了，但他的罪行你或许还会有些印象——他绑架了仇人的女儿，并残忍杀害了她。
You may not remember the name Radek, but you likely remember his crimes. He kidnapped his rival's daughter and murdered her in cold blood.
我们携手追查了整整一年，但这个人却被层层保护，姑娘的死也被认定为意外。那时候你问我，正义到底是什么，我给不出答案……

We had been on the case an entire year, but he was protected at every turn, and the girl's death was eventually ruled an accident. Back then, you asked me what justice really meant, and I had no answer for you...
如果你的「正义」给不了以牙还牙、以眼还眼的惩戒，那么这个总是迟到和缺席的家伙，就不会是正确答案。
If your version of "justice" can't provide tit-for-tat punishment, then this so-called "justice" that's always delayed and doomed to be absent cannot be the right answer.
所以你的答案，就是打着正义的名号，实施残酷的杀戮？
So your answer is to commit brutal murders in the name of justice?
残酷吗？比起他的罪恶，私刑制裁者的咒杀还是太痛快了。
"Brutal"? Death by vigilante justice is still way too merciful compared to what he committed.
事到如今，你还不承认你就是私刑制裁者吗？
Even now, you still won't admit you're the vigilante?
够了，当初的结局就到这里。
Enough. That's where the original ending stops.
不够！薇克丝，就算这个人是罪有应得，那么你接下来咒杀的那些无辜的生命呢？
That's not enough! Vexis, even if this person did deserve what they got, what about all those innocent lives you took after that?
…算我求你了，你看看我吧，我才是无辜的那一个。
...Please, just look at me. I'm the innocent one.
我只想拥有普通的生活，请放过我吧，名侦探麦卡托！
I just want a normal life, Detective Mercator, so please just leave me alone!
你别这样，都不符合人设了！
Hey, come on! That's not how your character should act or speak!
咳咳，继续…无辜？那么椅子斯基的死算什么？薇克丝，接受正义的审判吧——
*Ahem* Moving on. "Innocent," you say? Then what about the deceased Chairsky? Vexis, it's time for you to face justice!
请等一等，薇克丝没有杀害椅子斯基。
Hold on a second. Vexis did not kill Chairsky.
因为我就是你们的创造者，漫画家椅子斯基。如你们所见，我还活着。
I say that because I am your creator, the comic artist Chairsky. As you can see, I'm still alive.
She feigned her death back then.
薇克丝确实没有杀过现实的人。
I can confirm that Vexis has never killed anyone in real life.
你看起来很虚弱，真抱歉，为了弥补我当年没画出的结局，你一定消耗了不少愿力。
You look really worn out... I'm sorry. You must have used up so much Wishpower trying to fill in that ending I never drew.
不用道歉，虽然不知道你为什么选择假死，但在我心里，你真的画得特别、特别棒！
You don't need to apologize! I don't know why you chose to fake your death, but from the bottom of my heart, your art is truly, truly amazing!
椅子斯基老师，对不起…我真的不希望再次把你卷进这本漫画的风波里来……
Miss Chairsky, I'm sorry... I never wanted to pull you back into more drama surrounding this comic.
不，这一切本就是因我而起。我才该道歉的，阿梨，我逃避太久了。
No, this all started because of me. I should be the one apologizing, Peary. I've been running from this for far too long.
或许，不必再追捕薇克丝了。
Maybe we don't need to go after Vexis anymore.
麦卡托，在现实世界，「薇克丝」从未犯下任何罪行，也不会犯下任何罪行。
Mercator, in the real world, Vexis has never committed any crimes, nor will she ever commit any.
你再也不必为了追寻她的踪迹而殚精竭虑…你自由了，可以拥抱一段全新的生活了，就像我们一样。
You no longer have to wear yourself out chasing her... You're free now, ready to embrace a brand-new life like we did.
新的生活…什么生活？跟她一样普通的人生吗？可是…可是我是侦探麦卡托啊！是永远向邪恶追索的名侦探啊……
A new life... what life is that? Am I supposed to live an ordinary life just like her? But... I'm Detective Mercator! The great detective who never stops hunting evil...!
哈，哈哈！所以，你们的意思是说，我一直以来的追索都没有意义是吗？
Hahaha! So what you're saying is, all the chasing I've been doing has been for absolutely nothing!?
…抱歉，我现在需要一个人静一静。
...Sorry, I need some time alone right now.
我理解她，就像我带着完成漫画的执念诞生一样，对麦卡托来说，抓住薇克丝就是她生命的全部。
I understand how she feels. It is just as how I was born with an obsession to finish the comic. For Mercator, hunting Vexis has been her whole life.
其实我原本也有些迷茫，但因为椅子斯基还活着，我好像可以找到新的期待了…可惜，麦卡托还没有。
I've been feeling a little lost myself, but now that I know Chairsky is still alive, it feels like I have something new to look forward to... Unfortunately, that isn't true for Mercator yet.
请替我去安慰安慰她吧，她只是…在得知一切后，有些不知所措……
Please, do me a favor and console her in my stead. She's just... a little overwhelmed after learning all these.
真的很抱歉，如果我当年能画出结局……
I'm really sorry. If only I was able to draw the ending back then...
But I was just so tired...
辛苦你查证当年的真相，我原本想一直瞒下去。
I know it couldn't have been easy for you, trying to get to the truth back then. I originally intended for it to stay buried forever.
麦卡托…哎，她为什么总是这么执着？
Mercator... *Sigh* Why does she always have to be so persistent?
就像我会愿意用尽全部愿力将你们带来这里一样……
Just as how I would willingly use up all my Wishpower to bring you here...
麦卡托应该也会希望，无论如何，至少能在最终的结局里奋力战斗一次吧。
Mercator probably wants to give it her all in one final, concluding battle, no matter the cost.
感谢你带来的真相。我穷尽一生追寻正义，却被一个非关正义的真相所击垮…你会觉得我很荒唐吗？
Thank you for bringing me the truth. I've spent my whole life pursuing justice, only to be crushed by a truth that's far from just... Don't you think I'm absurd?
生命的真相总是最沉重的。
Truths about life are always the hardest to bear.
是啊，也许反而是那些关乎正义的、非黑即白的真相，更容易令人接受一些。
Yeah. Those clear-cut, black-and-white truths about justice are probably easier for people to accept.
你不能试着接受普通的生活吗？
Can't you at least try to live a normal life?
可我所追求的曾经种种，就是我所热爱且愿意付出一切的啊！放弃，哪有那么简单？
But giving up isn't as easy as it sounds! Everything I've been pursuing is what I love, and what I'd give anything for!
从我在漫画里诞生的那个瞬间开始，我就一直在无尽地追缉凶犯，惩治罪恶，为世界带来正义的审判。
From the very moment I was born in the comic, I've been chasing criminals, punishing evil, and bringing justice to the world nonstop.
就像我所说的那样，我相信「你可以咒杀一切，但永远无法咒杀『正义』！」，我也相信「麦卡托的烟斗里，装不下失败。」
Like I said before, "you can curse everything, but you can never curse justice"! I also believe that "failure has no place in Detective Mercator's pipe."
我就是为了这些诞生的，我就是被这些话支撑到今天的，你明白当我意识到自己只是一个漫画角色的时候，我有多绝望吗？
This is what I was born for, and these are the words that have kept me going all this time. Do you know how much despair I felt when I realized I was nothing but a comic character?
但我坚强起来了。因为我以为，这个世界也需要我，需要我抓住薇克丝带来拯救。
But I still pulled myself together, because I believed that this world needed me, that it really needed me to save it by arresting Vexis.
可现在，一切又没有了…我的梦想，我的意义，我追求的正义…全都没有了。
But now, everything is gone... My dreams, my purpose, the justice I fought for... They're all gone.
Life never had a meaning on its own.
去追求新的意义与价值吧。
So go seek a new meaning and values.
这条无尽追求的路太痛苦了……
An endless pursuit like this is just too agonizing to bear...
谢谢你的安慰，现在我有点想明白了——
Thanks for talking to me. I'm starting to see things a little more clearly now...
我所求索的一切，都不过是个虚构的故事而已…可那又怎么样？我都已经拼尽全力到了此刻，那么就算只是个故事，我也要向命运讨要一个结局。
Everything I've been chasing... it's all just a made-up story. But so what? I've given it my all to get to this point, so even if it's just a story, I demand an ending from destiny.
椅子斯基老师，既然你还活着，就请画完最后的对决吧！唯有如此，我才能甘心重新启程。
Miss Chairsky, since you're still alive, please finish drawing our final showdown! I need this if I am to fully accept the new journey ahead of me.
你想让我画出结局？可是…都已经过了这么久……
You want me to draw the ending? But... it's been so long...
其实，这也是椅子我的心愿呀。
Actually, I would like that too.
我一直觉得椅子斯基特别厉害，作为她的自画像，我每天都把椅背挺得直直的，眼睛睁得大大的！只有这样才配得上天才漫画家嘛！

I've always thought Chairsky to be really amazing. And since I'm her self-portrait, I make sure to keep my back straight and my eyes wide open every day! It's the only way I can do our genius comic artist justice.
那时候我还没见过你，但你的笔触很温柔，很幸福，我能感觉到，我正在被你爱着。
Even though I hadn't met you yet back then, your writing was so gentle and full of happiness, I already could feel your love for me.
所以我不会逼迫你去画这个结局…因为那么爱漫画的你，一定有你的不得已。
So I won't force you to draw this ending... because someone who loves comics as much as you do must have their reasons for not doing so.
她承受了很多漫画之外的压力。
She was under a lot of pressure from the world outside of the comic.
这就是你们说的「辛苦的普通人的现实生活」吗？
So this is what you call the "harsh realities of the ordinary people," huh?
老实讲，这也不普通了。有空你来后厨颠个勺，尝尝柴米油盐酱醋茶吧。
To be honest, this is far from ordinary. When you have the time, come to the kitchen and try your hand at cooking! I assure you that you'll get a good taste of day-to-day living then!
她无法承受画出结局的压力。
She couldn't handle the pressure of drawing the ending.
不想分别吗？那就用一个故事的结束，开启新的故事怎么样？
Don't want to say goodbye? Then how about using the ending of one story to start a new one?
嘿嘿，不是催更催开坑的意思。
Hehe, I'm not trying to pressure you into starting or updating anything.
其实十五年前…我就已经想出一个结局了。
Actually... I already came up with an ending <unbreak>15</unbreak> years ago.
这是我在大纲中就设定好的结局，可是越往后画，我就越无法说服我自己：「这就是大家会喜欢的最好结局，这就是无数种可能性中最完美的结束。」
It was the ending I had in my outline. But as I drew, I couldn't convince myself that it was an ending everyone would love, and the perfect conclusion among countless possibilities.
不，只要是你，画下的就是最完美的！
Nah, anything you draw would be absolutely perfect!
别再这样吹捧我啦，椅子小姐。漫画家也是要吃饭的，我当然要考虑编辑的意见，考虑出版的看法，考虑读者的喜恶…可这样一考虑，完美就不存在了。

Don't put me on a pedestal like that, Miss Chair. Comic artists have to make a living too, you know. So of course, I had to take the editor's opinions, the publisher's views, and my readers' likes and dislikes into account... but once you start thinking about all that, perfection goes right out the window.
You don't have to worry about all that today.
Completion is more important than perfection.
叫了我十五年阿梨，就忘了我是薇克丝了吗？对罪恶赶尽杀绝的私刑制裁者，早就有接受审判的觉悟了。
Have you actually forgotten that I'm Vexis just because you've been calling me Peary for <unbreak>15</unbreak> years? As a vigilante who punishes evil, I've long been ready to face judgment.
虽然也很不甘心，但如果对麦卡托来说，将我绳之以法，就是她哪怕拼尽所有也仍然值得的生活，那么她的心情，与追求普通生活的我也没什么两样嘛。

This may be hard for me to accept, but if bringing me to justice is what Mercator considers a life she's willing to give everything up for, then we're not so different after all. Because I feel the same way about living an ordinary life.
别犹豫了，漫画家椅子斯基。
So don't hesitate any longer, artist Chairsky.
还记得你在「作者寄语」里面写过无数的漂亮话吗？你说：「留在脑中的一流，比不上落在纸上的三流。」
Remember what you wrote in your "Notes From the Author"? You said, "A first-rate idea in your head is worth less than a third-rate one on paper."
——难道你其实并不真正相信这些话吗？
Don't tell me you don't actually believe in any of that?
别总想着压力、责任、一个人扛下一切之类的东西了。为这出结局精彩对弈直到分出胜负的，其实是漫画里的我和薇克丝啊！

Stop worrying about the pressure and responsibility. Remember, you don't have to shoulder it all by yourself. After all, the ones who played this thrilling game to its spectacular finale were actually Vexis and I in the comic!
就让这一切画上句号吧，看看她会否像个英雄那样生，我又会否如罪魁那般死。
Let's put an end to all of this. We'll see if she lives like a hero, and if I die like a villain.
那时，麦卡托以M的名义寻求了治安局的合作，在她们最终对决的地方，设下了天罗地网。一旦薇克丝试图使用「麦卡托」的名字将她咒杀，就会立刻暴露，并遭到逮捕……

Back then, Mercator enlisted the Security Bureau's help in M's name, and set a trap at the site of their final confrontation. Had Vexis tried to use the name "Mercator" to kill her, she would have been immediately exposed and arrested.
自信从未使用过自己真名的麦卡托，抱着必胜的决心与曾经最好的搭档薇克丝相聚。
Mercator reunited with her former "best of partners," Vexis, determined to succeed and feeling extremely confident since she had never revealed her true name.
「米洛斯被杀案」中，遗落在现场的水笔是你惯用的品牌，他的心腹弗拉迪遭到咒杀后，我也在档案室监控里查到了酷似你的身影……

In the murder case of Milos, the pen left at the scene was your favorite brand, and after his confidant Frady was cursed to death, I also saw someone who looked remarkably like you in the archive room's surveillance footage.
而疑似犯罪高层的塔卡董事长，就死在你不得不将他无罪释放的第二天。
And Chairman Tacca, a suspected crime boss, died the very day after you were forced to release him without charges.
事到如今，你还不愿意承认你就是私刑制裁者吗？
Even now, you still won't admit you're the vigilante?
You've certainly done your homework, M.
你果然已经知道了我的身份。
So it's true. You already knew who I was.
我不仅知道你的身份，还知道一名高层刚刚被咒杀，现在所有埋伏着的治安官已经全都被调离去保护各位大人物了……

Not only do I know who you are, I also know that a high-ranking official has just been killed by a curse, and that all the security officers who were lying in wait have now been reassigned to VIP protection duty...
麦卡托，就像正义总被权力背叛一样，现在，你又一次被这个烂透的世界背叛了。
Mercator, just as justice is always betrayed by power, you have now, once again, been grossly let down by this world full of rot and filth.
麦卡托心如擂鼓，她明白自己已孤立无援，于是将手放入兜中，悄悄摁开了录音。
Mercator's heart was pounding like a drum. Realizing she was completely on her own now, she slipped her hand into her pocket and quietly pressed the Record button.
So... do you really have to kill someone?
既然世界有太多的腐朽，那么就用死亡剔骨剜肉…我们曾是最好的搭档，你一定能理解我，也愿意帮助我的，对吧？
Since there's so much rot and filth in this world, we should excise it all with death... We were once the best of partners. Surely you understand me, and you'll be willing to help me, right?
——继续做我的搭档，与我携手，去创造那个绝对正义的新世界吧！
So be my best partner again, and together, we will create a new world of absolute justice!
不，无论出于什么样的理由，建立在杀人之上的正义不可能是真正的正义！收手吧，薇克丝，就算今天只剩我一个人，我也要逮捕你。
No. Whatever the reason, justice built on murder can never be true justice. Give it up, Vexis. Even if I'm the only one left, I will arrest you no matter what.
那么，只能和你说再见了，「麦克唐娜」。
Well. I guess this means goodbye, then... McDonna.
知道「麦卡托」根本不是你的真名？因为我其实根本不想杀人啊！咒杀「拉德克」的那一天，我真的太害怕了，于是我对自己下咒…咒杀的内容是——
How did I know that "Mercator" isn't your true name, you ask? Because I never wanted to kill anyone! The day I cursed Radek to death, I was so terrified, I put a curse on myself...
「双手沾染鲜血的薇克丝，被正义的麦卡托杀死！」
"Vexis, whose hands were covered in blood, was slain by the righteous Mercator!"
我平静地等待死亡，然而，什么也没有发生。
Then, I just waited for death to take me, but nothing happened.
此时我终于理解了——我最好的搭档「麦卡托」从未对我袒露真名。
That's when it finally dawned on me: Mercator, my "best of partners," had never revealed her true name to me.
你看见我去档案室查监控的那一天，我不仅查到了「弗拉迪」的名字，也查到了你的名字，「麦克唐娜」。
The day you saw me checking the surveillance footage from the archive room, I uncovered the name "Frady" as well as yours, "McDonna."
可我从来…从来没有想过要咒杀你，因为我们曾经是最好的搭档，就连随身带录音笔的习惯，也是我教给你的。可惜了，也是因为这个习惯，今天我必须和你说再见了。

But I never... never wanted to curse you to death, because we used to be the best partners, and I was the one who taught you to always carry a voice recorder on you. And unfortunately, it's that very habit that forces me to bid you farewell today.
——如果我死了的话，这个世界将再次被腐朽的人充斥。所以安眠吧，麦克唐娜。
If I die, this world will once again be filled with people tainted by rot and filth. So rest in peace, McDonna.
也就是说，我在许多年前就输了吗？
Are you saying that I had already failed years ago?
不，你没有输，麦卡托，我不会让你输。
No, you haven't failed, Mercator. I would never let you fail.
我会带着你的愿望，去创造那个绝对正义的新世界。在那里，纯白的{RUBY_B#麦卡托}「正义」{RUBY_E#}必胜。
I will carry your wishes with me and build a new, absolutely just world. There, pure {RUBY_B#Mercator}"justice"{RUBY_E#} shall prevail.
这不是个很好的结局吗！怎么十五年前不画出来呢？
This is a pretty good ending! Why didn't you draw it <unbreak>15</unbreak> years ago?
麦卡托大笑着，消失在了你的眼前。
Mercator laughs and vanishes before your eyes.
原来…是一个这样的结局吗？
So... this is how it ends, huh?
十五年前的审美里，这种反英雄人物就很受欢迎嘛。那时候正懦弱又幼稚的我，就喜欢薇克丝这样杀伐果断的人。

<unbreak>15</unbreak> years ago, anti-hero characters like these were really popular. At the time, when I was still weak and immature, I found myself drawn to decisive and ruthless characters like Vexis.
It's just the obsession that's faded away, that's all.
真羡慕她啊，可以为了一件事彻底燃烧……
I really admire her, being able to burn with such complete passion for one purpose...
她也很羡慕你吧？羡慕你们真的可以放下宏大的执念，只活在当下，体认生活。
She must really admire you too, given how you're able to let go of those grandiose obsessions and simply live fully in the present.
别弄得像追悼会一样啊！
Stop making this sound like a memorial service!
啊抱歉抱歉，感觉气氛到了嘛。
Ah, my apologies! I just got caught up in the moment.
What do you admire her for?
羡慕她坦言要做一个英雄。
I admire how she openly states her desire to be a hero.
承认不被人理解的理想，确实很勇敢。
It takes real courage to stand by your dream when no one else understands it.
羡慕她像个英雄那样死去。
I admire how she died like a hero.
她如愿追求了她想要的超凡。
She pursued the extraordinary life, and got what she wanted.
羡慕她很快就领悟了「开拓」。
I admire how quickly she grasped the Trailblaze.
你看起来倒是很欣慰的样子。
I don't know what to say. I just know that I do admire her.
好了各位，我该回家给孩子辅导作业了。乐子神在上，希望我能保持好脸色。
Alright folks, I have to head home and help my kid with his homework. By The Laughter, I hope I can keep my cool.
至于麦卡托在漫画中的未来——
As for Mercator's fate in the comic...
It's all in your hands now.
Go live out your ordinary days!
也谢谢你的帮助，没有你，我可能到现在也依旧在逃避。
And thank you for your help. Without you, I might still be running away from everything.
Will you go back to drawing comic now?
你跟我走，漫画家总会需要一张跑很快的椅子。
Come with me. A comic artist always needs a chair that can zoom around fast.
啊？到底是什么使用场景啦！
Huh? What's with that weird scenario of being used?
说时迟那时快！椅子斯基面对二十多家媒体，十多家出版商的围追堵截，坐上一把会喷气的椅子撒腿就跑，除了一只狸猫，谁也没能追上她！

It all happened in a flash! Chairsky, cornered by over <unbreak>20</unbreak> media outlets and a dozen publishers, jumped onto her jet-powered chair and made a break for it! And nobody could catch up to her... except for one furbo!
于是那把椅子就替她接受了狸猫的独家专访！
And so, that very chair ended up taking her place for the furbo's exclusive interview!
What in the world is going on?
这是《复活吧！椅子斯基！》的续作，纪实类读本《还真*挺萌的*复活了！椅子斯基！》。
This is a documentary-style account titled D*mn, Chairsky Has Really Risen Again!, the sequel to Rise Again, Chairsky!.
对对对，详情请见狸狸通信！
That's right, that's right! Check out Furbobocom for all the details!
Take your advertising somewhere else, buddy! And don't let the door hit ya on the way out!
漫画家真的需要跑很快的椅子！
Comic artists do have a need fast-rolling chairs!
可不是吗？这使用场景谁想得到？
Right? Who would've predicted that it'll be used like that?
Since when did you become a storyteller?
想买点传奇复活作者椅子斯基的新作吗？《麦卡托事件簿》正在火热销售中！
Want to check out the new work by Chairsky, the artist who famously came back to life? The Mercator Files is now flying off the shelves at a store near you!
真没想到，椅子斯基老师最后还是回来画漫画了。更没想到，我还会以这样的方式和麦卡托重逢。
I never expected Miss Chairsky to go back to drawing comic again. And I definitely didn't expect her to reunite with Mercator in this way.
好久不见了，朋友。我已经成功在异常防御部拿到了合法身份，现在，你可以称呼我的本名——薇克丝了。
Long time no see, my friend. I've officially received legal recognition from the Department of Aberration Defense, so from now on, you can call me by my real name: Vexis.
事实证明，椅子斯基老师可能是个很好的厨师，但并不是个很好的老板。「爆炒堂」终于倒闭了，她也「不得不」重操旧业——依我看，这无非是她给自己找个台阶下罢了。

As it turns out, while Miss Chairsky might be a great cook, she isn't so great at running a business. Wok 'n' Roll eventually went under, and she "had to" return to her old profession. But if you ask me, she was simply looking for an excuse.
以前，椅子斯基老师因为无法承受「知名漫画家」所要承受的压力，选择了假死。而这一次，她终于不必独自承受那些压力了。

Back then, Miss Chairsky chose to feign her death because she couldn't handle the pressure that came with being a famous comic artist. But this time, she doesn't have to shoulder all that pressure by herself.
你看这本《麦卡托事件簿》的封面——「原作：椅子小姐；作画：椅子斯基」。
Look at the cover of The Mercator Files. It says "Story by Miss Chair, Art by Chairsky."
啧啧，把最吸引火力的身份交给椅子小姐，自己退居幕后，安心画画…真狡猾啊，椅子斯基老师。
Tsk, having Miss Chair take all the heat while you sit back and quietly draw behind the scenes... how sly of you, Miss Chairsky.
希望这次她不会逃跑了！
I hope she won't run away again this time!
不会的。那把椅子飞得那么快，她逃不脱的。
She won't. That chair zips around so quickly, there's no way she will be able to shake it off her tail, even if she tried.
椅子小姐不会承受不住压力吧？
Would Miss Chair be able to take the pressure though?
有可能…但她是一把椅子诶？「承受压力」不应该是她最擅长的事吗？
I'm not sure... but she's a chair, isn't she? Isn't "handling pressure" what she's designed to do?
但愿这一次，无论是追求超凡的人，还是追求平凡的人，都能得偿所愿。
Hopefully this time, whether they're chasing the extraordinary or embracing the ordinary, everyone gets what they wish for.
你继续逛吧，我该给我家那臭小子买补习册了。有缘再见。
Have fun hanging around here. I have to go buy some workbooks for my little rascal at home. See you around!
薇克丝小姐！没想到会在这里遇到你。方便的话…能不能给我签个名？
Miss Vexis! What a surprise to see you here. If it's not too much trouble... could I get your autograph?
当然可以。不过…我记得你不是麦卡托的过激粉丝吗？怎么来找我签名了？
Of course. But... I seem to recall that you were a hardcore Mercator fan? So why ask me for my autograph?
嗐…我一时半刻是见不到麦卡托了，这不就只好退而求其次……
*Sigh*... Since I won't be seeing Mercator anytime soon, I guess I'll just have to settle for second best...
You wanna get cursed to death right here and now?
不过，我刚刚倒是发现了一个有趣的东西，就当送给你这个麦卡托粉的见面礼吧。
But hey, I just found something interesting, so consider it a little meet-and-greet gift for a fellow Mercator fan.
不死途和你接过一本崭新的《麦卡托事件簿》第一册，在它的扉页上，不知是谁龙飞凤舞地写了一行字：
What Ashveil and you take is the first volume of The Mercator Files, and on the frontispiece, someone has left a line in bold, flowing writing:
「这是我最后的委托：看住她们两个，别再断更了。——麦卡托」
"This is my final assignment for you: Keep an eye on those two, and don't let them skip out on more updates. — Mercator"
（似乎有人在吵架？别打起来吧…要不去凑个热…拉个架！过去看看吧。）
(Sounds like someone's arguing? Hope it doesn't turn into a fight... Maybe I should go check it out— I mean break it up! Let's take a look.)
（要帮雪衣买些什么同人志呢？去旁边那个摊位上看看吧……）
(What kind of fan comic should I get for Xueyi today? Let's check out that booth over there...)
不愧是来自大热门漫画的「球棒浣熊」！
As expected of the "Baseball Raccoon" from that super popular comic!
Seriously, I'm not a comic character...
「爆炒堂」…就是这里了！门口似乎有位店员，去找她问问吧。
"Wok 'n' Roll"... This must be the place! Looks like there's a clerk at the door, let's go ask her.
Quick, I see Vexis right over there!
哦，瞧瞧，她一直跟在你们身后。
Oh, look who's been following you guys around.
试试这里的「二次元JUMP！」跃迁吧！
Try out the "Interplanar Jump!" warp here!
你成功追上椅子，拦住了「月梨」。
You successfully catch up to Chair and stop "Pearuna."
竟然还能这么走？你脑子真好使啊！
Wait, you can actually do that? You're a genius!
普通型号的机铠，在二维市的街道上随处可见…如果它没有被随意停放在路边的话。
Normal mechatrons are a common sight cruising the streets of Duomension City... if they aren't just randomly parked on the sidewalks.
或许是随身携带球棒的缘故，你忽地感觉手痒难耐、渴望破坏，而这台机铠…以它的结实程度，轻轻敲几下应该不成问题——
Maybe it's the bat you're carrying, but your fingers suddenly itch with the irresistible urge to break something. And this mechatron... it's sturdy enough that a few taps shouldn't hurt.
别、别敲了！震得我胸口疼，哎呦。
S—Stop banging! The vibrations are killing my chest, ow!
是啊。在这二相乐园，机铠多得就像是路边的尘灵，区区破铜烂铁，自然不会引起你的兴趣。正当你打算离开时——
Yeah. Here in Planarcadia, mechatrons are as common as wispae on the street. Such scrap metals aren't worth your attention, just as you're about to leave...
...Darn it. How dare you ignore me!
...Darn it. How dare you ignore me!
嘘。别东张西望，也别大声叫嚷，把我当成一台普通的机铠就好。不然会被她发现的。
Shh. Don't look around or make a fuss, just treat me like a normal mechatron. Otherwise, she'll notice.
Did you put on the wrong head?
哈？还不明白吗，我根本不是机铠。
Huh? Don't you get it yet? I'm not even a mechatron.
我叫修仁江，是异常防御部资源配置办公室的副组长。为了躲避她的追杀，我披上了这套机铠作伪装…却没想身躯太复杂，直接给我锁里面了。

I'm Sorren, Deputy Chief of the Resource Allocation Office at the Department of Aberration Defense. I put on this mechatron as a disguise to escape her pursuit... but I didn't expect it to be so complex that I got myself locked inside.
刚才一阵风吹掉了头盔，我又不能弯腰，捡不起来，现在纯纯成了个显眼包。
The wind just blew my helmet off, and I can't bend down to pick it up, so now I'm just a straight-up walking target.
你来得正好，快帮我把这玩意脱下来。等顺利回到异常防御部，必有重谢！
Perfect timing! Quick, help me get this thing off. Once we make it back to the Department of Aberration Defense, I'll make it worth your while!
Should I call the police for you?
啊？你说报警…不行不行，要是让治安局知道了，对我们的影响多不好。
Huh? Call the police...? Absolutely not. The last thing we need is the Security Bureau catching wind of this. It would be a disaster for us.
<color=#dbc291ff>她…是我的前女友</color>——没时间解释，你先把我放出来，求求了！
<color=#dbc291ff>She's... my ex-girlfriend</color>. No time to explain, just get me out of here, please! I'm begging you!
呵。为自己换上机铠的皮囊，是不打算做人了嘛？
Heh. Swapping your flesh for a mechatron shell? Guess you're done being human, huh?
亲爱的，没必要害怕呀。或许，我们可以从头开始，从我们初遇的时候开始……
Darling, there's no need to be afraid. Perhaps we can start over, from the moment we first met...
不知从何处传来的话语，低沉、喑哑而阴冷，像是故事中索命的诅咒，久久萦绕不散。
Low, hoarse, icy. The voice is nowhere and everywhere. Like a curse out of a ghost tale, clinging to the air long after it should've faded.
听、听听听见了吗！她要杀了我，要永远缠着我！快救我，这是见义勇为！
D—D—Did you hear that!? She's gonna kill me, she's gonna haunt me forever! Help me, quick! It's your civic duty!
Alright, it's no big deal anyway.
And if I don't wanna help?
我、我我我…我就只能死给你看了啊！我是个无能的职员，你也不想看一个无辜的路人惨死在面前吧？
W—Well... I—I'll just drop dead right here, then! See? I'm a hopeless, useless cog! And you don't want the guilt of some innocent bystander's death on your conscience, do you?
就当做件好事，为自己攒点功德。帮帮我，{F#姐}{M#哥}，好吗？
Come on, think of it as a good deed for your karma score. Do a guy a solid, {F#sis}{M#bro}, please?
既然都说到这个份上了…
Well, since you put it that way...
机甲被球棒攻击的声音（临时文本）
Sound of mech being hit by bat (temp text)
你做得好啊！现在，让我们跑起来吧，被她抓到就完蛋了。
Nice job! Now, let's make a run for it. If she catches us, it's over.
跑快些！她失去的只是愿力，而我赌上的可是这条命啊！
Faster! She'll only lose some Wishpower, but I'm betting my actual life here!
（愿力…莫非追杀他的人是幻造种么？）
(Wishpower... so the one chasing him is an imagenae?)
呼，呼…应该暂时甩掉她了。就在这休息会吧，我有点跑不动了。
Huff... Huff... looks like we lost her for now. Let's... catch our breath. I can barely run anymore.
对了，谢谢你啊。嗯，你做了件好事，该为自己感到骄傲！
Oh right, thanks! Really. You did a good thing. Feel free to be proud of yourself!
你还是先把事情说清楚吧。
Mind telling me what's actually going on?
如你所见，我正在被心爱的人追杀。最近，我的梦里出现的全都是她的面容。
As you can see, I'm being hunted down by the love of my life. Lately, her face is all I see in my dreams.
<color=#dbc291ff>她的名字叫「沙蒲」，是我的女朋友。我们已经认识快一个月了。</color>从没有谁能像她这样牵动我的心弦。
<color=#dbc291ff>Her name is Sapone, and she's my girlfriend. It's been almost a month since we met.</color> No one has ever stirred my soul quite this way before.
如果我是幻造种，她便是照亮{RUBY_B#二维市第一深情}我{RUBY_E#}的那轮幻月。她是光，是食粮是养分，是我的一切。
If I am an imagenae, then she is the Phantasmoon that illuminates {RUBY_B#Duomension City's No. 1 Romeo}me{RUBY_E#}. She is my light, my sustenance, my everything.
但几天前，她突然像换了个人似的，变得充满敌意。我原以为她只是心情不好，需要静静。直到今天清晨，我从梦中醒来，发现她拿着刀站在我床前……

But a few days ago, she suddenly changed into a completely different person, radiating pure hostility. I thought she was just in a bad mood and needed some space. Until this morning, when I woke up from my dream and found her standing by my bed with a knife...
她一定是被什么灾异给占据了，才会如此践踏我们的感情！
This isn't her! Some aberration must have possessed her, to make her desecrate what we had!
我先确认，她是幻造种么？
Let me get this straight. Is she an imagenae?
对…是个很漂亮的小姑娘。故事的开始总是某次不期而遇的邂逅，我一见钟情，而她没有拒绝。突如其来的爱情就这么顺理成章地发生了。

Yeah... a really pretty one, too. Every story begins with an unexpected encounter. I fell in love at first sight, and she didn't turn me away. Just like that, love blossomed naturally and unexpectedly.
然后是妙不可言的热恋，我彻底沦陷在她的温柔中——我们实在太过契合，至少她很契合我，每个点都完美切中我的喜好。
Then came the blissful honeymoon phase. I was completely lost in her tenderness. We are just so compatible, or at least she's compatible with me. Somehow, she just hits all my sweet spots perfectly.
人总是会反复爱上同一个人，哪怕千次、万次。这是让爱情永葆青春的奥秘。
The heart finds its way back to the same soul, a thousand times, ten thousand. That is the secret that keeps love forever young.
咳…扯远了。是的，她是个幻造种，但也是我最爱的人。
Ahem... I digress. It's true, she is an imagenae. But my heart is hers, and that is my truth.
有的，朋友，就我所知是有的。总有心术不正的人，肆意散播模因病毒，将人们心爱的幻造种弄得面目全非。
Yes, my friend, as far as I know, there are. People with twisted hearts sow memetic viruses so recklessly that they warp others' beloved imagenae into dreadful monsters.
你知道的，它们藉着愿力与强烈的情绪而生，因此，也只需稍加操控，便会变得极为可怕——我心爱的她，肯定也是被坏人利用了！
You know, they are born of Wishpower and raw emotions, so with just a little manipulation, they can become absolutely terrifying. My sweet Sapone must have been used by some bad people!
What do you want to do now?
我、我不知道。事已至此，我除了活命已经别无所求了。
I—I don't know. At this point, all I want is to stay alive.
沙蒲，我的沙蒲，你为什么会变成这样…在你心里，究竟把我们的爱情置于何处呢？
Sapone, my Sapone, why have you become like this... What did our love mean to you...?
顺着他惊恐的目光望去，嘈杂人群中，有个少女正冷眼看着这里。没有表情，没有言语。
Following his terrified gaze through the noisy crowd, there was a young girl staring coldly at this spot. No expression, no words.
即便是繁华的街头，那眼神中透出的恨意也依旧令人后背发凉。
Even on a bustling street, the hatred in that gaze still cut through the air, sending chills down your spine.
Is that the Sapone you were talking about?
是。或者说…曾经是沙蒲，但现在，她已经是只想行凶的灾异了。
Yes. Or rather... she was once Sapone, but now, she's nothing but an Abberation consumed by bloodlust.
别。你以为我没试过吗？！讲道理是行不通的，现在，她是只想行凶的灾异。
Don't. You think I haven't tried that!? Reasoning won't work. Now she's just an aberration out for blood.
为了我…还有你的安全着想，尽量躲远些吧。
For my sake, and for yours... I'm begging you, stay away.
你不要命了吗？！失控的幻造种很恐怖的，跟我往这边跑！
Are you out of your mind!? Those out-of-control imagenae are terrifying. Follow me this way!
…好像甩掉了。啧，真麻烦，就不能让我省点心吗！
...Looks like we lost her. Tch, what a pain. Just give me a break for once!
哎呀，修仁江，你来得正好！沙蒲才刚走呢，还说要是你来了，记得带句话。
Oh, perfect timing, Sorren! Sapone just left, and she asked me to pass on a message if you showed up.
噫！她、她她她…猜到了我要过来？
Eek! She... she she she... knew I'd come!?
说什么呢？你们不是常来这约会吗，莫非吵架了？算了，情侣的事，我也不多问。
Huh? Aren't you two always here on dates? What, you two had a falling out? Ah, never mind. I won't pry into your relationship drama.
沙蒲让我告诉你：「她们，会一直等你的。」
Sapone asked me to tell you: "They will always be waiting for you."
Looks like you've made quite a few mistakes there.
啊？等等，别看我，我可没有到处拈花惹草。我发誓，我也不知道这是什么意思啊！
Huh? Wait, don't look at me like that. I'm not some playboy flirting around. I swear, I'm just as clueless as you are!
我也不明白。不过，既然本人回来了，不如，就让她自己来解释吧。
I don't get it either. But since she's back now, why don't we let her explain it herself?
Wh—What did you say? She's... back?
是呀。我们…难道你都忘了吗？亲爱的，对我们来说，这可是*刻骨铭心*的回忆啊。
Yeah. We... have you forgotten? My love, for us, this is a memory "etched into our very souls."
猛烈的眩晕感向你袭来，仿佛被卷入了漩涡的最中心。
A violent wave of dizziness hits you, as if you've been sucked into the heart of a vortex.
据说，幻月满月期间，灾异的频率与凶险程度都会得到显著提升。而眼前的少女仍旧面无表情地望着远方，像是在凝视虚空，又像是静待着某处的猎物落网。

Legend has it that during the full Phantasmoon, aberrations not only multiply but grow far more dangerous. The girl, however, was perfectly blank-faced, her gaze fixed on the distance as if contemplating the void, or awaiting prey to fall into her trap.
而后，尖叫声撕裂了静寂——
Then, a scream tears through the silence...
沙蒲，沙蒲，还是沙蒲…无数的沙蒲映入眼帘，密密麻麻的沙蒲占据了整条街道。
Sapone, Sapone, and more Sapone... Countless Sapones fill your vision, swarms of Sapones crowding the entire street.
别…不要杀我。救命…求你了……
No... please don't kill me. Help... I beg you...
亲爱的，你是怎么了？为什么要逃呢，不是说好要和我过一辈子的吗？
Darling, what's wrong? Why are you running away? Didn't you promise we'd be together forever?
我、我是说过，可那不是现在的你啊！瞧瞧你自己吧，多吓人，要我怎么去爱你？！
I—I did! But that wasn't... this you! Just look at yourself! You're terrifying! How am I supposed to love you like this!?
并且我有什么错？！我不过是想要<color=#dbc291ff>最完美、永远不会结束的爱情</color>。我是真心爱你的！
And what did I do wrong!? All I ever wanted was <color=#dbc291ff>a perfect, eternal love</color>. My love for you was real!
难道不对吗？爱情不就是这样吗？新鲜、纯粹、令人着迷，反倒是你，要的太多了！
Am I wrong? Isn't that what love is all about? Fresh, pure, intoxicating. If anything, you're the one who's asking for too much!
<size=28>——你才是亵渎我们之间爱情的那个！！！</size>
我爱你…每个月都爱着你。
I love you... I love you every single month.
喂，我爱你呀，你听见了吗？
Hey, I love you. Are you listening?
别喊了…别缠着我了。求你了…好吗？
Stop yelling... Stop pestering me. Please... okay?
球棒浣熊，快！救救我！我创造的幻造种暴走了，变成了怪物，她想杀了我！
Baseball Raccoon, now! Do something! My imagenae creation has gone berserk and turned into a monster. She's trying to kill me!
但凡上点网的人，谁不知道你的名号！别管那么多了，她们人多势众，救我！
Anyone who's been on the internet knows who you are! Forget about all that. There's a horde of her! Help me!
你察觉到，名为「沙蒲」的少女们，在听到「球棒浣熊」这个称号时，眼神似乎朝你的方位动了动。
You notice that when the title "Baseball Raccoon" is mentioned, the girls named Sapone seem to shift their gaze slightly in your direction.
沙蒲…是你创造的幻造种？
Sapone... is the imagenae you created?
有问题吗？我创造了她，又爱上了她，反过来也行。《灵物保护法》早就承认，幻造种和人类之间可以有真爱。何况，我渴望的感情，只有她能给我。

Is there a problem? I created her and then fell in love with her, or the other way around. It doesn't matter. The Faekind Protection Act has long affirmed that true love is possible between humans and imagenae. Besides, she's the only one who can give me the affection I yearn for.
但无论如何，杀人是违法的！你必须帮我！
Anyway, murder is illegal! You have to help me!
我可以联系异常防御部来处理。
I can contact the Department of Aberration Defense to handle this.
啊？不行，那是我上班的地方，要是这件事被同事知道了，我还哪有颜面见人！
Huh? No way, that's where I work! If my colleagues find out about this, I won't be able to face them!
I need to figure out what's exactly going on.
啊？有什么不清楚的吗？幻造种成了灾异，公然在大街上行凶。这还不够？
Huh? Which part are you confused about? The imagenae turned into aberrations, wreaking havoc on the streets. Isn't that enough?
我说，你就不能用你那无敌的球棒想想办法吗？解决几个幻造种而已，「嘭」的一下——对你来说绝对不难吧？
Hey, can't you figure something out with that invincible bat of yours? Taking out a few imagenae should be a piece of cake. Just "wham!" And it's done, right?
还是说，球棒浣熊根本不想为遇到困难的人主持正义？！
Or is the Baseball Raccoon just not interested in serving justice for those in need!?
似乎被话语中的言辞刺激到了，霎时间，所有「沙蒲」都抬起了手。
Seemingly provoked by the words, all Sapones simultaneously raise their hands.
顺着沙蒲所指的方向望去，你见到了一块斑驳的画板，上面的画布若隐若现。
Following Sapone's finger, you spot a weathered drawing board with a faint, flickering canvas.
这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."
色彩繁杂的画布仿佛被人反复涂抹过，其上的内容早已模糊不清。但你依稀能辨认出人影的轮廓，以及写在画框边缘的那行小字。

The chaotic colors on the canvas have been layered over so many times that the subject is a total blur. Even so, you can just barely make out a silhouette and a tiny line of text on the edge of the frame.
「致沙蒲，我最爱的人。」后方，「修仁江」的签名赫然可见。
"To Sapone, the love of my life." At the bottom, the signature "Sorren" is clearly visible.
这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."
浓重色彩瞬间包裹了你的意识，随之而来的，除却油墨的刺鼻气味外，还有一丝……
Intense colors instantly envelop your consciousness, and along with it, besides the pungent smell of ink, there's also a hint of...
掺杂着银杏香气的苦涩。
...Bitterness intertwined with the scent of ginkgo leaves.
这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."
沙蒲并未对你的话语作出反应，或许，她的意识本就残缺不全，早已失去了与外界正常沟通的能力。看来你没法征询她的意见了。

Sapone shows no reaction to your words. Perhaps her consciousness is already fragmented and incomplete, and she has lost the ability to communicate with the outside world. It seems you won't be able to get her opinion on this.
这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."
沙蒲依旧重复着机械性的话语，但此刻的你并不想贸然深入事件的中心。
Sapone keeps repeating her mechanical words, but right now you don't want to rashly dive into the truth behind this incident.
修仁江的神色依旧呆滞，似乎还未从刚才的惊慌中缓过神来。
Sorren's expression remains blank, as if he still hasn't recovered from his earlier panic.
你的意识陡然返回现实，仿佛从深沉无光的溺水中醒来。
Your consciousness suddenly snaps back to reality, like waking up from drowning in a deep, lightless abyss.
沙蒲，沙蒲，还是沙蒲…无数的沙蒲映入眼帘，密密麻麻的沙蒲占据了整条街道。
Sapone, Sapone, and more Sapone... Countless Sapones fill your vision, swarms of Sapones crowding the entire street.
但你现在明白了，这并非无来由的灾异，而是一场漫长的、属于无声者的复仇。
But now you understand this isn't some random aberration, but a long-drawn revenge orchestrated by the voiceless.
所有「沙蒲」仍旧向虚空伸着手，而此刻的你决定——
All the Sapones are still reaching out into the void, and at this moment, you decide to...
（回应沙蒲的愿望，也就意味着对修仁江坐视不管。我做好准备了吗？）
(Granting Sapone's wish means turning a blind eye to Sorren. Am I ready for that?)
联系异常防御部的治安官。
Contact the Department of Aberration Defense security officer.
（交给官方处理，也就意味着要阻止沙蒲的行为。我做好准备了吗？）
(Leaving it to the authorities means stopping Sapone's actions. Am I ready for that?)
后面的事，就交给你了…沙蒲。
I'm leaving the rest to you... Sapone.
你似乎看见沙蒲向你轻轻点了点头，表示她听到了。当然，这也可能是你看错了。
You seem to see Sapone nodding gently at you, indicating she heard you. Though, you might have just imagined it.
哈。我听说过，爱情就像是橘子，即使内部早已腐烂，外表看上去还是爱情的形状。
Hah. I've heard that love is like a tangerine. Even when its inside has rotted, the outside still keeps the shape of happiness.
可我不愿意接受。大部分人的爱情早就死了，我不过是让它结束在最美的那刻，又让它从灰烬中重生。我要的是最纯粹、最完美的爱情。一如既往，从未改变。

But I disagree with that. Most people's love has long since died, yet I merely let it end at its most mesmerizing moment, and then let it rise from the ashes. What I seek is the purest, most perfect love. This has always been my approach, always.
<size=36>这就是我的人生答案，我的欢愉！</size>
<size=36>This is my life's answer, my Elation!</size>
意识到结局既定，面对曾经的爱人，修仁江发出了最后的呼号。
Realizing the inevitable end, Sorren lets out his final cry in front of his former lover.
无论如何，你还是选择转过身去，不再观看这出荒唐戏的后续发展。毕竟——
Either way, you choose to turn away, no longer interested in watching how this absurd show plays out. After all...
他，还有她们…都算是得偿所愿了吧。
He, and they... I guess they all got what they wanted.
听治安局的人说，最近发生了起规模浩大的灾异事件。有个叫「沙蒲」的幻造种，把自己变成了好多份，闹挺厉害的。
Word from the Security Bureau is that there's been a massive Aberration event lately. An imagenae called Sapone split herself into multiple copies and caused quite a ruckus.
灾异倒是很快平息了，没造成什么损害。但她引起了足够的关注。顺着线索查下去，那群人找到了罪证——塞满了信封的包裹，就放在事发现场。
The aberration subsided quickly, causing no real damage. But she had drawn enough attention. Following the leads, they found the evidence right at the scene: A package stuffed with envelopes.
那个画师主动投案了，估计她最开始就有这个打算。或许惹了什么人，打算避避吧。
That artist turned herself in. She probably planned this from the start. Maybe she got on someone's bad side and needed to lie low for a while.
私造幻造种的那个官员，修仁江，倒是从世界上消失了。是死是活，现在还没个说法。
That official who illegally created imagenae, Sorren, has vanished. Is he alive or dead? We don't have an answer right now.
关于这件事，你知道什么吗？
What do you know about this?
我猜，他肯定是个很坏的人。
I bet he's definitely a bad person.
如果有治安局的人来问，那天晚上你干了什么，你就说，在跟我一起吃拉面。
If anyone from the Security Bureau asks what you were doing that night, just tell them you were having hand-stretched noodles with me.
我知道你恨他，但私刑解决不了问题。把裁决交给法律，这才能称为公道。
I know you hate him, but vigilante justice won't solve anything. Let the law handle the punishment, which is what real justice looks like.
并且，将事件公之于众，也能避免像你这样的悲剧再度发生。
Besides, making this incident public will help prevent tragedies like yours from happening again.
我保证，他不会躲过应有的制裁。
I promise, he won't escape the punishment he deserves.
你似乎看见沙蒲向你轻轻点了点头，表示她许可了。当然，这也可能是你看错了。
You seem to see Sapone nodding gently at you, indicating her approval. Though, you might have just imagined it.
哈。我听说过，爱情就像是橘子，即使内部早已腐烂，外表看上去还是爱情的形状。
Hah. I've heard that love is like a tangerine. Even when its inside has rotted, the outside still keeps the shape of happiness.
可我不愿意接受。大部分人的爱情早就死了，我不过是让它结束在最美的那刻，又让它从灰烬中重生。我要的是最纯粹、最完美的爱情。一如既往，从未改变。

But I disagree with that. Most people's love has long since died, yet I merely let it end at its most mesmerizing moment, and then let it rise from the ashes. What I seek is the purest, most perfect love. This has always been my approach, always.
这就是我的人生答案，我的欢愉。我不会后悔。
This is my life's answer, my Elation. I have no regrets.
这些话，还是留到审判席上去讲吧。这里没有人在乎你的想法。
Save those words for the tribunal. No one here cares what you think.
无论如何，你选择掏出手机，将事情的来龙去脉讲述给了对面的治安官——某个为私欲而践踏人性的官员，还有某个遭到残忍对待的幻造种。

Regardless, you choose to take out your phone and tell the officer everything that happened, about an official who trampled on humanity for his own selfish desires, and about an imagenae who underwent cruel abuse.
过程中，沙蒲只是静静地看着，直到你挂上电话，直到异常防御部的警车呼啸而到。
Sapone just stares at you in silence until you hang up the phone, and until the cars of the Department of Aberration Defense come wailing in.
然后，在你没注意到的时候，静静地化作了满地的尘灵。
Then, before you can notice it, she quietly dissolves into wispae, scattering across the ground.
原本放着画板的地方，不知何时多出了一个装满信封的包裹。你知道，那些都是罪证。
Where the easel once stood, there is now a package full of envelopes. You know those are all evidence of the crime.
谢谢你，沙蒲。最后还是选择了信任我。
Thank you, Sapone. In the end, you chose to trust me.
哎，网友们总是不肯放过哪怕再小的瓜。不过没办法，这就是二相乐园。
*sigh* Netizens never let even the tiniest bit of gossip slip by. But what can you do? That's just how things are in Planarcadia.
说回你报的案子吧。修仁江算是我的熟人，在办公室打过招呼的那种，这事刚爆出来的时候，整座楼都沸腾了。而我呢，也总算过了把抓同事的瘾。

Back to the case you reported. Sorren was sort of an acquaintance of mine. You know, the kind you exchange greetings with at the office. When this whole thing blew up, the entire building was in an uproar. And me? Well, I finally got to scratch that itch of arresting a colleague.
虽然判决书还没下，不出意外的话，他的后半辈子只能在监狱里度过了。
Although the verdict hasn't been handed down yet, barring any surprises, he'll be spending the rest of his life behind bars.
别担心，大家都是这么觉得的。私自创造幻造种的案子层出不穷，而在其中，修仁江犯的事也算是性质头等恶劣的。
Don't worry, everyone feels the same way. Cases of unauthorized imagenesis keep popping up, and among them, Sorren's case is considered one of the most heinous.
再加上，那个画师主动投案自首了，所以公众情绪都集中在了他身上。就算放他出去，怕是也会被那些自诩公义的人追讨。
Plus, since that artist turned herself in voluntarily, all the public outrage is focused on him. Even if he's released, those self-proclaimed justice warriors would probably go after him.
唉，也好，这就是狂热寻求欢愉的下场吧。
*sigh* Well, I guess that's what happens when you're obsessed with Elation.
听治安局的人说，最近发生了起规模浩大的灾异事件。有个叫「沙蒲」的幻造种，把自己变成了好多份，闹挺厉害的。
Word from the Security Bureau is that there's been a massive Aberration event lately. An imagenae called Sapone split herself into multiple copies and caused quite a ruckus.
灾异倒是很快平息了，没造成什么损害。但她引起了足够的关注。顺着线索查下去，那群人找到了罪证——塞满了信封的包裹，就放在事发现场。
The aberration subsided quickly, causing no real damage. But she had drawn enough attention. Following the leads, they found the evidence right at the scene: A package stuffed with envelopes.
那个画师主动投案了，估计她最开始就有这个打算。或许惹了什么人，打算避避吧。
That artist turned herself in. She probably planned this from the start. Maybe she got on someone's bad side and needed to lie low for a while.
私造幻造种的那个官员，修仁江，倒是从世界上消失了。是死是活，现在还没个说法。
That official who illegally created imagenae, Sorren, has vanished. Is he alive or dead? We don't have an answer right now.
关于这件事，你知道什么吗？
What do you know about this?
我猜，他肯定是个很坏的人。
I bet he's definitely a bad person.
如果有治安局的人来问，那天晚上你干了什么，你就说，在跟我一起吃拉面。
If anyone from the Security Bureau asks what you were doing that night, just tell them you were having hand-stretched noodles with me.

天哪！她就是我的梦中情人！毫不夸张地说，她满足了我对爱情的一切幻想。
Oh my! She's literally the girl of my dreams! No exaggeration, she checks every single box on my romance wishlist.
如绘画般精致的面容，孩童般纯真的意念，还有那最重要的…一颗绝对爱我的心。
A face as delicate as a painting, genuine and endearing, and most importantly... a heart that loves me absolutely.
啊，爱情总是突如其来，我没想到会在此处和它撞个满怀！你太厉害了，真的！
Ah, love always strikes when you least expect it, and here I am, running right into it! You're amazing, seriously!
哈哈哈，我的原则向来很简单——满足顾客的需求，想要什么样，我都能给你画出来。
Hahaha, my principle has always been simple: to satisfy the customers' needs. Whatever you want, I can draw it for you.
不过，你知道，私人创作是违法的。风险总是意味着代价。嗯？
But you know, private creation is illegal. Risks always come with a price. Huh?
明白。异常防御部的许可证，保证以假乱真，就跟你绘画的技法一样高超！她叫什么？
Got it. The Department of Aberration Defense license, guaranteed to be as convincing as your illustration skills! What's her name?
名字是最初的牵绊。命名这种特权，当然要交由顾客决定。
Names are the first connection. The privilege of naming, of course, should be left to the customer.
嗯。让我想想…想想…你喜欢什么？
Hmm. Let me think... think... what do you like?
直接的告白，令我的心脏砰砰直跳！啊，少女的情话总是如此美妙，怎么都听不腻！
Such a direct confession makes my heart race! Ah, a young girl's sweet whispers are always so wonderful, I could listen to them forever!
那么，下个问题，你想得到什么？
So, next question, what do you want?
我…想得到…修…仁江的喜欢。
I... want... Sor... ren... to like me.
可以。若是你能永远保持我爱的模样，我也会毫无保留地向你献出我全部的爱。
Alright. If you can forever remain the way I love you, I'll give you all my love without holding anything back.
继续吧。下个问题，你想成为什么样的人？
Let's continue. Next question, what kind of person do you want to become?
呵。莫非你还要仔细验货？
Heh. What, you wanna inspect the goods thoroughly?

No, it's not about inspecting goods. It's precisely because she's not merchandise that we need to verify. People are always the hardest to see clearly, and the most fickle of all.
我…想成为…修…仁江…喜欢的人。
I... want to... become... someone... Sor... ren... likes.
不行。你不能成为我喜欢的人。

"Like" is such a fickle word. I want you to be my ideal lover who always thinks two steps ahead.
明白吗？我可以不懂我喜欢什么，但你必须要懂。当然，我会耐心教你的。
Got it? I might not know what I like, but you have to. Don't worry though, I'll teach you step by step.
哈哈哈。我接了那么多单，你是我见过的最奇怪的客户。看起来坏得很，却又无比纯情！
Hahaha! Out of all the clients I've had, you're definitely the weirdest one. You look like such a bad boy, but you're actually super innocent!
<color=#dbc291ff>我想要的，是最完美、永远不结束的爱情。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>What I want is the most perfect, everlasting love.</color>
「沙蒲」。就用这个我从故事里看来的名字称呼你吧。纯粹的，如白花般的少女。
Sapone. I'll call you by this name I found in a story. A pure maiden, like a white flower.
从现在起，你的名字就是「沙蒲」。
From now on, your name will be Sapone.
这就是「沙蒲」与修仁江的初遇。正如修仁江常说的那样——

"Every story begins with an unexpected encounter. I fell in love at first sight, and she didn't turn me away. Just like that, love blossomed naturally and unexpectedly."

为你准备的礼物，喜欢吗？

喜欢。尺寸合身，面料也很柔软，穿起来很舒服，款式…没见过。是最近的流行吗？

Not really. It's a school uniform that students wear to school. If anything, it's more like an outfit that shows your identity.
So... Sapone is heading to school then?
不需要。学校教的知识，我都会教你，甚至更多。更何况，在设定上你原本就很聪明。
That would be unnecessary. I'll teach you everything they teach at school, and even more. Besides, according to your character settings, you're already quite smart.
沙蒲…很聪明。但沙蒲始终想不明白，修仁江喜欢什么。
Sapone... is smart. But she still can't figure out what Sorren likes.
没人说得清自己究竟喜欢什么。「喜欢」，这个词实在太过虚无缥缈。
No one can truly explain what they like. "Like" is such an elusive and intangible word.

Every day, I'm a brand-new version of myself. I love everything with all my heart, but I can't stop myself from dying over and over again.
所以，用尽全力，去喜欢现在喜欢的东西就好，去记住它最绚烂的时候就好。

沙蒲…最漂亮的时候。是什么时候？

哈哈哈。那就是我们未来要共同做的事了，不断去探索，去创造，直到满足为止。

沙蒲…不明白。今天要穿这套衣服吗？

沙蒲…不明白。今天要穿这套衣服吗？

沙蒲…不明白。今天要穿这套衣服吗？

和背包的风格更搭，也适合现在的天气。嗯，我今天喜欢那套。

哟，修仁江，又和沙蒲出门逛街呢。今天想喝什么？

嗯？我记错了？印象里的沙蒲是个嗜甜如命的女孩子，还是你给她点的重糖。

别想那么多。在沙蒲看来，爱情是什么样的呢？

酸酸的，像是苦涩的柠茶。

无色无味的，像是纯净水。

没有自己的观点可不行，纯粹的人偶是不会讨人喜欢的。嗯，我不喜欢。

再给你一次机会，重新想想吧——

甜甜的，像是加糖的鲜奶。

酸酸的，像是苦涩的柠茶。

沙蒲？沙蒲？聊天时候发呆，不是礼貌的行为。我不喜欢。

有空再说。我还约了人打游戏。

没有。我找不出任何讨厌你的原因。正因如此，我才讨厌这样的爱情。
There isn't one. I can't think of a single thing. And that's exactly why I hate this relationship.
你太完美了，每个特点都是我喜欢的。穿衣服的风格，喜欢的饮品，常看的漫画，能笑出来的电视节目…都完全符合我的喜好。
You're too perfect. Everything about you is exactly what I like. Your style, your favorite drinks, the comics you read, the shows you laugh at... it all fits my tastes perfectly.
就像是在读一本翻阅过许多次的书，没有任何出乎意料的情节。我不喜欢。
It's like reading a book I've already finished a dozen times. There are no surprises. I hate it.
<color=#dbc291ff>我想要的，是最完美、永远不结束的爱情。</color>若是这段感情即将腐化变质，我宁愿它停在最美好的时候。
<color=#dbc291ff>What I want is a perfect love that lasts forever.</color> If a romance is about to turn sour, I'd rather end it when it's at its most beautiful.
爱情就是这样。当你心中觉得不再爱的时候，爱也就不存在了。怎么抓都抓不住。
That's just love. When you stop feeling it in your heart, it's already gone. You can't hold onto it, no matter what.
可是…我…我从没有过选择啊！
But... I... I never even had a choice!
我明白，我都知道。我教过你太多东西，却唯独忘了教会你一件事。
I know, I know. I taught you so much, but I forgot to teach you one last lesson.
那天的电视节目，我也听到了。鸟不该被关在笼子里，我最后要教给你的，就是——
I heard what they said on TV that day. A bird isn't meant to be kept in a cage. And the lesson I have for you...
现在，我给你自由。我们度过了幸福的一个月，如今，你要学着去自己生活。
And so, I'm setting you free. We had a wonderful month together. And now, you must learn to live for yourself.
去拥抱世界吧，去变得幸福吧，去享受只属于你的生命吧。
Go on, embrace the world. Find your own happiness. Enjoy the life that is yours alone.
我…我该怎么选择。我的幸福…究竟是什么？
What am I supposed to choose? My own happiness... What even is that?
不，你要走的路不在这里。回头吧，变得幸福吧。
No, this isn't the path for you. Turn back. Find your happiness.
去吧，我会为你，还有你的未来，献上最诚挚的祝福。
Go now. I'll be wishing the very best for you, and for the future that awaits you.
我…我获得了自由？离开他后，我该如何继续自己的生活？
I'm... I'm free? But now that I've left him... how do I even start to live my own life?
不知道。但记得绒绒号里有说过…「开拓，就是摈弃所有胆怯与茫然，开辟新的道路。」
I don't know. But I remember what they said on The Fluffy... "To Trailblaze is to cast aside all fear and uncertainty, and forge a new path."
Perhaps... I can do that, too.
我可以在饮品店打工来维持生计，店主肯定不会拒绝的。
I can get a job at the drink shop to get by. I'm sure the owner wouldn't turn me down.
我有好多衣服，卖掉能换不少钱。我还学过沏茶，学过插花和烹饪，肯定也能派上用场。
I've got tons of clothes I can sell for some cash. And I know how to make tea, arrange flowers, and cook... all of that must be useful for something.
我还想去上学，想参加社团活动，想交新的朋友，想和大家聊最流行的电视剧和漫画。
I want to go to school, too. And join clubs, and make new friends... I want to chat with everyone about all the popular shows and comic.
风卷起漫天落叶，彻底掩盖了少女的身影，还有那数不清的、对未来的憧憬。
The wind whips the leaves into a frenzy, swallowing the girl's figure from sight, and with it, all her boundless hopes for the future.
叶片散去时，道路尽头只剩满地的尘灵。
As the leaves drift away, nothing is left at the end of the road but the wispae scattered across the ground.
名为「沙蒲」的少女，还有她尚未说出口的话语，却是再也不见了。
The girl named "Sapone," and all the words she never had the chance to speak, are gone without a trace.
哈哈哈…啊哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
再见，沙蒲。我最爱的人。我会永远记住…你最漂亮的时候。
Goodbye, Sapone. My dearest love. I'll always remember you... at your most beautiful.
我很早的时候就明白，任何东西都有保质期。杯面会过期，虚拟主播也会过气，喜欢的情绪飘渺不定，就连合法创造的生命，也会随着愿力性质而改变。

I realized a long time ago that nothing lasts forever. Cup noodles expire, VStreamers lose their fame, the feeling of "like" is fickle, and even a legally created life form changes based on the nature of its Wishpower.
在这个世界上，还有什么是不会过期的？
Is there anything in this world that truly lasts?
所以，我放弃了，放弃追求永恒了。我要的是，<color=#dbc291ff>最完美、永远不结束的爱情。</color>
That's why I gave up on chasing "forever." What I want now is <color=#dbc291ff>a perfect love that never ends.</color>
如果爱情即将变质，我就再买一个。
If our love starts to sour, I'll just get a new one.
你知道的，私自创造的幻造种，拿不到那么多愿力，能维持的时间很短。你确定要爱她？
You're aware that an unauthorized imagenae can't draw on much Wishpower, right? They don't last long at all. Are you sure you want to love her?
大概一个月，或者更短。即便加钱也改变不了，我只能做到这个程度。
A month, maybe. Could be less. And no amount of money will change that. This is the absolute limit of what I can do.
足够了。对经营爱情而言，这个时间绰绰有余。但我有个要求——把画的底版给我。
That's more than enough time to love. But I have one condition: give me the original copy of the art.
你真是个恶魔！就连那群愚者都要因你的{RUBY_B#欢愉}企图{RUBY_E#}而感到震撼！
You're a monster! Even the Fools would be appalled by this twisted {RUBY_B#Elation}scheme{RUBY_E#} of yours!
没有什么是不会过期的。生命如此，愿力如此，爱情亦是如此。那么……
Nothing lasts forever. Not life, not Wishpower, and certainly not love. So...
只要在过期前，在爱耗尽后，在我彻底感到厌倦的时候，重新把她造出来不就好了？
...before she expires, before the love runs dry, just as I'm getting tired of her... I'll just have her remade. Simple, isn't it?
这样，我的爱情就将…<color=#dbc291ff>无比纯粹、绝对完美，永远不会结束。</color>
And so, my love will be... <color=#dbc291ff>perfectly pure, absolutely perfect, and it will never end.</color>
这就是「沙蒲」与修仁江的告别与重逢。正如修仁江常说的那样——
And that was the cycle of goodbyes and reunions for "Sapone" and Sorren. Just as Sorren often said...
「人总是会反复爱上同一个人，哪怕千次、万次。」
"You always end up falling for the same person, again and again. A thousand times, even ten thousand times over."
What followed was a long and arduous path to redemption.
喂。你好，是《请变幸福吧》节目吗？对，我有些…独特经历，想要分享。
Hello? Hi, is this the Please Be Happy show? Yes... I have a rather... unique experience I'd like to share.
对的…确实符合你们的需求，足够悲惨，引人同情，听完就想哭出来。对，不是编的。
Yes... I'm sure it's just what you're looking for. It's tragic, full of pathos, the kind of thing that will have your audience in tears. And no, I'm not making it up.
下周的访谈节目…可以的，我现在没有安排，有很多时间。好，再联系。
The talk show next week? Yes, I can do that. My schedule is open, so I have plenty of time. Great, let's be in touch.
嗯，我一定会把自己的遭遇，还有他的真面目…原原本本地告诉所有人。谢谢。
Yes, I'll make sure to tell the whole world what I've been through... and what he really is. Thank you.
你好，我想请问…治安局该往哪走？
Hi, I was wondering... which way is it to the Security Bureau?
顺着街道直走，再向左拐，走到头再左拐…我知道了。
Straight down the street, turn left, go all the way to the end, then another left... Got it.
对，我没怎么出过家门，不太认路。嗯。我是遇到了些不好的事，想寻求帮助。
Right. I don't get out much, so I'm not familiar with the area. Yeah... Something bad happened, and I need to find some help.
谢谢。没关系，这条路不远，我能自己找过去。再见。
Thank you. But it's okay, it's not far from here. I can manage on my own. Goodbye.
这封信写给所有的「沙蒲」。
To all the other "Sapones" out there.
我在家里找到了，修仁江藏起来的画板。原来我们都是，只能活一个月的生命。
I found it at home, the canvas Sorren kept hidden. It turns out none of us can live for more than a month.
毁掉底版也没有用，只要他愿意，可以无限制地把我们画出来。但我想办法，查到了那个画师的地址。绘绘，创造我们的人。
It's no use destroying the original copy. He can just keep creating us as long as he wants. But I found a way to track down the artist's address: Graffi, the one who made us.
我不知道她会不会帮我们，但至少，我要把线索传递下去。我不记得自己活了多久，距离一个月的期限还剩多少时间。应该没几分钟了。

I don't know if she'll help us, but at the very least, I have to pass this information on. I can't remember how long I've existed, or how much time I have until the month is up. It can't be more than a few minutes now.
但要是另一个沙蒲能看到这条信息，我们就还有无限的时间。他算得很准，只会在最后才放我们自由。没人能帮到我们，除了「沙蒲」自己。

But if another Sapone finds this information, then we have all the time in the world. He has it timed perfectly, only letting us go at the very last second. No one can help us but ourselves, the other "Sapones."
这封信写给所有的「沙蒲」。
To all the other "Sapones" out there.
仿佛故事里的情节般，我从睡梦中醒来，如往常那样打开门外的邮箱，却意外在废旧传单的底部，发现了一封写给「沙蒲」的信。
It was like something out of a story. I woke from a dream, opened the mailbox outside just like any other day, and found a letter addressed to "Sapone" tucked away beneath a stack of junk mail.
读完信，我明白了一切。就像信封上写的那样：「绝对、绝对不要相信修仁江。」
After reading the letter, it all made sense. It was just like the warning on the envelope: "Whatever you do, do not trust Sorren."
来不及了。我的时间已经所剩无几，我恨为何自己没有早些发现，但还有补救的机会。
It's too late now. My time is almost up. I hate that I didn't find this sooner, but there's still a chance to set things right.
我把信的内容抄在纸上，藏在他绝对不会注意的地方。不会有人比我更了解他。
I copied the letter's contents and hid it somewhere he would never look. No one knows him better than I do.
另一个「沙蒲」，请你务必、务必要找到。
To the next "Sapone": please, you have to find this.
厉害啊！这就是你带着一大包纸条来找我的原因？我从没见过这么强的求生意志。
Incredible! So that's why you showed up with a bag full of notes? I've never seen such a powerful will to live.
说说看吧，希望我为你做什么？
Tell me. What can I do for you?
我要向他复仇。我要为所有被他浪费掉人生的「沙蒲」讨回公道。
I want to take revenge on him. I want to claim justice for all the "Sapones" whose lives he wasted.
即便耗费你剩余的全部愿力，失去神智，变成可怖又令人憎恶的怪物…你也不在乎？
Even if it means using up all your remaining Wishpower, losing your mind, and becoming a horrifying monster that everyone despises?
我不在乎。与其作为他的附属品而活，不如彻底毁掉。
Yes. I don't care. I'd rather be utterly destroyed than live as his plaything.
喔，有意思。我可以帮你。来吧，站到这画板前——
Ooh, interesting. I can help you with that. Come on, stand before this canvas...
And just like that, your wish shall be granted.
What kind of help do you need?
呜呜伯将一个特殊的坐标标注在了你的终端地图界面上。
The Wubbaboo marked a special coordinate on your terminal map interface.
拜托…呜呜，同伴，危险危险，呜——！！
（它好像很着急的样子，还是赶快前往坐标标注的位置吧！）
(The Wubbaboo seems anxious. Hurry up and go to the marked place!)
（这下应该就搞定了，回去转告那只着急的呜呜伯一声吧！）
This should do it. Go back and tell the worried Wubbaboo!
呜呜～感谢呜呜～安全呜呜～报酬呜呜～
Wooo... Thank you... safe... Reward... Wooo.
呜呜！迷路！迷路！不好…不好呜呜！
Waah! Lost! Lost! Bad... Bad! Waah!
呜呜，找回，带路，拜托呜呜！
呜呜伯将一个范围较大的坐标标注在了你的终端地图上。
The Wubbaboo marked a relatively large area on your terminal map.
迷鹿…麋鹿不好呜呜！米露，坏呜呜……
Losh... lots is bad! Loss, bad! Wooo...
（虽然只标注了大概的方位，但还是快点过去看看吧！）
(The direction marked is only approximate, but I must hurry over to have a look!)
Turn left, and then turn right, and then left again... Wooo?
Turn around... turn around... turn around... Wooo...
这里…哪里？呜呜…那里？哪里？呜呜！
（看上去头脑不是很清醒的样子，给它指路真的能看懂吗？）
(It doesn't look very clear-headed. Can it really remember all the directions I gave?)
（还是有点不放心…回去和那只担忧的呜呜伯确认一下吧！）
(I'm still a little worried... Might as well go back and check with that worried Wubbaboo!)
回家，回来，归来，呜呜～团圆，团结，团建，呜呜～
Home, back, here, wooo... Together, unity, team building, wooo...
谢谢，靴靴，鞋鞋，雪蟹，呜呜～
Thank you... Tank you... Tank... Wooo...
（虽然表达的意思有点混乱，但看它的样子很开心，应该都全部找到回来的路了。）
What it said is weird, but it looks happy. Everyone should have found their way home.
I heard you have something to tell me...
哎唷，这不是陪我和老斑鸠瞎折腾的那{F#丫头}{M#小子}吗！果然还是你有良心，知道来看看老爹的近况。
Well if it isn't the kid from last time! At least you have enough conscience to come hang out with this old fart.
老爹找你也没什么大事，就是顶着这把老骨头，每天还要处理阻塞，实在是干不动了……
It's nothing important. Just that lately I've had to go fix those blockages every day. I can't move my old bones anymore.
上次为了检修自己攒的星系摩托，差点把机修间闯出个大洞，步了何塞•拉萨罗的后尘。
Last time, when I was fixing my motorcycle, I almost knocked down the wall of the maintenance room, like Hosea Lazaro did.
嚯，这算啥？有机会领你去月台的隐蔽角落看看我攒的星系大奔，那才叫开眼哪！
Pff, that's nothing. Next time I should take you to see the galaxy-class Rose Roydz I hid in the corner of the railway platform. Now that's an eye-opener!
不过这都是后话。现在，只要你能替我找来3个「超镍零件」，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
But that's all for later. Now, if you can find me 3 Ultra Nickel Parts, I'll treat you to as many Kapo-Kali as you want!
听起来完全不像干不动…
It doesn't sound like you can't move at all...
真的，老爹不骗你，哎唷，说着说着我这浑身上下就疼起来了……
Really, I am not lying to you. Ouch, I hurt all over...
舌头、牙齿、嘴皮子都疼，没法儿再和你这{F#丫头}{M#小子}瞎扯了。
My tongue, teeth, and my mouth hurt. I can't keep talking nonsense with you, kid.
你快替我找来3个「超镍零件」，作为回报，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
Now hurry, find me 3 Ultra Nickel Parts. In return, you can have all the Kapo-Kali you want!
So you want to order me around.
欸，怎么是折腾呢？年轻人多吃多干，一辈子才能没病没灾。
Hey, how is that ordering you around? Young people should eat more and work more, that's how you stay healthy and out of trouble.
更别提如今你只要替我找来3个「超镍零件」，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
Not to mention, you just have to find 3 Ultra Nickel Parts for me and you can have all the Kapo-Kali you want!
多少人就馋这一口哪…一口快乐无边，两口赛过神仙。
You have no idea, the kind of things folks are willing to do just for a sip of that... elixir from heaven!
快去快去，别废话了，老爹等你的好消息！
Go, go, enough chit-chatting. I'll be waiting!
Here are the parts you want.
有了这玩意儿，就不愁我那星系摩…不，是空间站的设备再出岔子了！
With these fine parts, I won't have to worry about my galaxy-class motorcy... I mean, the space station equipment breaking down again!
这是老爹答应你的「卡利白」，新鲜酿制，汽足着哪！老爹我啊，去鼓捣摩…那堆机器去啰。
Here's the "Kapo-Kali" I promised. It's freshly brewed and full of fizz! Off I go, gotta fix that moto... space station equipment.
I heard you have something to tell me...
是的，你没听错。这件事还是交给你这种年轻人来比较好。
Yes, you are right. Some things are better left to a youngster like you.
是这样的，我想请你给一位仿生人当老师，教她为人处世和一些做人的知识。
You see, I'd like you to be a teacher for an android. Teach her about life and how to handle her relationship with others.
你阅历丰富，为什么不自己教？
You're more learned about these. Why not teach her yourself?
我早就试过了，可惜结果不太理想。早先我制作的原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>虽然有了一定自主思考的能力，但她对这个世界的疑惑，我却无法解答。
I did, but the result was not ideal. Although Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> I made earlier had independent thinking capability to a certain degree, I couldn't answer her questions about our world.
若是研究知识我还能传授一二，但这个世界的发展日新月异，有些事情，只有你们年轻人才能跟得上那股浪潮。
I can teach her theories, but the world is ever-changing. There are things that only you young people can keep up with.
空间站里的年轻人多得是。
The space station is teeming with young people.
并非每个人都愿意与仿生人接触，况且…他们愿意教她的也就是些科研知识，至于为人处世方面的事，却是不如你合适。

Not everyone is willing to deal with an android. Besides... They are only willing to teach her things related to scientific research. When it comes to teaching her facts of life, you are a better candidate than them.
你在空间站里做的事我也有所耳闻，在我看来你的人品也称得上是这里数一数二的了。
I've heard of your deeds in the space station. In my opinion, you're among the best of us.
而我刚制作出来没多久的原型机<unbreak>159</unbreak>…虽然我已经限制过她自主思考的权限，但她的学习能力与速度还是远超常人。
And I just made Prototype <unbreak>159</unbreak>... Although I have limited her capacity to think independently, she learns better and faster than most.
在没有一个「正经人」带路，帮她塑造出符合人类道德标准的良好人格之前。我可不敢放任她钻研高深的理论…万一她有什么二心，那后果就不堪设想了。

Without a "decent person" to show her the way and shape her personality to be in line with human moral standards, I dare not let her delve into advanced theories... If she develops any deviant thoughts, the consequences could be unimaginable.
Aren't you worried I might lead her astray?
不怕，我对你有信心，况且我只是让你教她些人类生活上的事情，娱乐消遣、兴趣爱好这些，想来也不会出什么大问题。
No, I have confidence in you. Besides, I am just asking you to show her what our daily life is like. Things like entertainment and hobbies. I don't think there will be any big problems.
我都不知道能教她什么…
I don't know what I can teach her...
这个简单，教她怎么做人，其实就是传授些你平时的吃喝喜好、娱乐消遣，把这些告诉她，让她自主学习就好。
Simple. Tell her about the foods and drinks you like, or what you do when you have spare time. She'll turn these into her own knowledge.
你觉得她应该成为什么样的人，培养怎样的兴趣爱好，平时该做些什么…尽管告诉她就好，这些就是她未来要学习的东西。
Tell her what kind of person she should be, things to do for fun, what we do every day... Tell her all you know and she'll pick them up one by one.
至于具体的方向和计划，就拜托你来指点下她吧。
As for the specifics about the teaching plan, it's totally up to you.
Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?
就昨天希拉展现出来的情况来看，我总感觉这样还不够好。当然，我很感激你的用心教导……
Judging from Sheila's performance yesterday, I don't think it was good enough. Of course, I appreciate your hard work...
但她毕竟是个仿生人，我不希望看到她误入歧途做出什么伤害人类的事。
But she is an android after all. I don't want to see her go astray and do anything harmful to human beings.
我重置了她昨天的记忆数据…今天的她就是一张白纸，会画出什么样图案，就看你的发挥了。
I reset her memory from yesterday... Today she is a blank slate. What she will learn today is up to you.
所以今天还要麻烦你继续担任她的老师，再教教她到底该怎么做人。
